“My Royal Majesty Empress, has anyone told you that when you encounter things related to the empire, you are always far-sighted, careful in calculation, and come up with smart strategies from time to time. Even if you are not a hyped top sage, you are by no means an idiot. But once you encounter personal feelings, you will be a total fool? Is this the legendary high IQ and low EQ?”

Catherine did not understand some vocabulary that was almost like a poisonous mocking, but her gaze was obviously colder, “I don’t have time to say this nonsense with you. What I want to listen to is your reply!”

“IQ is innate, and EQ is acquired. To be precise, this EQ is a bit ambiguous. Let’s just treat it as a feeling to relationship…”

“Since you can’t give me an answer, then let Shea come and talk to me.” Catherine’s voice became colder.

“Don’t be angry, Your Majesty Empress… Isn’t it just not using this big guy on the battlefield? Plus you must have whatever Shea has…” Chen Rui said with a grin, “I will promise you. But the second condition… Let’s tentatively set a 2-year time limit.”

Catherine thought about the time when she left that day. The voice of ‘2 years’ came from behind. She nodded and closed her eyes, “I’m going to rest, Sir Aguile. You can go back and report your task.”

Chen Rui turned around and walked a few steps before suddenly stopping, “The closest person in this world… I also lost it before. It was a life that I once regarded as my daughter. Although she has left me forever, she left an eternal imprint in my mind. Your success in Nirvana should be the result of this imprint, and a strange connection has also been formed between us. I believe you have sensed it. It is precisely because I have lost it, that’s why I will cherish it even more. Lastly, the ‘illusion’ you have seen before is not necessarily an illusion. Perhaps it has now become a real existence.”

As the footsteps walked away, Catherine slowly opened her eyes as she looked at the castle in the sky under the purple moonlight.

chapters.title: Chapter 757: Explanation And Peace Talk
chapters.body:
Chapter 757: Explanation And Peace Talk

Chapter 757: Explanation and Peace Talk

Another barrack under the purple moon sky.

“Father.” Teris bowed and saluted respectfully.

Raizen glanced at Teris, “Do you know why I summoned you?”

“Even if father doesn’t summon me, I will also come to father.” Teris looked very sincere, “First of all, I want to plead guilty to father. As the deputy commander of the southern expedition, the army I lead failed many times at the Warlock Fortress. I still couldn’t conquer the fortress even when father personally came. I have really let down father’s trust.”

Raizen shook his head, “George of the Warlock Fortress is a famous general. Besides, Empress Shea is presiding in person, plus Aguile and the others who have strange strengths. It is really difficult to conquer it in a short time. There is also a factor of my underestimation of the enemy. Besides… you are just a deputy commander. It is not your turn to take this responsibility.”

“Then, the second thing I want to report to father is about Brother Aleus… Recently, there have been rumors spreading around in the army, saying that it was because of the fight for the inheritor that I tried to plot against brother. These kinds of rumors get more complicated the more I try to explain, so I have remained silent. In fact… the cause of brother’s death is very complicated. I will explain everything to father now. If father wants to punish me, I will not complain.”

“Say it, I’m listening.” Raizen nodded slowly.

“There are a few things that I don’t want to hide from father. I guess father should be training in the deepest part of the Dark Furnace. When I came out of closed training, the war between eldest brother and second brother had reached the most intense situation. Eldest brother seemed to be very concerned about father’s situation and asked me a lot of questions. I told him the truth, saying that I was training on the periphery and I have never seen father. In the days that followed, eldest brother tried to test me several times. After confirming my answer, he put his guard down and invited me to put down second brother’s rebellion together. However, after I assisted eldest brother in conquering the Iron Fist City, there was news of father coming out of training. Although eldest brother tried to cover it up, I still found many anomalies. For example, his emotions seem to fluctuate very sharply…Teris’ words made Raizen’s eyes squirt slightly, “Go on. “

“Later, he took the initiative to ask father to be the chief commander to attack the Warlock Fortress and let me be his deputy. However, during the siege, eldest brother always refused to listen to my tactical opinions, and he just ordered the army to attack. I feel…” Teris seemed a little hesitant.

“What do you feel?” Raizen frowned, “You don’t have to worry about it.”

“It seems that eldest brother is deliberately exhausting our elite army, and he seems to be delaying the time. I have never figured out why he has such intentions.” Teris lowered his head, “I have been in a dilemma for a long time. When I want to talk to eldest brother frankly, I discovered a strange thing. Brother was manipulating a kind of light with strange rune in it. The rune finally burst, and eldest brother’s eyes turned into a strange silver… Raizen’s eyes flashed sharply. Although his facial expression did not change, his fists were clenched tightly.

“After eldest brother activated this kind of strength, I was noticed by him, then eldest brother… lost his temper and wanted to kill me. I could only resist, but I was not the opponent of eldest brother and I was knocked down by him. When I asked eldest brother why did he do this, he just said that I would be the biggest obstacle to his succession of the empire. Just when he was going to kill me, he seemed to be suddenly recoiled by some kind of power. He fell to the ground. His breath quickly declined, then he fell into a certain kind of illusion and inexplicably started saying that he is playing with, to unify the Demon Realm, and in the end… With that said, Teris took out something from the space ring. This was a crystal coffin with Aleus’ corpse. The coffin should be a special item as the corpse did not decay, especially his face that was still life-like.

Raizen stood up, walked slowly to the crystal coffin, and glanced at Aleus’s body. His eyes were intertwined with complicated gazes.

“When I went to see eldest brother, those elite guards could testify… But speaking of it, I was indirectly responsible for eldest brother’s death.” Teris lowered his head with a sad expression, “In fact, after I broke through in the Dark Furnace, I also regarded eldest brother as a competitor. It’s just that I want to beat eldest brother in an upright manner, definitely not… a result that cannot be called a victory like this.”

Raizen retracted his gaze that was looking at the crystal coffin and sighed, “I also heard about Aleus excluding you on the front line. I will further verify this matter. If what you say is true, then you are not responsible. Leave the coffin here. You can retreat first.”

“Thank you, father!” Teris showed joy as he walked to the gate of the camp, and he suddenly turned around, “Father, please forgive me for asking, is what Catherine said during the day is true? Your body…”

Raizen glanced at Teris lightly and did not say anything. Teris seemed to sigh softly as he bowed and left.

Raizen did not look at Teris’ distant figure, but he looked directly at Aleus’ peaceful expression in the coffin. He placed his hand on the coffin lid and gently closed his eyes, letting the moonlight shining into the camp pull his shadow long.

The next day, Town Nimbus.

The building in the town, which was initially the temporary headquarters of the Bloody Empire Army, ushered in new ‘guests’.

The hall of the headquarters had been emptied, and a huge round table was placed with throne seats on the 3 corners. There were only 3 seats in the entire hall because in front of these 3 people, others were not qualified to sit down.

Soon, the 3 seats were occupied by its masters. After the successful peace talk in the Dark Shadow Empire 300 years ago, the leaders of the 3 empires finally gathered together again. The content of this meeting was also regarding peace.

Teris stood by Raizen’s side while Chen Rui who was wearing a mask stood beside Shea. Catherine’s side was the Demon Emperor-level confidant, Liliz, who rushed to the fortress last night.

“Your Majesty Raizen, Your Majesty Shea.” Catherine said under the veil, “I believe both of you are very aware of the current situation. The war between the 2 empires has deviated from the original intention of the war. If it continues, it will not only be the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire, the entire Demon Realm will also fall into a protracted war. I believe this situation is something we as the 3 rulers don’t want to see.”

Shea nodded, “I agree with Your Majesty Catherine’s point of view. Although the Fallen Angel Empire is a victim in this war, if we insist on retaliating with hatred, then it will never be possible to achieve true peace. I hope the people of the 3 empires can live and work in peace and contentment instead of being trapped in endless wars.”

“As long as the 3 empires exist, then the war is only a matter of time.” Raizen’s attitude was very unfriendly, “Only the eliminated empire and the establishment of a unified government can enable the people to truly enjoy peace and stability.”

Catherine said calmly, “Everyone understands this truth, but no one wants to be united by the will of others, and the Bloody Empire does not have the ability to swallow the other 2 empires at the same time. Similarly, neither the Dark Shadow Empire nor the Fallen Angel Empire has the ability. If we insist on going our own way, it will be an unimaginable disaster for the people of the 3 empires.”

“If I let go now, it will be a real disaster for the Bloody Empire.” Raizen said coldly, “Your Majesty Catherine, I don’t know how long you will rule the Dark Shadow Empire as an empress, but I can be sure that you are already the most terrifying enemy even when I’m still in the Bloody Empire now; as for Your Majesty Shea, although your personal strength is not worth mentioning, the economic development momentum of the Fallen Angel Empire is fastest among the 3 empires. The military potential should not be underestimated too. As long as you are given time to develop, you will become a powerful empire no less than the Dark Shadow Empire among the 3 empires, then the Bloody Empire will become the weakest one in the 3 empires. By then, today’s role may be reversed, and I will never sit back and watch this day come.”

“Your Majesty Raizen thinks too highly of the Fallen Angel Empire, and you underestimated the Bloody Empire.” Shea shook her head, “While the Fallen Angel Empire is developing, the Bloody Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire are not stagnating; all are also progressing. The Dark Shadow Empire has Her Majesty Catherine, the top sage, and the Bloody Empire, in addition to Your Majesty, the top powerhouse, has His Highness Teris, who has been hailed as the Demon Realm’s top genius for many years. Whether in ability or wisdom, he can become Your Majesty’s best helper. The Demon Realm in the future should be a world of rapid development and common prosperity, rather than endless chaos and war…”

“Your Majesty Shea is right.” Catherine promptly said, “As for Your Majesty Raizen’s physical condition, Prince Consort Aguile of the Fallen Angel Empire should have a solution. Is Your Majesty Raizen willing to accept this help? “

Raizen sneered coldly, “Is this a threat?”

“Please forgive me for my rudeness, Your Majesty Raizen.” Chen Rui spoke up, “This is not a threat, but a help to a friendly neighbor. Of course, if it is an enemy, I believe no one here will do such a foolish thing.”

“Still threatening.” Raizen sneered coldly, “But it sounds like you seem to have the confidence to dispel the abnormality in me?”

“If the vitality is weakened, then there is at least 1 way to extend it. If it is possible, Your Majesty can talk to me about this issue privately.” Chen Rui didn’t want to easily reveal the existence of the longevity potion. Furthermore, Catherine said before that the longevity potion might not be able to cure the root cause, but the symptom treatment should not be a big problem, so Chen Rui’s answer was vaguely affirmative.

“There is nothing convenient or inconvenient. This is a kind of curse. It is a mixture of the strength of the dark element and the light element. Since the Mammon Royal Family has the talent of [Dark Mastery], the dark element curse is fine.” Raizen glanced at Chen Rui contemptuously, “Are you sure, can solve the light element curse that troubles a kingdom-level powerhouse?”

“If Your Majesty is sure that it is a light element curse…” Chen Rui’s eyes lit up behind the mask, “Then, I have 100% confidence.”

Raizen was moved slightly and stared at the mask closely, “100%?”

Chen Rui looked at Raizen without fear with strong confidence in his voice, “If I said 100%, then it is 100%.”

When Teris next to Raizen heard these words, a cold light flashed past his eyes suddenly. They instantly became fierce and determined as if he had made a certain determination.

chapters.title: Chapter 758: Surprising Change
chapters.body:
Chapter 758: Surprising Change

Chapter 758: Surprising Change

Raizen finally retracted his gaze at Chen Rui and slowly nodded. From his eyes, he could see that this Aguile’ was definitely not boasting, but he was truly sure.

Of course, Chen Rui was sure. Not to mention anything else, the light element curse… with the Snow Dallet Flower, it is really easy peasy. This time, even the longevity potion does not need to be exposed.

After this interlude, Raizen’s negotiating attitude had obviously eased a bit. This matter was not only related to his life, but also related to the fate of the Bloody Empire as a whole. Judging from the current strength, if he hadn’t been in the empire, the Bloody Empire was likely to face the danger of being destroyed by the Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire.

Raizen was not good at eloquence. Teris next to him was in charge of ‘bargaining’ for the Bloody Empire. Teris’ eloquence and ability to negotiate were indeed outstanding, but what the Bloody Empire required was not a peaceful covenant, but a temporary armistice agreement, and the conditions were very harsh, making it difficult for the 3 parties to reach a consensus for a while.

However, it was a good start that the 3 empires deescalated from using the army to sitting down and talking. The key was that Chen Rui was confident to cure Raizen. Although there was no result, the prospect of the whole negotiation seemed bright.

After the fruitless morning ended, the 2 parties agreed to continue the negotiation on the second day. The fierce verbal battle and the uncompromising contention were comparable to the battlefield filled with smoke. The stalemate continued until the third day where they finally began to break the ice.

“The Fallen Angel Empire currently masters a series of technologies such as battle ball, magic television, aromatic millet wine, soil improvement, and so on. These must be shared by the Bloody Empire, and the same is true for the new things that emerged during the armistice.” Teris’ condition was almost exactly the same as Catherine previously. They obviously attached great importance to these technologies. Although this young prince was very good at ‘copycat’ culture, ‘copycat’ was not omnipotent as some ‘high-tech’ technical links couldn’t be solved.

Take the battle ball as an example. The venue and competition rules were easy to plagiarize, but the production technology of the ball couldn’t be imitated. The flexibility and durability of the local battle ball produced by the Bloody Empire were far inferior to that of the original version by the Fallen Angel Empire. The ball often exploded after being kicked in the game while the balls ‘imported’ from the Fallen Angel Empire would not.

“Battle ball can be considered, but we will not provide technology for magic television, aromatic millet wine and soil improvement crystal. We will only provide limited quantities of finished products.” Chen Rui immediately rejected Teris’ proposal. Teris’s negotiation skills were very smart. Chen Rui had suffered several losses throughout the confrontation in these few days, but Shea was still very accurate in grasping the general direction. Generally speaking, the progress of the negotiation was fairly smooth.

“Then let’s make a compromise. The Fallen Angel Empire provides the technology of aromatic millet wine. As for soil improvement, we can follow the example of the cooperation between your empire and the Dark Shadow Empire to proceed in batches.” Teris did not wait for Chen Rui to answer and changed the topic abruptly, “By the way, isn’t the Fallen Angel Empire hosting the Demon Realm’s potioneer contest next year? Why not let all 3 empires organize it? It will be a major event in the Demon Realm. The Fallen Angel Capital can hold a 3-empire joint trade fair a month before the contest.”

“I think His Highness Teris’ proposal for a joint contest and trade fair is very good.” Catherine said, and Teris lowered his head with a smile to express his gratitude. “Not only the potioneer contest, even the mechanic contest can be included to become the alchemist contest that is divided into 2 levels- alchemist and alchemist master. The 3 capitals can take turns to hold it once every few years.

This will not only improve the Demon Realm’s alchemy level through exchanges and competitions, but it also strongly promotes economic development. “

“I agree with Your Majesty Catherine’s proposal.” Shea agreed, “The first alchemy contest will be held in the Fallen Angel Empire. It will be organized together with the potioneer contest which is originally scheduled 7 months later. The 3 empires’ Alchemist Association can jointly release the contest notice.”

Chen Rui thought of the betting agreement with Saman and nodded slightly.

Teris added, “It’s not just alchemy, but also the battle ball. The battle ball league of the Demon Realm’s 3 empires. During the truce, this will become another form of war - a war that everyone welcomes.”

This proposal made Shea and Catherine nod at the same time. Raizen, who liked battle ball, also nodded slightly.

Teris changed his tone and turned back to the previous topic, “Since the 3 Royal Majesty agree, then the Fallen Angel Empire should provide magic television related technology so that more people can participate in this competition.”

“Alright, we can provide magic television related technology, but I have a requirement that the 2 empires must not ban the broadcast of the Fallen Angel Empire’s television programs. Of course, the Fallen Angel Empire will not ban the 2 empire’s programs. There are also some television programs that we spend a lot of money on, such as the previous concert. These programs are now played for free. In order to recover the cost, we will selectively charge in the future, This fee cannot be discounted neither for the Dark Shadow Empire nor the Bloody Empire.”

Teris thought for a while. As long as I mastered the technology of magic television, my empire could also host and broadcast similar programs in the future. Therefore, he agreed. Catherine also had similar ideas as Teris, but she always felt that Chen Rui’s request might have other objectives, but now it was a major issue related to the peace talk, plus there were no pitfalls in this request, so she agreed.

The 2 sides reached more and more consensus, and the peace talk gradually went smoothly. While listening, the recorder behind speedily recorded and sorted the conditions for the final agreement to be signed.

At this moment, a servant came to Teris’ side and whispered a report. Teris bowed to the 3 rulers, “Please excuse me.”

Teris went out for a moment, then he hurried into the hall again and whispered in Raizen’s ear.

Raizen’s facial expression changed, and he glared at Shea and Catherine as a terrifying coercion surged at them. Chen Rui stepped forward and blocked in front of Shea, “Your Majesty Raizen, what do you mean?!”

Raizen said coldly, “I should ask you this sentence!”

Catherine had an ominous omen and asked, “What actually happened?”

Teris spoke up, “Just now I received a report from General Gustav saying that he found that a powerful magic enchantment was set up nearby. Part of it has been triggered. Now everything here has been completely isolated from the outside world!”

“Powerful magic enchantment?” Chen Rui didn’t expect this kind of incident to happen, “What is going on?”

Teris sneered, “General Gustav wanted to break through the magic enchantment, and he was seriously injured by recoil only when he touched it. Except for the Fallen Angel Empire’s powerful magician who defeated more than 30 Demon Overlords, I can’t imagine anyone else who can do this! If you really want a truce or even peace, how can you set up this kind of enchantment?! Obviously, you want to kill my father and I, then annex the Bloody Empire all at once!”

Raizen stood up slowly without speaking as his body was already surging with a powerful strength wave. The hall was instantly filled with rich malicious intent.

“Raizen! Don’t be fooled!” Catherine shouted, “If we really want to join forces to deal with you, why would we bring these few people now?! Do you think just a few of us can kill you?”

Shea also spoke up, “Town Nimbus has always been occupied by the Bloody Empire Army during this period. Even this negotiation room is your choice!”

“You did this deliberately because you wouldn’t choose to fight head-on! If it weren’t seen through by General Gustav earlier, there must be a lot of schemes!” Teris shouted, “Father, just in case, let’s leave here first!”

The whole ground shook as if there was a big explosion. Everyone was unstable as the room was filled with exclamations and shouting.

The voice quickly weakened and actually disappeared in the end, showing a strange tranquility.

Chen Rui was taken aback. In the negotiation of the 3 empires’ rulers, such a thing would actually happen! It is definitely not Catherine and Shea, so is it Raizen’s own planning?

As Raizen yelled, the entire hall was torn apart. Countless broken tiles shot out in all directions and shattered without a trace. The smoke dissipated. Apart from the initial few people in the hall, there was actually no living person nearby.

Surrounded by the strange breath of coldness, the weaker secretary and several guards trembled as their bodies quickly became stiff, and they fell to the ground in an instant as if their vitality had been devoured by the intangible power.

Liliz, who was next to Catherine, was just the strength of the Demon Emperor. Even though the power of Nirvana could restrain this kind of breath, she couldn’t help showing an uncomfortable expression.

A prompt of ‘unknown energy invasion’ appeared in Chen Rui’s consciousness. He immediately activated the Super System to absorb that energy. At the same time, he held Shea’s hand and passed the power to help her alleviate the strange erosion force.

Teris shuddered as he seemed to be resisting the cold air. All of a sudden, he spat out a mouthful of blood, and said anxiously, “Father, I don’t know what ambush they have! You leave first!”

“Damn it!” Raizen guarded Teris behind his back. He launched a punch with purple light at Catherine across the distance.

The [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] appeared in front of Catherine, blocked the punch, and she shouted, “Raizen, don’t you understand? We are all being set up! I feel that the power here is very strange. Let’s leave here together first!”

Raizen thought for a while, and he finally nodded.

Suddenly, everyone’s body was wrapped in a black electric spark.

Catherine and Raizen reacted fastest, showing the power of Nirvana and surging bloody energy to block the lightning. However, this black lightning seemed to have an irresistible corrosive force, and it carried a peculiar law power. Both of them looked strenuous, and their complexion changed at the same time.

Even the 2 kingdom-level powerhouses were like this, not to mention the others were even worse. Liliz couldn’t bear it as she slowly fell to the ground while her body was shivering; Teris also tremblingly leaned on a broken pillar with a pale facial expression. He revealed an extremely painstaking expression.

Chen Rui’s defensive shield was quickly eroded and shattered. Although the power that invaded his body could be absorbed by the Super System, the external pressure couldn’t be absorbed.

“There is actually a breath of faith…” Chen Rui frowned. At this time, the [Analytical Eyes] suddenly experienced a data change which shocked him as he shouted, “Teris! It’s actually you!”

Prior to this, Teris’ strength has always been S- in the [Analytical Eyes], and there was no bracket that represented hidden strength. He unexpectedly became S++!

Race: Mammon Royal Family.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S++(S-)

Physique: S++(S-), Strength: S++(S-), Spirit: S++(S-), Speed: S++(S-)

[Analysis]: Dark attribute, unknown.

Degree of danger: High.

This climb from S- to S++ should not be a real increase in strength, but a buff under certain conditions, just like the Pope Vantis whom Chen Rui encountered at the Holy Light Mountain. The ‘unknown’ in the analysis was also confusing.

Teris’ S++ strength was completely inconsistent with the painful appearance he showed at this time. Chen Rui could sense that that faint breath of faith was released from Teris!

Speaking of the sensing of faith power, even Raizen and Catherine, who had just advanced to the kingdom level, couldn’t compare with Chen Rui, so he immediately shouted it out.

Teris was taken aback. Looking at Chen Rui’s keen gaze, he suddenly smiled. He slowly stood up straight as the black electric spark on his body disappeared, and a faint majesty appeared in his eyes, which was completely different from the usual elegance, “Good eyesight. I didn’t expect that it would be you, not Catherine, who sees through me first.”

Catherine and Raizen were shocked at the same time. Just as they were about to make a move, the lightning strength suddenly increased dozens of times, so the 2 couldn’t move for a while. Even the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] was imprisoned by a special power.

“Unfortunately, it’s too late.” Teris shook his head, “Raizen, Catherine, actually you 2 surprised me. Catherine actually completed the fifth Nirvana, and Raizen is even more remarkable. You actually forcibly broke through to the kingdom level in Dark Furnace which I did some tricks to it. Unfortunately, you are all going to die today because I don’t need your submission; I only need destruction.”

“Teris!” Raizen showed a disbelief gaze. It turns out that the trap that I suffered in the Dark Furnace was actually planned by this youngest son! In this way, other things…···

“Raizen, you guessed it.” Teris seemed to see through Raizen’s thoughts, “I planned the dispute between Edmund and Aleus, and I personally killed Aleus. The fact that you came out of training surprised me, so I arranged something in the Town Nimbus long ago, and I always wanted to lead you here. What made me even more surprised was that in addition to you, the big fish, this net also caught 2 other fishes. In fact, what I am doing is very risky, but if 3 empires can really restore peace, then my years of painstaking efforts will be in vain, so I made a move. Fortunately, I succeeded. As long as I kill all of you, the following matters will be much easier; I can easily unify the Demon Realm.”

“Just you alone?” Catherine said, “Don’t say whether the ambush you set up can kill us, even if it can be done, do you think you can really unify the 3 empires?”

“A person’s strength is limited, so I have been managing it for 300 years.” Teris smiled confidently, “I forgot to tell you that I have another identity which is the master of ‘the Bloodfall.”

chapters.title: Chapter 759: [Dream Galaxy Territory]
chapters.body:
Chapter 759: [Dream Galaxy Territory]

Chapter 759: [Dream Galaxy Territory]

The amount of information revealed by Teris’ words was too great. For a while, everyone was dumbfounded.

The Bloody Empire’s Young Prince Teris, manipulated the internal strife of the Bloody Empire, killed Great Prince Aleus, and planned today’s astonishing plan to ambush the 3 rulers. What was even more unbelievable was that the Demon Realm’s top genius was actually even the mastermind behind the ‘Bloodfall’ organization that attempted to subvert the 3 empires!

The supreme ruler of the 3 empires ultimately fell into the hands of the mysterious master of the Bloodfall.

“Don’t waste your effort.” Teris sneered and looked at Catherine and Raizen who were resisting the black lightning with all their strength. “This is the Bloodfall enchantment launched by the law artifact, the Bloodfall Orb. With your current strength, you can’t break free. Your strength and vitality will be gradually reduced in this law enchantment until you are annihilated.”

“Law artifact?” Catherine, who was preparing to counterattack, was surprised, “How can you use the law artifact? It’s impossible with the secret technique alone!”

“The name of this organization, Bloodfall, is more than just a name… Over the past few hundred years, although the faith power it has provided cannot be compared with those so-called religions, it is enough to awaken this artifact. I used about 2 million lives as sacrifices for the secret techniques from 3 sources of darkness. With the help of a person, I can finally activate this artifact once with all my strength.

There was only 1 chance, and I grasped it. “

The source of darkness! Chen Rui was trying his best to resist the Bloodfall Orb. Hearing this familiar term, he suddenly thought of something, and his whole body shuddered.

The Blue Lava Estate! Town Lupin!

Chen Rui, Athena, and Paglio led an army to Town Lupin in the Blue Lava Estate back then to investigate. When Chen Rui arrived in Town Lupin, this large town with a population of nearly 300,000 suffered a terrifying extinction, and all the creatures in the town died. The reason was that the area where Town Lupin was located had the most rich source of darkness underground. In order to recover the damage suffered in the Elemental War, Dark Elemental King Hegel killed all the lives that received the breath of the source of darkness and sacrificed it with a secret method.

At that time, the Water Elemental King also said that Hegel’s recovery did not need to sacrifice so many lives. The reason why the whole town was wiped out was because another person needed this dark elemental strength to break through the bottleneck…

Then this person…

“Teris! It turns out that you are the real culprit of Town Lupin’s extinction!”

Chen Rui gritted his teeth and shouted as he felt an incomparable anger burning in his chest.

He always thought that Hegel was the biggest culprit, and he hated this kind of behavior, so even though he experienced life and death together with Hegel in the Dead Sea, the 2 were never able to become friends. It now seems that the real mastermind is Teris!

“Yes, it’s me.” Teris smiled slightly, “To be precise, apart from helping me to control the Bloodfall Orb once, the sacrifices of lives also have an important function, which is to activate the soul power to transform my physique so that I can break through the training bottleneck, make up for the only flaw in this body, and successfully reach the level of Demon Overlord or even higher…”

Raizen and Catherine both frowned while Shea, who had been silent for a long time, showed a shocked expression, “For this reason, you killed so many innocent lives?”

2 million lives! In Chen Rui’s concept, the city where he lived in his previous life had a population of only 600,000, which was equivalent to massacring a few cities!

Calculated by this number, many more innocent people were slaughtered than Town Lupin in the remaining 2 places with the source of darkness! So many innocent people lost their lives just for his breakthrough of the bottleneck and a chance to use the artifact!

“This question is too naive. Don’t forget, you are a ruler. Meaningless feelings and compassion will only become restraining shackles!” Teris’ tone to Shea was more like a reprimand. His gaze turned into contempt as he looked at Raizen and Catherine, “As for both of you, don’t be hypocritical. Aren’t your hands covered with blood too? The lives that were directly or indirectly killed in the battles and wars launched by an empire for various reasons are way more than this number.”

Teris seemed to be downplaying it as if he had just trampled to death a few trivial ants. “In fact, killing 1-2 people and killing 10,000 or 20,000 people is only a change in numbers. The same is true for 100,000 and millions. Trivial matters should be put aside to accomplish great matters. No pain no gain. For my great cause, appropriate sacrifices are inevitable… At this time, all the members of the Bloodfall in the 3 empires should be dispatched, and the 3 empires have fallen into chaos. Although you have cleared a lot of the Bloodfall forces, most of them are known strengths. How can the spies I planted with 300 years of meticulous planning be removed in a short time? Once you die, with my identity as the prince of the Bloody Empire and the strength at hand, I will soon be able to lead the Bloody Empire to wipe out the 3 empires and unify the Demon Realm!”

“Wait!” Catherine suddenly reacted, “Teris is only 200 years old now. You said that you have run the Bloodfall for 300 years! You’re not Teris! Who are you?”

Teris smiled with his habitual elegance, “I’m the true Teris. Mammon. Raizen is my biological father. There is no doubt that he grew up watching me. It’s just that… the world is unpredictable. Some changes are beyond your expectations and imagination. Catherine, I know you have been trying to divert my attention, but unfortunately, these tricks are futile… No matter who I am, I’m a winner and you all are the losers. Your corpses will only be my stepping stone.”

A mask suddenly appeared on Chen Rui’s face. He quickly devoured the nearby spirit power and soul strength like a whale absorbing water. However, the enchantment power of the Bloodfall Orb did not change in the slightest. Obviously, it was not affected by the mask’s strange power.

“You are no doubt the Beelzebub remnants of Glorfin.” Teris smiled with a special kind of disdain, “Unfortunately, having only 1 of the 7 artifacts can only be regarded as a quasi-artifact, and it cannot compete with the strength of the law artifact. However, under the might of the Bloodfall Orb, even Catherine and Raizen can’t activate the 7 artifacts. You can actually activate the God-Eating Mask which surprised me a bit. It’s a pity that with your strength, what can you do even if you get rid of the enchantment?”

As soon as he finished speaking, there were countless stars around him. Teris’ laughter stopped abruptly. He sensed that in the Bloodfall enchantment, his breath had also seemed to be weakened. A surprise flashed in his eyes.

At the same time, the black lightning on Catherine and Raizen was forcibly suppressed as their momentum suddenly flourished. It turned out that Chen Rui didn’t want to break free from the enchantment. Instead, he used [Galaxy Territory] to help Raizen and Catherine!

Raizen and Catherine had been accumulating power to make the biggest counterattack, Now with the buff of the [Galaxy Territory] power, they burst out their power.

There was a black flame in Catherine’s hand. This flame seemed inconspicuous, but it was an extremely refined power of Nirvana. At the same time, Raizen’s fist with a purple glow came to Teris swiftly - a concise and deadly punch!

Although Catherine and Raizen weren’t in their peak stage, the attacks consisted the huge kingdom power of the 2 powerhouses, which was definitely not something a Demon Overlord could resist. As long as one was hit, even Chen Rui with a special physique would definitely die if he could not use the [Star Diversion] or the God-Eating Mask.

At the critical moment, Teris watched as the black flame and purple light approached as if it was too late to react.

Seeing that they were about to succeed, the facial expressions of Catherine and Raizen suddenly changed at the same time.

Chen Rui only felt a blur, and Teris had disappeared unbelievably on the spot. The nearby scene turned into a huge brilliant river.

The river was composed of countless starlight. Unlike the brilliance of the [Pole Star Transformation], this galaxy emitted a dreamlike and beautiful crystal light.

The galaxy oscillated with a strange rhythm which contained a mysterious rhyme. The black flame and purple light which had the absolute upper hand in strength seemed to gradually slow down like in a quagmire.

Immediately afterward, the galaxy had a strange distortion. The black flame and purple light that were supposed to destroy the galaxy unexpectedly twisted and intertwined in an unbelievable way. The galaxy in the sky was still crystal clear like a god overlooking everything below.

“Damn!” Chen Rui regained his senses abruptly. Raizen’s fist rushed straight to Catherine while Catherine’s black flame attacked Raizen.

Due to the law power of the Bloodfall Orb, Catherine was unable to control the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] nor did she have the extra energy to activate the [Fire Phoenix’s Yearning], so she could only forcefully resist it in haste.

Raizen’s power and strength were originally superior to her. Although this [Thunder Emperor Seal] was not as deadly as the last time, it also caused her to suffer serious injury. In the muffled sound, her veil already had a touch of blood. The pressure of the black lightning around her seemed to multiply. Even with the buff of the [Galaxy Territory], she couldn’t move anymore.

Raizen wasn’t anywhere better, the injury caused by this [Flame of Nirvana] was even worse than Catherine’s.

In addition to the power of the [Flame of Nirvana], a certain curse that had been suppressed seemed to be agitated because of it. The silver light in his eyes flickered frequently as his body trembled violently. His facial expression was abnormally pale, and he could only suppress the curse while desperately resisting the Bloodfall Orb’s terrifying pressure. With this kind of double injury, he was no longer able to attack.

Raizen and Catherine were simultaneously shocked. There was more of a kind of disbelief in their gaze. It seemed that they had seen something that was impossible to appear. In the next second, their 2 voices had already exclaimed in unison, “[Dream Galaxy Territory]!”

The dreamlike glitter of the galaxy gradually disappeared and returned to the figure of Teris. Teris slowly wiped off the blood from the corner of his mouth as his gaze became deeper and deeper. There was a sense of arrogance in the profound voice that was completely different from the original one, “Raizen, Catherine, we have been fighting for so many years, and in the end, I won.”

chapters.title: Chapter 760: Ruthless Hero
chapters.body:
Chapter 760: Ruthless Hero

Chapter 760: Ruthless Hero

Chen Rui didn’t understand what happened for a while, but seeing Raizen’s rare shocked expression and Catherine’s horrified gaze behind her veil, it must be an unbelievable truth.

“How could you possibly be him!” Raizen shouted angrily, ignoring his injuries. He clenched his fists until they turned white. He wanted to break free, but the black lightning shone and suppressed him again. There were blood spills from his face.

“Nothing is impossible.” Teris shook his head, “Raizen, you are still the same. I told you when I was fighting against the human world, a ruler should always keep calm and be merciless. You are too arrogant and too obsessed with the pursuit of personal strength. In fact, you are more suitable to be a fighter than a ruler.”

Since Raizen and Catherine yelled out the 3 words [Dream Galaxy Territory], Shea’s facial expression became weird. Now, although ‘Teris’ evaluation of Raizen was pertinent, it faintly criticized Raizen’s remark on Shea as ‘not a qualified ruler’.

Meanwhile, Catherine had recovered from the shock, and she smiled bitterly, “Although it is unbelievable… you are right, you won this war, Midnight Sun.”

Midnight Sun! The name Catherine said made Chen Rui confused in an instant.

The great man of the past generation, the Demon Realm’s top powerhouse, the Lord and God of War of the Fallen Angel Empire, Midnight Sun Lucifer?

The Lord of Midnight Sun, who has become a legend, is actually the ‘Teris’ in front of us? This is ridiculous!

No wonder Catherine and Raizen showed that expression.

Midnight Sun should have died in the war when attacking the human world more than 300 years ago. When Midnight Sun died, the power of the Fallen Angel Empire was seized by Obsidian. Midnight Sun’s son, Shea’s father Grimm, was driven to the dilapidated Dark Moon Estate, where he began a life of oppression and died of it in the end. It was not until the Shea’s generation that she regained the throne, but suddenly a man came back from the dead… grandfather? This grandfather used Teris’ body and even called Raizen as ‘father’ for 200 years?

Chen Rui felt his brain was in a mess, then Catherine’s voice sounded, “Are you Midnight Sun or Teris?”

“I’m Teris. Mammon and Midnight Sun Lucifer.” Teris replied calmly.

“Possession and reborn?” Chen Rui couldn’t help but blurt out.

“I don’t know what possession is, but it is not considered reborn because although my body was destroyed in the war back then, my soul was lucky enough to be saved.” Teris’ eyes were fixed on Raizen’s face, “Raizen, your son Teris is also in this body. It’s just that his soul gave the dominance to me now. Most of the time, I am in a deep sleep state. Your son is indispensable for the Bloodfall’s current situation… including your current desperate situation.”

Raizen gritted his teeth and tried his best to endure the internal and external suffering as he shouted, “What actually happened?”

Teris said unhurriedly, “300 years ago, our army was defeated in the human world. By chance, I got the Bloodfall Orb and… for some special reasons, I was assaulted by a super powerhouse and died.” Teris seemed unwilling to mention the specific course of this incident, “Fortunately, my soul remained attached to the Bloodfall Orb and was kept by someone until the army was defeated and returned to the Demon Realm. You also know this person, Ragnaros. Samael.”

“Ragnaros!” Catherine realized something, “The former patriarch of the Samael Royal Family!”

Teris went on to say that the Wrath Empire was destroyed by the Mammon Family. The Samael Royal Family, who loved their homeland and were unwilling to give in, had always been the thorn for the Bloody Empire’s emperor. If it were not for the secret support of Midnight Sun, they would have fallen to Raizen’s bloody method. Although Midnight Sun had his own motive, it was an indisputable fact that he did a great favor to the entire Samael Royal Family.

After the defeat in the human world, Ragnaros took the Bloodfall Orb back to the Demon Realm. Although the soul of Midnight Sun survived by chance, it was severely damaged. He had been lurking under the help of Ragnaros. In the midst of extreme changes, he began to plan 2 things. The first thing was to try to restore the soul power of the Midnight Sun and find a suitable body to resurrect it with the secret technique. The second thing was to prepare the secret organization with the original purpose of ‘annihilating the Bloody Empire’. It was named after the artifact, the ‘Bloodfall’.

Only then did Chen Rui and others know why Midnight Sun disappeared without any news after dying. Teris’ tone changed, “More than 100 years have passed. The foundation of the Bloodfall is strong, and my soul power is gradually recovering. At this time, an important turning point occurred. I met someone, your son Teris. In order to transfer my soul, Ragnaros paid the price of his life, and I promised him to take care of the Samael Royal Family.”

Raizen shook slightly. Chen Rui had heard the rumors about the Samael Royal Family who was the Demon Realm’s royal family who was the most courageous and skillful in war. Although the empire was destroyed by the Bloody Empire, it never really surrendered and chaos often occurred. This situation continued until the Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen ascended the throne. Raizen also used bloody means to suppress them at the beginning, then Young Prince Teris changed everything.

More than 100 years ago, Teris somehow persuaded Raizen to use Gustav, the young patriarch of the Samael Royal Family at the time, to be the first general of the empire. He also used various methods to make the Samael Royal Family completely surrender. This stabilized the Bloody Empire’s internal turmoil. According to what ‘Teris’ said now, this was exactly the beginning of the real turmoil!

“Teris’ dark element physique fits very well with my soul. The most important thing is… he accepted my soul voluntarily.”

This sentence made Raizen in the black lightning clench his fist tightly, and more blood overflowed from his face.

Looking at Raizen’s reaction, a strange smile appeared on ‘Teris’’ face, “Your son is far above you whether in terms of talent, wisdom, or ambition. In some respects, even I only have admiration for him. The Bloodfall really grew in his hands. However, in your eyes, Teris’ training aptitude has always been an incurable shortcoming. For this reason, he has become the young prince whom you least value and have the least hope of inheriting the throne. Now… your empire, as well as the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire, is annihilated in his plan! “

“Annihilation… also includes the Fallen Angel Empire?” Shea finally uttered. Due to the strength of the Bloodfall enchantment, her teeth had begun to tremble, but she held on and said it out.

Teris took a deep look at Shea and nodded slowly, “The new order is often based on the destruction of the old order. The Fallen Angel Empire is also the object to be buried. Shea, you are stronger than your father Grimm, but not enough. I’m sorry, you can only accept the fate of a loser and die here as well.”

Shea trembled as she squeezed Chen Rui’s hand, “Your Majesty Midnight Sun, maybe I should call this soul Sir Grandfather… You’re the god of war worshiped by everyone in the empire, and you have become a legendary hero in the Demon Realm! Why…”

Teris was silent for a moment before he replied, “The hero has fallen, and now, there is only the ruthless hero.”

“The ruthless heroes cannot coexist.” Chen Rui felt the turbulence in Shea’s mind as her breath of life became weaker, so he immediately said, “Since Teris is ambitious, do you think he is willing to share the same body with you forever?”

“Naive provocation!” Teris sneered, “How can you ants understand the mind of the real powerhouse? Unifying the Demon Realm is just the first step. His goal is to become the supreme ruler of the Demon Realm while my ultimate goal is to become a God!”

“Not Demi-God or Pseudo-God, but God?” Catherine’s voice revealed obvious unbelief. In fact, she had been secretly accumulating the power of Nirvana to make the last fight, but it’s a pity that the Bloodfall enchantment’s devour and suppression were too strong, so her strength was weakened step by step uncontrollably.

However, the idea of ‘becoming a God’ was too impossible. Although training to become a super powerhouse was extremely difficult, there were still many in the history of the Demon Realm, but becoming a God was unique; at most was a Pseudo-God. Now that the Midnight Sun actually arrogantly said he wanted to become god, no one really believed it.

“What if my newly established empire is a brand-new regime that integrates religion and rule? What if I, the ruler, will become the highest object of popular belief? What if… those who believe in me live, and those who do not believe in me will die?”

“Believe in you?” Catherine was really perplexed, “You’re crazy!”

“I’m not crazy, I just experienced some things, died once, and figured out a lot of things!” Teris suddenly clenched his fist, “What is a super powerhouse? So what if I’m a Pseudo-God? What’s the big deal about becoming a legend? Everything is nothing but a lowly plaything in front of a God! Only the real God is eternal and immortal!”

Chen Rui only felt that these words were familiar. It seemed that he had heard similar theories from an Elemental King.

“Putting aside the rest of the Demi-Gods, don’t you fear the punishment of the gods if you steal their faith like this?”

“Hmph, I’m not the first to steal faith. You are just an ignorant person who is unknown to the truth. Moreover, as long as I can really build this kind of kingdom, the rest of the Demi-Gods will not become my obstacles. In contrast, we will become partners with common interests. “

“As for God…” Teris’ eyes flashed with a strange expression, “Have you heard of ‘Twilight of the Gods’?”

“That’s just a legend that had been buried in the legend.”

Catherine said coldly, “Do you want to use this to deceive yourself?”

“In fact, the Gods have not shown miracles for a long time. No matter whether they are asleep or not, no matter how difficult it is, I only know that this is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. When they wake up, maybe I have become an existence that they need to look up at.” Teris’ eyes became a little excited, “By the way, the legend says that the Twilight of the Gods is related to the 7 artifacts. After I unify the Demon Realm, I can try to gather and comprehend the mystery of the artifacts of the 7 great royal families. This will be a substantial bargaining chip. It just so happens that there are 4 artifacts in front of me.”

Of course what Teris said was Shea’s Sword of Fallen Angel by Shea, Catherine’s Dark Shadow Cape, Raizen’s Bloody Ring, and Chen Rui’s God-Eating Mask. The Bloody Empire’s First General Gustav was obviously under Teris, so the Wrath King Armor must also be in his hands.

However, Teris didn’t know that the Breeze Shadow Boots of the Belphegor Royal Family was lost in the human world more than 100 years ago, and the Sword of Fallen Angel that should belong to Shea, plus the Demon Shield of the Leviathan Royal Family, were all in Aguile’s hands.

At this moment, Raizen, who had been silent, suddenly shouted, and the Bloody Ring in his hand emitted a strong light. He jumped up and pounced toward Teris…

TL: Is Raizen going all in?

chapters.title: Chapter 761: The Only Choice
chapters.body:
Chapter 761: The Only Choice

Chapter 761: The Only Choice

When Chen Rui heard Teris talked about ‘Twilight of the Gods’, he suddenly thought of his glorious deeds of fooling the dark elf master by adapting the ‘Master Wukong’ into the ‘Twilight of the Gods’ when he first crossover to the Demon Realm.

I didn’t expect that the Demon Realm really has a legend like ‘Twilight of the Gods’, I don’t know what the real story is… Fortunately, according to Catherine, it is ‘a legend that has been buried in the legend’. Otherwise, I would be exposed and there might not be a Chen Rui today?

At this moment, Raizen launched a certain power of the Bloody Ring to ambush Teris.

Teris had been prepared long ago. His body swayed like a phantom, and he appeared in the distance in an instant. At the same time, the fingers of his right hand were dancing quickly. Little fluorescents were flickering at his fingertips.

Raizen’s pupils suddenly turned silver-gray, and both his speed and momentum dropped sharply. The blow still surpassed the distance, penetrating Teris’ body. Teris slightly flickered, and the armor phantasm on his body instantly cracked and his face turned pale. However, he was fine.

The offense and defense occurred in just a flash of lightning. In the blink of an eye, the overlapping phantoms of Teris that moved to the distance appeared in front of everyone again. Raizen had fallen to the ground. The blood overflowing in his mouth and nose had a strange silver color in it. His whole body was trembling, seeming to have completely lost the combat power.

“Raizen, I have been giving you opportunities. You really can’t hold it anymore.” Teris showed a strong confidence like everything was under his control, “This blow used the last power accumulated in the Bloody Ring. Unfortunately, without the suppression of the Bloody Ring, I can easily induce your light and dark blood mark. Your risky attempt will eventually render useless. Your biggest mistake is to ignore the dark element half of the seal. Although the Mammon Royal Family has the strength of [Dark Mastery] which helped in the first place, the person who helped me to cast the seal in the Dark Furnace has the most pristine dark element origin power of the Demon Realm, so the real killer of the seal is not the light element that you think, but the power of the dark element! Now, with the suppression of the law power and the outbreak of curse, you have no strength to attack again… Teris turned his gaze to Catherine, “Catherine, you don’t have to waste your time. The strength of the law artifact is not something you can contend with. Even if you have the 7 artifacts, I don’t need to do anything; I just need to watch here. Your strength and flesh will be thoroughly devoured by the Bloodfall Orb. Some of them will be refined into blood crystals by the Bloodfall Orb. When I absorb that part of the blood crystals, the level of my soul will be able to break through to the kingdom level in one fell swoop. This will be my first step on the way to God! “

“Shea!” Chen Rui exclaimed. It turned out that Shea couldn’t hold on anymore as she slowly fell back. Chen Rui leaned forward and sat down. Under great pressure, he barely held her in his arms. He couldn’t help but feel anxious as he sensed the rapid fading of Shea’s vitality.

Teris just glanced at Shea faintly with an indifferent gaze; he was not moved at all.

Catherine also sensed that the pressure was getting greater and greater, and the speed of her body’s power exhaustion was gradually increasing. She knew that Teris’ words were not a lie. Unless Teris went crazy, gave up resistance and took the initiative to approach her to give her a chance to launch a near-death blow, otherwise it was already impossible to make a comeback.

Liliz had been in a coma for a long time after losing Catherine’s strength protection. Despite the protection of magic items, she still couldn’t resist the power of Bloodfall enchantment. The blood color on her skin faded quickly, and her body had a faint tendency to wither as if her life was hanging by a thread.

Compared to others, Chen Rui, who owned the Super System, had less pressure, but the Bloodfall Orb was a law artifact after all. The might of a real artifact was by no means comparable to a pseudo-artifact. Even if Chen Rui was in the state of activated [Pole Star Transformation] like in the Jade Forest Sea back then, he was still controlled by the Shackles of True Flame activated by Isyorul, let alone now.

Chen Rui was not a saint. From crossing over to the present, although he had experienced a lot, he still had that otaku deep in him. At this moment, he didn’t think about the chaos of the Demon Realm or what the future might become. All he thought was to protect what he had always wanted to protect.

Not only Shea and Catherine in front of him.

There were also Zola and other women as well as cherished friends.

For this reason, he spared no effort.

Teris suddenly felt that the surrounding force field was different. Some translucent symbols appeared in the air. The entire space seemed to be separated by layers of strange strength. This strength was very unstable and appeared occasionally.

In the turbulent space, the man put down the unconscious Shea in his arms and slowly stood up. The pressure of the Bloodfall enchantment seemed to have lost its effect at this moment. The space trembled slightly, and a cluster of blood burst out of his body, but he didn’t feel it. He was just looking directly at Teris with his blade-like eyes.

There was a tingling sensation in Teris’ eyes suddenly as he squinted slightly. At this moment, the figure of the man suddenly disappeared.

Teris immediately had a hint of crisis, and his overlapping shadows appeared in the distance instantly, but the sense of crisis was still strong. He made a somersault in the air, avoiding a terrifying sharp qi. When he landed on the ground, there was already a faint red mark on his cheek.

Teris’ pupils contracted and looked at the man in front of him warily, “Aguile! The law power that even Raizen and Catherine can’t resist, you actually…”

There was another distortion and turmoil in the space. Chen Rui’s corners of his eyes suddenly split, then 2 bursts of blood spurted out, and his cheeks were dyed red, but he was still indifferent. The strength breath of his body became more intense. He was completely unaffected by the Bloodfall Orb’s enchantment.

“Artifact! It must be an artifact! And the quality is even higher than the Bloodfall Orb!” Teris said emotionally, “I didn’t expect that you actually possessed this kind of artifact, but… with your strength, you can’t control it at all. You can only use something like the secret technique of burning vitality to forcefully control it to offset the strength of the Bloodfall Orb’s enchantment.”

At this point, Teris’ eyes had become cold. “You cannot last in this state. The only thing that surprised me is that your first reaction was to defeat me instead of running away. Now it’s too late for you to run away! Unfortunately, you are only the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. I have basically surpassed the level of Demon Overlord and I am only 1 step away from the kingdom. At the same level, even Raizen is not my opponent. With your strength, you want to defeat me? I will take your life and artifact!”

Chen Rui didn’t speak because every movement and every word spoken would put a huge load on his body and spirit. What he activated was the space artifact, the ‘Tower of Glory’ which was the trophy obtained by defeating the Holy Dragon Rodriguez. This was a very high-grade artifact which Rodriguez used to escape the pursuit of Pseudo-God Raphael.

After Chen Rui got this artifact, he had been using the Super System’s [Deep Analysis] to ‘crack’ it, but the Tower of Glory’s level was too high. [Deep Analysis] not only cost aura, but also consumed faith power. Up to now, only the most ‘outer’ layer had been analyzed, and there was still a considerable distance between the core, which was equal to the uncracked ‘version’.

The current Tower of Glory could only separate Chen Rui and Teris into a single space, offsetting the effect of the Bloodfall Orb’s enchantment on him. It couldn’t work on Catherine and others. The price was to burn Star Power and vitality. Otherwise, it would recoil. The most serious thing was that once the limit was exceeded, his entire body and soul would collapse.

The control of Teris’ body is dominated by Midnight Sun now. Midnight Sun is once known as the Demon Realm’s top powerhouse. Although this ‘top’ is understood by ordinary people as being indeed invincible under the super powerhouse. According to Raizen, Midnight Sun also had the combat power for cross-level challenges. So, how strong is Midnight Sun?

Chen Rui had no time and energy to think about extra things including the recoil that he was about to suffer. The only thing he wanted to do now was to put down Teris before he collapsed.

This was the only way he could save Shea and Catherine. If he fell in this battle, everything would be doomed. Not only the 2 empresses, but the other women and friends would have no way to survive.

The [Galaxy Territory] and [Autumn Territory] were activated at the same time. Chen Rui had [Aura Blade] on his left hand and Northsea Sword on his right, attacking Teris like a storm.

Teris had already experienced the power of [Aura Blade], and dared not underestimate it. His body continuously flickered incredibly, making Chen Rui’s attacks futile. After dodging for a while, Teris finally launched a counterattack. The middle finger knuckle of his fist suddenly protruded which was somewhat similar to Phoenix Eye Fist (Phoenix Eye Fist uses the index finger). He speedily and accurately hit Chen Rui’s left wrist joint.

[Aura Blade] was extremely sharp and powerful. If he hit Chen Rui’s palm, it would not play any role. Instead, he would be injured by sharp qi. However, this tap hit the key point. Chen Rui felt a pain in his wrist as his entire palm seemed to have been severed from nerve connections, and he could no longer control the [Aura Blade].

When his action paused, Teris had already gotten closer and launched a series of attacks at Chen Rui.

Although none of the attacks were fatal, Chen Rui felt that every attack hit the most ‘critical’ part. Before he made the next move, he was already interrupted. He could not exert his power at all. Some of the moves were even involuntarily changed after being affected by the opponent. Every move was completely controlled by Teris just like a marionette.

This not only required an accurate grasp of strength and timing, but it also required the prediction of the enemy’s moves. Teris only witnessed the brief encounter between Chen Rui and Raizen on the battlefield, coupled with the dodge observation just now, he had grasped the situation precisely; this ability was quite terrifying.

Strictly speaking, the difference between S+ and S++ was not as huge as imagined. They all belonged to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord level, but the latter was closer to the bottleneck than the former. In Chen Rui’s past record, he had almost no opponents at the same level. This was the first time that he had been completely suppressed by an opponent like this.

If Raizen’s attacks were simplified, refined and effective; then ‘Midnight Sun’ had absolute control of the entire battle.

He was no doubt the Demon Realm’s top powerhouse in the past.

Chen Rui finally used the continuous teleport to pull the distance. Blood flowed out even more from his mouth. The damage caused by the recoil was even above the damage caused by the opponent’s attack.

Teris sneered. As he was about to pursue, he frowned suddenly. He turned into a series of afterimages and dodged. It turned out that there was already another figure. The appearance of this figure was the same as that of ‘Aguile’, except that there was a faint blood color in his eyes.

Shura!

At this critical moment, Chen Rui finally summoned Shura who had always been in the human world to collect faith!

TL: Will Chen Rui get enough faith power to fully control the artifact?

chapters.title: Chapter 762: Urgent Parties
chapters.body:
Chapter 762: Urgent Parties

Chapter 762: Urgent Parties

Teris’ eyes flashed lightly. Although ‘Aguile’ was suppressed just now, whether it was muscle, combat response or ability to recover, they are above my estimation. I have experienced countless opponents and have extremely rich combat experience. With the state of ‘Aguile’ forcibly using the artifact, he can still display such qualities. He is definitely an opponent that cannot be underestimated. The sudden appearance of the mysterious figure seems to be related to ‘Aguile’, plus he is even in his optimum state. This made Teris feel more dangerous.

However, Teris was still very confident. He was now only 1 step away from the kingdom. Not to mention 2 peak stages of the Demon Overlord, even if it was 20, he had the confidence to win. Because he was not only ‘Teris’, but also ‘Midnight Sun’!

The top powerhouse below the super powerhouse.

Shura moved. With a tap of his foot, he appeared in front of Teris with a flash. His hand clawed at Teris with a faint destructive breath. When Teris was about to react, he suddenly turned into a series of afterimages and appeared in the air. It turned out that the Shura in front was actually a phantom, and the real Shura had moved to the back silently like a ghost. If it weren’t for Teris’ quick reaction, the sneak attack would have been successful.

Just as Teris avoided Shura’s sneak attack, the sky full of sword qi assaulted from the distance, sealing his escape route from up, down, left and right directions. Teris snorted as he spread his 5 fingers and stretched out his hands to draw a large circle around his body. Suddenly, there were countless flashing crystal lights like pieces of mirror. The indestructible sword qi of the [Aura Blade] was actually refracted by the mirror-like crystal lights. A part of it even reflected toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui didn’t have time to dodge. A translucent shield immediately appeared on him. Several cracks appeared on the defensive shield, which barely blocked the reflected sword qi in time.

There was a wisp of smoke around the crystal light on the mirror which was spinning quickly. The glitter of the crystal light seemed to be dimmed as if it was devoured by something. When Teris’ hands shook, the crystal light shattered and burst open. The smoke scattered and merged into Shura’s body. There were several obvious cracks on his body, but they did not bleed; the cracks quickly began to heal automatically.

The sudden change just now was actually instantaneous. The speed and reaction of both parties were extremely fast. It was like shooting each other with arrows. Dodge, take the arrow, and shoot back. A slight mistake would have dire results.

In the Bloodfall Orb’s enchantment, the space was constantly distorting and changing. The immobile Raizen and Catherine could only see the 3 vague figures intersecting in the space occasionally.

They might never have thought that one day, the 3 rulers of the Demon Realm (including the 2 kingdom-level powerhouses) as well as the life and death of the 3 empires would rely on a ‘mere’ Demon Overlord.

Teris gaze was a little more solemn. Neither of these 2 opponents can be easily defeated. If I am a little careless, perhaps I will fail miserably in my own fail safe plan. It seems that they have to be taken seriously.

Thinking of this, Teris’ momentum suddenly changed, and he exuded an overwhelming burst of breath. A piece of armor phantasm appeared on the body. This ‘armor’ had previously blocked Raizen’s blow. Although Raizen’s blow was exhausted, it was the strength of the kingdom after all. The armor still had cracks on it when it was formed. It was not known whether it was a skill or equipment.

The phantasm of the armor was fleeting as the surrounding light became bright. The space was instantly filled with vast ancient breath. A long and brilliant river of starlight appeared at the feet of Teris, flowing with a strange rhythm. It was the territory that the Lord of Midnight Sun was famous for in the Demon Realm—— [Dream Galaxy Territory]!

As soon as this long river came out, the buff of the [Galaxy Territory] was still fine, but the debuff effect was significantly reduced. The debuff effect of the [Autumn Territory] was actually dissolved by the little starlights.

At this moment, several huge white light balls flew out of Chen Rui’s hands, rushing towards Teris. At the same time, Shura transformed into 8 seemingly real phantasms and surrounded him in all directions.

Teris waved his hand, and the whole space seemed to be reversed. The brilliant galaxy hung upside down in the sky, looking dreamy and blurred. This process seemed simple, but what actually happened was that Chen Rui’s [Aurora Shots] were directed by the galaxy’s strange rhythm at the several phantasms of Shura.

[Aurora Shots] possessed a special destructive power, so Shura’s phantasms were immediately annihilated after being hit. The real body just made an embracing posture, and the [Aurora Shots] with the destructive power quickly shrunk and disappeared as if they were devoured by something.

Teris pointed at Chen Rui, and a huge torrent in the galaxy rushed down, splitting into 2 waterfalls, pouring toward Chen Rui and Shura.

This was not simply ‘water’, but countless stars with unstoppable power. The speed of the stars was not very fast, but it faintly carried a breath that was quite close to the law. Chen Rui could hardly dodge, so he could only take it.

Before the ‘waterfall’ reached Chen Rui, it had already made him feel the terrifying pressure as if the surrounding air had been solidified into a solid object, almost making him difficult to move. The Northsea Sword in Chen Rui’s hand buzzed and rippled with circles of soft water patterns as it went toward ‘waterfall’.

The turbulent torrent encountered a soft trickle, and the power of the 2 gushes of ‘water’ was intertwined in an instant. There was no impact or repulsion as imagined, but they were surprisingly intertwined in a stalemate.

Shura flickered, turning his body into light smoke and spinning like a whirlwind. The turbulent black smoke surrounded the galaxy waterfall. The waterfall was offset and devoured by a special strength at a high speed.

“Boom!” Chen Rui, who used water swordsmanship to fight against the galaxy, shook suddenly. His body made an explosion sound and his face was flushed as if he was drunk. Facing the huge pressure of the galaxy waterfall, the recoil caused by the use of the Tower of Glory was triggered at this moment. Chen Rui’s face became redder, and he was on the brink of collapse. He spat a mouthful of blood. As the water swordsmanship was stopped, the overwhelming galaxy had gushed past the water ripples and rushed toward him.

The strength of the galaxy was huge and vast. The spontaneous translucent blue shield just lasted for a few seconds before it shattered. The figure in the middle was swallowed by the surging galaxy in the blink of an eye.

This scene happened to be clear in the turbulent space. Catherine’s heart twitched fiercely; the calmness in her gaze was suddenly torn apart by something.

Teris was very confident with the power of [Dream Galaxy Territory], so he immediately turned his attention to Shura. With a thought, the galaxy that rushed to the Shura whirlwind immediately solidified and turned into a greatsword.

With a wave, it cut the black smoke into several pieces. The black smoke was not a physical entity, so it quickly condensed together, but there were dots of starlights inside which made the speed of the black smoke slower and slower. It could no longer hold its smoke form, so it condensed into Shura’s body.

Teris’ afterimages appeared in front of Shura in the blink of an eye. Shura retreated bit by bit amidst the high-speed hits. He seemed to be in a passive situation, and his injuries were gradually increasing. Obviously, Teris’ ability to ‘control’ the battle suppressed Shura to a disadvantageous position.

The galaxy that swallowed Chen Rui suddenly distorted strangely while revealing strange vitality and strong violent breath from time to time. The galaxy exploded and turned into pieces of mist as if it had been evaporated by the terrifying high temperature. A figure blasted out with waves of sharp qi.

Teris repeated the same technique. Countless shimmering crystal mirrors appeared around his body, reflecting the [Aura Blade]. Suddenly, Teris’s complexion changed. A crack actually appeared on the surface of the crystal mirror. The sword qi that penetrated at high speed made a wound on the back of his hand, followed by another 1, 2, 3…

This time, the almost perfect mirror protection was actually breached!

Teris immediately retracted the skill, and the overlapping afterimages flashed back to the galaxy in the air. As he vigilantly watched Chen Rui exuding the rampant breath, a feeling of extreme crisis surged in his heart. Obviously, this enemy has activated another secret technique. His attack power has been greatly improved to the same level as me.

However, forcefully using the artifacts by activating this secret technique will increase the consumption of mental power and physical strength. This also shows his eagerness to win.

Teris’ thoughts turned. While turning into afterimages, he quickly formed a hand gesture. The galaxy around Shura turned into intersecting spider silks that contained a mysterious rule. Soon, the spider silks turned into a large cocoon of starlights, enveloping Shura.

The cocoon bulged out from time to time which was obviously due to Shura’s attacks. However, he was still unable to break through the cocoon’s defense.

At this time, Chen Rui teleported several times in a row, intercepted the afterimages, and launched a berserk attack. Teris appeared very calm. He battled while retreating, fully utilizing his talent of controlling the battle, This made Chen Rui could not fully make use of his berserk strength.

Teris was not afraid of Chen Rui, but prolonging the battle was the best tactic at this time. As long as the combat power of the mysterious man was confined and the burning vitality of ‘Aguile’ was exhausted, he could naturally win without fighting.

If it was another time or place, Teris would defeat the opponent completely by brute force, but he had painstakingly planned for the destruction of the 3 empires for 300 years. Therefore, he must avoid any accident due to his negligence at the last moment.

Chen Rui had given up his defense and started a fierce all-out attack. His time was really running out. Once he surpassed the critical point of his load, both he and Shura would be annihilated.

All of a sudden, Teris’ pupils shrank as he sensed something: No!

How come the power of the Bloodfall Orb has been reduced!

Faith power! Something is weakening the faith power that I painstakingly accumulated?!

Teris was shocked. Once the Bloodfall Orb lost its effectiveness, Catherine and Raizen would get out of trouble. With his current strength, even if the 2 were already exhausted, he couldn’t match with them!

In that way, everything is over!

Realizing this, Teris immediately reacted. His eyes turned to the cocoon that wrapped Shura. The source is that mysterious person!

It turns out that the other party actually has such a terrifying plan!

“Damn it!”

Teris yelled, and did not retreat. The galaxy suddenly became shining as it rushed toward Chen Rui with all his strength— That mysterious person must be a summoned creature or subordinate of ‘Aguile’, so ‘Aguile’ must be killed as soon as possible!

TL: The faith power accumulated through Bloodfall should be very little. With Shura’s ability to empty a church’s faith in a few days, there seems to be a chance…

chapters.title: Chapter 763 - The End, The Defeat Of The Strongest
chapters.body:
Chapter 763 - The End, The Defeat Of The Strongest

Chapter 763: The End, The Defeat of the Strongest

The splendid galaxy and the violent red light collided head-on without reservation, and the huge impact made the entire space tremble. In the starlight and the red flames, the 2 figures intertwined and separated swiftly. If it was a Demon Overlord, he wouldn’t be able to see the high-speed movements. He would feel that the hands and feet had become phantasms.

Both of them had the eagerness to end the battle as soon as possible. Chen Rui, who had gone all-in by activating the [Scorching Dragon Possession], was still suppressed because Teris, who had the soul of Lord of Midnight Sun, was too powerful.

[Dream Galaxy Territory] not only had buffs and debuff abilities similar to [Galaxy Territory], but it could also change any attack form as desired. The most terrifying thing was the ability to predict the enemy’s action first and control the battle situation. If Raizen’s strength was now at the S++ level, he was definitely not Teris’ opponent.

What surprised Teris was that his body sometimes involuntarily showed strange injuries. It seemed that the damage caused to ‘Aguile’ was partially reflected back. As the battle went on, his control ability became weaker. ‘Aguile’ could make accurate and timely responses and counterattacks most of the time. Not only did Teris exhaust a lot of strength, but his injuries were also aggravated.

If the battle was a game of chess, then ‘Aguile’ now had the skill to play against him. This is an incredible change. Does this Beelzebub Royal Family member have a fighting talent that surpasses me, the top powerhouse?

In Chen Rui’s eyes, Teris’ figure had become a translucent human body, and all movements were trajectories of strange colors. The phantasms represented possible trajectories, and the depth of the color represented the intensity of the attack. It was like studying the action video of a game, one could predict the most likely habitual action and make an effective response. These analyses were all completed in an instant as with Chen Rui’s reaction – This was the strength of [Deep Analysis].

It was the first time that Chen Rui applied [Deep Analysis], a non-combat skill, to actual combat, and it actually had a miraculous effect.

This analysis was not 100% accurate, but combined with Chen Rui’s own combat instinct and spirit sensing, he could make a judgment with the smallest error which was equivalent to entering a mysterious state of ‘marvellous prediction’. Of course, analyzing the state of battle also had significant side effects. Over time, the load on spirit power was quite large, especially when he was severely exhausted now, but he could no longer care so much.

Seeing the opponent slowly turned the battle situation unbelievably, Teris made a resolute decision. He gave up melee combat, appeared in the air, stepped on the galaxy, and spread out the galaxy with his hands, turning it into countless light balls with powerful strength. The light balls filled the entire space. All the escape routes of Chen Rui were sealed.

“[Star Gathering Explosion]!” Teris waved his hand, and the light balls flew toward Chen Rui from all directions at varying speeds just like a well-trained tactic that was impossible to predict.

This was a nearly incomprehensible skill that consumed a lot of territory power. Teris was confident to use this blow to solve the opponent.

Chen Rui quickly shifted and dodged in the air. He waved the Northsea Sword to defend with water swordsmanship, but the situation was getting worse and worse – The terrifying fact of these light balls not only lay in the explosive strength contained in a single one, but it was more in the endless balls. As soon as one moved slowly, more and more attacks would arrive.

Chen Rui tried his best to dodge and defend, but no matter how he teleported or flew, there were always countless light balls around. The pressure on the Northsea Sword was getting stronger and stronger as if the sword was being pressed by a mountain. At the moment the water swordsmanship could no longer be sustained, a light ball that was not diverted exploded. Then, the light balls that flew all over the sky rushed over in a focus to create a terrifying explosion.

Boom boom boom…
