Elder Miss Black Dragon sneered coldly, “Why can’t I come out? That guy has been knocked out and tied up by me. Just in case, I also put on special iron pants for him as a lesson for him to speak mindlessly! “

The legendary chastity pants, plus in that situation… It’s too cruel! Master Poison Dragon had a chill. The true value can only be determined through comparison. Now it seems that Little Betty is so gentle and understanding, plus a good and loving wife…

Ms. Betty didn’t know about Master Poison Dragon’s conscience discovery. She seemed worried, “What should we do now? We must hurry!”

“Fortunately, I still have a backup.” Paglio grinned as a small crystal bottle appeared in his hand. This useless Daniel. Now I can only use my private goods.

“Is this the tasty one?” As soon as the small bottle appeared, Ms. Black Dragon immediately locked it with her eyes.

Due to the lessons learned from the blue dragon, the poison dragon was naturally spook by Ms. Black Dragon, “Don’t touch it! This thing is expensive! You will lose a lot of money if you break it!”

This sentence was quite effective. Ms. Black Dragon’s hands were frozen in the air. Paglio suddenly rolled his eyes and revealed a strange smile, “Yes, this is indeed a tasty thing, just as tasty as getting married… By the way, we still need a messenger.”

The poison dragon’s gaze fell on a certain ‘informant’ who was admiring the treasure in the courtyard.

At the south suburbs, Mountain Lush, Chen Rui was already there long ago, waiting for Kia’s arrival, but after waiting for a long time, he still didn’t see Kia. While he was wondering, a familiar figure appeared in front of him, but unfortunately, it was his friend, not his girlfriend.

Chen Rui asked suspiciously, “Paglio? Why did you come here?”

“Are you waiting for someone?”

“How do you know I’m waiting for someone?”

“If you are waiting for Kia, don’t bother. A succubus asked me to tell someone, Royal Highness Prince Consort, that she is suddenly busy.” The poison dragon took out a bottle of wine and drank a mouthful.

Chen Rui was taken aback. His date with Kia was a secret. Paglio probably didn’t lie. It seems that this date has failed again.

“You seem to be busy with something recently…” Paglio grinned, “I heard Little Betty say that her best friend rejected a guy’s proposal. To be precise, a guy was rejected by all the women. Do you want me to help you with an idea?”

“Hmph!” Chen Rui was suspicious as he looked at the poison dragon, “You have an idea? Are you that kind?”

“If it weren’t for Little Betty’s concern about Isabella’s marriage and asked me to help, I wouldn’t bother to care about you.” Paglio showed an expression of disdain as he turned and left, “Come, let’s go to the Red Fruit Hotel for a drink. You are alone these days anyway.”

Chen Rui hesitated for a moment before he followed Paglio, failing to notice the hint of the conspiracy in the poison dragon’s eyes.

By the small river in the western suburbs.

Kia, who was notified by a messenger to change her appointment location, was using the ancient runes communicator in her clothes to make a remote call with her allies.

“Kia, is he here?”

“Not yet… I have been waiting for a long time.”

“Remember, we must not agree! For the sake of our future so that no new competitors will appear in our family, we must work together to hold on to this barrier.”

“Isabella, I know.” The little succubus nodded seriously with absolute firmness, “Even if he strips off my clothes, I won’t agree.”

“It’s you who will strip off his clothes!”

“Don’t cheat on us!”

“Sobs… Why isn’t he here yet…”

chapters.title: Chapter 770 - All Are Here
chapters.body:
Chapter 770 - All Are Here

Chapter 770: All are Here

Just as Kia wandered in the western suburbs while waiting foolishly, Chen Rui had followed Paglio into the Red Fruit Hotel. The Red Fruit Hotel was 1 of the high class hotels in the Dark Moon. Last time, Chen Rui also met ‘Christina’ here.

The Red Fruit Hotel was also 1 of the designated retailers of the aromatic millet wine in the Princess Villa of the Dark Moon branch. The restaurant business alone was extremely hot.

To Chen Rui’s surprise, Paglio didn’t take him to the restaurant to drink wine, but they walked into the accommodation room. The reason was simple. The restaurant was full. The explanation was acceptable. In his previous life, when watching the World Cup, he used to book a room with a few brothers to stay up late to watch football. He still remembered that feeling. But the poison dragon has always been stingy, so why is he willing to book a room to treat me to a drink of wine?

Just as Chen Rui was wondering, the door opened. It was even a deluxe room. There was a large table of wine and dishes on the dining table in the living room… Uh, empty plates of wine and dishes. A person sitting among the plates was burping.

“Olypheus!” Paglio stared at the empty wines and dishes in a daze. He couldn’t help but twitch at the corner of his eyes, “Didn’t I say to serve the dishes when we are back?”

Olypheus was dumbfounded as she blinked and looked at Paglio, “What?”

“Don’t use this damn imitation show!” The poison dragon almost spat out his dragon breath. He initially wanted to do something to the wine and dishes, but he didn’t expect that Olypheus would actually serve all the dishes and eat them all!

“I’m too hungry. Didn’t you say that there is food?” Olypheus looked at the poison dragon innocently, “It’s okay, I ordered the third round again.”

Wait! The third round? Could it be that… The poison dragon felt that his heart and wallet were dripping blood. No way! This money must go to Julia’s public account! Must be reimbursed!

“Where are Betty and Julia?”

“This is what happened. We happen to run into Alice and Adeline outside the hotel. Krobelus and Julia took them to go shopping. Julia said that if I am too hungry, I can stay and eat something first.”

Alice actually comes to the Dark Moon at this time? Paglio was taken aback. This is a critical moment. No wonder Betty and Julia led the 2 little girls away, leaving Ms. Black Dragon to make things easier.

“Then serve the dishes!” Paglio said to the waiter.

“Okay, okay!” Olypheus nodded excitedly without a hint of the bloating appearance just now. As long as it was free, she could eat as much as served.

Master Poison Dragon’s eyes start to twitch again. Can your internal organs become a stomach?

The efficiency of the Red Fruit Hotel was very fast. The wine and dishes were quickly replaced with new ones.

The poison dragon’s gaze caught sight of Ms. Black Dragon who quickly swept the plate, and his face started to twitch- Can you leave a few dishes for the medicine!

“Paglio.” Chen Rui didn’t notice any abnormalities. He absent-mindedly drank a few sips of wine and said, “To be honest, I’ve been really depressed recently. Tell me… Do you have a way?”

“Um…” The poison dragon started by deceiving Chen Rui into the Red Fruit Hotel. How could there be any good ideas? As he was stuttering, he saw Chen Rui’s expression of suspicion, and he immediately pointed to Ms. Black Dragon, “The idea is Olypheus!”

“Me?” When the confused Ms. Black Dragon heard her name, she paused to swallow her mouthful of food before she continued to devour the food.

“What are you trying to say?” Chen Rui frowned.

“Have you ever thought about the reason for the failed marriage proposal? Those women are actually loyal to you… What an enviable damn human. In fact, you care about them too much, so they… what is the term?”

“Tsundere?” Chen Rui didn’t expect that the poison dragon was actually bullshiting. He nodded as if he understood.

“Yes, that’s the term! Women just like to be jealous and like to compare.” Paglio’s words became more and more smooth like an expert in love, marriage and family issues,”The positive strategy is obviously too difficult, so you have to change another angle to solve this problem. Suppose if there is a new competitor that can threaten them, would those women be so arrogant? So tsundere?”

“It seems to make sense.” Chen Rui quickly thought about the possibility, “Will it be counterproductive…”

“Of course not! I have the most experience in this area!”

“Will you still be closely supervised by Little Betty now if you are experienced?”

“What you see is just the appearance!” Master Poison Dragon immediately changed the topic, “Olypheus is your nominal fiancée. If you let those women know that you are about to officially marry her, will they refuse your proposal?”

Chen Rui frowned more tightly, “But my feelings toward Olypheus…”

“I know you only regard Olypheus as your sister. This time, it’s just acting. I guarantee you will succeed! You just need to pay Olypheus a sum of money at that time.”

The confused Olypheus was extra attentive when she heard the word ‘money’, then she nodded desperately- This trip is too cost-effective. Not only can I eat for free, but I can also get money for nothing!

“It’s really worth trying.” Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. The dead duck dragon should have a clearer perspective as a bystander. This trick is indirectly saving the day. Coupled with the positive strategy, it will surely end the cold war and win the sisters’ alliance! Maybe it will make the ladies unhappy at first. I’ll try my best to make up for it when the marriage proposal is successful!

When Master Poison Dragon saw that the human was finally fooled, he excitedly drank a gulp of wine while concealing the proud expression in his eyes: Acting? Hehe, this master will let you act the real show tonight!

On the other side, the poor succubus little maid became anxious as she did not see Chen Rui’s figure after waiting for 3 hours.

“He really isn’t coming? Did we go over the line, making him sad or annoyed? Sobs…” Little succubus’s voice was already choking.

Athena’s voice sounded, “Kia, don’t cry! I’m almost in the southern suburbs to pick you up.”

“That’s strange, Chen Rui is not such a person. Since he asked you out, he would definitely not leave you there alone.” Isabella’s voice was full of doubts, “Kia, are you sure that Dodo notified you of the change of dating location?”

“En! It’s Dodo. Where is Chen Rui now?”

“Don’t worry! I’ll ask Delia for help right away… Zola, arrest Dodo as soon as possible for interrogation. That cunning slime is actually a triple spy!”

“Oh…”

In the Red Fruit Hotel, the third table of wine and dishes had been swept away.

“Is there a fourth round?” Olypheus looked at Paglio expectantly.

Although the poison dragon almost got cramps all over his body, his eyes rolled and he already had an idea, “Wait a minute, Betty and the others haven’t come back yet! By the way, Betty said she wanted to drink the special black pear juice from Wawa Beverage Shop. I’ll go buy some.”

“I’ll go too!” Ms. Black Dragon was thinking about having some dessert, so she jumped up quickly.

Paglio nodded, “Cunning human, don’t go away yet. I am in a good mood after completing Little Betty’s entrustment. I will bring you a bottle later.”

Chen Rui did not suspect him as he nodded with a smile.

On the other side.

“Athena! Where have you been?”

“I have met up with Kia. I’m in the town now.”

“Don’t hurry back! Go to the west of the city!” Isabella’s voice seemed a little anxious, “Dodo spilled the beans just now. He was the one who changed the date place instead of Chen Rui, and the masterminds are Paglio and the dragons! According to Delia’s intel provided by the Dark Demon, they should be at the Red Fruit Hotel now! Although I don’t know what the dragons are doing, I have a bad hunch that it is definitely not a good thing! Zola and I have already rushed over there! Let’s meet first!”

“Okay!”

At this time, Paglio had bought several bottles of black pear juice with Ms. Black Dragon. This time, the little girl did not swallow, but she slowly tasted the drink with a straw. Nonetheless, she was holding a bottle in her left hand, a bottle in her arm, and another on her right.

Paglio walked to the side and secretly took out the crystal vial while the girl was not paying attention. Just as he poured it into a bottle of juice, he felt something was wrong. As he turned his head violently, he was startled when he saw Ms. Black Dragon’s big eyes flashing curiously.

“The one in your hand is… the ‘expensive’ thing that can be eaten?”

“This is… a tonic for men! Women must not eat it!” Paglio hurriedly patched up with a lie, “Don’t you think Chen Rui is very unhappy today? This is to help him calm down. Don’t tell him later. Lest refuses to drink. After he drinks it, you will have a good conversation with him. In addition to the remuneration, I will treat you to a big meal tomorrow…”

“Deal!” Ms. Black Dragon suddenly showed a look of scrutiny, “Are you trying to poison boss! I’m boss’ bodyguard!”

“I swear in the name of dragons that this is definitely not a poison!” Paglio swore with a curse and muttered in his heart, That guy is a poison immune freak. Even my poison is useless! However, this kind of instinct-inducing thing cannot be regarded as a poison. In a sense, it is a real ‘tonic’ that can cure all kinds of problems.

Olypheus barely took the ‘tonic’ with her ‘occupied’ right hand. Alice’s voice came from the other side, “Olypheus! Is that you?”

Ms. Black Dragon’s reaction was extremely fast. Except for the bottle in the left hand that she was drinking, all the others disappeared in the space ring instantly. She turned around and waved, “Alice! Adeline! Come on! Someone treats us to a drink!”

The poison dragon, “…”

On the opposite street, Julia and Krobelus came with Alice and Adeline.

The poison dragon turned his mind and whispered to Ms. Black Dragon, “Olypheus, you go upstairs right now to give Chen Rui the bottle of tonic to drink, then lock the door and don’t come out.”

Ms. Black Dragon asked puzzledly, “Why?”

“Do you want to enjoy the fourth table of food alone? I will take Betty and the others to buy something. I will come back to foot the bill later.”

“Okay, okay!” Ms. Black Dragon nodded quickly, and quickly ran toward the Red Fruit Hotel.

Paglio immediately greeted Alice and the others. Alice asked, “Why did Olypheus run away?”

“Um, she went to the hotel to pack the unfinished food. Let’s go back first. She will come and meet us in a while.” As the poison dragon said, he winked at Ms. Emerald Dragon and Elder Miss Black Dragon. The women immediately understood and agreed with him.

Alice didn’t doubt him and nodded. She held Adeline and walked back together.

Master Poison Dragon just breathed a sigh of relief when he saw that success was around the corner, then a familiar voice behind him suddenly sounded, “Paglio! What are you up to! Where is Chen Rui?”

Isabella, plus Athena, Kia, and… Zola!

Master Poison Dragon’s eyes blacked out: Crap! This time everyone is here!

chapters.title: Chapter 771 - Doomed
chapters.body:
Chapter 771 - Doomed

Chapter 771: Doomed

It was not Paglio who reacted first, but Alice.

The name of Chen Rui made the little princess’ ears prick up immediately, then a hidden attribute of marvellous reasoning broke out, “Brother? Brother is here? By the way… Olypheus!”

“Olypheus?” Isabella frowned as she looked at Paglio, then her eyes turned to Krobelus, “Betty, what’s the matter?”

Ms. Emerald Dragon lowered her head guiltily, “I’m sorry, Yini.”

“Olypheus went back to the Red Fruit Hotel to pack…” Alice suddenly jumped up. “Could she be packing brother?!”

This sentence hit the mark. Paglio’s heart was beating the drum. Athena and Kia looked at each other and said in unison, “Let’s go to the hotel now!”

“No!” Paglio blurted out almost without thinking. Counting the time, Ms. Black Dragon should have given Chen Rui the bottle of ‘tonic juice’. Although they won’t get to the real show so quickly, the medicine should have begun to slowly take effect. If they go to the hotel now, our previous efforts will be lost. Moreover, after failing this time, it is almost impossible to encounter this kind of opportunity again.

As soon as he finished speaking, a strong sense of danger surged in Master Poison Dragon’s mind. A figure appeared in front of him instantly to ask as if she didn’t hear clearly, “What did you say?”

Master Poison Dragon couldn’t help but shudder. This was not an imitation by Ms. Black Dragon, but the real original creator. Compared with the usual word plus a question mark, now there were 3 more words. Obviously, the hatred value and danger had increased 4 times.

Paglio wanted to learn from a guy pointing to the sky and saying ‘Look! Alien’, but obviously he was not that guy. The madwoman would not look at the sky in a daze, but she would rampage instead.

Master Poison Dragon had no doubt that if he blocked the way again, he would be disassembled by the madwoman into dusts of magic elements.

Compared with the long-term crisis in the future, I better save my life now… “It’s nothing!” Master Poison Dragon quickly spoke up, “In fact, nothing special happened. It’s just… that guy has been very upset recently, so he asked me for help… Alright, I’ll accompany you there. “

As a result, a group of people ‘detained’ the culprit, Paglio, and walked to the Red Fruit Hotel.

Master Poison Dragon, who was already ready to run with Little Betty and leave the mess to Julia, was stunned when the door of the locked room was kicked open.

There was no saucy or lewd vibe. Neither was there an emotional art performance of a sex scene. The theme song of the room was just 1 – Eat.

The protagonist was naturally the gluttonous Ms. Black Dragon; even the male protagonist on the side became the background.

“The fifth round…” Judging from the state of food placement, Master Poison Dragon smartly skipped the number directly to ‘fifth’. What? You ask where the ‘fourth’ is? As Alice said… Right, it’s packed.

“Ah, sister, you are all here…” Olypheus paused, muttering with her full mouth, “Paglio and I happened to meet Alice and Adeline outside the hotel. Paglio said If I’m too hungry, I can stay and eat something first. I’m too hungry… so I will eat first…”

Why does this sentence sound so familiar? Master Poison Dragon was speechless when he saw Olypheus gobbled the food at a faster rate for fear of being snatched by others: No doubt, this little girl’s brain grows in the stomach. You think this group of people barged in just to grab food from you?

However, to Master Poison Dragon’s surprise, a certain full and drunk human whose presence was greatly reduced by Ms. Black Dragon, actually did not have any abnormalities. He is even casually tasting the half-drinked ‘tonic’ drink?

“Athena, Zola, Isabella, Kia… Why are you all here?” Of course, the male protagonist didn’t understand what had happened. He stood up, “Alice and Adeline too…”

“The name of me, the princess, was mentioned at the end!” Alice had already jumped up. The human who had no idea of the situation had a koala on his body once he stood up.

By the way, Alice is already 16 years old. The little loli of the past should be about to become a teen girl. Why her appearance and figure has not changed much? Could it be caused by the resentment of the little loli from the weird uncles for thousands of years? It is possible, considering the relatively long lifespan of demons. Maybe Alice hasn’t reached the puberty stage.

But everyone knew that what made Royal Highness Little Princess depressed the most was not her height, but the unchanged chest…···

An envy expression flashed past Adeline’s absent-minded eyes. After receiving the ‘Spiritual Mind Eyes’ that derived from the [Dragon God Eyes] gifted by Auglas, Adeline had been able to use her spirit power to see through the eyes. Spiritual Mind Eyes actually had extra powerful strength that even allowed her to have combat power that surpassed ordinary Demon Overlords. However, for the naga girl, it was enough to be able to see that ‘brother’ clearly with these eyes.

Alice didn’t know that Aguile was Chen Rui. Previously, she kept belittling the guy who was about to become her sister’s husband in front of all her friends. Naturally, Adeline would not reveal this secret.

By now, even Isabella, who had made some mental preparations, was a little puzzled, “Paglio, what are you up to?”

Master Poison Dragon’s reaction was quite fast as he pointed to Chen Rui, “Ah… This is the case. This guy has been in distress recently. I intend to help him. Now it seems that it is no longer necessary. .”

Isabella looked at the ‘distressed guy’ who put down Alice, “Chen Rui, is that right?”

“Pretty much.” Chen Rui didn’t know what happened. In his opinion, the poison dragon was really helping him, and it seemed to be working out well now. At least, Madam Aunt who suddenly appeared didn’t call him that damn ‘Your Highness’.

As soon as these words came out, Master Poison Dragon suddenly felt that the huge sense of crisis being targeted by the magic elements had disappeared. He was so moved that tears almost filled his eyes. What a good victim, he was deceived and even helped to justify…

“Why do you need to lock the door?” Madam Aunt asked another key question.

“So that we can enjoy wine and dishes alone…” Ms. Black Dragon’s answer was standard and timely, allowing Master Poison Dragon to put down the last scruple.

The little girl with a bulging mouth walked over with 2 plates of vegetables that seemed to be intact, and she came over with a flattering expression, “Sister, this is what I have specially kept for you.”

It should be that you didn’t manage to finish it… Everyone’s expressions were a little skeptical.

Isabella’s eyes finally softened as she glanced at the little girl. She touched her head in a petting way, and said to Chen Rui, “That guy, go home first.”

That guy stood up in tears. ‘Go home’! It’s been a long time since I heard these warm words. Even if Madam Aunt’s voice seems very cold.

“Then I’ll not accompany you.” Master Poison Dragon wiped off his cold sweat as he led Ms. Emerald Dragon and Elder Miss Black Dragon sat down, seeming to continue the dragons’ dinner. When the figure of the Royal Highness Prince Consort being escorted disappeared from his sight, he just breathed a sigh of relief- After so much effort and practice, it was a waste of work in the end.

“Why are you all looking at me like this? What have I done?” Chen Rui asked innocently as he felt the unkind gaze of the 4 allied women. In fact, he was really innocent. In the past few days, he failed to propose and received a cold treatment. He finally managed to date Kia out, but she was stood-up by him.

“You really have gone too far. Kia waited for you for nearly 4 hours beside the river in the western suburbs with horror!”

“The western suburbs’ river?” Chen Rui was taken aback while looking at the aggrieved little maid whose eyes were red, “Didn’t I say to meet at the southern suburbs’ Mountain Lush?”

As soon as these words were spoken, the 4 women all showed surprised expressions.

After Master Poison Dragon drank a few sips of wine in the hotel room, he finally relieved most of the depression in his heart.

“By the way, Olypheus, are you sure Chen Rui really drank that bottle of…’tonic’?”

“Ah.” Ms. Black Dragon replied casually, then she lowered her head and continued to sweep the plate.

Paglio’s brows frowned— Could it be that human’s physique is so great that he can ignore the desire for sex? It’s impossible. Someone else would, but this kind of guy who values lovers is absolutely impossible!

The poison dragon was suspicious. He walked over, picked up the juice bottle that Chen Rui hadn’t finished drinking, and carefully smelled it. His facial expression changed, “No! There is no taste of Purple Orchid Heart Grass and Ecstasy Flower. Olypheus, what is actually going on? Where is the bottle of ‘tonic’ I gave you?”

Olypheus was taken aback. She took a long time to react and looked like she had forgotten it, “I think… I drank it.”

“What! You?” The answer made Paglio shocked as he jumped up, “Did you really drink it?”

“En!” This time the little girl nodded very firmly.

Paglio almost vomited a mouthful of blood, “Didn’t I say that only men can drink it?”

“But you said it’s expensive and delicious!” Olypheus said confidently.

“I’m doomed! Dear Dragon God! I’m really doomed this time!” Master Poison Dragon just felt like the sky was spinning around- Ms. Black Dragon actually drank that bottle of ‘powerful tonic’!

The potency of this tonic is very powerful. Even if Daniel’, the blue dragon, who is imprisoned and punished with chastity pants, cannot get rid of its effect. Afterward, Elder Miss Black Dragon still had to use her body to ‘detoxify’ it. If Olypheus has already drunk all of it, the consequences will be unimaginable. Once Auglas knows…

Julia and Krobelus also realized the seriousness of the problem. They were shocked, especially Julia, who had experienced the effects of the medicine personally. Her back was soaked in cold sweat, “Olypheus, how do you feel now? Is your body a little hot? Are you dizzy?”

“Now that you said it… It seems to be starting to get hot.” Ms. Black Dragon started to fan, “Why is it so hot? Oh, my head is starting to get dizzy!”

“What to do now?!” Julia almost cried.

“Get the human back right now! No matter what method you use!” Paglio jumped up, “If you don’t want to be torn to pieces by the Sir Dragon Emperor!”

TL: They’re so doomed either way…

chapters.title: Chapter 772 - Ending
chapters.body:
Chapter 772 - Ending

Chapter 772: Ending

The hustle and bustle of the long street had become extremely deserted.

The purple moonlight revealed an empty and desolate gray. The desolate and cold night even overshadowed the sounds of wind and insects.

A pair of cold eyes stared indifferently at the black shadow in front of him.

He had a black blade in his hand.

There was blood on the tip of the knife. This blood was not only the enemy’s. He was already limping, but his hand was still very stable.

The opponent’s hand was already glowing with dazzling light, winding over like a viper, but he didn’t move.

Not moving was far more difficult and skillful than moving.

This was the most mysterious aspect of martial arts.

Seeing that he was about to be covered by the light, he finally moved his mouth.

“Help!”

Okay, the above was just the fantasized scene of the male protagonist by Master Gu Long (novelist). The real process was that the poison dragon behind the scenes sneakily followed the returning home team in an attempt to kidnap the male protagonist, but he was eventually caught by the female scientists of the alliance.

Unexpectedly, Paglio, who had always been afraid of Zola, actually did not escape, but he teamed up with Elder Miss Black Dragon Julia to launch an attack. Not surprisingly, although Paglio’s strength level and Julia had reached S++, they were restrained by magic. The poison dragon was still not an opponent of the fairy dragon, even with Elder Miss Black Dragon.

After a brief ‘dragon war’, Master Poison Dragon, which turned into rice paste, popsicles, and barbecue several times, finally couldn’t stand it, and exclaimed the word ‘help’ to the male protagonist.

Isabella walked to Paglio who had lost his combat power, “It’s amazing, heroic Sir Poison Dragon? You don’t hesitate to bribe Dodo to deceive Kia, then you deceived Chen Rui to the hotel to meet Olypheus. I want to know what actually happened?”

If it’s not a serious matter, who wants to be so heroic… The haggard Sir Poison Dragon looked depressed, “It’s not just us who bribed Dodo? Are you not the same? Isabella, for the sake of Little Betty and Olypheus. Let Chen Rui go back to the hotel. “

Chen Rui was speechless: Dodo is actually an undercover agent? It turns out that I am the biggest fool!

Athena interjected, “Why let Chen Rui go back to the hotel?”

“Because… Princess Olypheus is in danger!” Julia, who fell on the ground with green smoke around her, also struggled to speak, “Chen Rui has an obligation to protect the princess!”

“Obligation?” The little loli’s ears stood up keenly.

“Okay, don’t give me more trouble.” Chen Rui rubbed Alice’s ponytails, “I don’t understand the danger… Let Olypheus answer it. Olypheus? Come out!”

This surprised Paglio and Julia. Olypheus? Isn’t Krobelus taking care of her? Is the medicine acting up…

The figure of Ms. Black Dragon finally appeared on the back of the street, “Boss! You’re so impressive. You spotted me! It seems that the sneaking technique taught by my dad is a lie. He must pay me 1 million black crystal coins next time. “

Chen Rui directly ignored the latter sentence, “Olypheus, what is going on?”

Olypheus looked at Isabella’s encouraging gaze and she nodded, “Paglio invited me to eat a free meal today… Then he gave me a bottle of juice containing ‘very expensive and delicious’ supplements. He asked me to let boss drink it and lock the door… Then, sister came.”

“A very expensive and delicious supplement?” Madam Aunt, who was the leader of intel, immediately grasped the main point.

“He said it was for men only…”

There was almost no need to explain. Many people present understood what that thing was.

The only person who was puzzled was the naga girl. The little loli, who had been influenced by the bad books since childhood, explained like an expert, “It must be that thing that will cause a person to do evil to girls if he drinks it!”

Chen Rui had already covered his eyes speechlessly. I was actually drugged by this damn dead duck dragon, plus it’s an aphrodisiac drug! Master Poison Dragon was even more embarrassed. He wanted to transform into a ground dragon, drill a hole and escape.

Kia asked a key question, “The juice… was drunk by Chen Rui?”

Julia hurriedly replied, “Actually… It was stolen by Olypheus! This medicine is very effective and cannot be canceled. If it doesn’t… something will definitely happen!”

“Ah!” The four heroines of the alliance looked at each other. The problem is really serious now. The poison dragon’s item is definitely not a shoddy product. Do we really have to make the relationship between Chen Rui and Olypheus real…

Isabella suddenly thought of Olypheus’ description of the bottle, and she had a thought as she glanced at the little girl, “Olypheus, tell sister honestly. Did you drink it?”

Ms. Black Dragon said to Paglio as if she hadn’t heard it clearly, “What?”

Paglio, “…”

Isabella knew it, “Olypheus? Tell the truth.”

Ms. Black Dragon glanced at Julia, “Huh?“

Julia, “…”

“Olypheus?”

Ms. Black Dragon looked at Chen Rui strangely, “En?“

Okay, now everyone knew it.

‘Delicious’ did have a considerable temptation for Olypheus, but in terms of priority, ‘the most expensive’ was the first choice, so this chick must have embezzled the ‘very expensive’ bottle of ‘tonic’.

Julia, who learned the truth, looked at her smoking body, and seemed like she wanted to laugh. However, she turned into a crying face again. Her mouth was open for a long time, but she did not speak after all.

Master Poison Dragon’s eyes were black, and he was about to collapse. I have been a pirate all my life. Today, I failed in this easy task and was tricked by this chick! Thinking of the tragic situation of being almost annihilated just now, he couldn’t help but feel sorrow.

Ms. Black Dragon said hesitantly, “About that… Paglio…”

Apology? The poison dragon glared at her: Even so, I will not accept it!

“The Red Fruit Hotel’s bill hasn’t settled yet… I left Krobelus there as mortgage.”

“Boom!” Master Poison Dragon simply fainted this time.

After an hour.

In the room of the financial officer’s residence.

“Athena, Alice and Adeline are all settled, right?”

Athena nodded and whispered, “I have settled them in the palace.”

“Okay.” Chen Rui spread his hands. “4 dear ladies, sit down first. Let’s talk frankly…”

The ladies of the alliance exchanged glances quickly, and they finally sat down.

“From Dodo… Forget it. Don’t mention the cunning and damn spy bug, nor this nonsensical farce.” Chen Rui shook his head, “Actually I don’t know how to say it. Maybe you don’t care about the comparison with Shea; maybe you are not rushed to marry me… However, I really want to form a complete and warm family with my beloved women… Please forgive me for using the word ‘women’, which I’m very ashamed of. You’re all extremely good women. I’m extremely lucky to have any of you. However, for many reasons… I have all of you in my life. This is my greatest success and honor. I don’t know if I can spend a lifetime to continue this success?”

The female lord, female scientist, the female head of intel and the maid looked at each other a few times. After a moment of silence, Isabella spoke first with a touch of gentleness in her eyes, “I can only say… you are a total idiot.”

Chen Rui smiled bitterly. Anyway, the fool card… is better than the good people card.

“All women hope to find a warm, comfortable and safe harbor. I once lost all hope. Fortunately, when I thought my life was about to end, I finally found this harbor. Unfortunately, I’m not the only 1 who owns him.”

With that said, Isabella looked at her other allies and smiled, “It’s about the same as men’s possessiveness. Women also have a strong sense of exclusivity, so I care very much about comparisons with other people and even competition. However, compared with losing him, I would rather share with others. It’s just that… I really don’t want to have new competitors to share my incomplete warmth. Although I’m also a later sharer, please forgive me for being selfish.”

Although the rest of the girls did not speak, Chen Rui understood a lot from their gaze.

“Support Yini, keep the formation downstairs.”

“Support upstairs, keep the formation downstairs.”

“Support upstairs, no reply downstairs.”

Well, these were all illusions, but Chen Rui already understood Isabella very well. He was no doubt an idiot; he didn’t understand a woman’s heart at all.

“Can I understand it affectionately as… you are actually anxious to marry me? My most beautiful brides?” Chen Rui smiled, “Although we will form a big family, I will give each of you an independent wedding. I will do my best to take care of you for your whole life. As for the competitors… I can guarantee that I will never get new women.”

“Does the so-called ‘new woman’… include your lover, Christina, in the Dark Shadow Empire?” Athena asked a question that she had always cared about. In her mind, she always had scruples about the opponent who ‘snatched’ her man’s first time.

“Does it include Alice and Adeline?” This time it was the little troublemaker maid, and she added a sentence, “Your Highness Prince Consort?”

“What?” It was obviously Ms. Fairy Dragon who caused more trouble… The atmosphere suddenly became lively. They finally broke the deadlock and returned to the harmony and unity before the cold war. Regardless of whether it was a clear answer or a vague one, those problems had finally been brushed off. As Chen Rui said before, for many reasons, he had all of them in his life, and the most important reason was love. The love that was able to understand and tolerate each other.

The whole process of heart-to-heart talk was very warm. The only regret was…

“I’ll go back to the yard… Don’t look at me with that kind of gaze, dear Royal Highness Prince Consort. Although I really want to stay… How can I lose to Shea? Before the wedding, we better keep an effective distance.”

“Isabella is right. Kia, let’s go back to the palace. Alice is still waiting for us. Let’s go. Don’t linger.”

“I… My experiment has not been completed yet.”

“Wait… it’s not scientific!”

Ending: The male protagonist still guarded the empty room in tears.

TL: 🤣…

chapters.title: Chapter 773 - The Prologue Of The Gaming Era
chapters.body:
Chapter 773 - The Prologue Of The Gaming Era

Chapter 773: The Prologue of the Gaming Era

Chen Rui’s miserable life of guarding the vacant house alone did not last long. After getting the formal promise of concubine marriage, it was obvious that the women’s defense was in vain. Firstly, the little maid secretly left the door open, then the ‘punishment’ by Ms. Fairy Dragon who was unwilling to let the little maid take the lead alone… Soon, the male protagonist returned to his blissful life.

At this time, it was not too long before Chen Rui and Shea got married. Although the comparison mentality was still there, it was not as important as the independent wedding. This was once in a lifetime. It should not be hastily done because of resentment or comparison.

Under this weighing of interests, all the women really calmed their minds and were not ‘anxious’ anymore- This time, let Shea take the lead. Anyway, Shea is behind in many ways. I can take this wedding as a reference first. Our wedding can’t be lower than that in the future, right?

The turmoil of the crystal harem finally ended. As for the marriage of the substitute (a deceptive vocabulary borrowed by Isabella) and Her Majesty Empress, Chen Rui did not need to worry about it, so he calmed down and prepared to concentrate on completing an important task.

This task was what he had mentioned in front of Shea, allowing the Alchemist Association of the Fallen Angel Empire to have the same ‘foundation’ as the ancient magic tower of the Dark Shadow Empire and the Book Collection Hall of the Bloody Empire.

It could be understood as a game platform, covering the entire platform of the Demon Realm.

To be more precise, the alchemy field was just a cover, and the game was just a form of expression. What Chen Rui ‘created’ was most likely to change the entire Demon Realm.

To make a game, software and hardware were the 2 most basic elements, and the preparation and debugging work actually started long ago. This included the internal beta personnel of Roman, Delia and others who appeared in the City of Stars. The war of the Bloody Empire caused a delay in progress, but overall it went smoothly.

The technical prototypes of these games were actually produced out of the ‘inheritance illusion’ of the ancient alchemy civilization. As the master of the City of Stars, he only needed to tell the ‘intelligence center, Crystal Phoenix, of his creativity, then it could be put into trial after slight modifications. It was easy to adjust and debug with Crystal Phoenix, the biggest golden finger in the game illusion.

What Chen Rui needed to consider was how to activate this kind of illusion software through a normal hardware carrier, the game console. In fact, a part of this ‘hardware carrier’ had already been promoted in the Demon Realm, and it already had a large mass basis which was the magic television.

The launch of magic television was not just for entertainment or for profit, nor was it just to stabilize the turbulent political situation when Shea newly ascended the throne, but it was a long-term plan. The same was true for the recent ‘magic game’ plan. However, the 2 plans had now been combined into one. The reason was the 2 new exchange items added by the Super System’s exchange center after the 6-star evolution.

The first one was the ‘devotee’s heart’- An independent core of faith that could be integrated into items to become the center of absorbing faith power and converting faith. It was similar to the Tower of Faith that controlled the entire planet’s faith power in the Super System.

The second was the ‘devotee’s feet’- It was also a kind of fusion crystal that could absorb and buff faith power before passing it back to the devotee’s heart. This was equivalent to the devotee’s heart expansion subsystem; its function was similar to the Pillar of Faith.

At first, Chen Rui felt that these 2 things were too useless because no one would believe in Chen Rui or Aguile in reality. However, by chance, he merged the devotee’s heart with Crystal Phoenix and found that the bravery, perseverance, and wisdom shown in the inheritance illusion including anger, massacre and other emotions or qualities could actually generate faith power!

As a result, a huge and amazing plan was created unstoppably- The magic game centered on Crystal Phoenix, the ‘faith game’!

Through Roman and others’ testing, it was found that the players themselves had no additional losses besides the exhaustion of a certain amount of spirit power in the illusion state. On the contrary, they could also train or be entertained through the game. For Chen Rui, the beliefs provided by these players would bring him a steady stream of scarce faith crystals. In the future, he would be able to gradually comprehend the law of Demi-God.

Objectively speaking, this plan was actually consistent with the ultimate goal of Teris (Broc), but Teris’ method was to rule and enslave the entire Demon Realm and forcibly seize faith while Chen Rui turned this process into spontaneous entertainment. Just like extreme war massacres and gentle negotiation plus cooperation could bring the same result of peace.

The first batch of ‘magic television signal towers’ had been completed at the estates of the Fallen Angel Empire. These signal towers could greatly enhance the clarity of magic television and reduce interference. The core of their technology was the use of a faith receiver that the gremlin servants made using the ancient alchemy civilization’s secret technique integrated with the devotee’s feet. The faith receiver could store, receive and transmit the faith power of the television game.

Faith receivers were divided into A, B, and C according to their authority and level. In the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association, the iconic building, the Emerald Pillar, which was more than 10 meters high, incorporated the rarest Level A receiver and would become the center of faith in the entire empire game. These faith powers could be automatically transmitted to the City of Stars who owned the devotee’s heart regardless of space and distance. The beneficiary was naturally Chen Rui who owned the City of Stars’ spiritual imprint.

Another research product of the gremlin servants was the ‘game helmet’ that could be used with the magic television. The production and debugging stages had been completed and put into mass production.

Now that everything was in place, he just had to hype it up to promote it. For otaku, who was immersed in the online world and used to be a small online merchant in his previous life, there was really too much experience to ‘learn from’.

Just a few minutes of the fierce battle promotional video enticed the demons who liked to fight by nature. Of course, there was no lack of music production and illusion technology. It was thanks to the previous concert that caused a sensation in the Demon Realm. It provided valuable experience in technology.

At the same time, there were advertisements throughout the magic television and newspapers. The related equipment had not been officially sold, but the name of a new item that was about to become popular, the ‘magic game’, had almost become a household name.

Therefore, with much anticipation by millions of people, the magic game finally appeared in the market.

As in the trailer, this magic game named the ‘Infinite Warrior’ was a pure martial fighting type.

The player played the role of adventurous warriors or magicians, fighting monsters in a huge map. As the experience of killing enemies increased, the game character could be upgraded and the ability would be enhanced; some monsters would drop corresponding treasures or materials. One could go to the towns in the game to make potions and weapons to strengthen his combat power…

It was equivalent to the RPG adventure single player game in Chen Rui’s previous life, but the magic game based on the magic power of the ancient civilization was not that simple.

The game was divided into 3 levels of difficulty: easy, normal and difficult. Easy level required only a small amount of spirit power. The greater the difficulty, the greater the consumption of spirit power to enter the game and the higher the degree of simulation. This degree of simulation was not the painful feeling or look, but the real battle. The characters in the difficulty level were basically synchronized with their own strength, and it was relatively difficult to upgrade. However, the combat skills and experience gained in the game would directly reflect to the brain center to form a real spiritual imprint. In other words, it was not only entertainment; the game was real combat training.

Non-combat races such as goblins and imps, or those with weak combat ability could also enter the difficulty level. They only needed to learn to pilot a combat puppet in the game and pass the difficulty level ‘pilot’ test. They could get an enhanced version of game helmet from the local mechanics association and use the puppet pilot’s special occupation to pilot the powerful combat puppet in difficult level games.

In addition, there were countless mysteries in the game to be discovered step by step.

As soon as the ‘Infinite Warrior’ was launched, it immediately caused an unprecedented sensation in the Demon Realm.

In addition to the popular sales of the magic game helmet, the sales of magic television had also reached a historic high. The link between the magic helmet and the magic television was quite perfect. The scene entered with the helmet was a completely simulated magic illusion. Without wearing the helmet, one could enjoy the game played by the character like watching the television.

The game had a strict time limit, and the intensity was linked to the spirit power, so the average person’s daily game time was generally about 2-4 hours which was a more suitable time for training or entertainment. This undoubtedly reduced a lot of impact on other industries. Otherwise, everyone would be immersed in the game all day long and nothing else would be done.

Nowadays, more than 50% of the topics on the streets and alleys were discussing the emerging magic games.

The ‘Infinite Warrior’ actually integrated the 2 elements of abyss battle and assemble puppet. The ‘Abyss’ was just 1 of the most difficult game scenes in this big world. In order to avoid some kind of trouble, corresponding changes were made to the image of the monsters. When deciding to launch the ‘Abyss Map’, Chen Rui suddenly had a strange hunch. Perhaps, this is not just a game.

As for the special occupation of the ‘puppet pilot’, it was actually training pilots for the assemble puppet. Everyone who had received the enhanced version of the game helmet was recorded and inspected from time to time to select the best talents. The most credible talents would join the empire’s Secret Army under Her Majesty Empress. This secret army would be one of the secret military strengths of the City of Stars.

This time, Chen Rui did not launch the simulated business game that Alice tested. It was not because he was worried about the impact on the ‘Infinite Warrior’, nor was he afraid that there would be no corresponding game groups, but he had more far-reaching considerations.

The road ahead was very long. Just as the ‘Infinite Warrior’ was currently only a ‘single-player game’, the era of the great alien game directed by the crossover had just begun.

TL: Only 2-4 hours per day? That’s so little…

chapters.title: Chapter 774 - Diplomatic Mission
chapters.body:
Chapter 774 - Diplomatic Mission

Chapter 774: Diplomatic Mission

After the magic game, ‘Infinite Warrior’, was launched, the craze spread rapidly from the Fallen Angel Empire to the Demon Realm.

In terms of entertainment, this was an unprecedented model. Combat, adventure, and excitement had always been the keywords of the demons. Nowadays, even the darkest goblin with the weakest strength could become the protagonist rather than the audience and experience a series of far surreal adventures as well as battles. This sense of involvement and excitement couldn’t be replaced by any previous leisure activity.

For those who already had rich combat and adventure experience, this kind of game was an excellent training method. In addition to the spirit power exhausted by the game, the combat experience in ‘illusion’ was combined with realistic training which could accelerate the speed of strength growth.

The most fascinating thing was that in the game, they could challenge extremely difficult enemies who exceeded their own limits. If it was a battle with a higher level in reality, the result would definitely be the death of the soul while they would not truly die in the game. This allowed them to gain extremely valuable combat experience and greatly increased the possibility of breaking through the bottleneck.

The death setting of the difficult level game was not infinite reborn in place. In addition to the realistic pain, one could only be reborn in the middle of the town 2 days after death, and there was a certain period of weakness after the reborn. One could use the potion purchased in the town to heal and shorten this weak state. The 2-day buffer time could avoid the infinite death strategy. Furthermore, trainers who truly had realization would also use this buffer period to settle and train for the next challenge.

These were just the 2 main reasons for the popularity of magic games, but they were already enough to dispel the trivial doubts and criticisms.

Since the signal of magic television covered the 3 empires, the people of the Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire were also full of strong curiosity and desire to buy the new items that were vigorously promoted in the television program. This was because the new items launched by the Fallen Angel in the past 2 years such as battle ball, newspaper, television, aromatic millet wine… had become the popular item of the Demon Realm without exception. Not only these, the urban transformation of the Bloody Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire had completed the first step with the technical support of the Fallen Angel Empire. Just the automatic water element system that had entered thousands of households had benefited all demons.

In view of the terms of the 3 empires’ peace talk, the ‘new technology’ that appeared in the Fallen Angel Empire would be shared with the 2 empires free of charge. Therefore, the Fallen Angel Empire provided the 2 empires with the 2 technologies of ‘magic television signal towers’ and ‘magic game helmet’ that supported the game.

However, the sad thing was that after carefully studying the 2 technologies, the alchemists of the 2 empires reached a disappointing conclusion that they could not be imitated.

The main component of the magic television’s signal towers was the signal receiver. Its production process was extremely delicate and complicated. Even with ready-made design drawings, it couldn’t be produced in a short period of time.

The structure of the game helmet was relatively simple, and the difficulty lied in the core crystal. This kind of energy intensity was no different from ordinary white crystal, but the density and purity were quite amazing which was similar to the most expensive gold crystal. If they really used gold crystal, then the cost of the magic helmet was too astonishing. It would be impossible to reach the civilian price of the Fallen Angel Empire.

This conclusion frustrated the senior executives of the 2 empires. Nowadays, magic games had an unprecedentedly popular trend. In this trend, if the empire’s magic game couldn’t produce magic television signal towers, it would not only reveal the incompetence of the empire, but it also would bring chain negative effects.

This result was naturally expected by Chen Rui. The magic television signal receiver used the processing technology of the ancient alchemy civilization, and the manufacturer was the gremlin servants, the most powerful craftsmen in the alchemy civilization. Whether it was personnel or technology, it far exceeded the current overall level of the Demon Realm. What’s more, the real core of the receiver was the devotee’s feet produced by the Super System.

As for the core of the magic helmet, it was a mystic crystal with a trace of kingdom illusion power. Mystic crystals were actually the cheapest white crystals. After the Super System’s highest grade refinement, the density and purity had actually surpassed the gold crystals, but the energy concentration was far less, making it the most suitable kingdom illusion power carrier.

This kind of crystal was not a ‘new’ technology, because there was a similar refining technology in the battle ball back then, so the 2 empires couldn’t do anything about it. At this time, the Fallen Angel Empire very generously sold a batch of magic television signal receivers and the core mystic crystals of the magic helmet to the 2 empires at the lowest price based on the peaceful principle of friendship and mutual assistance. They also sent dedicated technicians to assist in the construction of the television signal towers.

Although some people pointed out that this was a technological invasion as relying too much on external strength would make the empire passive step by step, it was indeed the best solution in the current situation. The reason being many of the people from the 2 empires had now entered the Fallen Angel Empire to be a ‘resident’ in order to experience the magic game first. If this continued, it would be quite detrimental to their own development and economy.

In fact, the mystic crystals in the magic helmet not only stored the kingdom illusion power, the ‘upgraded version’ of the game in the future would include some of the most important functions. Even if the 2 empires refused to spend money, Chen Rui would spare no effort to give it away for free.

The faith power brought by the magic game exceeded Chen Rui’s imagination. The current coverage of the game was only a small part of the Fallen Angel Empire. Yet it brought him tens of thousands of faith crystal income every day, which was still increasing at an impressive speed. If he really built a huge network covering the entire Demon Realm…

Chen Rui suddenly thought of the human world. Whether it’s the 3 archangels that steal faiths or the Black Death Follower that plunders faiths, they are simply weak compared with my current method of collecting faiths. From another perspective, I have already embarked on a road to ‘becoming a god’.

“Hey, kid, don’t daydream! It’s your turn!” A heavy metallic voice sounded, interrupting Chen Rui’s thinking.

“Me?” Chen Rui looked at the proud and arrogant fatty in the room as he pointed to himself in surprise.

Opposite the fatty was a human figure with a light black mist. His facial features were slightly fuzzy. His eyes were glowing with dark red light while his shoulders and elbows even had sharp blade-like bone spurs.

The human figure showed a strange smile and raised the card in his hand, “Yes, I unfortunately lost in the last game. Now it’s your turn.”

This room was actually an extra space, and the external environment of this space was actually moving- This was a carriage.

The carriage had the national flag of the Fallen Angel Empire, Red Blood Flame Flag. It was followed by a lot of cavalry holding ceremonial flags in front and back. The carriage had passed the Iron Fist Estate of the Bloody Empire and was bypassing Town Essidor, heading west toward the capital.

This was the envoy team sent by the Fallen Angel Empire to the Bloody Empire. The leader was the fiancé, ‘Aguile’, of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Shea.

The dual curse of light element and dark element in Raizen’s body was not only the light element power with a high power restrain, but the dark element’s strength that assimilation and corrosion of the dark element were also very troublesome; it was more powerful than the light element. This was a result of Teris’ scheming when Raizen was training in the Dark Furnace. Although relying on 1 of the 7 artifacts, the Bloody Ring, and his own strong willpower to break through the bottleneck, he reached the kingdom level in one fell swoop, but that kind of curse power still stubbornly fused in his body like a tarsal maggot; he was unable to dispel it.

This time, Chen Rui purposely went to the Bloody Empire to treat the hidden illness of the Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen in order to fulfill his promise.

The light and dark curse on Raizen was actually cast by Midnight Sun, but the dark element strength was based on the strength of a person, Dark Elemental King Hegel. Hegel had the purest power of dark elements, so even Raizen with [Dark Mastery] was not immune to it.

It was better for the doer to undo what he had done. This time, Chen Rui brought the Dark Elemental King along to the Bloody Empire. After eliminating the holy dragon and getting the dark origin fragment, Hegel promised to do something for him, and now he had fulfilled his promise.

Chen Rui made this carriage by imitating Catherine’s space item. As a ‘mobile facility’, its space was quite large, but this was only relatively speaking. If the fatty on the opposite side of Hegel appeared in his ‘original form’. The whole space would explode apart. The fatty was none other than the Octopus King, Red Pipit from the Dead Sea.

After Chen Rui and his old father-in-law Dragon Emperor Auglas went to the Dead Sea’s Land of Hatred to kill the holy dragon Rodriguez, Chen Rui obtained the Octopus King’s soul crystal ball from the space artifact, the Tower of Glory, and returned it to the Red Pipit. The soul crystal ball was Rodriguez’s method to control the Octopus King. Without the crystal ball, even if the slavery contract was canceled, the Octopus King’s soul would still be incomplete and his strength would stagnate throughout his life.

Auglas had already given Octopus King a powerful deterrent. Under this circumstance, Chen Rui returned the soul crystal ball to Octopus King without mentioning any conditions which really made him grateful. After recovering to his complete soul with the soul crystal ball, the Octopus King immediately left the Dead Sea and rushed to the Dark Moon to contact Chen Rui as agreed.

It happened that Chen Rui was going to the Bloody Empire, so Octopus King, who had nothing to do, chose to go with him.

The strength of Octopus King was SS+ which was the peak stage of the kingdom level. If he could rush to the Fallen Angel Empire during the war at the Warlock Fortress, it would probably be another ending.

The journey was long, and Dark Elemental King Hegel, who had met the Octopus King before, accidentally mentioned the magic card game ‘Fate Showdown’. Octopus King suddenly became interested and claimed to be a good player. When Hegel left the Land of Hatred, he conveniently took the magic card of Lich King Glorios. It seemed that after losing to Lich King last time, the Dark Elemental King was determined to make a painstaking practice.

As the 2 were eager to try, the game began. The 2 sides adopted the most exciting mode of the ‘Death Game’. Octopus King no doubt had some skills; he actually competed on a par with Hegel. Both sides had victory and loss.

Chen Rui didn’t bother to watch this kind of low-level real-time strategy confrontation. Just as he was in a daze, the Octopus King actually challenged him.

“Yes, you!” Octopus King was in full spirits after defeating his rival, Hegel, “Hegel said you know this too. Come on, let me teach you.”

Teach? Chen Rui showed a strange expression, “Are you sure?”

The triumphant Octopus King didn’t notice the strangeness in the Dark Elemental King’s smile, let alone knowing that Hegel lost to him deliberately in the last game.

Thus, the tragedy of being raped began.

TL: It’s fine, no pain no gain

chapters.title: Chapter 775 - Raizen’S Request
chapters.body:
Chapter 775 - Raizen’S Request

Chapter 775: Raizen’s Request

“Impossible!”

“I don’t believe it!”

“Once again…”

After being continuously bloodbathed in the ‘Death Game’, Octopus King, who couldn’t believe it all, resolutely refused Chen Rui’s suggestion to change to another mode of competition. Under the evil gaze of the Dark Elemental King, he reluctantly chose to continue. This was undoubtedly the beginning of a nightmare.

The nightmare continued until they reached their destination, the Bloody Empire. Judging from the sluggish mental state of the Octopus King when he disembarked from the carriage, there was no doubt that he carried forward the spirit of friendship first and duel second, maintaining an all-loss record. In other words, he was abused so miserably that the Octopus King would probably shiver at the mention of the ‘Death Game’.

The same kind of sluggishness was the Dark Elemental King. After tricking the Octopus King a few times, His Highness finally couldn’t help but step into the pit himself and become the good brother of the Octopus King.

Chen Rui was no stranger to the Bloody Empire. In order to find the Fertile Yuan Soil needed by the Earth Elemental King, he passed the examination of the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association under the name of ‘Richard’. He first became Master Turia’s student, then he ‘betrayed’ him and became the disciple of the Demon Realm’s top mechanical master, Nate, for the purpose of the Book Collection Hall’s materials. After obtaining the information of the Mountain Seckred in the Book Collection Hall, Chen Rui saw through Nate’s vicious conspiracy attempting to use the evil devour ability. Therefore, he used tricks to expose Nate’s insidious face in front of all mechanics. In the end, Nate was imprisoned by Raizen while Chen Rui faked death to escape. Master Turia was now the chairman of the Mechanic Association.

By the way, Turia’s daughter… the innocent girl named Beluan seemed to be a little bit interested in ‘Richard’, but ‘Richard’ had already expressed an attitude of rejection at the time. More importantly, the male protagonist of this incident was already dead, so everything in the past had become a thing of the past. With the current situation at home, if he brought another girl back, the sky would surely fall. The previous farce was big enough to make him suffer a headache, and he didn’t want to repeat the same mistakes.

The envoy team received a grand welcome from the Bloody Empire. Chen Rui was a little surprised that Gustav, who had obviously colluded with Teris, was also among them. He was even the first general. It seems that he is not affected by Teris’ incident. What is Raizen planning exactly?

Raizen met with the envoy team of the Fallen Angel Empire in the palace hall. After the courteous etiquette, Raizen set his eyes on the Octopus King and the Dark Elemental King behind Chen Rui with a scorching light in his black eyes.

“These 2 are my friends, I invited them to treat Your Majesty.” As an envoy, it was not the same as bringing friends to visit relatives, so Chen Rui also categorized the Octopus King into the category of medical soldiers. In fact, the Octopus King, who was eager to win, had lost countless verbal promises to him on the way. He just nodded his head without objection when he heard this.

Raizen tilted his head to show courtesy to the Octopus King. His gaze toward the Dark Elemental King was a little sharper, “Sir’s breath seems familiar?”

“Of course it is familiar.” Hegel showed an uncanny smile on his face, “It’s not the first time I have seen you, but you didn’t see me back then. As for the location…”

“The Dark Furnace?” Raizen’s eyes narrowed as the cold light passed.

“Not bad.” Hegel didn’t look deterred at all.

“I’m surprised that you will openly appear in front of me.”

“Because I owe this guy a favor. I promised to do 1 thing for him; anything.” Hegel glanced at Chen Rui, “Although I think this kind of favor is not worthwhile for him, since he insisted, I came. “

“Besides him.” Raizen glanced at Chen Rui and pondered for a while before asking, “Who else have you promised?”

“A person who helped me regain strength, but he and I are clear now.” Hegel smiled calmly, “I believe you know who this person is better than me.”

“I believe that an Elemental King will not easily promise anyone.” Raizen’s breath converged, “Fulfill your promise. I don’t want to pursue other things for the time being.”

“You can pursue the responsibility anytime you want.” This time, the fatty Octopus King spoke up. He actually had no real relationship with the Dark Elemental King, but they were in the same camp now after all. As a powerhouse of the kingdom peak stage, naturally he would not sit back and watch his ‘comrade’ being threatened.

“Oh?” Raizen looked at the Octopus King with interest as the battle intent in his black eyes gradually rose, “Your strength is indeed powerful. I am not your match in terms of strength and physical state. There will be a Demon Realm martial battle in 2 years. I wonder if you have the guts to participate?”

“Guts? It’s hard to believe that this is a vocabulary spoken by a guy who has just entered the kingdom level.” The Octopus King sneered, revealing his sharp teeth. There seemed to spark in his gaze toward Raizen, “Well, your ignorant provocation succeeded in arousing my interest. After 2 years, I will let you know what is the real kingdom-level strength. However, when the time comes, you must be prepared for death.”

“Very well.” Raizen smiled, nodded, and looked at Chen Rui, “I want to compliment you. Your arrival is really a pleasant surprise, Sir Aguile.”

Chen Rui bowed slightly, “I’m glad Your Majesty can say that, so… please arrange a suitable place. I think we can start treatment.”

The dark element seal on Raizen’s body was the most original dark element strength. It had penetrated into his soul and he could barely suppress it with the Bloody Ring, but for the Dark Elemental King, it was just pulling out a dagger that he pierced into the opponent’s body. Soon, the dark element seal on Raizen’s body was dispelled.

Raizen, who had the dark element seal dispelled, seemed energetic. The next step was the light element seal. For the Demon Realm races who lived in dark elements, the power of the light element was the most troublesome and difficult strength to deal with, but For Chen Rui, it was a breeze because there were 3 Snow Dallet Trees in the Super System. This kind of faith treasure, which was ‘stolen’ from the Light Divinity Temple in order to heal Madam Aunt previously, played a huge unplanned role in advancing the peace of the Demon Realm this time.

The Snow Dallet Flower could greatly enhance the effect of the light element training and eliminate all light element curses. When used with related materials, there was a small chance to induce mutated light-element physique. Nonetheless, except for the dispelling light element curse, the rest of the functions should be useless for Raizen who had [Dark Mastery].

When Chen Rui took out the Snow Dallet’s flower, Raizen’s eyes showed an unconcealable shocked expression. It was by no means an ordinary surprise. It seemed like… it was not his first time he saw this kind of flower.

“It’s been 100 years. I didn’t expect to see the sacred flower again in my lifetime.” Raizen was silent for a moment, “I’m surprised that you can have this kind of thing. I believe you have seen my surprise. It reminds me of a person.”

“Your Majesty?”

“Don’t worry. I won’t ask you the origin of this flower. Everyone has their own secrets, even though… your secrets are incredible… You may leave this flower. There’s no need to interfere with the rest.” Raizen accepted the Snow Dallet and changed the topic, “Also, what’s the matter with the magic television signal towers? I always feel that there seems to be some uneasy factor in it.”

“This is just for entertainment just like magic television. Of course, the benefits it brings are also considerable.”

“Your so-called benefits should be more than the sales of magic television and magic helmet. Although the magic helmet cannot be manufactured for the time being, the open technology means that it is only a matter of time. Therefore, most of these benefits are actually lost. I dare to assert that you should have other means of revenue. Otherwise, how can you let the empires other than yourself benefit? Moreover, a thing that is easy for the whole people to indulge is likely to bring unpredictable consequences for the entire empire. I’m currently considering ordering a full empire boycott before the magic game has formed a scale and has enough influence power.”

Chen Rui frowned. With Raizen’s prestige, if he really wanted to order the entire empire to boycott the magic game and even influence the Dark Shadow Empire’s policy, perhaps his plan of getting the whole Demon Realm’s faith would really fail.

“Your Majesty is really over-concerned, but you guessed a point right. In fact, this game has follow-up benefits because the mystic crystal power strength of the magic helmet is limited. Once the power runs out, one can’t access the game. Now it’s a free trial period. In the future, one will need to charge the energy every once in a while to maintain access to the game. Of course, this part of the service is charged. This will be our real continuous revenue.”

Naturally, Chen Rui would not tell his faith plan. What he wanted to do was to mislead Raizen with monetary benefits, but this kind of charging method was indeed 1 of the plans. In fact, it was equivalent to ‘point card’ or ‘monthly subscription’ charging methods of the game. One thing for sure was that future games would definitely not only be single-player.

Raizen’s eyes lit up with a bizarre expression, “Good means! No wonder you have stated in the agreement that the 3 empires shall not prohibit each other’s television program-related content. Plus, in order to recover the cost of some of the programs, they will be charged selectively in the future, and the rest of the empire cannot be discounted. It turns out that you were prepared long ago. Almost everyone thinks that the Fallen Angel Empire has suffered a big loss with those terms, but now it seems that those of us who underestimate the Fallen Angel Empire are the ones that will really suffer a loss.”

“Your Majesty, don’t get me wrong. Benefits can coexist. Our model, including technology, can also be imitated by your empire. As long as you produce the corresponding equipment and games, you can naturally compete with us for this market share. According to the agreement, we also will not ban your empire’s ‘program’.

“You mean to follow you forever? Just like the rest of the things? This will only make the distance between us and you bigger and bigger. I believe Catherine understands this too.” Raizen took a deep look at Chen Rui, ” I really admire the people who designed this game idea. In another kind of battle, you undoubtedly have the upper hand. But you should not underestimate the strength of an empire. I can restrict it by many means… If you can promise me a request, not only will I not obstruct it, but I will also spare no effort to support the promotion and development of all new items of the Fallen Angel Empire. The consensus of the 2 empires is enough to form a big trend. Even if the remaining empire wants to resist, it is difficult to stop it. Of course, this time is within 2 years.”

Chen Rui thought for a while and asked, “What’s the request?”

“Go to the 4th floor Book Collection Hall of the Mechanic Association to help me bring out someone. I should have gone by myself, but I can’t do it in my current physical condition, so this matters needs your kingdom-level friend’s help.”

The highest mystery of the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association, the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall? Chen Rui’s mind moved. Raizen went on to say, “Her name is Tiffany.”

TL: Tiffany? The mysterious girl appears in earlier chapters?

chapters.title: Chapter 776 - Abnormality In The Book Collection Hall
chapters.body:
Chapter 776 - Abnormality In The Book Collection Hall

Chapter 776: Abnormality in the Book Collection Hall

Tiffany’s name reminded Chen Rui of the girl with light blue hair and a veil whom he met at the Bloody Empire’s trade fair. Tiffany was very curious about everything. She had a touch of friendliness which made it easy for someone to have a good impression. At that time, Chen Rui promoted his self-made handheld console which was the game that “the mistakes made will accumulate while the successes gained will disappear.” Um, it was the Tetris game which aroused Tiffany’s great interest.

Later, Chen Rui followed Nate to the Third General Adelaide’s birthday party as Richard. A special incident occurred at the party. Young Prince Teris killed an important person in the fight between Great Prince Aleus and Second Prince Edmund. He also used the opportunity to confess his love to Tiffany, but Tiffany fled in panic, and Teris entered the Dark Furnace to reflect and train.

Later, Chen Rui went to the Mountain Seckred and met a mysterious girl whom he suspected to be Tiffany, Satan’s apprentice and believer. She acted ruthlessly, unlike the previous Tiffany.

To think about it now, as the boss of the Bloodfall who manipulated the Demon Realm’s chaos, was his confession to Tiffany really to show his love, or was it an excuse to enter the Dark Furnace, or something else? Now that Teris was dead, this has also become a mystery.

“Sir Aguile?” Raizen’s voice interrupted Chen Rui’s thinking.

Chen Rui came back to his senses and spoke up, “Your empire’s Mechanic Association’s Book Collection Hall is famous in the Demon Realm. It is said that the 4th floor is its greatest mystery, but I only heard about it. I don’t know what’s the mystery in it. Moreover, I need to figure out why must it be a kingdom-level powerhouse to enter? Also, who is that Ms. Tiffany and what happened to her there? Or what will happen to my friend when he goes there?”

“The Book Collection Hall has a long history, and its verifiable years are hundreds of thousands of years. Its the 4th floor… To be precise, it is a strange area similar to the kingdom, containing mysterious and vast strength. Outsiders can only rely on the assistance of certain magic items to enter it and there is a strict time limit. Otherwise, they will be annihilated by its immense power.”

Chen Rui knew that what Raizen said was not a lie. There was definitely more than 1 mechanic master who was annihilated on the 4th floor because of their greed for knowledge and realization. When he entered the 4th floor to search for the whereabouts of the Mountain Seckred back then, he would have been annihilated by the kingdom power because of the timeout if he hadn’t forcefully activated the time law at a critical moment.

“As for Tiffany…” Raizen paused for a while before he continued, “She’s the royal bloodline of the Mammon Royal Family. In order to train a certain strength, she entered the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall 40 days ago. The originally scheduled period is 1 month, but she has not come out until now. The mechanics of the association also enter the closed 4th floor for their usual studying and browsing. To break the closed entry forcibly, you must have kingdom-level strength. Therefore, I would like to invite your kingdom-level strength friend to bring Tiffany out safely.”

“I see.” Chen Rui thought for a while, “But… Your Majesty is sure that Ms. Tiffany is still alive?

Raizen’s answer was positive, “I’m sure.”

“Although I very much hope that the Bloody Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire can become a strategic ally for economic development, the key to this is my friend’s own wishes. If he is unwilling, then I can’t do anything. I need to discuss it with him.”

At this moment, a guard came to report, “Your Majesty, Sir Ragertre is asking to see you for an emergency report about the Mechanic Association!”

Raizen frowned slightly, Chen Rui’s mind moved and spoke up, “This news may be related to Your Majesty’s commission just now. Can I not avoid it?”

Raizen said to the guard as he nodded slightly, “Let Ragertre come in and report.”

Ragertre, an officer sent by Raizen to investigate and monitor the Mechanic Association, brought bad news this time.

Something abnormal happened in the Book Collection Hall this morning. Many mechanics, including the President Turia of the Mechanic Association, were inexplicably unconscious and the potion masters of the Potioneer Association had rushed for treatment, but they were helpless.

“What?” Raizen furrowed his brows tighter, “Ragertre, please seal relevant news first to avoid the situation from expanding. I will go to the Mechanic Association now.”

Chen Rui stood up when he heard Turia was unconscious, “If Your Majesty doesn’t mind, I want to take a look together.”

“Certainly.”

Soon, Raizen, Chen Rui and others rushed to the Mechanic Association.

It was still the large-scale Mechanic Association building in Chen Rui’s memory. At this moment, the outer area was full of heavily armed soldiers. Any entry and exit were prohibited.

President Turia’s wife, mechanic master Mavinna, led the mechanics to bow toward Raizen. She had unconcealable anxiety on her face. Speaking of which, Chen Rui was the matchmaker of Mavinna and Turia, the pair of happy enemies. When Chen Rui saw the ‘lady teacher’ whom he had not seen for some time, he felt a cordial feeling in his heart. In any case, Turia and his wife treated him, the ‘apprentice’, sincerely.

According to Master Mavinna, Master Turia and 2 mechanical masters were reading the information on the Book Collection Hall’s 3rd floor this morning. They were discussing the structure of the magic television signal receiver that they had been studying before, then they suddenly fainted and became unconscious. At the same time, the mechanics on the 2nd and 1st floors also had the same situation as if they had been attacked by something. Later, everyone carefully entered the Book Collection Hall to carry Master Turia and others out.

After a few hours, the morning incident repeated again. Another group of people passed out. At present, the Book Collection Hall had been isolated, and the mechanics dared not approach it.

Raizen’s gaze moved slightly as he glanced at the Book Collection Hall in the distance, “Do you feel it? Sir Red Pipit.”

Octopus King, who followed Chen Rui to the Mechanic Association to join in the fun, nodded, “Although the remaining law breath was weak, it was very pure and very strong. Aguile, I suddenly became interested in this place. Maybe I should promise you the matter that you mentioned.”

Chen Rui’s mind moved slightly, “If you are really interested, we can go together.”

Raizen slightly pondered and said to Mavinna, “Master Mavinna. Come, let’s see Master Turia first.”

A group of people came to the Mechanic Association’s lounge. There were many unconscious mechanics lying there. In the innermost room, Chen Rui saw his former ‘teacher’ Turia. Turia’s facial expression was gray with weak breathing. Beside Turia, there was a pretty girl with red glasses. It was Turia’s daughter, Beluan.

“Your Majesty.” Seeing Raizen’s arrival, Beluan hurriedly saluted.

Raizen nodded and asked Wilson, the president of the Potioneer Association, “Master Wilson, how is Master Turia?”

Master Wilson sighed, “Master Turia should have been eroded by a strange dark element power. His soul and body seem to be separated, so he was unable to wake up, and his soul power is still weakening. This situation… potion or healing methods can no longer work. If his soul collapses over time, even the legendary resurrection potion cannot save him. Not only Master Turia, but all the people who have been eroded are like this. I have tried my best.”
