Beluan’s glasses were already blurred, and the big tears fell drop by drop. Her body trembled as she held Master Mavinna’s hand tightly.

“Hegel.” Chen Rui pulled the Dark Elemental King to the side, “Can you dispel this kind of dark element power?”

Regardless of whether there was any agreement between the empires, Chen Rui couldn’t just sit back and watch it because of personal reasons.

“Red Pipit has just said that the root is the law power. Unless the root is cut off, it is impossible to dispel its effect, but I can still control this kind of strength from triggering…” Hegel suddenly snorted, “I don’t know why you suddenly become so nosy, but did you forget something? The favor I owe you have been paid off!”

Chen Rui shrugged, “Didn’t you also say it in the hall before? It’s not a good deal to repay this favor, so please help me again. I remember that the dark elementals would clearly distinguish kindness and hatred.”

Hegel glanced at Chen Rui coldly, “This kind of trick is useless. If you ask for my help, there must be a corresponding price. Maybe you should agree to 1 of my conditions?”

“Should I feel honored? I’m neither a friend nor an enemy… but a partner?” Chen Rui smiled slightly.

Despite the mask, Hegel could still feel the annoying smile on his face, “Hmph! Don’t regret it.”

When the Dark Elemental King slowly raised his hand, the origin fragment on his arm, the ‘Nightmare Band’ exuded a faint trace of black gas. The black gas spread to the bodies of Turia and the mechanics. After a while, the face of Turia and the others began to recover a bit of vitality. Although they still hadn’t awakened, the condition of their souls’ continuous weakening had disappeared.

Raizen nodded to Chen Rui after he overheard the conversation between Chen Rui and Hegel just now, “Thank you, Sir Aguile.”

Mavinna and Beluan hurriedly bowed to Chen Rui in tears. Chen Rui couldn’t say much with his current status, so he just nodded in return.

“Okay, Hegel will stay here to stabilize these guys. Aguile, let’s go to the Book Collection Hall to have a look.” The Octopus King who was eager to try spoke up, “Just take it as I’m repaying your favor.”

“I think I seem to have become a creditor; there are people everywhere paying me.” Chen Rui smiled, “It’s just that your interest in there shouldn’t be equated with ‘repaying favors, right?”

Octopus King grinned, “Let’s go, calculative guy.”

Raizen asked someone to present a hand-drawn map as well as 2 sets of cloaks and glasses. “This is the map of the Book Collection Hall. The entrance to the 4th floor should not be difficult to find, but the door is closed. Even with the blood of the opener, it will not work. Perhaps this strange Sir Aguile has other ways. Otherwise, he can only rely on the strength of Sir Red Pipit to crack it. Also, ordinary mechanics must wear these 2 items to enter the 4th floor in order to avoid damage from the other force there within a limited time. I hope these 2 things can help both of you.

Octopus King was indifferent to these things. Chen Rui had used cloaks and glasses. Knowing that they had a certain protective effect, he took them. The 2 left the lounge and headed for the Book Collection Hall.

TL: Whose kingdom is that? Shouldn’t be from the Abyss Family right? It also seems to have the destructive power of the silver box…

chapters.title: Chapter 777 - Enter
chapters.body:
Chapter 777 - Enter

Chapter 777: Enter

Chen Rui and Red Pipit walked into the Book Collection Hall which was classified as a restricted area, and the faint feeling in Chen Rui’s heart became clearer as they stepped closer. This was a kind of unprecedented breath containing the mysterious rule. Although he had not entered the state of [Pole Star Transformation], he could still feel the existence of that kind of law power.

‘Law’ was the basis of formation for kingdomized. Compared with this, the Demon Overlord-level territory could only be regarded as a rule similar to ‘law’. Only by comprehending the law power could the territory achieve a real qualitative change and thus evolve into the most original kingdom.

For the entire journey to the Demi-God level and even God with Kingdom of God, kingdomized was only a starting point, but it was also the most important first step. If this step was taken, it would cross the gap that divided the ordinary powerhouse and super powerhouse to step into a whole new ‘world’.

When Chen Rui activated the [Pole Star Transformation], he could activate a powerful strength equivalent to the law and compete with the kingdom powerhouse, Isyorul. However, it was a passive strength developed through the evolution of the Super System instead of his own real perception.

These days, Chen Rui did not relax his training. He would enter the training ground every day to use time law to comprehend. At his current level, simple physical or mental training had no much effect. The most important thing was comprehension.

The 6-star evolution was an evolution equivalent to the law power, and this law power was the law containing the highest truth of the universe. The difference between the levels should be a reflection of the degree of law comprehension. He was currently the lowest Blue Pole Star Level. If he could touch even a trace of the edge of universe law, he could break through the current Pole Star Level.

At that time, [Pole Star Transformation] could exert its true power.

Chen Rui was only ‘sensing’ the law now which was far from ‘realization’. Even the ‘time law’ generated by the alternation of the 4 seasons’ territory was more of a ‘rule’ category which was not considered a real law.

“Is it my illusion? You seem to be familiar with it?” The Book Collection Hall was huge, and the terrain was not complicated, but it was not flat land. Octopus King was still in the front at first, but then he unconsciously followed Chen Rui. Soon, the 2 of them entered the 3rd floor.

“Your illusion.” Chen Rui raised the hand-drawn map in his hand. Items such as magic maps couldn’t play a role in this kind of place, “The magic circle here seemed to have been stopped. After going up this staircase, it should be the entrance to the 4th floor.”

The 4th floor was the biggest secret of the Book Collection Hall. It could only be entered by a master or accompanied by a master. It also required a lot of contribution points and a lot of scarce materials. What’s even more amazing was that what everyone saw seemed to be different. Chen Rui once heard that 2 masters, Turia and Mavinna, said that there were countless rich materials, but neither of them remembered exactly what they saw afterward, yet at that time, some special insights or memories still remained in their minds. Chen Rui didn’t feel this way when he went in last time perhaps because he took off his glasses boldly. However, the consequence of taking off the glasses was to see the boundless ancient runes and the terrifying Demi-God territory. It was very dangerous at that time. If it weren’t for the power of time that he comprehended at the spur of the moment, he had been turned into ashes by that vast and boundless strength.

“This door is the entrance to the 4th floor, right? The remaining breath of the law should be exuded from here.” Octopus King walked upstairs and looked at the front door. The material of this door was quite special. It was neither metal nor stone. It gave people a heavy feeling. There were countless primitive patterns on it. The strange thing was that it didn’t even have a keyhole.

Red Pipit pushed the door, but it didn’t move at all. A puzzled expression flashed past his eyes. Although his movements were casual just now, he had already used 20% strength. Even a city wall protected by magic would be knocked down. Unexpectedly this door’s sturdiness was far higher than expected; there was actually no response.

Octopus King felt that he had embarrassed himself in front of Chen Rui. A glimmer of light flashed in his eyes, and the powerful kingdom power had been condensed in his hand in an instant as he hit the door with a punch.

Chen Rui was recalling the last time Nate opened the door when he suddenly felt the terrifying breath from Octopus King, “Wait a minute!”

It was too late when he said this. In an instant, the entire Book Collection Hall shook. The stairs behind Chen Rui shattered inch by inch. Most of the ground and many rooms on the 3rd floor were cracked. No one knew if the information inside was affected.

In fact, Octopus King had controlled the strength and range of this punch, but the kingdom-level strength was too strong. Moreover, the magic circle of the Book Collection Hall had stopped, and it had lost its protective strength. Therefore, the aftermath of the shock caused a large area of damage.

However, under such a punch, the door still did not open. Only a shallow fist mark appeared which was insignificant compared to the entire thick door.

The Octopus King knew that he had caused a small trouble. What’s more, the door did not open after such a big movement. He turned around and smiled, “It’s a hard door.”

Chen Rui was speechless. He pointed at the door, “It’s not just hard.”

Octopus King looked back and saw that the fist mark gradually faded at a speed visible to the naked eye, and it soon recovered to its original state. He was dumbfounded, “Didn’t Raizen say that the kingdom power can be used to break the closure to enter directly? Even if I hit with all my strength, I’m afraid the entire Book Collection Hall would be shattered by the aftermath of the shock before this door is not broken. What should we do?”

“Let me think about it first, don’t mess around.”

“Forget it. What can you think of, this door doesn’t even have a hole…” While Octopus King muttered to himself, he finally began to notice the pattern on the door, “That’s right, this must be the key to opening the door! Judging from my many years of experience, this pattern seems to be related to some ancient things… Oh, it should be the ancient runes known as the ‘Language of Gods’! Damn, ancient runes are mysterious and profound. Besides those who are stubborn and spend tens of thousands of years studying it; otherwise even the general Demi-God, there are not many…”

While the Octopus King was complaining about it, he saw Chen Rui walking to the door and started to draw out strange symbols in his hand. There were a total of 18 flying toward the door. The pattern on the door flashed light and began to vibrate slightly. However, it seemed not strong enough to open it.

Octopus King was stunned. It was obvious that Chen Rui activated the ancient runes that required ‘tens of thousands of years of study’ plus ‘stubbornness’ to understand.

“You, you, you… Is it my illusion again? Judging from your breath of life, your age is definitely not more than 100 years old. How can you…”

“Don’t roast me anymore, help me!” Chen Rui interrupted the Octopus King, “If I guessed correctly, this door should have used some kind of blood as the key, but now the blood has obviously expired, so it should be forced open with kingdom power.”

The Octopus King didn’t have time to ask what it meant to roast. He quickly channeled the kingdom power into those symbols. The symbols suddenly shined brightly, and the patterns on the gates were also changing rapidly, turning into 18 incomparably clear basic ancient runes. With a rumbling sound, it finally opened.

“How did you know about ancient runes?” The Octopus King looked annoyed. As he was tragically defeated in the ‘Fate Showdown’ when he came on the way, he always wanted to use an opportunity to show off his strength and redeem his reputation, but he didn’t expect the limelight to be robbed by this guy again.

“Your illusion!” Up to now, Chen Rui had some understanding of Octopus King’s temperament. He laughed as he walked toward the door.

Behind the gate was a large hall. Except for the blue shining halo on the central ground, there were no extra furnishings. There were many materials on the ground. As Raizen said, the 4th floor was usually open once every 7 days. Tiffany went in for a long period this time, so when President Turia entered with this noble lady, he left a lot of spare materials just in case.

Chen Rui used [Deep Analysis] to recall the method that Nate used to activate the halo previously. As he inserted the materials into the grooves around the halo in order, the halo suddenly emitted a dazzling blue light, and a royal blue light gate appeared in the center.

“You dare to say you haven’t been here before?”

“Alright , don’t bother about the details.” Chen Rui shrugged to Octopus King as he passed the cloak and glasses over, “The inside is the real 4th floor. Put on this first just in case, especially the cloak. It should save a lot of trouble. After all, our purpose of this trip is to find someone.”

“Hmph!” Octopus King took the glasses and cloak, thought about it, and put it on.

The 2 of them stepped into the space door. After the scene was distorted for a while, they had entered another world.

This world was like a big screen with countless small screens in the middle that were sub-worlds. These sub-worlds gradually change like entrances to activities.

Chen Rui and Red Pipit walked in the void. Every time they took a step, a translucent step would automatically appear under their feet.

There were countless mysterious knowledge and strength in the world of these activities. Those who enter could choose the entrance to browse or comprehend. However, this process must be completed within a limited time. Once the red light of the glasses emitted a warning, the red jade lock on the cloak must be crushed immediately. This would directly send them out the gate.

However, Chen Rui’s purpose today was not for knowledge, but for Tiffany, so he took off his glasses. The functions of these magic glasses were mainly timeout alarm and ‘filtering’. As soon as they were taken off, the sight in his sight changed drastically.

All the worlds were gone. They turned into symbols of various sizes that flicker all over the sky- Ancient runes!

This was the world of ancient runes! Just like the binary ‘1’ and ‘0’ in the computer, everything was composed of 18 basic symbols. If the ancient runes in Chen Rui’s mind were a short essay composed of words and sentences, then the entire world of the 4th floor was a coherent and complete long story.

Although it was not the first time Chen Rui saw such a spectacle, he was still awe-struck.

These runes were mysterious and profound. Even with Chen Rui’s current level, he still couldn’t fully comprehend them. The [Deep Analysis] suddenly operated at high speed.

“This place makes me feel uneasy,” Octopus King took off his glasses, showing a surprised expression, and he put them on again “Okay, I’ll listen to you next. What shall we do?”

“Don’t wander around. Let me have a look.” Chen Rui focused his attention and began to analyze the traces and rhythm of these runes. It was too difficult to find Tiffany from so many sub-worlds in a limited time. This direct analysis method of the essence was the most direct.

“There seems to be a trace of change here, maybe we can go from here…” Chen Rui turned his head, and he was shocked suddenly because the Octopus King who had been waiting for him to act suddenly disappeared. An ominous premonition surged in his mind.

TL: Hmm, did he get teleported away or he see something interesting…

chapters.title: Chapter 778 - Eye
chapters.body:
Chapter 778 - Eye

Chapter 778: Eye

A considerable part of Chen Rui’s [Deep Analysis] was reserved for the ‘Tower of Glory’. As long as he didn’t forcibly activate the Tower of Glory, his current S++ spirit power could still be used relatively freely for [Deep Analysis].

This ancient runes world was not static; it constantly circulated and changed just like a huge living creature. For Chen Rui who had mastered the basics of ancient runes, it was undoubtedly a huge treasure house. However, what he had to do now was not to learn the knowledge of this treasure house, but to find his companion and the goal of this trip as soon as possible.

Although he didn’t know why Tiffany stayed in this place for more than a month, it was certain that after about a few hours, this knowledge treasure house would become the most terrifying hell.

Chen Rui took a deep breath, calmed down, and began to analyze and identify the changing trajectory of the ancient runes around him. Red Pipit has just disappeared, but there is no trace of it like a drop of water in the vast sea. However, the runes changes earlier were probably left by Tiffany who entered the world 40 days ago. Tiffany must have caused some amazing changes.

Now it is impossible to find the location of Red Pipit. I can only find some links by following the traces that Tiffany left.

Chen Rui’s [Deep Analysis] had reached its limit, and those incomprehensible sentences were quickly ‘copied’ by [Deep Analysis] as it searched for possible matches in memory and understanding at a high speed. Although there were still some errors, he had implicitly understood part of the meaning.

Just like a primary school student, although he did not know many words when reading a novel of interest, he could still approximately understand the general meaning of the novel.

Following this ‘approximate’ feeling, Chen Rui carefully walked forward step by step. The ‘transparent ladder’ in the [Analytical Eyes] was actually a section of the cyclical conditional handle. If this cyclical conditional handle combined with alchemy were used in the real world, it was very possible to create quite wonderful things.

Chen Rui did not have such extra thoughts as he was just trying to digest and recognize the mystery of the world’s origin, runes, to look for traces that might be left by Tiffany. For the world of runes, it was as if a person’s wound was slowly healing. Many of them had been assimilated. Moreover, the entire world was not static but changing all the time, which added a lot of difficulty to Chen Rui, who was originally an ‘outsider’.

Unknowingly, 2 hours had passed. Chen Rui came to a frustrating conclusion. If this search continued, it would be difficult to find results even for a few days. There was not much time left for him. If Red Pipit did not use the cloak power to escape out, then this trip even affected Octopus King, so he had to take a risk.

What Chen Rui had to do was to use the [Deep Analysis]’s understanding of ancient runes, use his strength to make a certain impact on the world, and find the clues he wanted to find. Simply put, he would act as a’ virus’ to invade this computer.

A physical golden rune appeared in Chen Rui’s hand and slowly flew toward a node that he had been studying for a long time.

This rune seemed to be only the size of a palm, but it condensed all his strength. The golden rune quickly blended into the rune of that node. 1 minute had passed, 2 minutes, 3 minutes… half an hour had passed, but nothing happened yet.

Chen Rui reluctantly gave up waiting. As he was about to move forward, there were a few rays of golden lights in his sight. The golden color of the node spread around like a spider web.

Although it was nothing more than a trivial movement compared to the whole world, it was enough to surprise Chen Rui. He didn’t move rashly. He immediately put on the pair of magic glasses, and saw that the world in the glasses changed strangely. An intermittent passage appeared in front of him. Chen Rui knew that the strength of the rune just now was limited and this passage could not be maintained for a long time, so he walked in immediately.

Each section of the passage was another sub-world. Chen Rui shuttled for a while, feeling that the ‘wound’ caused by a certain strength to the big world became more and more obvious. Finally, he saw a floating figure in the air.

Judging from the figure, this was a woman whose whole body exuded a black and white light. With that light, the night and day in the space were constantly changing, and a powerful repulsive force radiated out. With Chen Rui’s current strength, he actually couldn’t get close.

Tiffany? Chen Rui couldn’t clearly see the woman’s specific appearance. The distance between the 2 was about 1 kilometer, but there were actually 2 different spaces. The repulsive force that Chen Rui sensed came from the junction of the spaces. It contained pure destruction law power which was shocking.

Chen Rui had already sensed that his previous golden rune power was about to disappear. It is very likely that this space will also disappear in the sense due to the change. I have already reached this point; I can’t return with nothing. He took a deep breath, and a trace of blood flashed across his eyes as he had switched to ‘Shura Mode’.

Shura, who was annihilated in the battle with Teris, had long been reborn. As long as Chen Rui, the original body, did not die, the avatar could be reborn infinitely. The price was a lot of aura and the corresponding time.

If the avatar did not leave the original body, Chen Rui could directly ‘utilize’ the ability, but if the avatar was separated, it couldn’t be activated.

A huge black hole appeared in front of him. This move was the [Star Devouring] that combined the power of Shura’s devour. Its power was far above the normal mode of [Star Devouring]. Chen Rui jumped into the black hole and they merged into one. In an instant, the pure destructive breath all around rushed into the black hole frantically, and the edge of the void gradually solidified into a translucent entity like glass.

As the destructive breath greatly weakened, a crack appeared in the ‘glass’, and the crack spread quickly. With a ‘bang’, the 2 spaces merged into 1. The black and white light on the woman’s body quickly dimmed. Her distance from Chen Rui suddenly got closer, just tens of meters away.

Chen Rui, who had retracted the black hole, saw it clearly. No doubt it was Tiffany, but her eyes were closed tightly; she seemed to be unconscious.

At this moment, an extremely dangerous omen surged in Chen Rui’s mind, and the glasses that should give the warning sign later flashed a warning red light. Before Chen Rui could react, the peaceful world around him instantly boiled, and the indescribable violent breath burst pit. In the blink of an eye, it had spread all over the world.

Tiffany’s body was wrapped in the breath and slowly became blurred.

Chen Rui was so pressured by the breath that he couldn’t move, nor could he crush the lock of the cloak to escape. He could only watch Tiffany’s figure disappear little by little under the breath.

“Boom!” The magic glasses shattered. the specific content could no longer be seen in the frantically changing ancient runes, but he could feel the increasingly strong intent: Death! Annihilation!

Chen Rui’s vision was blurred because of the growing berserk power. even his body had almost lost consciousness, only his spirit and soul were struggling to resist. In this case, even if he could barely activate the [Star Gate], he couldn’t get in at all.

This pressure had far surpassed any kingdom-level powerhouse that Chen Rui had encountered. It even surpassed his Dragon Emperor, old father-in-law, Auglas!

With this kind of absolute gap, even if Chen Rui could activate [Pole Star Transformation], he was definitely not an opponent.

The berserk and restless rune world gradually subsided. As his vision began to recover, he saw a huge eye in the center of the space.

Chen Rui had fought against Isyorul who had a ‘third eye’, and he had also seen Auglas’ [Dragon God Eyes] as well as Rodriguez used the light elements and dark elements origin fragment to condense into gold and silver pupils in the Tower of Destruction. However, these ‘eye powers’ added up were still inferior to this eye.

Compared with the previous berserk breath, this eye exuded a relatively serene strength, but this ‘serenity’ gave people a stronger sense of suffocation.

There was no information in the [Analytical Eyes]. Obviously, the distance between this eye and him was farther than imagined. The pupil of the eye was black and crystal clear. The gaze was very indifferent. Chen Rui instinctively felt that as long as the ‘eye’ had a slight thought, it could annihilate him instantly. What a terrifying strength this is.

If according to Teris, the gods have fallen asleep, then this level of strength should be infinitely close to god… Pseudo-God!

“Whose believer are you?” A sound that penetrated into his soul sounded in Chen Rui’s mind, as if from a deep hell.

“Revered powerhouse, please forgive me for being presumptuous. My name is Aguile. I was commissioned by the Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen to come here to bring back the noble lady Ms. Tiffany of Mammon Royal Family.” Chen Rui used the [Analytical Eyes] to reply with spirit power.

“Ignorant ant! No matter how advanced your hiding skills are, that kind of light-element physique still can’t hide from the eyes of the real powerhouse! The [Body of Light Blessing]… no! I saw something purer than the [Body of Light Blessing]… Hmph! Are you the Pope or the Pope’s inheritor of the Holy Church? Or should I say, what is the plan of that damn conspirator Michael?”

Chen Rui was shocked as he didn’t expect the other party to actually see through the skills of the Super System’s [Breath Holding] and [Camouflage], directly revealing his [Body of Light Glory]. Moreover, the ‘eye’ spoke out the name of Michael, the head of the 3 archangels on the ground without hesitation. It must be the Pseudo-God powerhouse of the same level.

There is actually a Pseudo-God powerhouse hidden in the Bloody Empire’s mechanics association most mysterious 4th floor, the world of active ancient runes. This truth is really shocking!

Chen Rui thought about it, and said quickly, “Please allow me to explain, sir…”

“My name Sariel…you may have heard my name before.” The voice of the ‘eye’ revealed a fluctuation that made one’s soul tremble, “Your kind of soul reborn tricks is not worth mentioning in front of my Evil Pupil! Now, answer my question right away! If you play tricks again, I will turn your soul into nothingness!”

TL: Sariel? Another angel?

chapters.title: Chapter 779 - Key And Task
chapters.body:
Chapter 779 - Key And Task

Chapter 779: Key and Task

The name ‘Sariel’ sounded familiar to Chen Rui. He should have seen it in the religious materials that he occasionally read on the Internet in the previous life, but in this magical with with Lucifer, Satan, Michael… it was not surprising that there was 1 more ‘Sariel’. It could not match with the legend in the memory of that otaku.

Now his fragile life was held in the hand of this Sariel, and the other party had determined his human identity and the [Body of Light Glory] with preconceived consciousness. If he denied or quibbled, he might be killed immediately.

What made Chen Rui most nervous was the vocabulary of ‘soul reborn’. Can he also see through my crossover? It doesn’t look like it when you think about it. Why does he say ‘trick’?

Chen Rui thought quickly, and he replied, “No doubt sir is observant. I’m indeed a human, and… I came from the Holy Light Mountain, but before confessing the whole thing, I want to ask, what does sir mean by the so-called ‘soul reborn trick’?”

“Hmph! You so-called holy apprentices, don’t you think you have eternal life, and your soul can be infinitely reborn in the Kingdom of God?” Sariel said disdainfully, “It’s just a trick to fool believers. If you think you can rely on this to play tricks in front of me, then my Evil Pupil will completely annihilate all your hopes!”

Oh, that’s why. Chen Rui sighed in relief. He frowned when he thought of the ‘eternal life’ mentioned by the holy apprentice Clark and April, “It seems that Sir Sariel is very familiar with the Holy Light Mountain, but when the holy apprentice mentioned this kind of ‘eternity’ to me, my answer was, “I don’t know whether the so-called reborn is true or not. I only know one thing, there is nothing absolutely eternal or immortal. Every existence has a day of decay, even if it is god.”

Sariel was silent for a moment, “You’re wrong, god is truly immortal, even if… you go on. Maybe I will consider giving you a way to survive.”

Chen Rui knew well that the so-called ‘give a way to survive’ was definitely not because of those words, but because the other party already had plans. It seemed that he still had value. Otherwise, as long as Sariel blinked, an ant like him would have been completely annihilated without a chance to speak.

“I would like to clarify 1 matter. I’m definitely not a believer of Michael and those guys! On the contrary, because of the physique problem, I’m regarded as a thorn in the eye by the current Pope Vantis. I was heinously framed and hunted down. In desperation, I took the risk of being devoured by space turbulence to come to the Demon Realm! My body is even imprisoned by Raphael’s law artifact, the Shackles of True Flame.”

The crystal clear intent in Sariel’s black pupil was even greater. Chen Rui only felt a strange power passing by within his body, sending a chill into his spine.

“It’s really Raphael’s Shackles of True Flame.” Sariel seems to be thinking, and the power that bound Chen Rui was gradually loosening, “Your soul fluctuation seems to be calmer. Is it because you have told the truth or found a familiar lying rhythm? But judging from a few pieces of evidence, the former is more likely. Well, according to your storyline, Your Holiness, who owns the [Body of Light Glory] should have become the pope… You should have considered revenge before, right?”

Although Sariel said that he might believe it, Chen Rui knew that these old monsters who had lived for so many years were not easy to deal with, so he still dared not relax in the slightest. “Of course, I want to regain everything I lost. With my [Body of Light Glory], the position of the pope should have been mine… But with my current strength, I can’t shake the foundation of the Holy Light Mountain at all. However, these are all empty talks now. First, saving my life now from sir is the priority.”

Sariel’s voice was a little bit more contemptuous, “You’re smart, but the value you showed is not enough to arouse my interest. It is not enough to make up for the cost of disturbing the kingdom and waking me from sleep.”

The 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall was no doubt the kingdom of Pseudo-God. Chen Rui knew that this was definitely not the broken kingdom of the holy dragon, but the real Pseudo-Kingdom of God. Even though he had now recovered his mobility, he still couldn’t escape. As long as the other party moved his mind, he would be annihilated before entering the [Star Gate], so he could only win with wits.

“I’m commissioned to take away Ms. Tiffany this time. The identity of Ms. Tiffany is a bit special. I’m sorry for the unintentional interruption of sir’s sleep… Moreover, I can show the value that sir needs.”

“Tiffany? What do you want to remind me of?” Sariel said mysteriously, “It seems that you still don’t understand the real purpose of her coming here.”

Chen Rui cautiously tested, “I really don’t know. I only know that she seems to be an apprentice of someone important.”

“Apprentice? What do you want to say?” Sariel seemed to smile, “In fact, she is just a tool of Satan, but she should be an important tool after leaving me.”

Chen Rui roughly understood. Sariel no doubt knew Satan. Perhaps Tiffany should be here under the order of Satan to carry out some kind of ritual or transformation with the help of Sariel’s strength?

“If I knew this was Sir Satan’s instructions, I wouldn’t have accepted Raizen’s commission.

Chen Rui had already scolded Raizen dozens of times, but judging from Raizen’s attitude, he probably didn’t know the secret of the presence of a Pseudo-God powerhouse on the 4th floor. No matter what, it is a scam this time.

The huge eye moved slightly, “Have you really met Satan before?”

“Yes.” Chen Rui held a snake pattern badge in his hand, “This is given to me by Sir Satan, and I can summon him at any time.

“That’s the case…” With Satan’s eyesight, your light-element physique can’t hide from him either. He should have his own plan in giving you the badge to summon his avatar. “Sariel sneered, “You’re very smart as you didn’t summon his avatar in front of me. Then you should understand that your value to Satan does not mean that you are valuable to me.”

“I understand.” Chen Rui bowed, but he was secretly shocked. Sariel inadvertently revealed 2 truths. First, the snake pattern badge in his hand actually summoned the avatar. Second, Satan had long discovered his light-element physique!

The avatar of this world was different from the avatar like Shura. It was equivalent to a kind of projection, and its strength was only part of the original body. Legend has it that when god showed miracles, sometimes the avatar would descend. This belonged to the category of very high strength that could also activate a kingdom power or other secret arts. It was greater than the simple projections or substitutes like Guradam.

As for Satan’s plan, Chen Rui had no idea of it. When he first saw Satan, he probably just had the [Body of Light Blessing]. Later, he made a wise choice to use the [Dual Training] technique to eliminate the trace of power of the Demi-God, but Olypheus still seemed to have some problems with her body…

Sariel asked, “What was the power that you used to devour the origin power of destruction just now?”

Origin power of destruction? Chen Rui remembered the previous scene of using the black hole to devour the pure destructive power, and he replied, “That is a kind of mutated devour talent of mine, but the effect is not unlimited. I can’t use it again after it reaches the limit.”

“Even if the role is limited, it is a great talent to be able to devour the origin power of destruction like that. Perhaps it can play an unexpectedly important role at a critical time. Then… I will give you a choice to accept my Evil Moon Sigil and do 1 matter for me. “

“I have no reason to refuse this only way of life.” Chen Rui gave a wry smile.

There was a faint glow in Sariel’s huge eyes, and a strange symbol slowly flew over.

Chen Rui bowed to the mark, allowing the seal to enter his body without any resistance. After the seal entered the body, it suddenly turned into a strange strength that spread to his soul. An alarm immediately sounded in the Super System, but Chen Rui did not confirm the conversion of the supernatural power. A trace of blood red expression quickly flashed in his eyes, ‘accepting’ the seal in another form.

“Very well, you don’t have to worry about the seal. As long as you don’t betray me, it won’t cause any harm to you. It won’t bother you either. It will also allow you to have part of the Evil Pupil’s strength. If you really accomplish this matter, I will give you generous rewards and even help you regain everything you have lost.”

Chen Rui nodded respectfully, “Please tell me, sir.”

Sariel’s voice was filled with satisfaction, “This matter is actually related to Tiffany. She came here with Satan’s instruction. She wanted to use my power to accomplish something which is related to the agreement between Satan and I back then. Now It seems that it’s almost there.”

Chen Rui thought for a while, “May I take the liberty to ask… what is the matter?”

“I intended to tell you about this incident earlier. Satan needs my power of the Evil Pupil to turn that girl into a key. This key can open a mysterious place.”

Chen Rui was shocked. Tiffany is actually a ‘key’! This is Satan’s real purpose for accepting her as apprentice? This is the ‘destiny’ of the charming girl that I remember?

“Her physique is very special, the light and dark physique. Coupled with Satan’s secret technique and the baptism of my power of the Evil Pupil, we have perfectly synchronized the light and dark attributes of her body with the seal at a mysterious location. This is the meaning of ‘key’. Her baptism has only 2 results. First, she becomes the real key with complete loss of consciousness and crystallization of the flesh and blood. Second, she becomes the person who retains her body and consciousness, but also has the function of a key. Initially, she almost became the first. As you devoured those origin destruction power at the critical moment and the runes you tried also produced some small changes, so her current destiny has changed a little bit. It should be the second result.”

Chen Rui secretly breathed a sigh of relief. In any case, it is better than the first result.

“In fact, this is the result I want. I will do something on her body. At that time, you can use the power of the Evil Pupil to perceive where she is. At a certain time, Satan will let her look for something at the mysterious place with overwhelming origin power of destruction.

With your talent and the Evil Pupil I gave, you should be able to cope with it. All you have to do is to follow her there, then take the thing and give it to me. “

Chen Rui finally understood why Sariel wanted to save him, and he asked, “Sir Sariel, what is the thing that I am going to take?”

“That’s actually just a part of an object. To be precise, it’s half. It should be contained in a silver box.”

This answer made Chen Rui almost unable to restrain the frantic beating in his heart because the other half of the ‘thing’ Sariel said was in his hands!

TL: At least Sariel still can’t see through his Super System. Will the seal bring Tiffany to him though, hmm…

chapters.title: Chapter 780 - Sariel’S Bestow
chapters.body:
Chapter 780 - Sariel’S Bestow

Chapter 780: Sariel’s Bestow

Silver box.

This had always been a mystery in Chen Rui’s mind. Back then, Paglio teamed up with Zola to fight against Ranieri and Jacob, then he betrayed and sneak attacked Zola. He was eventually imprisoned by Dragon Emperor Auglas for 2,000 years. The root cause was this box.

Chen Rui got this silver box from Paglio’s treasure. He only opened it twice. To be precise, it was not really open. As a result, Shura was born from it.

The silver box was now hidden in the water of the Fountain of Resurrection in the laboratory in the Rainbow Valley. What Chen Rui could not imagine was that even the top powerhouses such as Sariel and Satan, who were infinitely close to God, were also coveting this silver box! Moreover, there was more than 1 silver box!

“You… have actually heard of this silver box before?” Although Chen Rui’s mood swings were only fleeting, Sariel still keenly noticed it. The surrounding breath suddenly solidified.

Chen Rui knew it was not good, and he suddenly had an inspiration. He answered almost without thinking, “Sir, when I came to the Demon Realm, I heard a Demi-God powerhouse mention a mysterious silver box by chance. However, the silver box I’ve heard of is 1/7 of ‘something’. I don’t know if it is the same thing as sir said?”

This ‘1/7’ is not made up by Chen Rui, but Zola said at the beginning that the silver box was 1/7 of ‘something’. If the 7 pieces could be perfectly combined, even god would be deterred. He just didn’t understand why the 2 statements were different.

“That should be another silver box. If you have news about this, you should report it to me immediately.” Since Chen Rui answered quite quickly, Sariel really let go of his doubts and replied, “As for ‘1/7’, it can be understood in another perspective. In fact, this thing and something on the top of the Holy Light Mountain are also… It is meaningless to say it now. As long as you complete my task, I will try my best to help you return to the human world and get back the position of the pope. You will naturally understand many secrets by then. If we can continue to cooperate, it will be a win-win situation with huge benefits. However, you are not yet qualified to know now.”

The Light Divinity Temple on the top of the Holy Light Mountain is actually related to the silver box! Although there is no final answer, I have learned enough secrets today. Chen Rui took a deep breath and recovered his calm, “Sir, one more thing, is there a way to conceal my [Body of Light Glory]? Since I have worked for sir, naturally I don’t want to be exposed by others. Besides, this is the Demon Realm, I don’t want to cause unnecessary trouble.”

“Actually, your disguise technique is smart enough. If it is another Pseudo-God-level powerhouse, he can’t feel that uncomfortable light element breath if he doesn’t have the experience of fighting against the guys in the human world for countless years. More importantly, your worries are now unnecessary.”

Sariel’s voice was full of pride, “The Evil Moon Sigil contains the power of the Evil Pupil. As long as you can realize the mystery, you can perfectly conceal the [Body of Light Glory] or other breath. Unless you are willing to show it, even Michael can’t see through it. Of course, except for me. Not only that, the power of the Evil Pupil can also speed up the process of canceling the Shackles of True Flame. I can see that it’s just a matter of time before you break free from the shackles. But, I want to warn you one thing first, the Evil Moon Sigil has been integrated with your soul. You can integrate with it and borrow it, but do not try to dispel the sigil or betray me. Otherwise, you will get the most tragic consequence in the world.”

“Understood.” Chen Rui exhaled, “I have a partner coming with me this time. Apart from that, many mechanics of the Mechanic Association outside seem to be infected by some kind of leaked strength…”

“Is your partner that kingdom-level little octopus? He showed his original form and wanted to attack the kingdom to get out, but he was subdued by me. I will send him and Tiffany out of here. As for the Mechanic Association, it was caused by the law power leakage during Tiffany’s baptism. It should be fine now.”

“Thank you sir, I will never tell anyone what happened today.” With that said, Chen Rui bowed again.

“You’re very smart. I always reward and punish justly. In addition to the power of the Evil Pupil, I have 2 more things to give you.” Sariel’s black pupil flashed, and something flew over. Chen Rui took it and saw that it was a hexagonal bronze badge with an eye pattern on it.

“This is the Evil Pupil badge that can summon my avatar. When you are looking for the thing Tiffany is looking for, you can activate the badge if you encounter Satan’s obstruction. I need to accumulate energy now, so I’m asleep most of the time, so don’t simply use the badge to bother me. Otherwise, you will summon the nightmare to destroy yourself.”

This was not the first time Chen Rui heard this tone, and he nodded ‘skillfully’.

“From your previous performance, you have an astonishing foundation and understanding of ancient runes. This memory crystal contains the essence of ancient runes. Ancient runes are one of the essential foundations of the Pseudo-God realm. It is necessary to enter that mysterious land as well as for your future path.”

The countless runes all around suddenly turned into a dot of crystal light and fell into Chen Rui’s hands. Chen Rui was joyous and bowed, “Thank you, sir.”

He knew very well that this was nothing more than a stick and carrot tactic. In addition to the silver box where the mystery was located, in the long run, his [Body of Light Glory] plus ‘the pope inheritor’ should also have a certain value for Sariel. Perhaps it might also involve the secret of the Pseudo-God stealing faiths…

Soon after, Chen Rui’s figure appeared outside the thick gate on the 4th floor.

There were 2 people lying underground, 1 was Octopus King Red Pipit and the other was Tiffany who was wearing a veil.

The Octopus King woke up first. When he saw Chen Rui, he was relieved and looked around, “This is… the door? Illusion?”

Chen Rui shook his head, “You have changed your job to illusion king now. When you showed your original form just now, it stirred the power of that world, so we came out.”

“Really? That damn place is too terrifying, I don’t want to go in anymore.” The Octopus King got up, looked at the door with lingering fear as he stretched out his body, “Oh, the headache is so painful, and the bones seem to be falling apart.”

Bones? Isn’t an octopus a mollusk? Chen Rui’s strange gaze made Octopus King panic inexplicably, and an “En” was heard. Tiffany finally woke up.

“Who are you guys?” Tiffany stood up slowly, staring at the 2 men coldly with an ice-like murderous intent in her eyes. No doubt, it was the cold and ruthless killer of the Mountain Seckred, not the curios and charming girl at the trade fair. Chen Rui had already guessed that just like her light and dark physique, there was also a dual personality in her body.

In the [Analytical Eyes], Tiffany’s strength had reached S+. It seems that the so-called ‘baptism’ has also improved her strength, but unfortunately, these are only for the sake of the ‘key’. Even in the eyes of her ‘teacher’, this girl is just a pathetic tool.

“We are commissioned by Raizen to bring you out of the 4th floor.” Facing the wary Tiffany, Chen Rui seemed very indifferent, “Obviously, this task has been completed.”

Tiffany glanced at Chen Rui and Octopus King while secretly feeling the changes in her body before she finally let go of the hostility.

The mission of this trip to the Book Collection Hall was finally completed despite the unbelievable twists and turns.

Besides the Evil Pupil badge, the memory crystal containing the essence of ancient runes was the biggest gain among Sariel’s rewards. It could improve the level of the ancient runes of Chen Rui and Zola by several levels. Sariel said that the ‘ancient runes were one of the essential foundations’ of the Pseudo-God realm. It should not be fake. In addition, the ‘Evil Moon Sigil’ was also one of the gains. According to Sariel, the power of the Evil Pupil contained in it was far more than simply concealing the [Body of Light Glory]. Of course, the seal was actually a life-threatening thing and means of Sariel to control Chen Rui.

However, someone who was as powerful as Sariel could not think that this guy who accepted the Evil Moon Sigil also had an avatar, and the sigil was actually ‘swallowed’ by the avatar.

However, Chen Rui did not intend to completely devour the Evil Moon Sigil and alarm Sariel. In case he provoked the boss, it was likely to affect other people. Therefore, the seal was temporarily stored in Shura’s body. In case Sariel tried to remotely control him or detonate it in the future, it would only work on Shura. Worse comes to worst, he would let Shura blow himself up and fake death. He would be fine after some time.

The baptism of light and darkness on Tiffany’s body would take 2-3 years to completely condense. She would go to a mysterious place to find another silver box by then. Chen Rui was still considering whether to participate in this complicated trip. He was aware that the most important key was his own strength. If he could reach the level of contending with Satan and Sariel, then he could become a mantis catcher behind the cicada, not the cicada used as bait or the manipulated puppet.

In 2-3 years, it seems that the goal is not only the challenge of the 3 empires or Raizen, but perhaps more… Chen Rui slowly clenched his fists.

When the 3 of them appeared outside the Book Collection Hall, Raizen was already waiting there.

“Your Majesty, my friend and I have completed your entrustment.”

Raizen nodded, “Master Turia and the rest of the mechanics have woken up. Thanks for this. Please go back and rest first.”

Raizen glanced at Tiffany behind Chen Rui, “Tiffany?”

Tiffany’s eyes seemed colder, “Anything?”

This tone was completely unlike the attitude a noble lady should have toward the ruler. Raizen slowly shook his head.

“Then I’m leaving.” Tiffany uttered a sentence, turned and left.

Raizen frowned and did not stop her.

When Chen Rui met the Dark Elemental King, he saw Beluan bowed deeply to him gratefully at the door of the lounge behind. He nodded immediately.

As the 3 of them were walking, Octopus King knocked his head, which was always aching, and he spoke up, “Wait a minute, I remembered, there is a strength in that world that makes me tremble. I seem to have fainted. Why did I show up at the door with you suddenly?”

“I can only say that you think too much.” Chen Rui shrugged, “Do you want to keep thinking when you have a headache, just think of something else?”

“What else?”

“For example… Fate Showdown?”

“Damn it, my head seems to hurt even more…”

TL: Maybe the silver box is just a standard container for the god artifact?

chapters.title: Chapter 781 - Alice’S Rehearsal Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 781 - Alice’S Rehearsal Plan

Chapter 781: Alice’s Rehearsal Plan

A day later, Chen Rui led the envoy team back to the Fallen Angel Empire.

Dark Elemental King Hegel had long left without bidding farewell while the original purpose of Octopus King Red Pipit was to go around the Demon Realm. After all, he was imprisoned in the black sea area for so many years that he was so bored. However, he did not help much on this trip. Instead, he suffered a small injury in that strange place on the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall, so he felt embarrassed. In addition, he miserably lost in the Fate Showdown, so he bid farewell to Chen Rui halfway.

In general, Octopus King was still a worthy friend. After Chen Rui’s invitation for him to stay was turned down, Chen Rui made an appointment to meet him again at the alchemist master contest of the Fallen Angel Capital half a year later. Then, he left after bidding farewell.

This time the Bloody Empire’s mission was more eventful than expected, but the result was better than expected. He not only cured Raizen, but also got the promise of a strategic alliance within 2 years. The distribution network of the magic game was fully rolled out in the Bloody Empire, and the progress was even greater than that of the Dark Shadow Empire. Even if Catherine intended to obstruct it, under the background of the 3 empires’ peace agreement, the Dark Shadow Empire couldn’t stop this trend that had spread to more than half of the Demon Realm.

Especially after the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association released a ranking list, the craze for magic games had reached a new height.

This ranking was divided into an overall ranking list and regional ranking list. It included level ranking, overall points ranking, class combat power ranking, top kill, fastest kill and other rankings.

These lists were all the pseudonyms of the players in the game. Of course, many players used their real names. However, there was no such thing as name and portrait rights in the Demon Realm. They would not cause a commotion when they were listed. Instead, they were proud of it. Every month, the people on the list would get rewards with different levels from the Mechanic Association. The most popular was the ranking list that would automatically be cleared every month. Points could be used to redeem game equipment, items, materials, and so on. They could also be exchanged for a certain amount of magic crystal coin in reality.

The mode of earning real profits in virtual games had made the popularity of magic games soar to another level. Magic game television towers had been set up everywhere, and the successive out-of-sales of magic television and magic game helmet had brought huge income to the 3 empires. However, in Chen Rui’s plan, even if it was a loss without income, this promotion was quite worth it because compared with the future, the current income could only be regarded as a drizzle in the beginning.

At the same time, those players who chose the ‘puppet pilot’, a special profession in the game, had also entered the sight of the empire’s Secret Intelligence Department. The best of these players would be within the ‘recruitment’ range of the pilot for the empire’s future assemble puppets. Whether it was quality or quantity, it was much better than traditional conscription training.

After Chen Rui, the initiator of all this, returned to the Dark Moon Estate, he stayed behind closed doors most of the time to study the Evil Moon Sigil in his body.

Sariel did not deceive him. The Eye of Evil power contained in the Evil Moon Sigil was no doubt extraordinary. Chen Rui only extracted a part of it to integrate into his body now, and his vision had been greatly enhanced. He could also exude a spirit deterrence similar to dragon demeanor from his eyes.

Zola’s eyes brightened when he heard the news of the second silver box. However, the success rate of getting this silver box from the Pseudo-God powerhouse was almost zero.

Chen Rui asked about the secret of the silver box again. Zola hesitated for a while, but she still insisted on not telling him. It was not because Ms. Fairy Dragon was selfish. She did not keep any secrets from Chen Rui by now. It was just that the secret of the silver box involved the strength related to god. Even if one reached the kingdomized level and became a super powerhouse, one might not be able to touch it.

However, for a learner, this secret possessed irresistible appeal. Even Ms. Fairy Dragon herself could only use the secret technique to forcibly seal a part of her thoughts to avoid being tempted and distracted in training. Moreover, [6 Elements Kingdom] was also a training method with a very high risk factor. Therefore, she didn’t want Chen Rui to fall into such trouble. At the moment, focusing on strength was the most important thing; it was best to reach Demi-God or Pseudo-God before studying it.

Chen Rui did not continue to question when he realized Zola’s good intentions. He kissed Ms. Fairy Dragon and took out a gift. The memory crystal contained the essence of the ancient runes. Every time the memory crystal was read, the imprint of the memory would be indifferent, which meant that when the number of reads reached a certain limit, it would fragment and disappear. However, Chen Rui had the secret weapon of [Deep Analysis]. After only reading it once, he copied the massive amount of data into his memory to be slowly digested and absorbed in the future. Zola could still use it at least hundreds of times.

For the Ms. Valley Master of the Rainbow Valley, knowledge was more precious than black crystal coins (Of course, black crystal coins were also very important), so this memory crystal was undoubtedly the best gift. She hugged and swung Chen Rui around a few times. Uh… Later, in order to protect the dignity of the man, Sir Deputy Valley Master ‘retaliated’ by hugging Ms. Valley Master and rolling all the way onto the bed.

The date of marriage with Shea was approaching day by day. Someone who cultivated behind closed doors and occasionally used his body to comfort a few wives did not know that a ‘conspiracy’ against him was unfolding. To be precise, it was against ‘Aguile’.

“Olypheus, do you understand?”

“Um…” Ms. Black Dragon was chewing on a few skewers of grilled squid in her hand.

“Don’t pretend to be dumb!” Alice curled her lips, “Otherwise, I won’t treat you to eat the next barbecue meatballs, yellow braised chicken wings, 3 fresh hot pot, tofu, yuba broth…”

Just hearing these names made Ms. Black Dragon’s mouth water, and she nodded quickly, “I understand, isn’t it just helping you deal with that brother-in-law?”

“What brother-in-law, that despicable guy deceived my sister by dealing with Obsidian! I hate that guy a lot! I want him to suffer a big embarrassment at the wedding! Not only at the wedding, but also at the concert before the wedding! Ah… by the way, ask him out to prank him first; take it as… ‘rehearsal! You must help me!”

“This…” Ms. Black Dragon was a little worried. She was good at taking money without doing things, damaging the public fund for private use, embezzling and fake reimbursements and so on, but Alice was a good friend, so it was not so righteous to do it to her. The most important thing was that she had taken rewards without fulfilling the task for many times. If she kept making empty promises, she would lose a free meal ticket in the future. The problem was that the person Alice had to deal with was the boss who paid her salary – Both sides had benefits, and the little chick was reluctant to let go of either.

By the way, I seem to have promised the boss that I cannot reveal Aguile’s identity to Alice, otherwise he will have to deduct my salary and benefits for the whole year…

This is not easy…

Just as Ms. Black Dragon was in a dilemma, Alice used the biggest lure, “The Princess Villa VIP building’s free meal coupon for 1 month! Special offer of 50 premium aromatic millet wine coupons! Princess Retail Store Jewelry Carnival’s gold crystal gift voucher!”

“Deal!” Ms. Black Dragon held the little loli’s hand with tears – Mother said that if there is any cheap bargain, I must go for it.

Boss, it’s not that our side is weak, but the enemy is too cunning!

The next day Chen Rui, who was summoned by Shea, came to the capital palace through the Rainbow Valley’s teleportation portal.

“Sir Aguile, are you busy lately? For a man who is about to become an empire’s prince consort, shouldn’t you take the last moments to enjoy your life of indulgence, lest there be no chance in the future?” There were no outsiders here. Shea’s intent to be playful appeared in the purple eyes.

Chen Rui shrugged, “Your Majesty Charming Empress, should I feel sad or honored?”

“Honored. Undoubtedly.” Shea replied affirmatively, “Is our bridesmaid ready? There will be a highly anticipated concert before the wedding. I look forward to her performance very much.”

Her Majesty Empress, who used to talk non-stop about the political affairs, is now talking non-stop about the crystal harem. Perhaps this is woman nature? Chen Rui could only laugh bitterly.

In fact, Ms. Bridesmaid had an original saying: If Her Majesty Empress said that she’s looking forward to my performance, then I’m also looking forward to her performance on my man’s bed.

The lethality of this sentence is too great, and there is also a knockdown attribute. Considering the stability of the crystal harem, it must not be relayed. But speaking of it, the hooligan… Uh, the charm of Madam Aunt is enough to beat Her Majesty Empress, and only the little charming girl Kia can match it.

Seeing Chen Rui’s bitter smile, Shea didn’t continue questioning. He took out an envelope, “This is an invitation letter sent by Alice to me, saying that she wants to perform at the concert. In the afternoon, she invites ‘Aguile’ to the countryside to have a tour and also rehearse once.”

“Alice? Invite me?” Chen Rui took the invitation letter. As he reminisced about the trip with the little loli at the Dark Moon back to them, there was a warmth in his heart, but this time the person Alice invited was actually ‘Aguile’ whom she despised?

The blackhearted little loli must have no good intentions.

“How long do you want to hide from Alice?” Shea sighed, “Actually, Alice has always liked you very much since the Dark Moon.”

“You misunderstood, Shea, I also like Alice, but…”

“But a younger sister-liking?” Shea shook her head, “Alice doesn’t just like you, plus she is no longer a child. If she knew that her sister’s wedding partner was her favorite man, she would definitely be very sad.”

“Well, issues are inevitable in growing up. I can’t just reciprocate just because someone likes me.” Chen Rui sighed. A younger sister fiancee, Olypheus, is already troublesome. Adding another one will add to the chaos.

Shea stared into his eyes, “Of course others can’t, even if you want to! But… Alice is my sister. From childhood to adulthood, I will give her whatever thing she wants.”

Well, the legendary benefits of having both sisters is what an otaku dreams of.

Wait, whatever thing?

“Since this is the case… I shall change the marriage of the original Prince Consort Aguile to become Princess Alice’s husband.”

Chen Rui was shocked by Shea’s words, then he burst into tears: It turns out that it is not the legendary benefits of having both sisters, but sending the husband off!

Wait, change the marriage?

Seeing the bitter face of Royal Highness Prince Consort, Her Majesty Empress finally showed a moving smile, “Well, no matter what, you must make Alice happy on this trip. Otherwise, I will reveal Aguile’s true identity to our Royal Highness Little Princess. Don’t forget, your 3-year promise with her is almost up.”

The last sentence made Chen Rui feel like a trance as if he had returned to the time when he made a pinky promise with the little girl.

3 years, so fast…

TL: What is Alice’s plan though? The stun stick again?

chapters.title: Chapter 782 - Accident! Incredible Reasoning And Liar Brother
chapters.body:
Chapter 782 - Accident! Incredible Reasoning And Liar Brother

Chapter 782: Accident! Incredible Reasoning and Liar Brother

The outer suburbs of the capital, Mountain Misty Leaf.

The location of Mountain Misty Leaf was relatively remote, but the scenery was quite good. The special plant was a blue leaf that would exude a fragrant mist. This was the origin of the Mountain Misty Leaf’s name.

Alice invited ‘Aguile’ to visit the Mountain Misty Leaf. The entourage of Royal Highness Little Princess, in addition to the 2 Demon Emperor lamp spirits guards, also included her good friend Olypheus.

‘Aguile’ was still wearing the ‘standard’ costume of the mask and cloak. The 4 people rode the demonic beasts all the way to the Mountain Misty Leaf and chose a relatively flat field.

“Olypheus, you go to dig a stove. Sister Genie, Sister Genin, can you hunt for something nearby?” The little loli took out a large table cloth, spread it skillfully on the ground, and began to arrange the plates.

Genie and Genin responded and left.

“Aguile… Brother, can you help me pluck some Jade Dragonfruit and Violet Herb for barbecue?” The little loli came in front of Chen Rui and handed over a small basket with an irresistible and innocent smile.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of Alice’s angelic smile when he was abducted to the Aldas laboratory and met Alice for the first time. A knowing smile appeared behind the mask as he took the small basket, “Okay, Princess Alice.”

After Chen Rui left, Alice’s gaze changed suddenly. It was similar to the spooky face when one flashed the torch from below the face. She took out a small bag, “Olypheus, we should start! Hand me the basket, I want to put a powerful laxative into the berry juice! Hehe, when Aguile has diarrhea later, you can light up a fire next to him…”

“Huh?” Ms. Black Dragon scratched her head and secretly hid the empty bottle in her hand behind her.

The little loli had quickly set up the plates, “Quick, give me the berry juice, or the guy will be back in a while.”

Ms. Black Dragon asked with a guilty conscience, “Is it the bottle that tastes sweet and sour?”

“Huh?” The little loli reacted immediately with a bad feeling. She quickly grabbed the basket with a stride, opened it and looked dumbfounded, “Where is my berry juice? And the pudding with anesthetics? What about the Swelling Grass biscuits? All gone!”

“That…” Ms. Black Dragon said wryly, “That pudding seems to have a tingling taste, it tastes good.”

“How can you do this!” The ‘hard work’ that Alice carefully prepared for 2 days was eaten by Olypheus, so she cried out, “It’s just a short while of digging a stove, and you have eaten all the things I carefully prepared!”

“Because you said I could eat a big meal, so… I deliberately saved my stomach for lunch. I’m too hungry now…” Ms. Black Dragon said embarrassedly, and her stomach made a growling sound.

Seeing Alice’s teary eyes, Ms. Black Dragon said guiltily, “Alice, what about I give you 1 more barbecue… No, 2!”

“I don’t want to barbecue!” Alice suddenly thought of something and opened her teary eyes, “Have you not felt your body numb? Or is your belly bloated?”

“It’s okay, but the biscuits don’t feel bloated at all. I’m still hungry.” Ms. Black Dragon rubbed her stomach with an expression of dissatisfaction. When she saw Alice’s sadness, her eyes rolled, “Alice, don’t you know, bo… that Aguile is much more powerful than me. This thing won’t work for him. I have a type of medicine. I heard that it is a super tonic…”

“Tonic?” Alice was taken aback.

“No!” Ms. Black Dragon showed the rare wise gaze as she shook her fingers with confidence, “Paglio lied to me as a tonic, but judging from the performance of him and sister last time, it should be a problematic poison. Paglio and Zola fought a battle for this bottle of medicine, and Paglio was beaten severely.”

“Although I don’t understand it, it sounds terrific!” The little loli suddenly became energetic, and she didn’t even bother to wipe off her tears, “Where’s the bottle of medicine?”

“Look!” There was a bottle in Ms. Black Dragon’s hand with black solution inside.

“Why does the bottle look a bit like black pear juice?”

“It’s indeed a bottle of black pear juice, but it contains a very expensive and delicious poison!” Speaking of ‘delicious’, Ms. Black Dragon’s belly growled again.

“Very poisonous? Will it… poison Aguile to death?” The purpose of the little loli was to punish him, not to harm him. After all, that annoying guy is my sister’s prince consort, and my sister really doesn’t seem to be disgusted by him.

Ms. Black Dragon thought for a while. The last time Paglio asked me to serve it to boss, so it should not be deadly poisonous. If I get the boss to drink it this time, maybe I can still claim the previous reward!

Thinking of this, Ms. Black Dragon’s eyes glowed like black crystal coins which surpassed her appetite, “It won’t poison him to death, I can promise!”

“Okay! Just give it to Aguile then!” Alice raised her small fist.

“But this is a very expensive poison!” Ms. Black Dragon deliberately emphasized the word ‘very expensive’.

“Olypheus, are we friends?”

“What?”

“2-month free meal vouchers for the Princess Villa VIP building! 100 premium aromatic millet wine vouchers! 2 Princess Retail Store Jewelry Carnival’s gold crystal gift vouchers!”

A second later, Alice successfully received the ‘very expensive and delicious poison’. At this time, a prompt cough sounded and Chen Rui’s figure appeared in the sight of the 2 ‘in time’.

“Princess Alice, this is Violet Herb and Jade Dragonfruit.”

“Brother Aguile, you are so fast!” Alice’s big eyes flashed with small stars, showing admiration, “I bought this bottle of black pear juice from the most famous Wawa Beverage Shop in the city. You must try it!”

Chen Rui took the bottle of ‘Men’s Tonic’, and he was speechless— Not to mention anything else. Just based on Chen Rui’s understanding of the little loli, he knew that the little stars just now was nothing but the little loli’s cover up for the 2 horns on her head and the small tail behind her. Besides, he hadn’t walked far just now and had been hiding nearby. As for Violet Herb and Jade Dragonfruit, there were ready-made stocks in the storage warehouse.

I remember that the poison dragon said that this bottle of ‘tonic’ has been destroyed by Ms. Black Dragon? It was actually secretly hidden again…

This thing is not the lowly anesthetic laxatives of the little loli. If I really drink it, something big would surely happen today. Luckily I was acutely vigilant.

“Brother Aguile, won’t you drink it?” The little loli’s eyes sparkled with hope.

“Someone dropped money there!”

Chen Rui pointed to the distance. As soon as he said it, Olypheus was already flying away speedily. The sound of Ms. Black Dragon’s sprinting caused Alice’s hair to fly. She couldn’t help but squint her eyes. When she opened her eyes, the bottle in Chen Rui’s hand was empty and the other hand closed the mask, “En… very tasty, thank you Princess Alice.”

Alice showed suspicion as she looked at the empty bottle.

“Ouch, my head hurts a bit.” Chen Rui then covered his chest, “My heart is also beginning to hurt. Could it be that there is nothing wrong with the recent training…”

“Really?” The strange thing is that instead of being happy, Alice showed a skeptical look. “An elder brother once said to me that after we explain a series of facts to people, most people will tell the possible result. They can connect this series of facts in their minds and get results through thinking. However, there are a few people, if you tell them the result, they can use their inner consciousness to infer what the various steps are to produce this result. This is called ‘retrospective reasoning’.”

Chen Rui was taken aback: I seemed to tell Alice about these when telling ‘Holmes’ to her, but I did not expect that she remembers it so clearly.

The little loli walked over slowly, and looked at Chen Rui with a scrutiny gaze. Her nose twitched again as if she was smelling something. Although from the standpoint of Alice’s height, she could only look up at him, Chen Rui had goosebumps in his heart. He actually had the illusion of being looked down at.

“Your hands are very clean.”

“Huh? Thank you for the compliment, Your Highness.”

“I mean, your nails do not have the remnants or smell of Violet Herb or Jade Dragonfruit, and there is not much dirt on your shoes. There are only a few grass stems. This means that you did not pick Jade Dragonfruit and Violet Herb just now, and you haven’t left this area. In other words, you’ve overheard the conversation between me and Olypheus nearby.” The little loli suddenly had a pipe in her hand, and she sipped it in his mouth like a great detective.

Chen Rui was already sweating. I’m witnessing the most terrifying reasoning once again!

“Then, you should know that there is a problem with the thing you just drank, so you used the method of dropping money to distract Olypheus away. When I couldn’t open my eyes, you quickly poured away the black pear juice. If I guess it right, you should pour it into the space item instead of on the ground for safety reasons.”

No way! She can even infer the fact I poured it into the storage space?

The little loli took the pipe and pointed it in the direction of Olypheus, “Then, you must be very familiar with Olypheus, or she is also very familiar with you. Your cuffs have a little burn mark, and there’s a strange smell. I only smelled this kind of smell in the Rainbow Valley laboratory of Teacher Zola. You should be doing some kind of magic experiment in the Rainbow Valley these 2 days. That kind of place is not accessible to ordinary people, so the relationship between you and Teacher Zola is pretty close. Your mask is very new. The edges are not smooth enough, and there are almost no scratches, indicating that your mask is not often worn or replaced, so you don’t wear a mask most of the time. The reason for wearing a mask is not to remain mysterious, but to conceal your true face. Perhaps… you are probably a person we know very well.”

Chen Rui was really sweating this time. It is far more terrifying than the guess years ago! I haven’t seen the little loli after a while, and she actually has such a powerful deduction ability!

“So…” the little loli put her hands on her waist with her fingertips curled up in a nice arc as she pointed at Chen Rui’s mask with a strong momentum, “Who, are, you?”

“Well, in fact, when I came out this time, I originally wanted to tell you the truth… I wanted to tell you a long time ago.” Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “I just didn’t expect…”

At this moment, Chen Rui had a warning sign in his heart; Ms. Black Dragon suddenly let out a low roar in the distance.

Chen Rui was taken aback. Olypheus’ black hair began to spike up with extremely fierce breath coming out of her body.

“Oh no!” Chen Rui understood immediately. The strange force in Ms. Black Dragon’s body is triggered! It is actually at this time!

Olypheus’ pupils had turned white, the diamond mark on her forehead glowed scorchingly, and her nails quickly extended to the length of half a foot. Her eyes fell on Alice and Chen Rui. With a roar, she appeared in front of them in an instant. She grabbed toward Alice immediately.

Alice was startled, but her strength was too weak, so she could only watch her irrational friend make this fatal blow to her.

“Alice!”

With a loud shout, the little loli felt like she had fallen into a warm embrace. The scenery blurred for a while, and she had appeared in the distance.

“Don’t move. Stay here!” Chen Rui shouted and flew toward Olypheus.

Now Ms. Black Dragon was delirious and berserk as she attacked. The most important thing was that Isabella who could comfort her and the little mermaid princess who used singing to shorten her trigger period were not by her side. Chen Rui was afraid of hurting her and could only passively defend.

Genie and Genin had already returned with their preys. They were shocked when they saw this scene. Genie waved her hand, and the buff effects such as accelerating power immediately surged on Chen Rui’s body. However, the debuff effect launched by Genin did not have any effect on Ms. Black Dragon who had a magic immune physique.

“Both of you don’t come here! Protect Alice!”

“Yes! Master!” Genie and Genin came to Alice immediately.

“Sister Genie, Sister Genin, what did both of you… call him?”

Alice once went to the City of Stars to test the game, so she knew that the City of Stars was a relic of the ‘grand master inheritance’, where all alchemy creatures respected a person as master.

Genie and Genin looked at each other without answering.

Alice suddenly remembered the phrase ‘Alice’ felt very familiar just now, and suddenly an almost unbelievable result came up.

On the other hand, the battle between Chen Rui and Ms. Black Dragon had entered a climax. The battle of the peak stage of the Demon Overlords, especially when 1 party couldn’t hold the power, was quite amazing.

Chen Rui did not use powerful moves, but he used the strength of water to continuously divert Olypheus‘ berserk strength, but Olypheus’s strength after the trigger was close to S++, especially after integrating the Dragon Island artifact Imperial Demon Claw, her 2 claws were invincible. Even [Aura Blade] couldn’t cut it off. He was distracted for a moment and was clawed in the shoulder. There were 5 shocking bloodstains.

Chen Rui bore the pain as he grabbed Olypheus’ arm firmly. As they resisted each other, the ground nearby had a terrifying distortion. Even the protective enchantment jointly created by Genie and Genin was constantly shaking due to the powerful force field.

Chen Rui had an idea. He stared at Olypheus as his eyes channeled the newly comprehended power of the Eye Pupil.

Under the power of the Eye Pupil, Olypheus’s gaze was involuntarily attracted. As their eyes met each other, her white pupils slowly returned to black, and her mind became sober, “Boss…”

After just saying a word, she passed out. Chen Rui caught Ms. Black Dragon’s collapsed body and carried her up, then he secretly breathed a sigh of relief.

I didn’t expect that the Eye Pupil taught by Sariel can actually restrain Satan’s strange power. It seems that this is the best way to cancel Olypheus’ trigger. I will need to do more research in the future.

As soon as the battle was over, the little loli had already rushed over. She hugged him tightly as she burst into tears, “You liar brother!”

TL: Maybe he can even cancel the imprint after fully mastering the Evil Pupil?

chapters.title: Chapter 783 - Grand Wedding
chapters.body:
Chapter 783 - Grand Wedding

Under the full attention of the Demon Realm, the wedding day of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Royal Majesty Empress had finally arrived.

Almost all the lords and the empire’s upper class people attended the wedding ceremony held in the morning. The Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire also sent envoys to present gifts.

The whole ceremony was grand and splendid. The whole process was broadcast by magic television. However, Chen Rui, 1 of the protagonists as the party involved, was confused all the way. The royal wedding was not trivial, especially the supreme ruler of Royal Majesty Empress, so they must follow various steps, etiquette and rituals. The dizzy male protagonist had a vague memory of the specific details of how it was done, only remembering that it took 2 hours to dress beforehand.

‘Aguile’ who appeared in front of the public still wore a mask to remain mysterious, but this mask was a simplified version which only covered the eyes, revealing his nose and black hair. After the wedding ceremony was successfully completed, ‘Aguile’ officially became the prince consort of Empress Shea.

In fact, the prince consort was nothing more than an empress’ accessory. It was more of a symbol. In a sense, it was quite similar to the ‘chief toy boy’ for the ‘queen’. The Royal Majesty Empress had the right to cancel or replace him. Even if ‘Aguile’ was really the rumored king of Beelzebub, then this relationship also meant the ‘surrender’ of the Beelzebub Royal Family.

After the ceremony was the celebration. There were not only traditional banquets and balls, but also 2 celebrations that could be called the main events.

The first was the ‘Empress Cup’ battle ball match held in the royal arena in the afternoon. Although the battle ball had been impacted by the magic game, its popularity had not diminished at all, especially since the 3 empires’ battle ball league was about to start. The Empress Cup was actually the most important warm-up match before participating in the Demon Realm League.

The 2 teams facing each other were the Red Blood Team and the Flame Team. The elites selected from different parts of the team were equivalent to the ‘empire team’. The personal skills and abilities could be regarded as the top level at present, but they needed to be further adjusted in tacit understanding.

After a fierce and exciting match, the Red Blood Team defeated the Flame Team with 4-2. Since the battle ball was popular, the Demon Realm audience had a considerable level of appreciation. This high-level ball game was like a sumptuous treat which made the fans feast on it.

The second event was the large-scale concert, ‘Dream Night’ that would commence in the evening. The venue was also in the arena. This was the second concert held by the Demon Realm. After gathering countless popularity in the first concert, this concert was unprecedentedly popular. Numerous ‘fans’ came from all directions, including fans of the other 2 empires. The arena was once again packed. The tickets for the concert had long been sold out, and the black market prices had also skyrocketed to staggering heights. Fortunately, the Fallen Angel Empire was well prepared, adding large live screens in the plazas and many locations. They also sent a large number of soldiers to maintain order.

The 2 protagonists of the wedding ceremony today were also watching the concert, but not at the scene, but in the palace; to be precise, the royal bedroom.

There was no magic television in the royal bedroom, but a special 3D magic projection device which made one seemed to be on the scene when it was turned on.

“Our bridesmaid… is amazing, but this ‘The Beginning of the World’ seems a bit familiar?”

The bride and the bridegroom held hands and sat on the sofa looking at the figure of the woman wearing a veil playing music in the magical forest scene. In the elegant Quqin sound, the graceful figure walked in the mist, looking ethereal and mysterious.
