“Uh, yeah, amazing.” Chen Rui sweated a little on his forehead. It is really amazing. How is this ‘The Beginning of the World’? It is clearly ‘The End of the World’. Madam Aunt really plays such a song at the celebration of the wedding ceremony.

There was a strange friendship between Isabella and Shea. Especially after the life and death battle with Obsidian, this friendship was stronger, but their implicit conflict also gave the blissful male protagonist headaches from time to time.

“Well, just treat it as ‘The Beginning of the World’…” Shea smiled knowingly, “I accepted this gift from her. I will give her a big gift for her wedding next time.”

Chen Rui wanted to spit out ‘an eye for an eye makes the whole world blind’, but obviously this was a very subtle type of ‘battle’ between women. It was better for the man to avoid meddling in. He poured 2 glasses of fruit wine and handed them to Shea.

“According to the rules of our hometown, newlyweds should cross arms to drink the cup of wine.”

Shea’s attention no doubt was diverted as she revealed a cautious expression. She turned off the projection, took the wine cup, and drank the wine with her arms crossed according to Chen Rui’s posture.

“According to the rules of my hometown, you are my official wife.” Chen Rui looked at Shea’s moving purple eyes and delicate red lips, “My Princess Royal, you are so beautiful.”

The name ‘Princess Royal’ seemed to bring Shea back to the time when the 2 met for the first time. The experience of acquaintance, knowing, love, life and death, and so on appeared in her mind. A warm feeling slowly spread in her heart. The usual cold complexion when she was on the throne had already melted, leaving only the warmth.

Naturally, both their lips merged together, and the warm feeling spread quickly from the intersection to their whole body.

“Wait a minute.” Shea suddenly opened her eyes and grabbed the hand that slid downward.

“No way. I waited for several years and can’t wait any longer. There is a saying in my hometown, the joyful night is always short. We must hurry up.” Chen Rui grinned and hugged her up in a standard princess hug as he walked toward the bed.

“Since you are a prince consort, you must listen to my orders.” Shea struggled a few times, and her voice suddenly softened, “Just tonight, okay? After that… you can do whatever you want.”

It was the first time that Chen Rui heard this pleading tone. His heart shook, and he finally let her down gently.

“Answer me a few questions first.” Shea pulled Chen Rui to sit on the bed.

“Uh… alright.”

“I have always wondered, what is the reason you formed the 3 empires alliance? Is it to unify the strength of the Demon Realm to deal with… or revenge on the human world in which you were originally in? You never seem to mention it to me. What happened before you came to the Demon Realm. As your wife, I want to know everything about you.”

Chen Rui thought for a while, “Before I came to the Demon Realm… My memory is fragmented, I just remember the super… The inheritance of the grand master and my former name, ‘Arthur’. It was like a dream. Just like how I gave up the name Arthur, I have given up everything in the past. The Demon Realm has my beloved woman, my best friend, and the business that I manage. This is my home. I will never leave here. As for the empire alliance… it has nothing to do with revenge. I just want to cancel the root of the Demon Realm’s war and really let the Fallen Angel Empire and the Demon Realm develop in peace. There are many ideas in it, including how we can defeat the 2 empires without bloodshed as well as some economic and military measures in these 2 years, but… these are not suitable for discussion on our wedding night.”

“What if I insist? Dear Your Highness Prince Consort, you said you will answer my questions.” Shea glanced at him with a smile.

Chen Rui’s face was bitter. No, it’s unscientific! The night is short, my girl. I would not agree if I had known about it earlier.

Shea smiled as she noticed his expression, “Okay, let’s change the question. How did you coax Alice on that outing? These days, I see her feeling very refreshed, which is completely different from the precious months’ listlessness. Moreover, she personally made a gift and gave it to me. Has my sister been successfully tricked by you?”

“How is it a success? Actually, I’m the loser, okay?” Chen Rui couldn’t help but shudder when he recalled the series of actions of the Royal Highness Little Princess after seeing through the identity of ‘Aguile’ – swooped, hugged, hooped his neck and so on.

That day, Alice was crying and laughing.

That day, he walked back with Alice on his back.

That day, the 2 made a formal agreement.

No matter what identity he was in the future, no matter what the relationship between the 2 was, he would always be forever by her side unconditionally.

With this earnest promise, Alice finally put aside the big burden in her heart. She no longer struggled with the 3-year or 2-year agreement. In fact, the long-term plan was set because the little loli had one of the most entangled things – I’m almost 17 years old… Why has there been no change in my height and appearance in these 2 years? Especially the chest…

I heard that when my sister was 15, she started…

Therefore, I must wait until I truly have the ‘hardware’ competitiveness! Then defeat sister, defeat Athena, defeat Kia…

Woo, speaking of Teacher Zola, when can I learn the quick magic of the big breasts?

(The above were the little loli random rant)

Seeing Chen Rui distracted, Shea pinched the soft flesh on his waist, “Hmph, no matter what, you can barely count as pass as Alice has regained vitality… By the way, a lady told me yesterday that although I’m the only woman of ‘Aguile’, that’s just a ‘substitute’ or ‘small account’. According to that, my ranking is last, is that correct?”

Chen Rui wanted to cry but he had no tears. He could say the name of ‘the lady of yesterday’ with his eyes closed. Can’t you stop causing the End of the World?

“The third question is, how many women do you plan to collect?” Shea made a difficult 360-degree rotation with the fingers pinched on his waist, which was the technique taught by ‘the lady’.

“Not anymore! Really! With you, I’m really completely satisfied.” Chen Rui reluctantly made an oath, “I swear by the name of Chen Rui, I will never have new women. If I violate …”

‘New’ women naturally exclude Royal Majesty Empress.

But the current harem is enough. If there are a few more, the blood sacrifice of the crystal harem will surely turn the male protagonist into a corpse. From now on, I shall be an honest person and have sex in a down-to-earth manner.

After the oath was over, Shea had covered his mouth lightly, “Hmph! It’s just an empty oath, you just have to know it in your heart…”

Her smooth hands gently stroked his face, “The last question, the woman in front of you, whether she succeeds or fails, possesses or loses, are you willing to accompany her until the end of everything?”

Chen Rui looked into her eyes, “Of course, just like she has been with him.”

Shea’s purple eyes became hazy as she blushed as if she had drunk wine. She slowly lay down backward. Although she didn’t have a special posture, she looked very sultry.

“The question and answer time is over. Then, Sir Chen Rui, it is time for you to fulfill your prince consort obligations…”

It was said that when someone recalled afterward, this was the last ‘complete’ sentence from Her Majesty Empress that night.

TL: Who will be the one who gets married? Hmm…

chapters.title: Chapter 784 - Good Morning And Next Step
chapters.body:
Chapter 784 - Good Morning And Next Step

In the morning, Chen Rui, who was immersed in a dream, was suddenly awakened by a burst of unexpected pain. Strangely, he actually had no warning signs even though his spirit power had reached S++.

As he opened his eyes, he saw that the ‘culprit’ was actually his Princess Royal Her Majesty Empress.

Is it the punishment for some ‘excessive’ postures last night?

Compared to the Little Maid and others’ first time, Her Majesty Empress appeared reserved and much more traditional. Although it could be seen that she supplemented some basic bed knowledge, she was still not Chen Rui’s opponent at all. From the beginning resistance to being completely at his mercy at the end, the taste within was not to be told to the outsiders.

Her Majesty Empress blushed with a charm when she saw him waking up. She whispered, “Do you like it?”

“Of course I like it!” Unexpectedly, the iceberg’s royal sister, who was usually cold to the point of almost cruel, could actually show such a shy and charming attitude. Someone’s desire in the morning suddenly swelled, and his hand reached the snow-white body in the quilt.

“Ouch! It hurts!” Her Majesty Empress took a bite on his shoulder. There was a bit of force in this bite, and the lust of some guy suddenly plummeted.

Shouldn’t be like this… Is she possessed by a cerberus?

“Didn’t you just say that you like it?” Shea’s expression was a little surprising.

I don’t like this one. Just as Chen Rui wanted to explain that he was not an M, he saw Shea’s puzzled expression, “In that book… didn’t it say that men like ‘good morning bite’, right?”

Good morning bite? Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, and his desire that just cooled down instantly swelled to its peak as he nodded quickly, “Like! Huh? Wait a minute, it seems that something strange has been mixed in… You said, ‘That book’?”

Shea was even more embarrassed, “Alice gave me a gift… It seems to be called ‘The Things that those Bastards Like’? There is a special note in it, saying that men like ‘good morning bite.”

Alice, I knew it… Chen Rui had some expressions. The influence of the little loli is really everywhere.

“Um, does the good morning bite in that bastard book mean… shoulder biting?”

“It doesn’t say so in the book…” Shea suddenly reacted and realized, “Isn’t that the case?”

“My silly empress silly princess, you should refer to reliable sources.” Chen Rui held up the beautiful face that was close at hand, kissed the white jade-like face, then lowered his head and got into the quilt.

The exclamation from Her Majesty Empress mixed with the evil laughter of a certain wolf spread in the royal bedroom, “Little baby, I shall let you experience for yourself, what a real good morning bite is…” The morning breeze blew the green trees outside the palace, flicking a little bit of spring.

The wedding of Her Majesty Empress was a golden opportunity for merchants. Various promotions had been launched. The Fallen Angel Capital was as lively as a carnival every day. The craze lasted for more than 10 days before it gradually subsided.

As an empress, although Shea’s relationship with Chen Rui is extremely intimate, because of her responsibilities, she did not linger in the harem life, nor did she practice the honeymoon plan proposed by Chen Rui. Instead, she resumed normal government affairs on the third day after marriage.

Perhaps influenced by the festive atmosphere, the various affairs of the empire were developing in a good and orderly direction.

Although the marriage between Chen Rui and Shea was so grand that the rest of the girls were jealous, everyone tacitly knew that Shea should be the first woman Chen Rui ‘liked’ in the ‘order’ while the women behind were jumping the queue. Now, Shea was at the last instead.

After many discussions, the empress, the female general, the female scientists, the female spy and the little maid reached a tacit agreement – To divide the time of ‘possession’ of the male protagonists; distribute them according to the weekly and monthly ‘quota’, then set aside a certain amount of free time for him to choose.

(The male protagonist lived happily ever after. The end. Uh. Don’t hit my head! You… throw the banana peel back into the trash can… Okay, the male protagonist said, I think I still save it.)

A satisfying sexual life without shame or irritability was for sure, but it was necessary to add a series of sarcastic prefixes such as, ‘too fixed’, ‘man wants freedom’, ‘I’m not a sex tool’, and so on. In fact, little rivalries in the harem were inevitable. Fortunately, after the girls reached a tacit agreement, the situation had finally stabilized. Chen Rui could also calm down and deal with the following plan.

The magic game was being implemented quite smoothly, and the follow-up action was still to expand the coverage of the magic signal towers. As it was a single player game, the daily game time was limited, so the game helmet’s mystic crystals could continue to be used for a long time. For the time being, Chen Rui had no plan to start the charging model. He would fully expand the quantity first now. In fact, apart from the cost, the sales of magic television and the game helmet alone had already made a fortune.

The preparations for the 3 empires’ battle ball league were all ready, and the game would officially start next month. The Fallen Angel Empire had 2 teams. The Red Blood Team’s home was the capital’s royal arena, while the Flame Team’s home was set at the Dark Moon ancient arena. This would be a major event in the Demon Realm that was also a kind of Chen Rui’s testing. His general direction was that after the war really subsided in the future, this kind of competition could eventually replace the battle and become another form of force as well as the collective cohesion of each empire.

The technology of the best aromatic millet wine had been quite mature, and various flavors had been developed. It was now popular in the Demon Realm. Recently, a new good news came from medusas, that was, the distilled wine had been successfully experimented, and its taste far exceeded the aromatic millet wine. It was named white wine by Chen Rui and was undergoing further adjustment of taste and fragrance. This was a secret weapon. Chen Rui did not plan to launch it immediately. Whether considering the market or other considerations, it needed to wait at least 2 years later.

After canceling all the contracts in the life and death battle with Raizen, aside from Dodo, the White Feather Estate Lord Sicali, the Dark Shadow Empire’s Custer Family matriarch, Celine, Guradam and his apprentice (the master was the master-subordinate contract, the apprentice was the master-servant contract), Slee, the Green Shade Estate’s Royce trio, Tim from the Walan Fortress, and Samuel from the Human World, their contracts were canceled.

After the 3 empires’ peace talk in the Dark Shadow Empire, Chen Rui met Celine secretly. Celine was a scheming girl who not only knew Chen Rui’s true identity, but she also mastered many of the Dark Moon and even the Fallen Angel Empire’s economies. More importantly, the Dark Shadow Empire’s top commercial family would become a crucial tool for Chen Rui within 2 years, so she must be controlled.

However, Chen Rui and Celine signed the master-subordinate contract this time, not the master-servant contract, which meant the master could not directly execute the subordinate, and in case of death, it would not affect the subordinate. Of course, subordinates couldn’t betray the master, otherwise she would be sanctioned by the contract. Celine knew that with the current strength of the opponent, it was easy to kill her, and the 3 empires were likely to form an alliance. ‘Aguile’ would fight against Raizen in 2 years. Once he won, Aguile might become the top powerhouse or even the controller of the Demon Realm. If she stood on the right team, it would bring unimaginable benefits to her personally and to the Custer Family, so Celine resolutely signed a master-subordinate contract with Chen Rui and continued to serve as a ‘spy’, fully supporting the Fallen Angel Empire.

The Royce trio had followed Chen Rui since the beginning of the Dark Moon development. Especially Royce, with the help of Chen Rui, regained his lover Vasasha, restored the glory of the family, and became the lord of the Fallen Angel Empire’s special economic zone, the Green Shade Estate, so he was very grateful. The situation of Tim and Royce was similar. Both of them had high loyalty, outstanding ability, and were unlikely to betray. The cancel of the contract was not a problem. In fact, it could be used as a ‘means’ to make them completely committed.

Slee was almost forgotten, but for the imp, his life had reached an unprecedented height. After receiving the potion book given by Chen Rui, Slee did not let go of this chance to change his destiny, and studied hard. He made rapid progress and was appreciated by Aldas. He became an official pharmaceutics apprentice, determined to get the ‘professional title’ of potioneer within 10 years.

The undead army of Guradam was an important combat power of the Fallen Angel Empire. For the cancellation of the contract, the first reaction of the corpse necromancer was that Chen Rui had died, because he signed the master-subordinate contract, and the contract would disappear only if the master canceled the contract or death. However, when Chen Rui appeared in front of Guradam again, the corpse necromancer was taken aback.

Guradam already had the Dragon Power Essence needed for advancement, but the Siren’s Heart was a troublesome thing. The Siren’s Heart referred to the vital crystal on the forehead of a siren. After losing it, the siren would be greatly injured. The most troublesome was that the siren had a very strong temperament. Unless it was willing, one couldn’t get the Siren’s Heart. The little mermaid princess was disgusted with Chen Rui. She would criticize him from time to time, suggesting that it was better to go to the Dead Sea to trick a siren girl back than asking her to give him the Siren’s Heart. Although there was no Siren’s Heart, the gift Chen Rui gave to Guradam still made the corpse necromancer quite happy. This was the life box where Lich King Glorious once contained the soul essence, which was later cut off by Chen Rui with the Sword of Fallen Angel. Scythe was an extremely rare soul container, and the remaining soul breath could give Guradam a lot of inspiration and help.

As 1 of the 4 lords, Sicali was much smarter. Now Shea had gradually realized the absolute rule of the Fallen Angel Empire. Based on his fence sitter performance in the Obsidian era, if he didn’t hold a side tightly, he would most probably be slowly neglected and eventually uprooted. So after Shea got married, Sicali took the initiative to find ‘Aguile’ and offered the contract again to express surrender. Due to years of operation and methods, Sicali had a high prestige in the White Feather Estate. The White Feather Estate was 1 of the 4 major estates. Chen Rui did not want any changes in the most important 2-year development period in the future, so he accepted Sicali’s ‘loyalty’.

As for Samuel, Chen Rui was not worried that the loyal golden knight would leak his secrets, but the Blood Oath of Light was similar to the master-subordinate contract. It was very likely that Samuel, who had sensed the disappearance of the blood oath, would think that the third prince was already dead.

If necessary, Chen Rui would face Samuel to clarify this misunderstanding because next, he would go to the human world.

TL: Going to the human world again? For what? There should be nothing left for him right?

chapters.title: Chapter 785 - Purchase
chapters.body:
Chapter 785 - Purchase

Chapter 785: Purchase

After the light blue light flashed, a figure appeared in a remote corner of the Starlight Empire at Venus City.

This was a human with a very ordinary appearance and clothes. In the crowd, this kind of average face had a very low sense of existence. No one would think that this person actually came from the rumored ‘violent and vicious’ Demon Realm.

The ‘travel expenses’ of this trip to the Human World were not cheap, 1 million faith crystals without any discount. Not to forget, he still had to pay another 1 million to get back. However, unlike that time when they accidentally came to the Human World with the space seed, this time he already prepared 2 million faith crystals.

In the beginning, he took Shura to steal faith, raced against time and even went deep into the Holy Church’s lair. In the end, he barely collected 1 million and returned to the Demon Realm to save Madam Aunt. Things were different now. Since the magic game quickly became popular in the Demon Realm, the faith crystal in the Super System had skyrocketed at an unexpectedly faster acceleration, which was terrifying. Over the years, the sky-high ticket prices of traveling between the Human World and the Demon Realm would drop to the price of a cabbage.

Chen Rui came to the human world this time for 3 main purposes. The first was naturally the origin fragment. According to the agreement with Light Elemental King Delkus last time, he would exchange the light source power and the wind source power with the light origin fragment. With these 2 source powers, Zola would get all 6 major element source powers, plus the kingdom-level Dragon Power Essence granted by Auglas, the success rate of Zola’s [6 Elements Kingdom] would be greatly increased, and the risk would be reduced to a minimum.

The second purpose was about Shura and the Black Death Follower. At first, in addition to stealing faith power, Chen Rui left Shura in the human world for the purpose of removing the scum of the Holy Church. However, Shura accidentally joined the mysterious cult and became the big deacon of the Black Death Follower. This mysterious cult was actually a cult that worshipped the abyss creatures!

The abyss creatures were the source of the destruction of the alchemy civilization and many other civilizations. In addition to the trial illusions, Chen Rui had personally experienced the power of the abyss creatures. From Satan’s words, it could be concluded that the abyss creatures should be sealed in a certain place. Over the years, they had been trying to return to this world all the time. Once the abyss creatures really succeed, then it would be a terrible disaster for the Demon Realm and the human world.

The mysterious cult created a bloody murder in which the souls of 10 cities were slaughtered and sacrificed to ‘god’ in the first 20,000 years. Such a blatant action was definitely a certain ritual to summon the abyss. Fortunately, it failed because of unknown reasons and was even encircled by the Holy Church. It was a pity that the cult had not been completely eliminated, but it hid in the dark. The Black Death Followers were definitely still brewing a new subversion conspiracy. Just the faith that it continuously provided to the abyss was a major problem. Therefore, Shura must return to the mysterious cult and try to destroy this terrifying organization that had the danger of destroying the entire world.

Although the mysterious cult had not made it to the public, its strength and scale were not trivial. Shura’s personal strength was limited, and he was only in contact with external forces now. It was not suitable to act rashly for the time being. He must step into the core step by step. At that time, he only needed to make the secret of the cult public, then the Holy Church would naturally eliminate this old enemy with all its strength.

The third purpose was about the improvement of alchemy. At this time, there were only approximately 4 months left before next year’s alchemist master contest. In the alchemist master contest, he would face Teacher Tetenis’s strongest rival, the potion and mechanics dual-grand master, Saman. The potion was fine as he could deal with it using the potion in the Super System, but the mechanical skills required real skills. Since the last time Chen Rui returned to the human world, he could not break through the last bottleneck even when he used the time law of the training ground. He felt really close to the grand master level. This time in the human world, he also wanted to visit the 2 mechanics grand masters of the Jade Forest Sea again to seek a breakthrough opportunity.

From the Blue Star City in the south of the Starlight Empire, one could reach the north of the Jade Forest Sea through the Ice Sea area. However, Chen Rui had plenty of time this time, so he did not leave immediately. Instead, he came to the ‘Golden Key’, the largest magic shop in Venus City.

“It turns out to be sir! Welcome back. What do you need this time? I guarantee sir will get the best offer.” Chen Rui bought a lot of magic scrolls here last time, so the chubby shopkeeper Cissman had a deep impression on him. He personally welcomed him to the VIP room on the second floor with great enthusiasm.

“I need 3 things, the law pattern paper, the Blue Light Grass and the Lock Scorpion Vine’s seeds. The more the quantity, the better.”

Alchemy’s branch scroll art had developed to a considerable height in the human world. Magic scrolls were also quite popular. Even ordinary people could use scrolls to cast magic. However, due to various reasons, scroll art had declined in the Demon Realm for many years. Magic scrolls were considered an ornament in the Demon Realm which was rare and expensive but not of high practical value. It was rarely used in combat.

When Chen Rui returned to the Demon Realm from the human world, he received the 2 books, ‘Basics of Scroll Art’ and ‘Scroll Art Mastery’, presented by the elf tribe’s mechanics grand master, Finoia. The information recorded in these 2 books was very complete, and Finoia’s own experience and label were extremely precious. Chen Rui copied these 2 books and gave them to Teacher Tetenis and Fonsaq, the president of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association. He also set up a scroll art research department to organize specialized personnel to conduct research on scrolls. This was also one of Chen Rui’s war strategies.

Thanks to the complete theoretical support and ready-made scrolls, the research had made gratifying progress. However, relying on the Demon Realm’s local production of scrolls, there was a problem that could not be solved at present, which was material. The material used to make the initial base surface of the scroll was called the law pattern paper. This paper had very good magic storage attributes. The main material was the Blue Light Grass and the Lock Scorpion Vine. These 2 plants were light element plants. They were not rare in the human world, but they were almost extinct in the Demon Realm which was full of dark elements. There was no substitute for it at the moment.

Therefore, Chen Rui wanted to purchase a large amount of the law pattern paper and 2 kinds of plants and seeds this time. He could find alternatives through experiments or use the ‘magic soil’ to cultivate in batches (Although they could be planted in the galaxy garden, the number was limited after all).

“We still have about 300 copies of the law pattern paper in stock, but due to special reasons, the price is relatively high. The Lock Scorpion Vine and seeds are also partly available, but the Blue Light Grass… is currently out of stock.” Cissman laughed apologetically, “Not to mention at the Golden Key, it is now a hot commodity even in the entire human world because not long ago, the Holy Church… Hehe, sir should know that during that time, the Holy Church almost sealed all the nearby empire, and everyone evacuated now.”

Chen Rui was taken aback. This is exactly what the church has done to encircle him, and it was later revoked because of Isyorul’s death. But what does this have to do with the Blue Light Grass?

“I knew about the incident at that time. After I purchased the magic scroll from you, I started training behind closed doors. It took a while to complete. What happened later?”

“I see!” Cissman showed a sudden expression, “Sir has no idea. Since then, the church has started to buy the Blue Light Grass and seeds on a large scale. I don’t know the specific reasons. Now the price of the Blue Light Grass and the law pattern paper has increased several times, and the entire magic scroll market has also been greatly affected. Although many magic botanical gardens have increased their planting area and scale, it will take at least a year to mature and put to use. The price of the magic scroll is unlikely to decrease again.”

“Oh…” Chen Rui faintly guessed that the church’s massive acquisition of the Blue Light Grass should be related to the disappearance of the Snow Dallet Tree. It might be a need for replacement or remedy. Nevertheless, his scroll plan was likely to be stranded this way.

Chen Rui thought for a while and asked, “My family has been in business for many years. A gentleman doesn’t beat around the bushes. Although the market is tight, it doesn’t mean that there is no stock. Otherwise, the magic scroll will be out of stock long ago. I know you must all have stocks, just waiting for the price to rise. How about I exchange them with the Dark Soul Grass.”

The Dark Soul Grass was a very rare kind of magic plant with relatively pure dark element power. It was a necessary material for mechanics and high grade potions. Of course, this ‘rare’ was for the human world. In the Demon Realm, the Dark Soul Grass was even more common than the Blue Light Grass or the Lock Scorpion Vine.

Chen Rui experimented with potions some time ago. There were many related materials in the storage warehouse, the Dark Soul Grass was one of them. In fact, there were many similar items with such price differences. If it was just for money, he could be a ‘plane merchant, but he obviously didn’t intend to do this.

“The Dark Soul Grass?”

Cissman’s eyes lit up suddenly as he saw a dark purple plant in Chen Rui’s hand. Cissman took it and took a closer look, “No doubt it is the Dark Soul Grass, and the quality is quite high. How about this? 1 Dark Soul Grass for 20 Blue Light Grass, and I will add another 30 seeds. I know that this price is very disadvantageous for sir. In the past, this kind of exchange would definitely be impossible, but now it is a critical time. If sir is urgent, the price is very reasonable. If it is not urgent, then when the price drops next year, sir can come here again, and I will give you another discount at the current price.”

Cissman said it very nicely, but if the other party didn’t need it urgently, why would he exchange with the Dark Soul Grass?

Chen Rui understood this naturally, and he did not refute it. In fact, the Dark Soul Grass was much cheaper for him than the Blue Light Grass, so he nodded immediately, “Okay, let’s exchange 1,000 plants first.”

“1000 plants!” Cissman was taken aback. He originally thought that the other party only had a few dozen plants, but he did not expect such a huge amount. This required 20,000 Blue Light Grass and 30,000 seeds. With the current market, let alone his store, even the entire magic store in the Venus City did not have so many stocks. All the piled stocks accumulated were no more than 10,000 plants.

“If not, I will go somewhere else.”

“Please wait a minute!” Cissman’s mind quickly turned. This was a big and profitable business which could make at least 5 times more profit. He couldn’t just watch it fly away.

He couldn’t take this big deal, but that didn’t mean that other people couldn’t either.

“How about this?” Cissman finally made a decision, “I will introduce someone to sir. He happens to be looking for the Dark Soul Grass, and he should also have enough of the Blue Light Grass on hand, but there is one condition. Sir must first exchange 200 Dark Soul Grass with the Golden Key, and I will provide 4000 Blue Light Grass and 6000 seeds. What do you think, sir?”

“No problem, we can trade now, including the law pattern paper and the Lock Scorpion Vine. What I want to know is, who is the buyer of the exchange? Don’t worry, I will complete the transaction with you first.” As Chen Rui waved, 200 Dark Soul Grass had appeared on the table.

“Of course I can trust sir!” Cissman’s eyes squinted as he smiled, and he immediately arranged for the clerk to count. “Sir, please rest assured, that person is potioneer Feiz, the apprentice of Master Maseus in the alchemy department of Starlight College. He is very enthusiastic and very easy to talk to, so communication is definitely not a problem. These days he happened to be shopping around for the Dark Soul Grass, and he should be still in town now. There should be a large stock of the Blue Light Grass in the alchemy department of Starlight College. I will send someone to look for Feiz now.”

Soon after, Feiz appeared in the VIP room. This was a young man with short black hair. He was a little out of breath as he obviously rushed over. As soon as they met, he asked, “Sir, you really have a lot of the Dark Soul Grass.” ?”

“Are you Sir Feiz? My name is Simon. I don’t know how much Dark Soul Grass you need?”

“I want as many as sir has!”

“How about 1,000 plants?” Chen Rui asked tentatively.

“Do you really have 1,000 plants?” Feiz said with joy after getting an affirmative answer, “Excellent! I will give you the highest purchase price!”

Chen Rui shook his head: “Sorry, I only accept exchange. I need the Blue Light Grass and its seeds.”

“The Blue Light Grass?” Feiz thought for a while, “Ok! 100 plants plus 100 seeds for 1 plant, what do you think?

“Sure. The price is fair.” Chen Rui looked at Cissman on the side. The fatty shop owner smiled awkwardly and pretended not to hear it.

“By the way, do you have any dried Devil’s Snare Leaf? I only need 20 grams.

Devil’s Snare Flower? Chen Rui suddenly felt warm in his heart as he thought of a yard with the fragrance of tea. He smiled and said, “If it is to make white potion, then… fresh Devil’s Snare Leaf should achieve better results.”

Feiz’s eyes widened as he looked at the dark blue leaf in Chen Rui’s hand, “This… really is Devil’s Snare Leaf! Great! The task assigned by the teacher can be completed! Sir Simon, due to the massive exchange amount, please come to college with me if it’s convenient for you.”

Chen Rui thought for a while and agreed.

Starlight College was located on the outskirts of Venus City. It was the most famous institution of higher learning in the human world with a long history. It had cultivated countless elite talents. Many faraway empire nobles had sent their children to college to study here. Its popularity and the quality of teaching were evident.

The 2 set off in a carriage. About 4 hours later, the carriage stopped.

“Sir Simon, since the Star Tower of the college is about to open soon, entering the college will be very strict, please don’t mind.”

The Star Tower? Chen Rui’s mind moved, and suddenly he thought of this term when the Princess Royal Highness came to him when he was in the Jade Forest Sea. It was said to be an excellent place for training, even for a Saint powerhouse.

I wonder if I will have a chance to see the Star Tower and those ‘acquaintances’ back then?

“Sir Simon?” The enthusiastic potioneer reminded him, interrupting Chen Rui’s thoughts.

“Oh, nothing, let’s get off the carriage.”

TL: Wouldn’t those ‘acquaintances’ recognize him and report to the Church?

chapters.title: Chapter 786 - Accomplice
chapters.body:
Chapter 786 - Accomplice

Chen Rui’s first impression of Starlight College was that the gate was tens of meters wide. The people standing in it were extremely small. Even a giant dragon could easily pass through.

The center of the door was a layer of translucent material which obscured the scene behind it. It should be some kind of protective visual interference magic to avoid being spied on.

There were several neatly arranged and very eye-catching giant magic statues on the door. Strange inscriptions were engraved on them. According to Feiz, these statues were magic inscription guards with powerful strength. Any enemy who dared to trespass into the college would suffer from terrifying attacks.

In addition to the guards, there was also a team of guards. Among them was a thin man who seemed familiar to Chen Rui.

Come to think of it, the silly man intended to show off himself by belittling Chen Rui in front of Landbis and a few female students back then in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital’s elf tribe residence. As a result, Chen Rui first stole the limelight in the Purple Forest of the Grand Master Finoia, then he broke the magic circle and easily defeated the Saint-level instructor of the college, and he killed the super powerhouse Isyorul in front of all the students in the end, which was tantamount to smashing these arrogant guys in the face.

“Isn’t this our trash potioneer, Feiz?” The silly man still had that nasty tone.

Feiz did not look at the silly man and said to the guard leader, “Leader Raymo, this is my friend Simon. I want to take him to meet the teacher and discuss matters related to potion. Please register for me and apply for a temporary pass certificate.”

Raymo glanced at Chen Rui. Before he spoke, the silly man jumped out again, “Leader, it’s been an extraordinary period recently. Our law enforcement team has a heavy responsibility, and we must not let anyone with unknown origins come in.”

“Leader Raymo, this is related to the important experiment of my teacher, Master Maseus. I can guarantee that this Sir Simon is definitely not someone with unknown origin.”

The silly man immediately yelled, “How can you guarantee it? This person is obviously questionable. Maybe there is a conspiracy. If this causes the impact on the Star Tower selection contest, let alone you, even Master Maseus cannot bear this responsibility either!”

Chen Rui could see that the silly man and Feiz definitely had an old grudge, and he was just using the problem to make things difficult.

“Neil!” Feiz couldn’t help but shout, “The law enforcement team is an important strength to maintain the college order and discipline. You can’t use it to avenge your private interest. This will only make Rowling despise you even more!”

The silly man, Neil, sneered, “I’m just doing formal matters. If you don’t agree, you can cry in front of your teacher and let him go to the school affairs department to complain about me! If you insist on bringing this person in, then I will enforce the power of the law enforcement team to imprison both of you!”

When these words came out, not only Feiz was mad, but Raymo also frowned. Although Neil’s aunt, Belia, was the deputy officer of the school affairs department, Neil was just a member of the law enforcement team. Raymo was the leader.

“Your name is Neil?” Chen Rui interrupted the boring dispute and took out something, “No matter what your prominent background is, anyone who deliberately blasphemes the light will be severely punished. As a Light Knight, I reserve the accountability of you maliciously attacking the church personnel for the time being. I only ask, can I, the Light Knight with unknown origin and conspiracy, go in with my friend, Feiz?”

The eyes of the law enforcement team members all were fixed on the badge shining in white in Chen Rui’s hands. This was indeed the badge representing the Light Knight. Only the Reserve Light Knight who had passed the formal assessment was eligible to have it. Except for the Knight himself, most people could not trigger the kind of white light that proved one’s identity.

Neil’s facial expression suddenly became quite unsightly. Light Knight itself was nothing, but the Holy Church behind it was a behemoth that all empires had to look up to.

The Holy Church’s recent moves had been very large. It frequently sent out the judges of the Tribunal to arrest cultists and put them at fire. It was quite unwise to provoke the Holy Church at this time even if his father was the city lord of Starlight Empire’s Blue Star City.

“Sorry, Sir Simon.” Raymo glared at Neil and nodded to Chen Rui. His hand glowed as he quickly registered on a metal board, “It was just a misunderstanding. This is your temporary pass certificate, please keep it and give it to the guard at the door when you come out later.”

“Thank you.” Chen Rui smiled slightly and took the pass certificate. The Light Knight badge was obtained from Eliza when he was in the Holy Light Mountain, and it was genuine. In fact, he still had a Holy Light Guardian Knight Badge personally given by Holy Lady Eudora which would scare the silly man when he took it out. Unfortunately, it couldn’t be displayed easily because there might be thousands of Light Knights named Simon, but there was only 1 Holy Light Guardian Knight named Simon who caused a big chaos on the Holy Light Mountain and destroyed the holy tree. The guy listed as the number 1 ‘wanted’ inside the church.

Feiz glanced at Chen Rui in surprise as he walked forward and disappeared in a flash of light. Chen Rui hesitated for a while before he followed suit. When passing the translucent ‘door’, the metal board emitted a strange light, and he felt that his whole body was wrapped in a burst of coolness. He had passed through the door without hindrance.

After passing the gate, Chen Rui was amazed by the scene.

The spacious avenue, lush greenery, tall buildings, exquisite statues, and the men and women going back and forth… Such familiar scenes and atmosphere gave Chen Rui the illusion of returning to his college days.

Feiz sighed, “Sir Simon, I didn’t know that you are actually a member of the church.

“You seem to have some misunderstandings about the church?”

“It’s not me, it’s my teacher, Master Maseus.” Feiz smiled bitterly, “Teacher’s sister and his family died strangely back then. It is said that the cause of death was related to the church. Teacher once made some kind of vow by his surname… If possible, in a moment in front of teacher, can sir…”

Chen Rui had a good impression of this young man, so he smiled slightly, “No problem, I’m an ordinary businessman now.”

“Thank you sir.” Feiz bowed his head.

The 2 walked for a while, and a crisp female voice sounded, “Feiz!”

The one who greeted Feiz was a beautiful girl, and there were 2 girls beside her. The beautiful girl with red hair was Chen Rui’s ‘acquaintance’. Her name was Ariel, and she was very close to Princess Landbis.

“Rowling, I’m back.” Feiz smiled and waved to the girl.

It could be seen from Rowling’s calling of Feiz’s name that she was the reason why the silly man, Neil, was hostile to Feiz.

“The task assigned to you by Master Maseus has been completed?”

Feiz nodded, “Thanks to the help of this sir… Sir Simon, this is my classmate, Rowling. This is Ariel and Sili.”

Ariel glanced over Chen Rui with a slight frown, then she unfrowned again, obviously not caring.

Chen Rui knew that Ariel had bizarre spiritual talent and liked to sense the strength of others. When he was in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, Ariel sensed his strength, which aroused the idea of other boys messing with him. Now Chen Rui not only had the Super System’s [Breath Holding] and [Camouflage] skills, but he also mastered part of the Eye Pupil’s mystery given by Sariel. Therefore, he was able to completely hide his power breath and the [Body of Light Glory]. Even Satan might not be able to see through, let alone Ariel.

“It’s a great honor to meet the 3 beautiful young ladies.” Chen Rui looked at Rowling for a while and smiled, “Sir Feiz, is this Ms. Rowling your lover?”

As soon as this sentence came out, Rowling’s face immediately blushed, and Feiz quickly explained, “Sir Simon misunderstood! Actually we…”

When Feiz just explained a few words, Rowling suddenly made an excuse and left with her 2 female companions.

Before leaving, Ariel uttered a sentence to Feiz, “What a hopeless fool.”

Anyone with a discerning eye could see that Rowling had a good feeling about Feiz, but Feiz was like as dumb as a wood. If he was in Chen Rui’s previous life, he would definitely be labeled as ‘a single dog forever’.

Feiz watched the 3 girls leave and sighed softly, “Sorry, Sir Simon, let’s go.”

“It seems that you are not entirely a fool.” Chen Rui said calmly, “What’s the reason? Family background? Identity?”

“That’s about right.” Feiz smiled wryly, “Rowling is the daughter of the Internal Affairs Officer, and Neil is the son of the Blue Star City’s city lord, and a member of the school’s elite group Shueisha. Unless I can become a potion master, I have no… Okay, let’s not talk about this. The potion department is in front. Please remember our previous agreement.”

Master Maseus’ appearance was about 60 years old with deep eye bags. His mental state was not very ideal. He was a typical potioneer who immersed himself in experiments.

Nevertheless, when encountering something related to potion, the sluggish master suddenly showed a surprised expression, “This kind of dark element breath… No doubt it is the best Dark Soul Grass! And this piece of fresh Devil’s Snare Leaf. It’s hard to imagine that it has such pure power! Feiz, you did a great job this time! “

“Teacher, according to Sir Simon’s request…”

“The Blue Light Grass and seeds? No problem!” Master Maseus suddenly remembered something. “Wait a minute! Belia from the school affairs department transferred away a considerable amount of the Blue Light Grass and seeds… It may not be enough for exchange.”

“It’s okay, Master Maseus, Sir Feiz and I are also considered friends. If the number is really less, it is still acceptable.” The exchange rate on the college side was much higher than that in the magic shop, not to mention Chen Rui had already received a considerable amount of Blue Light Grass, so he was not demanding.

“Great! Sir Simon, you are really a generous businessman!” Master Maseus had a good impression on Chen Rui. “Well, what materials do you need to exchange again. Go ahead and tell me. I will try my best to satisfy you.”

Chen Rui was about to answer when an apprentice came to report, “Madam Belia from the school affairs department is here.”

“It’s just right!” Master Maseus said with joy, “Now there’s hope for the Blue Light Grass.”

Belia was a tall, blonde woman who was about 30 years old with a beautiful face. She exuded an unviolable arrogance. For some reason, Chen Rui felt that this woman’s eyes seemed familiar as if he had seen her somewhere.

Belia’s first sentence was as sharp as a knife, “Master Maseus, I heard the law enforcement team say that you have a Holy Church guest here?”

The facial expression of Master Maseus suddenly changed. Feiz on the side lowered his head guiltily when he realized the matter had been exposed.

Chen Rui shrugged indifferently, “This… Ms. Belia, is there a problem? As a Light Knight, I have never heard that Starlight College has regulations prohibiting church personnel from entering. In fact, the church has always maintained a good friendship with all major colleges.”

“If you are a member of the church, then take your materials and leave!” Master Maseus spoke ruthlessly, “I will never make any transactions with church members!”

“I see, Master. I understand now.” Belia sneered, “This failed transaction should be regarded as Feiz’s use of college resources and outsiders to make a profit in private transactions. According to the college’s regulations, this kind of behavior must be expelled at the slightest level of punishment!”

Feiz’s face turned pale in an instant. He didn’t expect there would be such a terrifying result with just a simple task of purchasing materials.

Master Maseus was shocked. If he approved the deal, it would have violated his oath. If he did not approve, Feiz would be expelled from the college. He was not a fool. He finally understood the real purpose of Belia’s visit this time – Belia’s nephew, Neil, is in love with Rowling, the youngest daughter of the Internal Affairs Officer. If she can become in-laws with him, she can further consolidate the family’s status in the empire. However, Rowling prefers Feiz and hates Neil. Belia wants to take this opportunity to expel Feiz and completely cut off Rowling’s hope.

Should I break the vicious oath made with my surname? Or abandon my apprentice Feiz? Master Maseus clenched his fists as his breathing became heavy.

At this time, Chen Rui, who had been observing Belia, said, “When it comes to ‘private profit’, I have more important clues to provide. However, I want to discuss this with Ms. Belia alone. May I?”

A more important clue? Belia’s eyes lit up slightly. She nodded and said, “Yes, let’s go to the school affairs department office to talk.”

Looking at the 2 people leaving, Master Maseus slammed a fist on the door, “Damn woman! Damn church!”

Belia’s office was spacious and bright. Upon entering the office, Chen Rui closed the door. This action made Belia frown slightly, “Sir Simon, what are you trying to say?”

“Your beauty is so alluring, Ms. Belia… It’s really an unexpected reunion.” Chen Rui revealed a strange smile, “No, maybe you should be called “Ms. Soranly or… ‘Big deacon’? Although your hair and appearance have changed a little, you can’t hide it from my eyes. “

Belia was initially sneering secretly as she thought that this Light Knight was stunned by her beauty. When she heard the second half of the sentence, her facial expression changed drastically.

She reacted quickly, showing a bright red light in her hands. Just as she was about to attack, she suddenly felt that the whole room was darkened, and a terrifying destructive breath enveloped her. She was unable to move. At the same time, the red light in her hand seemed to be devoured, and disappeared instantly.

“You… Who are you?”

“You forgot the person sleeping next to you so quickly? My little cutie, this is really a sad result.” Chen Rui’s face began to change quickly to another face as his eyes flashed with a faint red light.

Belia was shocked and blurted out, “It’s you!”

TL: Does this consider ‘new woman’??

chapters.title: Chapter 787 - Cooperation
chapters.body:
Chapter 787 - Cooperation

“Of course it’s me.” Chen Rui now used the face of ‘Richard’, or more accurately, Shura.

This Belia was what Chen Rui saw in Shura’s memory, the ‘bedmate’, the big deacon of the Black Death Follower, Soranly!

Belia’s face didn’t look similar to Soranly’s. The color of her hair and pupils were also different, and her arrogant temperament did not reveal Soranly’s seductiveness and dissoluteness, but Chen Rui’s instinct told him that she was Soranly.

Especially after revealing her identity, the woman’s first reaction made Chen Rui more certain. No one would have thought that the sister of Starlight Empire, the Blue Star City’s city lord, the deputy minister of the Starlight College’s school affairs department, was actually the Black Death Follower! And she was even the big deacon of the Black Death Follower!

This incident probably involved the mysterious cult which has disappeared for thousands of years. How far is their influence?

Belia looked around vigilantly while Chen Rui smiled confidently, “Don’t worry, I have already sealed this area with territory, plus the soundproof magic circle in your office, the people outside can’t hear us talking. Even if we do things we like to do here, no one will know about it.”

He deliberately said the last sentence to pretend to move ahead in order to hide the intention to retreat. He imitated Shura’s tone. At this time and place, Belia would definitely not act wild. Once they were discovered, even if her identity as the Black Death Follower was not exposed, there was a danger of reputation tarnishing.

“Hmph! I haven’t seen you in a while, your upper and lower body has switched?” Belia calmed down a bit, and she said annoyingly, “You have been missing for so long, and I can’t contact you at all. I thought you were already… Unexpectedly, you are actually a Light Knight.

“The most dangerous place is often the safest place, not to mention that this identity is just a cover up.” Chen Rui smiled disdainfully, “Aren’t you also in the upper level of Starlight College? As for the disappearance… just as you expected. Angelie no doubt wants to take the opportunity to get rid of me. She sent me out to complete a dangerous mission, and she sent someone to secretly assault me. So I went along with the plan and hid myself, waiting for the right time to strike back at her.”

This sentence was not made up. As Shura’s promotion speed was too fast, the Black Death Follower’s Bishop Angelie felt deeply jealous. The assigned mission was indeed dangerous and unusual, and an assassin was sent to intercept Shura, but Shura was summoned back to the original body by Chen Rui in the middle of the battle because of the battle with Teris. Naturally, he had ‘disappeared’.

“It’s okay since you’re fine now. I’m worried to death during this time. I believe you will give Angelie a big surprise.” Belia smiled. In fact, both of them had a tacit understanding. Belia also wanted to use Shura to kill Angelie, and she even planned a conspiracy to eliminate Shura together. As for the sensual relationship between the 2 (actually Shura), it was just using and indulgence. It was not enough to become a fetter or bargaining chip.

“Your worry is unnecessary.” Chen Rui said, “Now I’m in the dark. As long as the time is right, I can give Angelie a fatal blow… Are you sure to replace her as a bishop?”

“Me? Bishop?” Belia looked surprised, but she quickly figured out the true meaning of these words in her mind.

Chen Rui shook his head, “I’m not interested in instilling doctrines to a group of people. I pursue absolute strength, which is more suitable as a guardian.”

Compared with the ‘instilling doctrine’ position, guardian was equivalent to a pure massacre machine. The development and training of force was the focus.

Belia thought rapidly, revealing a pondering expression — Richard’’s identity is just a Light Knight, and it may still be fake. But my deputy minister’s identity is not trivial. In case it is revealed, there are endless troubles. The best way should be killing him. But in terms of combat power, I am far inferior to him. Furthermore, he is also a scheming person, so he will not be easily deceived or fooled.

Chen Rui saw Belia’s concerns, “I admire your talents and methods. I also know that you have a considerable background, whether it is here or ‘there’. With my potential and strength, we can work together to go further and further along the road instead of stabbing each other on the way… The premise is that you really want to cooperate with me.”

Belia looked at Chen Rui’s eyes and finally showed a charming smile, which was a stark contrast from the usual arrogant temperament. She did not hide the temptation revealed in it, “I agree with you very much. Perhaps an equality contract can become the beginning of our true intimacy?”

“Of course, true intimacy without gaps in all aspects.” Chen Rui also smiled. This was exactly what he wanted to suggest.

The conversation in the office was over. Chen Rui didn’t go to the potion department again. He left the college straight away.

Master Maseus had been waiting for the worst result, but the worrying thing did not happen. Instead, Belia sent someone to relay a message, “This matter is just a misunderstanding.”

She obviously could take this opportunity to push Feiz into desperation, but she let him go. This was definitely not Belia’s style. There was only one answer. Instead of betraying Feiz, the ‘Light Knight’ had exerted unimaginable power and let Belia give up the attempt to expel Feiz.

As for a certain Light Knight, he was now sitting in the carriage returning to the Venus City in a good mood.

This time he went to Starlight College for the Blue Light Grass, but he accidentally encountered Shura’s Black Death Follower ‘affair’. Chen Rui would definitely not reveal Belia’s identity now. It was not because of contract that he could use the spiritual link to cancel at any time, but it was to go deeper into the mysterious cult.

In fact, the gains from the trip to Starlight College were much more than that. Using Belia’s relationship, he had obtained a large number of the Blue Light Grass and seeds far beyond what he expected. He also got the law pattern paper and the Lock Scorpion Vine. The goal of getting materials had been over-fulfilled. Not only that, but there was another surprise – the quota for entering the Star Tower.

The Star Tower was the biggest mystery of Starlight College and was well-known in the human world. It was said that this was an excellent way of training for Saint Powerhouse. The Star Tower was opened every 10 years, and now it was the 10th open season. Due to the limited number of places, corresponding competitions were already underway in the college to compete for the qualification to enter the Star Tower.

In addition, each teacher who had reached the level or made a special contribution had an additional recommended quota. This recommended quota could be people outside the college; it was mainly targeted at the instructors that the college wanted to recruit.

Belia naturally had an additional recommendation place at hand. She originally wanted to give it to her nephew, Neil, but Neil could only be regarded as incapable regardless of his temperament or strength. He only became an elite student and joined the law enforcement team by relying on Belia’s relationship. It was nothing more than a political investment to compete and win his brother for her father’s position of the city lord in the future.

Belia’s ambition was by no means just the bishop of the mysterious cult. After signing an equality contract with Chen Rui, it was equivalent to placing the bet on this huge potential ‘Richard’ and establishing a relationship of coexistence of interests. The stronger ‘Richard’ was, the higher the chance of winning for her, so she did not hesitate to give Chen Rui the recommendation slot.

The official opening time of the Star Tower was more than 2 months later. Due to the Demon Realm’s alchemist master contest, Chen Rui could stay in the human world for only 4 months at most this time, so it was impossible to just wait in the Venus City in these 2 months. There were 2 options before him. First, go to the Jade Forest Sea to ask the 2 grand masters for advice. Second, go to Storm Island to get the light source power and the wind source power.

After thinking twice, Chen Rui decided to go to Storm Island first. Storm Island was located in the southern sea area of the Yang Shao Empire’s Garden City which was far away from the Starlight Empire. However, Venus City had a teleportation point to Loya Empire’s Clear Mirror City which was the largest teleportation station in the human world. It had teleport points to all places which could greatly shorten the time of long-distance travel.

It happened that tomorrow was the time when the Venus City and the Clear Mirror City teleportation points were open at the same time. Taking into account the voyage by sea, he could probably reach Storm Island in half a month. Anyway, the star point was set in the Venus City, and it was only a blink of an eye to come back.

After returning to Venus City from Storm Island, he could also go to the Jade Forest Sea from the Blue Star City by sea to study for a period of time under the guidance of 2 grand masters. He only needed to rush back the day before the Star Tower opened.

Storm Island was one of the most famous dangerous places in the human world. The berserk hurricane that surrounded the sea area all year round had claimed the lives of countless seafarers. The island contained countless dangers, but in the concept of many adventurers, risk and wealth often coexist. In addition, Storm Island had many unique resources. The Mercenary Union often had high-paying missions related to it. Of course, there were also many adventurers who came to try their luck in treasure hunting.

On the sea area, a white sail ship was swaying from left to right and struggling desperately on the edge of a hurricane.

The big bearded captain yelled, “Almost there! As long as we pass through this last area, we can leave this damn place!”

“Captain, the auxiliary mast is broken!”

“Captain, the water seepage in the rear compartment exceeds the warning level!”

“Left full rudder! Hold on! Meng Siyang, take a few people to reinforce the port side!” The big bearded man’s voice was a bit hoarse, “Think about the beautiful wine and women in the Garden City; think about the black crystal coins in the pocket after the mission is accomplished! As long as I get out of here, I will bring you bastards to the Rosa Bar to party for 10 days!”

These remarks would definitely cause the sailors to cheer usually, but now there was no response. Seeing death approaching, everyone’s heart was like a tight bowstring which might break at any time. The shouting of the big bearded man was gradually buried by the terrifying whistle. Many people had begun to collapse; some were even praying.

The approaching black hurricane was like a ferocious beast, and it was about to suck the ship into the entrance. Suddenly, the ‘ferocious beast’ moved back quickly as if it was torn apart by something on the way, dispersing left and right.

It wasn’t until the 2 hurricanes split far apart that the surviving people woke up like a dream, and they cheered together.

“Light God! It must be a miracle of Light God!” A sailor who believed in Light God shouted with beaming eyes.

The big bearded captain slapped the firm believer on the head while pointing in a direction, “Your Light God is there.”

In that distance, a magnificent black large sail ship was riding the wind at an incredible speed. It was actually sailing in a straight line, completely ignoring the existence of hurricanes. There was a figure floating in the air in front of the sail ship. This figure punched at will, and the hurricane in the distance was torn apart.

Everyone watched this scene dumbfoundedly. As a veteran of the sea area, it was the first time anyone saw someone rushing into the Storm Sea area in such a violent way!

In any case, the powerhouse was respectable, not to mention that he was the benefactor who saved their lives. Under the leadership of the big bearded captain, the awe-inspiring sailors saluted the black sail ship that gradually disappeared from sight.

“By the way, captain, you seemed to say… party at the Rosa Bar for 10 days?”

“Yeah, I heard it too!”

“Meng Siyang, you bastard. When I told you to reinforce the port side, where did your ears go?”

“Rosa Bar!”

“Rosa Bar!”

The shouting of the big bearded man was overwhelmed again, but this time it was by the wave of cheers.

Chen Rui didn’t pay attention to the incident on the ship behind him. The rescue just now was just a handy act. Although the journey to this place was smooth and only took 10 days, in general, his time was very limited and he must rush to Storm Island as soon as possible.

It was not the first time the Devil’s Snare Ship had entered the Storm Sea area. Combined with the labels on the chart, the sandmen skillfully maneuvered the ship and bypassed some possible dangerous areas as they advanced toward the Storm Island as quickly as possible.

In order to save Samuel, Chen Rui once boarded the Storm Island and fought a mysterious creature on the island. This mysterious creature was the titans. The [Analytical Eyes] showed that the titans with powerful combat power were actually alchemy beings.

This kind of alchemy beings was probably a product left over from the ancient alchemy civilization. In the City of Stars controlled by Chen Rui, there were alchemy beings such as giant crystal beasts and the lamp spirits. However, when he released the ancient alchemy civilization’s spiritual imprint breath, the titans showed unexpected anger and launched a berserk attack on Chen Rui.

This showed that the titans must be related to the ancient alchemy civilization. As for why there was such a strong hostility, it was still unknown. In addition to the titans, Chen Rui also encountered another powerful existence on the island last time, the wind elementals!

There were not only elementals but also the king – The Wind Elemental King with the wind origin fragment!

The speed of the Wind Elemental King was extremely astonishing, even beyond [Sonic Boom]. Plus the strength of origin fragments and elements law, although his strength stayed at the Demon Overlord level due to certain restrictions, the combat power was definitely comparable to Zola and Dodo who was S+ level.

Last time Chen Rui escaped the Wind Elemental King’s pursuit by using the technique of concealment. There was no doubt that in this exchange, he would face the mortal enemy of the Earth Elemental King. Perhaps, the mystery of the titans could also be answered.

TL: Maybe the ancient alchemy civilization enslaved the titans back then 🤔

chapters.title: Chapter 788 - Ruin
chapters.body:
Chapter 788 - Ruin

The Devil’s Snare Ship passed the Storm Sea area in the shortest time and arrived at Storm Island.

There was no tornado like the Storm Sea area around Storm Island. It was just shrouded in mists which looked illusory and ethereal.

Chen Rui put away the Devil’s Snare Ship and the sandmen as he set foot on the island. Storm Island was a large area, and the magic map was completely useless here. Since he just hurriedly circled the periphery and didn’t discover in depth when he rescued Samuel last time, he could only rely on memory to explore and move forward step by step.

While on the move, Chen Rui suddenly raised his head and saw 2 black figures in the sky – 2 golden eagles, with Chen Rui’s vision, he could clearly see the unabashed hostility in the ferocious gaze.

The thunderbird!

The thunderbird was one of the strongest birds in the human world. It was even more ferocious than the griffon. It had a powerful [Thunder] talent and its combat power was second only to giant dragons.

Chen Rui once got a little thunderbird in the Garden City and established his identity as a ‘beast tamer’. With that, he followed Paul into the Holy Light Mountain. Since Chen Rui could not carry it through the [Star Gate], he released the thunderbird before the Snow Dallet operation.

The thunderbird’s temperament was unfriendly and unruly. Previously, the little thunderbird was young and undeveloped. In addition, Chen Rui tamed it by coercion and temptation based on absolute strength. If it was this adult thunderbird, it would also be difficult to tame it even with a death threat.

In the sound of crisp chirping, 2 thunderbirds swooped down toward Chen Rui one after the other. From time to time, some ignorant humans would come to steal the eggs or chicks of the thunderbird, so this kind of predator like the thunderbird was extremely hostile to humans. After discovering the enemy, it chose to attack as soon as possible.

Chen Rui frowned slightly, and the thunderbirds suddenly slowed down. In their eyes, it seemed that the surrounding trees were beginning to wither quickly, full of depression and twilight. At the same time, the slowed and weakened state started to show up. The thunderbird at the front even lost the strength to flutter its wings and fell straight to the ground.

The thunderbird behind sensed the enemy’s strength. It chirped with a struggle, and a thunder struck Chen Rui and split him in half. However, the halves of the figure quickly merged into 1 again as if nothing had happened. As he waved his hand, the thunderbird had already fallen with his companion before it could strike another lightning.

After Chen Rui quickly captured the thunderbirds with [Autumn Territory] and illusion, he tried to convey a friendly consciousness in the [Analytical Eyes] and wanted to take the opportunity to inquire about the location of the wind elementals, but the response was still very hostile. As his thoughts turned, his eyes were covered with a faint purple light, and the power of the Evil Pupil had been activated.

The ferocious gaze of the thunderbirds became hazy, and some images began to slowly reflect in Chen Rui’s eyes.

This was a strange palace that seemed to be among the clouds, surrounded by the power of storms and lightning.

Around the palace, there were strange human figures. Their lower bodies were a whirlwind-like air current, faintly exuding electric spark. It was traveling in a suspended manner even on the ground.

In addition to these human figures, there were tall giants on the ground. They wore armor and held javelins condensed by lightning in their hands. Their skins were dark silver and golden.

The purple light in Chen Rui’s eyes gradually faded, and the thunderbird’s eyes returned to normal. The power of the Evil Pupil brought a powerful deterrence to the soul of the thunderbird. Even after Chen Ruic canceled the binding strength, these 2 ferocious and aggressive predator birds did not attack again, but they flew away with fear.

Chen Rui rubbed his temples to relieve the discomfort. Sariel’s Evil Pupil is indeed amazing. This was a new function he had learned in the training ground in recent days- It could map the soul, which was a kind of strange power to read memory.

The difficulty of the actual application of this kind of power was far more than expected. Chen Rui consumed a lot of spirit power when activating for the first time. He almost couldn’t control it and got recoiled, but he got the information he wanted in the end.

The old nest of the wind elementals was a familiar palace. Right, he saw it in the Bloody Empire’s 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall, the Cloud Palace.

Surprisingly, the titans were also in the Cloud Palace, and they were at peace with the wind elementals as partners. In fact, the last time Chen Rui was chased by the ‘coalition army’ of the wind elementals and the titans. It seemed that the relationship between the 2 was extraordinary.

The thunderbirds’ memory did not contain the specific location of the Cloud Palace, but there were areas where these ‘dangerous creatures’ were active. Under normal circumstances, the thunderbirds would never easily enter these areas. The Cloud Palace was likely to originate from some kind of bloodline memory as well.

According to the memory of the thunderbirds, Chen Rui walked toward those ‘dangerous areas’ one step at a time.

In addition to the thunderbird, the Storm Island had abundant species, but the more he moved forward, the less demonic beasts there were. The strange and dangerous breath in the air became more and more intense.

Walking through a forest and in front of a basin, Chen Rui finally saw a huge figure – titan.

Although there were no wind elementals that Chen Rui was looking for, he knew that as long as he found the titans, the wind elementals must be nearby.

Before finding the wind elementals, Chen Rui didn’t want to alarm these giants to cause unnecessary battles. With a move in his mind, he channeled out the [Sneak] skill and hid his body.

Race: Titans (alchemy beings)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S

Physique: S, Strength: S, Spirit: S, Speed: A.

Analysis: Thunder power, strength talent, spiritual immunity.

Degree of danger: Quite high.

Chen Rui carefully bypassed this titan and continued to move forward. No doubt, the number of titans entering his sight gradually increased. The weakest was even the Demon Emperor level strength, which made Chen Rui think of the powerful dragons.

These giants with terrifying combat power looked a little dull when they were not fighting, and their activities did not seem to have a clear purpose, but it was certain that once the intruder Chen Rui emerged, he would definitely become the first target of attack of these giants.

The strange thing was that he met a lot of the titans along the way, but he didn’t see the wind elementals. As Chen Rui was puzzled, he suddenly stopped because he sensed a faint energy fluctuation in front of him. This kind of spiritual energy fluctuation was quite subtle. If he was a normal Demon Overlord or even a kingdom-level powerhouse, he might not be able to sense it. The reason Chen Rui could sense it was because he had a special spiritual imprint, the ancient alchemy civilization spiritual imprint.

The frequency of spiritual energy was becoming more and more familiar. It was similar to a certain illusion created by the spiritual imprint, but the strength was very weak. Chen Rui’s heart moved, and he walked straight ahead. There were no titans, but a cliff.

Chen Rui channeled the spiritual imprint in his body, trying to adjust to the frequency that synchronized with the nearby spiritual energy. The scene in front of him no doubt began to change slowly. It was not a cliff after all, but a huge canyon in front, and a long slope led directly to the entrance to the canyon.

On a closer look, the slope was actually formed by some kind of extremely strong radial power or some kind of big explosion in the canyon. The power of the explosion should be very special. Not only did it leave exaggerated traces, but the area was almost barren which looked particularly eye-catching.

With a thought, Chen Rui walked all the way into this huge canyon following the traces.

The further he went, the more obvious the traces, and the more shocking the intensity of the damage, but this seemed to happen quite long ago. The 1-hour time limit of [Sneak] was up, and it would take 3 hours to activate the next time. Fortunately, there were no titans in the canyon. With strong curiosity, he continued to walk forward. As he was walking, he suddenly kicked something under his feet. It was a familiar old metal object that seemed to be some kind of broken part.

When a similar wreck was found in front, Chen Rui finally remembered what it was.

Besides the assemble puppet, there were also translucent crystal-like fragments which should be the remains of a giant crystal beast or a crystal beast. This discovery further confirmed Chen Rui’s speculation.

The relatively complete ‘skeletons’ could already be seen before. Chen Rui also found some human-shaped bones that had not been completely weathered in the half assemble puppet.

Finally, a huge building appeared in front of Chen Rui. The scale of this building far exceeded the City of Stars. It shouldn’t be called a castle, but a city!

Chen Rui couldn’t be more familiar with the appearance and style of the city – the ruin of the ancient alchemy civilization!

The first impression of this ruin on Chen Rui, apart from being huge, was only a word: ruined.

The previous huge explosion traces no doubt spread out from the city. The gate area of the ruin had completely disappeared because of this explosion, and the vicinity was full of severely damaged wreckage.

Chen Rui walked into the ruin, and there were shocking traces of destruction everywhere. No living entity was found. The huge ruin was full of dead breath.

Chen Rui followed the hazy spiritual energy fluctuations and found the central palace of the city.

The central palace, which represented the supreme ruler of the city, had collapsed in half, and the remains of the guards were all nearby. It was clear that they had experienced a terrifying battle. When Chen Rui thought of the alchemy beings, the titans, outside the canyon, and the rage showed by the titans when he first released the power of spiritual imprint, he vaguely guessed something.

The structure of the central palace was much more complicated than that of the City of Stars, but the overall style was similar. Since the original strong defense power had disappeared, Chen Rui did not spend too much time cracking the weak illusion protection with his sense of the spiritual energy to find the most central main hall room.

As soon as he opened the door of the main hall, Chen Rui felt dizzy. A spiritual energy enveloped him from all sides. This spiritual energy was much stronger than the one sensed outside the door, and it had obvious hostility and strange power. It seemed to want to devour his soul.

Chen Rui was prepared for it. The God-Eating Mask appeared on his face. The God-Eating Mask had an attribute that was immune to spirit and soul control, and it also had the skill of the nemesis of spirit power, [God Eater]. Under [God Eater], this spirit power that wanted to devour his soul was in turn being devoured.

As the spiritual energy faded, the scene in front of him became clear. This was a spacious room with nothing extra than the huge purple crystal in the center.

This purple crystal was the central life crystal that controlled the entire ruin. If he could control it, he could become the master of this huge ruin.

TL: Another ancient ruin? Are both alchemy civilizations from the same origin?

chapters.title: Chapter 789 - Ancient Secrets
chapters.body:
Chapter 789 - Ancient Secrets

Chapter 789: Ancient Secrets

The quality of the purple crystal in front of him was quite high, but the surface was covered with cracks and there was no sign of life. It was obviously severely damaged, and the previous wave of spiritual energy disappeared.

The level of this ancient alchemy civilization was obviously far better than that of the City of Stars. Although it was severely damaged and almost completely unusable, for Chen Rui, it was 100 times more precious than ordinary treasures.

Even if this was an abandoned city that couldn’t be restored, the existing materials in the city were likely to raise the level of the City of Stars to a higher level. What’s more, there must be many precious items in this level of relics…

Chen Rui could see that the cracked purple crystal was not completely scrapped. Otherwise the amount of spirit power could not be stored at all, and the room would be destroyed automatically. If sufficient energy could be provided, the crystal could still be repaired, but the spirit power devour just now had exhausted its last power. Now, it had completely lost the ability to resist.

Chen Rui thought for a while. A purple light appeared in his hand as he approached the crystal. It was the spiritual imprint of the City of Stars.

“Unknown spiritual imprint!”

“Identified as the power of similar civilizations!”

“It doesn’t match with the imprint of the dominating soul; refuse to add spiritual imprint!”

“Judged as an intruder! Start defense!”

“Insufficient life energy, unable to activate defense… The purple crystal’s messages kept popping in Chen Rui’s mind. Because his spiritual imprint did not match the soul power of the original crystal master, the purple crystal seemed to be very resistant. Unfortunately, with the current strength of the crystal, it was impossible to resist the invasion of Chen Rui.

The purple light smoothly merged with the crystal, and the spiritual imprint power spread quickly like a spider web. It seized control step by step while continuously eroding the original structure.

“Insufficient energy, give up the level 3 authority protection…”

“Abandon level 2 authority protection…”

“Abandon level 1 authority protection and retain the highest level authority. Enter protective dormancy…”

Soon, the spiritual imprint power of the City of Stars succeeded in occupying the crystal and obtained most of the authority. However, due to the difference in level, it was unable to obtain the highest core control authority. Even so, this was enough to make Chen Rui delighted.

After gaining control, Chen Rui immediately received a warning of insufficient energy. He immediately took out an energy conversion instrument produced by the City of Stars and converted dozens of aura fruit into energy cubes before placing them next to the purple crystal.

These energy cubes were top-level energy essence which could provide the highest purity of life energy, and the quality was far above the energy extracted by the alchemy civilization.
