chapters.title: Chapter 801: Beamon
chapters.body:
Chapter 801: Beamon

Chen Rui asked, “Why are you 2 here?”

“It’s really master!” Lucio’s voice was full of ecstasy. After being caught by these orcs, he thought he was bound to die. He didn’t expect to miraculously meet his powerful master!

Ina answered Chen Rui’s question, “Yesterday, I led the merchant group to transport a batch of wine and goods to the Thunderstorm Tribe for trading, but I didn’t expect that the orcs suddenly turned hostile and snatched all the goods. We were also detained here.”

Chen Rui remembered that Ina once said that his father was a businessman who died of a chronic illness. She became a mercenary for survival, and she would inherit her father’s legacy and regain his old business if she had the opportunity. Later, after Ina led Chen Rui to Storm Island to rescue Samuel and Joanna, she left sadly. Unexpectedly, she really became a businesswoman, and she was even working in high-risk areas like the Nightmare Wilderness.

“Have you seen a half-elf girl named Blanche?” With that said, Chen Rui looked at the situation around the cages for a while. These cages’ frames are shaped using the stone pillars. I don’t seem to feel anything like magic circles.

Ina and Lucio looked at each other and shook their heads. Someone in the cage beside him said, “I know that half-elf!”

Chen Rui saw that it was a fatty with a chubby head and big ears.

“I can tell you, but you have to save me. When I reach a safe place, I will surely tell you!”

The slightly smarter people could see that this ‘orc’ was a human disguise. This was a survival chance that came in despair, and it was the only chance to live.

Chen Rui frowned, “You tell me now and I will try to rescue you.”

“No! You must save me first!” The fatty insisted on the conditions, and emphasized that it was ‘me’ rather than ‘us’.

When the words came out, many people yelled, “I know too! Save me first!”

“Shut up!” Chen Rui was afraid that they would alert the guards outside, and a circle of intangible momentum spread around. The strange pressure suppressed these people speechless.

A hoarse voice sounded, “Is it a girl with glasses?”

The voice came from the cage behind. It was also a person detained in solitary confinement. The man was tall and thin. Unlike others, he seemed to carry a torture instrument on his body. His eyes were piercing in the dark. He was actually able to speak under the pressure of Chen Rui.

Chen Rui immediately turned around and the man continued to say, “About 4 days ago, a few orcs came here with 2 women who looked like wizards and took away the girl who was in solitary confinement in the cage beside me. The girl was locked in for several days and remained in a coma. From the wizards’ conversation, I heard the word ‘half-elf’.”

4 days ago? Chen Rui took a deep breath. I am still a step behind. It seems that Blanche is most likely taken to the Doom Swamp where the great wizard is. He nodded immediately, “Thank you, I will get you all out of the prison first.”

The sealwork of the cage was very special. It looked tight with no door. He didn’t know how to open it.

The man looked at the way he looked at the stone pillars and sighed, “No need to try. These cages should be left over from the Orc Empire. They are extremely strong. If I hadn’t been locked in by these chains, I might be able to break open. Your strength has just reached the edge of Saint, so you can’t damage these pillars. If you really want to save me and these people, it’s best to leave here immediately before being discovered and go to the Blue Holy Sanctuary of Glory Empire to ask for help…”

“Understood.” Chen Rui interrupted him, “You mean I can only use brute force to crack it, right?”

“At least you have to have to reach the real Saint…” The man shook his head. Before he finished speaking, his pupils suddenly contracted as he felt that the breath exuded by Chen Rui had changed. It instantly climbed to the point which was shocking to even him, a powerhouse that was about to reach the peak of Saint.

In the blink of an eye, the sharp qi enveloped the prison cells. The extremely strong stone pillars were broken into several pieces almost at the same time. The cut was smooth as if it was slashed by a sharp sword.

Seeing that the cage was broken open, the humans couldn’t help but be overjoyed. They climbed out one after another. However, the totem-shaped light inscriptions appeared on the broken stone pillars, and the entire cage began to shake.

“Oh no!” Chen Rui knew something was amiss. These stone pillars without magic circle fluctuations actually have the totem power of the orc tribe. The brute force cracking just now may have alarmed the enemy!

This situation made almost everyone panic. The tall and thin man stood up and said, “Damn orcs, there are actually such totems! Now we can only kill our way out together! Is there any way to help me break the shackles? The shackles carry a special soul power which confines my strength.”

“Soul power?” Chen Rui slightly pondered, and there was already a sword in his hand. The quillons were 2 back to back dark golden angels. The sword was all-white with a simple and mysterious breath, the Sword of Fallen Angel.

He slashed directly on the torture instrument worn by the man. The torture instrument only broke through an opening, but it did not break immediately. In the man’s surprised gaze, the opening automatically began to expand. In a blink of an eye, the entire torture instrument seemed to have lost its life and was scattered on the ground.

In the area of the central royal tent, the orc soldiers who received the order quickly gathered in the direction of the dungeon.

With a deafening sound, the entrance of the dungeon burst open. The nearby orc soldiers were blown away by a huge wave of air. Many of their bodies were torn apart in mid-air.

This move was made by the tall and thin man named Bonnet. His body that didn’t look strong contained amazing explosive power. Wherever his fists waved, the orc soldiers turned into blood mist.

Not long after, the area became blazing with consecutive explosion sounds. It was already late at night. Many orcs suddenly fell into chaos.

Bonnet attracted firepower while Chen Rui led Ina, Lucio and the rescued humans to quickly evacuate in the opposite direction. The man took the item given by Chen Rui and threw it wildly. After venting his anger, he kept up with the team without stopping.

A roar was heard from the dungeon in the distance. The roar shook the entire area of the king’s tent. People with weaker powers felt that they were buzzing sounds in their ears and they could hardly retain their stability. Bonnet’s facial expression changed, “Run! It’s Orc King Fugger!”

As soon as he said it, the roar was approaching at high speed. In the blink of an eye, a tall figure was already blocking the front. This was a strong orc wearing a heavy armor with golden pupils and very thick hair. His hideous appearance looked particularly horrifying in the moonlight.

Race: Orc.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S+

Physique: S+, Strength: S+, Spirit: A, Speed: S.

[Analysis]: Strength talent, Beamon bloodline transformation

Risk: High.

It seemed that the Orc King Fugger that Bonnet mentioned should be the top existence among the strongest orc forces. As long as Fugger was defeated, it shouldn’t be a problem for Bonnet with S-level strength to take Lucio, Ina and others to escape the Nightmare Wilderness. He could also continue to the Doom Swamp to rescue Blanche.

Chen Rui frowned suddenly as he saw 2 orcs descended from the air, 1 male and 1 female. In the [Analytical Eyes], both strengths were S.

“Imshi, Sashry… The 3 Orc Kings of the Thunderous Tribe are here!” Bonnet smiled bitterly and said to Chen Rui, “It seems that our luck is used up. What is your name? Before I die, I want to know the one who fights together in the end…”

“Things are not as bad as you think…”

Bonnet’s words were interrupted again as Chen Rui’s voice came in his mind, “I’ll deal with these 3 Orc Kings later, and you protect these people to retreat to the west. Wait for me in that small forest. By the way, there is also a unicorn. It’s my mount, don’t hurt it.”

Dealing with the 3 Orc Kings? Bonnet couldn’t react to it for a while, then Chen Rui was walking slowly toward Orc King Fugger.

All of a sudden, everyone’s vision was blurred and Chen Rui had appeared in front of Fugger in an instant. Fugger didn’t panic. He threw a big fist containing the berserk strength.

Chen Rui did not evade, but he threw a punch.

“Boom.” When the 2 fists slammed into each other head-on, the ground trembled violently. Cracks appeared on the ground below the collision point and quickly spread to the surroundings.

Bonnet once experienced Fugger’s power, so he seemed to see the tragic scene of Chui Rui being crushed. However, his worry was replaced by surprise. He saw Chen Rui standing still and Orc King Fugger took a step back, then another step back… He took 5 steps in a row before he managed to stand firm. His expression of contempt was replaced by disbelief.

In fact, the strength of this blow was not much different between the 2 sides. Fugger suffered from underestimating the enemy, while Chen Rui used the overlapping strength realized from the surfy sea. When Fugger realized something was wrong, he could no longer block the powerful wave-like force.

When Fugger felt the opponent’s strength, his golden eyes were full of fighting spirit. Before he counterattacked, a warning sign suddenly appeared behind him. It turned out that the opponent had appeared behind him like a ghost.

Fugger reacted extremely quickly. He turned around and clawed, but this blow fell into a kind of muddy water-like power which was completely different from the previous wave power. It was as if punching into cotton, unable to maximize the impact. Before the strength of this punch was exhausted, the soft water ripples had turned into a whip that lashed in his ribs severely. Fugger felt a sharp pain, and his body shook. His fighting instinct told him that the opponent did not use a lot of power, and that the blow was actually his own strength which was redirected at him by some strange means. It was equivalent to hitting himself with a punch.

The pesky water ripple power came again. It was the first time Fugger encountered such a strange opponent. He would rather choose the previous head-to-head battle. After continuous losses, his raging roar continued.

The visibility under the moonlight was not very high for others, but Bonnet could see clearly that Orc King Fugger, the most powerful one in the Nightmare Wilderness, was successively restrained by that unknown human. There were more and more dents on his armor.

Fugger finally got rid of the strange force field, and he found that the opponent was missing. The sound of beating came from Imshi and Sashry on the side. It turned out that the troublesome enemy actually left him alone to attack Imshi and Sashry instead!

This kind of ignore infuriated Fugger more than any provocative language. With a loud shout, he rushed toward Chen Rui. Chen Rui gave a long laugh. His hands drew mysterious ripples, and a soft like water but vast force field circled the 3 Orc Kings.

This force field was none other than the [Water Profound Mystery]. Chen Rui used both hands instead of a sword this time. It was just like Catherine battling against the crystal dragons and the other 2 in the Crystal Valley. The difference was that Catherine’s ‘resolve’ was more proficient while he was more like ‘borrowing’ the force.

Leveraging strength to fight was just like the ‘Tai Chi’ he had heard of in the previous lives, but he had not learned Tai Chi, so he could only use the inspiration of Tai Chi to realize his own understanding and progressively improve it into the current combat skill.

The attacks of the 3 Orc Kings were always involuntarily attacking their own people. Even if they could hit the enemy occasionally, it would be dispelled and diverted by a strange movement and power. They could not cause real damage. Instead, they were frequently being hit. In fact, it was closer to the ‘universal shifting’ described by Jin Yong.

Bonnet looked dumbfounded. He finally understood why Chen Rui said ‘I’ll deal with these 3 Orc Kings later’. When this ‘nameless powerhouse’ broke the cage, he already knew that the opponent was strong, but he did not expect him to be strong to the extent of actually fighting the 3 Orc Kings alone!

Very few people can match this kind of strength, even the Holy Sanctuary of the Blue Glory Empire. As a top Saint powerhouse, how can he be unknown? Who is he?

The 3 Orc Kings became more frightened as they fought. They immediately changed their tactics, abandoning their best hand-to-hand combat to focus on energy and territory power attacks. This greatly reduced the effectiveness of [Water Profound Mystery].

Chen Rui frowned when he saw Bonnet and the others still watching the battle. He channeled [Water Profound Mystery] to the extreme. The 3 Orc Kings who surrounded him felt that the water ripple force field was amplified, and their bodies involuntarily floated. Chen Rui’s hands shook, and the water ripples suddenly turned into huge waves, knocking back the 3 Orc Kings at the same time.

“Run!”

The loud shout made Bonnet wake up as he hurriedly led everyone to retreat to the west.

Before they ran far away, Bonnet suddenly felt a terrifying fluctuation. Looking back, the 3 Orc Kings’ figures quickly became taller and bigger, and their momentum was also undergoing shocking changes.

Bonnet was secretly shocked when he suddenly thought of a legend about the orc royal family.

Beamon Giant Beast!

These 3 Orc Kings actually possess the Orc Empire’s strongest Beamon bloodline. They can transform into the most terrifying melee combat beast, the Beamon Giant Beast!

Can that powerhouse withstand it? Bonnet felt bitter in his mouth when he thought of himself challenging Fugger recklessly previously. He was lucky that he was imprisoned rather than being killed on the spot.

Although Bonnet had reached Saint, he knew in his mind that this battle was out of the level he could participate in. The only thing he could do now was to take these people away as soon as possible so as not to drag down the unknown powerhouse.

At this moment, he heard the roar of the Beamon Giant Beast from behind, which seemed to be intertwined with shock and anger. Bonnet couldn’t help but glance, and he saw that the sky suddenly turned into a fiery red color. He could vaguely feel the heat and viciousness contained in the fiery red even at this distance.

TL: This is the strongest tribe? Then the great wizard won’t be anywhere stronger, right?

Find out what happens next by getting early access to chapters with Patreon! Please do check out the community goal in our Patreon as well! Thanks for the support! Click here to access our Patreon page.

chapters.title: Chapter 802: Urgent
chapters.body:
Chapter 802: Urgent

Thunderstorm Tribe.

From the ground’s astonishingly distorted fissures, one could see the fierceness of the battle and the terrifying power level. The soldiers stood far away while holding their torches high, not daring to approach them.

The most striking thing in the battlefield was the 3 giant beasts that were about 6 meters tall covered in tough steel wire-like hair. The proportions of the body were somewhat similar to that of the orangutan. The big mouth revealed sharp teeth. The claws were nearly 3 meters long as a weapon.

This was the Beamon Giant Beasts, the strongest orc bloodline transformation with super offense and defense capabilities and physique which was enough to rival the most ferocious giant dragon.

However, the 3 Beamon Giant Beasts were staring at the figure in the middle as if facing some terrifying opponent.

The person’s face was relatively vague. The salient feature was that the whites of his eyes were black, and his pupils were bloody and fiery red. Although his height was incomparable to the 3 giant beasts, the tyrannical breath exuded was not inferior at all compared to the most powerful Beamon Giant Beasts.

[Scorching Dragon Possession].

Imshi shouted loudly as he waved his huge claws toward Chen Rui. The strong wind pressure caused dent marks on the ground. Although the Beamon Giant Beast was huge, its attack speed was not slow at all, especially with the strong power buff. Nevertheless, the figure did not dodge and had no intention to resist.

In the blink of an eye, the blow had quickly hit the target.

Chen Rui was hit, but the claws containing the huge strength and destruction could only make his upper body lean back slightly. After he slowly stood up, he rubbed the faint mark on his face like nothing had happened. It was as if he was just being gently pushed by a coquettish woman.

Imshi’s golden pupils suddenly shrank. Chen Rui disappeared in an instant. At the same time, a warning sign came from above. When he raised his head, the enemy appeared on the top of his head. The figure seemed to cover the moonlight.

When Imshi raised his head, Chen Rui had already punched.

At this moment, even the soldiers in the distance had a certain illusion simultaneously that it was not a small figure, but a huge winding red ferocious beast.

Judging from the intense sound heard in an instant, Chen Rui definitely launched more than 1 punch although it was only a blink of an eye.

“Boom!” The entire ground shook. Imshi’s huge body was smashed into the ground. Although the fur of the Beamon Giant Beast possessed the strong defensive ability, this heavy blow made Imshi dizzy. Just as he got up, he fell to the ground with an unstable footing.

Sashry also let out a roar. This roar was not a simple deterrent. A blue light flashed on Imshi’s body as if he had been quickly healed. He actually got up quickly. It seemed that Sashry had a battlecry power similar to a wizard.

Chen Rui was about to eliminate Sashry first when he suddenly felt a fluctuation behind him. He teleported to the distance in an instant, causing the sudden claw to miss its target. It was the strongest Fugger who attacked.

Fugger’s height at this time had changed again, shrinking to about 2 meters high. It seemed that Fugger had the strange talent to change the size of his body at will. Imshi and Sashry were originally S-level strengths. After transforming, they reached the S+ level. Meanwhile, Fugger’s increase was even greater. His comprehensive strength had reached S++, and the attributes of physique and strength had climbed to S++.

The reduced size of Beamon was more capable of exerting power when facing Chen Rui’s height. At this time, Sashry’s battlecry changed again. Fugger’s body was covered with a light green color, and his speed suddenly rose to S++. Except for the inherent inadequacy of spirit power, the rest of his qualities had reached a near-perfect level. His attack appeared more and more rapid.

Under normal circumstances, Chen Rui’s strength was at the level of S+ which was definitely inferior, but he was now in the ‘stimulant’ state of [Scorching Dragon Possession]. All attributes had been greatly improved. He did not evade and started counterattacking Fugger.

The distortion and tremor on the ground became more and more intense, and the orc soldiers in the distance felt that the moonlight in that area seemed to be distorted. Layers of unimaginable intense force fields filled their vision, and they could not see the specific scene in the center. Even the 2 most conspicuous huge figures of Sashry and Imshi looked vague.

Not only Fugger attacked, but also Sashry and Imshi. Their body size and combat power couldn’t join the battle between Fugger and Chen Rui, so they launched supportive techniques. Sashry used battlecry. There were 3 types of battlecry: healing, acceleration, and mind disturbance. The mental disturbance was activated now. It had the effect of disturbing the opponent’s mind and interrupting spell casting; Imshi used territory where the enemy’s offense and defense would become more fragile within the territory. It also had the effect of restraint.

At first, Fugger didn’t want Sashry and Imshi to intervene in the fight, but it turned out that the 3 of them could barely stand against the opponent only when they joined forces. Originally in Fugger’s expectation, as long as he transformed into Beamon, he would be able to easily annihilate his opponent with the strength advantage and melee combat ability. However, the opponent also had a similar transformation. Not only did he have an absolute strength comparable to that of Beamon, but he also showed incredible control power. Fugger was like a chess piece that was controlled by the enemy. Every move was expected, and he felt like he had never been so restrained like this in a battle. It was more terrifying than the strange combat skills before. This passive situation was not relieved until the 2 Orc Kings joined.

Chen Rui activated [Insight] that was based on [Deep Analysis]. He realized this [Insight] during the battle with Teris (Midnight Sun). He could predict the enemy’s intention first and judge in advance to control the battle. Although there was still a long way to go compared with Midnight Sun’s control, he already had a feeling of being a ‘chess player’.

Chen Rui made several first strikes to force the 3 Orc Kings away. He flew into the sky and took a look at the distance. Bonnet and the others should have almost evacuated, so at least they will not be affected by this battle. Furthermore, just to be safe, this battle does not need any witnesses.

“If you only have such level of strength and means, then it’s time to put an end to this battle…” Chen Rui looked down at the 3 Orc King in midair.

Fugger roared, and a yellow light appeared in his mouth. A strong light was launched toward Chen Rui. Chen Rui suddenly disappeared in the air, and almost at the same time, 3 black figures appeared around the 3 Orc Kings. It was actually 3 Chen Rui.

“[Supernova Explosion]!” 3 voices sounded in unison.

There were no stars under the moonlight today, but at this moment, all the orcs saw the starlights. This was an unforgettable scene in a lifetime. The extremely strong starlight was even more dazzling than the sun.

The entire area of the central royal tent was filled with daylight as the dazzling light and strong destructive shock wave spread violently. Many orcs who were still watching from a ‘safe distance’ had not had time to react before they turned into nothingness. The back row was also thrown away by that huge force.

The dazzling starlight finally faded, and the 3 Beamon Giant Beasts fell on the greatly collapsed and distorted ground. To be precise, their bodies were inlaid into the ground as if their bones had been removed. Their berserk breath had disappeared, and their vitality had dropped to the lowest point.

If it were not for the physique and defense power of the Beamon Giant Beast Beast, the overlap [Supernova Explosion] launched by the power of the avatars was enough to make the 3 Orc King shatter.

The 3 King Orcs could no longer maintain their transformation form and automatically regain their usual form. The weaker Sashry and Imshi had been severely injured and unconscious. Fugger tried several times to get up, but he was unable to succeed.

The 3 figures who had launched the horror starlight gradually merged into 1, and he slowly walked to Fugger’s front.

“Where is that half-elf girl?”

The words, ‘half-elf girl’, let Fugger have a different expression in his golden eyes, then he kept the fierce gaze staring at Chen Rui without answering. Unfortunately, the strongest Orc King only had the strength to stare at this moment.

“Was she sent to the Doom Swamp?” Chen Rui said with a resolute murderous aura, “Answer me! Don’t try to fool or deceive me. Otherwise, I will completely wipe out the entire Thunderstorm Tribe! You know I’m capable of this!”

These words made Fugger’s original weak breathing become rapid, and he finally stopped insisting, “4 days ago, the great wizard sent the envoy here and took away the half-elf woman alone.”

“Why did the great wizard offer a reward for arresting her?”

“I have no idea.”

Chen Rui saw that Fugger was not lying. He frowned and asked, “Then, why do orcs capture humans? You even capture the business travelers who are trading here?”

“This is the order of the great wizard. It seems to be required for the blood sacrifice ceremony.”

Blood sacrifice! An ominous omen surged in Chen Rui’s mind, and his thoughts turned, “What is the fastest way to reach the Doom Swamp?”

Fugger hesitated for a moment, “There is a 2-way [Teleportation Array] in the palace ruins which can directly reach the Doom Swamp, but it needs the teleportation crystal of the Great Wizard to use it.”

“Give me the teleportation crystal! I will let the Thunderstorm Tribe go!”

Fugger said quickly, “I only have 1 teleportation crystal, but it has expired…”

Soon, Chen Rui came to the [Teleportation Array] in the palace ruins, holding a crystal in his hand. It was the teleportation crystal obtained from Fugger.

Based on his magic circle and mechanics, he had understood the mystery of this teleportation crystal after a little test. The crystal contained the spiritual imprint of the [Teleportation Array], but the imprint needed some special power activation in order to work. This kind of power surprised Chen Rui; it turned out to be faith power.

The great wizard of orcs was said to be able to communicate directly with the Orc God. She was also the guide of orcs’ development and survival, as well as the instructor of orcs wizards. She was worshipped by various orc tribes. Then the great wizard was equivalent to the role of an oracle. It was not surprising that there was this kind of faith power item. The problem was that Chen Rui could only convert the faith power for his own use, but he could not channel the faith power to ‘charge’ this teleportation crystal.

Now Blanche is likely to encounter great danger. It is urgent to go to the Doom Swamp. Chen Rui couldn’t help but feel a little worried.

spiritual imprint…faith power…

Right! Suddenly, he had a lightbulb moment and smashed the crystal. Before the spiritual imprint dissipated, he used the power of devour to ‘devour’ it, then he walked into the [Teleportation Array].

This was actually the inspiration from a change of perspective. He was now equivalent to a ‘teleportation crystal’ with a spiritual imprint, and there was a lot of faith power in his body which could naturally activate the [Teleportation Array].

No doubt, [Teleportation Array] emitted a whirlpool-like blue light, and soon Chen Rui disappeared.

chapters.title: Chapter 803: The Secret Language Stone Palace
chapters.body:
Chapter 803: The Secret Language Stone Palace

TL: 4 chapters for today as pateron monthly goal is achieved! Thanks for the support 🥰

After the flash of blue light, Chen Rui had appeared in another teleportation array.

There was a forest in front of him with a passage paved by stone slabs leading to the depths of the forest. The white mist was floating around, and the visibility was not high.

This should be the famous dangerous place of the Nightmare Wilderness, the Doom Swamp. On the hand-drawn map given by the human merchant, there is not too much description of this area, but the general direction is indicated. There is also a 2-word reminder: “Very dangerous”.

Chen Rui came to the Doom Swamp himself and the avatar, Shura, went to the dwarf forest to meet Bonnet, escorting Ina, others and the unicorn White Wind all the way out of the Nightmare Wilderness. Ina’s ship would send White Wind back to the Jade Forest Sea. As for Bonnet, who was probably a member of the Blue Glory Empire’s Holy Sanctuary, Chen Rui did not want to have too many intersections with him, especially since he was also 1 of the most wanted criminals of the Holy Church. A slight mistake could hurt Ina, Lucio or even Samuel.

The most important thing right now was to immediately rescue the half-elf girl who might be listed as some kind of ritual sacrifice.

There were 6 3-meter-high statues on both sides of the stone path close to the teleportation array. These statues were very strange in shape. They had 2 upper bodies, holding sharp swords. They looked hideous and strange.

These 6 statues gave Chen Rui a familiar feeling. As he passed by the statues, the statues’ eyes suddenly flashed with dark red light and became alive.

At this time, the [Analytical Eyes] information prompted: The Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C.

Analysis: Invulnerability attribute, perception concealment.

It turned out to be the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts that I once saw in the Land of Hatred! No wonder they looked familiar. The Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts is a combat machine created by alchemy. It is made of secret spells and special materials. It has the characteristics of greatly reducing physical and magic damage. They can also shield the detection of perception.

These 6 Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts’ double bodies and 4-arm shape were not the same as those Chen Rui had seen, and their combat power was more powerful. Particularly, the close combat lethality of the double body was almost comparable to the nagas.

However, Chen Rui had seen 100,000 Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts in the underwater world. Facing the 6 Demon King-level Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts, he was calm and composed. He held his hands together, and the movements of the 6 Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts stopped at the same time. The arms holding the swords were frozen in the air, and the joints made a piercing sound. They were obviously unable to resist him even with all their strength.

Chen Rui frowned suddenly. He shook his arms and knocked the 6 Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts away, and the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts burst open in the air.

This self-detonation was a bit unexpected, and the movement caused was loud. With his hearing, he had already felt a faint sound from a distance. It seemed that more than 1 person was rushing to this side quickly.

Chen Rui didn’t panic. Since his deeds were exposed, he simply caused more commotion. It would be better to alarm Longmetil and interrupt the blood sacrifice that might be in progress.

Several ‘Zerays’ imitated by Zola appeared in his hands. Although their power was slightly lower than the original ones, they were still quite impressive. They had previously caused extensive damage in the Thunderstorm Tribe.

“Boom Boom!” There was a deafening explosion sound in the woods. Some magic circles or totems placed near the woods were completely destroyed by this terrifying explosion. More and more people were alarmed. The first ones to come over had appeared in his sight.

This was a team of cavalry whose mount was a black lizard pseudo-dragon; the image was somewhat similar to the theropod carnivorous dinosaurs known by Chen Rui. The cavalry was wearing light armor with their face covered in black cloth. Their figures were somewhat different from that of the sturdy orcs. They looked more agile. They held a spear in their hands and carried a row of javelins behind their back.

A cavalry spotted Chen Rui and immediately signaled his companions to rush forward. Chen Rui waved his hand, and an airflow burst out, flipping away the cavalry and the mounts that rushed in front. When the cavalry behind saw this, they didn’t dare to get close, and they threw javelins one after another.

Chen Rui’s figure disappeared instantly and appeared behind a lizard pseudo-dragon. The cavalry was taken aback. Before he could do anything, he was lifted up into the air. After a slight shock, he was finally relieved, but he found that all his companions and mounts had fallen to the ground. He was the only one left in the cavalry team.

“Half-orc?” The information displayed by the [Analytical Eyes] surprised Chen Rui, but since half-elf existed, half-orc was naturally within the scope of understanding, but it was just a little unexpected.

“Where is the Great Wizard Longmetil?” Chen Rui used Evil Pupil’s mental pressure to question him, but the half-orc still did not speak under the power of Evil Pupil. After a while, he couldn’t stand the terrifying mental pressure and fainted.

Chen Rui was taken aback. The strength of this half-orc is only E. By right, it is impossible to resist the power of Evil Pupil. There is only one possibility for this – he received a stronger spiritual implication such as a certain… faith.

While Chen Rui was frowning, there was a bright light around him. A large-scale lighting magic had been activated as if it were daylight, but he didn’t plan to hide. He just stood there, waiting for the arrival of the fast approaching enemy.

Soon, a large group of cavalry appeared in front of him. These cavalry’s bodies had a faint light, which was obviously blessed with the battlecry of the wizards.

The cavalry was not eager to attack, but they slowly pulled a distance to form an encirclement. Several wizard-like men and women began to appear beside the cavalries. Judging from their figures, there were orcs and half-orc.

Under the order of a leader, these wizards threw objects one by one at Chen Rui, which fell far and wide around him. It turned out to be huge stone pillars with totems engraved on them. The weight of the stone pillar was not light. If it was a human magician, it would perhaps be a problem to carry it using the original body strength alone. Only the ‘magician’ of the orc tribe could temporarily take up the role as ‘javelin thrower’ so easily.

As soon as the pillars were inserted into the ground, they quickly emitted a strange light. The shiny inscriptions interweaved and resonated like a large array that wrapped Chen Rui in it.

Chen Rui felt that his body seemed to be bound by intangible ropes. He was struggling to move. He was surprised that the power of these totems that was different from ordinary magic was so amazing. The interwoven totem inscriptions merged in 1 place, and dozens of huge ‘claws’ suddenly appeared on the ground, forming a cage that trapped Chen Rui in it.

After the cage was formed, the lizard cavalry took out the javelin together. Amid the battlecry of the wizards, the javelins with green light were thrown into the cage one after another.

The purpose of these javelins was not to pierce Chen Rui through the cage, but to land on the ground around him. When they were inserted into the ground, they turned into puffs of green smoke and spread out. The green smoke was obviously very poisonous — it was the first time Chen Rui saw such a combination of battle tactics.

Javelins were thrown at the cage like rain. Under the effect of the totem array, the poisonous smoke did not spread, but concentrated in the cage area. It was so concentrated that it was almost impossible to see the cage.

At this moment, a black hole in the sky appeared out of thin air like a whirlpool that quickly devoured the poisonous smoke. Not only the poisonous smoke, but the light on the totem pillars also rapidly weakened. In the blink of an eye, the giant claw cage that had lost the power of the totem had been turned into powder.

The wizards staggered back, seeming to have received some kind of strong recoil, but the devouring power of the black hole continued. Whether it was the cavalry or the wizards, they involuntarily flew to the black hole above.

When the black hole disappeared, the unconscious wizards, cavalry and even the lizard pseudo-dragon mounts lay unconscious on the ground. In fact, [Star Devouring] did not devour their flesh and blood, but it had completely destroyed the combat power of these people.

Chen Rui approached the wizard leader. This was a half-orc woman with a pretty hot figure, and her appearance was much more delicate than the orcs. With the previous example of cavalry, Chen Rui guessed that these wizards might have some kind of stubborn beliefs. Only relying on the power of Evil Pupil might not produce results. Fortunately, he had more than Evil Pupil.

While thinking about it, Chen Rui had a mask on his face, the God-Eating Mask. His eyes began to glow with a faint yellow light.

Soon after, the half-orc wizard leader, Baji, led a ‘half-orc wizard’ all the way to the location of Great Wizard Longmetil – The Secret Language Stone Palace.

The half-orc wizard was a disguise by Chen Rui. After Baji became the puppet of the God-Eating Mask, she told everything she knew. He learned from her that since the half-elf was sent to the Secret Language Stone Palace 4 days ago, Great Wizard Longmetil had been behind closed doors and focused on preparing for the ‘blood sacrifice for the god’. The first batch of captured humans were also sent to the stone palace; it was said to be some kind of sacrifice.

The news made Chen Rui more anxious. Before entering the stone palace, the 2 were blocked by the guard at the door, saying that it was the great wizard who ordered no one to enter.

Baji appeared stern, claiming that there was an emergency and she had to report it to the Great Wizard.

As there was such a big movement outside, even the person inside the Secret Language Stone Palace heard it. Baji’s status was different. As the leader of the high level wizard in charge of defense, it made sense to rush to report to the great wizard after discovering the situation. So after some intimidation, the 2 successfully entered the stone palace.

The stone palace had a large space. It was not like an ordinary palace where one could find the main hall directly. Instead, it was full of complex maze-like passages. Fortunately, there was a guide like Baji. Otherwise, it was not an easy task to find the ‘God Prayer Hall’ where the great wizard was.

The stone palace was filled with a silent and peculiar atmosphere. There were no extra guards, but the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts were scattered along the way.

These Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts were in a dormant state. In fact, the soldiers and wizards of the Doom Swamp had a kind of ‘immunity’ amulet. Without this amulet, one would be indiscriminately attacked. This was exactly why Chen Rui was attacked by the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts as soon as he walked out of the teleportation array.

When the 2 walked into the large corridor in front of the God Prayer Hall, something unexpected happened. The Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts on both sides suddenly came back to life. Not only those in the corridor, but also the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts behind. In the blink of an eye, both of them had been surrounded.

This situation was unprecedented. Baji was taken aback. She clearly took an amulet with her. Why did it trigger the revival of the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts?

Chen Rui thought about it a little, and he already understood – Longmetil must be carrying out some extremely secret activity, so he will kill his ‘own people’ without hesitation.

Could this activity be… Chen Rui shuddered suddenly as his ominous premonition became stronger, and his breath suddenly rose.

TL: Can he stop the ritual in time? His opponent seems to be at least demi-god (or the god he prays to) since there is faith power in the troop, can he fight without the [Pole Star Transformation]?

Find out what happens next by getting early access to chapters with Patreon! Please do check out the community goal in our Patreon as well! Thanks for the support! Click here to access our Patreon page.

chapters.title: Chapter 804: The Truth About The God Prayer Hall
chapters.body:
Chapter 804: The Truth About The God Prayer Hall

In the God Prayer Hall of the Secret Language Stone Palace, the countless half-moon runes that slashed at high speed gradually faded away, and the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts’ bodies were scattered on the ground like shredded paper.

Baji’s expression was very natural. In her greatest consciousness, her master was omnipotent. As a slave, she could dedicate her life to the master at any time.

After Chen Rui destroyed the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts, he rushed into the God Prayer Hall with Baji.

The God Prayer Hall was the center of the Secret Language Stone Palace. It was very spacious. The most eye-catching was the statue directly in front. The statue looked burly with full-body armor, and it held a greatsword and a hammer. It should be the god of the orcs.

On the walls on both sides, there were also wall paintings. The theme was naturally the various legends of the Orc God. Among these legends, a figure appeared consistently. It was a woman wearing a cloak and holding a staff. At the top of the staff was a beast skull with horns.

According to Baji’s previous description, this woman was the spiritual leader of the orc tribe, the Great Wizard Longmetil who was said to be able to communicate with the will of Orc God.

Chen Rui showed a contemplative expression. The Holy Light’s 3 archangels stole faith under the watch of Light God, and the Demon Realm has not seen miracles in countless years. Satan and Sariel revealed that the gods should be sleeping or in another hibernating state. If Orc God is really one of the gods, then the so-called ‘communicate with will’ of this great wizard is a bit unexplainable.

It stands to reason that Great Wizard Longmetil should be in this hall, but I don’t know why she is missing. At this moment, 4 black figures suddenly appeared in the 4 corners of the main hall, and they slowly moved closer. They exuded a cold and terrifying breath, which surrounded Chen Rui and Baji. These 4 black figures wore black cloaks and bright golden masks on their faces.

The man on the east spoke up, “Baji, you sinner who betrayed God, actually colluded with outsiders to trespass into the Secret Language Stone Palace! Both you and the intruder will receive the strongest sanctions!”

“The 4 secret guards!” Baji whispered. The 4 secret guards were the guardian of the great wizard. They had great strength and never showed their true faces. She initially heard that 3 people were ordered to go out, so she didn’t expect that they had returned in secret.

These 4 had the Demon Overlord level strength, but the combat power was inferior to the 3 Orc Kings of the Thunderstorm Tribe, but one thing aroused Chen Rui’s surprise. In the display of the [Analytical Eyes], these 4 are actually human!

The highest guardian of the orc tribe is actually not orcs or half-orc, but human?

As Blanche’s situation was very critical now, Chen Rui didn’t have time to think about these things. The momentum of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord completely burst out, and he asked, “Where is Longmetil? Say or die!”

This shout contained Evil Pupil’s mental pressure, and the 4 of them shook together. The cold murderous aura seemed to have encountered a sky full of flames, and they were completely dissolved. They all looked shocked.

However, this shock only lasted for a while. The 4 of them groaned at the same time and cut their wrists. The blood evaporated into strange light patterns as the ground in the God Prayer Hall showed a corresponding mark, which quickly merged at 1 place. It seemed to be a 6-pointed star array with something vaguely appearing in the middle.

Before he could see what it was, Chen Rui felt that his vision had changed drastically. He was already in a strange space with Baji, and the 4 guards had disappeared. Just as Chen Rui was frowning, something appeared in the center. From a distance, it was a giant snake-like creature that floated in the air.

This creature gave Chen Rui a terrifying hunch, and Baji’s horrified voice sounded, “Be careful, master! This is a god-given weapon…”

Before Baji’s words were finished, the ‘giant snake’ burst out with a bright red light. Just as Chen Rui wanted to hold Baji, there was a strong warning in his mind. Before he could think about it, he immediately activated the defensive shield.

Baji’s figure trembled as her body was instantly divided into countless pieces. Before the pieces fell to the ground, they had already burnt. There were not even ashes left.

There were countless tiny cut marks on the defensive shield. With a ‘bang’, it actually shattered. Chen Rui’s pupils shrank: Even the defensive shield can only resist for a while?

When the light of the giant snake lit up again, Chen Rui immediately turned on the power of [Deep Analysis]. In his eyes, he could clearly see that it was a red silk condensed by countless energy. They were weaving and spreading at a high speed. It instantly annihilated Baji and destroyed the defensive shield. The horror of its power was evident.

Chen Rui launched the [Light Boom] without hesitation, and his figure was dodging at high speed like a lightning. This was almost like dancing on a steel wire. [Light Boom] could only be used once an hour, and he could only become the light for a limited time. When slowing down, Chen Rui was a bit slow to dodge, and there was already a thin bloodstain on his face- With my body’s defense power, I actually can not resist the red silk!

Not only that, the red silk also contains a terrifying energy. It is not pure fire power, but some kind of annihilation law power. Once I am hit, I will be annihilated like Baji.

Such a terrifying strength… Is it really a weapon given by God?

Taking advantage of the time before the giant snake’s next wave of attacks, Chen Rui opened his hand, and several [Aurora Shots] were launched. The giant snake trembled slightly after being hit, but it was unharmed. The red silks of death were triggered again.

Chen Rui could no longer use the [Light Boom] technique. A simple big shield appeared in his hand. During the continuously activated teleportation, he felt that the Demon Shield in his hand shook constantly, and there were a few more bloodstains in the place that could not be blocked. Fortunately, they were just external injuries.

Demon Shield’s defensive power was no doubt strong. The red silk that could instantly disintegrate the ‘defensive shield’ did not leave any marks on it, but Chen Rui still looked solemn. If this went on, he would become more and more passive. A careless move or exhaustion would result in Baji’s footsteps.

Although the previous [Aurora Shots] could not destroy the giant snake, Chen Rui felt that the giant snake seemed to only attack and not defend, so [Aurora Shots] still caused a certain amount of impact. He made a decision immediately and used the strongest attack to defeat the giant snake and escape from this terrifying space!

Thinking of this, Chen Rui shifted his mind and put away the Demon Shield. His body quickly flared with red flames, and a pair of red light wings appeared behind him like the wings of a phoenix. As soon as the wings came out, the strength of the red flames became stronger like it was about to burst out violently.

The god-given weapon did not give him a chance to channel. Countless red silks interwove into a net of death which burst out again. At this time, Chen Rui was in the midst of brewing a big move. He could not use the Illusive Demon Shield to protect himself, so he was about to be covered by the gigantic red net.

All of a sudden, the high-speed spreading red silk stagnated as if the flow of time in the entire space had changed. Everything had slowed down except for Chen Rui.

However, the red silk quickly recovered its speed and accelerated. At this time, dozens of red winding giant snake-shaped beasts with terrifying breath appeared and charged at the giant snake.

[Scorching Dragon Roar]!

In the blink of an eye, the red net and [Scorching Dragon Roar] had passed through each other. They didn’t seem to do anything to each other.

When the figure with light wings was passed through by the red net, he turned into countless pieces while the Scorching Dragon berserk wave also engulfed the giant snake. The whole space shook during the surge. It finally could not bear it and turned into nothingness amidst an explosion sound.

The scene was back to the God Prayer Hall. The mark of the 6-pointed star array had extinguished. It seemed to be the huge recoil caused by the destruction of the god-given weapon. The 4 secret guards fell to the ground. 3 of them even lost all their vitality as their bodies gradually faded. They might be annihilated at any time.

The phantasms of the ‘giant snake’ in the center still existed, but the image was gradually dimming. Upon closer inspection, it was a whip with a faint red light.

“Oh…” Chen Rui’s voice sounded. The body scattered into countless ‘fragments’, no, to be precise, it was flies, regrouped into the human form, “This is not really a weapon, but a projection. You just used the secret technique of life to activate the projection power, but now that I have destroyed the projection, your fire of life will be completely extinguished too.”

In fact, Chen Rui still had lingering fears about that whip. This ‘whip’ was one of the most terrifying weapons he had ever seen. Just a projection could easily annihilate the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Even the time law he mastered could hardly restrain its strength. If he hadn’t activated the God-Eating Mask’s [Demonic Flies Transformation] in time, he wouldn’t have escaped the catastrophe and would have been truly torn into pieces.

“Where is the half-elf girl!” Chen Rui walked to the only surviving secret guard. With a thought, he activated [Spring Territory], which slowed down the opponent’s dying life, “Speak up! I can save your life!”

“The believer will definitely be reborn under the might of God!” The secret guard’s voice was weak, but full of enthusiasm.

“Let’s not say whether the Orc God is already asleep. Even if he’s not, will he care for a human like this?” Chen Rui’s sneer made the secret guard body shake, and he refused to make any noise again.

Since the previous Baji had died, Chen Rui intentionally activated the God-Eating Mask to turn this secret guard into a puppet, but the other party’s soul seemed to have a special connection with the whip projection. Now the projection had collapsed and his soul fire might be extinguished at any time. Even the resurrection potion might not be effective.

Chen Rui was about to give it a try when he suddenly felt that the surrounding fluctuations were different. It should be because of the rapid disappearance of the power of the long whip projection which caused something that was originally hidden to be revealed.

“Ancient runes?” Chen Rui was very familiar with this kind of fluctuation. His eyes immediately fell on those corners, “Hmph! Illusion structure, real mimicry, breath concealing… It turns out that the God Prayer Hall I saw is not the real hall.”

This arrangement of ancient runes was extremely mysterious to ordinary magic circle masters and could not be cracked at all. However, according to Chen Rui, who had been studying ancient runes, these were only fairly basic applications, and the level was much lower than him.

It didn’t take long for the ancient runes that concealed and created the illusion were cancelled, and the God Prayer Hall revealed its true colors.

The first thing Chen Rui saw was the changes in front of him. There were no Orc God statues, but some relief sculptures. To be precise, there were 3 layers. These relief sculptures conceal the breath of faith, but they were concealed by a strange strength. It was impossible to see the true face of the relief sculpture which looked gloomy and eerie.

This familiar scene shocked Chen Rui. Thinking of the 4 secret guards dressed in black cloaks and metal masks, he immediately reacted- The mysterious cult! The Black Death Follower!

TL: Will Blanche be turned into a Black Death Follower as well?

chapters.title: Chapter 805: The Blood Cave
chapters.body:
Chapter 805: The Blood Cave

The discovery of this truth gave Chen Rui a great shock. The mysterious cult actually spread to the orc tribe!

To be precise, the orcs are also victims. Their faith in the Orc God has been converted to the mysterious cult’s Evil God!

As the saying goes, Rome wasn’t built in a day. Judging from the condition of the God Prayer Hall, this deception plan must have been implemented for a long time.

At this time, only the remaining phantasm of the god-given weapon was left, and the bodies of the other 3 had disappeared. Only the secret guard supported by the [Spring Territory] had not faded. The strength of [Spring Territory] seemed to be effective. The disappearing speed of the phantasm of the god-given weapon had also been eased, so this secret guard will not be annihilated for the time being.

“Unexpectedly, you are actually the Black Death Follower! This is the southeastern part of the mainland. Is Longmetil the chief bishop of the southern district? No, it should be higher than the chief bishop…”

The secret guard shook and lost his voice, “You… who are you! You actually know so many secrets of the church!”

“Tell me the whereabouts of Longmetil and the half-elf!” Chen Rui’s gaze looked extremely cold. It revealed a strange power that made the soul tremble, “Otherwise, I will take your soul out now and slowly torture it. Even if you are the abyss believer, if you lose your soul, there is no such thing as a reborn! Then, I will give your soul to the Holy Church. You should know how they deal with the Black Death Follower. By then, death is only an extravagant hope for you!”

Although Chen Rui’s remarks were intimidating, he learned a lot about the mysterious cult from Shura, such as the interpretation of the soul reborn in the Black Death Follower’s doctrine. These remarks hit the other side’s soft spot, and the secret guard’s body suddenly trembled. Watching Chen Rui’s gradually reaching out his hand, he couldn’t help but yell, “The great wizard took the half-elf to the Blood Cave!”

“The Blood Cave? Where is it?”

“The secret cave of Nightmare Volcano is the highest worship place in this branch… There is a teleportation array behind the god statue that connects to it directly, but only Madam Longmetil can open it.” The secret guard gritted his teeth, “I already tell you everything that I know. Give me a quick death!”

“The last question, why Longmetil wants the half-elf girl?” Chen Rui’s hand already had a mass of destructive power.

“The blood sacrifice dedicated to God requires the main sacrifice. Madam Longmetil activated the Eye of Blood Sea secret technique to search, and she happened to sense that the special physique possessed by the half-elf girl was the best main sacrifice product, so she issued a bounty on her.”

Although Chen Rui didn’t quite understand how the Eye of Blood Sea secret technique searched Blanche, he finally understood the cause and effect. At the moment, he must rush to the Blood Cave of Nightmare Volcano to rescue the half-elf girl as soon as possible. With a shift of thought, he withdrew the [Spring Territory] power.

The vitality of the secret guard that had lost the support of the [Spring Territory] began to lose quickly, and his body gradually flickered. At this time, the phantasm of the ‘whip’ was already weak and invisible. This secret guard would soon be annihilated like the 3 companions.

“It’s too late, the first stage of blood sacrifice should have been completed…”

The last words of the secret guard before the annihilation made Chen Rui anxious. He hurriedly walked toward the 3 layered relief sculpture. After searching for a while, he opened a secret door and no doubt found a 2-way teleportation array.

The secret guard once said that only Longmetil himself could activate this teleportation array, but Chen Rui still maintained the devoured Longmetil spiritual imprint and did not ‘digest’ it. Coupled with the ample faith power, in theory, he was another Longmetil who was able to freely enter and exit any ‘restricted’ place in the Doom Swamp.

Facts had proved that this theory was fully in line with practice. Chen Rui did not waste too much time activating the teleportation array. Soon, he came to the Blood Cave through the teleportation array.

If the Doom Swamp was a dangerous place of the Nightmare Wilderness, then the Nightmare Volcano was the land of no return. There was almost no life form in the volcano. The Blood Cave was in this Nightmare Volcano. There was boiling lava everywhere with a suffocating and terrifying high temperature; even the line of sight had a distorted illusion.

Chen Rui walked forward step by step. After 2 turns, he came to a large cave. His gaze instantly froze.

What he saw was endless corpses piled together, almost covering the middle flat ground.

The flat ground was the size of a sports field. It was like an island surrounded by lava sea, and the ground was covered with dried blood. Judging from the color of the ground, the number of deaths in this place was far more than what he could see. Due to the evaporation of high temperatures, the corpses of men and women who had lost their humidity had become extremely dry and looked more creepy. However, he could still recognize their race. There were humans, orcs and half-orcs.

Strangely, there was no breath of life or the trace of Great Wizard Longmetil here.

These corpses were surrounded by a strange inscription on the ground. The sunken parts in these patterns and texts were blood-red crystals which seemed to be the essence of the coagulation of these superb blood. When connected together, they were like texts.

These patterns gave Chen Rui a familiar feeling. Right! The stone slab of Socrates, the Starlight College’s magic circle master!

That piece of stone slab is still in the hands of the elf Grand Master Finoia. It turns out that the connection of the dented patterns is the real mystery…

This is actually some kind of text for the mysterious cult to perform evil sacrifices, or it can be called… the abyss language?

Chen Rui was anxious as he tried to find the half-elf’s corpse. Fortunately, he didn’t find it. He looked all the way to the blood-red altar in front of the corpse mountain.

There were also several corpses under the altar. The strange thing was that these corpses were not as dry as the ones in the circle, and their expressions were lifelike as if they saw something extremely terrifying.

Judging from the clothing, the identities of these corpses should be altar’s guards and support wizards. Could it be that Longmetil sacrificed his subordinates for the sake of sacrifice?

Chen Rui walked up to the altar step by step, and was suddenly shocked. His eyes focused on the corpse on the altar. It was not Blanche, but… a tall woman wearing a black cloak with a sharp face. There was also a silver staff on the ground nearby. The top of the staff was shaped like a beast skull with 2 curved horns.

Looking at this woman’s appearance and attire, it is obviously the Great Wizard Longmetil!

Longmetil is dead?

The blood sacrifice this time is a sacrifice to ‘God’, and the main sacrifice is Blanche, but why is Longmetil dead now?

Like the guards, Longmetil didn’t have any scars on her body as if her soul power suddenly disappeared in an instant, but her expression is a little strange. In addition to horror, it is more of disbelief and even a hint of panic?

Maybe it’s an illusion. Chen Rui shook his head. What about Blanche?

Where is Blanche?

A glimmer of hope ignited in Chen Rui’s heart, and he began to look carefully for the whereabouts of the half-elf girl. At this moment, his pupils shrank suddenly and stared at the ground near the edge of the magma behind the altar. There was something there – glasses.

The magic glasses I gave to Blanche!

This is a quasi-artifact that can restrain Blanche’s blood mutation. Without the will of the half-elf girl, no one can take it down!

From the attitude of Blanche last time, these glasses should be one of the things she cherishes the most, so she will not give them up easily.

The glasses are left here, then…

Chen Rui rushed forward and looked at the bottom of the rock wall, but there was no trace of Blanche there, only boiling lava.

There seemed to be a scene in his mind. Blanche took off her glasses at the moment of life and death and killed Longmetil and others who wanted to kill her with the power of blood eye, but she stumbled and fell into the lava because of their counterattack or other reasons…

Chen Rui bent down and picked up the glasses carefully as if he had picked up the tough and gentle girl. Hoping for the last fluke, he searched every corner nearby over and over again, but unfortunately, there was no gain.

The terrain of this cave used for secret sacrifices was simple and hidden. Except for the [Teleportation Array], there was no other way out. It was tantamount to a dead end, which made him give up his last hope.

He fought all the way and rushed here desperately to no avail.

In fact, since the acquaintance, the dialogue between him and Blanche was very few. The half-elf girl seemed not good at words and even worse at expressing her emotions. Only those words appeared firm.

I’ll wait for you.

“Blanche!” Chen Rui only felt a pain in his heart as he roared and punched the ground. A large area of the hard ground covered in magma for countless years suddenly collapsed.

The Black Death Follower! The mysterious cult! The figure of Chen Rui flew outward. The knuckles of his clenched fists turned white because of excessive force. The cult must be completely uprooted! Revenge for Blanche! Revenge for all the innocent people!

When Chen Rui’s figure disappeared into the teleportation array, the magma in the Blood Cave suddenly surged and formed a huge vortex.

In the center of the vortex, a lump of flaming lava slowly rose, blooming layer by layer as if it were some kind of flower. An extremely pure bloody light began to emerge from the central part of the flower. Gradually, all the lava stopped moving and began to crystallize which looked spectacular.

That cluster of bloody light swiftly turned into a human form. This was a red naked female body. The light red skin was covered with spiderweb-like cracks, and the pattern was golden red as if the circulation in the whole body was not blood but lava.

Her delicate facial features could be vaguely seen with 1 blue eye and 1 red eye. She was staring in the direction of the teleportation array.

She slowly retracted her gaze, lowered her head, and looked at the terrifying skin and blade-like nails on her raised hands. In the blue pupils, a drop of flame-like tear slowly dropped.

The drop of ‘flame’ that flowed straight down hit the solidified crystals. In an instant, all the solidified crystals broke apart at the same time, returning to the surging lava.

The lava seemed to carry a certain intense emotion surging violently, engulfing everything including the teleportation array and the sacrifice altar.

After everything turned into ashes, the woman slowly closed her eyes, and the rising blood pillar slowly sank into the lava, just like an angel without wings fell into darkness…

TL: Does that mean he would have to fight her one day? Can he still save her?

chapters.title: Chapter 806: Slap On The Face
chapters.body:
Chapter 806: Slap On The Face

Early morning.

Venus City.

In a hotel room.

Chen Rui stood up and slowly opened the door to the room. After returning from the Nightmare Wilderness, he shut himself in the room.

The trip to the Jade Forest Sea was actually very rewarding. He advanced to grand master in both mechanics and potion at the same time. He should be full of spirits right now, but he was extremely depressed.

The Nightmare Wilderness became a veritable nightmare. In order to save Blanche, starting from the Garron Tribe, he killed all the way to the strongest Thunderstorm Tribe, fought the 3 Beamon Orc Kings, then he fought in the Doom Swamp. He was almost beheaded by a terrifying god-given weapon at the Secret Language Stone Palace, but when he arrived at the Blood Cave of Nightmare Volcano after a hard battle, he was a step behind after all. All he could find was a pair of glasses left behind by the half-elf girl.

For this reason, Chen Rui fell into deep self-blame because the real reason Blanche left the Jade Forest Sea was because of him.

He knew that the quiet half-elf girl actually had a lot to say to him in her heart, but she never had this chance again. If he could do it again, he would choose to give Blanche a real promise when he was in the Jade Forest Sea.

Unfortunately, there was no such ‘if’.

No matter what, what is lost is already lost, and I can only cherish everything I have now.

I will always remember this girl and will completely destroy the mysterious cult to avenge her.

After calming his mind, he took a deep breath, took his sadness deep into his heart, and strode out the door.

Today was the opening day of the Star Tower. He was on the way to Starlight College now.

Soon after, Chen Rui arrived at the Starlight College in a horse-drawn carriage. The business of horse-drawn carriages to and from the Starlight College in the past 2 days had been extremely good, and the price had tripled.

There were more law enforcement teams and reception staff at the school gate than usual. Chen Rui, who disguised as ‘Roman’, held the pass badge issued by the school affairs department and entered the school gate smoothly.

The campus was not as lively as imagined, but it was more orderly than usual.

“Roman!” There were not many people who knew ‘Roman’ on this campus, so Chen Rui was a little surprised. As he looked back, it turned out to be a female apprentice of Socrates who went to the Jade Forest Sea last time. Her name seemed to be Sophia. She looked sweet.

“You’re finally back. Teacher has been talking about you every day for the past few days. If he knows that you are back, he will be exhilarated. I’m going to the teacher’s dean room now. Do you want to come along?”

“No need.” Chen Rui smiled, “I’ll go to the school affairs department first. The Star Tower will be open this afternoon. I need to register first. Anyway, thank you.”

“Oh.” Sophia took a few steps, and she suddenly seemed to pluck up the courage as she turned around, “If you are free, can I ask you about the magic circle alone?”

What is this? A date? Chen Rui was taken aback and thought secretly: This is too unscientific. Based on this good-for-nothing rough and bitter face, there is actually a girl who will take the initiative to date him? Should I answer ‘I only like widows’? (A certain nephew sneezed wildly in the Demon Realm)

Chen Rui thought for a while and replied, “Right now is the Star Tower’s… Uh, wait until this big event is finished, okay?”

After finishing this matter, ‘Roman’ should also disappear.

“En.” Sophia’s face seemed a little red, and her footsteps were quicker.

Looking at Sophia’s back, Chen Rui smiled bitterly and scratched his head. He walked all the way to the school affairs department where he happened to run into Belia under the building.

There were a lot of people in the school affairs department building, and there were 2 men and a woman beside Belia. They were all ‘acquaintances’.

The first was Arthur’s fiancée, Princess Landbis of the Blue Glory Empire. The other 2 were Belia’s nephew, the silly man Neil, and Quinn, whom Chen Rui met last time in the Jade Forest Sea.

Quinn thought highly of himself. He wanted to challenge Chen Rui, but Duoduo melted the knife in his hand.

Although the beauty of Landbis was particularly dazzling in the crowd, even eclipsing Belia’s beauty, Chen Rui did not look at her. He greeted Belia directly, “Ms. Belia, we meet again. I have come to participate in the Star Tower’s trial as promised.”

As soon as this sentence came out, the silly man, Neil’s facial expression suddenly changed. Last time he used his aunt, Belia, to deal with his love rival Feiz, but Feiz was fine. Instead, he received bad news that his aunty had given the additional referral place to enter the Star Tower to another person!

Initially, in Neil’s opinion, this slot definitely belonged to him. This had also become 1 of his capitals for pride and ridiculing the others. However, the sudden bad news was like a bolt from the blue, making the silly man perplexed at the moment. He felt like he couldn’t lift his head in front of his classmates and Shueisha’s companions, especially Rowling.

This matter had another meaning of losing an important capital in the family inheritor dispute.

However, Neil was self-aware and did not dare to show any resentment toward Belia. His father only had a sister, Belia, but he had more than 1 son. More importantly, Belia was the real power figure of the Starlight College, and her right to speak in the family was not under his father as the city lord. Because of this, his mother tried her best to win over and please Belia in order to give him more convenience. If he annoyed this aunty, it would not be beneficial at all no matter in college or in the future, so the silly man could only swallow the bitter pill silently.

Now, the guy who robbed him of his slot actually appeared in front of him blatantly, and he even mentioned the matter in public. It was an outright slap in his face.

“Who do you think you are?” Neil couldn’t help but blurt out. Such a precious slot is actually taken away by this seemingly silly rubbish!

“Ms. Belia, why is there such a rude idiot around you?” Chen Rui didn’t hide his disdain for this kind of person.

Neil was furious. He gritted his teeth as if he was about to swallow Chen Rui alive. Belia frowned, “Roman, this is just a misunderstanding. He is my nephew, Neil. Falos.”

“It turns out that it’s your nephew… Then I’ll forget it for your sake.” Chen Rui glanced at the silly man with a look of disdain.

Belia was very aware of the strength and cruelty of ‘Richard’. If another guy with low strength was so impolite, he would have waved and annihilated him long ago. In fact, he had given her a lot of faces.

However, this attitude angered the silly man even more, “You damn…”

“Shut up!” Belia whispered; her voice obviously sounded displeased.

Neil’s face twitched for a while, but he didn’t dare to speak again.

“Ms. Belia, you need to educate our Student Neil and teach him the most basic manners.” When Chen Rui said ‘our’, he deliberately increased his tone and winked at Belia.

“That’s enough, let’s go to the school affairs department first to go through the procedures.” Belia glared at Chen Rui in dissatisfaction, but she did not pursue further. This surprised Landbis and the others. Belia’s sternness and arrogance were well-known in the college. If someone else made a mockery like this, she would definitely go mad immediately. However, her reaction now was such a formal sentence, and it even revealed a hint of familiarity with that ‘Roman’. This was undoubtedly shocking and even suspicious to the others.

“Excuse me, Minister Belia, as far as I know, even if there is a recommendation slot, it must pass the Dean’s level 1 review, even if it is personally recommended by Minister Belia.” Landbis finally spoke. Although she knew that Neil was hopeless, his father was the city lord and he was also a member of the Shueisha that she organized. Now that Neil was humiliated in public, it was impossible for her, the president of Shueisha, to keep quiet about it.

Belia narrowed her eyes slightly and nodded, “Yes.”

“Review?” Chen Rui looked at Landbis with interest while deliberately showing a hostile gaze. Quinn who noticed this at the side had blazing cold eyes.

Landbis’ facial expression remained unchanged as she said calmly, “Yes, the review should have ended yesterday. As far as I know, sir’s name is not on the review list.”

“I see.” Chen Rui laughed suddenly, “Dean’s level 1… does the deputy dean’s work?”

“Of course, it does.” Landbis thought this question was a bit strange when a voice sounded from behind.

“Roman!”

This voice was actually Deputy Dean Socrates’. Improving things like magic circles was addictive, especially after the initial success. Socrates had been studying since returning from the Jade Forest Sea. These days he was stuck in a bottleneck and failed several times. He had been looking forward to the return of ‘Roman’. Now that he heard Sophia say that she encountered ‘Roman’ at the college, he immediately rushed toward the school affairs department.

“You finally came back!” Sir Deputy Dean slapped Chen Rui on the shoulder, “I’m looking for you, come with me to the laboratory!”

The obvious intimacy of Socrates surprised Landbis and others. Chen Rui shook his head, “Wait a minute, sir dean. Just now someone said that my recommendation for entering the Star Tower was not reviewed by the dean, so it’s not effective. I’m bothered by it right now.”

Socrates’ eyes turned fierce, and his first reaction was to look at Belia, “Who said that?”

“Of course it’s not me.” Belia smiled lightly. “I’m Teacher Roman’s recommender.”

“Yes, this time your school affairs department finally did a good job.” Socrates’ eyes turned to Landbis and others, “I reviewed the qualifications of Roman more than 1 month ago. Who has any questions?”

Neil lowered his head. For him, it was another big slap in the face.

“I’m sorry, sir dean. No problem now.” Landbis replied generously. She secretly began to reassess the guy who looked slothful. To make the deputy dean pay such attention to him, plus Belia’s attitude, ‘Roman’ is definitely not an ordinary talent.

If this person stays at the college in the future, at least I can’t become his enemy.

“Then it’s fine now! Roman, quickly have a look at the magic circle for me. As long as the improvement is successful, I can get an extra slot for you.”

When Neil heard the last sentence, a hope rekindled in his mind and he winked desperately at Belia. Chen Rui saw it and sneered secretly. Really thinking that the world is revolving around you alone?

“It’s okay, sir dean. The Star Tower shouldn’t be entered by any random person.”

This sentence completely ruined Neil’s last fluke, which was equivalent to being slapped a few times in public and then being stepped on severely. The silly man’s facial expression suddenly became extremely unsightly.

Chen Rui didn’t even look at Neil. He just nodded to Belia and followed Socrates.

TL: Will this Star Tower be a kingdom of some kind of god as well?
