chapters.title: Chapter 807: Star Tower
chapters.body:
Chapter 807: Star Tower

After Chen Rui left, Belia ignored Neil and others as she turned and walked toward the office building. Landbis left after consoling Neil, leaving only Neil with a spiteful face standing there, clenching his fists.

Although there were not many people here, Neil felt that there were many people talking behind his back; they seemed to be laughing at him. He felt that he was greatly humiliated and hated ‘Roman’ even more.

Quinn said, “This Roman is very arrogant.”

These words intrigued Neil, “Quinn, when you enter the Star Tower, can you help me teach him a lesson?”

Quinn frowned and did not answer; he seemed to be thinking.

“Didn’t you always want that weapon made of Red Star Iron?” Neil gritted his teeth, “As long as you help me out, I’ll give it to you!”

“Okay! I promise you!” Quinn’s eyes flashed, “The Star Tower has its rules. I may be able to teach him a lesson, but it may not let you really relieve your hatred. So let me give you an idea. Go find a person and he will definitely do his best to help you.”

“Who?”

“Didn’t you just see it just now? The relationship between this guy named Roman and Officer Belia seems extraordinary. As long as you tell that person…”

Neil had already reacted as his eyes lit up, “You mean Instructor MacGall?”

MacGall was a senior swordsmanship instructor of the college with extraordinary strength, but he was intolerant. He had been pursuing Belia, but unfortunately, Belia never had interest in him. This time MacGall would also enter the Star Tower. If he heard the ambiguous relationship between ‘Roman’ and Belia, he would definitely not sit by and watch.

Looking at Neil’s distant back, Quinn’s eyes flashed an expression of disdain: I’m Quinn. How can I let Neil use me like cannon fodder? If it’s not for Neil’s father, the city lord, and his aunty being the real power of the college, I am even ashamed to team up with him. The reason why I ‘recommended’ MacGall was because it is inconvenient for me to act due to the relationship between Socrates and Belia.

However, ‘Roman’ was really annoying just now. He actually ignored the existence of a genius like me and dared to look at Landbis with that kind of look. If I have the opportunity, I can consider stabbing him in the back at the Star Tower.

In short, let’s see how it unfolds.

Chen Rui had been busy in Socrates’ laboratory until noon. He even had lunch in the laboratory, but there were still some gains. He learned some common knowledge about the Star Tower from Sir Dean.

Unlike the ancient magic towers of the Demon Realm, the Star Tower was not the pagoda as he imagined, but a huge and strange space filled with the mysterious power of the universe’s stars.

The Star Tower would be opened once every 10 years. It could make people of all levels and realms get valuable insights. One would gain the most when entering for the first time, and the effect of entering the second time after 10 years would be much smaller. Generally speaking, after entering 3 times, it basically lost its effect.

There were 4 stages of training in the tower.

The 1st stage was realization, also known as ‘Star Rise’, which was equivalent to the understanding and comprehension of star power. It was the foundation obtained in the Star Tower.

The 2nd stage was the ‘Ranking’ of stars. This step was based on the comprehension of Star Rise. The higher the degree of Star Rise, the higher the ranking of stars.

The 3rd stage was ‘ Starfall’ where the origin power of the stars would be bestowed in the space. The higher the star rank, the purer and larger the star power that could be obtained.

The 4th stage was ‘Tower Condensation’. After obtaining the star power, according to one’s own comprehension and strength, one could condense tower that could absorb star power continuously to temper oneself. From this level, everyone was an independent Star Tower.

Not only that, after the success of Tower Condensation, everyone entering the space would be connected through a mystical connection to become a whole ‘tower’. In Chen Rui’s understanding, this ‘tower’ was the relationship between the upper and lower lines of the pyramid- People with higher levels of comprehension would absorb the star power of people with lower levels, and those in lower levels would also receive a small amount of feedback from the comprehension of the higher levels. From this perspective, everyone was a part of the ‘Star Tower’.

This special trial method intrigued Chen Rui. Although the final decision on the location of the pyramid was the comprehension of the Tower Condensation stage, qualitative change first required quantitative change. The previous Star Rise and Rankings were equivalent to laying the foundation for Starfall, which should not be ignored.

In the afternoon, all the candidates who entered the Star Tower were gathered in a platform opened up on the back hill of the college. The space in the center of the platform was about the size of 4 football fields. There were towering huge stone pillars in 4 directions, similar to the shape of an obelisk. The periphery was full of countless crystal pillars of different heights, each of which was engraved with subtle and mysterious patterns.

This platform gave a grand and magnificent vibe just like the school gate of Starlight College that was domineering and eye-catching. It was impossible to build it successfully without impressive manpower and material resources.

Less than 200 people participated in the Star Tower trial this time. Among them, Starlight College’s instructors and students accounted for 70%, and the rest were outsiders who got the recommended places. Some of these people had very solid backgrounds and connections while others were candidates for college instructors, which was also one of the effective ways for Starlight College to expand the strength of teachers.

Under the preside of the 3 deans of Starlight College, the Star Tower finally opened.

The obelisk pillars on all sides emit lights of red, orange, blue and purple at the same time. The symbols engraved on the surrounding crystal pillars seemed to be alive due to the light. They reflected light one after another, forming strange texts. These texts were arranged according to a special rhythm like an incantation that was being chanted. Under the influence of the ‘incantation’, a white door appeared in the center.

At the same time, a magic mirror appeared right in front of the platform where people could see the situation in the Star Tower’s space, but now it looked completely dark.

Participants in the trial were informed in advance of the precautions for entering the Star Tower. Some were not the first time to enter the Star Tower. Although many people showed excitement, they still maintained order and entered the gate one by one.

Chen Rui’s position was at the back of the crowd. When the front crowd was almost in, a girl behind suddenly touched him. As soon as Chen Rui turned his head, he saw the other party handing over a small piece of paper and whispered, “Someone asked me to pass it to you.”

Chen Rui took a look at the note which stated, “Swordsmanship senior instructor MacGall, quasi-Saint powerhouse, jealous, unsuccessful in pursuing Belia for many years, this is the second time he has entered the Star Tower.”

These words looked graceful and elegant, but there was not even a signature. Nonetheless, Chen Rui understood what it meant — Someone was reminding him. While he was thinking, the note had automatically turned into flying ash without a trace.

Chen Rui originally wondered whether it was written by Socrates’ female apprentice, Sophia. Seeing the scene of destruction of evidence, he thought of this morning’s experience in front of the academic affairs building, and a beautiful face emerged in his mind.

He turned his head and glanced around, and it happened to meet the pair of eyes at the end of the crowd. The beautiful eyes looked at his face for a while before moving away.

No doubt it’s her!

This reminder is clearly a gesture of goodwill. In addition to apologizing for the academic affairs department building incident, it probably has more far-reaching intentions.

It can be seen from the solicitation of the Jade Forest Sea that Landbis seems to not let go of any resources around her. She is meticulous, far-sighted, and decisive. She can handle big matters.

This kind of person, once an opportunity arises, often can soar into the sky.

‘Arthur’ would most likely not appear again. Perhaps this Princess Royal Highness, who was almost a sacrificial victim of politics, can really take her destiny completely in her own hands.

Chen Rui didn’t think too much, and he followed the crowd forward. It seems that I will encounter something interesting in the Star Tower this time.

As soon as he entered the space of the Star Tower, Chen Rui felt that the light suddenly dimmed, and he couldn’t see his fingers. After a while, fluorescent light began to flash in the sky. This fluorescent light became brighter and brighter. Soon, the entire space was lit up. The magic mirror outside the space also clearly reflected the situation in the space.

Sea of stars. The entire sky was an endless sea of stars.

Gorgeous and dazzling starlights were scattered in every corner of the space. The space was full of special breaths. Due to the limited time, people had chosen suitable locations and began to comprehend the power of these stars in space.

The time law inside was a bit special. 1 day was equivalent to 2 hours outside. The time for ‘Star Rise’ was 1 day, then ranking would start. Within 3 hours of ranking, one could still continue to comprehend and determine the level of the ranking.

After the ranking was over and everyone’s position was fixed, they would automatically enter a separate small space, accept the starfall, and start to condense the Star Tower at the same time. After the Star Tower had solidified successfully, they started to divide the order according to the level of realization to further refine the strength. This process would take 3 days. After the time, everyone would be automatically expelled from the Star Tower which marked the end of the trial.

Quinn walked up to a middle-aged man and glanced at Chen Rui’s side suggestively. The middle-aged man no doubt followed his gaze.

The man’s face was a little long. His appearance was ordinary with a beard and deep facial features. His eyes exuded faint hostility and were full of murderous intent when he looked at ‘Roman’.

Quinn showed a gloating expression as he saw the middle-aged man walk toward ‘Roman’ step by step and sat down not far away. The oblivious trash, ‘Roman’ was still unaware of the imminent disaster.

This man was MacGall, the senior instructor of the swordsmanship of the college. His strength was one step short of entering the real Saint. He had always coveted Belia’s beauty and pursued her many times. Unfortunately, in Belia’s eyes, MacGall, who had no background and mediocre strength, was not very valuable, so she hadn’t given him any favorable response at all.

MacGall was narrow-minded and had strong jealousy. When Neil said that the goddess in his mind actually had a flirtatious relationship with this guy named Roman, he was immediately jealous and determined to teach ‘Roman’ a vicious lesson in the Star Tower.

The strength of ‘Roman’ was less than Warrior. From MacGall’s point of view, he was almost like an ant. He immediately channeled his quasi-Saint spirit power and rushed toward the rival. This move can stun the opponent and prevent him from comprehending the star power and getting any benefit. Even if he is not sent out, this trip to the Star Tower is considered wasted.

People with weak spirit power will faint due to exhaustion when comprehending the star power. This kind of incident is not uncommon, and no one will know the truth.

As soon as this spiritual impact was launched, ‘Roman’ no doubt could not hold it as he fell forward.

TL: Hmmm, he better don’t be the top 1 in ranking and alarm the whatever boss in it 🤔

chapters.title: Chapter 808: The Strongest And Weakest In History
chapters.body:
Chapter 808: The Strongest And Weakest In History

The incident of ‘Roman’ was immediately reflected in the magic mirror outside the Star Tower. The fact that someone fainted at the beginning of ‘Star Rise’ really surprised the senior executives of the college.

The most astonished were Socrates and Belia. At this time, even more shocking things happened.

MacGall, who was not far from ‘Roman’ stood up with undisguised hatred in his eyes. There was actually a sword in his hand. A flame emerged from the sword as he walked toward ‘Roman’ step by step.

The people in front of the magic mirror were taken aback. Although the strength of MacGall was still one step away from the real Saint, his swordsmanship was so skilled that only a few college instructors could match it. [Blazing Flame Sword] was his famous sword skills. Looking at MacGall’s momentum, he was actually trying to kill the unconscious participant with all his strength – It seems that the participant’s fainting is probably also a plot by MacGall!

Belia’s thoughts turned sharply, and she calmed down in the end. As far as I know, ‘Roman’’s strength is at least the real Saint, plus he has a deep scheming and strange methods. How could he easily fall into the trap of a character like MacGall.

The most anxious was Socrates, who yelled, “Regiana! Open the emergency space channel now! Hurry!”

Regiana was the dean of Starlight College. The original space of the Star Tower had been closed, and people outside could not enter. The emergency space channel was a special item made by using the star powers, which enabled one to enter and exit the Star Tower in a short time. This item could only be used once per trial. It was originally used to handle emergency events as a backup. They didn’t expect to use it right away shortly after the trial was started.

Although Regiana did not understand why MacGall would suddenly kill this person who participated in the trial, he also knew that the situation was urgent, so he immediately took out a crystal and cast a spell. A few runes began to fly out of the crystal and they slowly merged together.

It took about 15 seconds to open the space channel. Meanwhile, in the magic mirror, MacGall had approached ‘Roman’ and raised the sword high.

Socrates was extremely anxious, and his whole body was surging with magic power. As soon as the space entrance opened, he would rush in to stop MacGall.

MacGall’s cruel face seemed to be distorted from hatred as his hands trembled slightly. He hesitated for a moment before finally severely chopped down. ‘Roman’ who was in a coma didn’t have the slightest resistance and was beheaded. The long sword with flames slashed several times in just a few seconds. The body of ‘Roman’ was completely cut off and disintegrated. The broken limbs burned under the powerful flame attached to the sword turned into ashes in the blink of an eye.

This scene not only stunned the college senior executives in front of the magic mirror, but even the participants in the Star Tower, including Quinn, were dumbfounded- This is too cruel! He actually used such cruel methods to kill people in the Star Tower in front of so many people!

Socrate’s’ blood was boiling as he was watching it, but Belia’s brows relaxed because she and ‘Roman’ signed an equality contract, and the power of the contract had not disappeared at this moment, indicating that the ‘death’ of ‘Roman’ was simply a cover.

‘Roman’ should be using death to conceal his future actions so as to avoid involving me… What a good method. He actually deceived so many people publicly. He deserves to be my collaborator indeed.

However, why did MacGall take the initiative to attack ‘Roman’? Belia’s eyes squinted, and there was a ray of cold light.

In the distance of the ‘crime scene’, a man with short hair and yellow skin secretly gave MacGall a thumbs up and praised: Brother Mac draws a clear line between grace and revenge; he is a man! I salute you!

After ‘venting’, MacGall seemed to regain his consciousness, and he was dumbfounded. Just now I let jealousy and hatred get into my mind, and I have a strong desire to crush this love rival to pieces. I can’t believe I put it into action in a blast of fury!

I’m in real trouble now! Those who could enter the Star Tower were not average people. Even the worst would be my colleague in the future, even if my current identity is the senior instructor of the college, I can’t bear this kind of consequence.

At this time, the space channel finally opened, and Socrates’ figure went into the entrance instantly. In the magic mirror, a lightning went straight to MacGall. Not to mention that MacGall was unprepared, even if he was prepared, how could he resist Saint magician’s furious shot? Before he could resist, he fell to the ground, scorched.

After all, Socrates still maintained a sense of sanity and didn’t really kill him until the truth of the matter was ascertained.

“Damn it!” Socrates looked at the shattered corpse of ‘Roman’ that had completely disappeared and roared angrily. He is truly annihilated; even his corpse is gone. Even if there is the legendary resurrection potion, it is impossible for him to come back to life!

This talent he valued, this magic circle quasi-instructor with the super talent of magic circle, actually inexplicably died under the hateful murderer’s sword!

“This incident was purely accidental. That was the college instructor, MacGall. He was too impatient and used some kind of poison training previously, so he lost his sanity and made a big mistake today. In any case, we will thoroughly investigate this matter. I will give everyone an explanation at that time, and I can guarantee that nothing like this will happen again in the future.”

Regiana’s figure appeared behind Socrates, and his voice sounded throughout the space, “The rest, please continue the trial. Now is the most important period of Star Rise. Don’t be affected by this.”

Regiana made up a reason that was barely justifiable, and he did not stay any longer. He took Socrates who was still in rage and the half-dead coke man out of the space of the Star Tower.

The people dispersed one after another, returned to their respective positions, and began to calm down to comprehend the star power; only Quinn was worried. Dean Regiana had always been known for being rigorous and fair. If he said that a thorough investigation would be conducted, it would definitely be done. Neil was the driving force behind this incident, but he was also the one who gave the idea. Under this kind of mood, Quinn had difficulty concentrating for a while, and he was unable to reach the best state. Hence, the effect of Star Rise on him was naturally greatly reduced. It was considered to be self-inflicted.

In fact, when Chen Rui first entered the darkness of the Star Tower, he had already become 2. MacGall ‘killed’ avatar Shura. From MacGall’s magnified hatred of to ruthlessly slicing the body apart, it was all due to Shura’s illusion power. After confusing MacGall, Shura had returned to the unscathed original body.

The role of ‘Roman’ should be over. He didn’t want to stay in Starlight College, so he conveniently disappeared via MacGall’s hand. This also had the intention of not dragging Belia, because Belia was an important piece for him to destroy the mysterious cult, and he must protect her now. The longer he waited, the bigger outcome could be achieved.

After solving the small character as an onlooker, Chen Rui really settled down and began to fully comprehend the star power around him.

The star power of the Star Tower was similar to the Star Power in Chen Rui’s body, but they were not the same.

Star Power was made by tempering the original power of the Super System. Whether it was quality or quantity, it was better than ordinary power. In other words, this was a kind of high-end law power.

This should also be the origin of the Super System. Once he could fully comprehend it, he could reach the highest evolution and have an unimaginable strength. In other words, the step by step evolution of the Super System was to lay the foundation for mastering and comprehending the final law.

Unfortunately, this kind of law was still too profound for Chen Rui now. He couldn’t exert its power at all under ordinary conditions. Only under special circumstances could he passively activate a trace of power such as [Pole Star Transformation].

The star power in the Star Tower contained a more basic and simpler law. For Chen Rui’s current strength, it was easier to understand and grasp, so this was a rare opportunity.

Like everyone else around, Chen Rui was gradually immersed in comprehension.

One day passed quickly. In the magic mirror, the Star Tower space became hazy as everyone seemed to be divided into a separate space. Their figures gradually became blurred, and the light inside their bodies began to shine.

This was the second stage, the beginning of star ranking. The time was 3 hours. The level of understanding of the star power was different, so the intensity and color of the light radiated from the body were also different. Gold was the highest, silver was the second, and white was the lowest.

The 3-hour final star ranking would determine the intensity of the third stage of Starfall. The size of the obtained star power had a direct impact on the most critical Tower Condensation. Generally speaking, one could basically determine the level of the final Tower Condensation from the star ranking segment.

As soon as the ranking started, an eye-catching thing happened. A bright golden light appeared in the magic mirror which instantly overshadowed everyone’s light. This golden light became more and more dazzling like a sun, making it almost impossible to look at it directly.

The senior executives of the college were all shocked. Even Socrates, who was still furious, showed a surprised expression. It’s the first time I see a light with such intensity and purity in the history of Star Tower!

This is definitely a genius among geniuses!

The initially dull atmosphere caused by the murder suddenly became active. The college executives seemed particularly excited because among participants in the trial, college teachers and students accounted for 70%, and more than half of the remaining 30% might become college teachers, so the chances of this super genius to be part of the college were quite high.

Unfortunately, due to the special power of the ranking rule, it was impossible to see the faces of others in the Star Tower, and this rule was also protective. Everyone was in a relatively independent space which prevented interference from each other, so there would be no similar incidents like MacGall’s attack previously. The only thing one could do was to strengthen his perception and strive for higher ranking.

The golden light also attracted the attention of the participants in the Star Tower. Who is this person? With such a strong light, is it the person who stands at the top of the Star Tower this time?

Not far from the golden light, Landbis also showed an expression of shock like many people, but she quickly calmed down and began to seize the time to comprehend the star power- The time for ranking is very limited. Rather than admiring others, it is better to do my best to improve my own comprehension and position.

Under the stimulation of golden light, the light on many people gradually became brighter.

Chen Rui was at the center of the golden light. He had a new perception of star power. He tried to integrate this perception with his own use of Star Power in order to find a trace of the law.

“No…” Chen Rui frowned. Every time he was about to grasp it, he would fail without success again and again. It seemed to be infinitely close, but he kept feeling that something was wrong. It seemed that he was getting further and further away from the keypoint.

Did I turn into a dead end?

The instinct of training for many years told him that if he forcefully continued forward, he would only continue to hit the wall.

Different points of view bring different perspectives. The best way is to give up everything before and to understand it from a new perspective. However, the competition for ranking time is only 3 hours. 1 hour has passed, and only 2 hours are left to start all over. This is not the Super System, so I can’t use the time law.

Once I choose to start over, it means giving up my current first advantage which will directly affect the following of ‘Starfall’ and ‘Tower Condensation’.

Chen Rui was in a dilemma for a while. After thinking for a long time, he finally made up his mind.

In the magic mirror, the dazzling golden light suddenly dimmed, and it finally disappeared without a trace. This shocked the onlookers again. What happened?

That peerless genius was exhausted because of some secret technique? Or an accident happened?

Even Dean Regiana couldn’t sit still, but due to the previous MacGall incident, the emergency space item that could only be used once had been used, so he couldn’t go in to see what is actually happening now.

Many eyes were fixed on the magic mirror, hoping that the strong golden light would appear again.

The participants in the Star Tower were naturally happy about this; they were more gloating. They initially thought that there was no hope of competing for the highest ranking, but now the strongest competitor suddenly became weaker, this was a godsend opportunity. All of a sudden, the competition among participants had become more and more fierce.

The end of the star ranking had finally arrived. What made the college executives regretful was that the golden light never appeared as expected. It was likely that the person was eager for success which had caused problems in comprehension. Now that the overall situation was set, even if he made a comeback, his ranking would not change.

After the ranking was determined, the independent space in which each person was located began to move and change automatically. The strongest comprehension was moved to the very center, and the others were scattered from strong to weak in circular radiation. Each space also formed a network network-like connection. This seemed to be some kind of mysterious formation.

An hour later, bright stars fell in the starry sky, covering the corresponding figures in them, and the Starfall began.

The silhouettes in the starlight absorbed and transformed this power of falling stars with all their strength. Soon, towers of varying heights and colors shining with starlight began to appear.

Everyone was a ‘tower’, the Star Tower.

Through this tower, one could absorb starlight, continuously temper his body or soul, and even gain a higher level of realm insight.

Among the many ‘towers’, there was a light on the outermost periphery that was a bit prominent, not because it was strong, but because it was weak.

Generally speaking, those who could enter the Star Tower were not mediocrities. After the Starfall for so long, the tower shape had not solidified. It could only be described by the words ‘damn weak’. It was likely to be a connection of a certain empire or a large force. The previous strong golden genius and this kind of ‘idiot’ who couldn’t even complete the Tower Condensation were the most extreme in the history of the Star Tower.

In fact, ‘the strongest in history’ and ‘the weakest in history’ were both the same person, Chen Rui.

TL: What insight can he gain? Will his Star Level in Super System increase?

Find out what happens next by getting early access to chapters with Patreon! Please do check out the community goal in our Patreon as well! Thanks for the support! Click here to access our Patreon page.

chapters.title: Chapter 809: Unchained
chapters.body:
Chapter 809: Unchained

Although the participants had entered the Tower Condensation stage, Chen Rui still remained in the comprehension stage of the previous ‘Star Rise’. Even the shift in the ranking space could not interrupt his contemplation.

Chen Rui gave up the huge advantage of the lead, which was equivalent to giving up the Starfall and Tower Condensation, but he did not get entangled with these because the Super System was a different road. He came here to get the insight he wanted. It was not necessary to become participants of the Star Tower step by step. If he could comprehend a trace of law that could only be mastered at a kingdom-level, Starfall or Tower Condensation couldn’t be compared with this kind of gain.

Now it was tantamount to abolishing his own thoughts and starting from the beginning. Due to the different angles of mind, what he saw and what he would see must be very different from the original.

Chen Rui, who started afresh, was about to grasp something, but he missed it again. Next, he gave up again. He was quite bold this time. What he gave up was not only the previous use of the star power to grasp the kingdom, but also all his initial comprehension.

He was like the little otaku who just crossed over to the Demon Realm, re-experiencing Alkaid state, Mizar state, Alioth State…

After a long time, Chen Rui opened his eyes and finally understood what realization he had caught.

It was not law, nor kingdomized, but the foundation.

As a crossover, he was fortunate to have the trump card of the Super System. In just a few years, he changed from a powerless weakling to a powerhouse standing at the peak stage (in the general category). However, Chen Rui knew very well that he had never been a genius in comprehending. Although relying on the trump card and his unremitting efforts plus a little luck, he had reached the point where he was today, his foundation was not solid compared to those powerhouses who had trained hundreds or even thousands of years.

The disparity was huge. He didn’t feel anything before, but now the gap was more obvious when he touched the higher-level strength. This was the biggest reason why he could faintly touch the law, but he still couldn’t really grasp it.

The evolution of the Super System requires more initiative and comprehension as I reach higher levels instead of relying on the passive ‘growth’ of the system. Law is a new starting point to enter the Demi-God level. If I continue to develop as it is, even if I barely passed this threshold, I will not be able to exert the strongest combat power due to my weak foundation. My future advancement will be more and more difficult, and it may even stop for the rest of my life.

Thinking of this, Chen Rui was suddenly sweating in fear. Fortunately, there is still time now. I will not touch the law again, but I will refine my existing strength. Before the qualitative change, I first let my quantitative change reach the best condition.

The Star Tower is the best tempering environment.

Chen Rui’s mind moved. He had previously guided the power of the Star Tower with the Star Power and faintly realized the origin of the Star Tower. That was why he emitted the golden light that transcended everything. Now he no longer deliberately pursued this law, but he regained this kind of comprehension and integrated his Star Power into the pure and incomparable star power in space. This process was unexpectedly smooth.

The trial of the Star Tower had entered the final Tower Condensation stage. There were many dazzling towers that were intertwined into a circular network with the blue tower in the center. The connection between the upper and lower lines of the pyramid had begun to be exerted. The starlight surged toward the center and returned to the surroundings again. It was equivalent to a cyclic ‘life entity’.

Among the various tall light towers, the simple starlight on Chen Rui’s side that was not in the shape of a tower was particularly eye-catching.

The magic mirror was instantly bright and brilliant. The degree of dazzling brilliance covered the Star Tower which everyone condensed.

Everyone was shocked. Their first reaction was that the golden light reflected by the magic mirror was ‘resurrected’. Everyone was dumbfounded. It turned out that the weakest guy is actually the strongest genius just now!

Unfortunately, the rise of this golden light is now too late. It missed the power of Starfall. He can’t condense into a tower, so how can it obtain the true power of the Star Tower?

The participants in the Star Tower also thought so, including Landbis, 1 of the 3 tallest towers in the central area. Compared with Landbis’ eye-catching beauty, she had been keeping a low profile in other aspects, especially her strength. Today, she finally showed her glory and jumped into the top 3 of the Star Tower. It was very likely that she would directly enter the real Saint level. As for the genius who once shone incomparably and quickly dimmed in the star rise level, even if he re-arised, it was too late. He would be a loser in the end. Perhaps this person had higher aptitude and understanding than all the geniuses present, but having the conditions for success did not necessarily mean success. This was reality.

The light still did not condense into a tower shape, but it shone more and more unbelievably bright. In the boundless starry sky, all the starlight cast was concentrated on this light. The dazzling feeling of the light gradually faded, and it was replaced by a kind of crystal clear light. It was like a sword that was constantly refined in the tempering of the furnace.

The overall structure of the ‘Star Tower’ of 200 people changed suddenly. Everyone felt that the circulation of the star power in the small tower was getting faster and faster while the power was getting stronger and stronger. However, the core was not the 3 highest towers, but the light that didn’t form a tower at all!

“How is it possible?” In front of the magic mirror, another Deputy Dean Iridan murmured, “His star ranked last, and he did not gain any power from Starfall…”

Under such circumstances, it became the strongest ‘Star Tower’. This was unprecedented.

“There is only one explanation.” Regiana stared closely at the shining stars with his eyes flashing in disbelief, “He has escaped the restriction of the rule, although I don’t understand how he did it…”

There was no doubt that this would be the most incredible scene in the history of the Star Tower. In fact, the shock had just begun.

The stars in the sky moved slowly. It was not a single star, but the rhythm of the entire starry sky seemed to echo the stars. The stars rose higher and higher. Everyone including the participants in space had an illusion that the star blossoms blended into the entire starry sky.

After the stars merged into the starry sky, they gradually disappeared. The vast starry sky that originally seemed ethereal was full of vitality in an instant. The largest star in the center began to be as hot and dazzling as the sun. The trajectories of the surrounding stars also changed strangely and began to revolve around the ‘sun’.

Landbis looked up at the starry sky with a self-deprecating smile. What if there is no Tower Condensation? That ray of light does not need these. That talent is the existence that controls the entire starry sky while we who rely on the power that descended from the sky to condense the Star Tower can only look up to him.

This is a world’s difference.

With the vast sea of warmth, the soul and the Star Power were constantly being refined. Chen Rui felt very wonderful at this moment. He had completely integrated the power of the Super System into this star space.

Various mystical rhythms, power, and even comprehension close to the law flashed past his mind, but Chen Rui did not waver and did not try to capture them. No matter what appeared, he just focused his mind in order to use the origin Star Power of the Super System to wholeheartedly refine the most basic Star Power.

All of a sudden, crisscrosses of fiery red chains appeared, which were suffocating. Under the pressure of the starlight, the fiery red chains became more and more dimmed before they finally dissipated. Countless scattered sparks were devoured by the starry sky and disappeared without a trace.

Soon after, a huge ball appeared, which looked like a huge eye, emitting a weird breath. This breath was quickly broken down, and traces of starlights wrapped the huge eye. Unlike the fiery red chains, this giant eye did not collapse, but the blackness in the “pupil” was constantly washed away by the crystal light until it became colorless. Gradually, the giant eye completely merged with the surrounding stars and disappeared into the starry sky.

After these 2 changes, the crystal clear starry sky became more and more condensed. Many participants at the Star Tower below were surprised and delighted when they sensed the further sublimation of the power obtained. They seized the opportunity to absorb the comprehension of the power.

Chen Rui had a bigger surprise in his mind at this moment. Just now, he tried to fuse the power of the starry sky to impact the Shackles of True Flame in his body, and it actually worked at one try. The Shackles of True Flame, which still had to be absorbed for nearly half a year, had been completely absorbed by the Super System.

This meant that the law power of the Shackles of True Flame, which had been constraining Chen Rui, was completely absorbed by the Super System. At the same time, the restriction of faith transformation was also canceled. In other words, he could now freely activate the 6-star evolution [Blue Pole Star Transformation], the strongest combat skills!

The second surprise was that Sariel’s Evil Moon Sigil was assimilated by the Super System, completely losing its threats. Not only that, it meant that Evil Pupil had completely become Chen Rui’s own strength and he could control it independently from Sariel’s control. Under Chen Rui’s deliberate control, the spiritual imprint of Sariel was retained. This way, he could continue to maintain a certain connection with Sariel so that he would not notice the abnormal change of the Evil Moon Sigil.

All the laws of the Shackles of True Flame and the Evil Moon Sigil were absorbed by the Super System, but Chen Rui’s mood was now completely different from before. He was not eager to comprehend or absorb. Instead, he put aside distracting thoughts and focused on using the origin of the star space to refine and strengthen the Star Power. His strength was also slowly rising in this kind of rejuvenation.

Gradually, Chen Rui had a strange feeling in his mind – The space of the Star Tower didn’t seem to be real. It seems to be someone’s… projection?

What really dominates this projection is a trace of power that is indescribable in words, which resembles the law like the truth in the universe. At first glance, it feels simple, easy to understand and within reach, yet it is extremely mysterious and beyond reach when I focus on comprehending it.

Chen Rui tried to use soul power to comprehend and touch this ‘truth’. As soon as he got close, the whole soul trembled as if a balloon was blown to its maximum limit in an instant, and it would explode in the blink of an eye.

At this time, the role of the Super System was immediately brought into play, eliminating all the ‘gas’ of the ‘balloon’. Chen Rui regained his composure and took advantage of this opportunity to get rid of that terrifying comprehension with all his strength. He was so shocked and drenched in a cold sweat.

TL: Finally, the chains are broken, and it may be handy perhaps?

chapters.title: Chapter 810: Angel
chapters.body:
Chapter 810: Angel

At this time, the crystal clear starry sky gradually faded like a soulless body. Chen Rui’s figure appeared in the sky.

The near-annihilation scene just now left him with lingering fears. That power was too terrifying which was beyond his reach with his current strength. Fortunately, he had Super System. Otherwise, he would have been annihilated in an instant.

The trace of power extracted by the Super System at the critical moment could not actually be converted into an aura. It was just swallowed by the Super System’s [Star Devouring] and kept in [Star Conversion].

With the moment of fright just now, Chen Rui did not dare to easily touch this terrifying power. He temporarily closed the [Star Conversion] function and sealed it inside. He would slowly study it when the strength and timing were ripe.

After the refinement of the star space, Chen Rui’s Star Power had been fully purified and consolidated. His comprehensive strength advanced to S++ while his strength, physique, and speed had finally reached S++ which was synchronized with his spirit power. He was only one step away from the real kingdomized.

The most important thing was that Chen Rui had figured out the way forward. He would no longer forcibly comprehend the law, including the power of the Shackles of True Flame that he had absorbed, but he would further refine his strength. By then, everything would fall into place, and he could use the strongest form to break through the bottleneck.

At this moment, Chen Rui frowned suddenly as he saw that the space of the sky began to appear irregularly distorted. All the nearby stars were repelled, and a vague human figure appeared in the space of stars.

This figure seemed to be teleported by a special power. It was originally just a phantasm, then the phantasm quickly became clear while the accompanying vast momentum became more and more intense. The participants in the small star towers below were protected in a small independent space, but they still could clearly feel the overwhelming and terrifying strength.

The luster of the entire starry sky became dimmed, and even the stars seemed to be shaking slightly. In a blink of an eye. The figure has quickly completed its materialization. The information in the [Analytical Eyes] caused Chen Rui’s brows to be slightly frowned as a cold light flashed across his eyes.

This was a tall man in a long robe. He had white hair and blue eyes with a handsome appearance. The white and blue robe were embossed with gold edges. Behind him were 2 pairs of white wings which looked gorgeous and dignified, exuding light and holy breath.

Race: Human (Mutated).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SS.

Physique: SS-, Strength:SS-, Spirit: SS+, Speed: SS-.

[Analysis]: Light attribute, water attribute, space compression.

Degree of danger: Extremely dangerous!

With this kind of clothing, power breath and data, Chen Rui immediately knew the identity of the visitor.

The Holy Church’s 4-winged angel!

Not only the participants of the Tower of Light, but even the senior executives of Starlight College in front of the magic mirror were shocked. The angels of the Holy Church are already Demi-God-level super powerhouses. They actually descended into the space of the Star Tower. This is something that has never happened before!

The 3 deans exchanged glances quickly and had a unified opinion in an instant. Regiana nodded, “You guys keep an eye here, I will go and invite the old dean immediately.”

In the space of the Star Tower, the 4-winged angel exuded a powerful deterrent momentum. Looking at the man who was floating in the air on the opposite side without showing any surprise or awe, he frowned slightly, “My name is Ze Hongen, one of the cherubs under the Light God. Human, tell me your name?”

Ze Hongen’s momentum did give Chen Rui a lot of pressure. However, he was not as nervous as facing Isyorul at the beginning. Since he had unlocked the Shackles of True Flame’s restrictions, he could activate [Pole Star Transformation] as he wished.

Ze Hongen’s strength was at the same level as Isyorul, so facing this Ze Hongen who wanted to deter Chen Rui as soon as he appeared, he was very calm.

Since Master Roman had died just now, Chen Rui bowed slightly and answered without shame, “Paglio.”

“Your calmness surprised me. I have to compliment you. You’re the most outstanding Demon Overlord I have ever seen. You’re indeed an outstanding person who can influence ‘that kind of power’.” Ze Hongen put away his deterrence and praised him.

“‘That kind of power?” Chen Rui asked tentatively, “Is it the original body of this projection space?”

A shocked expression flashed through Ze Hongen’s eyes, “You can actually see that this is a projection?”

“It’s just a little talent. I hope Sir Ze Hongen can satisfy my curiosity.” Chen Rui intended to inquire more, so he pretended to be polite.

“Unfortunately, Paglio, this is one of the top secrets of the Holy Church.” Ze Hongen shook his head, “However, you still have a chance. With your talent and comprehension ability, as long as you join the church, it is only a matter of time before you can understand this secret. Maybe one day, there is still a chance to really touch it when your strength and level are enough.”

“Sir means…” Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, “Join the church?”

At this time, the light outside the Star Tower flashed, and 2 people appeared. One was Dean Regiana, who had disappeared not long ago, and the other was an old man with white beard and hair. At a closer look, his skin was lustrous and ruddy, and his eyes were piercing, revealing a vitality that was not commensurate with his age.

As soon as this old man appeared, several senior college executives bowed, “Old dean!”

This was Old Dean Carlisle who was the earlier predecessor of Starlight College. He had been researching in college. It was said that his strength had entered the level of the super powerhouse.

Carlisle nodded slightly, then he set his gaze on the magic mirror. He was shocked instantly, “Ze Hongen?”

Regiana asked, “Old dean, this Ze Hongen…”

“The 4-winged cherub under the Holy Church’s 3 archangels, Raphael. He is known as the ‘God of Exploration’.” Carlisle sighed, “His strength is even above mine.”

Regiana was secretly surprised, “How could this cherub descend in the space of the Star Tower?”

“The Star Tower is a projection space created by something in the Holy Light Mountain.” Carlisle shook his head slightly. “This matter involves a secret that was at least 1 hundred thousand ago; even I am not sure of the insider story. Even so, no church angels have come directly in the history of the Star Tower. I think you need to tell me in detail what happened previously. Especially regarding the person in front of Ze Hongen.I think this abnormality should have something to do with him.”

The magic mirror could not transmit sound, so the conversation between Chen Rui and Ze Hongen could not be heard by Carlisle and others outside.

“Talking to smart people is easy.” Ze Hongen smiled warmly, “You have strength, potential, and talent. You will be trained as the most important talent and given all the necessary resources. If you are willing, I can recommend you to be a holy apprentice of the archangel, Sir Raphael.”

“Holy apprentice?” Chen Rui showed a knowing smile. He faced 4 holy apprentices last time, inflicting heavy injuries to 2 and killing 2. He later fooled the other 8 holy apprentices during the encirclement battle.

“Holy apprentice is the strongest warrior of God. Every holy apprentice has special abilities and eternal life. Even if the body dies, the soul will be reborn in the kingdom of God.” Ze Hongen’s words were full of temptation, but he didn’t know that the truth of the so-called ‘reborn’ had long been seen through by the person in front of him.

“As far as I know, the basic condition of a holy apprentice should be the [Body of Light Blessing]?” Chen Rui asked calmly, “I don’t have that kind of royal bloodline.”

He was indeed not the [Body of Light Blessing], but the [Body of Light Glory] which was the highest light-element physique that the current Pope Vantis had.

“It seems that you know the church quite well.” Ze Hongen’s smile remained unchanged, “There is indeed such a condition to be a holy apprentice, but a talent like you can be promoted exceptionally. If you can break through the kingdom level, then Sir Raphael will personally baptize you and give you the power of an angel.”

“That’s the case.” Chen Rui showed an understanding expression and suddenly added, “It’s like… you?”

Ze Hongen raised his brows and his tone became cold, “You seem to lack the necessary reverence toward me. I warn you that appreciation does not mean connivance. You have only 2 ways to go, join the church or die.”

You finally reveal your hideous real face? Chen Rui sneered secretly and shrugged, “Sir Ze Hongen, I didn’t say that I’m not joining. I just feel strange that without the [Body of Light Blessing], I can become a holy apprentice… It seems like the loss of the Snow Dallet made our Sir Light God to be less picky…”

“How dare you! This is blasphemy!” Ze Hongen’s eyes flashed, and the pressing momentum was exuded again, “The Snow Dallet… Where did you hear the rumors?”

“Is it a rumor?” Chen Rui did not panic, “I’m thinking about one thing now, what is the original body of the projection? To be called the top secret of the Holy Church, is it something in the Light Divinity Temple at the peak of Holy Light Mountain? I should have touched the power of that thing via its projection, that’s why you, the 4-winged angel, came here, right?”

Ze Hongen shook slightly. He waved his hands immediately to seal the surrounding space before shouting, “Who are you?”

“It’s me who wants to ask that? Are you an angel? A human? Or… one of the true blasphemers who steals God’s faith?”

This sentence made Ze Hongen’s face suddenly change. I didn’t expect to encounter such a strange person after spending a lot of effort to activate the secret technique to reach this projection space!

He was about to make a move when he suddenly saw a light.

The intense blue light was so dazzling that even the entire starry sky that was suppressed by his momentum became shining.

Feeling the terrifying breath oncoming, Ze Hongen was horrified and had a bad hunch. He didn’t care much, and pointed to the center of the bright blue light, “Punishment Sword!”

A white light flashed out like a sharp sword, and the rays of stars along the way were unbelievably cut apart.

However, when the white light approached the bright blue light, it seemed to have encountered some terrifying oppression. It was unable to move an inch forward. Ze Hongen waved, and the white light returned to his hand. It was a silver greatsword. The 4-winged angel looked very solemn.

Old Dean Carlisle and others in front of the magic mirror were also stunned. The blue light as dazzling as the sun actually possessed the strength to compete with the 4-winged angel, Ze Hongen!

Landbis in the small Star Tower below was the most shocked. Although the dialogue between the 2 could not be heard after Ze Hongen sealed the space, she recognized the incomparable blue light at a glance. She finally knew the identity of this person who created continuous shocks.

TL: Ma fiance?

chapters.title: Chapter 811: [Wailing Wall]
chapters.body:
Chapter 811: [Wailing Wall]

The dazzling starlight gradually converged, and the figure in the blue armor appeared in the center. The shining armor exuded a brilliant and sacred breath as if all the magnificence of the starry sky was concentrated in one body. In contrast, the 4-winged angel Ze Hongen on the opposite side looked eclipsed.

[Armor of Faith]! And it’s such a pure and powerful faith power! This kind of breath, even a powerhouse like him who was about to break through to the peak stage of kingdomized was shocked by it.

Ze Hongen looked at the figure vigilantly, and he finally understood why the other party never show the ‘necessary’ reverence. By the way, this [Armor of Faith]… I seem to have seen it somewhere before…

“I have a lot of questions in my mind.” Before Ze Hongen could think about it, the other party’s faint voice sounded, “If I can catch you, I should be able to get the answer I want.”

Objectively speaking, it was a wonderful thing to mingle into the inner circle of the Holy Light Mountain, but one of the elements of a spy was a low sense of presence. Chen Rui’s performance this time was too eye-catching, and believers were by no means something that could simply get through. With his current strength, playing with fire in front of a powerful Pseudo-God like Raphael would be a dead end. Besides, the time in the Demon World was quite tight at the moment, so it was impossible to stay in the human world for too long.

Chen Rui felt the long-lost [Pole Star Transformation] power. His current Star Power was quite refined. Combined with some new insights, the vast power that cycled in him as the universe was way stronger than the last time in the Jade Forest Sea.

“Hmph! Ignorant trash who doesn’t know his own capabilities. You are just a fragile body after all. You will soon know what real power is.” Ze Hongen’s greatsword slammed, and his momentum skyrocketed.

“I have also heard such words from another human who claimed to be ‘4-winged angel’, but that guy is now completely destroyed.” When Chen Rui thought of ‘another angel’, the hatred hidden in his mind burst out suddenly, and his tone was full of cold murderous intent.

Since this Ze Hongen said ‘join or die’, then I’ll give him a real answer to death. Consider it as a sacrifice to Duoduo!

This sentence shocked Ze Hongen’s mind, he finally remembered where he had seen this magnificent [Armor of Faith]! It is the magic crystal from the Jade Forest Sea’s elf tribe! In the magic crystal, it records the battle process of another 4-winged angel. He is also known as 1 of the 2 cherubs under Raphael, Isyorul, who is known as the ‘God of Discovery’!

“It’s you!” Ze Hongen said in shock. It turned out that Isyorul died in this man’s hands!

If Ze Hongen originally had contempt for this enemy who had barely reached the kingdom level by relying on [Armor of Faith], now he didn’t dare to underestimate the opponent.

Chen Rui didn’t talk nonsense. In a flash, he appeared in front of Ze Hongen with a destructive starlight in his fist hitting toward his chest. The starlight had turned into hundreds of rays in the blink of an eye.

Except for the old dean, everyone at the star tower below and in front of the magic mirror couldn’t keep up with this movement. They could only feel that it was a dazzling star blooming in the sky with countless dazzling light rays and crashing into the angel.

Ze Hongen had been on high alert just now. After learning that ‘Paglio’ was the strong enemy that killed Isyorul, he crossed the greatsword before him and burst out the strongest power without hesitation.

Countless starlights hit Ze Hongen with a terrifying sound, and the sky began to shake violently, but each starlight stopped at a position about 3 meters away from Ze Hongen. They gradually dimmed.

The starlights were not extinguished for no reason. In front of Ze Hongen, a series of whirlpool-like water ripples were rippling. The water ripples were quite violent, and even Ze Hongen’s body was shaking slightly, but the starlights were still unable to break through the water ripples’ defense.

The water ripples spread out across the entire space. The sky full of starlight quickly dimmed in the circles of ripples. Chen Rui clearly felt the huge pressure. The channeling of Star Power seemed to stagnate. This was the kingdom of Ze Hongen.

The center of this kingdom was the mysterious defensive space of Ze Hongen with wonderful law power exuding all around. Chen Rui’s attacks were bounced back, diverted and absorbed.

“Don’t compare me with that stupid fellow Isyorul.” Ze Hongen sneered, “Arrogance is the biggest reason for his failure. Your attack power is really shocking, but it can only wail in vain in the face of my [Wailing Wall].”

Bullshit, [Wailing Wall]? I’m even a specter… Chen Rui thought of the analysis of the [Analytical Eyes]. Combined with the feeling of attacking just now, his brows became tighter, “Space compression?”

Ze Hongen was shocked. He actually sees through the mystery of my law.

“Hmph, your eyesight is good, but it’s a pity that you are all-talk.” Ze Hongen seemed particularly determined. Judging from the attack that [Wailing Wall] has just received, it is obvious that the other party launched law power. Strangely, he still stayed at the kingdomized level.

This shows that [Armor of Faith] is not the power that ‘Paglio’ comprehends, but he is a believer who received a gift from a certain powerful existence because a powerhouse that truly comprehends the [Armor of Faith] should be at least Demi-God level. Then, there is no need to fight this battle.

Since this enemy only has the believer’s [Armor of Faith], there must be a strict time limit. As long as the time limit of [Armor of Faith] has passed, it’s up to me to do anything with this ant who only has the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. To be able to capture the number one felon who stole the Snow Dallet Tree and killed Isyorul is definitely a great achievement.

Although [Royal Star Transformation] was not an ordinary [Armor of Faith], it did have a time limit, so he must defeat Ze Hongen before the time was up. First, he must break the opponent’s tortoise shell-like kingdom defense.

Space compression… Space-time should be an objective reflection of the movement of matter. It seems that some things are variants. No matter how I see it, this so-called space compression is not scientific right?

However, even he himself had the power to change the flow rate of time. This was an unscientific world, so from the ‘unscientific’ point of view, due to the compressed power, the permittivity, permeability, and so on had unscientific changes. Ordinary attacks could not break through this [Wailing Wall] and reach Ze Hongen’s original body.

In the kingdom of water ripples, there were dots of shining light. The originally dim starry sky instantly became extremely bright. The phantasms of countless stars began to rotate and revolve with a special rhythm. The core of all this was Chen Rui.

[Blue Star Kingdom] of [Blue Pole Star Transformation]!

Ze Hongen was secretly shocked when he clearly felt that pure and incomparable kingdom power. Even a powerhouse like me, who is about to reach the peak stage kingdom, can’t match this level of kingdom power. It is impossible to be activated by a mere believer who relies on [Armor of Faith] to reach the kingdom level. Who is this ‘Paglio’?

In any case, the power and time of [Armor of Faith] are always limited, and [Wailing Wall] is the strongest kingdom defense. As long as I can defend against the opponent’s attack, I can naturally become the final winner.

As if he sensed that Chen Rui was about to launch some terrifying big move, Ze Hongen’s greatsword quickly turned into countless secret texts which condensed a strong spirit power. These texts quickly scattered and disappeared into the [Wailing Wall].

“Since I can’t break the defense of this kingdom. Then, I shall completely shatter your kingdom!” Chen Rui’s momentum climbed immensely under the [Blue Star Kingdom], and he said coldly with a flame-like light in his pupils.

As soon as he said that, Ze Hongen felt that the surrounding breath instantly became berserk, murderous and wrathful. What was terrifying was that this kind of breath was still surging by folds. A feeling of extreme danger inevitably surged in his mind.

Almost at the same time, dozens of snake-shaped beasts roared, and the fiery red color had filled Ze Hongen’s pupils in no time. Not only Ze Hongen, but also the participants on the ground below and the spectators in front of the magic mirror all felt the whole sky turning into berserk blood red color.

The star space began to shake violently. If space had not provided special isolation protection for the participants of Tower Condensation, the remaining breath alone could knock off more than half of the so-called geniuses.

Ze Hongen’s vision shook violently as his spirit power had spread to its limit. The texts that scattered into the [Wailing Wall] appeared layer by layer. They were constantly washed and shattered in the red sea of berserk.

After a long time, the blood red that filled the sight gradually faded, but there were countless bloodshots in Ze Hongen’s eyes. His breathing became uncontrollably heavy and rapid. The greatsword, which had been transformed into secret texts, had returned to its sword form, but there were a few more obvious cracks on the sword. Nonetheless, the cracks quickly healed automatically as if the greatsword was alive.

The water ripples in the sky had been fragmented, but they had not collapsed. Ze Hongen’s eyes glowed with dots of light as the water ripples scattered in the sea of stars slowly merged together. The ripples emerged again. It didn’t seem to be greatly affected.

Chen Rui was slightly surprised. The defense of this [Wailing Wall] is even above what I imagined. Even the [Scorching Dragon Roar] activated by Blue Star’s territory actually cannot destroy Ze Hongen’s kingdom.

“Very surprised?” Although the spirit power consumption was not light just now, Ze Hongen’s laughter still showed strong confidence, “I admit that the power of the trick just now is very powerful. If it weren’t for a defensive opponent like me, I’m afraid you would have gotten me with that move. With this Punishment Sword, if the same move is repeatedly activated, its power will be greatly reduced, but… I think it’s still a question whether you can activate the move just now.”

Chen Rui knew that Ze Hongen was messing with his mind, but the enemy’s defense power was shocking. No matter whether the Punishment Sword was really playing a role, he really could no longer activate [Scorching Dragon Roar]. Only the strongest trump card, [Pole Star Storm], was left.

If even this trick cannot defeat the [Wailing Wall], then I can only open the [Star Gate] and run away.

TL: Nono, use the [Pole Star Starm] and defeat him…

chapters.title: Chapter 812: Badge
chapters.body:
Chapter 812: Badge

Ze Hongen did not give Chen Rui time to think. The white wings behind him and the greatsword in his hand glowed with scorching brilliance at the same time. All the water patterns in the [Wailing Wall] kingdom were plated with a layer of white light and rippled in a strange way. The light flared around Ze Hongen’s body like a flame.

“Although I’m best at defense, what I have is not only defensive power.” The Punishment Sword in Ze Hongen’s hand pointed to Chen Rui. The momentum skyrocketed, and the water ripples in the kingdom turned into a huge whirlpool surrounding Chen Rui.

“[Conviction Punishment]!”

The Punishment Sword turned into a huge light beam and shot toward Chen Rui. In the light beam, there were countless secret texts containing the spirit power which were different from the solid and heavy defenses before. These secret texts emit strong murderousness and destruction. Wherever they passed, the [Blue Star Kingdom]’s star phantasms turned into light smoke and dissipated.

Chen Rui’s eyes glowed with a strange light while staring at this powerful attack. It seemed too late to dodge. He was wrapped in the light beam in the blink of an eye. The spectators only felt that the glare was so dazzling that they could not look directly, so they closed their eyes.

Only Old Dean Carlisle could see it clearly. The secret texts of the light beam were like a terrifying sword, which repeatedly shuttled in the light beam. Carlisle’s heart was palpitating secretly. If it was me, I’m afraid that I would have been destroyed by this move. I don’t know how ‘he deals with it.

[Conviction Punishment]’s light beam shook suddenly and quickly dimmed as if it was devoured by something. The secret texts were all extinguished in Chen Rui’s palms.

Punishment Sword reappeared in the hands of the 4-winged angel. The crack was a bit deeper, and Ze Hongen could hardly believe his eyes at the moment- This strike [Conviction Punishment] is my strongest killing move which contains extremely pure light element power. Even the opponents of the peak stage kingdom can’t easily defend it. This enemy directly took it without activating any defense skills!

Is it because of that [Armor of Faith]? Ze Hongen cast his gaze on the armor covering the opponent’s whole body. That armor showed a magnificent starlight. It actually didn’t even have a crack. But even if this armor possesses incredible defense power, it can’t resist the all out attack of the kingdom power. Furthermore, the opponent’s figure only moved back less than 10 meters. Judging from his breath, he really resisted the blow without any injury.

Wait a minute! The feeling of the light element power being devoured… Ze Hongen’s mind subconsciously had an idea, but he quickly rejected it- Any [Body of Light Blessing] has no such strong effect, unless it is above the [Body of Light Blessing]…

That’s even more impossible! Except for Pope Vantis, even the 2 major archbishops do not have the same kind of physique. Anyone with this physique will be cultivated as the first priority regardless of whether in the empire or the church. They will never appear on the opposite side of the church.

Ze Hongen couldn’t imagine that this ‘impossible’ assumption was precisely the correct answer.

The wonder of the [Body of Light Glory] had been truly tested under the powerful attack of this kingdom-level light element, and Ze Hongen’s full blow power had been reduced by more than half. A part of the remaining half was automatically absorbed.

As for the full-blown attack, it could only be regarded as a drizzle in front of the [Blue Pole Star Transformation] armor that incorporated the semi-artifact Mystic Jade Armor.

“The so-called punishment is just so so.” Chen Rui’s pupils flickered a strange light, and the star phantasms that had disappeared because of the [Conviction Punishment] appeared again. The entire [Blue Star Kingdom] began to spin at a high speed.

Ze Hongen felt dizzy and he had a bad omen. He quickly retrieved the kingdom power of [Wailing Wall]. The ripples spread out and were ready to defend.

All of a sudden, Ze Hongen felt that there was a hint of cold breath in the kingdom. This breath began to spread rapidly like a crack on a gem was expanding rapidly. Even the entire gem was disintegrated into countless fragments. Not only that, those cracked water-like ripples actually quickly solidified uncontrollably.

Ze Hongen’s face changed drastically, “What did you do?”

“You should wail at your [Wailing Wall].” Chen Rui said in response to an unexpected question. His arms stretched out, and blue giant wings on his back spread out all at once, extending infinitely and merging into one with the [Blue Star Kingdom].

Chen Rui used [Winter Territory] just now, but the Evil Pupil played a key role. The Evil Pupil had become Chen Rui’s true power now. Combined with [Deep Analysis], it could play a wonderful role. Just now, the Evil Pupil was like a sophisticated computer analysis instrument, which started to scan at high speed to analyze the details of the force field in the kingdom. It could instantly determine some weak aspects like a kind of x-ray vision which could see through the flaws.

Such a skill consumed considerable spirit power, but it could play an unexpected role in battle. Chen Rui used this ‘see through’ technique to gain insight into the structural characteristics of the [Wailing Wall].

As far as the defense was concerned, the endless structure of [Wailing Wall] was indeed close to perfection. No shortcut to destruction could be found instantly, but attack and defense could not coexist. Just when Ze Hongen used the Punishment Sword to attack, the defense finally revealed a trace of flaw. Chen Rui seized this opportunity to silently activate the [Winter Territory] which acted like a computer virus that infiltrated [Wailing Wall], destroying several important balance points of the cyclic force field.

These changes were only completed in the blink of an eye. Chen Rui had to resist the ‘Punishment Sword’ in exchange for that. Of course, the [Winter Territory] that came in while taking advantage of the gap could not really cause Ze Hongen’s kingdom to collapse. It only greatly weakened the defense of the [Wailing Wall]. If Ze Hongen was given a certain amount of time, these ‘viruses’ could be cleared out.

Unfortunately, Chen Rui would not give him time.

Ze Hongen also understood this. He had to activate the Punishment Sword’s defense secret texts with all his strength in a hurry. The greatsword quickly turned into spirit power texts that merged with the [Wailing Wall].

Meanwhile, the planets in [Blue Star Kingdom] were moving faster and faster, and the image quickly became blurred. One could only see layers of blue star dust moving at high speed. The bright star dust drew countless irregular fatal arcs in space, instantly condensing into a terrifying storm.

“[Pole Star Storm]!”

In the blink of an eye, everyone’s sights were flooded with this storm that concealed countless starlights. They couldn’t see the situation clearly and just felt dizzy. Even the magic mirror was shaking slightly.

The storm finally subsided, and the starry sky returned to its original splendor, but the layer of water ripples had disappeared. The wings behind Chen Rui had been retracted as he looked at Ze Hongen quietly.

“You lost.”

Ze Hongen seemed to want to say something. The corners of his mouth trembled while the Punishment Sword in his hand cracked and shattered like a glass falling from a high altitude on the concrete floor.

At the same time, the 4 white light wings behind Ze Hongen dimmed as blood overflowed in his mouth, nose and ears at the same time. His facial expression became extremely pale in an instant.

The other party was right, he lost and failed miserably.

A super powerhouse that was about to reach the kingdom peak stage actually lost to a ‘Saint’ level person who only achieved the kingdom’s power by relying on the [Armor of Faith]. It was simply unbelievable. Maybe the opponent’s real strength was not Saint, but this didn’t matter anymore because he had already lost.

The injury on the surface was secondary, but the shatter of the [Wailing Wall] caused his spirit power and soul power to be severely damaged. The powerful kingdom power of the other party around him had firmly locked him now. He was like a frog being watched by the viper; he might be completely annihilated at any time.

“Ze Hongen, I think you have recognized the fact that you lost. Then, we should talk properly. If I can get a satisfactory answer, maybe you can leave alive… instead of ending up like Isyorul.”

Ze Hongen slowly raised his head to meet Chen Rui’s gaze. He felt the opponent’s eyes carried a kind of terrifying penetration force as if it could penetrate the soul. His mind trembled, and he finally asked, “What do you want to know?”

“What is there in the temple on the top of the Holy Light Mountain?”

A mocking expression flashed past Ze Hongen’s eyes, “The thing there is not what a character like you can covet, even if you beat me today.”

“Naturally it is not enough now; reaching Pseudo-God will do.” Chen Rui said calmly. This was the advice given to him by the Light Elemental King. By deliberately saying this, Ze Hongen felt that he was unfathomable.

“How much do you actually know?” Ze Hongen frowned.

“Not too little and not too much.” Chen Rui added tentatively, “For example, Wind Badge, 1 of the 7 components of the supreme artifact…”

‘Wind Badge’ and ‘supreme artifact’ were inside stories ‘leaked’ from the Fire Elemental King. This was not a secret that ordinary people could know. Ze Hongen no doubt was in utter shock. He lost his voice, “Where did you hear that from? Did that woman……”

Woman? Chen Rui’s were all-ears. What does this mean?

Chen Rui was thinking quickly when. Ze Hongen stopped what he wanted to say in time. Instead, he glanced up to the sky. Chen Rui followed his gaze and raised his head, but there was nothing.

He subconsciously withdrew his gaze immediately and found that there was a badge in Ze Hongen’s hand.

Chen Rui couldn’t see the specific pattern on the badge, but he thought of a thing immediately. Summoning badge!

It’s like my snake pattern badge and evil eye badge!

Then this summoning badge is…

Chen Rui’s hairs were erected, and the kingdom power burst out suddenly. A sharp wind slashed out.

Being locked by the kingdom power, Ze Hongen could not dodge it. He felt that the right hand holding the badge was cold. The blood was oozing out, and his broken wrist fell straight down. After losing the defense, even the kingdom-level physical strength could not resist the terrifying sharpness of [Aura Blade] in the [Pole Star Transformation] state.

Not only the wrist, but the remaining force of this [Aura Blade] also hit Ze Hongen’s ribs, leaving a bloody wound that revealed his bones. He immediately screamed.

Chen Rui shouted, “If you want to survive…”

Ze Hongen’s facial features had been distorted due to the pain, but there was a smug smile. The trail of blood from the end of the broken wrist became a string of texts. The kingdom power actually couldn’t penetrate it. The next second, the chopped off palm crushed the badge.

TL: Time to run?
