chapters.title: Chapter 813: Raphael
chapters.body:
Chapter 813: Raphael

As soon as the badge shattered, a little light appeared in the entire space like a seed, revealing a sacred and solemn breath. Even the [Blue Star Kingdom] power could not conceal this breath.

Ze Hongen was thrilled as he rushed toward the ‘seed’ with all his remaining strength. Suddenly, he had a huge sense of crisis. His body had been wrapped in countless sharp qi.

“Sir Raphael, save…”

Ze Hongen’s cry for help came to an abrupt end. In the blink of an eye, his body was completely annihilated by the kingdom power.

Chen Rui wanted to keep Ze Hongen alive to ask about the Breeze Shadow Boots and other secrets, but he did not expect him to have such a move. He successfully activated the badge even with his chopped-off wrist. Chen Rui was inexplicably shocked when he heard the name ‘Raphael’.

Of course, he wouldn’t give Ze Hongen a chance to survive.

Chen Rui knew that time was extremely tight. After killing Ze Hongen with all his strength, he waved his hand without thinking and opened a light blue light door. At this time, the ‘seed’ had begun to rapidly expand into a glowing figure. Bursts of shocking breath spread out like a spider web in all directions.

Chen Rui seemed to hesitate for a moment, and his body was stuck by the ‘spiderweb’. The light of the [Star Gate] quickly faded.

In front of the magic mirror outside the Star Tower space, Carlisle and the senior college executives were also shocked by the annihilation of Ze Hongen.

“Old Dean…” Regiana said grimly.

Carlisle knew what Regiana wanted to say, and he shook his head, “Don’t worry, a powerhouse who can kill Ze Hongen is not someone we can detect or stop if he wants to enter the Star Tower silently. Besides, there is a Demi-God contract, the Holy Church…”

Before he finished speaking, the space in the magic mirror shook violently. With a ‘click’, a crack actually appeared on the mirror surface, then 2 cracks, 3…

“Bang!” The whole magic mirror shattered, causing Carlisle and others’ facial expressions to change drastically. What kind of power is this! Just the aftermath of the space shock shattered the magic mirror that integrated with the power of the star space!

In the Star Tower space, the violent shock exuded terrifying pressure. The Star Tower below protected by the space collapsed one after another, and all participants fainted without exception.

Finally, the terrifying shake was over, and a human figure gradually became clear in the dazzling light in the sky.

This was a man with long black hair and an extraordinary temperament as if he was detached from the world. Due to a special power, his facial features were a little fuzzy, but it gave a handsome and delicate feeling. There also seemed to be a habitual gentle smile.

The man kept a calm smile as he cast his calm gaze on Chen Rui who was struggling to hold on.

Chen Rui instinctively sensed a terrifying might that could terrorize his soul in the seemingly soft gaze as if it could crush his soul. This kind of ‘crushing’ was different from the ‘see through’ of Sariel’s Evil Pupil, but it was also extremely dangerous.

Chen Rui took a deep breath and used the devour power in his body, quickly offsetting the black-haired man’s coercion. He bowed, “Sir Raphael?”

“I can feel the collapsed water element kingdom breath in this space, Ze Hongen… has been annihilated.” With that said, the man’s eyes flashed. The ’spiderweb’ all over the space turned into a force field with a strange structure. The illusion power and devour power that covered Chen Rui suddenly collapsed. He was entirely sealed from all directions.

Not to mention people, even sound and light couldn’t get through.

“Nice illusion and devour power. It seems to fuse with the talents of some kind of dark creature.” Raphael’s indifferent voice echoed in Chen Rui’s soul, shattering the defense of his spirit power. “It’s just the power that hasn’t been kingdomized. It is not enough to compete with Ze Hongen; it is even more impossible to kill him, especially in such a short period of time after using the dominance badge. Compared with this process, I’m more curious about your courage… Your calmness seems to come within your mind. Don’t you know who I’m?”

“Of course I know. I’m just a little curious.” Chen Rui smiled, “I have heard about the famous Sir Raphael for a long time. It is an honor to see you personally today.”

“I’m not interested in accepting the worship of ants.” Raphael said flatly, “If you need honor, then let it be the last emotional experience in your life.”

As soon as he finished speaking, Chen Rui suddenly felt that the space of spiderweb turned into a cage with countless icy killing intent. Raphael only needed a thought to annihilate him completely. Under this absolute strength gap, any subtle technique was futile. There was no room for resistance at all.

The terrifying chill suddenly stopped because of a word Chen Rui said, “Abyss.”

Raphael raised his brows. His eyes seemed to have a surprised expression, “What do you want to say? Last words?”

Although Chen Rui nearly died, he still seemed very determined and shook his head, “Sir was summoned by Ze Hongen. If it was just to kill a Saint-level ant like me, it would be such a waste of power. Don’t sir want to get something more valuable? Actually, whether it’s a last word or death, it’s meaningless to the avatar. Sir should know it better than me.”

“Avatar?”

“I’m not so arrogant that I dare to face the sir directly with my real body, even if sir’s power is only a trace.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Besides, Ze Hongen’s strength was almost close to the peak stage of the kingdom, how can he die in the hands of a Saint who has not even kingdomized?”

This sentence was not false. Raphael was likely to sleep in the huge statues of the Holy Light Mountain. Like Sariel and Satan, this badge could only summon an avatar. However, even the avatar was definitely not what he could handle now. Chen Rui could feel that Raphael’s avatar was at least the level of his old father-in-law, Dragon Emperor Auglas, and the actual combat power was definitely above Auglas.

So the one who stayed here was the avatar, Shura.

In fact, Chen Rui still had 2 trump cards in his hand that should be able to compete with Raphael’s avatar, Sariel’s Evil Pupil badge and Satan’s snake pattern badge, but he was in the human world now. Whether they could be summoned across spaces was still a problem, not to mention they were not easy to deal with. Even if the summoning was successful, it would expose a lot of things and bring future troubles.

“I don’t have time to listen to your nonsense.” Raphael looked at the crowd below, “Your real body may be hidden somewhere. If this space is destroyed, you and your avatar will disappear completely.”

“It seems that sir still doesn’t believe that my true body has left.” Chen Rui shrugged, “The reason why I have left an avatar here is not only to witness Sir Raphael’s heroic manner, but also to make a deal related to Abyss with Sir Raphael.”

“Go on.”

The word ‘Abyss’ made Raphael’s eyes flicker. The life and death of this person had been completely squeezed in his hands. It would be easy to destroy, but as the other party said, a precious summoning badge would be wasted to just kill some ants. Ze Hongen was already dead, and the dead was worthless. It was better to listen to the deal and see if he could get anything valuable.

“I can provide the most important intel of the abyss, but I want to know the answer to a few questions.”

“How do I know that the intel you provided is valuable?” Raphael’s gaze showed a bit of disdain, “Perhaps you’ve only heard this rumor occasionally.”

“Really?” Chen Rui smiled, “I have a simple illusion technique, please allow me to show sir.”

With that said, Chen Rui’s eyes flicked with faint red light, and the magic power that was disintegrated by Raphael gathered again. The space here was locked by Raphael’s power. Neither the image nor the sound would be transmitted, so Chen Rui didn’t have to worry.

Scenes after scenes appeared in space like a movie.

Endless blood red, the suffocating, hot, glamorous and beautiful Flower of Abyss, countless the abyss creatures, endless death and destruction… Raphael’s gaze turned to a figure in the distance of the abyss army. She was a female, but he couldn’t see her face clearly, yet he could feel the extreme hatred. In fact, this illusion was created by Chen Rui in combination with the memory and data in the ancient alchemy civilization city, the ‘Sky Wheel’. However, whether it was the memory crystal or Doruda’s data, there was only a rough description of Quilliana and no specific appearance, so Chen Rui used a rather vague ‘expression technique.’

“Hatred God…” Raphael shook slightly, retrieving his calmness.

“Yes, Quilliana.” Chen Rui answered in time, “The Black Death Followers are trying to get her to descend.”

The last sentence was obviously made up.

Raphael finally moved and reduced the pressure, but he still kept the space sealed, “Tell me all you know, I can let you go, but only this time.”

Chen Rui shook his head, “All I want is the answer. After getting the answer, sir can destroy this space or my avatar at will.”

“3 questions.” Raphael pondered slightly, “I can choose not to answer.”

“Okay.” Chen Rui knew that his chips were actually limited, “But sir, please answer a question first.”

“Say it.”

“What is it in the Light Divinity Temple?” Chen Rui spread his hands, “Although with my strength, I don’t deserve to know the answer, but I really can’t suppress my curiosity.”

Raphael’s gaze flashed a strange light, “The things that create and change everything, even if it is god…”

Raphael didn’t say anything more, but looked at Chen Rui lightly, indicating that there was no more to follow.

Chen Rui secretly cursed the tease. A map in his hand floated to Raphael, “This is the distribution and overview of some important bases of the Black Death Follower.”

He prepared this picture to be given to the Holy Church earlier, but he did not expect that the middleman was 1 of the 3 major leaders.

Relying only on Chen Rui’s personal strength, it must be quite difficult to deal with the mysterious cult. He must borrow the force from the Holy Church, and several important bases in it were all under the jurisdiction of Shura’s ‘leader’ Angelie. Exposing them to the other party could also make his undercover plan proceed more smoothly.

After the map disappeared in Raphael’s hands, Chen Rui asked the 2nd question, “In fact, I have also asked Ze Hongen the first question. He mentioned that there is a supreme artifact part called ‘Wind Badge’ in the temple. I want to know more about the ‘Wind Badge.’”

“Hmph! It seems that Ze Hongen really deserves to die.” Raphael frowned, “For God, this is a taboo. As the spokesperson of Light God, I won’t answer your question.”

The spokesperson of Light God? Chen Rui sneered secretly in his heart. The Breeze Shadow Boots is ‘God’s taboo’. What does it mean? Are there any stories about the Demon Realm’s 7 artifacts?

“The Black Death Follower disguised into wizards in the Nightmare Wilderness to confuse the orcs, deceives the faith of the orcs to worship the Evil God, hold blood sacrifices, and use the faith to make Quilliana descend…” Chen Rui selectively said what he had learned about the Nightmare Wilderness. 90% of these things were true and the rest were false. Quilliana’s arrival was naturally false. Raphael did not doubt him. His facial expression had become solemn.

“If what you are saying is true, then this is indeed something that must be taken seriously…” What interests me is, why do you know so many secrets?” Raphael nodded, “It seems that it is more valuable to keep you alive so that it’s worth my effort. “

“What does sir mean?” Chen Rui was startled, “I have a 3rd question.”

“I don’t want to answer anymore, you are not qualified to trade anymore.” Raphael returned to his calm smile and moved his fingers. Chen Rui felt that the strength fluctuations around him became extremely weird. The surrounding spiderweb space suddenly turned into crisscrossing light that penetrated Chen Rui’s body.

When Chen Rui was penetrated by the light, he did not feel any pain. It just seemed that countless silk threads passed through his body multiple times and came straight to his soul. Not only the avatar felt this penetration, even the soul of the original body felt it which was shocking.

“[Dimension Soul Shackle].” Raphael’s voice was still very calm as if he had just done a trivial thing. “The ability to seal the soul is very rare, especially across space, but for an all-powerful archangel, it is not surprising. I’m not only Cherub but also Domination and Potestas. I’m the closest existence to god, and I have the power that is far beyond your imagination. The basic power of an avatar is soul power, and your soul has been locked. Even if it’s just an avatar, it’s impossible to return to the original body.

I believe I will get more valuable things from your mouth. “

“As expected to be 1 of the 3 archangels, I wonder how does Michael and Gabriel’s strength compare to yours?” Chen Rui sighed.

“This is the 3rd question?” Raphael said calmly, “Unfortunately, you have lost the qualification to trade.”

“This is not the 3rd question… Well, Raphael, 1 of the 3 archangels, Cherub, Domination, Potestas, the closest existence to god, cast the Dimension Soul Shackle on me. As a result, my avatar could not return to its original body…” A strange smile suddenly appeared on Chen Rui’s face, “Before the result, there is 1 more sentence, provided if this is just an ordinary avatar.”

Raphael raised his eyebrows and saw that the ‘avatar’ sealed by the Dimension Soul Shackle disappeared suddenly.

chapters.title: Chapter 814: Skit
chapters.body:
Chapter 814: Skit

Raphael was taken aback by Chen Rui’s disappearance. He didn’t expect this low-powered guy to actually swagger away under his watch. The [Dimension Soul Shackle] that could imprison soul was a very powerful secret technique. Even an ordinary Demi-God couldn’t break free. Raphael spent a lot of time secretly brewing to capture this avatar alive, but he made a fool of himself in the end.

The archangel snorted, and his figure gradually faded in the space without looking at the ‘ants’ that fainted on the ground.

At the same time, in a room in the Venus City, Chen Rui slowly opened his eyes. A flash of red light in his eyes disappeared briefly, and his pupils returned to normal.

[Dimension Soul Shackle]’s power was no doubt extraordinary. Even if Chen Rui was so far away, the soul of the original body felt a faint throb. Unfortunately, this soul secret technique had no effect on the avatar of the Super System. Instead, a trace of the power was devoured by Shura’s talent. In the future, it might be possible to imitate this kind of secret technique that targeted soul.

Chen Rui successfully refined the Star Power this time, unlocked the Shackles of True Flame, and beheaded Ze Hongen. It was already an unexpected gain which greatly exceeded his expected goals. As for leaving Shura in the star space before running, it was a spontaneous idea.

Raphael, the archangel, was also one of the several Pseudo-Gods at the top. He was also Cherub, Domination, and Potestas.

Putting other matters aside, Chen Rui would face the top powerhouses such as Raphael and Michael sooner or later just because of the Breeze Shadow Boots of Light Divinity Temple. This time, he wanted to use the safest method to face Raphael and feel the strength of this peak stage powerhouse. Those exchange questions were just casual conversations. Especially regarding the Breeze Shadow Boots, Judging from the information revealed by Ze Hongen and Raphael, it has been confirmed that the Breeze Shadow Boots is the Wind Badge of the supreme artifact. There may also be a woman involved. Is this woman referring to Isabella? Or is there someone else?

As for a certain supreme artifact, it is a ‘taboo’ for the gods. I wonder what shocking secrets are hidden in it. There are many secrets involved such as the true purpose of the God-Eating Mask and half of the Illusive Demon Shield on my body, and the 2 silver boxes…

With Chen Rui’s current strength, it was not the time to explore these secrets. It was like the car was just invented, but one was already thinking of exploring outer space. Being obsessed will only distract myself. Now that I have witnessed Raphael’s strength, this trip to Starlight College can be regarded as a successful conclusion.

This time he had stayed in the human world for more than 2 months, and it was only more than a month before the alchemist master contest of the 3 empires in the Demon Realm.

That night, Chen Rui met Belia in Venus City.

The college was in a crucial period now, but Belia rushed to the city as quickly as possible after receiving the news from Chen Rui.

“Are you… okay?” Now Belia’s gaze on the man on the sofa was more of deterrence and fear. Although ‘Roman’ used to use fake death to get out of sight previously, later in the Star Tower, that mysterious man, who shone brightly, stood out and became the center of the entire starry sky. He also beheaded the 4-winged angel of the Holy Church with an incredible power. No matter how, it was related to ‘Roman’.

After the terrifying power that shattered the magic mirror came, it was no longer possible to see what was happening in the space from the outside. The unconscious participants were automatically sent outside by the space power of the Star Tower when the trial time was over, but no one knew what happened. Fortunately, there were no unnecessary casualties.

I initially thought that this man is just a Saint powerhouse, but unexpectedly he is a more terrifying existence that surpassed Saint!

Belia would not be complacent because of a close relationship and contract with a super powerhouse. She knew very well that the other party was the same type of person as her. He saw only interest and value in his eyes. Even what she originally believed to be the most stable dependence on the equality contract had become the most unstable factor because the Demi-God powerhouse could pay a certain price to cancel the contract.

Therefore, she felt uneasy. What is the purpose of a powerhouse with such a terrifying power, lowering himself to join the bottom level of the mysterious cult?

“Of course I’m okay, but… Belia, I think you have misunderstood something.” The man on the sofa showed a strange and familiar smile, “Sit down first. I will introduce you to someone. My brother, Paglio.”

Belia suddenly saw another man on the sofa next to him. She was actually unaware of how this person appeared next to her. If the other party wanted to take her life, it was effortless for him.

This man had a well-built body with short hair and pale yellow skin. He did not seem to have any special breath, but occasionally, sharp light could be seen faintly when his eyes turned.

Belia recognized it at a glance. It was the man who had absorbed the Star Tower’s power. Although this man didn’t show his appearance for a long time as he soon put on dazzling armor to fight the seraph, the image was already deep in her mind. She immediately stood up and bowed to him.

‘Paglio’ nodded to Belia and motioned to her to sit down, “Since you are Richard’s partner, at least our relationship is not enemy.”

This ‘Paglio’ was Chen Rui’s disguise, and the other was naturally Shura.

Belia had a realization. It turned out to be 2 people!

Facing this terrifying super powerhouse, Belia didn’t dare to be rude. She sat down somewhat restrained while looking at Shura. No doubt the old lover did not let her worry too much as he spoke up, “Don’t be nervous, although you also have a lot of secrets that you didn’t tell me, but Paglio is right. We are not enemies but a close cooperative relationship. Therefore, we must trust each other. Today I will tell you frankly that the reason why I became the Black Death Follower is because my brother and I have gnawing hatred with the Holy Church. The Holy Church not only takes away our most important wealth, but they also took away the lives of our relatives, so I plan to use the cult’s strength to deal with the Holy Light Mountain – Although my brother is a little dismissive about it.”

“I’m not arrogant; I just want to avenge with my own hands.” Chen Rui shrugged, “This time, I need to use the power of the Star Tower to unlock the shackles on my body, so Richard use the name of ‘Roman’ to participate. His purpose was to help me explore. After I followed him into the Star Tower, I no doubt unlocked some kind of imprisonment. Surprisingly, it alarmed the angels of the Holy Church. That 4-winged angel, Ze Hongen was not my opponent adn was killed by me. But then Raphael, 1 of the 3 archangels, came, so I could only escape. Although the process was extremely thrilling, after paying a considerable price, I finally succeeded in activating my secret technique to escape from Raphael’s pursuit.”

“The Supreme Angel Raphael!” Belia exclaimed. Her gaze at Chen Rui became more awed. She quickly calculated in her mind: When these 2 men talked about the Holy Church, the hatred they revealed does not look fake. They are surely not the spies of the Holy Church – I personally saw the 4-winged angel of the Holy Church annihilated in the hands of ‘Paglio’. If this was to win my trust, it was too much of a price to pay. Besides, ‘Richard’ has become my collaborator long ago, so there is no need for such superfluous contrived works.

“Dear Sir Paglio, have you ever thought of joining our cult?” Belia moved her mind and tentatively extended an invitation to Chen Rui.

“I’m different from Richard. I don’t like to be restrained. I don’t want to join any forces for the time being.” Chen Rui shook his head decisively, “The daytime battles severely injured me, especially Raphael’s attack which almost annihilated me, so I must rest for some time. I’ll give you a piece of advice. Without my permission, you must never reveal my existence to anyone, including the forces behind you. You’re a smart woman, so I won’t threaten you. The heavy bargaining chip should be in your own hands to maximize your benefits. I believe you will know how to choose.”

Chen Rui was very aware of the mysterious cult. The identity of the super powerhouse was too conspicuous. The origin of ‘Paglio’ couldn’t withstand scrutiny at all. Once exposed, it would waste Shura, an important chess piece. Furthermore, he couldn’t stay in the human world for a long time. In this case, staying invisible and keeping a sense of mystery was the best strategy.

The mysterious cult was deeply ingrained and acted extremely secretively. It could be seen from the deception of the orc tribe’s beliefs. It couldn’t be completely eliminated in a short period of time. At present, though Shura as the spy, the mysterious cult would be eradicated step by step with the strength of the Holy Church.

Hearing Chen Rui’s direct refusal, Belia revealed a regretful expression, but she secretly nodded in her mind. If the other party agreed to join the mysterious cult, it would be doubtful. Besides, if such a capable person became a cult member, it was likely to cause an unpredictable effect on the planning of the forces behind her.

“Understood, Sir Paglio.” Belia stood up and bowed to Chen Rui again.

“I got news that the Holy Church will take a big action in the East District recently. Both of you must be careful not to reveal your identities. You may want to completely cut off some things that may bring disasters, just in case.” Chen Rui was like a devil who rebuked the sin. The so-called latest news was actually the news he provided to Raphael. The Holy Church would rather kill 1,000 people by mistake than let the Black Death Follower go. This time, they would definitely take action.

With that said, Chen Rui added a ‘kind’ reminder, “Listen to Richard, don’t you want to replace Bishop Angelie? This time is a good opportunity. If necessary, I can make a move when the time is right.”

“It’s okay, it’s just a bug. My brother, take care of your wounds in peace.” Shura and Belia looked at each other, showing a tacit understanding of smiles.

Chen Rui nodded. This self-directed and self-acted short skit has come to an end. The human world matter has basically been resolved. It is time to return to the Demon Realm.

chapters.title: Chapter 815: Maroon Lamp Spirit
chapters.body:
Chapter 815: Maroon Lamp Spirit

The Demon Realm.

Dark Moon Estate’s Blue Lake Mountain Range, Military Restricted Area.

Blue Lake Mountain Range was once rumored to have a treasure, which attracted countless treasure hunters. Finally, the secret of the treasure was officially cracked, that was, the ‘improved secret formula of magic soil’, including the discovery of the Fountain of Resurrection and so on. Later, when the taurens tribe settled there, the Blue Lake Mountain Range became the Dark Moon’s largest ‘arsenal’ and was classified as a military restricted area.

The taurens built the temples needed for reproduction here, then 2 new taurens tribes were absorbed, and the scale of the tribe grew. The taurens had free and safe activity areas, sufficient food, and could do their favorite forging jobs, living smooth sailing days. The batches of excellent equipment they had created also became powerful armed reserves in the Dark Moon Estate and even the Fallen Angel Empire.

A few months ago, a huge figure descended on the Blue Lake Mountain Rang. Despite prior notice, it still caused a shock among the taurens.

The ancient alchemy civilization castle’s City of Stars.

The City of Stars showed a powerful deterrent force in the Warlock Fortress battle. Unfortunately, due to incomplete repairs, it was unable to utilize its true strength and was almost destroyed by Raizen with a punch. After the battle of the Warlock Fortress, the City of Stars did not return to Loeb Mine at the White Feather Estate, but it used the energy to travel all the way south, eventually settling in the Blue Lake Mountain Range.

These days, Chen Rui spent his days in the hustle and bustle of the City of Stars. In fact, since he returned to the Demon Realm from the human world, he had not been idle. First, he went to Teacher Tetenis’ place to stay for several days, then he participated in Shea’s plan to establish the first college of the Fallen Angel Empire before returning to the City of Stars for research.

The results of the study gave Chen Rui a huge surprise. The shattered life crystal of the ‘Sky Wheel’ was absorbed and assimilated by Crystal Phoenix, the central life crystal of the City of Stars. The Crystal Phoenix was also upgraded to level 3 because of this. A qualitative leap had been achieved in control levels and functions.

The upgrade of the central life crystal was the most important condition for the upgrade of the civilization castle. Chen Rui asked the titans to demolish the massive materials. Among them were many irreplaceable treasures which were necessary for upgrading civilization. After Crystal Phoenix’s analysis and experiment, an upgrade plan had been successfully confirmed which could upgrade the entire City of Stars to a level 3 civilization castle.

Level 2 civilization to level 3 civilization was a key ‘quality’ upgrade. The upper limit of biological production was greatly increased, and it had the authority to build enhanced biological warehouses and culture tanks which could strengthen and improve alchemy beings and organisms. In addition, some powerful castle weapons had also been added.

By comparison, levels 3 to 4 were more scalable ‘quantity’ upgrades.

The overall upgrade time of the City of Stars was expected to take 3 months, and the upgrade period would not affect daily work.

In the 2 months that Chen Rui left the Demon Realm, the magic game, the ‘Infinite Warrior’, was basically popularized in the entire Demon Realm. It was called the 3 most popular things in the Demon Realm together with battle ball and aromatic millet wine. Correspondingly, there were more and more faith crystals in the Super System.

The market of magic television and magic game helmets was basically saturated. Many so-called experts had begun to predict that the revenue of magic games would drop sharply. In fact, even in terms of revenue, the magic game’s potential had only been explored a little. Furthermore, the purpose of Chen Rui’s development of the magic game was not just to make money.

Currently, he was working on the upgrade of the next version. In the crystal board obtained from the secret warehouse of the ‘Sky Wheel’, the detailed blueprint and improvement plan of the assemble puppet were recorded. This plan would be specifically applied to the production of the assemble puppet of the City of Stars, and targeted reforms would be carried out in the game to further select the strongest pilots for the assemble puppet.

Besides that, combined with the massive data of abyss monsters obtained in the ‘Sky Wheel’, the new game version’s difficulty, monster, equipment, and other aspects would be increased and adjusted. The most important was also to bring an unprecedented new game mode, manifesting the true charm of magic games.

Chen Rui sat in the central control palace as he stared at the lamp on the metal table that was covered by the purple light of Crystal Phoenix, the maroon heart lamp.

The heart lamp was the core of the lamp spirits. The higher the level of the heart lamp, the greater the strength. The heart lamp was divided into 3 types from high to low: gold, silver and iron. Under the condition of the same materials, the grade had certain randomness. The probability of gold was the least, silver was second, and iron was the most. Once the lamp spirits die, they could be resurrected through the heart lamp. Of course, this resurrection was not infinite. The gold lamp could be resurrected 4 times, the silver lamp could be resurrected 3 times, and the iron lamp could be resurrected twice. Heart lamps that exceeded the number of resurrections would fail and shatter unless repaired at a high cost.

In addition to repairing the heart lamp, it could also use special materials and energy to rank up, but each level was very difficult to level up. The higher the grade, the more so. If the level up failed, the level of the heart lamp would drop 1 level: The gold lamp would fall to the silver lamp, the silver lamp would fall to the iron lamp, and the iron lamp would break directly if the level up failed.

Generally speaking, the golden heart lamp was already the limit, and the upper limit of strength was capped at the Demon Emperor level, but the data showed that the powerful alchemists in the alchemy civilization used a secret formula to create a maroon heart lamp that exceeded the limit. However, even with the secret formula, the success rate was still very low. Once it failed, it would be scrapped directly.

The one in front of him was the extremely rare maroon heart lamp. Another harvest in the Sky Wheel’s secret warehouse was the ‘maroon heart lamp’ left by Doruda.

According to Doruda’s diary records, this was the lamp spirit he created based on the madly infatuated woman, Manlace. The body proportions, appearance and character were exactly the same. He was once used by Doruda as a slave to vent his desire. Later, when Manlace died with endless hatred in front of Doruda, Doruda’s spirit almost collapsed. In order to suppress the fear in his heart, he sealed it in the secret warehouse forever.

This was the only maroon heart lamp in Chen Rui’s hands. His idea was to analyze the manufacturing secret technique of this legendary super heart lamp, so as to create more maroon heart lamps.

Unfortunately, even though Crystal Phoenix rose to level 3 life crystal, it still couldn’t complete this analysis, so Crystal Phoenix proposed to revive the lamp spirits. It recommended to input energy into the ‘maroon heart lamp’, and then collect the data from the revived lamp spirits for testing and calculations.

The central life crystal emitted a rich purple light which shone on the maroon heart lamp. Since this lamp was not produced by the City of Stars, Crystal Phoenix was inputting the highest concentration of energy while trying to control the consciousness of the heart lamp.

This process was slower than expected, and the process of absorbing the energy of the maroon heart lamp was quite slow. It started to shine little by little.

At this time, a warning voice sounded from Crystal Phoenix, “2 outsiders have entered the City of Stars, and their identity is level 1 authority. They have passed the guards, and the defense weapons are automatically turned off.”

Chen Rui’s thoughts moved, and the metal ground on the side rose and turned into a platform automatically. There was a crystal mirror on the platform which showed the figures of the 2 level 1 authorities.

1 was a beautiful woman in a maid outfit. The slightly conservative outfits show off an amazingly sexy figure with slender legs, plump breasts, curved horns on the head, a pair of small wings on the back, and a thin tail waving slightly behind the hips. The mysterious charm was full of irresistible seduction.

The beautiful maid was holding a small basket in her left hand and her right hand was holding a blond girl’s hand. The girl was wearing a short white gold-trimmed skirt. She looked only around 12 years old. Her skin was white and tender with delicate facial features. She looked exactly like the little loli.

Kia and Alice.

After Kia became Athena’s assistant, she played several roles and showed surprising talents. She solved a lot of problems and successfully helped Athena to get through the tough period when she was newly appointed.

The little succubus had been traveling a lot toward Blue Lake Mountain these days. She used the reason of supervising someone to prevent cheating (The City of Stars was full of lamp spirits beauties with absolute obedience), but in fact, she stole what was entrusted to her. Of course, the madam lord had recently made a lot of ‘secret inspections’ of the military restricted areas.

After the last outing, the little loli returned to her previous uplifting spirit. She deliberately returned to the Dark Moon’s Princess Retail Store to preside over the main store, and ‘conveniently’ stick to Chen Rui.

However, the addition of the little loli did not cause shock to the crystal harem. The main reason was that the body figure of the Royal Highness Little Princess lacked a sense of threat. Everyone knew that Chen Rui regarded Alice more as his sister.

“Brother! I’m here!” The little loli pointed to the front, “Open sesame!”

No doubt, a light door appeared at the location pointed to by Alice. In the City of Stars, Chen Rui, the supreme controller, could appear anywhere at any time, and he could open the space door to reach the connection anywhere.

Alice pulled Kia, walked into the door of light, and appeared in front of Chen Rui.

When the little loli saw Chen Rui, she jumped up into his arms. Then, she suddenly rolled her eyes, “Brother-in-law!”

This new title made Chen Rui stunned. Right, the empress sister’s husband. While he was feeling a little vanity, the little loli raised her head with pitiful tears in her eyes, “Brother-in-law, I have…”

Chen Rui’s body shook as he felt a chill on his back. He was speechless.

“What happened? When did it happen? Hurry up and abort it! Don’t let your sister know about it!” It was the little maid beside her who answered the question, and she deliberately gave the sir brother-in-law a wink.

The little loli said tearfully, “I won’t tell sister, but that little life is the crystallization of our love, so I can’t kill it… By the way, Kia, what are the other lines? It seems to be on page 32.”

The succubus maid opened the book earnestly and began to search. Chen Rui clearly saw the cover – “That night, I climbed into my brother-in-law’s bed”.

“Stop!” The anxious brother-in-law hurriedly stopped the performance of the sister-in-law and the accomplice, little maid.

“Don’t you like it, brother-in-law?” The little loli blinked with big eyes, “There is also a book called “Little Sister-in-law, Brother-in-law’s Half Buttocks”. Do you want me to give you another surprise?”

“No, I’m already surprised enough.” Chen Rui shook his head with cold sweat on his face. Not just surprise, almost convulsed.

The little loli laughed, and her eyes were suddenly attracted by the gleaming maroon heart lamp. The charging of the maroon heart lamp was nearly complete, and it emitted a magnificent colorful halo.

“Brother, what is that?”

At least it’s not brother-in-law anymore. Chen Rui wiped his sweat secretly, “That’s the maroon heart lamp I’ve been working on these days.”

“What a beautiful lamp! Can I go and see it?”

“Of course, don’t get too close.”

Seeing the little loli jumping and diverting her attention to the maroon heart lamp, Chen Rui breathed a sigh of relief. The little maid walked over with a smile and placed the basket on the table, deliberately dragging her voice, “Brother-in-law… I brought you something to eat.”

Chen Rui dragged this little charming troublemaker and heavily slapped her buttocks. Succubus let out a painful cry, but this sounded like a certain excited moan. He saw the little charming girl glanced at him with a ‘wronged’ look. Her blushing face seemed to be able to squeeze out water. That kind of coquettishness made a certain male involuntarily feel an intense desire.

“Seduction talent again!” Chen Rui quickly woke up and whispered, “Don’t mess around, Alice is still here.”

“With sister-in-law around, wouldn’t it be more exciting to have an affair?” The little charming girl approached deliberately, licked her sexy red lips, and rubbed an important part of the man with her elastic buttocks.

Chen Rui had always lacked immunity to the seduction of this beloved little succubus. Moreover, she was so tempting, so he touched the little succubus’ waist.

Who knew the little charming girl turned around, dodged, and suddenly shouted, “Alice!”

The little loli was looking at the maroon heart lamp with great interest, then she heard the voice, and turned around, “What’s the matter?”

Chen Rui hurriedly sat down, pretending to open the basket and using the table to cover up the tent raised on his lower body. He secretly scolded the little charming girl for being mischievous.

“Nothing, I’ll watch it with you.” The little charming girl winked mischievously at the man, and she walked toward Alice with a wagging little tail.

At this time, the life breath of the maroon heart lamp was getting stronger and stronger. The colorful halos intertwined and condensed a colorful light cocoon.

The light cocoon began to spin rapidly, and a human-shape figure could be vaguely seen.

As the figure became more and more clear, the rotation speed of the light cocoon became slower and slower. This was a naked woman with fair skin, beautiful facial features, slightly raised eyes and slightly thick lips. She showed a sexy and mature charm.

What’s sexier was the body. Her height actually reached more than 190 cm. Her breasts and buttocks were prominent, but the proportion of the buttocks was slightly larger. The body proportions were exactly like Manlace. Judging from Doruda’s journal, he seemed to have a crazy obsession with hips.

Alice stared at this mature woman whom she needed to look up to no matter in terms of her height or figure. Then, she subconsciously looked at her flat chest, and touched her buttocks.

Not to mention the little loli, even the succubus maid’s facial expression was a little uncomfortable. That kind of butt… really gives people pressure!

“Brother, this is your research?” Alice cried out, “Woman without clothes!”

In fact, the real resentment that made the little loli cry bitterly was: Big breasts! Big butt!

TL: Better don’t let the maroon lamp spirit learn that ‘mischievous’ behavior…

chapters.title: Chapter 816: Manlace
chapters.body:
Chapter 816: Manlace

In the resentment of the succubus maid and the little loli, the maroon lamp spirits had completely solidified into a physical entity, then the light cocoon stopped turning and disappeared.

Race: Lamp spirits (Alchemy beings).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S+

Physique: S, Strength: S+, Spirit: S+, Speed: S.

[Analysis]: Indestructible attribute, powerful magic body, buff elements, melee combat proficiency, bed skills proficiency.

Danger level: High.

Chen Rui was a little surprised. The maroon lamp spirit actually has the strength of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. It is indeed the super lamp spirits created by the most outstanding Frankenstein of the ancient alchemy civilization.

The lamp spirits slowly opened her eyes. Her pupils and hair were both dark blue. Chen Rui was shocked when he saw the cold murderous intent in those dark blue pupils. He instantly appeared in front of Alice and Kia.

With a wave of the maroon lamp spirit, the temperature suddenly rose, and the entire central palace was filled with fiery breath. There was a red light on the body of the maroon lamp spirits, and the dangerous breath was even stronger. The attack was obviously buffed with [Bloodthirsty].

The maroon lamp spirit appeared in front of Chen Rui. Chen Rui’s speed was S++. His mind moved slightly, and he grabbed her wrist quickly. He felt a fire-like burning sensation from his palm. When he thought of ‘buff elements’ in [Analysis], he immediately understood.

At this time, there was a transparent protective shield around Alice and Kia, which was made by Chen Rui using the central crystal. At the moment of this distraction, Chen Rui suddenly felt that the wrist of the maroon lamp spirit ‘slipped’ out of his control like a swimming fish and unexpectedly buckled his elbow. She also turned to his side and exerted force.

Joint lock? Chen Rui raised his brows, and he shook off the lamp spirit with his strength. The lamp spirit turned around and appeared on the other side like a ghost again, targeting toward his joint. Chen Rui was mentally prepared this time. He turned around and dodged, trapping the lamp spirit’s hand.

Chen Rui’s current strength had reached S++. Coupled with various enhancement factors, his combat power was far better than the average peak stage of the Demon Overlord, but he didn’t use his full strength. He just trapped the maroon lamp spirit and cooperated with Crystal Phoenix to control her.

After the 2 fought for a while, the central life crystal glowed brilliantly. Under the illumination of the purple light, countless golden symbols appeared on the maroon heart lamp. As the purple light slowly penetrated into the golden light, the lamp spirit’s movement slowed down accordingly. The dark blue pupils became a little more purple.

Soon, those golden light symbols were re-written and arranged by Crystal Phoenix like some kind of programming language and engraved into the heart lamp. The lamp spirit also completely retrieved her strength, stopped her movements, and gave Chen Rui a respectful bow.

“Master.” The voice of maroon lamp spirit was slightly low with a bit of suggestive temptation.

After the lamp spirit was successfully controlled, Kia and Alice’s protection was also withdrawn accordingly. They came to Chen Rui’s side and looked at this ‘woman without clothes’ vigilantly.

They were worried during the battle just now, but now the danger was resolved. When they saw her standing in front of Chen Rui unabashedly, especially a beautiful woman with a hot body, the little succubus maid and the little loli simultaneously felt an unprecedented sense of crisis.

“Don’t look!” The little loli jumped on Chen Rui’s back and tried to cover his eyes with both hands.

Chen Rui gave a wry smile and gave a command to the lamp spirit. The lamp spirit immediately put on clothes and a veil on her face. This traditional clothing style of the lamp spirits was actually very revealing. The subtle mystery made the maroon lamp spirit look more sexy and alluring.

“Why bother to wear it…” The little succubus maid, who knew all-too-well, muttered to herself.

“Brother, how long are you going to research here? We haven’t been having fun for a long time!” Although the lamp spirit had already put on clothes, Alice hung around Chen Rui’s neck and refused to come down.

“Brother has a lot of work to do now…” Chen Rui patted the little loli’s hand, trying to free the hanging bear from his back, but the little loli actually hung on him with amazing ‘wiggling technique’ and came to the front, transforming into a koala.

Feeling the fragrance of the girl, Chen Rui could not help twitching his nose. He looked at Kia with a pleading look, but Kia stood by and covered her smile.

After finally coaxing the koala down with a newly developed small game console, the maroon lamp spirits said, “Master, please give me a name.”

Chen Rui thought for a while, “Let’s call you Manlace. Do you remember the name? Or do you remember anything from the past?”

Manlace showed a blank expression and shook her head. The most important reason why she was subdued by Crystal Phoenix was that she was completely wiped out of consciousness by the original master, which was equivalent to a ‘wild’ alchemy being. If the autonomous consciousness of the maroon lamp spirit was still there, even if the Crystal Phoenix had been upgraded to a level 3 life entity, it would not be able to do so.

“Manlace?” The little loli, who was sitting on the stool and just started the game, snorted in dissatisfaction. Why isn’t she called Big Bun Lace? Big Butt Lace? Hateful Lace?

(By the way, the name of this game is ‘little princess run’? It should be specially made by brother for me… I will barely forgive him.)

Chen Rui thought of the remodeling plan for the lamp spirit and asked, “What’s the difference between your powerful magic body and the normal magic body? What are the buff elements?”

These were the instinctive attributes of the maroon lamp spirits, and they had nothing to do with memory, so Manlace answered right away.

Her ‘indestructible attribute’ was the characteristic of the ordinary lamp spirits. As long as the heart lamp was around, the lamp spirits would not die. If there were enough materials, the maroon heart lamp could theoretically be resurrected infinitely.

The ‘powerful magic body’ already had a faint concept of ‘territory’. The fiery breath just now was the fire element of the powerful magic body. It could enhance the effectiveness of the [Bloodthirsty], so its power was naturally far superior to ordinary lamp spirits.

‘Melee combat proficiency.’ Chen Rui had just experienced it personally, which effectively compensate for the lamp spirits’ lack of melee combat ability, and ‘buff elements’ was the additional damage of elements. Unfortunately, the maroon lamp spirit just used fire element and fire elements buff which had little use for Chen Rui who had the [Fire Phoenix Stigmata].

As for the last ‘bed skills proficiency”… Needless to say, it was specially made by Doruda to satisfy some kind of perverted mentality and desire. However, when the real Manlace died in front of Doruda full of hatred, the perverted scientist’s distorted desire was replaced by a deep fear. He no longer dared to see a clone with the same face as the real one, so he erased her consciousness forever and stored it in the secret warehouse.

In addition, Manlace also had a special talent for piloting the assemble puppet – She could go to the battlefield, the cockpit, plus… the bedroom. She could be considered the most almighty maid.

Unfortunately, according to Crystal Phoenix’s preliminary analysis, the production process of Manlace was quite complicated, and the possibility of imitation was almost zero. Even Doruda only made 1. The only feasible solution was to use some reference data to try to improve the existing lamp spirits after the City of Stars was upgraded to level 3 and a powerful biological warehouse was built.

“Master, my life energy has been fully charged, does the master need to absorb energy now?” Manlace’s body exuded a seductive breath, apparently activating the ability of ‘bed skills proficiency’.

For the ‘humans’ of the alchemy civilization, the meaning of the lamp spirits’ existence was not only a magical assistant on the battlefield, but they were also a ‘cauldron’ for satisfying desires and absorbing energy. He (she) usually used a secret technique to draw the life energy of the lamp spirits to enhance their own strength

This kind of absorption would undoubtedly cause damage to the lamp spirits. If the frequency was too high, it would also cause irreparable damage to the origin. Once the origin collapsed, it would be scrapped and discarded.

The reason why Manlace put forward the requirement of ‘training’ was completely driven by instinctive instructions, which was the most important purpose of Doruda in creating her back then.

The fate of the lamp spirits was to dedicate everything, including their life, to the master.

“No need!” Kia was the first to answer. Although Manlace didn’t explain how to ‘absorb’ the energy, compared to the innocent little loli, the succubus’ instinct made the little maid immediately guess the meaning of the lamp spirit.

However, Manlace ignored Kia. She just looked at Chen Rui with seductive eyes while the little maid beside him revealed her seductive talent.

“Both of you stop.” Chen Rui patted the little maid’s waist lightly, gave her a ‘reassuring’ gaze, and said to the lamp spirit, “I don’t need to absorb your life energy now nor in the future. This is my commitment to all the lamp spirits of ‘the City of Stars’, and it applies to you as well. I now appoint you as the chief commander of the City of Stars. Your duty is to guard the City of Stars, and complete the upgrades and restoration work of ‘The City of Stars’ together with Crystal Phoenix.”

The lamp spirit had very independent thinking and consciousness; their joys and sorrows were no different from ordinary human beings. In the face of death, they might fear, but they could not disobey the orders of the highest authority. Hearing Chen Rui’s promise, Manlace’s blue eyes lit up, and the seductive breath faded instantly. It was replaced by a cold and arrogant temperament as her eyes became more submissive, “Yes, master. If master needs it, Manlace will try my best to satisfy the master’s need.”

When a cold, arrogant and sexy beauty told you that ‘you can do whatever you want’, it was indeed a considerable temptation, but it was another matter to have a wife staring at you at the same time.

Chen Rui clearly felt that the seductive power exuded by the little maid on the side was stronger, and he quickly shook his head, “No need, I have given you the corresponding permissions. Go to the database to read the information first and grasp the status of the entire castle. “

As soon as Manlace left, the powerful seductive breath on the little maid disappeared, but she quietly and secretly teased Chen Rui with little moves in front of Alice. Because of Alice’s presence, Chen Rui couldn’t make any moves, so he could only suppress it.

“Did Zola finish her research?”

When Chen Rui returned to the Demon Realm, Zola coincidently closed the Rainbow Valley a few days ago and began to research behind closed doors. Therefore, Chen Rui had 2 gifts with him, the light origin fragment and wind origin fragment. He believed that when Ms. After Fairy Dragon was out, these 2 treasures would give her a huge surprise.

“Only remember Zola…” While the little loli was playing the game, the little maid succubus kissed Chen Rui’s mouth and secretly drew a circle on his leg with the other hand.

Chen Rui grinned and said indistinctly, “How can I? I still remember that someone’s birthday is only 2 months and 5 days away?”

The little maid immediately smiled, and glanced at him affectionately.

“At least someone still has a conscience. I will keep the door open for you at night… It’s the back door.” The inaudible voice of the little maid entered Chen Rui’s ears, “Hehe, I’ll let someone know that although that woman’s parts are bigger, she may not be comparable to… Hehe!”

This time, it was someone who was elated.

chapters.title: Chapter 817: The Curtain Falls
chapters.body:
Chapter 817: The Curtain Falls

The ‘Peace Cup’ battle ball league co-organized by the Demon Realm’s 3 empires had finally come to an end. The Red Blood Team of the Fallen Angel Empire took the league championship. The response of the league this time was quite enthusiastic, especially the new home and away system which added a lot of charm to the game of battle ball. During the start of the league, the venues were full seats. Even the magic televisions in many public areas were crowded with fans. Many of them were away fans who came from thousands of miles to cheer.

Due to the time limit of the magic game, the battle ball did not receive much impact. Instead, it became the most popular activity for the rest of the time after the magic game.

All in all, the first Demon Realm league was quite successful, and the benefits and impact it brought far exceeded expectations. The 3 empires announced that they would hold the second league at the same time next year. At that time, the participating teams would be expanded, and each empire would send 4 teams to compete for the championship. The news was received with cheers.

Before the craze for the battle ball league faded, another much anticipated event by the entire Demon Realm was coming soon – The alchemy competition co-organized by the 3 empires.

The predecessor of the alchemy contest was the potioneer contest, which was already planned to be held when Obsidian was in power. In the end, due to the ‘fundraising scandal’ and the crusade against the Dark Moon, it was delayed again and again. When Obsidian was defeated, the contest was postponed indefinitely until Shea ascended the throne and co-organize master level contests including potion and mechanics with the Dark Shadow Empire. However, it was forced to stop due to the invasion of the Bloody Empire. After a fierce battle, due to the intervention of the Dark Shadow Empire, the 3 empires finally reached an armistice agreement and jointly held an alchemy competition, the first of which was located at the Fallen Angel Capital.

This alchemy competition was divided into 2 categories, mechanic category and potion category.

These 2 categories were divided into Group A and Group B. Group B was the common mechanic and potioneer whereas Group A was the master level.

The most attractive was the master contest. People would be able to witness the Demon Realm’s top mechanic masters and potion masters battle against each other.

The rules of the potioneer contest were different from the normal alchemist contest. For example, in the mechanic master contest, at the same level, there were extra points for multiple specializations. Back then, Nate of the Bloody Empire won the mechanic master contest because of duo-specialization and became the Demon Realm’s top mechanic master. However, the character of this top mechanic master was extremely low. He actually used sorcery to steal other people’s skills to improve. After this incident was exposed, Nate’s reputation fell and he was imprisoned by Raizen.

In any case, Nate’s power was still there. It was reported that Raizen had pardoned and released Nate from prison to represent the Bloody Empire in the contest.

If Nate participated in the contest, the master contest would become even more remarkable because the Fallen Angel Empire had announced that Fonsaq, the president of the Mechanic Association, would be participating. Fonsaq was originally the Vice President of the Bloody Empire Mechanic Association and the top leather master of the Demon Realm. He was framed by Nate, which destroyed his family. After many years of living in anonymity, he returned to serve as the president of the Mechanical Association of the Fallen Angel Empire when Nate’s reputation was tarnished. Meeting Nate in the contest this time could be said as the inevitable clash of the enemies. There should be a fierce battle by then.

Compared with Fonsaq and Nate, another person deserved more attention. It was the genius master ‘Arthur’ of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association.

‘Arthur’ won the Dark Shadow Empire’s mechanic contest with amazing talent and strength. That final was still talked about to this day. What was originally just an ordinary mechanic contest turned into a masters contest in the end, and the 2 champions were geniuses beyond ordinary masters. Alas, Arthur defeated the duo-specialized master Horford with his trio-specialized master level to win the championship. Although ‘Arthur’ was all-glorious, it was after all an alchemist contest and not a masters contest, so his reputation was inevitably insufficient. However, this time it was the strongest masters contest in the Demon Realm. If anyone could win this competition, they would be worthy of being the number 1 alchemist.

In addition, there were many well-known senior mechanic masters such as the top metal master, Master Anderson, the top accessory master, Master Tetenis and so on. By then, this mechanic master contest would stage a wonderful showdown.

The potion master contest could not be ignored either. Angegille, the president of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Potioneer Association, and Wilson, president of the Bloody Empire’s Potioneer Association, were both senior masters. It was said that they already had strengths that were extremely close to the grand master, and the Fallen Angel Empire’s newcomer Aldas was also a favorite to win the championship. The story of the dark elf master who killed the potion genius Andrew with a fart was still talked about. According to historical records, for hundreds of thousands of years, every new potion grand master was always created in the potion master contest. The Demon Realm has not had a grand master for nearly 10,000 years, so this time, people were also very much looking forward to a miracle in this potion master contest to witness this historic scene.

When the night falls, the 2 moons emit an alluring purple glow, shining on the brightly lit capital.

For demons who like nocturnal activities and the nightlife was already quite rich, the busiest time of the day had just begun.

Although there were still a few days before the official opening of the alchemy competition, the flow of people in the Fallen Angel Empire had been several times higher than usual, and the tickets for the competition had already been sold out. Many shops took the opportunity to launch many promotions to make a lot of money.

The night market, battle ball field, restaurant, and so on were all lively. It was not including those fans who put on the magic game helmet and enter the spiritual world to fight.

In order to stabilize law and order, the capital had specially strengthened the guards’ strength. Patrolling guards could be seen everywhere. A large-screen magic television was also added in public areas such as the central plaza for tourists to watch free of charge; those who did not have tickets for the competition could gather here to watch live.

The Fallen Angel Capital’s Royal Inn.

A burly man in his 40s was bending over and bowing his head, showing a very respectful look to the chair in front of him.

There was a person sitting on the chair. No matter the appearance or the momentum, the person on the chair could only be described by the word ‘ordinary’, but the man opposite didn’t dare to move with a kind of genuine fear in his heart.

The person on the chair had been keeping quiet. The bowing man’s sweat dripped from his forehead, but he never dared to stand up straight. The intangible pressure was like a butcher’s knife hanging over his head, which could cut his head off at any time.

The ordinary man finally said, “Nate, you only have one chance, understand?”

“Understood, Your Majesty!” The burly man bowed lower.

When the ordinary man waved his hand, the burly man seemed relieved. He hurriedly bowed and stepped back, only to find that his clothes were soaked with sweat.

Although Raizen only said this to him from his release from the Bloody Empire’s prison to the arrival of the Fallen Angel Empire, he understood a lot of meanings.

This time, the rulers of the 3 empires would attend the competition as an arbiter, which showed the importance attached to the competition. As one of the masters competing on behalf of the Bloody Empire, as well as being the strongest master and a convicted prisoner, this was the only chance for redemption. The Demon Realm respected powerhouses. Sometimes strength could overwhelm everything. If he could win the contest, he was very likely to regain his former glory; if he failed to seize this opportunity, then he, the publicly condemned prisoner, would lose his last existence value.

In this competition, I must win!

A secluded compound in the Fallen Angel Capital.

“Teacher.” Chen Rui handed over a bottle of wine, “This is a new and improved aromatic millet wine which tastes better than the previous one. It has not been released to the public; you can try it.”

Tetenis took the bottle of wine, opened the cork, smelled it, and his eyes lit up. He took a sip, and showed a pleasant expression, “Very good, by the way, Aldas, how is your preparation?”

The dark elf on the side showed a gloomy expression while shaking his head, “Teacher, please forgive my slow learning. I haven’t been able to capture that special mysterious feeling yet. I’m still a little bit short of the realm of quasi-grand master.”

“Don’t rush it, this competition is just a training. Your aptitude is indeed not particularly outstanding, but the diligence and perseverance you have, from a certain point of view, it is easier to find the pulse of success than your qualifications,” Tetenis suddenly glanced at Chen Rui, “Of course, this law is not suitable for a guy with unbelievable talent and luck.”

“Teacher, shouldn’t you praise me since you drink my wine?” Chen Rui grinned and brought another plate of braised pork ribs in front of the old man, “I made all these things myself. Congratulations to teacher for successfully being promoted to grand master.”

“Hmph! I dare not to accept it. I should call you teacher instead.” Tetenis sternly said while looking at the apprentice silently, but his eyes were filled with undisguised excitement. These days, with the help and tips of Chen Rui, Tetenis, who had been staying on the quasi-grand master for many years, finally got his long-cherished wish and successfully advanced to the grand master.

“Sir teacher, I dare not take it. This title can be given to the great grand master who gave me the inheritance. In my heart, the old… Uh, teacher will always be the teacher.”

The last sentence was indeed sincere. The old man felt great comfort as he smiled, scolded and nodded, “It’s good enough that you have me in your mind. Let’s put aside the flowery words to coax those girls. No matter what, your current level is far higher than mine, so I can’t give you any more help for this duel with Saman. But I have to remind you that Saman has nearly 10,000 years of experience. He’s a really strong grand master, probably on a par with you. Under no circumstances should you lose your prudence.”

“I won’t underestimate any enemy. Don’t worry, teacher.” Chen Rui showed strong confidence, “I will definitely win the final victory and draw a perfect end to that fate.”

The capital outskirts.

A gigantic dark figure appeared in the night sky with its white bony wings flashing. Its hollow eye sockets flickered like a ghost in the darkness. On the back of the dark figure, a figure shrouded in a black cloak looked out at the Fallen Angel Capital.

A sinister laughter sounded. After a while, the huge dark figure had disappeared into the night sky.

TL: Nate still has some skills, even though he stole them, can Fonsaq win against him? Also, will it be a tough competition for Chen Rui?

chapters.title: Chapter 818: The Beginning Of The Main Event
chapters.body:
Chapter 818: The Beginning Of The Main Event

The much-anticipated alchemy competition finally kicked off as scheduled.

As one might expect, familiar names appeared on the official entry list: Nate, Fonsaq, Anderson, Tetenis, Xingxing, Angegille, Wilson, Aldas…

There was no doubt that this masters contest would stage a wonderful showdown between the masters. The only regret was that Master Arthur was not on the list.

In addition to the promising participants, the Arbitration Council was even more shocking. The chief arbitrator was the senior appraisal master Panu as well as 2 famous appraisal masters. These 3 arbitrators had served as judges for potion contests many times, and they had always been known for their fairness and strictness. Appraisers were also a type of alchemy. They mainly focus on good vision and judgment, so their skills did not necessarily have to reach the peak. For example, the appraiser genius ‘Richard’, who once shined in the Bloody Empire, was actually Master Fonsaq’s apprentice. He deliberately became Nate’s apprentice to reveal Nate’s true face to the world. He successfully avenged his ‘teacher’, but unfortunately, the genius was also ‘sacrificed’, which made people sigh with regret.

However, it was not the 3 appraisers that attracted the most attention, but the 3 specially invited arbitrators: the Fallen Angel Empire’s Shea, Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen, and the Dark Shadow Empire’s Regent Frentz!

The reason for the absence of Catherine, the great empress of the Dark Shadow Empire, was to master the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] behind closed-door training to prepare for the martial battle more than a year later. Currently, the important military and political affairs of the Dark Shadow Empire were temporarily handled by Uncle Frentz. Frentz was once blinded by the rebellious Broc, but fortunately, with the help of Catherine’s power of Nirvana, he regained some vision with the help of a magical item.

The leaders of the 3 empires also sat in the Arbitration Council which showed great importance to the competition. It greatly increased the significance and weight of the alchemy competition. It made the competition more intense to a certain extent.

The potioneer competition of Group B had started. Many potioneers had been working hard a few years ago to prepare for an overnight success in the potioneer contest planned by Obsidian. As a result, the potioneer competition had been delayed again and again until today. After a long period of precipitation and accumulation, they finally got the opportunity to unleash.

After several rounds of elimination in the preliminary rounds, many potioneers who entered the final stage showed admirable standards and potentials, especially 3 potioneers who reached the master level. In the end, Luyi, the apprentice of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Potioneer Association President Angegille, won the prize. The Dark Shadow Empire’s Regent Frentz had a satisfied smile on his face when he saw the potioneer talent that the empire cultivated the championship.

The potioneer contest was followed by the mechanic contest of Group B. Although there were no 2 shining stars like ‘Arthur’ and Horford like the last the Dark Shadow Empire’s mechanic contest, there were still quite potential participants, especially Sosa from the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association.

Sosa was originally just an ordinary mechanic in the Mechanic Association. He was quiet and did not show extraordinary talent. Master Fonsaq recognized his talent with a discerning eye. Back then, he rejected several ‘excellent talents’ recommended by the association, but instead accepted this ‘mediocre talent’.

Under the careful guidance of Master Fonsaq, who taught students in accordance with their aptitude, Sosa made tremendous improvement, dropping the jaws of those experts. This competition has become the best test. As a result, Sosa won the Group B mechanic competition as expected, and his performance standard had basically entered the threshold of the master level. Seeing that the contestants from their empire won the final victory step by step, the atmosphere of the Fallen Angel Empire’s home court suddenly reached a climax with continuous enthusiastic cheers.

Shea, who was in the VIP seat, nodded slightly. Sosa’s honor this time had greatly inspired people’s cohesion and morale. Although the 3 empires were in a truce, the open and secret battles between them were still fierce, which was equivalent to another battlefield.

In the battle ball league, the Bloody Empire’s Blood Shadow Team lost to the Red Blood Team and finished as the runner-up. As the alchemy contest was halfway through, both the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire had won the glory, but the competitive Bloody Empire was empty-handed, which was particularly annoying.

Raizen still maintained the calm momentum, but there was a layer of gloom in the depths of his pupils.

After 4 days of fierce competition, the Group B competition finally came to an end. Next, the real highlight was about to be staged, the Group A master contest.

The first was the potion master contest.

The favorites to win the championship were the presidents of the Potioneer Association of the 3 empires, Angegille (the Dark Shadow Empire), Wilson (the Bloody Empire), and Aldas (the Fallen Angel Empire). Aldas was an old minister who originally followed Shea in the Dark Moon. After Shea ascended the throne, she promoted the dark elf. In comparison, the experience of this president was not as good as the first 2 . Of course, Aldas also had an incredible and remarkable record of killing the genius potioneer (actually a master) Andrew with a fart. Coupled with the participation of many well-known masters, this match was full of suspense.

The preliminaries of the master contest were white potion.

White potion belonged to high grade potion and was regarded as the benchmark of potion master. Generally, if a potioneer wanted to be promoted to a potion master, in addition to challenging the existing masters, the formal channel was to pass the assessment of the Potioneer Association. 1 of the most difficult and most important items was to produce the white potion within the specified time. Of course, in such large-scale competitions, the strength of the master level was recognized by many masters, and they could also become masters directly, such as the 3 potioneers of the previous Group B.

White potion was divided into 4 categories, buff type, enchantment type, recovery type and destruction type.

The buff types include Strength Potion, Wind Walk Potion, Iron Wall Potion, and Spirit Potion.

Enchantment potion included equipment enchantment potion, single element magic enhancement potion, and single element magic defense potion.

Recovery types included body recovery potion, essence recovery potion, magic recovery potion, strong healing potion, and others.

As the name suggests, the destructive type was dominated by poison potion. Due to the large demand and high income, some people had once found another way to advance to the grand master with poison. This category has become the main focus of many potion masters.

White potions had time limits, and many had associated side effects.

The rules of the preliminaries were very simple. In 1 hour, produce the highest purity white potion of any type. Half of the masters would be eliminated in this preliminary. There were 56 masters participating in the competition, so those who were ranked after the 28th in purity would be eliminated.

People’s eyes were focused on the potion crafting tables, each of which was separated by a special enchantment to avoid mutual interference. As the game began, the potion masters who had been adjusting themselves quickly got into work.

Pharmaceutics was a very rigorous discipline where a slight difference could cause a huge difference. Sometimes even the slightest error in the dosage could lead to completely different consequences. Due to the complexity of the preparation of white potion, plus the time and purity requirements, it was inevitable that some people would make mistakes under tension. A crafting table was suddenly filled with smoke, and a fire explosion was faintly visible. After the smoke dissipated, a disgraced lich master appeared in everyone’s sight. His hair was scorched. This unfortunate guy was a contestant from the Fallen Angel Empire, Master Kemp, who used to bribe Chen Rui with 50 purple crystal coins to obtain Aldas’ ‘secret formula’.

The intensity of this explosion was so strong that the lich master fell to the ground. Although his life was not in danger, he could no longer make the potion. With the help of the staff, he left the arena in despair.

There was also a muffled explosion sound from the crafting table on the side. Another great demon master followed the footsteps of Master Kemp, but this contestant was much tougher than Kemp. He didn’t even look at the injuries on his body, and he immediately took out a set of new instruments from the space equipment and continued crafting.

The 1-hour competition came to an end quickly. Under the enchantment power, all the potion masters stopped working. The staff labeled the potions configured by the masters and sent them to the 3 appraisal masters in the jury panel.

There were magic televisions with giant screens on all sides of the royal arena, on which the names of all participating potion masters were displayed. With the judgment of the appraisal masters, the names and purity of potions began to appear behind the names of the potion masters, and the rankings were constantly changing.

Angegille – Spirit Potion 87.4.

Wilson – vicious poison potion 87.2.

Aldas – Strength potion 87.1

Panukee – acid potion 83.2

Rochester – heart rot potion 82.9

…

The results came out soon. The top 3 were the 3 most popular association presidents, and their potion purity reached the level of 87. It was already a very high level, which was obviously much higher than the 4th place of 83. The 3 masters were almost the same, and they should be at the same level. This also silenced those who had been questioning Aldas’ abilities.

At the end of the first round of preliminaries, there were only 28 masters left on the field, and there was only a half-hour rest in between, and the second round of preliminaries began immediately. The content of the second round was a racing competition. They had to make 3 kinds of white potions with a purity of more than 70. The 8 masters who finish first would enter the final.

The requirements of this round were higher than the previous round, and more people had been eliminated. From the interpretation of the rule, in addition to skills, strategy must also be emphasized. Too much speed would cause purity mistakes and failure. Blind pursuit of purity would delay time, and would cause one to be eliminated as well. This required a balanced grasp.

This round was related to the candidates for the finals to compete for the championship. With the announcement of the start, the masters on the stage began to produce.

At the VIP table, the little maid succubus stared nervously at the masters and asked aside, “Athena, which one do you think is Saman?”

There was a soundproof enchantment around the VIP seats, so Kia wasn’t worried about being overheard.

Athena was also looking at the situation on stage carefully. She shook her head, “I don’t know, but Saman will definitely be 1 of the 8 who will make it to the final.”

“Athena, don’t be fooled by habit and appearance. Saman may not be among these 8 people.” It was Isabella who was wearing a cloak and a veil. This time, except for Zola, who was in closed-door training, almost all of Chen Rui’s relatives and friends were present.

“Madam Aunt is right,” The languid voice was the nephew, “Did you not even see the shadow of the cunning Sir Uncle?”

“He’s really a cunning human.” Master Poison Dragon agreed with Roman’s adjective. When he raised the glass in his hand, the slime on the side immediately poured wine for him flatteringly. He also filled his own glass – This was the emerald jade wine specially made by Ms. Emerald Dragon, how could he not please Master Poison Dragon?

“Hmph!” The Royal Highness Little Princess, who expressed dissatisfaction with the title of ‘Sir Uncle’, waved a small fist, “Anyway, brother will win in the end!”

TL: Saman will literally lose in 1 second to the purchased good of the Super System…
