chapters.title: Chapter 819: Grand Master
chapters.body:
Chapter 819: Grand Master

As Isabella expected, when the potion master contest ended the next morning, the mysterious Saman still did not show up. Of course, the ‘cunning human’ as well.

The finals of the potion master contest could be considered exciting. No doubt, the presidents of the 3 empires’ Potioneer Association, were superior. Angegille’s buff potion was extremely outstanding with shocking purity and efficacy; Wilson was considered the strongest poison master. He even created a very vicious poison potion; Aldas was stable in all aspects. The 3 were once in a stalemate

In the final contest, the Dark Shadow Empire’s Angegille performed beyond his current level, crafting a powerful Iron Wall Potion with minimal side effects.

According to Panu, the chief arbitrator, this potion was very close to the ‘True Iron Wall Potion of black potions.’ That was to say, Angegille had unleashed a level that was very close to the threshold of grand master, which was the quasi-grand master level. Of course, this was only extraordinary level performance, so the state was not stable. Therefore, he could not be called a quasi-grand master.

With this bottle of potion, Angegille finally defeated 2 rivals and won the championship of the masters contest.

As the potion master contest was over,the public’s focus was on the final and most exciting game of the contest, the mechanic master contest.

Potion masters were low-key, and many had a notorious image for developing poisons. Thus relatively speaking, people were more familiar and fond of mechanic masters.

After the master-level mechanic made a successful or satisfactory work, he would usually name and engrave the name of the maker. A good piece of equipment would often be passed down through the ages. Meanwhile, the potion produced by potioneer, would be left with an empty bottle after drinking, even if it was a bottle of black potion.

The preliminaries for the mechanic master contest started in the afternoon. Seeing the famous masters whom they had only heard the names before walk into the arena, the atmosphere of the arena suddenly became high. When Master Fonsaq, the president of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association, entered the arena, he was greeted with loud cheers from the home audience.

Anderson, Rummenigge, Turia, Mavinna and others of the Bloody Empire all stepped forward to greet or nod when they saw the ‘disappeared’ Fonsaq. At first, ‘Richard’ was accepted as apprentice by Turia, then he later ‘betrayed’ him in order to expose Nate’s true face and finally ‘sacrificed’. Turia and his wife had been grieving for a long time because of this, and Turia’s daughter, Beluan, had become a quiet person because of this.

When Fonsaq heard Turia’s sentence, “You had a good apprentice”, he took a long time to realize that it was someone who was pretending to be ‘Richard’ instead of Sosa, who just became the champion of Group B. His facial expression suddenly seemed a little strange. It was the hug of his old friend, Xingxing, that brought him back to his senses.

Contrary to Fonsaq, the top mechanic master Nate was booed when he appeared. Even Turia and others who participated on behalf of the Bloody Empire showed their expressions of contempt while Fonsaq didn’t conceal the hatred in his eyes.

The mechanic master contest was divided into individual competitions and finals. The individual competition was a single-type mastery competition. After elimination, the top 3 in each type would be determined to enter the finals to determine the winner.

Coincidentally, Nate and Fonsaq drew the consecutive numbers, so both their mechanic tables were very close. Nate seemed to ignore the boos around him and Fonsaq’s hatred.

Ill reputation and disgraced were a true portrayal of him now. If it wasn’t for the halo of a top mechanic master on his head, he wouldn’t even be eligible for an amnesty to participate this time.

The winner takes it all. No matter what, this halo must be preserved. 3 contests have been carried out. The potioneer contest and the master contest champion was won by the Dark Shadow Empire. The winner of the mechanic competition belongs to the Fallen Angel Empire. The Bloody Empire, which has gotten championships in many areas in the past, has not had any success yet. This is putting shame on the Bloody Empire’s emperor’s face.

Once we fail the mechanic master contest again, I don’t know how other mechanical masters will be punished, but I, Nate. Mammon, have absolutely no choice but to die.

In order to regain glory and future, in order to save my life, I must win this battle! Nate’s eyes suddenly glowed with a strong light. He concentrated all his mind, truly regaining his top mechanic state and confidence.

“Fonsaq, you are lucky that you didn’t die back then.” Nate looked at Fonsaq contemptuously, “No matter what, I will always be number 1.”

This sentence was actually more of a psychological tactic of deliberately angering the opponent. Many viewers heard this arrogant provocation, and the boos became louder. Fonsaq stared at Nate with hateful eyes as if he wanted to kill him.

At this time, Tetenis, who was walking to the back mechanic table, suddenly touched Fonsaq. Fonsaq seemed to wake up and looked at the audience stand in the distance, where his current wife, Lisa, and 2 beloved daughters, Eve and Alian, were. The dark elf master took a few deep breaths, and the hatred in his eyes subsided. He sneered, “Let’s not talk about your despicable means of improving your skills, the so-called ‘number 1’ is just taking advantage of the rule. When it comes to a single-specialization, your metal mastery is not as good as Master Anderson’s, your leather ,astery is not as good as mine, and as for accessories… you are not qualified to be on a par with master level.”

“Winning is winning, losing is losing.” Nate said proudly, “I’m still number 1 after this competition, and it will be the same in the future.”

According to the rule, the greatest threat was the trio-specialized genius ‘Arthur’. However, ‘Arthur’ did not appear in this competition. The remaining duo-specialized master Horford was Nate’s apprentice, and his strength had not yet reached the senior master level, so Nate was very confident of becoming the champion this time.

“You’re wrong.” Fonsaq suddenly revealed a secret smile, “Even if you have the advantage of duo-specialized rule, you won’t be able to get the first place today, dare you make this bet?”

Nate looked at the masters who participated in the competition. They were basically familiar faces from the previous masters contest. He didn’t think these people could surpass him in a short period of time. “What do you want to bet on?”

“Life.”

“Okay!” Fonsaq’s answer was in Nate’s expectation. No matter what tricks the opponent has, in this kind of competition, strength is always the only factor that determines the outcome. Furthermore, there are 3 empire leaders sitting on the throne. It is impossible to use tricks or fraud. It is a contest with high winning probability. Moreover, if I don’t win, I will die. As long as I win, I can take Fonsaq’s life, which is a great achievement no matter how I look at it. So Nate agreed without hesitation.

Witnessed by many mechanic masters, the 2 sides signed a soul contract. Before the competition started, such an exciting scene occurred, and the atmosphere of the arena set off a climax again. Most people supported Fonsaq while some people thought that Fonsaq was too impulsive because in terms of strength and rule, Nate was still the most popular candidate to win the championship.

After signing the contract. Fonsaq didn’t bother anymore. He quickly adjusted his state and was ready to face the real challenge. Master Xingxing seemed to be confident about the bet of his best friend because he was one of the few people who knew the strength of the Tetenis as the quasi-grand master of all elements. Even if the cunning ‘Aguile’ were not around, Nate would definitely lose to Tetenis.

However, Xingxing didn’t know that Tetenis had successfully moved beyond the realm of quasi-grand master to become a true grand master not long ago.

After an episode where the 2 masters bet on their lives, the mechanic master contest officially began.

As expected, after elimination matches, the names of Nate, Fonsaq, Anderson, Rummenigge, Tetenis, Xingxing and others were on the roster for the finals.

The first place in the single type competition was Leather Mastery Fonsaq, Metal Mastery Anderson, and Jewelry Mastery Tetenis. Nate chose Leather Mastery in the elimination matches, and he was second only to Fonsaq. He was not anxious because of this because tomorrow’s finals rule was extremely favorable to him, he was confident to turn things around.

On the final day, the sky was very clear without a single cloud, and the 2 moons glowed brightly.

The final rule adopted a point system. Each master produced 3 items within the specified time, and each item was evaluated. The one with the highest total score was the champion, that was, the top mechanic master.

In addition to quality, craftsmanship and attribute, the grading criteria for the items would have additional scores for multi specialization. Of course, if the corresponding standards were not met, the scores obtained were not as good as single-element items. In all fairness, Nate’s metal proficiency and leather proficiency had reached a very high level of senior masters, second only to the top level of Anderson and Fonsaq, so the additional scores was very high. This was the most important reason for him to win the previous masters contest championship.

The finals had finally started. After a long wait, the masters finally completed their respective works. The atmosphere of the arena suddenly reached a climax. Most of the audience were laymen. What they cared about as audiences was that they could witness the creation of legendary grade equipment with their own eyes.

Anderson’s first item was ‘Split Slash’. Metal long sword, quasi-legendary grade, increase strength by 31%, slash damage by 32%, and add ‘sharpness’. 75 points.

The second item was ‘Gloomy’. Metal dagger, quasi-legendary grade, increase movement speed by 35%, increase wielding speed, double poisoning effect. 77 points.

The third item was ‘Splendid Moon’. Metal shield, legendary grade, increase projectile defense by 35%, melee combat resistance by 40%, slow stamina recovery. 91 points. The final total score was 243.

Fonsaq’s first item was ‘Shade’. Leather cloak, legendary grade, increases movement speed by 41%, wind element magic buff by 40%. 92 points.

The second item was ‘Guardian’. Leather armor, quasi-legendary grade, reduce magic damage by 31%, increases defense against blunt weapon by 35%, and ‘mirror’ which greatly increases the attack reflect chance. 79 points.

The third item was ‘War Intent’. Leather gloves, quasi-legendary grade, increase weapon wielding speed by 30%, magic resistance by 30%, poison immunity. 78 points. The final total score was 249.

Xingxing scored a total of 223; Rummenigge scored a total of 217…

Although Fonsaq was temporarily ranked 1st, Nate was calmer because whether it was Anderson or Fonsaq, although their skills were indeed outstanding, the 3 items were still only single-specialization. His crafting process was very smooth just now, and he had reached the peak stage status. Among these 3 items, 2 were metal proficiency, and 1 was leather proficiency. Even if the basic score was slightly lower than Anderson and Fonsaq, there was an extra 50 points, so he could still safely be number 1.

No doubt, Nate’s score was out. The basic score was 229, the extra score was 50, and the total score was 279, surpassing Fonsaq and ranking first.

“Haha! As I said, I’ll always be number 1, now or in the future!” Nate’s tense nerves relaxed, revealing undisguised ecstasy, “Fonsaq, you lost! I’ll take your life!”

The audience was restless for a while. Top mechanic master Nate no doubt lives up to his reputation. He actually surpassed Fonsaq. According to the contract, Fonsaq’s life…

Fonsaq didn’t show the slightest panic, but gave Nate a disdainful look, “Don’t forget the content of our gambling agreement, I’m betting that you won’t win the first place, not that I win the first place. This contest is not over.”

“Still trying to struggle?” Nate laughed wildly, “Who else besides me…”

Before he could finish speaking, the appraisal master’s exclamation suddenly came from the arbitration panel. Nate was shocked, just in time to catch a glimpse of Fonsaq’s sneer, and an ominous premonition surged in his mind.

Many masters flocked to the arbitration panel with excitement. That near-rude gaffe, almost ignoring the highest leaders of the 3 empires.

The leaders of the 3 empires also expressed surprise as a name appeared on the big screen.

Tetenis.

The first item was untitled, metal pocket knife, excellent grade, 107 points.

The second item was untitled, leather cap, excellent grade, 109 points.

The third item was untitled, magic ring, excellent grade, 103 points.

Base score 319, trio-specialized extra scores 100, final total score, 419.

Tetenis, who had always been known for being proficient in accessories, was actually trio-specialized! And the points were over 100! The most incredible thing was that these equipment were only excellent grade!

The originally noisy arena suddenly became quiet, and the audience’s first reaction was shock. Cheating?

Impossible! Who dares to cheat in front of the leaders of the 3 empires?

That’s right, no one dared to cheat so blatantly. Nate immediately denied the conjecture. According to the rating standards of the appraisal masters, even the top legendary grade equipment cannot exceed 100 points, but quality is not the only criterion for scoring. If this score is not cheating, there is only 1 possibility… Nate suddenly shivered.

There was already a master here shouting, “Grand master! It’s a grand master!”

In an instant, the audience was in a commotion. The Demon Realm has not had a grand master for nearly 10,000 years, and now a mechanic grand master emerges!

Compared with the frenetic atmosphere of the arena, Nate was in despair. Whether it was trio-specialized or duo-specialized, it would be eclipsed in front of the word ‘grand master’. He finally understood why Fonsaq so confidently gambled his life with him previously.

TL: When will Saman and Chen Rui compete?

chapters.title: Chapter 820: The Real Start
chapters.body:
Chapter 820: The Real Start

Facing the debut of the mechanic grand master, the audience was full of joy to witness this historic moment.

The ‘top mechanic master’ Nate had completely collapsed. He fell to the ground with a dreadful face. Tetenis, whom he had always thought was only proficient in accessories, turned out to be the grand master of all aspects! There was no suspense at all about the outcome of this competition. Whether it was Raizen’s means or the power of the contract, his life would end in a disgraceful way.

Only a few people at the scene noticed Nate, who was like a drowned dog, and everyone’s focus was on the newly advanced grand master. Tetenis’ face showed indifference. His true joy had already been shown and shared in front of Chen Rui, Aldas, Lisa and other relatives, so his mind was peaceful now.

Under everyone’s attention, Tetenis walked to an open space. Just when everyone thought he was going to say something, a table suddenly appeared in front of Tetenis. It was filled with various reagents and instruments. Some people had recognized that this was the potion crafting table!

The people realized something. In an instant, everyone was silent at the same time as they stared at the crafting table, especially those potion masters and potioneers.

Tetenis’ hands moved. It was not very fast, but it was very natural; every move was smooth. As soon as the expert made a move, the flowing movement made all the potion masters, including Angegille, who had just won the potion master contest, hold their breaths at the same time, lest they miss a single detail.

The first was a bottle of white potion, then a lot of materials were added ‘casually’ in the white potion. According to the general knowledge of potion, white potion was already the final mixed solution to form the structure, and it was also the last step of ordinary potion. If materials were added arbitrarily, it would cause a mess which scrapped the potion or even cause an explosion.

However, the fragile and sensitive white potion was highly-flexible like a well-behaved mud ball in the hands of Tetenis. After several repetitions, the liquid potion that was poured into the medicine bottle turned black in the end.

Black potion?

Not every bottle of dark or black potions can be called black potions, but what about the one that this mechanic grand master just crafted? Or… he is more than just a mechanic grand master?

The 3 senior appraisal masters came to the potion crafting table. Panu, the chief arbitrator, picked up the bottle of black potion and looked at it carefully. The other 2 masters poured in various instruments to conduct various testing experiments, and they finally reached a unanimous consensus. Panu announced loudly, “This is the True Spirit Potion of the Demon Realm that has been lost for nearly 10,000 years!”

True series potions? It is really black potion!

This time even the 3 empires’ rulers were moved. The atmosphere in the arena reached a climax again. A grand master in pharmaceutics and alchemy! An all-round alchemy grand master!

Another great scene that is enough to go down in history! It is rare to find this kind of grand master of all aspects even in hundreds of thousands of years!

Compared with the shock of the 2 rulers, Shea seemed a lot calmer. She really didn’t know that Tetenis became the grand master of the 2 fields. However, since she was ‘his’ teacher, it was reasonable to create miracles. Everything about ‘him’ was more or less about ‘miracles’, including the entire Fallen Angel Empire.

“Sir grand master. Panu, the chief arbitrator, sounded through the audience with his magically amplified voice, “You have created a great miracle, do you have anything to say to the witnesses present?”

The jubilant audience fell silent one after another, wanting to hear what the grand master had to say.

Tetenis took a deep look at Panu, “I shall borrow a phrase from Master Fonsaq, this competition is not over yet…”

Panu showed a puzzled expression, “What do you mean?”

“You know better than anyone else.” Tetenis looked at him coldly, “Sir, or should I call you by another name?”

“Oh?” Panu’s eye glowed strangely, only 1 eye; the other was dull. His voice became hoarse, “My camouflage item has reached the level of quasi-artifact. Even the 3 empires’ rulers didn’t notice the abnormality. How did you recognize me?”

“Gaze, when you induced my Teacher Lunce to a duel, it was the same gaze that was full of cruelty and twisted excitement.” Tetenis’ eyes were full of sneer and hatred, “Your intention was simple. The higher you praise me now, the harder I will fall later. Am I right, Panu… No, Panu’s impostor, Saman!”

For the arena audience, the name Saman was very unfamiliar. Only those senior potion masters vaguely remembered something, but the audience could hear clearly that the referee ‘Panu’ was actually impersonated by a guy named Saman, and this person also wanted to harm the newly promoted grand master!

“Haha!” “Panu” revealed a piercing hoarse laughter, “Tetenis, you did not disappoint me indeed. You are much better than your teacher. You can actually get to this point, duo-specialized grand master! It’s a pity that you are no longer officially qualified to compete with me. I will follow the rules of imprint and first harvest the life of your beloved apprentice! Then… if you want revenge, you might as well bet your life with me. I will beat you with your best skills in front of everyone and stomp your so-called all-round grand master under my feet! I want the entire Demon Realm to know who is truly the most powerful grand master!”

Everyone understood now. Saman is going to challenge Grand Master Tetenis and his apprentice! And from the tone of the conversation between both sides, this person seems to be an extremely powerful grand master?

This is definitely even more shocking news. The Demon Realm has not had any grand masters for nearly 10,000 years, and 2 grand masters appeared all of sudden!

“You’ll have an answer soon.” Tetenis showed strong confidence.

“Hmph! You have just barely stepped on the threshold of grand master, but your confidence is inflated blindly. I will make you fall from the cloud completely, but the first thing to finish the guy who accepts the imprint. Could it be that he has already chosen to escape foolishly? Didn’t you tell your apprentice that escaping a duel that is already attached to an imprint would result in an immediate punishment?”

“I’ve been here the whole time.” A voice sounded, “It’s just that there’s something wrong with your eyes that you haven’t noticed. Oh, I forgot, you’re blind in 1 eye… If I remember correctly, This eye should have been taken down by Grand Master Rosenburg himself 9,000 years ago. Unfortunately, that the sir grand master, who was being betrayed, could only blind 1 eye of his ungrateful apprentice by exhausting his life.”

Saman turned his head sharply, and he saw the appraisal master beside him changing rapidly, turning into a masked man in the cloak.

VIP seat.

The eyes of Athena and others lit up at the same time, and Master Poison Dragon excitedly took a sip of wine, “Haha, the same unexpected appearance, that cunning bastard finally appears!”

Ms. Black Dragon was working hard to munch the delicious food that Alice brought. Hearing this, she raised her head and asked vaguely, “Boss?”

As soon as she looked up, half of the barbecue beside her was silently taken away by a translucent ‘hand’.

“You’re the cunning bastard!” Alice snatched a plate of hoofs and a plate of braised pork in front of Paglio and handed them to Olypheus. She immediately left an impression of a good person in Ms. Black Dragon.

Master Poison Dragon lost more than that. Just when he was distracted, another plate of fried balls was taken by the translucent hand.

“I agree on the terms cunning and bastard, plus despicable and insidious.” The one who complained was the mean little mermaid princess who was reluctantly dragged into the group of relatives and friends by her good friend naga girl.

“I agree with the terms despicable and insidious, plus lust and shamelessness, as well as

many beautiful adjectives…”

It was naturally the villain nephew who was full of jealousy, but his Envy Royal Family lover sneered, “Would you like to add ‘playboy’? The specific time was yesterday evening, and the location was Leilan Tavern?”

The nephew villain suddenly became mute. Obviously, this news was disclosed to the niece-in-law and subordinate of the second-level intel agency by Madam Aunt, who controlled the capital intel. Unfortunately, Madam Aunt’s attention at the moment was all on the man in the cloak, ignoring the resentment in her nephew’s eyes.

“Why are you all not worried about Sir Chen Rui at all?” The naga girl asked timidly.

“That kind of scourge is not worth worrying about, especially when careful planning is made. Instead, the worrying one is Saman… Dodo, you bastard!” The last sentence was obviously that the translucent ‘hand’ was caught red-handed by Master Poison Dragon.

In the arena.

Saman’s face was full of surprise. Although the person in front of him was wearing a mask and he couldn’t see his face, the familiar rule breath was unmistakable. It was the owner of the other half of the imprint!

Grand Master Rosenberg’s name had made many alchemist masters who were familiar with history understood that this Saman was actually the rebel apprentice who killed his master Rosenberg and fled 9,000 years ago! He is still alive after over 9,000 years!

“Arthur? Why are you able to conceal the imprint’s breath?” Saman asked in shock because imprints could sense each other. Tetenis’ apprentice has been lurking beside me, and I didn’t even notice!

Unlike Saman’s shock, the arena audience’s shock was toward Saman’s calling of the man in the cloak.

When the man in the cloak appeared just now, that kind of costume reminded many people of Her Majesty Empress’s newly married Royal Highness Prince Consort, but Saman surprised everyone. He directly revealed the true identity of the man in the cloak — Arthur!

Only 1 person can be a student of the all-around Grand Master Tetenis, to have the qualification to compete with Saman who is suspected to be the grand master, and to be called ‘Arthur’ – the brightest star in the Dark Shadow Empire’s mechanic competition, trio-specialized genius master!

Not only other people, but even masters such as Anderson and Rummenigge of the Dark Shadow Empire showed unbelievable expressions. Arthur, who has been missing for several years inexplicably, actually appeared!

‘Arthur’ was the name Chen Rui used to accept the imprint. Looking at Saman, who had recovered his one-eyed great demon form, Chen Rui replied indifferently, “It’s just an attempt at a power application. As you wish, we will put an end to this 10,000 years of grievances today, and I will use your life to pay homage to the heroic spirit of the 2 grand masters and the past inheritors.”

“Ignorant trash!” Saman had regained his composure, “You still don’t understand the difference in strength between us? If it’s your teacher, maybe I will be more serious.”

“Stop talking nonsense.” Chen Rui met Saman’s sinister gaze without fear, “The real duel starts now.”

TL: This is getting real spicy…

chapters.title: Chapter 821: The Battle Of The Strongest Grand Masters
chapters.body:
Chapter 821: The Battle Of The Strongest Grand Masters

From the bet between Nate and Fonsaq to the debut of Grand Master Tetenis, to the duel agreement between Tetenis’ apprentice and the mysterious Grand Master Saman – the trio-specialized genius master ‘Arthur’ who once disappeared, this mechanic master contest could be described as twists and turns, one climax after another.

Not only the people in the stands, but the audience in front of the magic television also quieted down as they waited for the most exciting showdown.

Under Tetenis’ signal, everyone in the field stepped back and made way for an open space.

“If it wasn’t for the imprint’s rule, I don’t need to do anything for an ant-like character like you.” Saman looked at Chen Rui contemptuously as a golden light shone from his body.

Chen Rui didn’t explain either. He used the Evil Pupil’s power to seal the breath of the imprint. Now, since he wanted to defeat Saman in an open and honest way, he naturally no longer suppressed it and allowed half of his imprint power to fly out of the body.

The 2 golden lights combined together, and the space where the 2 were located appeared partially shifting like glass that refracts light. The sound and image could still be transmitted. This was the independent space of imprint.

Chen Rui learned from the information in the imprint that this was a space that contained the mysteries of law and advanced ancient runes. Both sides of the battle would set the rules, and the space would automatically decide the winner. In the end, only 1 person could leave alive.

“Ready to face death?” Saman had experienced this kind of duel more than once, and he seemed confident in his own power.

Chen Rui said calmly, “I’m not interested in chatting with people like you, so let’s set the rules now.”

“Blubbering confidence, I’ve seen too many guys like you. It’s nothing more than knowing that you will lose, but you are just trying to hypnotize yourself so that you look like you don’t have any fear of death.” Saman’s 1-eyed expression of disdain was even stronger. He had absolute confidence to win even if it was Tetenis who had advanced to the grand master level, let alone the apprentice of Tetenis.

Chen Rui shook his head, “I have always been afraid of death, so I will choose to conquer death to overcome my fear.”

“Ignorant trash!” Saman sneered coldly, “I know you have a title of trio-specialized mechanic master, I’ll give you a chance to perform. Let’s compete on mechanics for the first match, the stake is half of the vitality. How about that?”

“Agreed, the second is pharmaceutics?”

“Agreed! The stake is the other half of vitality, if you can win 2 matches in a row, then my life will automatically disappear, and the same is true for you. If you win 1 and lose 1, then we will enter the final of the third match. In the final, the bets of the first 2 rounds will be repeated. The bet will be repeated until 1 side loses completely.”

“Agreed.” Chen Rui nodded. When the 2 said ‘agreed’, a visible golden chain appeared from the space and entangled together into bizarre texts which formed a kind of rule. Under the conclusion of this rule, some states of each other, including the bet of vitality power, appeared in their minds simultaneously..

“What an amazing vitality power! No wonder he agrees to your request to delay the duel!” Saman couldn’t help expressing himself proudly as he laughed, “Although delaying the duel cost me 300 years of life, this time I will take at least 100 times the interest! You seem to have gained some kind of pharmaceutics insight in the imprint. You are indeed the apprentice of Tetenis. Unfortunately, you don’t understand that even if you fully comprehend the imprint and surpass Tetenis, you will only become the second Dawor. Even Dawor died at my hands, let alone you?”

“I heard from teacher that when you bet with his teacher, the bet is only once every 200 years. This time, how did you change the number from a specific number to a proportion?” Chen Rui frowned, and there was a faint light in his eyes which shrouded Saman, causing Saman to feel a sense of being seen through.

Chen Rui activated [Deep Analysis] with the power of Evil Pupil for a moment by following the rule of space. He finally revealed a realization expression, “You have innumerable undead powers on your body, this should be a symbiotic contract. Your contract partner should be undead! No wonder you can actually last undefeated for nearly 10,000 years. It turned out to be cheating by borrowing the lifespan of your symbiotic partner!”

Having that contract partner’s life meant that Saman almost had endless bets, plus his own power, he could naturally triumph in every battle.

This truth made Tetenis suddenly realize the truth. When thinking of his teacher who passed away, he couldn’t help clenching the fist in his hand.

“You can actually see through this secret!” Saman’s 1 eye gleamed bleakly, “Hmph! This doesn’t violate the imprint space rule. It’s not cheating at all. It’s those guys who are stupid! The winner takes it all. If you have this capability, you can also cheat amidst the rules as long as you can beat me!”

“Really? I can see more than this…” Chen Rui’s Evil Pupil channeled to the extreme, “I see! This symbiotic contract of yours is flawed, plus the punishment of the imprint rule, your undead companion’s life is not really immortal. His lifespan should only be less than 1,000 years. No wonder…”

Chen Rui finally understood why the lich instigated Saman to delay the time of the duel last time, because he coveted his powerful vitality which was far superior to that of Tetenis. Chen Rui didn’t know how long his life would be, but half of the lifespan he got from Paglio was at least about 100,000 years, so from Saman’s point of view, this transaction was definitely of great value.

“So what if you knew it?” Saman let out a sinister laugh, “Now that the rules are set, it only takes 2 matches, and your life is mine.”

Chen Rui smiled. Even through the mask, Saman could clearly feel the determination, “This kind of clever trick means nothing to me. Anyway, only 1 person can survive today. Whether it’s a trick or a conspiracy, it’s just a joke in front of absolute strength. After talking nonsense for so long, it’s time for our duel to begin.”

Saman didn’t expect that Tetenis’ apprentice really had the strength to compete with him, so he was also confident, “I should be the one saying this sentence. The first mechanics, best of 3. The content of the game is decided by rolling the dice.”

A 6-sided dice appeared in the air in front of Chen Rui. With a shift of thought, the dice had already turned. After the rotation, the dice shattered, and a word ‘1’ appeared in the air. The test was refining.

A mechanic table with various utensils and a Purple Star Iron metal minerals appeared in front of the 2 of them at the same time. Within an hour, whoever had the highest refining rate would win the round.

Refining was the purification process of removing the impurities and preserving the essence. It was also 1 of the most important basic skills of mechanics, especially the mechanic that was proficient in metal. This step would determine the quality of the entire equipment.

Chen Rui’s mind moved. If Saman can exploit the loopholes in the rules, and I can too. This first test is just nice to try if the Super System is suitable for this game. He turned on the smelter on the mechanic table. When the minerals were heated to red by the high temperature, he picked up the hammer and simply knocked down on the mineral.

When Saman saw Chen Rui’s actions, his contempt became stronger. The hammer in his hand began to tap the red-hot mineral. In the eyes of the mechanic masters, that kind of action seemed to have strange rationality and rhythm which could almost pull one’s soul. This movement alone could determine Saman’s strength already.

“Grand master!” A master had already exclaimed. His voice was heard by the audience and spread quickly.

Saman no doubt is a mighty mechanic grand master! Perhaps as he himself said, his strength is far above Tetenis!

Listening to the conversation between the 2 just now, it seems that they are engaged in a life-and-death gamble. There is almost no suspense between a master and a grand master. How will the trio-specialized genius master deal with it?

Saman could remain undefeated for 10,000 years. In addition to holding a huge number of cheating ‘betting chips’, his own skills were indeed extraordinary. Over the years, Saman had fully grasped the mystery of half of the imprint, and his strength was even higher than that of his original teacher, Rosenberg. Although he was quite disdainful of Chen Rui, he had not been neglectful. He hammered, refined, hammered again, and refined again… The volume of that mineral was also shrinking rapidly.

An hour later, a small round metal ball appeared on Saman’s mechanics stage. It seemed perfect with no holes or protrusions. Chen Rui didn’t seem to seize the time to further refine. Instead, he finished refining long ago, and he just watched Saman’s movements with interest. In front of him was a small metal cube.

The mechanic masters shook their heads. Not to mention the relatively clumsy movements of ‘Arthur’, judging from the shape of the refined product of the 2 alone, Arthur is obviously much inferior because impurities can easily accumulate at the corners of the cube. Only the round shape is a suitable shape for maximum refinement. No doubt there is no suspense in this duel.

Saman sneered at the small cube in front of Chen Rui, and the imprint space began to judge the outcome. The result was displayed directly in the space in the form of texts just like the result of the dice roll just now.

The refining degree of Saman was 86. Generally speaking, many materials could not be purified repeatedly after reaching a certain degree of purity. The Purple Star Iron was 1 of the most difficult materials to refine. Ordinary masters could reach the limit of refining degree of 70. It was quite remarkable for Saman to actually reach 86. This was still under the time limit of 1 hour. From Saman’s method, as long as there was enough time, the refining degree could be increased to 90 and above.

The masters were amazed. No matter what Saman’s character was, the grand master-level skills were indeed truly competent. However, this amazement only lasted for a few seconds, and it immediately turned into a shock after the results of ‘Arthur’ came out.

Arthur’s refinement, 100!

Saman was in disbelief and almost thought he saw it wrongly- What is the concept of 100? No matter what material it is, no matter how it is refined, there is always a trace of unavoidable impurities. For Purple Star Iron, the refining of 90 is almost the limit of what can be achieved by manual refining.

Today, however, this theory had become a living reality in front of him!

Saman was very clear that the decision of the imprint space was absolutely accurate. That mineral that was knocked a few times in a clumsy way really unbelievably achieved the highest purity that can only be achieved in theory! What kind of techniques and means can achieve this? Can the top great grand masters do it?

“What kind of cheating method did you use!” Saman couldn’t help shouting.

“The winner takes it all as long as the rule allows it, you said it yourself.” Chen Rui replied indifferently, knowing that as long as it was ‘transformed’ by his hand, it could be recognized by the rule!

Saman was panting heavily. His 1 eye seemed to shoot countless sharp blades to smash Chen Rui into pieces. He finally calmed down and began to roll the dice to decide the content of the second round. The content of the second round was, within 2 hours, use the specified materials to create a long sword of excellent quality, and then use the 2 swords to hit each other. Whoever’s sword breaks first would be the loser.

There were several main points of this rule. First, the specified materials could not be increased or decreased, which greatly limited the means of forging skills; second, excellent quality. Whoever exceeded or fell below this quality would be directly judged as the loser; Thirdly, hit each other, which required the selection of the most suitable balance between the hardness and toughness of the long sword, and the attribute must be good in attack.

Looking at the fixed sword embryos and materials on the mechanics stage, Chen Rui didn’t move any more thoughts and really calmed down. The refining just now was just an experiment, and now, it’s a real contest between the grand masters.

After Chen Rui was silent for a moment, he reached out to the hammer. Due to the previous accidental defeat, Saman was not in a hurry and kept observing Chen Rui’s movements.

The moment he saw Chen Rui stretch out his hand to hold the hammer, Saman’s pupils shrink suddenly: This action, this focus, this momentum… It’s completely different from the previous match. This is the feeling that a real grand master exudes!

The strength of this Arthur has unbelievably surpassed Tetenis. At least he has reached my level as the ‘grand master’!

The mechanic masters outside the field only took a few glances, and their eyes seemed to be attracted by it as if they were pulled by a whirlpool. Chen Rui’s movements seemed to be clumsy, and every detail revealed a vague breath of life. Under this breath, the sword embryo changed little by little into a long sword. This change was natural like a metamorphosis.

Judging on this alone, only the grand master can do it! That feeling, even ‘Arthur”s teacher, Tetenis’ previous actions, seemed to be far inferior.

No wonder ‘Arthur’ dared to bet his life with Saman. It turns out that he had already surpassed his teacher!

The mechanical president of the Dark Shadow Empire, Anderson, showed an extremely emotional expression. I haven’t seen him for just a few years. That trio-specialized genius master has become a real grand master that everyone looks up to!

Not only the masters, but all the audience present felt a feeling that they could not see clearly or could not understand the process of Chen Rui’s forging. They felt that the long sword was like a new sapling, rising and opening bit by bit from the buds. The branches and leaves were stretched until it became a towering tree.

This was a wonderful feeling. Some people even get an unexpected insight because of this.

Saman couldn’t help being shocked, but he immediately calmed down and started his forging.

2 hours was not a short time, but the royal arena was very quiet, lest it disturbed the 2 people in the imprint space. Unlike the previous round, this time almost everyone’s minds were full of expectations for the unknown result because this was a contest between 2 grand masters who represented the highest stage level of the Demon Realm, and only 1 of them could survive in the end.

Find out what happens next by getting early access to chapters with Patreon! Please do check out the community goal in our Patreon as well! Thanks for the support! Click here to access our Patreon page.

chapters.title: Chapter 822: Rule Loopholes?
chapters.body:
Chapter 822: Rule Loopholes?

The waiting time was always long, especially for the laymen to watch the experts. However, in front of the ‘rhythm’ of the 2 grand masters, time seemed to pass very fast. Before the audience could properly grasp the wonderful feeling, 2 hours had passed.

There were 2 swords on the mechanic tables in front of Chen Rui and Saman. If they hadn’t seen it with their own eyes, they would have thought that the 2 swords were made by the same person because the length, shape, and even the feeling of the 2 swords were almost the same. Although they were both excellent grade, they looked ingenious.

The reason why the 2 long swords had the same feeling was that the judgments and choices of the 2 grand masters were strikingly similar. The specifications of the 2 swords should be the best choices that could meet those fighting conditions within 2 hours.

However, just as only 1 of them could survive in the end, only 1 of the 2 swords could remain.

Up next was the result of this match.

The 2 swords slowly levitated, affecting the mood of countless audiences. The 2 swords turned into 2 rays of light, colliding with each other swiftly. Under the sparks, the hearts of the audience continued to tremble.

After striking more than 10 times, there was finally a ‘ding’ sound. 1 sword was broken into half and fell down while the other 1 persisted to the end despite the multiple cracks.

The sword flew slowly in front of Chen Rui, and the audience cheered. The trio-specialized genius master… No, grand master ‘Arthur’ won!

Compared with the mysterious 1-eyed grand master, the genius grand master who was once famous in the Demon Realm was obviously easier to be accepted and supported by the audience.

In the first game, the mechanic match, Arthur won 2-0!

The power of rule came into play immediately, and Chen Rui felt a burst of vitality coming from Saman. The light in Saman’s 1 eye suddenly dimmed, and he looked a lot haggard.

I lost the first match! Saman’s hand trembled slightly. It has been 5,000 years. Since the gambling battle started 5,000 years ago, I have never lost a round. Everything was under my control. I can’t believe that in the first match today, I actually lost to this opponent who should be less than 30 years old!

“Why?!” Saman growled, “The materials, techniques, and attributes are almost the same. Why does my sword break?!”

“No matter how shameless your character is, but after all, you are a grand master, so I will let you understand.” Chen Rui said indifferently, “Although our materials, techniques, and others are almost the same, I have 1 most important thing that you don’t have, which is an understanding of the sword. What you have is an understanding to craft the weapon whereas I understand the ‘sword’ itself, because — my weapon is the sword! Therefore, the sword I created is more alive than yours. To be precise, the level between us is quite similar, but such a small gap is enough to decide the outcome.”

Those mechanic masters only felt that these words contained the truth of the grand master level. Although there were many things they didn’t understand, they were still fascinated and ecstatic.

Saman’s grand master-level strength was not for nothing. He soon understood the reason for his failure, took a deep breath, and showed a very solemn look in his eye, “I admit that I underestimated you before. Your strength has far surpassed Tetenis. Even I must take you seriously. You’re indeed a genius and a powerful grand master. Unfortunately, you are destined to be only my stepping stone. Your life, your honor, and everything you have will belong to me.”

“The only thing that can ‘belong to you’ is failure.” Chen Rui smiled indifferently, “The potion battle is next, don’t you need a break? Grand Master Saman?”

Saman sneered coldly, “Don’t be too complacent. Although your pharmaceutics doesn’t have much reputation, I believe that you, like Tetenis, have reached the potion grand master level. My pharmaceutical attainments are far above mechanical skills. I will not give you any chance and take back the vitality that I just lost.”

In fact, many people in the audience had already guessed that ‘Arthur’, in addition to the mechanic grand master, should also be the potion grand master. He was an all-round grand master. It was rare to find 1 in hundreds of thousands of years, and there were 3 this time. Furthermore, they were teacher-apprentice and arch enemies who were about to have a life and death battle. No matter what the result was, it would leave a strong mark in the history of the Demon Realm.

Today’s shock was enough. The audience was now more looking forward to the outcome of this battle.

“This kind of naive psychological tactic can only expose your guilty conscience. Perhaps this is your self-attempt to calm down the tension?” A determined laughter sounded behind Chen Rui’s mask, “What I want to remind you is that you can no longer lose again.”

Saman didn’t speak any more. Taking a deep breath, he became concentrated. After stabilizing his mind, he started the potion battle.

It was also a best-of-3 rule. The first match was crafting black potions ‘Eternal Power’. The first to complete would win.

This match had widened the eyes of many viewers. If True series black potions was the entry potion of potion grand master, then Eternal series potions was the advanced potion. The buff of True series potions was temporary. Compared with the white potion, it doubled the effect and had no side effects. Furthermore, the Eternal series potions buff the attribute forever. As for the resurrection potion and the longevity potion, which were the highest grade potions, only the legendary great grand master could make it. The means of the real great grand master were no longer limited to these types of black potions. It was said that they could produce God potions that made the gods fearful. However, these were ancient legends with an old history, and the authenticity needed to be investigated. The Eternal series potions in front of them now were the most attractive.

The imprint space gave many herbs, and both parties could choose to mix them. The formula of potion was not static. In addition to the basic formula of the main body, many aspects including materials, steps, techniques, etc. could have subtle differences and improvements. This was also the reason potions had a difference in purity. The same potion made by different potioneers could have different formulas. The same was true for black potions. The key was the effect of the potions.

This was different from the previous refining test. The refining was to put the materials provided by the space into the Super System for processing. This time, if he directly exchanged the potion without using the materials in the imprint space too, it would probably not be recognized by the rule of the space. Besides, Chen Rui also had his own experience in the preparation of Eternal series potions, so he decided to start the manual crafting after thinking quickly.

The potion grand masters emphasized the word ‘realm’. The fusion of the whole potion was like the original existence, but the potioneer lifted the veil on it little by little. When Chen Rui exited this immersive realm after the making of ‘Eternal Power’, he found that Saman actually ended a long time ago.

In the first round of potion battle, ‘Arthur’ lost!

Judging from the time given by the space, Saman’s speed was twice as fast as him. In other words, when Chen Rui was only halfway, Saman had already completed it.

“This speed is too unconventional…” Chen Rui’s eyes were fixed on the material in front of Saman. He seemed to understand something when he realized that the material for the potion body did not seem to move, “You pre-made the main ingredient of the various potions before the duel? Is this kind of cheating allowed as well?”

“You actually found it out so quickly.” Saman said with a gloomy smile, “To be precise, I made it yesterday because the main ingredient’s medicinal effect has a strict time limit, and it will expire if it exceeds the time. This imprint rule allows it as long as the final product is newly made in the space. I have to praise you that you are fast enough just now. If I really compete with you, I have a good chance of losing.”

“It is allowed as long as the finished product is the latest ‘production’?” Chen Rui nodded slowly, “I understand. You have won this round.”

“You’re the most powerful opponent I have ever met. Not only in strength, but also in reaction and scheming.” Saman’s 1 eye narrowed and his smile became more and more smug, “Unfortunately, you are at a disadvantage because it is your first time participating in the duel. For thousands of years, I have completely understood the rule and can freely use the rule to gain the greatest advantage – It doesn’t matter if you say that I am cheating. The winner comes first. If you can win like this, I will also die without complaint.”

“It’s not too late to understand the rules…” Chen Rui actually laughed, “I’ll let you ‘die without complaint’.”

“Isn’t it too late? Don’t tell me that you want to take a leave to go craft the main ingredient?” Saman sneered, “The main ingredient of potions is the most time-consuming, and it will lose its effectiveness after more than a day. I’m quite prepared for each potion. Whether it’s the potion battle or the final battle of the third match, I will definitely win the potion category! Even if it’s mechanics, it’s hard to tell the outcome between us. The only thing you can do is to pray that you can draw mechanics for the third match every time. However, I want to remind you that if you lose a match, you will lose half of your life, and you don’t have much luck.”

“Add a precondition to your last sentence, that is if you can persist until the third round.” Chen Rui shrugged, “Okay, let’s start the second match.”

Luck seemed to be on Saman’s side. In the second round when Chen Rui drew lots, it was a speed competition of producing black potions of any type with a purity of more than 90% within 2 hours.

After the time was up, the one with the required purity and the highest number would be the winner.

Saman was overjoyed. For him, this rule could maximize the means of cheating!

Anyway, the other party had already seen through it, so Saman simply took out the potion’s main ingredient that had been made in advance from the space ring and began to quickly craft the potions. In less than 1 hour, 4 bottles of True series potions were completed. At this time, he glanced at his opponent, ‘Arthur’, who was scrambling to prepare a bottle. Although he couldn’t see his expression, he could see his nervousness from his actions that were out of standard. He didn’t even prepare 1 bottle yet.

Saman quickened his speed as he secretly smugged.

The 2-hour time limit was coming to an end. Saman had made 10 bottles of True series potions, and the quality of each bottle had reached 90 which was already his peak performance. However, when he looked at Chen Rui’s potion crafting table again, his only eyeball almost popped out.

There were densely packed black potions which were at least 50 bottles by sight!

chapters.title: Chapter 823: The Last Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 823: The Last Battle

Not just Saman, even the audience was stunned. They didn’t see how ‘Arthur’ did it. Before they knew it, so many bottles of potions appeared on the table, and they were all black potions!

If these potions were to be placed in magic shops or trade fairs, they would definitely sell like hot cakes.

He made them beforehand, then took it out from the space ring? Yes, it must be like this!

Saman sneered: It’s true that there is a rule loophole in the imprint space, but it doesn’t mean that you can cheat like this. Since the time limit of this game is 2 hours, if the finished product was prepared 2 hours ago, it will be regarded as a failure.

The 2-hour time came to an end, and the space made the judgment.

Saman Completion Quantity: 10 bottles.

Arthur’s Completion Quantity: 52 bottles.

Arthur won the second match.

Saman was completely shocked. He almost wanted to dig out his only eyeball, polish it, and put it back on to see clearly: No matter what the process is, the judgment of the space will not be wrong. 52 bottles of black potions are actually made within 2 hours! And the quality is all over 90!

Cheating! Must be cheating!

However, Saman couldn’t imagine how these 52 bottles were made in 2 hours. Even if I cheated and prepared the main ingredient in advance, the maximum is a dozen bottles. How could Arthur craft so many?

Iactually unbelievably lost a sure-win battle in the aspect I was best at!

“One last step before you lose.” Chen Rui’s voice sounded, “Let’s start the third match. I will use your despicable life to pay homage to Grand Master Rosenburg who was killed by you and predecessors who were deceived.”

Looking at the dice floating in the air, Saman’s facial expression was a bit distorted, but the rules of space would not take this into account, and soon the dice started to roll. The content of the third round of potion match, perhaps also the last match, was out.

They would take the potions made by each other within the specified time. The first to admit defeat or the dead one would lose half the vitality. If there was no loser, it would continue until there was an outcome.

This competition method was actually the more common deathmatch between potioneers. Back then, Aldas poisoned the challenger, Sandro, in the deathmatch.

Saman’s expression was extremely solemn because he had been forced to the edge of the cliff. If I am poisoned, I will die directly: if I admit defeat, I will lose the entire imprint inheritance duel, resulting in death as well.

In contrast, ‘Arthur’ had a much wider choice. If he was not sure, he could simply concede defeat, and the 2 sides would have a final third match.

The death battle began. Both sides started crafting the potion first, then they would draw lots to decide who would drink the potion first.

Although the time for crafting the potion was limited, Chen Rui was not in a hurry to make it. Instead, he just set his eyes on Saman’s busy figure. After staring for a moment, he also started to work.

At this time, the 2 moons had already been dyed with a layer of light purple as the sky gradually became darker, and the arena turned on the lighting facilities. This grand master contest went on for more than 6 hours. None of the spectators who should have left the venue left. Shea temporarily ordered a large amount of food to be delivered to the audience for free, but the people were still staring at the unparalleled duel in the field.

The time limit for crafting was 30 minutes, and the time for testing was 10 minutes. At the end of the time, they started draw lots to decide who would try the medicine first.

Saman was unfortunate enough to be the first to try the potion. The bottle of dark green potion prepared by Chen Rui automatically flew in front of him. In an instant, all eyes focused on it.

Saman frowned when he looked at the bottle of potion, opened the cork and smelled it. Then, he prepared a bottle of antidote and drank it before he bottomed up the poison.

The moment Saman drank the potion, his body seemed to be in a virtual state like he could turn into a puff of smoke at any time. He gradually converged into a human shape in the end and was unharmed.

Chen Rui had been keeping an eye on Saman’s situation. The Evil Pupil was showing a faint brilliance. After Saman returned to his demon form, he seemed fine, but many of his hair and beard had turned into light smoke and disappeared. This bottle of potion’s poison was evident.

Saman showed a relieved expression on his face, and the bottle of dark gray potion that he made flew in front of Chen Rui.

The time to test the potion was 10 minutes where they could quickly make the antidote, but Chen Rui did not rush to do it, nor did he look at the bottle of poison. He just looked at Saman quietly, “I’m really surprised…”

Saman sneered coldly, “You are surprised that I wasn’t poisoned by your poison? It is undeniable that the poison in the potion just now was really vicious, and the main material seems to be extracted from some kind of highly poisonous dragon. Unfortunately, it is not enough to poison me.”

Saman’s judgment was right. The main ingredient of Chen Rui’s potion was Paglio’s venom. This venom used to easily turn the master-level potion genius Sandro into ashes, but it actually had no effect on Saman. Even the poison dragon in the VIP seat was a little surprised.

“I’m not surprised about this… It’s the secret of your physique.” Chen Rui’s eyes seemed to see through Saman’s mind, making him shudder. “I finally understand it. It turns out that more than 90% of your body is already transformed into an undead state. This should be caused by the contract flaw between you and that undead partner. Your body is almost completely rotten now, and you can abandon it at any time. As long as the soul is not damaged, no matter how violent the poison is useless. This kind of deathmatch is already unloseable to the undead body. “

Saman’s heart sank immediately. He never imagined that this opponent could actually easily see through his biggest secret.

“You must have been overjoyed when you got this content, so you were acting in the beginning. The antidote was fake; the tension and solemnity were fake too. The purpose was to entice me to compete with you instead of giving up and admitting defeat. Your bottle of poison must be a powerful poison that has gathered countless years of hard work. If I drink it, it is very likely that I will die immediately before I can admit defeat, so then you can win directly and achieve a miraculous comeback.”

Chen Rui paused and shook his head contemptuously, “Unfortunately, your acting is too overdone and flashy…”

“It’s really flashy. Deliberate performance looks gorgeous, but it has no real connotation. He didn’t act it with authenticity.” A certain little loli in the VIP seat shook her head like a film critic. Her friend, the naga girl, on the side showed admiration.

Saman’s facial expression was cold and stern, “Cowardly guy, you are just making an excuse to admit defeat. You don’t even have the guts to test potion. You don’t deserve to be called a grand master!”

“This kind of naive provocation method is more indicative of your inner urgency, but…” With that said, Chen Rui actually grabbed the potion bottle and opened the stopper, “I don’t want to drag till the third match with you.”

Under Saman’s amazed eyes, Chen Rui lifted his mask, revealing the appearance of the ‘genius mechanic master Arthur’, then he drank the bottle of poison.

This time everyone was in an uproar: He clearly knew the other party’s tricks, but he still drank the poison! By the way, ‘Arthur’ didn’t seem to even make an antidote just now!

The naga girl exclaimed and couldn’t help standing up, but she was grabbed by her friend, the little mermaid princess.

“Adeline, don’t be nervous.” The little mermaid princess pursed her lips, “Didn’t you see that these guys are just chilled out?”

“That’s right.” Master Poison Dragon said as he took a sip of wine indignantly, “Even if he dies in a woman’s belly, it’s absolutely impossible for him to die from poison.”

Long before this ‘cunning human’ had any strength, Master Poison Dragon had already experienced the hateful attribute of ‘poison immunity’ which was an attribute that was quite depressing for the poison dragon.

Chen Rui drank the poison in one breath, then he threw the bottle and smiled, “It doesn’t seem to taste very good. Next time, I suggest you improve the taste. Even if there is no aromatic millet wine taste, it needs to be closer to juice at least.”

Saman stared at Chen Rui’s face as he tried to find a sign of pain or poisoning from it, but to his disappointment, the other party’s face was normal without the slightest discomfort.

Saman’s expression changed from shock to disbelief: What I made is the strongest poison that can kill the giant dragon, but it actually has no effect on this terrifying enemy like boiled water!

“Okay, since it was a tie just now, let’s continue this deathmatch.” Chen Rui didn’t put on his mask and clapped his hands, “This is the last bet in your life.”

Both sides continued to draw lots. This time, Chen Rui tried the potion first, repeating the scene just now. He didn’t even need an antidote. Hehe just drank another poison produced by Saman like it was plain water.

Then, it was Saman’s turn to try the potion. This time, a bottle of black potion.

Saman opened the cork and took a sniff. Suddenly, he shuddered, and the hand holding the potion bottle trembled slightly.

His first reaction was disbelief, then he smelled it again and trembled more violently. Even his face seemed to fade.

“Impossible…” Saman muttered to himself as his hoarse voice suddenly showed a strange sharpness, “You can’t possibly make it!”

“Nothing is impossible.” Chen Rui shook his head gently, “As I said, this is the last battle of your life.”

As if Saman hadn’t heard Chen Rui’s words, he almost fell into madness, still shouting hysterically, “It must be my illusion! This can’t be a resurrection potion!”

The audience, who had been numb from too much shock, was extremely shocked after hearing the last 2 words. Many people couldn’t help but stand up; even Raizen and Frentz showing a shocking expression.

Resurrection potion!

The strongest grand master potion!

Arthur, mechanical grand master and potion…great grand master?

“Whether it’s a resurrection potion, you’ll know once you drink it.

“Chen Rui’s expression remained calm.”

“Drink it!” Almost all the audience members shouted in unison.

If it was really the legendary resurrection potion that could bring back the dead, it was a ‘poison’ that was more deadly than any poison for undead creatures.

chapters.title: Chapter 824: Olypheus’ Enemy
chapters.body:
Chapter 824: Olypheus’ Enemy

Saman’s hands trembled more and more, and his undead body had already felt the powerful restraint contained in this potion breath, a vigorous life energy that made him feel trembling from his soul. After all, he was a legit grand master, and he had basically concluded that this bottle was the legendary supreme black potion – resurrection potion!

The achievement of ‘Arthur’ is definitely not due to the half of the imprint because the strength he showed has far surpassed the creators of the imprint, the 2 grand masters of Lolo and Rosenberg! It also far surpassed me who thought I had no opponents!

A genius who is both a mechanic grand master and a potion great grand master… No, just using the word ‘genius’ can no longer describe this young man who should be less than 30 years old – this kind of unworldly person can be the most dazzling existence in any historical stage. I actually encountered such a character, and it is even in the last battle of the 10,000 years of life and death showdown!

Saman suddenly felt like he wanted to cry for a long time. Why did I agree to let this young man replace Tetenis in the duel?

But he didn’t have much time to regret it. 10 minutes of choice time was running out. If he drank this bottle of resurrection potion, his soul would be annihilated. If he didn’t drink it, he would completely lose the duel. The imprint space would take his remaining life. It was equally fatal.

At this moment, Saman’s 1 eye suddenly dimmed like a light that went out, then he seemed to have lost his vitality.

Suicide? Impossible! Chen Rui frowned, and he suddenly felt a terrifying breath emanating from Saman’s body. This strength instantly surpassed the Demon Overlord lemon, giving Chen Rui an extremely dangerous feeling.

Saman’s eyes slowly opened. Not 1 eye this time, but 2 eyes. The light that flickered in his pupils was like a cold flame.

“This incompetent guy is actually driven to such a desperate situation that I have to solve it myself!”

‘Saman”s voice was much lower as if he was a different person.

Chen Rui sensed the changes in the data in the [Analytical Eyes]. He raised his eyebrows slightly, and spoke up, “Are you Saman’s contract partner? I finally understand now. It turns out that you are in a symbiotic relationship! In other words, Saman is your life box. As long as I kill Saman, your soul will disappear completely even if you are an undead creature!”

“Hmph!” The dark flames in ‘Saman”s eyes flickered, “If I wasn’t dying and was forced to borrow his strength to convert to undead, how could I end up in this broken state due to the damn interference of that damn imprint!”

Chen Rui suddenly understood that the imprint in Saman’s body was equivalent to a kind of soul contract. 1 person could usually only accommodate 1 kind of contract. Even for Demi-Godpowerhouse, there was only 1 contract of each level, so when this ‘partner’ used the powerful strength to forcibly sign the contract, it was interfered with by the imprint, causing the contract to undergo some irreversible changes.

“I see. Because of the imprint, your life has been firmly tied to him, so you are no longer a real undead creature. No wonder you covet my life and would rather sacrifice 300 years of life to postpone the duel. Unfortunately, you have lost now unless you can drink this bottle of resurrection potion. The contestants in space are protected by the law, so you can’t hurt me.”

Many viewers stood up one after another after they noticed Saman’s anomaly in space. Paglio and others in the VIP seats also stopped joking and showed solemn expressions. Ms. Black Dragon, who looked at ‘Saman’ in space, trembled for some reason.

On the arbitration panel, Raizen’s eyes were fixed on ‘Saman’, and there was a hint of murderous intent in his squinted eyes.

“I don’t need to drink this bottle of potion.” ‘Saman’ sneered, “Don’t think that the law in the imprint space can completely limit me. If it wasn’t for the abnormal change of the contract, I would have destroyed this law already!”

With that said, there was a bit of greed intent in ‘Saman’ eyes, “Although my strength has been greatly weakened for thousands of years due to this reason, and reversing the law will cost almost all of my life force, but as long as I can devour your life force, it’s all worth it!”

With that said, countless black lightning emanated from ‘Saman’. The entire imprint space shook, and the power of rule protection in front of Chen Rui was constantly shaking.

On the arbitration panel, Raizen stood up suddenly with a clenched fist. He punched into the space. In Chen Rui’s Evil Pupil, the power of this punch seemed to be a bit more powerful than in the last battle of the Warlock Fortress. It seemed that Raizen’s strength had grown to a considerable extent after completely getting rid of the curse.

The reason for Raizen’s move was very simple. The historically rare super-grand master ‘Arthur’ was an extremely precious resource for the Demon Realm. Moreover, the opponent had already lost the duel and was trying to harm him with despicable means. Whether as an arbitrator or a ruler, he couldn’t sit back and watch.

If he saved the life of this great grand master, it might be an opportunity to recruit.

Under Raizen’s attack, cracks finally appeared due to the pressure from inside and outside space. The space collapsed after shaking greatly.

Chen Rui felt that the ‘golden chain’ that was tying him and Saman had become much weaker and could break at any time. Obviously, the imprint power was greatly weakened.

“Haha!” ‘Saman’ laughed loudly, “Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen, thank you so much. Just relying on my strength alone would cost a lot more to break through this law space. Without your help, it is impossible to cancel the constraints of space so easily!”

Only then did Raizen realize that the other party was deliberately inducing him to make a move. The killing intent in his gaze became greater. His fist glowed with bloody light as he threw another punch at ‘Saman’.

‘Saman’ stretched out his hand to block, and his body suddenly shook. There was a cracking sound from his arm, and the crack quickly extended along the arm. “Boom!” The whole body was cracked and shattered into countless black gas.

The aftereffect of Raizen’s punch was almost inexhaustible. After destroying ‘Saman”s body, the bloody energy still spread and destroyed the black gas.

‘Saman’ did not show the slightest expression of pain. The 2 faint fires in his eyes quickly burned, and the rich black gas enveloped the bloody energy, quickly eliminating it.

In the next second, ‘Saman”s body swelled up and turned into a huge body about tens of meters long. The body wrapped in black gas was faintly revealing lightning. A strange and cold breath spread out to the surrounding.

The shape of this huge body looked like… a giant dragon?

Although the royal arena was protected by an enchantment, the viewers who were closer couldn’t stand the sinister breath that kept spreading. Those with low strength fainted.

Dodo in the VIP seat appeared beside Shea, activating the defensive power to protect Madam while Paglio also activated the territory to protect Athena, Alice and others.

Isabella was observant. She noticed that something was wrong with Ms. Black Dragon beside her, so she asked with concern, “Olypheus?”

Olypheus’ eyes were fixed on the huge body. Her body trembled involuntarily as the diamond mark on her forehead began to glow and her nails seemed to elongate.

The irregularity is triggered at this time? She thought so as she hugged Olypheus tightly, “Olypheus, calm down!”

‘Saman”s voice sounded with a special momentous power, “After almost 10,000 years, I can finally suppress that damn imprint power!”

Raizen moved and flew toward ‘Saman’, but 4 black figures suddenly appeared in the air. They were wearing black robes, and their lower bodies were translucent like a ghost.

The 4 black figures waved their hands at the same time, and strange force fields intertwined, turning into a high-speed changing enchantment that blocked Raizen.

‘Saman’ ghastly laughter sounded throughout the audience, “Raizen, don’t be anxious. Wait until I devour this delicious food, then I will fight with you.”

With that said, the swarms of black gas rushed toward the ‘stunned’ Arthur.

In the VIP seat, Isabella’s embrace did not calm Olypheus as before, but she trembled even more with rare tears flowing from both eyes, “Mom…”

“Mom?”

While Isabella was startled, Olypheus screamed, “He’s the one who killed mommy!”

Facing the spreading cold black gas, Chen Rui was waiting intently. When he suddenly heard Olypheus’ voice, his mind moved, and he finally knew the identity of ‘Saman’.

——Olypheus’ uncle, Auglas’ younger brother, Ukleus, the traitor of Dragon Island!

When Auglas’s father, Crusier, defeated the Holy Dragon Rodriguez, he wanted to pass the throne to his eldest son, Auglas, but his second son, Ukleus, plotted to kill him and put the blame on Auglas. Auglas used [Dragon God Eyes] to escape, but his wife Liana was severely wounded by Ukleus in order to cover the young Olypheus. Later, Liana encountered Satan while fleeing, and gave the secret treasure of Night Wave Staff to Satan as a price for containment. She also succumbed to her injuries not long after, leaving Olypheus to live alone in the Mountain Seckred until Chen Rui appeared.

As Raizen swung his fists, the protection enchantment instantly shattered. The black robes of the 4 black figures shattered, revealing their true bodies. These were 4 skeletons with metallic bodies. Their arms became shields which blocked the fist power.

“Mechanized man!” Roman in the VIP seat lost his voice. This was not the first time he had seen a mechanized man. Broc’s half body was in this form. It turns out that Broc’s body was modified by Saman!

At this time, the shields of the 4 mechanized men shattered together, and half of their bodies were shattered. Raizen showed a contemptuous smile. How can my punch be so easy to resist?

The 4 mechanized men were unaware of the shatter of their bodies. They quickly exuded a strong dark element breath as if they were casting some kind of powerful magic together.

At this time, ‘Arthur’ had been wrapped in black gas, and he was in a very dangerous situation. Raizen did not want to entangle with these 4 people, so he was about to attack with all his strength, then he heard a somewhat familiar voice from the black gas.

The voice was so calm.

“Raizen, don’t interfere in this battle.”

Raizen’s pupils shrink instantly. His initially calm face was full of uncontrollable shock. He a name word by word in disbelief, “A-gui-lie!”

TL: Luckily he has the [Blue Pole Star Transformation], kingdomized powerhouse is no longer his opponent…
