“This move is slightly better.” In the hand of The Fallen One, the scorpion tail that contained the talent power of the Lucifer Royal Family’s [Dark Flame] quickly crystallized and shattered, actually changing from an intangible thing to a tangible crystal.

This [Flame Tail] was a secret skill created by Sarandi in recent years. He didn’t expect it to be easily resolved by the opponent. After the 2 strongest killing moves failed, Sarandi thought of Chen Rui’s instructions and took out the number plate without thinking. All of a sudden, he found that The Fallen One had appeared in front of him.

Sarandi didn’t panic. His figure suddenly had several overlapping images which spread out in all directions. The true figure was mixed with the elusive figures.. This move was the killing move [Shadow Step] personally taught by the Lord of Midnight Sun.

However, The Fallen One didn’t think about it at all. He just bent slightly and intercepted Sarandi’s real body with one step. This scene made Sarandi’s complexion change, not only because the [Shadow Step] was seen through, but also because the opponent’s action and timing gave him a very familiar feeling.

“You…” Sarandi just subconsciously crushed the number plate, and he suddenly thought of something with an expression of disbelief in his eyes.

Just after uttering a word, the finger of The Fallen One pressed on Sarandi’s forehead. Sarandi only felt a bang in his head, and an invading strange spirit power spread in all directions as his body began to crystallize rapidly.

Before The Fallen One could deliver the next blow, the teleportation power of the number plate had already been activated, and Sarandi’s statue disappeared from the arena.

Sarandi lost; The Fallen One advanced to the top 16.

In the teleportation outside the ancient battlefield, Chen Rui immediately found Sarandi who turned into a crystal statue. Strangely, Sarandi was not fatally injured, but he fell into a kind of slumber. If Chen Rui’s sense was not wrong, Sarandi would be awake in just 5-6 days.

This could be understood as Sarandi left the battlefield in time, and the opponent had no time to kill him, but Chen Rui was very aware of The Fallen One’s strength. He can kill the peak stage of the Demon Overlord in seconds, so he is at least at the existence of the kingdom. If he really wants to kill Sarandi, there is no need for the slow method of crystallization. As long as the force is exerted directly, Sarandi’s chance of survival is basically 0.

Chen Rui couldn’t understand for a while: If The Fallen One is really Jacob, he will never be so kind and let Sarandi go.

Is he playing his opponent? Or some other reason?

So far, the top 32 matches were all over, and the list of the top 16 matches had been released. Starting from the top 16, 4 matches held at the same time were changed to 1 match in each of the upper bracket and lower bracket.

The first match in the upper bracket was particularly eye-catching.

Raizen vs The Fallen One!

TL: Hmmmm , The Fallen One a little bit sus… There was only one reason that Sarandi wasn’t killed, but 🤔

chapters.title: Chapter 865: Destined Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 865: Destined Battle

The other match of the top 16 was Catherine vs Thessaloni, a trainer with no empire. Thessaloni was a dark horse in this championship. As a member of the Belphegor Royal Family, even Isabella didn’t know this person. It should be a reclusive trainer who later moved out alone when the Breeze Shadow Empire was destroyed.

Thessaloni’s strength was only 1 step away from the kingdom level. Obviously, he wanted to explore the threshold of kingdomization through this competition. It should be said that he was quite lucky to meet Catherine.

Catherine was neither as cruel as The Fallen One nor as ruthless as Raizen, but she had her own plans. This time, she almost killed Thessaloni with an overwhelming momentum as soon as she started. After demonstrating her great strength, Her Majesty Empress offered an olive branch with the bait of guiding and helping Thessaloni enter the kingdom-level. Thessaloni considered it again and again before he finally agreed to join the Dark Shadow Empire.

This kind of aura to accept a follower and gain his respect in the face of battle could only be displayed by the main protagonist. Chen Rui could only express admiration.

Compared with the match that ended quickly with top beauty Catherine, everyone paid more attention to the battle between top powerhouse Raizen and The Fallen One.

Due to the advanced technology of the projection live broadcast, the audience could watch this suspenseful showdown in the arena.

Raizen – the Demon Realm’s number 1 powerhouse. Although this number 1 belonged to the category of ordinary powerhouses, Raizen had now clearly entered the lists of the super-powerhouse.

The Fallen One – a mysterious person of unknown origin with cruel methods. In the preliminary round, he instantly killed 199 players in the same field. In the first 2 quarter finals, he killed the peak stage of the Demon Overlord powerhouse twice. He should be a super powerhouse as well.

According to the division of the Demon Realm, the one who surpassed Demon Overlord was Demon Supremo. Therefore, this match of Demon Supremo vs Demon Supremo would be the strongest collision since the start of the championship.

Will the Bloody Empire Lord, who has always had a ‘peerless within the same realm’ title, be able to defeat the mysterious ‘The Fallen One’?

Everyone’s hearts were full of expectations.

In the ancient battlefield.

Wearing a dark red cloak, The Fallen One looked at Raizen at the opposite, and a strange voice sounded, “You should have been looking forward to this battle for a long time.”

“You think too much of yourself.” Raizen said coldly, “Your strength can only barely stand in front of me, but in my eyes, you have never been a real opponent.”

“So, who is your real opponent?”

“You don’t have the right to know.” Raizen raised his fist slowly as a faint purple light emerged from his fist, “I don’t have time to chat with you.”

“Really?” The Fallen One showed half of his face which seemed to have a strange smile, “It’s time for some matters to end too.”

Raizen didn’t speak anymore. The purple light flickered around his body while The Fallen One’s figure became hazy at the same time, allowing the purple light to pass through his body. However, the vast majority of the audience did not see the action clearly.

Only Chen Rui, Zola and others could see it clearly. Raizen had punched dozens of punches just now, but The Fallen One’s movements were extremely strange. The punches contained law power actually could hit him; they were all dodged and diverted away. The Fallen One’s counterattack was only 1 punch, but Raizen seemed unable to dodge it, so he took it directly. A layer of red crystals was wrapped around his arm, but it was shattered by Raizen’s punch in the next second.

The way The Fallen One moved made Chen Rui feel a little familiar. It seems that Sarandi has used it before, and I seem to have encountered it somewhere – Can The Fallen One directly absorb or imitate other people’s skills?

Compared with Sarandi, The Fallen One’s movements were more subtle and unpredictable, and his accomplishments were far better than Sarandi. Even in the face of a powerhouse like Raizen, he seemed to be able to use it at will.

The movements of the 2 sides were too fast, and the audience could only see it clearly through the slow-motion playback of the big screen of the magic television on all sides of the arena. They all exclaimed in belated amazement when the 2 people in the projection had already started a more intense battle.

In the probes just now, Raizen judged that The Fallen One’s strength level was the early stage of the kingdomized level while Raizen himself had now stepped into the intermediate stage of kingdom level. This was actually Chen Rui’s ‘credit’.

Raizen was endangered when his body was eroded by Teris’ special light and dark curse. Later, Chen Rui used the Snow Dallet Flower to cancel the light element’s power, but the power of the Snow Dallet was very strong and accumulated in Raizen’s body. Thereon, Dark Elemental King Hegel used the most quintessential dark element power to cancel Raizen’s dark element magic power. Raizen used the Bloody Ring’s power with Hegel’s dark element power as a reference, then he used the kingdom power to refine the Snow Dallet into 1 place. Under the special absorption of the Bloody Ring, a mutation similar to the fusion of light and dark occurred, which was a blessing in disguise for Raizen. Not long ago, he finally broke through to the intermediate stage of kingdom level.

Raizen moved his feet, and he instantly shifted and punched at The Fallen One. The punch was not fast, but it was simple and pure, and its power was far greater than the combined force of the previous dozens of punches. The Fallen One felt that he couldn’t dodge it. His figure moved several times, but he was still unable to dodge it. He could only extend his hand to resist it.

“ Boom! ” The ground under The Fallen One’s feet cracked, and The Fallen One’s body had numerous trembling overlapping images as if he was about to split into several people. The overlapping images merged into one again in the blink of an eye while Raizen was actually struck by some kind of force, which pushed him back for 3 steps.

The slow-motion playback showed that the overlapping image of The Fallen One was caused by the strange steps under his feet. Raizen’s punch actually hit the palm of The Fallen One’s left hand that he extended. However, when The Fallen One’s feet moved quickly in a seemingly disorderly manner, not only did he resist the punch, but he also simultaneously punched and knocked Raizen back with his right hand.

However, Chen Rui saw more things. The punch of The Fallen One actually borrowed the strength of Raizen itself. Using the opponent’s strength to fight!

This technique was very similar to Chen Rui’s [Water Profound Mystery], and even had a bit of the essence of [Water Profound Mystery] including the familiar pace. However, compared with the subtlety of [Water Profound Mystery], The Fallen One’s way of turning opponent’s power against them had greater momentum and was easy to activate. In all fairness, if Chen Rui himself were to use Raizen’s punch to fight back, it would absolutely not work as well as The Fallen One’s.

For some reason, a familiar feeling in his mind became clearer and clearer.

Raizen’s gaze had become dignified. Although it was only 2 simple rounds, his experience and intuition told him that this was by no means an opponent who could be easily defeated.

Raizen’s body revealed a breathtaking aura, and the little plains competition area where the 2 of them were located was instantly filled with rich blood mist which had encircled The Fallen One into the space of the kingdom. As The Fallen One waved his hand, the blood mist was filled with red lights like stars condensed from crystals.

Raizen sensed that the starlights carried a strange devour power, constantly sucking the blood mist in the kingdom, but Raizen didn’t panic or retrieve his power. His body flickered, and countless fists surrounded The Fallen One from all directions.

The Fallen One repeated his old tricks, turning into a phantom, trying to move away or borrow force, but under the effect of the blood mist, the movement became stagnant. A light flashed in Raizen’s eyes, and the fist shadows suddenly adjusted their direction inconceivably, sealing every corner of the phantom’s movement.

After locking the opponent, the kingdom power contained in the fist shadows exploded instantly, “ Boom boom boom …”

Raizen had used 70% of his strength in this blow. The Fallen One would at least be severely injured.

At this moment, the exploding punch suddenly distorted in a strange way. It was disintegrated and diverted away in an instant, and The Fallen One was actually unscathed.

What caused all this was the countless red crystal lights around The Fallen One which merged into a long stream and hung upside down above The Fallen One’s head like a dreamy sky river.

Chen Rui was shocked and stood up involuntarily. He finally understood why he was familiar with The Fallen One previously! He also understood why Sarandi was able to survive.

Catherine, who had just returned to the rest area after the battle, happened to see this scene, and her calm dark eyes behind the veil revealed a strong shock.

The most shocked was naturally Raizen who was in the field. His face changed drastically as he blurted out, “It’s you!”

If the front was just some vague familiarity, then that flickering crystal sky river had completely revealed the mystery of ‘The Fallen One’.

[Dream Galaxy Territory].

The strongest territory of the great emperor who was famous across the Demon Realm in the past.

At that time, even an arrogant person like Raizen could only look up at the existence of this person.

That person was the goal he wanted to pursue all his life, and he was also regarded as his destined enemy.

When that person fell into the war with the human world, Raizen was not happy. Instead, he locked himself in the house for 3 days, not allowing even the woman he loved the most to approach him.

200 years later, that person unexpectedly reappeared in front of him with an unexpected identity. In that same unexpected battle, he who had already been kingdomized and Catherine almost lost their life in the hands of the person who was a mere Demon Overlord.

In the end, that man and his son’s life disappeared in his eyes.

Unexpectedly, he saw this person again today.

Right across him, as his opponent.

The former Fallen Angel Empire’s ruler and Demon Realm’s top powerhouse.

Midnight Sun Lucifer!

No matter what the reason caused this person to be reborn, Raizen only knew 1 thing, this person was now in front of his eyes!

No wonder he can match my intermediate stage of kingdom level strength with the early stage kingdom level!

“ Hahaha! ” Raizen laughed. It was not a sneer, a proud laugh, but a real laugh.

The Fallen One didn’t take the opportunity to attack. He just watched Raizen quietly.

In this martial battle championship, the majority of the audience were from the Bloody Empire. Including the empire generals and ministers, they invariably showed a surprised expression when looking at the laughing Raizen. In their memory, the top powerhouse ruler never seemed to laugh like this before.

After laughing a few times, Raizen stared at The Fallen One with unprecedentedly bright eyes. His whole body surged with a powerful fighting spirit as if he was reborn.

“You are right, I’ve been looking forward to this battle for a long time.” Raizen’s blood boiled, “Today, let’s finish it.”

The Fallen One’s hands slowly flattened, and the flow of star river on his head became more and more turbulent, flashing with a dreamlike brilliance.

TL: Midnight Sun is back? What is he plotting this time?

chapters.title: Chapter 866: Victory Or Loss
chapters.body:
Chapter 866: Victory Or Loss

The dark clouds covered the sky, and the rumble of thunder continued to sound as the acidic rain fell.

This was the special rain of the Demon Realm. Acid rain would not happen every time, but there were at least 10 acid rains in a year which could cause considerable corrosion or even fatal damage to plants. The plants that survived in the Demon Realm were far stronger than the human world in terms of vitality and durability.

Not only the plants but also the demons. The arena was in the open air, and there were not many places to shelter from the rain, but this did not stop the enthusiasm of the audience who were watching the live projection in the arena in the heavy rain.

All the audience from the Bloody Empire were shouting Raizen’s name in unison even though the voice could not reach the scene of the ancient battlefield, even though they could hardly see the 2 fast-moving figures clearly.

Raizen and ‘The Fallen One’ – Midnight Sun.

From the moment the 2 sides entered the real battle, the people could only see the figures of the 2 who paused occasionally. Most of the time, the vision was filled with blood mist and a dreamy galaxy.

The vast majority of the audience set their eyes on the big screen of slow-motion playback, but even in slow-motion, it was still extremely fast. Only a few people such as Chen Rui could keep up with the actions of Raizen and Midnight Sun in time.

Chen Rui could see that the battle between the 2 seemed to be fierce, but so far it was a tentative conventional attack, trying to find the best time to make a conclusive attack.

Midnight Sun’s power level was not as good, but Chen Rui fought Midnight Sun before. It was a feeling that everything was in Midnight Sun’s control. Not only that, Midnight Sun seemed to have absorbed the insights of [Water Profound Mystery] when he fought Chen Rui last time, and integrated it into his movement, converting it into the Kingdom power of the [Dream Galaxy Territory]. The profound mystery of borrowing power was also more refined.

In all fairness, this ‘former’ top powerhouse was truly an out-of-the world person with amazing talent.

Raizen was obviously passive tactically, but he had an oppressive strength. He was able to use overwhelming power to break all skills, so he could gain the upper hand most of the time.

The gap between the small realm was not as insurmountable as the big realm, but the higher the strength, the more obvious the gap was. Facing Raizen at the intermediate stage of the Kingdom level, Midnight Sun still seemed to be able to handle it with ease.

If it was another opponent. Raizen might still rely on his strength, but facing Midnight Sun, he had no scruples or reservations. Now he was neither the Bloody Empire Lord nor the top powerhouse; just a pure warrior who threw himself into the fight.

Victory or loss, there will be no regrets.

Just a fight, that’s all.

“ Bang! “

After their fists collided, Raizen’s body flickered and Midnight Sun took a few steps back.

Raizen, who had the advantage, did not pursue the victory, but retreated sharply. The galaxy flowed in the sky. The trajectory of Raizen’s retreat was staggered and penetrated by several elusive figures appearing out of thin air. This was Midnight Sun’s incredible method.

Raizen almost suffered severe injury by this move before, but his retreat this time was different from the haste last time. While he retreated, the Kingdom power quietly covered the phantasms with a layer of blood mist. After those phantasms were stained with blood mist, there was no difference on the surface, but in Raizen’s eyes, it was no longer strange and unpredictable.

Raizen’s swift retreat came to an abrupt end. He launched several black lights to wrap 1 of the phantasms.

Mammon Royal Family’s bloodline talent, [Light of Sin].

[Light of Sin] was a powerful talent that weakened the opponents. It could even restrain the [War Puppet] of the Asmodeus Royal Family to a certain extent. Enemies illuminated by [Light of Sin] would have various debuffs for a short period of time. It could not be canceled or offset by buff magic.

Although [Light of Sin] was not a skill that would directly kill the enemy, in a powerhouse duel with comparable strength, just a slight misstep might lead to a complete loss. With Raizen’s Kingdom level strength and he activated this talent coupled with the Bloody Ring artifact that buffed the dark element, one could imagine the power of this talent. This blow was likely to become the key to the entire battle.

This time, Midnight Sun, whose real body was seen by blood mist, was caught off guard. He was entirely wrapped in the [Light of Sin]. Raizen had been waiting for this moment for a long time. Without thinking, he launched the strongest attack with all his strength.

“[Thunder Emperor Seal]!”

The simple and unpretentious punch had no fancy appearance or demeanor and the speed was not fast, but it tempered all the spirit and energy in one point. If this punch hit, even with the strength of Midnight Sun, he would also be utterly shattered.

All of a sudden, Raizen felt the [Thunder Emperor Seal]’s fist strength slowed down inconceivably, and the Midnight Sun’s phantasms started to shake again twice as fast as before. Raizen suddenly realized that it wasn’t the Midnight Sun who became faster, but he himself slowed down!

Sluggishness!

Not only sluggishness but also various debuff states such as weakening and exhaustion!

Raizen was shocked. The [Light of Sin] was actually reflected back!

If it wasn’t for Bloody Ring’s support, I’m afraid my condition would be even worse!

The [Thunder Emperor Seal] fist that was affected by various weakening effects was quickly covered with a layer of crystal. Although the crystal was immediately turned into powder by the fist, the crystal continued to strengthen repeatedly while it was fading. In the end, the weakened [Thunder Emperor Seal] turned into a solid fist of crystal, which was shattered without a trace by a finger of Midnight Sun.

The dark red cloak on Midnight Sun was also corroded by the power of [Light of Sin], revealing his true face.

This was a strange body which was not made of flesh and blood, but crystal clear pale red crystals. There were no internal organs except for a strange red bead which was like a heart that appeared in the chest cavity.

Raizen recognized the bead. It was the very thing that nearly killed him and Catherine in the first place, the Bloodfall Orb.

Raizen suddenly had a strong warning sign. He wanted to shift, but was slightly slower due to the [Light of Sin]. He was surrounded by countless red starlights of destruction, and a terrifying strength locked him firmly.

“Are you surprised?” Midnight Sun said indifferently, “I survived thanks to this body, which was originally the body of a strange dragon, but unfortunately, he was chosen as my body by the Bloodfall Orb.”

Chen Rui, who was the only person who could hear the conversation between the 2, suddenly understood that the ‘strange dragon’ was the Crystal Dragon Jacob!

When Teris, whom the Midnight Sun possessed, died, Midnight Sun should have perished, but he retained his soul due to the Bloodfall Orb. He escaped and disappeared. Later, he should have encountered the Crystal Dragon Jacob. After some kind of mutation, he possessed Jacob’s body and was reborn.

The body of the crystal dragon was no longer the simple [Anti-Magic]; it was completely immune to magic. When the [Light of Sin] touched the body of the crystal, it did not work at all. Not only that, the body of Midnight Sun also combined Chen Rui’s power of crystal mirror, which he had once experienced, reflecting the [Light of Sin] to Raizen.

Therefore, Midnight Sun should have deliberately revealed flaws previously, which led to Raizen activating the [Light of Sin]. As a result, he used the surprising move to make a comeback. This was the terrifying ability to control the battle.

As expected of a peerless genius with the ability to challenge higher levels.

“[Star Gathering Explosion]!” Midnight Sun didn’t give Raizen too many chances to react. With a wave of his hand, the starlights in all directions drew unpredictable trajectories toward Raizen. The speed and the trajectory were all very particular as if Midnight Sun was a chess player who controlled the entire chessboard. He also went all out to launch the strongest counterattack against Raizen.

Raizen was unable to shift. If he forcefully resisted it, he would either be dead or seriously injured.

This was not the first time Raizen had faced this move. This move once made him unable to get up. From that time to the Kingdom of today, he still had the feeling of ‘no solution’.

However, Raizen was not who he used to be.

Facing countless deadly starlights, Raizen suddenly closed his eyes. Midnight Sun’s crystal pupils shrank slightly, and a sense of danger surged in his mind. The starlight of [Star Gathering Explosion] twisted uncontrollably in an instant, and a strange symbol appeared in it. At a closer look, it was a hand gesture.

In the fist, the index finger and middle finger were raised, and the thumb was slightly buckled inward like a beast that bared its fangs.

This strange gesture carried great pressure. As the twisted starlights rolled back one after another, the gesture was already in front of Midnight Sun, magnifying in the blink of an eye – The power of this attack is far greater than that of the [Thunder Emperor Seal]. I have never seen Raizen activate this before, so it should be a newly comprehended killing move. It’s too late to escape, and I can’t take it. As long as it touches me, even the crystal body will be completely annihilated.

Seeing that the hand gesture was about to touch Midnight Sun’s chest, Raizen suddenly saw the red bead beating.

At this moment, Raizen had the illusion that what was in front of him was not the Midnight Sun, but a blood sea with huge waves!

The blood sea was filled with terrifying destructive breath, and Raizen instinctively felt that as long as he contaminated a little blood sea, even his body and soul of the Kingdom level would shatter without any suspense.

The blood sea in the sky was wrapping toward Raizen, and it was impossible to escape. Raizen didn’t expect such a turn of events. He gritted his teeth and urged that gesture to go with all his strength.

At this moment, the image of the blood sea trembled and quickly dimmed, and the figure of Midnight Sun reappeared in front.

“Get out of the way!” Raizen shouted as he clearly felt that something was amiss.

But it was too late. The only thing Raizen had time for was to see Midnight Sun’s gaze.

Calm and proud.

The entire live projection shook, and the image could not be seen clearly. The cracked part of the ground turned into powder while the solid ground was flattened by a layer under some kind of terrifying strength.

“What is this move called?” It was no longer the overlapping strange sound, but a vigorous voice.

“[No Me Seal].”

“Not bad, if the enemy still exists, there will be no me. This time, it is you, no me. You win.”

“The one who should be annihilated should be me.” Raizen’s voice was low, “What happened just now?”

“The Bloodfall Orb wants to completely control my soul, but unfortunately, it chose the wrong person from the beginning.” It was just a faint sentence, but it showed contemptuous pride.

My life is mine.

Even in death, the same is true.

“When you were fighting against me, were you still fighting against such an enemy?” Raizen gasped while shaking his head slowly. “I didn’t beat you, never did. It’s you who beat yourself.”

“You are still that obsessive warrior. It’s like my arrogance. You, will go further than me.”

A smile appeared at the corner of his mouth as a crack appeared in the red bead in his chest. There were more and more cracks, then it was completely shattered.

Raizen stared blankly at the disappearing smile as if all his strength had been lost. Despite the rain pouring on his face and body, his desolate back looked unprecedentedly hunched.

TL: He is just here to seek death?

chapters.title: Chapter 868: The Least Well-Received Match
chapters.body:
Chapter 868: The Least Well-Received Match

The emergence of the top 8 represented a step closer to the final battle.

Upper bracket: Raizen, Chen Rui, Lalaria, Zola.

Lower bracket: Catherine, Red Pipit, Paglio, Dodo.

The final winner would be 1 of these 8 people. At this stage of the martial battle championship, it was no longer an ordinary powerhouse battle, but a super powerhouse battle!

The quarter-finals were randomly rearranged, resulting in Raizen vs Lalaria, Chen Rui vs Zola in the upper bracket, Dodo vs Red Pipit and Paglio vs Catherine in the lower bracket.

Chen Rui was a little surprised by the result of this draw. He originally thought he would meet Raizen ahead of time, but Raizen was ‘lucky’ to be against the mustached flat-chested loli. Meanwhile, his opponent was his beloved Ms. Fairy Dragon.

There were only 4 quarterfinals, so each match was being live broadcast one by one.

After the draw lots, the first match was Red Pipit vs Dodo in the lower bracket.

Although in the battle of top 16 to top 8, Master Slime staged a counterattack of a loser, breaking through to the Kingdom-level to advance in one fell swoop. However, in the face of the Octopus King who had been on the peak stage of the Kingdom level for many years, Master Slime’s strength was still too tender.

Octopus King saw through Dodo’s strength at a glance, but he didn’t take him seriously. He waved his hand casually, and a circle of mist surrounded the slime. Dodo’s body began to freeze rapidly, and in the blink of an eye, he solidified into an ice sculpture of onion. As he breathed out, the ice sculpture turned into powder.

To Octopus King’s slight surprise, those ‘powders’ which should at least lose their ability to move quickly recondensed to Dodo’s appearance.

During Dodo’s battle with Roman, Octopus King had seen Dodo’s immortality. Now that he had experienced it himself, he could really feel the uniqueness of this physique. Neither physical damage nor element damage could really kill this bizarre creature.

The mist reappeared and Dodo became an ice sculpture for the second time. This time, Octopus King did not destroy the ice sculpture, but he directly froze the slime’s actions.

After a while, the solid ice layer made a cracking sound, and a sharp translucent blade actually pierced out from it.

Octopus King raised his brows. He had already used 30% of his strength. He didn’t expect Dodo to be able to break through the freezing power so quickly. Then, he saw a strange mouth appeared on ‘blade’ in an instant.

Octopus King thought Dodo would make some big moves, only to hear that mouth scream, “Surrender!”

Octopus King, “…”

A soft object like a gummy candy slowly squeezed out of the gap created by the ‘sharp blade’. It swelled into the shape of an onion as soon as it hit the ground with around 8 hands clasping the trembling body tightly, “I’m almost frozen to death! Surrender! Surrender!”

Anyone with a discerning eye could see that Dodo was very talented. If he could break through the ice block like this, he could at least fight for a few more rounds, but Master Slime didn’t think so. Master said that this opponent is very strong. Even the poison dragon is far inferior to him. Anyway, if I can’t win, I might as well suffer less and go back to enjoy my wine.

No doubt, without the pressure, even if he was promoted to the Kingdom-level, he was still the lazy and timid worm.

Compared to the first match, the second match was particularly striking because there was the biggest favorite to win the championship, Raizen. Raizen’s opponent was the strange loli, Lalaria.

The results of this match were generally considered to be not too suspenseful. Lalaria once shocked everyone and set a record in the screening round, but the subsequent matches were relatively mediocre. The most impressive thing was the scene where the dark elf girl fled and admitted defeat in the last round after being flirted by her opponent. In the audience’s impression, this was just an odd girl with good luck. She was impossible to be the opponent of the top powerhouse, Raizen.

Lalaria swaggered into the arena, looked at Raizen, who was as calm as a mountain, and said arrogantly, “I hate men the most. I don’t even bother to fight with a skinny guy like you, so I will let you punch me 3 times. If you can make me move 1 step, I will consider that you win.”

Even Raizen who had always been calm couldn’t help revealing a murderous intent in his eyes.

3 punches, 1 step?

By the way, and that ‘skinny guy’ name…

“Come on! Don’t waste my energy!” The flat-chested loli said impatiently, “I still want to have fun and beat that guy’s face!”

“Your mind tactics are very successful. You have already infuriated me.” A murderous intent surged out from Raizen’s eyes, “You will pay for this!”

“Bluffing with momentum?” The flat-chested loli said disdainfully, “I’m stronger than you!”

As soon as the words ended, Raizen sensed a terrifying momentum coming toward him. His murderous aura was actually completely suppressed, and he couldn’t help but take a few steps backward.

Raizen was really taken aback. His eyes suddenly became solemn. The opponent’s level of strength actually surpassed me – Peak stage of the Kingdom level?

“I have overlooked it. It turns out that you are a good opponent.” Raizen was completely serious, and his fist was instantly charged with great strength, then he launched a long-range punch at Lalaria first.

In Raizen’s mind, since she was an opponent worthy of a fight, he must do his best at all costs. He would not compromise or relent just because the opponent was a woman or even a ‘little girl’.

The fierce fist momentum came, and the wind pressure created caused the nearby leaves and gravel to roll back. The momentum was very shocking, but Lalaria looked away as if she was not bothered about it.

Just after the fist momentum approached the ‘little girl’, the powerful punch became weak in the blink of an eye. It turned from a stormy sea to a calm sea before it finally dissipated completely.

Raizen’s pupils shrink abruptly. Although this punch is intended to be a test, I’ve already used 70% of my force. The opponent didn’t even move a finger, and it was voided without a trace.

An absolutely formidable enemy!

Before the decisive battle with that person, I actually encountered a formidable opponent of this level!

Peak stage of the Kingdom level? Let’s try the challenge!

The entire battlefield was suddenly filled with surging blood mist. Raizen had activated the kingdom power without reservation.

“[Thunder Emperor Seal]!”

Raizen’s second attack was already an all-out attack, and it was his signature killing move.

After the fight with Midnight Sun, this punch was much more concise. Its power had also grown considerably. Wherever the fist momentum went, the enormous pressure caused many cracks to appear on the ground.

However, Lalaria still didn’t move, but she finally glanced at the purple fist. There seemed to be a ray of light flashing in her eyes. “ Boom! ” The ultimate move [Thunder Emperor Seal] was actually completely voided under this gaze.

Raizen was shocked: Too powerful! What kind of strength is this? She crushed the [Thunder Emperor Seal] with just a gaze!

Can the peak stage of the Kingdom level reach this extent?

Impossible! Is it…

An unbelievable guess flashed past Raizen’s mind.

“Demi-God?”

When the mustached loli heard these 2 words, she laughed, and the whole projection began to vibrate violently.

On the ground surrounding her, numerous cracks spread rapidly, and a pressing momentum suddenly erupted. Raizen’s body was quickly pushed back involuntarily. His feet dragged shocking traces on the ground, and he was finally blown away for hundreds of meters.

The astonishing laughter echoed across the whole city. It was heard even at the arena side. The clouds in the sky were flying away, and the projection was already blurred. Even the big screen of the magic television had a brief interference because of some kind of terrifying strength.

Catherine sensed the great strength in the laughter and couldn’t help being shocked. Even Octopus King Red Pipit also stood up as his facial expression changed.

The momentum gradually converged into Lalaria’s body. Raizen’s figure appeared not far in front, and his eyes were full of shock. This strange girl is actually a Demi-God!

The gap between Kingdom and Demi-God was far beyond the ordinary big realm difference. Which could only be described by the word ‘out of reach’. Raizen was very clear that he had no chance of winning, “Why, skinny guy? Lost the courage to attack?” Madam Lalaria looked disdainfully at Raizen.

Raizen took a deep breath and the words sounded in his ears again. You will go further than me.

The blood mist, which had been suppressed and almost disappeared, became richer than ever before. It was burning like a flame just like the fighting intent in Raizen’s eyes. Due to the accumulation of overly vast strength, blood was gradually overflowing from his facial features, but his eyes became more and more burning.

The burning blood mist formed into a strange hand gesture. The index and middle fingers of the fist were raised; the thumbs were slightly clasped inward.

“[No Me Seal]!”

“Not bad.” An admiring expression flashed past Lalaria’s eyes, “The power of this punch is already quite close to the peak stage of the Kingdom level.”

After Lalaria said the word ‘not bad’, [No Me Seal] had already rushed toward her face with overwhelming strength. The flat-chested loli stretched out a hand and pinched in the air, and the [No Me Seal] collapsed instantly like burst balloon. At this time, she happened to say the last word of the sentence – ‘level’.

Raizen gasped violently. This blow had consumed almost all of his strength, but it was easily canceled by the opponent. This was the absolute strength.

“Give it up, Raizen.” Lalaria did not use the word ‘skinny guy’, “You should be well aware of the gap between us.”

“You took 3 of my punches.” Raizen tried to adjust the rhythm of his breathing, “Now, I’ll take 1 punch from you.”

“Are you sure you can take it?”

Raizen didn’t say anything; he just put on a defensive posture.

Lalaria stared at Raizen for a moment, seeming to be a little more serious. She took a few steps forward, then she suddenly turned around and punched casually.

This punch seemed to be innocuous, but even Raizen had goosebumps as he sensed an extremely terrifying power as if a peerless beast was coming toward his face. In this instant, everything in the entire ancient battlefield was collapsing and disintegrating. It was simply doomsday.

Raizen shouted loudly, and the strength of his whole body soared to the top to face this ‘ferocious beast’. The moment the 2 met, Raizen felt 3 words- Unable to resist.

His soul trembled and annihilated little by little. His will was also on the verge of collapse. Raizen shouted again. Both his soul and life burned, resisting the force of this collapse.

After some time, before his life was exhausted, the terrifying strength finally gradually dissipated.

The blurred vision became clearer. He saw Lalaria in the distance slowly withdrawing her fist. The ancient battlefield did not collapse, but the cracks on the ground and the weak body that almost collapsed told Raizen that it was definitely not an illusion just now.

It’s just a casual punch. If it wasn’t for her mercy, I would have been annihilated.

Is this the strength of Demi-God?

At least I have seen the way forward.

“You will go further than me.”

The words sounded in his ears again. Raizen clenched his fists with his last strength as if clenching the promise of a life, then he fell down.

Almost all the audience was in an uproar. Only the Dragon Island’s braindead fan club remained firm, “Sir Lalaria, love you to death!”

The 2nd match of the quarter-finals was the least well-received since the start of the game.

The top powerhouse, Raizen, was defeated!

Lalaria advanced to the top 4!

chapters.title: Chapter 867: Foodie’S Counterattack
chapters.body:
Chapter 867: Foodie’S Counterattack

In the arena, although the projection was blurred due to the violent vibration, the audience saw the final annihilation scene of ‘The Fallen One’ in the big screen playback. The victory or defeat of this match did not surprise everyone, but the fact that the dark horse ‘The Fallen One’ was able to fight against the top powerhouse Raizen for so long was beyond everyone’s expectations.

Only Chen Rui knew how lucky Raizen was to win. No matter whether Midnight Sun was a hero or a villain, no matter what he did over the centuries was intended or affected by the Bloodfall Orb, at this last moment, that ‘arrogant’ man was the real Midnight Sun who would rather be annihilated than kneeling.

Maybe Midnight Sun came to the martial battle championship just for this moment. The Bloodfall Orb controlled his life but not his pride.

Chen Rui was deeply touched and sighed, “Famous generals have been like beauties since ancient times. They do not allow their gray hairs to be seen by the world.”

The famous general has died, what about the beauty?

Catherine also sighed. Midnight Sun eventually died in the hands of Raizen.

Looking at the lonely figure, the Dark Shadow Empire’s empress suddenly had a different emotion in her mind. She glanced at Chen Rui in the distance, just in time to meet his gaze.

When the 2 looked at each other this time, the feeling was completely different from the competitiveness when they were registering previously.

Catherine’s response was quick. Her gaze immediately became cold, but that guy blinked his eyes frivolously. Even though he had a mask on his face, she could imagine that expression, then she inexplicably felt annoyed and looked away, ignoring him.

Chen Rui smiled slightly and suddenly felt relieved.

After Raizen and Catherine both advanced, Lalaria, Chen Rui, Zola, Paglio, and Red Pipit also advanced.

The most impressive were Zola and Lalaria, Zola’s opponent was a magician named Thursfield. This magician was a reclusive powerhouse, and he had already touched the edge of the law. He was only one step away from stepping into the Kingdom level. Moreover, he was proficient in magic circles. His gorgeous magic and unpredictable means had attracted a lot of attention in the previous matches.

It was a pity that he ran into Zola, and Zola didn’t overwhelm him with her realm, so she controlled her strength at the Demon Overlord level, then she used magics to deal with magic and magic circles to deal with magic circles, defeating Thursfield with the method he was best at.

After Thursfield lost, he made a shocking move to express admiration to Ms. Fairy Dragon. As a result, when Ms. Fairy Dragon pretended to be dazed, the complete failure turned into complete abuse. He disappeared like a shooting star in the end.

Compared to Zola, Lalaria’s battle was even more bizarre. Lalaria’s opponent, Ruthya, was a slender, cold-looking dark elf beauty at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Moreover, she was a rare assassin type with elusive movements and fierce killing moves. The mustached flat-chested loli widened her eyes as soon as she saw the beauty. She used all kinds of seductions.

The cold beauty naturally did not buy it. She launched attacks mercilessly, but unfortunately any form of attack seemed to be a tickling for this weirdo loli. Instead, she showed an intoxicated expression of love from the beating.

In the end, the ruthless beauty couldn’t bear the harassment of Lala Loli. She crushed the number plate and fled the battlefield in panic. Judging from the frantic screaming and when she left, this beauty would probably have homosexual trauma in the future.

Although there were many strange things in the game, this martial battle championship made Chen Rui further recognize the hidden strength of the Demon Realm. Not to mention the super powerhouses, as far as high-level powerhouses were concerned, the high-level powerhouses of the 3 empires did not represent the entire Demon Realm.

Originally, the Demon Realm had 7 empires. There were quite a handful of powerhouses from the bereaved or the corresponding factions that did not join the 3 empires. Instead, they lived in seclusion outside the empires or in the countryside as ‘independent trainers’. The lifespan of demons was much longer than that of humans, so they had relatively more time to devote themselves to training. In this martial battle championship for the entire Demon Realm, there were many ‘independent trainers’ who came for actual combat training and breakthrough bottlenecks.

The last match to enter the quarterfinals was Roman against Dodo.

Chen Rui couldn’t be more familiar with these 2 guys. On Roman’s side, there were 2 ladies cheering, Delia and Medilu. On Dodo’s side, including the blackheart master, all the relatives and friends were relaxing while nibbling melon seeds to watch the excitement.

On the battlefield, Roman and Dodo were looking at each other far apart.

The gazes of the 2 were very cautious, and they did not act lightly as if they were carefully looking for each other’s flaws.

The bleak cold wind blew, and a familiar smell of pepper made Dodo sneeze. Roman’s face showed a scheming smile as he appeared in front of Dodo like lightning. The high-speed blue sword light was woven into a dense net of light that wrapped Dodo in it.

This attack of Student Nephew was the most powerful ultimate move, [No Return].

These 2 swords were legendary-grade weapons tailored by Chen Rui for Roman. They were extremely sharp, and they had special attributes of acceleration and defense piercing. Dodo didn’t have time to dodge, and he was instantly divided into countless pieces by the sword light.

Just when the audience thought that Roman could easily kill Dodo in seconds, Roman did not look relaxed at all. The sword light slashed those fragments into thousands of pieces again, leaving no room for survival.

The fragments disintegrated again. This time, a layer of lightning was attached to the sword light, and the fragments turned into powder.

Roman still didn’t give up. He turned into a whirlwind, blowing the powder in all directions. Just when the audience thought this guy had an unusual liking for crushing, the answer was revealed.

The scattered powder actually flew up automatically, quickly condensed together, wriggled and reassembled into the shape of an onion.

The audience was in an uproar: Immortal!

Roman and Dodo had fought countless times. Knowing that an attack of this magnitude was impossible to kill the slime, he unleashed his most powerful moves without any scruples.

Roman knew very well that Dodo’s undead body was powerful, but it was not endless. Once his stamina was exhausted, he could not be reborn again. The most important thing was that Master Slime was a mighty hero who would bow down in the face of force. As long as he was out of stamina or got scared, he would surrender immediately.

However, Dodo’s strength, combat power and stamina were far higher than Roman’s, especially the vitality displayed now seemed to have improved. It was not an easy thing to make it admit defeat.

Without waiting for Dodo to complete its recondensing, Roman launched [No Return] again. But this time Dodo’s healing speed was much faster than the last time. After several repetitions in a row, Dodo’s regeneration was getting faster and faster while Roman’s forehead was already sweating.

After launching a sword net, the scattered pieces were no longer ’dismembered limbs’, but countless onions. These small onions flew toward Roman from all directions and surrounded him. Roman shivered at the thought of some tragic consequence of being eaten and excreted by Dodo. He immediately activated the [Flash] talent of the Belphegor Royal Family. His figure turned into a lightning bolt, dodging narrowly the moment Dodo combined into 1.

Dodo didn’t give up. Countless small onions bounced and chased Roman as if they were tracking missiles. Roman’s eyes rolled, and there was something in his hand which quickly flew to the back and pinned it to the ground. It was actually a skewer of barbecued meat.

The small onions immediately abandoned Roman and began to pounce on the barbecue, which was down to only a bamboo skewer instantly. After escaping away from Dodo, Roman kept firing all kinds of food like barbecue, and Dodo chased while eating.

Roman took out a bottle of wine. When he was about to throw it out, his stomach suddenly growled disappointedly. It turned out that after throwing so many foods, his own appetite was aroused too. So the situation became that both sides were eating, throwing, eating, throwing, eating and throwing, and there was a ‘stalemate’ for a while.

The relatives and friends were speechless. What kind of martial battle championship was this, it was clearly a foodie conference.

Dodo, who had already recombined into a big onion, pounced on a bagel again, and his vision became blurred suddenly. Some strange patterns emerged around the ground of the bagel. These patterns made the slime instinctively feel a sense of danger. “ Boom ”, actually exploded.

The explosive force was so fierce that even Dodo’s onion was shriveled in half, but it protruded back to its original shape in an instant. The scene changed abruptly and they entered a strange space surrounded by the kind of lines that made it have a bad omen.

Dodo rubbed his eyes and saw that Roman was standing not far in front of him. He thought it was only an illusion, but when he took a step, countless white lights flashed. The slime was slashed into a dozen chunks. It took a long time to recover, then it realized that there were countless deadly dangers in this seemingly far distance.

This scene made Catherine in the audience stunned slightly. She gave Frentz, who was beside her, a faint look.

Frentz lowered his head a little guiltily. He tried to explain something, but he didn’t say anything in the end.

On the family and friends’ side, Delia frowned and asked Medilu next to her, “This is… that ‘Nirvana Sandbox’ last time? Did you give it to him?”

Medilu nodded, “ En , I gave it to him for self-defense…”

Nirvana Sandbox was a self-defense item that Catherine recently gave Uncle Frentz. Catherine infused this item with kingdom-level Nirvana power, which was equivalent to a powerful magic circle. Anyone below kingdom-level would not be able to break through the space of the item. If one acted rashly, it would also induce a terrifying attack of the magic circle.

However, this item could only be used 3 times, and each time was 1 hour. Frentz accepted this gift from Her Majesty Empress and gave it to his daughter Medilu, who then gave it to Roman.

Roman was well aware of the time limit for the Nirvana Sandbox. He grinned as he sat down, took out a few bottles of wine and a whole bunch of delicious food from the space ring.

“Give up, Dodo! As long as you crush that number plate, all the food here is yours! Look what’s there? This is your favorite roast duck, and these plates of stews. It’s delicious! Wow , there’s even this bottle of the best aromatic millet wine. I especially got it from leader…”

Roman’s voice carried a strong temptation. In fact, those barbecued meats in the past were actually coated with special spices which could widen the appetite and make one hungrier. It was specially prepared for this moment. I can definitely win without bloodshed. I am so smart that even leader can only look up to me.

Dodo’s stomach growled, and his saliva was drooling, but he shook his head resolutely. Although he did not have the quick calculation ability like Ms. Black Dragon, as Master Slime had countless fingers, he could theoretically count his fingers infinitely, so he calculated very clearly. ‘Madam’ Olypheus had carefully calculated the prize money in front of him before. If he won, he would get a lot of black crystal coins which was enough to buy more and more food!

However, Master Slime also wanted to eat the food in front of it very, very much. What should I do?

Seeing Dodo salivating, Roman sighed, “If you refuse, then I’ll eat all of this now. This roast duck is really delicious. Just smell it…”

The slime was struggling hard. He was almost unable to resist the temptation several times. He was just swallowing his saliva desperately while staring at the delicious food.

Even if they couldn’t hear Roman’s voice, the relatives and friends knew what this guy was doing. No doubt, there is no lack of weirdo. Knowing this guy, no, these 2 guys, it’s really shameful.

Watching Master Roman eat those delicious foods, Master Dodo, whose gastric juice and salivary amylase had been secreted frantically, rushed directly to Roman. Roman was startled. The Nirvana Sandbox sensed the movement immediately, and countless terrifying attacks were launched toward Dodo.

Countless dangerous rays of light continued to flash in the explosion, and the foodies whose appetite exploded began to devour those attacks desperately. Its body swelled more and more while muffled sounds and rays of light continued to leak out of its bodies.

During this process, the slime’s body seemed to have undergone some kind of change. This change was only subtle at first, then it became more and more obvious. Dodo’s eyes seemed to become black and white while the onion’s body became more and more transparent.

This scene reminded Chen Rui of a Pseudo-God remnant soul that had disappeared in the Tower of Glory, and he could not help expressing surprise . The holy dragon has been completely annihilated, so I’m not worried about resurrection, but judging from Dodo’s current state, he should have unknowingly merged with Rodriguez’s soul power which had not been digested previously.

Therefore, the countless accumulations from Rodriguez have finally come to a qualitative change.

The sound of the explosion was getting smaller and smaller while the light was fading at a faster speed, but the slime didn’t notice it. He just felt that the taste of these attacks seemed to have improved, and the damage done to him had also sharply reduced, so he could not help devouring more.

“ Boom! ” To Roman’s surprise, the space of the Nirvana Sandbox was actually broken with an opening. The familiar onion rushed over with an unprecedentedly overwhelming breath. Before Student Nephew could react, his eyes went black as he was knocked unconscious.

On the magic television screen, Master Onion was sitting on Roman’s head. The foods in the unlucky nephew’s space ring were all dumped on the ground. Master Onion transformed 4 hands, and ate the meal with a blissful look on his face.

The last place in the quarter-finals had emerged, Dodo defeated Roman and advanced!

chapters.title: Chapter 869: Semi-Final
chapters.body:
Chapter 869: Semi-Final

This championship was broadcast live to the entire Demon Realm. The elimination of the top powerhouse, Bloody Empire Lord Raizen, shocked the entire Demon Realm.

Only a few people such as Chen Rui understood that there was no suspense in Raizen’s defeat in the face of the Demi-God-level Lalaria.

‘Top powerhouse’ was actually only relative to the ordinary level. After entering the super-level, this title was actually no longer suitable for Raizen. It was like the world’s number 1 martial arts master who became a cultivator and entered a brand new world. If he wanted to get the top title again, everything had to start from scratch.

This defeat was not a bad thing for Raizen. Instead, he could get rid of some mental obstacles and go further.

Lalaria became famous from that match and became the biggest favorite to win the championship, but the weirdo loli who insisted that ‘I am a man’ didn’t care about it. In her mind, there was nothing more important than defeating that hateful Chen Rui.

Next came the 3rd match, Catherine vs Paglio.

The field was also randomly selected. This time, the battlefield for the 2 of them was a hill near a small lake.

Looking at the mysterious beauty wearing a veil on the opposite side, Paglio’s eyes flashed with a high fighting spirit. After the training in the Dragon Island, the poison dragon had entered the Kingdom level. Originally, he wanted to fight against Raizen initially to revenge the defeat in the Warlock Fortress, but he was assigned to the lower bracket.

In the lower bracket, the strongest should be Octopus King Red Pipit. Paglio had heard Chen Rui talk about the strength of King Red Pipit, and he knew that he was not an opponent, but the empress of the Dark Shadow Empire should have advanced to the Kingdom level only 2 years ago. Although her reputation as the second powerhouse, top sage and top beauty was extremely established, it still wasn’t enough to scare off Master Poison Dragon.

“I don’t like to attack women. Beauty, give up early, alright? If you don’t mind, let’s find a place to drink wine and have a chat?” Even if he knew that the person opposite was the Dark Shadow Empire’s empress who was famous in the Demon Realm, Master Poison Dragon still unceremoniously teased her.

There seemed to be a smile behind Catherine’s veil, “As long as someone doesn’t mind.”

“No matter who he is, I will let him not mind.” The poison dragon grinned and raised his fist.

Don’t mind your ass! Someone couldn’t help but grit his teeth.

In fact, the poison dragon knew that Catherine was not a simple opponent, and it was even more impossible for her to admit defeat immediately. On the surface, he was being flirty, but a powerful poison sneaked into the ground under his feet and silently went toward Catherine.

Since she was the opponent, it was Paglio’s style to do everything possible to knock down the opponent, even though unscrupulous methods. Back then, Chen Rui, a rookie, learned from Paglio that the trick that gave up the fanciness was the most concise and ruthless. It was also the most effective means of attack.

When Paglio said a few words just now, the ground beneath Catherine’s feet suddenly collapsed. The foundation of that circle of land seemed to be instantly turned into a terrifying quagmire with a green mist.

This was only on the surface, the real poison had completely infiltrated into her body before this.

Catherine seemed to have lost her mobility for a while due to the lethal poison. She fell into the poisonous quagmire. Many fans in the auditorium screamed.

Paglio’s surprise attack succeeded, but he looked shocked suddenly. His body flickered and appeared in mid-air. Almost in the next second, a figure below broke out of the ground and made a hole.

This method was exactly the same as Paglio’s sneak attack just now. It could also be regarded as retaliating with the same move.

This figure was a golden human figure of approximately 2 meters high with red eyes flashing. The facial features were somewhat blurred, and mysterious inscriptions were engraved on the whole body.

The highest grade war puppet of the Asmodeus Royal Family – Golden puppet!

Not only the 1 on the ground, but 3 identical golden puppets surrounded Paglio. In the air opposite, Catherine’s figure was looming as if she was ethereal.

The poison dragon was slightly surprised. She is really worthy of the first sage title. Not only did she see through the sneak attack, but she almost succeeded in counterattacking.

As Catherine pointed at Paglio, the 4 golden puppets turned into 4 swift golden lights that flew toward the poison dragon at the same time. Paglio had no fear. He turned into a green mist, wrapping the golden light in it.

The green mist had a powerful Kingdom power, and the 4 golden lights suddenly dimmed. Before they were nearly extinguished, countless golden lights burst out suddenly, interweaving into a golden giant net which divided the intangible green mist into thousands of tangible broken pieces.

The pieces that were scattered all over condensed into Paglio. At the same time, the golden giant net twisted and turned into a brand new shiny golden puppet, rushing toward Paglio with a speed and power that surpassed the previous one.

“ Bang bang bang …” The sound of dense and high-speed strikes came, and the 2 figures quickly exchanged hits in the air. Although the position was quite far from the ground, cracks continued to appear on the ground under the enormous pressure. As the water in the small lake set off a huge wave, Paglio became more and more frightened. In the Warlock Fortress back then, Catherine had activated [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] which moved Raizen, but now Catherine had neither personally attacked nor used the legendary strongest puppet; she was just using 4 golden puppet secret techniques to combine them into a shiny golden puppet. Yet it was on par with him, a Kingdom-level powerhouse!

In just 2 years, it seems that the Dark Shadow Empire’s empress must have undergone some remarkable changes. Her strength is unfathomable. I only entered the Kingdom-level 2 years later than her, even if I have the talent of dragons, my strength is still far inferior.

Having understood this, Paglio’s expression became more and more focused. He had completely put away the arrogance of dragons. On the journey of training, there is no undefeated powerhouse. Sometimes, failure is a precious accumulation. Being able to test the results of training in front of such a strong opponent is a rare opportunity in itself.

Thinking of this, Paglio calmed down instead. He shouted loudly, flew to the small lake, and plunged down. The water in the small lake splashed, and countless green mists spread rapidly, covering the entire battlefield. In the Kingdom of the poison dragon, all the plants withered and died in an instant. Even the hard ground and rocks were eroded by the terrifying poison and lowered layer by layer.

When the shiny golden puppet punched the small lake, it made a huge hole in the water that could not be filled. The hole continued to spread, and the lake water quickly evaporated into poisonous gas.

In the blink of an eye, the entire small lake had dried up, but Paglio was nowhere to be seen.

Just as the shiny golden puppet was looking for the enemy, 2 huge clusters of fluorescent light suddenly appeared in the mist that filled the sky. They were a pair of huge eyes. Corresponding to the huge eyes were the huge beast condensed by the mist which engulfed the shiny golden puppet.

In the process of being engulfed by the huge beast phantasm, the surface of the shiny golden puppet began to corrode rapidly. When the huge beast threw the puppet to the ground, it dispersed into smoke. The shiny golden puppet was already broken and dull. With a ‘ bang ’, it scattered into 4 broken figures, which instantly evaporated into smoke and disappeared.

After Paglio took down the shiny golden puppet with a big move, he was about to take advantage of the situation to attack Catherine, but he suddenly froze and stood still.

“You still want to fight?” A calm voice came from behind.

Paglio clearly felt that he was locked by a great power which was overwhelmingly powerful, and he sensed an unbeatable feeling in his heart.

At this time, in the highly poisonous kingdom shrouded in green mist, a little bit of greenery began to bloom one after another. Those plants that had withered and died began to revive again. Even the lake water turned back to liquid and became clear.

Those deadly poisons were instead converted into nutrients by some strange power.

This scene made the poison dragon show a bitter smile. He no longer intended to be entangled with her in the fight. He shook his head decisively, “I admit defeat.”

Paglio was clear that the strength gap between them was very huge. Catherine was merciful and did not use her real strength. Otherwise, if she used a killing move at the beginning, he had no room for resistance at all.

In the third match, Catherine won and advanced. Many fans breathed a sigh of relief.

According to the intel given by a certain slime after the match, the recording of Master Poison Dragon’s previous flirting with Her Majesty Empress was forwarded to Ms. Emerald Dragon by a mysterious man, and he also reported some previous secret violations. The next day, Master Poison Dragon’s face had a few claw marks. The official explanation was ‘I scratched it accidentally’.

Round 4: ‘Aguile’ vs Zola.

Well, this was the most unbelievable match so far.

The 2 participants who were supposed to be fighting intensely stared at each other for a while as if they were looking for flaws in each other (actually, they were affectionate).

Finally, Zola walked toward ‘Aguile’, and ‘Aguile’ was motionless as if his mind was enchanted by some spirit magic. Just when everyone thought that Zola was going to take the opportunity to make a big move, Ms. Fairy Dragon no doubt struck. She hugged the guy’s neck, and their bodies stuck together at zero distance.

[Death Embrace]? Throwing skills?

After a while, Ms. Fairy Dragon disappeared from the arena.

Only then did the audience react. Zola conceded defeat! ‘Aguile’ directly advances!

Wow, this is the quarterfinals!

Moreover, ‘Aguile’ is the prince consort of Shea, the Fallen Angel Empire!

The mysterious and powerful female magician, Ms. Zola is actually the lover of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Prince Consort Aguile!

This scene became the focus of heated discussions in the Demon Realm for some time. Especially in the Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire newspapers where even the reserved front pages were full of gossip headlines.

A certain pretty boy prince consort + kept man skill has reached its peak, winning without a fight to enter the semi-finals!

Prince consort cheating! The crown on Her Majesty Shea’s head looks green!

Mysterious Miss Magician publicly challenged Her Majesty Empress…

Chen Rui could only smile bitterly. Zola didn’t like to be in the limelight, but these gossip news made Ms. Fairy Dragon very proud.

In any case, the toyboy Royal Highness Prince Consort made it to the semi-finals.

The semi-final matches were: Red Pipit vs Catherine; Chen Rui vs Lalaria.

This would be the real battle and test.

chapters.title: Chapter 870: Encounter
chapters.body:
Chapter 870: Encounter

At night.

The Iron Fist Estate was brightly lit. For the demons, the nightlife was just getting started.

The night market had now become an indispensable facility in the Demon Realm’s estates and towns, and it was also an important source of tax revenue.

As one of the major estates of the Bloody Empire, the Iron Fist Estate was the first estate in which the deceased Young Prince Teris carried out a pilot ‘copycat’ night market. A large-scale night market was established in 2 major areas of the city.

In the eastern district night market, a group of beautiful women appeared. It became a beautiful scenery line that caught the people’s eyes.

More than a dozen beauties accompanied by only 2 men immediately attracted ignorant guys to come forward to flirt with them, but the next moment, they were ‘being’ turned into meteors and disappeared into the sky.

Immediately, someone recognized that the petite short-haired person who kept flirting with the beauties was actually the super powerhouse Lalaria who defeated the Bloody Empire Lord Raizen!

This discovery frightened the people with bad intentions – Even Raizen the Great was knocked down with a punch. My flesh is not enough for others to even stick between their teeth.

Not only that, Zola, the beautiful magician who had an affair with the Fallen Angel Empire’s prince consort, was also on the list. There was also Paglio who failed in the quarterfinals, Dodo the strange onion, as well as Roman and Olypheus who entered the quarterfinals before.

Even without Lalaria, this lineup was quite scary. For a while, no one dared to come up to chat with them.

“Alice, Adeline, come and try this. This is the specialty yoyo fruit of the Iron Fist Estate. Eat it and burp. You will feel a special coolness coming out of your ears, and your whole body seems to be floating.” Athena visited the Iron Fist Estate several times in the early years with her father and Red Dragon Mom. Although there was no night market at that time, she was no stranger to the specialties here.

“Really?” Alice shoved a yoyo fruit into her mouth, “Adeline, try it too.”

“ En .” The naga girl took the fruit from Alice and showed a jubilant smile. Although sometimes I miss my sister, family, and… mother, it’s so nice to stay by that person’s side and be with these friends.

“Isabella, you were amazing just now. You cut the price of 12 black crystal coins to 1 black crystal coin just now!” The little succubus maid’s face was full of admiration. If it was her, cutting a third of the price was already the limit.

“Of course, my sister is the best!” Ms. Black Dragon said with a smile while playing with the red coral earrings that Isabella gave her, “Lalaria, when will you pay me?”

The mustached flat-chested loli, who was attentive in front of Ms. Fairy Dragon suddenly froze, “Wait for me to win the championship. I’m broke now. Don’t worry. Didn’t I give you an IOU? I’ll win everything back later and give you twice as much property!”

“Lalaria, you are such a good person!” Ms. Black Dragon held the mustached loli’s hand, trying to increase her good impression in her mind, “By the way, words alone cannot be taken as evidence. Let’s write the extra double into another IOU.”

The mustached loli, “…”

“ Wow! It’s really a strange feeling like drinking wine secretly for the first time. Sister, try it…” This time it was Alice who called ‘sister’. The feeling of yoyo fruit was indeed very special. The little loli was swaying and almost fell. She was held by another veiled blond woman beside her.

Hearing ‘drinking wine secretly’, the blond woman pinched the little loli’s face lightly, and there was a touch of tenderness in her purple eyes. No one could have imagined that the veiled beauty beside the prince consort was the original match, 1 of the 3 rulers, Shea. Lucifer.

This was clearly bringing the harem to the night market.

“Roman, try this red robe.”

“Medilu, blue color suits Roman.”

“I think red is fine.”

“Roman, tell them yourself. What color do you wear?” This time it was the smiling Madam Aunt who rubbed it in.

“…” Student Nephew, who was in a dilemma for a long time, finally chose a red and blue robe, but that style could be described with the word ‘vulgar’. It gave Master Poison Dragon a good laugh.

“Fortunately, leader isn’t here.” Roman wiped a sweat. Sir Uncle’s means were more ruthless than Madam Aunt.

“That kind of loser may be on the way to meet a woman privately.” The little mermaid princess was still vicious.

In fact, Helen said it right this time. The person whom Chen Rui met alone was indeed a woman.

“Your Majesty Shea, as well as that Ms. Zola and Lord Athena, and so on… Are they at ease to let you come out alone?” The woman asked indifferently.

Chen Rui, who had changed his face, smiled slightly, “It’s like you are at ease facing me alone.”

The black eyes behind the veil remained serene, “So, did you come with a certain will of that Royal Majesty? Or your will has already represented everything?”

“My will…” Chen Rui scratched his head, “According to your usual understanding, it should include foolishness, ignorance and so on.”

“People change.” Catherine shook her head slowly, “Especially the environment and time can change a lot of things. You can use ‘involuntarily’ to explain it.”

“I admit that I’ve changed a lot.” Chen Rui stared into her eyes, “But there are some things that flow in our blood and breath. Even in the face of death, they won’t dim or fade away.”

Catherine looked away, “That’s what Gustav said when he was fighting with Raizen, so you’re also proficient in lip reading.”

“Why don’t you ask what will not change?”

“Aggressiveness is not the demeanor of an imperial prince consort.” Catherine changed the subject calmly. She suddenly stood up and bowed, “I asked to meet Your Highness today to ask a few questions.”

Chen Rui was startled, then he smiled bitterly, “I dare not accept this kind of etiquette. You can just ask.”

“You can definitely accept it.” Catherine sighed, “2 years ago, the entire Demon Realm thought that the Fallen Angel Empire was forced to sacrifice their interests in exchange for a short-term peace, but no one could have imagined that that was the beginning of the declaration of war of the Fallen Angel Empire. Your currency war has taught me, Raizen, and everyone a lesson. This should be just the beginning, what else will follow?”

“If you compare it to a financial turmoil, this is really just the beginning.” Chen Rui nodded, “If my plan can be implemented smoothly, causing the butterfly effect to expand further, the worst result is that the entire economy will collapse. …”

Catherine listened to him introduce some common knowledge of the financial crisis, and her facial expression changed suddenly, “First hit the Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire with the currency war, then use the military parade to show a powerful military strength to deter the 2 empires, now participating in the martial battle championship to show personal strength… Raizen and I were really wrong. We shouldn’t have given you 2 years.”

Chen Rui shook his head, “It’s too early to tell who is right and who is wrong.”

“It’s still early? Do we still have to wait until your army conquers the 2 empires?” Catherine’s voice had a bit of self-deprecation, “You may be able to win the final victory, but even if only 1 person remained in the Dark Shadow Empire, we will never yield. That was the case with Midnight Sun back then, and it will be the same now and in the future.”

Since it is impossible to hold your hand side by side, then face to face with a sharp blade in hand as an enemy.

“The era of Midnight Sun is over.” Chen Rui stood up slowly while laughing, “It’s fine as long as I can achieve the goal of destroying the Demon Realm. Think about it, no matter who wins or loses, the 3 empires’ military power and economy will be greatly damaged. We may not be able to recover for hundreds of years, and we will not be able to compete with the human world at all.”

Catherine was shocked, “Is this your real purpose?”

“Of course,” Chen Rui suddenly showed a strange smile, “Unless Your Majesty Empress is willing to sacrifice yourself…”

“I don’t know whether to appreciate or hate this way of framing the issue. Well, I already understand the bad consequences of launching a war.” Catherine gave Chen Rui a deep look, “But I really can’t understand your intentions. Do you want to integrate the strength of the Demon Realm and crusade the enemies of the human world?”

“If smart people think too much, they will complicate simple problems.” Chen Rui pointed to her head, “There is no doubt that you are a smart person.”

“ Hmph! ” Catherine glared at him in dissatisfaction, “Your so-called simplification is believing in the cooperation program you proposed 2 years ago?”

“Why not?” Chen Rui shrugged casually, but there was seriousness in his gaze.

Catherine pondered for a long time before she stood up and walked toward the door, “Perhaps, there is one last multiple-choice question between us.”

“Perhaps?”

“Wait till you can beat Lalaria first…The final is when everything is revealed. Whether… the end or the beginning, I don’t know.”

Chen Rui was startled. Judging from Catherine’s tone, she actually wants to make an ultimate decision with me in the finals. Not to mention others, Catherine must first defeat Red Pipit at the peak stage of the Kingdom level!

“Catherine, we…”

Catherine paused for a while, then she strode out without looking back.

Night market.

A slender figure appeared in the crowd. This lovely and fair-skinned young little loli. She looked no more than 3 years old. Her black hair was slightly curly with 2 lovely horn braids, and she looked delicate and beautiful. Her big black eyes seemed to be able to talk, giving the first impression of ‘super cute’.

The young little loli was wearing a small skirt, holding a huge plush pig head toy as she looked around for someone.

Her clothes and the texture of the toy seemed to be expensive, but there were no adults beside her. This quickly attracted the attention of thoughtful people.

“Little girl, Uncle Lu will take you to see the goldfish, okay?” The fatty, who looked like an immoral person, grabbed the young little loli with a wretched smile on his face.

The young little loli seemed to have the sensing power to danger. She immediately showed a vigilant expression, and her black hair slowly began to turn red.

“ Bang! ” The fatty’s wretched smiling face suddenly twisted and dented in the shape of a shoe print. The fat body instantly flew out, hitting the wall in the distance and leaving a human-shaped dent behind.

The one who kicked the fatty was a heroic and beautiful woman with short red hair. She also habitually carried a greatsword behind her back.

The young little loli looked at the red-haired woman with equal vigilance, and suddenly blinked her big eyes. She put one arm around the pig’s head, stretched out the other hand, and said in a childish voice, “Aunty, huggies.”

The red-haired woman was stunned for a moment before she hugged the young little loli. As the young little loli hugged her neck, she immediately felt relaxed as she felt a kind of reassuring breath become clearer. Then, a voice sounded, “Athena! What are you doing?”

“ Huh? ” Ms. Black Dragon rushed over first, “Athena, who is this?”

“I don’t know either.” Athena stroked the young little loli’s hair, “Little girl, what’s your name? Where’s your daddy and mommy?”

“Duoduo is looking for daddy…” The young little loli looked aggrieved and hugged Athena’s neck tightly.

“Duoduo? The name is very nice.” Athena felt that the name was a little familiar like she had heard it in Chen Rui’s human world story a few years ago, but she didn’t think much about it. She hugged the young little loli, “Aunty look for your daddy with you, okay?”

“Aunty is so nice.” The young little loli kissed Athena’s face.

“And here.” Ms. Black Dragon put her face up cheerfully, but the young little loli didn’t buy it.

Ms. Black Dragon did not feel dejected, She shouted joyfully, “Sister! Come quickly, Athena found a Duoduo!”

Soon, the cute young little loli was surrounded by the harem.

Soon, the cuteness of the young little loli conquered the harem.

The strange thing was that Duoduo was very close to Athena, Isabella, Kia and even Shea and Zola, but she was more wary of others. The most obvious was Lalaria, who just came over and wanted to hug her, but Ms. Duoduo’s crying threw the mustached flat-chested loli into the air.

Even the 10-year-old dragon loli from the fan club was also listed as a must cry by Ms. Duoduo.

“It doesn’t make sense!” For this reason, Lalaria deliberately tore off her mustache and tried her best to show an amiable smile, but it remained the same.

All the girls wanted to help Duoduo find her parents, but Ms. Duoduo only knew that daddy was called daddy and mommy was called mommy. She didn’t know anything about the rest.

“Duoduo! Where are you?” An anxious voice sounded from a distance. Athena and the others felt familiar with the sound.

The young little loli was being hugged by Zola and seemed to want to break free, but unfortunately, she didn’t have the strength. Soon, the girls found the owner of the voice.

No doubt she was an acquaintance: Liliz, the female officer of the Dark Shadow Empire.

“This is your daughter?” Athena was stunned: By the way, I seem to have heard the news of Liliz and Terdila getting married, but the 2 have been married for less than a year. Could it be that she got pregnant and then got married?

Liliz hesitated for a moment before she nodded.

Here the young little loli had already started to cry, “I don’t know Aunt Liliz, I want to look for daddy!”

Everyone, “…”

“I’m sorry for bothering everyone this time.” Liliz didn’t want to stay any longer. She hugged Duoduo, bowed deeply, and said goodbye with Terdila who came later.

After watching Duoduo disappear with reluctance, Athena realized that the pig head toy was still in her hands. She touched it lovingly as if she was stroking the cute little girl.
