“Why, reluctant to let her go?” Delia saw through her friend’s thoughts, “Just work hard and have one yourself.”

Athena blushed; only to hear Kia say curiously, “Isn’t Duoduo’s daddy Terdila?”

Alice’s eyes widened, “Is Terdila the legendary… tauren?”

Poor Terdila, inexplicably became tauren.

“Who is Duoduo’s daddy?”

“ Hmph ! It must be some irresponsible man who left after impregnating others! If I meet this kind of guy, I must cut the tools of crime, then beat him up to the point of bedridden!” Lala Loli’s words resonated with the girls for the first time.

“ Achoo !” A certain irresponsible man was about to rush to the night market to meet the girls when he suddenly sneezed and felt an inexplicable chill.

chapters.title: Chapter 871: Empress Vs Octopus King
chapters.body:
Chapter 871: Empress Vs Octopus King

The appearance of the young little loli was just a small interlude. When Chen Rui arrived at the night market, the harem troupe was watching a mini concert in the plaza. Since the last successful concert of the Fallen Angel Empire, this form of performance had been gaining popularity in the Demon Realm.

Due to the martial battle championship, the Iron Fist City currently gathered audiences from all over the world, so many fans spontaneously organize free concerts. Although the level was not very high and the special effects were amateur, it still attracted many people.

Chen Rui just heard about Liliz having a daughter in a series of experiences reported by Ms. Black Dragon. Since Ms. Black Dragon did not mention Duoduo’s name, the pig head toy was also kept like a treasure by Athena in the space ring, Chen Rui didn’t really look into it.

On the contrary, Athena boldly entered Chen Rui’s room and raided him at night. According to the little succubus maid who came to help her later, the ‘battle’ begging for a baby seemed to be particularly intense.

2 days later, the top 4 semi-finals began.

The first game was Catherine vs Red Pipit. It was located in the Rowlin Forest of the ancient battlefield.

Since both of them were Kingdom-level powerhouses, during this period, the enchantment in the competition area had been reinforced again. A special small magic circle was arranged under each tree, and the entire forest area was a giant protective magic circle.

After seeing the strength that Lalaria showed when fighting Raizen, Red Pipit was not afraid but rejoiced instead. He was determined to enter the finals to gain valuable experience through the battle with the Demi-God powerhouse so that he could search for the threshold of advancing to Demi-God. Perhaps this would become his biggest reward for participating in this championship.

Of course, in order to face Lalaria, he must first defeat his semi-final opponent, Catherine. As for the question of Lalaria entering the final, Octopus King thought there was no suspense at all.

Facing the Demon Realm top sage, Red Pipit could feel that the breath on Catherine was no trivial matter, but compared to him, a veteran powerhouse who had been standing in the peak stage of the Kingdom level for many years, there was still a considerable gap. It’s not too hard to win.

“It’s not that I underestimate women, but you have no chance of winning.” Red Pipit had a faint contempt on his face, “I will never be merciful to my opponent, but if you admit defeat now, you can at least retreat unscathed.”

Catherine didn’t answer, and her veiled face showed no expression. 4 golden puppets suddenly appeared around her body. This action fully demonstrated her fighting attitude and determination.

Red Pipit didn’t continue talking. As he shook his dark red robe casually, the ground suddenly trembled slightly, and waves of terrifying momentum burst out.

Catherine felt as if she was in a stormy sea. She drew a mark in the air with her fingertips flashing red. The totems on the 4 golden puppets began to glow. Immediately, the mark burned and turned into a giant net of golden light. With the golden puppet as the 4 corners, a formation was formed. At first glance, it looked like a marionette.

The golden puppet moved with a strange rhythm, and the tide-like momentum was immediately dismantled and dissolved. It was like a large ship that would not be overturned while breaking the waves at the sea.

[4 Royal Souls Formation], a high level war puppet secret skill that integrated offense and defense.

“Very subtle means, but unfortunately, in front of absolute strength, no matter how clever the skills, they are useless.” Red Pipit shook his head. With a wave of his hand, the golden net shook, and some ‘silk threads’ were broken. Nonetheless, they were automatically reconnected and didn’t collapse.

Octopus King’s small eyes narrowed slightly. His chubby body instantly appeared in front of the giant net. As his hands were slashed, the giant net split, and the 4 golden puppets were thrown backward. The [4 Royal Souls Formation] collapsed.

The 4 golden puppets turned and merged together, turning into a shiny golden puppet which was the [Combat Soul Fusion] that was activated when she fought Paglio. The shiny golden puppet had both strength and speed which was much more powerful than the golden puppet.

Facing the incoming shiny golden puppet, Octopus King just sneered as his figure flickered. In the blink of an eye, he seemed to split into several avatars to surround the shiny golden puppet. In fact, it was actually the afterimages of moving at a high speed.

With the high-speed beating sound, the shiny golden puppet began to twist, deform, and shatter at a speed visible to the naked eye.

To the audience, Octopus King’s chubby figure flashed a few overlapping images before returning to its place, and the shiny golden puppet that was still intact a few seconds ago actually shattered into countless pieces.

Paglio defeated the shiny golden puppet after unleashing all his kingdom power plus his own poisonous talent, yet the puppet only lasted for a few seconds under Octopus King. The higher the strength level, the greater the difference in small realms. The gap between early stage Kingdom and peak stage Kingdom was 2 small realms, and the difference was indeed significant.

When the shiny golden puppet was shattered, Catherine suddenly disappeared, and Octopus King suddenly had a warning sign in his mind. When he looked up, he saw a huge dark golden foot with a terrifying strength stepping down from the sky.

Even Red Pipit did not dare to neglect this kind of power. He raised his palms to the sky, and a huge wave-like strength surged out. The huge soles of his feet could no longer step downward when it was 5 meters away from Red Pipit.

This dark gold war puppet was more than 10 meters high. Catherine was standing on the puppet’s shoulders. She slowly pressed her hands down, and the runes on the dark gold war puppet flashed. Suddenly, the strength had been greatly enhanced.

Octopus King’s facial expression changed slightly when he sensed that the pressure increased greatly. His feet began to sink into the soil slowly.

Catherine injected black flames from both hands into the forehead of the dark gold war puppet. The dark gold war puppet’s eyes were full of green light. It stepped Red Pipit into the soil.

There were a lot of cracks on the ground all around, and the ground continued to make sounds and shake. Obviously, the strength of this foot was extremely amazing.

“ Bang! ” The ground in the distance suddenly exploded, and a chubby figure burst out of the ground, rushing toward her speedily.

The dark gold war puppet suddenly shrunk to an ordinary scale of about 2 meters, facing the Octopus King.

The projections in the arena kept showing images of 3 figures shifting and flashing. Even with the reinforced enchantment, the projections were still be blurred for a short time due to the strong shock. One could imagine the intensity of the battle.

The dark gold war puppet’s body was very special. Although it was damaged, it could continue to be regenerate, and various parts of the body could change shape. Sometimes, it transformed into giants; sometimes, it transformed its limbs into sharp blades.

When Red Pipit shouted, Catherine and the dark gold war puppet were blown away. The Octopus King didn’t pursue. His arms seemed to be transformed into 8, quickly drawing waves of trajectories.

The surrounding temperature dropped suddenly as the forest was quickly covered with a layer of hoarfrost. Layers of transparent crystal walls crisscrossed at the place where Catherine and the dark gold war puppet were located. It was like a maze. Red Pipit was no longer visible.

“Although I have been in the Dead Sea for many years, I have also heard of the prestige of the Asmodeus Royal Family’s [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet].” Outside the maze, Octopus King’s gaze no longer had contempt, and it was replaced by a serious expression, “Only now I know that [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] can not only infinitely regenerate and transform freely, but it can also complement and enhance the strength of the controller, resulting in a drastic increase in the strength of both sides. Your strength should not reach the peak stage of the Kingdom level yet, but your combat power is almost close to the peak stage level.”

Catherine still didn’t speak. Her hands glowed faintly as she tried to use her talent [Element Weakening] to dissolve the surrounding crystal walls. The crystal walls began to thin out, but it soon regenerated again, seemingly endlessly.

“I recognize your strength, but even if your strength reaches the peak stage of the Kingdom level, you are not my opponent.” Red Pipit was not bragging. As a veteran powerhouse of the peak stage of the Kingdom level, he was only one step away from Demi-God. Coupled with his own talent strength, there were very few people in the same realm who could beat him, “I will show your the true strength of the peak stage of the Kingdom level. Considering that you are a woman, let me remind you —— Since you choose to fight, you must be prepared to die.”

Catherine in the maze remained calm, and she finally answered, “This reminder also applies to you.”

A murderous look flashed in Octopus King’s eyes. He jumped up and disappeared.

Octopus King’s figure suddenly jumped out of the mirror behind the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet], and he punched across the air toward the puppet. There was a deep fist mark, and the circumference of the fist mark was covered with a circle of ice crystals. [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet]’s recovery had slowed down a lot due to the freezing temperature.

The puppet reacted extremely quickly as its hand suddenly transformed into a sledgehammer. It swung and shattered the figure, leaving a big pit on the crystal wall, but all that was scattered on the ground was broken ice. Soon, the big pit began to regenerate automatically.

Catherine suddenly understood the role of these crystal walls, and she immediately stood back-to-back with the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] to prevent possible sneak attacks at any time.

No doubt, Octopus King kept flashing like a ghost. Most of the attacks were on Catherine – As long as the controller was destroyed, the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] would naturally lose its strength.

Catherine understood the Octopus King’s intentions and tried her best to avoid multiple attacks with the buff and protection of [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet].

In this kingdom, the Octopus King was almost an unsolvable existence. The real body would only appear at the moment when the attack was launched, then it would become an ice crystal avatar. The trouble was, if this ice crystal avatar was not destroyed, it would continuously be attacked.

In just a few minutes, the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] was already badly damaged, and a large number of ice crystals had solidified on its body. The recovery speed was several times slower than normal.

After resolving another sneak attack by Red Pipit, Catherine accidentally glanced at the puppet when she changed positions with the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet]. Her pupils contracted suddenly because she saw Red Pipit’s shadow there!

He is in the body of [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet]!

It turned out that as long as this ice crystal reached a certain number and thickness, it could become the medium for the Red Pipit to enter and exit. Previously, Octopus King deliberately kept attacking [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] just for this moment.

This tactic is simply unpredictable , Even Catherine was tricked.

As Catherine thought of that, Octopus King had already flown out from the crystal wall of the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] and hit Catherine with a punch.

This punch contained a powerful strength. Even if Catherine’s strength was quite close to the peak stage of the Kingdom level, as long as she was hit, she would be seriously injured even if she didn’t die.

After Octopus King delivered the fatal blow, his facial expression suddenly changed because the punch actually penetrated Catherine’s body without any hindrance.

Phantom? Octopus King reacted immediately, and a strong sense of crisis arose in his mind. Before he had time to avoid it, a sharp blade suddenly pierced through his chest.

Octopus King roared wildly. He threw his arm violently back at an unconventional angle, whipping the figure away. Catherine’s figure appeared in the distance on the other side. The one that was struck away was the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet].

“You actually…” Octopus King looked at the blade of his chest in disbelief. He sensed a strange vitality that did not belong to him spreading rapidly. Apart from the heart that was shattered by sharp qi, every part of his body was invaded by this strange power.

This short blade was obviously a special legendary grade weapon. It could not only pierce the defense, but it could also store and spread Nirvana power. The strange ‘vitality’ made Red Pipit’s wound heal quickly, sealing the entire blade in his body. Not only that, this power was still constantly trying to possess the body to obliterate his soul and completely occupy the body of Red Pipit.

“Be prepared to die… I reminded you.” Catherine said lightly, and her body gradually changed from nothing to physical form with the cloak behind her.

1 of the 7 artifacts, the Dark Shadow Cape!

The Dark Shadow Cape was actually a very ‘powerful’ artifact. The weaker the user, the more difficult it was to play the role of the artifact. The stronger the user, the greater the effect and buff of the artifact.

At that time, when Catherine’s strength was greatly reduced because of ‘Nirvana’, she was chased by Broc. The power of the Dark Shadow Cape was not unleashed properly, and she was almost killed by Broc. When Catherine’s strength reached the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, she could use the strength of the Dark Shadow Cape to hide in Raizen’s kingdom.

The Dark Shadow Cape had three functions: invisibility, phantom, and [Anti-Magic]. Catherine used phantom to confuse Red Pipit, then she launched a sneak attack to retaliate with his skill, giving Octopus King a fatal strike.

The arena audience cheered. The top sage and top beauty Catherine the Great no doubt did not disappoint us. She won the battle in the end!

Only Raizen and others understood how unexpected Catherine’s victory was.

Chen Rui no longer watched the battle in the arena as he rushed to the battlefield with all his strength. Red Pipit was his friend. Although life and death was normal for his kind of battle, he would never sit back and watch this friend die, especially dying in Catherine’s hands.

“Good tactic! Good scheming!” Octopus King praised 2 ‘good’ in a row. He gritted his teeth and slapped his chest. The sharp blade that grew among his flesh thrust out from his chest, bringing out lots of green blood, “I was almost defeated or even lost my life because I underestimated the enemy. I don’t feel guilty at all for this loss, but unfortunately, this battle is not over yet. I have 3 hearts. This level is not enough to knock me down.”

Catherine sensed that the opponent’s momentum not only did not weaken, but skyrocketed to a terrifying level instead. She immediately recalled the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] and was prepared for a tough fight.

“I thought I had given you enough attention, but I still underestimated you. I’m sorry for that. Your strength and wisdom are enough to uplift my fighting spirit. I will do my best now.”

With that said, Octopus King took a deep breath, and the crystal wall in the kingdom gradually disappeared, turning into a rough surfy sea.

chapters.title: Chapter 872: Ice And Fire
chapters.body:
Chapter 872: Ice And Fire

For a time, the space in this area turned into a turbulent sea, and all the land and trees suffered annihilation as they were drowned by seawater.

At the moment when the sea covered the space, Octopus King’s eyes moved. He had sensed something, and suddenly expressed realization, “I see! You used the secret technique to call the life strength of all creatures in this area just now so that you can exert that kind of attack power. Your real strength is only just entering the intermediate stage of the Kingdom level, so you are not my opponent at all. As long as I suppress this secret technique, you will be vulnerable.”

The water level of the sea rose rapidly, and it had submerged all the trees. Catherine’s momentum was indeed weakened a lot.

Catherine let out a low snort, and a black flame ignited all over her body. The flame was full of vitality. The countless green tree canopies in the sea gradually emerged and rose one by one. No matter how the sea water rose, it could never drown the trees. It became a spectacular phenomenon for a while.

This kingdom with powerful vitality is infinitely magical. Nirvana is worthy of being the strongest bloodline talent of the Asmodeus Royal Family.

Octopus King was slightly surprised. The opponent’s kingdom power was obviously inferior, but he couldn’t suppress it. Before he could change his kingdom power again, Catherine’s breath began to increase significantly. She flew straight toward him with the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet].

As soon as Octopus King pressed the water surface, hundreds of huge water balls were launched at Catherine like homing missiles.

Catherine’s hands showed a touch of brilliance as she drew a mysterious trajectory. All the approaching water balls seemed to encounter something slippery, and they were repelled. It was not just an ingenious force-diverting trick, the water balls quickly thinned as they slid away, eventually dispersing into a liquid. It was [Element Weakening] of the Asmodeus Royal Family’s bloodline talent.

This talent was called the nemesis of all element attacks. Coupled with the [Anti-Magic] effect of the Dark Shadow Cape, it was enough to make her a nightmare for magicians. However, Octopus King was obviously not a pure magic trainer. Seeing that the water balls couldn’t work, he shifted to the back of Catherine and whipped his arm.

The blow was extremely powerful, and the speed was astonishing. The strong wind drew a rapid trail on the water. Catherine jumped up and did a somersault in the air, narrowly avoiding the blow, but the strong remaining momentum still swept her. A shocking red color appeared on the veil.

Octopus King’s power was unyielding. His arms turned into 8 illusory arms, and dozens of whip rushed over, almost sealing off Catherine’s dodges from all directions.

A huge dark golden figure suddenly appeared in front of Catherine. This figure instantly distorted and transformed into a large shield with a diameter of 10 meters suspended in the air. Those strong winds left countless pits on the shield, but they were unable to break through this barrier.

Catherine had used this short precious time to catch her breath. As she took a deep breath, all the trees on the sea were pulling and swaying in this direction.

Under the effect of this vitality, the [Flame of Nirvana] around Catherine became more fiery, and her breath rose again. The [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] quickly transformed from a shield shape to a giant sword, slashing in the direction of Octopus King. This kind of transformation was not simple as it required a lot of Nirvana power, but fortunately, the whole forest had been integrated with Catherine’s kingdom, which could provide quite strong support.

The distance between Octopus King and Catherine was around 50 meters, but this extremely sharp strike seemed to be slashing on his head. Octopus King’s figure was split in half and scattered into countless streams of water while his real body appeared in the other direction.

Octopus King, who got the upper hand, frowned a little. Catherine’s means and will were far beyond his imagination, and she was actually able to be in a stalemate with him in such a high-intensity battle.

Furthermore, even Red Pipit dared not be careless with that kind of counterattack.

Although the winning rate was high, this kind of protracted war of attrition was not what Red Pipit hoped. The Octopus King’s eyes turned to the big trees emerging from the sea. The vitality of these trees should be the biggest source of support for Catherine’s battle with higher level opponents. As long as this support is cut off, then there is nothing to be afraid of Catherine.

Thinking of this, Octopus King’s eyes flashed a terrifying red light, and the temperature of the surfy sea suddenly dropped. The entire sea actually froze at a speed visible to the naked eye.

Catherine was shocked. The [Flame of Nirvana] was burning desperately, but in the face of Octopus King, who had an absolute advantage in strength, she was still unable to stop the freezing. Even her own [Flame of Nirvana] was suppressed to the extent that it was almost extinguished.

Catherine knew something was wrong. As her hands wielded, the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] suddenly returned to its usual form, and there were black flames on its body. It shot at Red Pipit with all her strength. It was obvious that she wanted to go all-in.

Octopus King was long prepared. He left a substitute to divert the firepower of the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] while his real body appeared in the sky. At this time, the kingdom of sea had become a world of ice. Whether it was water or trees, they solidified into ice sculptures.

Life was the most special power. It was not easy for Octopus King to completely block the [Nirvana Kingdom] that contained the powerful life force. His eyes were red as berserk power burst out from his body. With a loud shout, all the frozen trees exploded.

These trees were actually Catherine’s kingdom. The collapse of the kingdom made Catherine suffered from recoil. Her veil was stained with red blood as she barely suspended in the air. The [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] flew back to protect her.

Octopus King’s blow consumed a lot of yuan energy, but he clearly felt that Catherine’s breath had been greatly reduced. With a tap of his feet, the entire frozen sea surface cracked open and turned into surging sea water again. The sea water shot water pillar at Octopus King, pushing him toward Catherine.

Catherine let the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] to greet him while she flicked her cloak and disappeared.

The previous exchange made Octopus King very aware of the characteristics of the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet], and he didn’t want to fight with it in close range anymore. Due to the collapse of the kingdom, the strength of the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] dropped sharply. After a few blocks, it was knocked onto the floating ice on the sea surface. It quickly froze and was trapped in the ice.

“Not giving up yet?” Octopus King controlled the sea water to sway around in the search for Catherine’s whereabouts.

He first destroyed Catherine’s kingdom, then he successfully froze her biggest weapon, the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet]. It was equivalent to sealing off her weapon. Even if Catherine could hide for a while with the Dark Shadow Cape, there was no threat.

Under the surge of Red Pipit’s kingdom power, 10 figures suddenly appeared in the void, but they were not Catherine; they were silver puppets, followed by 30 bronze puppets.

“Silver puppet? Bronze puppet?” Red Pipit sneered, “You even use these cheap stuffs? It seems that you are really out of skills.

Dozens of puppets formed a formation and surrounded Octopus King. Octopus King felt that this formation had a special suction force, and the water element power in his kingdom was strongly disturbed. He immediately exuded power with both arms and the formation collapsed. When it collapsed, dozens of puppets were blown away, and the poor quality bronze puppet shattered in mid-air.

At the moment when the formation was broken, Red Pipit looked back with a sense. He saw Catherine wearing the Dark Shadow Cape flying rapidly toward the frozen [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet], wanting to thaw the strongest puppet to make the final fight.

Red Pipit would not give her another chance to fight further. He shifted and quickly appeared behind Catherine. The surging strength burst out and hit Catherine’s back. This punch was unavoidable.

Octopus King still appreciated this woman with varied means and tenacious will. Besides, she was one of the 3 rulers, so this punch would not kill her, but it would severely injure Catherine and freeze her so that she completely lost the ability to resist.

Unsurprisingly, this punch hit Catherine firmly, but Red Pipit’s pupils shrink suddenly. The feeling of this hit was too familiar… No! This is not Catherine, but [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet]!

It is actually the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] who is wearing the Dark Shadow Cape!

The moment Red Pipit hit ‘Catherine’, the thick ice outside the body of the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] which had been frozen on the ice floe, suddenly shattered, and a fiery power rushed toward him. It was impossible to dodge at all.

The shocked Octopus King finally came to his senses. It turned out that Catherine had actually rushed toward him in disguise as the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet], then she let the ice hurt her on purpose, causing him to have a preconceived illusion in his mind. The real immortal puppet disappeared under her control with the Dark Shadow Cape while those silver puppets and bronze puppets were just a cover for confusion.

[Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] lured me here for this long-awaited blow.

The whole strategy is genius. The first part alone requires a lot of courage. Ordinary people can’t do it at all, but she bet it right. This kind of courage and scheming cannot be described with just the word ‘terrifying’!

Chen Rui, who rushed to the edge of the battlefield, was slightly shocked. He felt that the power of [Fire Phoenix’s Yearning] in his body was echoing some kind of strength in front of him. This phenomenon also occurred in the Warlock Fortress.

At this time, there were 2 pairs of wing phantasms behind Catherine, a pair of black and a pair of red. The flames all over her body were not only the vibrant [Flame of Nirvana], but also a combination of pure and incomparable fire element power.

Even if Red Pipit was at his peak, this terrifying power still made him feel dire. He burst out with all his power without hesitation.

The audience felt their vision swaying as if a huge dark red octopus appeared. It was roaring and waving the 8 huge arms in the waves, and above the octopus was a 4-winged phoenix that was burning with flames. Then, the entire projection was blurred under the violent shake.

The shaking finally stopped. Catherine and Red Pipit appeared in the projection. Catherine’s hand was less than 1 meter away from Red Pipit’s head. Red Pipit’s skin had turned red, and his fat face looked a little distorted. Clouds of steam constantly came out from his head as if his blood was boiling.

“You lost.” Catherine’s veil was already dyed with red blood, but her voice was still determined.

Strong unwillingness and disbelief flashed in Red Pipit’s eyes, but he finally sighed, “I admit defeat.”

This was no longer a matter of the number of hearts. An incredible fire element power has invaded his body. This kind of power had quite a strong restraining effect on Octopus King’s physique. Once it erupted, even his soul would be severely injured.

Catherine slowly withdrew her hand, and Octopus King felt the fire element power was withdrawn as well. He took a deep breath, and the blood that was almost burning quickly cooled down. The redness on the surface of his skin gradually faded.

“The blow just now is not simply burning vitality. What is the secret technique?”

Catherine smiled bitterly, “This is a new flame power I got, I named it [Fire Phoenix Transformation]. Fused with Nirvana power, it can deliver a super powerful blow, but only 1 blow. If we fight again, I will not be able to defeat you.”

“I missed a lot of opportunities, and you took the only chance. From this point of view, I didn’t lose in vain.” The Octopus King gave her a deep look, “If you can reach the peak stage of the Kingdom level, you should be a good opponent.”

After speaking, the Octopus King crushed the number plate and disappeared.

At another place, Raizen clenched his fists while watching this scene on the television screen.

Catherine actually defeated Red Pipit!

This is not a simple victory, but a victory against an opponent of higher level!

I have to admit that this woman has surpassed me.

Watching the disappearance of Octopus King, Catherine’s body trembled, and a large patch of bright red appeared on the blood-stained veil.

The price of this [Fire Phoenix Transformation] just now was not trivial. Her injury was more serious than it seemed.

In fact, Octopus King also knew this, but he still chose to leave nonchalantly. Victory or defeat meant little to the Octopus King. The most important thing was the gain of the battle.

Catherine took a few deep breaths. She used her remaining Nirvana power to stagger out of the arena, then she saw Chen Rui at a glance.

When she activated [Fire Phoenix’s Yearning] just now, she had already sensed some kind of response.

Catherine looked at him quietly. There seemed to be thousands of words in her black eyes, but only 1 sentence came together.

“I’m waiting for you in the final.”

chapters.title: Chapter 873: Demi-God Lesbian Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 873: Demi-God Lesbian Dragon

Compared with the emotion and surprise of a few people such as Raizen, most people in the Demon Realm thought it was natural for Catherine, the great emperor of the Dark Shadow Empire, to enter the finals.

The second semi-final was the Fallen Angel Empire’s Prince Consort ‘Aguile’ against the mysterious powerhouse Lalaria.

Due to serious damage, the forest area of the last match was no longer available. This game was set on a small plain in the center of the ancient battlefield.

The audience and the ‘insiders’ were on the same page. Faced with Lalaria, who easily defeated Raizen, ‘Aguile’ basically had no chance of victory.

Even many people in the group of relatives and friends also thought so, which was actually very rational. Of course, there were also people including Alice, Ms. Black Dragon, Adeline and others who blindly believed that their elder brother (boss) will win. Athena, Kia, and others did not care much about the outcome; they were just worried that their lover would be injured. As for the 2 unscrupulous friends, they started a bet on how long Chen Rui could last under Lalaria’s hands.

The semi-final between Chen Rui and Lalaria had finally begun.

“ Hohoho …” Looking at the masked ‘enemy’, the mustached flat-chested loli on the opposite side laughed strangely. “Finally, this day has arrived! Speaking of which, I would like to thank you. If it wasn’t for your stimulation, I wouldn’t get the most critical breakthrough in that hellish training! This time, I want to take revenge, revenge and revenge!”

With that said, the flat-chested loli stomped hard, and the ground shook.

Chen Rui pointed to his nose and said in surprise, “Is the hatred between us that high?”

“ Hmph ! Not to mention that you won all of my fortunes a year ago, according to the damn agreement with the old man, if I lose to you again this time, I will commit myself to a stinky man like you!” The mustached flat-chested loli almost roared, “Isn’t this a deep hatred? For the sake of the old man and Olypheus, I will spare your life this time. But you have to spit out all of my property!”

In front of the magic television, Raizen frowned as he listened to the ‘interpretation’ of the lip-interpreter beside him. Judging from the dialogue between the 2 sides, ‘Aguile’ actually encountered the Demi-God powerhouse, Lalaria, a year ago. When Lalaria lost to him, it even involved disputes such as marriage contracts. In any case, this ‘intimate’ relationship is not a good thing for the Bloody Empire.

“If it’s just property, I’m fine giving you back.” Chen Rui was not pretending to be generous. In fact, the property he won a year ago was all sealed by old father-in-law Auglas except for the Wind Dragon Island that was needed to make the titans, “But I’m sorry, I can’t lose to you, because I have a reason to be in the finals. As for the marriage contract, it’s just Sir Auglas’s usual trick. There’s no need to be so serious.”

“Ridiculous! I, Sir Lalaria, just have to move a finger to defeat you. Who needs you to compromise?” The flat-chested loli’s dark eyes flashed coldly. “I’ll beat you up now!”

As soon as the words ended, the mustached flat-chested loli roared. The shout spread forward along with the extremely terrifying breath, and a large number of cracks appeared on the ground in a radial pattern.

Chen Rui’s mind had an alarming sign, and he crossed his arms in front. Almost at the same time, a terrifying coercion pushed him back.

When he stood firm, he found that he had actually appeared dozens of meters away. There were 2 amazing drag marks under his feet.

Chen Rui felt numbness in his arms, and he was secretly horrified. My current strength has reached the peak stage of the Kingdom level, yet I barely resisted Lalaria’s breath. Is this the strength of the Demi-God level?

The mustached flat-chested loli suddenly appeared above Chen Rui with a strange laugh.

Chen Rui didn’t have the slightest warning in advance for Lalaria’s movement. It was only when the flat-chested loli raised her fist that the feeling of danger surged. This was no longer a simple high speed, but a kind of pressing momentum.

Fortunately, the [Analytical Eyes] had prompted before he sensed it. Chen Rui subconsciously activated his defensive barrier.

The defensive barrier of the Red Pole Star Emperor was far superior to the Blue Pole Star Emperor, but in front of Lalaria, the defensive barrier was as fragile as a glass ball. It shattered with a ‘ bang ’.

Lalaria’s punch hit Chen Rui, but she suddenly had a strange feeling as if time suddenly stopped before hitting the target, making the punch miss the target. Meanwhile, the opponent had shifted to the distance.

“Peak stage of the Kingdom level? You’ve actually reached this level.” Lalaria was slightly surprised, “It’s quite an astonishing rate of progress… However, even with that special time law, it’s far from being my opponent. There is an insurmountable gap between Demi-God and the Kingdom level! As a reminder, I will use a little more force in the next punch. You better equip the armor last time in advance, then maybe you can fight a little longer. I will give you this time.”

Peak stage of the Kingdom level! Listening to the lip-reader’s ‘live’ interpretation, Raizen’s facial expression became even more unsightly. This year, I made a leap to the intermediate stage of the Kingdom level. I initially wanted to shock everyone by beating Catherine and Aguile. I didn’t expect Catherine to defeat Red Pipit who was at a higher level, then ‘Aguile’ unbelievably reached the peak stage of the Kingdom level!

It seems like among the 3 of us: Catherine, ‘Aguile’ and I. My strength is already at the bottom.

Chen Rui took a deep breath. Although he had experienced the blow from the old father-in-law Auglas, he was facing a Demi-God-level opponent for the first time. As Lalaria said, between Demi-God and the Kingdom level, there was indeed an insurmountable gap.

The only thing that could compete with her was the [Red Pole Star Transformation], but Chen Rui didn’t want to activate it immediately. Lalaria’s strength is just entering the Demi-God level, and this chick is at most revengeful to beat me, so she will not really launch a killing move. Fighting against her is a rare opportunity to practice. Maybe I can find the path to the next level.

Thinking of this, Chen Rui did not activate [Pole Star Transformation], but he launched an attack actively. A light ball with a diameter of about 2 meters appeared in his hand, then it quickly became smaller as it seemed to be quickly compressed by something. After a few compressions, the diameter of the light ball had become about 30 centimeters before whistling toward the mustached flat-chested loli.

Lalaria sensed the powerful destruction power carried by the light ball, but she didn’t avoid it. She punched the light ball, and there was a violent shock in the space. The light ball scattered into countless luminous spots and fell to the ground. Potholes actually appeared on the hard ground due to the scattered luminous spots, which showed the power of the light ball.

Lalaria looked at the slight scratches on her fist in surprise, “Such a pure destruction law power. In terms of origin, it is almost close to Demi-God, but unfortunately, your strength is too weak. If you are a Demi-God, I would not dare to resist it forcefully.”

Just as the last word was spoken, Lalaria suddenly blinked out in front of Chen Rui with another punch.

This time Chen Rui had already vaguely figured Lalaria’s movements, but the law power carried by that punch firmly locked Chen Rui. It made him instinctively feel unable to dodge and resist, just like facing the Kingdom-level Isyorul when he was at the Demon Overlord level.

In terms of feeling, Demi-God’s law power was richer, more complete, and closer to the origin of matter than the kingdom’s law.

In the blink of an eye, Lalaria’s punch penetrated Chen Rui’s… phantasms.

“Damn law!” Lalaria missed again. She was even more surprised. When she was at the peak stage of the Kingdom level strength, she had trained with Auglas in actual combat more than once, and every time she was completely abused. Under the premise that Auglas suppressed his strength to the early stage of the Demi-God, she could hardly dodge a single blow.

Lalaria knew exactly how a Kingdom level felt when facing a Demi-God, but she didn’t expect this guy to dodge her attacks twice in the same way.

“It’s kind of interesting, but your kind of law consumes a lot of spirit power, so it’s impossible to activate it continuously.” The mustache on Lalaria’s lips jumped. She flashed with white light and turned into 3 images after the overlapping figures shook: the loli, the teen girl, and the elder sister. They rushed toward Chen Rui from different directions.

This time, it was way out of Chen Rui’s expectations. The speed of the 3 Lalaria was not inferior to a single one, and they were all an entity. It was the magical effect of Lalaria’s talent, [Magic Soul Eyes].

Although the strength of the 3 Lalaria was only equal to 1/3 of the original body, they were not what Chen Rui could resist. Just as he used time law to evade the loli’s attack, his shifting position had been locked by the teen girl. He barely used the time law to escape, and the elder sister appeared in front of her in an instant.

The continuous activation of time law under such high pressure exhausted a lot of Chen Rui’s strength. This time, he was half a beat slower, and he was blown away by the momentum exuded by the elder sister Lalaria. Just after landing, a powerful breath burst out from behind. His body was moved involuntarily.

The 3 Lalaria formed a triangular formation and did not attack directly. In the midst of the bright white light, 3 powerful momentums pressed Chen Rui in the middle. He was unable to move.

“ Hohoho… ” The loli, the teen girl, and the elder sister all laughed strangely at the same time, “No doubt it’s an interesting toy. I really can’t bear to end this game.”

Catherine, who was watching the projection in the arena, shook her head: Although I beat Red Pipit by luck in the last match, the difference in the big realm is by no means comparable to that of a small realm. Even if Chen Rui has reached the peak stage of the Kingdom level, there is still no chance of winning at all in the face of Demi-God Lalaria.

This was also Chen Rui’s current feeling. He let out a long breath and finally activated his strongest power.

The 2 moons in the sky suddenly turned fiery red, and numerous cracks suddenly appeared on the ground in the center of the 3 white light balls. The red light with vague spots of bright starlight quickly spread, and the 3 white light balls were actually suppressed.

The faces of the Lalarias all showed expressions of surprise as they increased the output of breath, but they still couldn’t suppress the red light in the center. Their bodies actually began to move backward just like the previous Chen Rui.

Such a powerful breath! And it’s still skyrocketing like crazy! Lalaria’s facial expression had changed, and her eyes had a solemn expression. The 3 had combined into 1, and the white light on her body suddenly increased several times.

The white light and the red starlight were actually in a stalemate. The soil and stones peeled off on the cracked ground instantly turned into dust under the terrifying pressure.

The whole ground was shaking. Not only the small plains, but even the arena far away in the Iron Fist City could feel the shake.

Raizen, Catherine and others were all shocked. At this time, the projection of the arena was completely unviewable under this terrifying strength. Even the broadcast screen of the magic television had continuous interference.

Several figures had already soared into the sky and flew toward the ancient battlefield at the same time.

TL: One more waifu?

chapters.title: Chapter 874: Demi-God Battle! The Final In Advance
chapters.body:
Chapter 874: Demi-God Battle! The Final In Advance

The shaking of the ground finally stopped, and a circular pit with a diameter of 200 meters appeared on the small plain as if a meteorite had fallen. In the center was a red figure.

Lalaria at the opposite looked down at the tens of meters of drag marks under her feet with an unbelievable look in her eyes.

Lalaria. Tostanofamiat, the next Dragon Emperor of the Dragon Island, Demi-God powerhouse, is actually forced to retreat by this stinky man’s momentum whose strength is only at the peak stage of the Kingdom level!

Not to mention dozens of meters, even if it’s just 1 centimeter, it’s a retreat after all!

Lalaria’s eyes were fixed on the figure of the red armor shining with starlight. Compared with the sacred elegance of the blue armor a year ago, this red armor looked more majestic and the style appeared to have more visual impact. The blade-like ornaments protruding from the arms had an aggressive and dangerous feeling. The original pair of wings on the back had become 2 pairs. Even his breathing seemed to exude a fiery destructive breath.

A breath of this level is by no means Kingdom level! Lalaria’s pupils contracted slightly – Demi-God?

Could it be that he hid his strength a year ago? But I remember the situation back then is not fake. What is actually going on?

“Never mind!” Lalaria roared, and a white light appeared on her fist, “I will not lose to you again!”

As soon as the words ended, the figure of the flat-chested loli instantly appeared in front of Chen Rui, punching his chest.

The speed and the massive power contained in this punch were by no means comparable to the previous ‘game’. Even Octopus King would be annihilated by this punch.

Chen Rui didn’t evade or parry, and the punch hit his chest firmly. His body just swayed, but a triangular area on the ground behind him collapsed radially.

A tyrannical strength; a law close to the origin; a deeper power of nature.

This was Chen Rui’s realization from this punch. Lalaria was secretly shocked when her punch didn’t actually shake Chen Rui. Her fist was full of white light, and her power had suddenly increased to 80%. She punched both her fists.

This time, the fist did not hit his chest but on a red palm. Both sides exerted force at the same time, and the ground began to vibrate violently again. Under the influence of this huge force field, the nearby gravel or dust was free from gravity and rose toward the sky.

In the tremor, a petite figure flew out at lightning speed. The retreat was actually faster than the advance. There was a red ‘star’ chasing closely behind the figure. The impact wasn’t frequent, but every time a hit was connected, an exaggerated trace of destruction appeared on the ground. There were shocking collapses and cracks along the way.

Under the strength of the Demi-God level, even the environment where the enchantment was set was fragile.

In the distant sky of the small plain, Raizen, Catherine, Red Pipit, Zola, Paglio and others appeared one after another.

Although most of these people were Kingdom-level powerhouses, the breath ahead was too powerful and dangerous, so no one dared to get closer.

“I can’t believe it, that guy…” Looking at the red figure and feeling the terrifying oppression, Red Pipit gave a bitter smile.

When he first met Chen Rui, he was still the ‘Black Sea God’, who easily controlled the life and death of that mere Demon Overlord (actually Demon Emperor) in his palm. In just a few short years, the ‘mere Demon Overlord’ had become a Demi-God-level powerhouse that he needed to look up to.

Raizen was also smiling bitterly. He had experienced the power of Lalaria himself. At that time, Lalaria could easily defeat him with just a random punch. However, at this moment, Lalaria was obviously going all out, but she was still suppressed by ‘Aguile’.

Is the red figure really the man who vomited blood after being punched by me at the Warlock Fortress 2 years ago? When he thought he had surpassed his opponent, the man had already left him far behind.

“This is the real final.” Paglio said with emotion without giving any face to Catherine on the side.

Catherine didn’t care about this. She just stared at the red figure quietly. An inexplicable brilliance flashed in her serene black eyes.

Lalaria made a vigorous attack, and her body dashed out, finally pulling away from Chen Rui.

“Are you bullying me naked?” The mustached flat-chested loli gasped slightly and blurted an outrageous sentence. Chen Rui paused and was a little speechless. You are doing fine. What naked?

The answer was quickly revealed. The mustached flat-chested loli raised her hand, and the phantasms of a huge island appeared behind her.

The phantasms spread quickly, and the entire battlefield turned into an island scene, exuding rich dark elements and vitality. This huge island should be Lalaria’s ‘base’ on Dragon Island.

The kingdom of Demi-God was no longer a pure energy space, but a true projection of life and faith. Every plant and tree could become the source of strength for Lalaria.

The huge and dangerous power breath forced Raizen and others to activate various protective power to protect themselves.

Chen Rui could clearly feel that the traces of vitality mixed with faith power quickly gathered toward the mustached flat-chested loli. The loli’s body began to emit strong white flames. The flames turned into ribbons which intertwined with her body and quickly condensed into a silver armor.

This armor did not cover the whole body like the [Pole Star Transformation], but it was a half-armor without a helmet. Besides the main body, there were boots and bracers.

[Armor of Faith]! Chen Rui suddenly understood, the difference between Demi-God powerhouse and kingdom powerhouse was that Demi-God powerhouse had true believers and kingdoms with faith. They could absorb and use the faith power to condense into [Armor of Faith]. This could not only be used by themselves, but they could also bestow [Armor of Faith] to the most devout believers.

Compared with the star armor of [Pole Star Transformation], what Lalaria had now was the real Demi-God [Armor of Faith]!

After equipping the [Armor of Faith], Lalaria had a pair of pale golden gloves on her hands. She seemed to be reborn, and her momentum had a great leap.

In the blink of an eye, Lalaria had already appeared above Chen Rui, slamming her fist with white flame into the air. A cluster of white light whistled at Chen Rui like a meteor. Chen Rui parried with 1 hand, and a majestic force struck him. His figure was suddenly unable to maintain the suspension as he fell down like he was being smashed down by a mountain.

Lalaria swiftly punched with both fists, launching several meteors. Chen Rui’s figure turned and moved to one side in time, but those meteors locked his figure firmly. After taking a big turn, they approached him again.

This kind of evenly matched long-range energy attack was like 2 ordinary people shooting each other with firearms, and it was difficult to dodge continuously. Seeing that it was unavoidable, Chen Rui put his arms in a defensive posture.

“ Boom boom boom… ” Under the terrifying explosion strike and pressure, Chen Rui’s figure had already fallen to the ground.

The aftermath of each blow left shocking marks on the protective power of the Kingdom powerhouses watching from a distance.

In contrast, the ground and surrounding environment that were covered by the island kingdom had become unimaginably strong and not as badly damaged as before.

“ Har! ” Lalaria took advantage of the situation. Her fists were getting faster and faster. Even if Raizen and others had maximized their eyesight, they could only see vague shadows. Chen Rui was bombarded by countless meteors and could only defend without fighting back.

At this time, red starlights suddenly appeared in the sky of the huge island, and the phantasms of countless planets appeared in the sky. The hot and dazzling sun was like the sun in the human world, and there was more than one such ‘sun’. The entire sky was all shrouded in [Galaxy Territory].

Before Lalaria could react, the hundreds of ‘meteor’ in front suddenly stopped as if being pulled by some powerful strength. One could faintly see the red figure in the center slowly spreading out the wings that were wrapping his body.

“ Pong! ” The speed of the spread of wings seemed to control the flow of time, from ‘slow’ to ‘rapid’ suddenly. Lalaria only felt a terrifying power burst out, and all the meteors were actually reflected back.

[Pole Star Transformation]’s defense killing move —— [Star Guardian Wings].

Lalaria’s both fists hurriedly parried in great shock, and a white protective crystal curtain appeared around her. In the next second, her vision was shaken by the blasted back meteor. Countless cracks were left on the protective crystal curtain, but thanks to the kingdom’s faith and vitality, it was constantly repaired automatically.

After a while, the shaking finally stopped. Lalaria put away the crystal curtain that was on the verge of collapse. She gritted her teeth while looking at Chen Rui who was safe and sound . This guy’s strength and means are unpredictable. He actually reflected my ultimate move which almost made me suffer a severe injury. “ Bastard, if you have any other moves, just use them!”

“You’ll see, Lalaria.” Chen Rui showed a smile from behind the visor. Actual combat and my own training are 2 different things. Although the outcome of the battle against the lesbian dragon has not been decided yet at his point, the actual gains have been considerable.

As he raised his hands, the movement of the stars in the sky became more and more mysterious as if a huge power was charging.

The mustached flat-chested loli pointed to the stars’ phantasms in the sky and sneered, “Don’t think that you can fool me with an illusion. Demi-God’s kingdom is the kingdom of true faith and life, and it can continuously provide faith power to support the battle. The Kingdom level illusion tricks are not comparable at all. Unless you suppress me with the real Demi-God kingdom, I will be invincible in the kingdom of this island.”

“Demi-God kingdom, faith’s support and application… It turns out to be like this.” Chen Rui suddenly understood the misunderstanding. With a thought, the [Red Star Kingdom] shone brightly, and the projected starlights shone on the island. All of a sudden, there were collapses in many places in the phantasm of the island.

Lalaria felt that the starlight contained enormous pure and vast faith power which invaded her kingdom. Her kingdom power suddenly became disordered, and the dark element environment that was most suitable for her to exert her strength was also rapidly weakening.

“Impossible!” The mustached flat-chested loli looked up at the [Red Star Kingdom], and her eyes shone with incredible light, “This kingdom is actually real?”

Demi-God’s kingdom is based on real projections. Could it be Chen Rui… owns the stars in the sky?

That kind of incomparable faith power and vast vitality breath is definitely not an illusion!

This is simply incredible… Only the legendary god…

chapters.title: Chapter 875: Victory
chapters.body:
Chapter 875: Victory

Seeing that her island kingdom was progressively suppressed, the mustached flat-chested loli exclaimed unwillingly, “No matter what, I will not lose!”

Lalaria’s eyes flashed a trace of blood, and she transformed from a loli to a young girl. She exuded a berserk breath.

Talent power, [Berserk].

In this state, the attack and defense would be doubled, but she would suffer recoil after the effect wore out and would fall into a period of weakness.

The scene of the island kingdom had faded not only because of the suppression of [Red Star Kingdom], but also because Lalaria had almost used up the faith power in it. She obviously wanted to make an all-out blow.

Lalaria would do anything to win.

Chen Rui had an omen of extreme danger. With a tap of his foot, his body rose into the sky. The red starlight in [Red Star Kingdom] flourished, and he rapidly charged his power.

“[Wrath of the Tyrannosaurus]!”

In the rage of the Young Girl Lalaria, a giant tyrannosaurus phantasm with a length of hundreds of meters appeared in the vision. Its roar shook the entire kingdom as it flew toward Chen Rui with terrifying power. When the tyrannosaurus wings spread out, the nearby spaces showed signs of being torn, revealing the terrifying magnitude of the strength.

Chen Rui was not too affected. The red starry sky he was in was already full of powerful and violent breath with destruction law, and a blood sea emerged. This blood sea was composed of hundreds of long and winding Scorching Dragons, which were also roaring toward the tyrannosaurus.

When the 2 collided, a huge cloud of smoke resembling a mushroom rose in the sky, and the terrifying shock wave spread out. It was not the first time that [Scorching Dragon Roar] appeared. Raizen experienced this once in the battle of the Warlock Fortress. However, over time, although this was the same move, its power was no longer the same. Now even a Scorching Dragon could easily annihilate Raizen.

At the moment when the 2 collided, the spectators in the distance only felt violent tremors not only in their vision but also in their own souls, which were filled with the raging roars of tyrannosaurus and Scorching Dragon. They could not hear all the other sounds. The form of this power seemed to really have life.

There were large and shocking cracks in the nearby space. Inside this crack, there was a terrifying space turbulence. Once one accidentally fell into it, even if he was a Kingdom level powerhouse, he would be banished forever even if he did not die.

The fierce battle did not last long. Although the giant tyrannosaurus was so berserk that it tore up several Scorching Dragons with its ferocity, in the face of the equally berserk and an astonishing number of Scorching Dragons, it was unable to maintain its bravery. The phantasm in the encirclement gradually dimmed, and the momentum also began to weaken rapidly before it was soon engulfed by the Scorching Dragon Sea.

Lalaria lost? As soon as the spectators had this thought, they saw the surging Scorching Dragon Sea suddenly stopped, and everything became quiet, which was the opposite of the deafening tremor before.

This ‘silence’ lasted for about 3 seconds, and the Scorching Dragon Sea swelled up suddenly. A roar that was 10 times stronger than the previous one sounded, and all the Scorching Dragons collapsed under this roar.

The protective power in front of everyone in the distance shattered. Everyone, including Raizen and Zola, was blown far away. A few Demon Overlords with weaker strength and no powerhouse support were even torn apart, disappearing without a trace.

The figure of the tyrannosaurus appeared in the center. It grew bigger, and the eyes were burning with raging flames. The original black scale armor had turned into silver with terrifying lightning.

After the tyrannosaurus defeated the Scorching Dragon Sea, it changed back to the shape of Lalaria. The young girl just now had become a hot elder sister. The loli men’s clothes were stretched forward and backward, showing a different kind of temptation, but the red berserk light flashed in both eyes.

This was the ultimate form of Lalaria’s [Berserk] talent with greater power but shorter duration. The side effects after the state were also greater, ranging from coma to severe damage to spirit power. If she couldn’t finish off the opponent, then she would lose all combat power.

“I’ve already defeated your biggest killing move!” Lalaria said proudly with silver lightning flashing on her body, “Admit defeat now while I can still maintain my rationality…”

Before Lalaria finished speaking, her words stopped abruptly. The red galaxy in the sky began to rotate in a special rhythm. Behind the bright red figure, 2 pairs of giant wings extended into the entire starry sky. The end had turned into countless stardust, and the image of the galaxy was instantly blurred by the high-speed movement.

In the blink of an eye, everything in the vision turned into innumerable strands of red star dust running at high speed, drawing countless irregular death arcs in the air which converged into a giant storm.

Lalaria clearly sensed that the danger of this storm was far greater than the previous [Scorching Dragon Roar]. With a roar, she transformed into the silver tyrannosaurus again and pounced toward the storm.

Next, everything became blurred. The spectators could no longer see everything, and all the sense organs seemed to be useless. They only felt dizzy and disgusted. Many people couldn’t hold it and fainted on the ground.

The terrifying ‘blur’ finally faded away, and the scene in front of them didn’t seem to have changed much as if the terrifying storm just now was just an illusion.

Elder Sister Lalaria stood there dumbfounded while maintaining a stiff motion. The berserk red light in her eyes had disappeared.

The next moment, there seemed to be a cracking sound. Immediately afterward, the island of the kingdom began to split and shatter rapidly. The whole island gradually faded. Finally, with a bang , it disappeared. The entire battlefield burst apart. The ground shook and the mountains swayed while countless smoke and dust rolled up toward the sky.

At the same time, the [Armor of Faith] on Lalaria suddenly shattered. At the same time, her power collapsed. She was standing unsteadily and was about to fall down.

Before she fell to the ground, she was gently supported by someone.

“Bastard…” Lalaria looked at the red guy with hatred. If her eyes were lethal, Chen Rui was already a dead person now. It’s a pity that her kingdom had collapsed, and [Berserk]’s aftereffect had also begun to occur now, so she had completely lost her ability to fight.

“You… still have a stronger move?”

Chen Rui hesitated and nodded. In addition to the original [Star Guardian Wings] and [Pole Star Storm], the [Red Pole Star Transformation] had a more powerful [True Red Extinction] which used the destruction law power to the extreme. It was an extremely terrifying and powerful killing move.

As soon as this move was used, Chen Rui himself couldn’t control his opponent’s life and death. He didn’t want to use it unless it was a last resort, especially in the face of Lalaria, the weirdo loli, uh , now the elder sister.

When Lalaria launched the ultimate [Berserk] just now, she actually retained a trace of rationality. She did not want to kill him, but she wanted to force him to admit defeat. It could be seen that Lalaria had no real killing intent; she just simply wanted to defeat him, which also affected her combat power to a certain extent. However, Chen Rui’s previous [Pole Star Storm] also reserved some power. Otherwise, Lalaria would be severely injured even if she didn’t die.

“Damn it, I … I lost.” Although Lalaria couldn’t see Chen Rui’s face, she instinctively felt that Chen Rui was not lying. In fact, she also noticed that the power of the storm just now subsided in the end. This time, she was defeated in her peak state, unlike the tricky contest a year ago, so it was irrefutable.

The red galaxy in the air gradually faded away, and the star armor on Chen Rui also disappeared. Unlike the [Blue Pole Star Transformation], after the [Red Pole Star Transformation] was activated, he would not fall asleep as before, but the Super System would automatically go to sleep and he could not use the system’s Star Power and skills. This was somewhat similar to the side effect of the original [Scorching Dragon Possession].

“There’s no need to be so indignant. This battle is actually just a practice between ordinary friends; if you don’t mind having me as your ‘ordinary friend’.” Watching Elder

Sister Lalaria’s enraged expression, Chen Rui shook his head speechlessly, “My promise is still valid. I will return all the property to you except for the Wind Dragon Island, which is rich in thunder nitrate. As for the promise of being a fiancée… you should be clear about Sir Auglas’s true intentions, so don’t worry about it.”

Although she had the 3 transformations of the loli, young girl, and elder sister, Chen Rui had always only kept aloof from Lalaria, the weirdo and didn’t have a single thought of fantasy at all. Moreover, it was already a relief that the current harem did not shrink in size. If he added more members, even the sky would collapse.

Lalaria didn’t expect that Chen Rui would actually give such a condition after winning. She showed a stunned expression as she thought she heard it wrong, “Really?”

“Of course. I can swear with all my heart.”

Lalaria’s figure gradually ‘shrank’ into the loli, struggling to hold the eyelids that were closing, as she asked alertly, “Then what do you want? There is no reaping without sowing!”

Looking at the mustached flat-chested loli’s vigilant look full of distrust, Chen Rui shrugged helplessly and took off her loose fake beard, “This should be Madam Lalaria’s most important thing. I’ll take this as an exchange.”

Lalaria kept staring at his eyes as her gaze flashed before she finally nodded, “Now I know why the old man is interested in you. It turns out that you are all the same type of fool…”

Chen Rui was speechless for a while.

“It’s his business that the old man is interested in you. If he takes you back to Dragon Island via marriage, I’m happy to hear it.” The flat-chested loli, who lost her mustache, laughed strangely. Her voice suddenly raised, “As for you… do you think I, Master Lalaria, will be moved by such a lousy trick?”

After that, the flat-chested loli mustered up her last strength and bit a certain fool’s hand.

Chen Rui: …

The vibration of the battlefield finally subsided. In the smoke, the figure wearing a cloak and a mask appeared in the vision of the audience, holding the sleeping Lalaria in his hands. Lalaria no longer had a mustache and she was sleeping like a baby, tranquil and serene.

TL: Hmmm , think she is moved. How will the battle between Chen Rui and Catherine unfold next? Will his battle change Catherine’s heart?

chapters.title: Chapter 876: Tauren’S Biography
chapters.body:
Chapter 876: Tauren’S Biography

Chen Rui handed the sleeping Lalaria to the Dragon Island’s trio fans, believing that these fans would take good care of her.

Seeing the 3 dragons girls, especially the little dragon loli, glaring at him, Chen Rui could only smile bitterly and moved his vision to Catherine.

“Your Majesty Catherine, do we start the final now?”

Catherine said indifferently, “Do you want to remind me that I will only have a glimmer of hope of winning by requesting to start the final now?”

Chen Rui shrugged, “If you really think so.”

The eyes of Raizen, Octopus King and the others all focused. Catherine’s eyes swept over Chen Rui’s hand held by Zola, and the cherry lips behind the veil blurted out 2 words, “2 days.”

2 days?

Many ‘informed people’ present expressed their confusion. This deadline is tantamount to suicidal waiting. Just now, the battle between ‘Aguile’ and Lalaria should have exhausted a lot of energy. He is in his weakest state now. With Catherine’s performance against Red Pipit, there may be some hope if she uses all her strength. Once the opponent is given the time to rest, then with the difference in strength between Kingdom and Demi-God, there is not even a glimmer of hope.

Catherine ignored the gazes around her. After saying these 2 words, she turned away without looking back.

Chen Rui was a little dazed as he stared at the departing back. He suddenly felt a pain in his lower back. When he turned his head and looked, Ms. Fairy Dragon was staring dazedly at the sky as if it was someone else who just stretched out the paws to twist his poor muscle by 360 degrees.

The second semi-final ended and, to everyone’s surprise, ‘Aguile’ actually defeated super powerhouse Lalaria who had defeated Raizen the Great.

The results of the semi-finals made many Empress Catherine supporters turn to ‘Aguile’. The second powerhouse, the Dark Shadow Empire’s empress, fought hard to beat Red Pipit; top powerhouse Raizen the Great was easily knocked out by Lalaria; ‘Aguile’ defeated Lalaria. Judging from the power relationship from 4 angles, it could be inferred that the strength of ‘Aguile’ was far superior to that of Catherine.

Of course, there were still many Her Majesty Empress loyal fans who believed that anything was possible on the battlefield, and Empress Catherine would surely win.

According to the consensus reached by both participating parties, 2 days later, the final of the Demon Realm martial battle championship would be held.

2 days passed quickly in the blink of an eye.

Early in the morning, the inn where Chen Rui lived was extraordinarily lively.

But it had nothing to do with today’s final. The protagonist was the flat-chested loli, Lalaria.

The reason it was ‘the flat-chested loli’ instead of ‘the mustached flat-chested loli’ was because she didn’t have her trademark mustache. Although she still dressed as a man, she didn’t seem to have that kind of weird feeling, which looked graceful and pleasant.

After 2 days of sleeping, Lalaria finally recovered from the aftereffect of activating the ultimate [Berserk].

“ Hey! That guy, laugh all you want!” The flat-chested loli without the mustache looked extra sensitive as she glared at Chen Rui viciously.

Chen Rui didn’t wear a mask, but just to be cautious, he used the face he used in the human world. He laughed unabashedly, “Actually, I want to say… um , Lalaria, you are so much cuter now.”

The flat-chested loli gritted her teeth, “Damn bastard, say whatever you want. One day, I will…”

“Sir Lalaria, why are you…” Kia, who had just walked downstairs, pointed her lips and asked quietly in surprise when she saw Lalaria’s appearance.

Lalaria gave Chen Rui a sullen look and sneered coldly, “Since I lost to who is that, I’m willing to admit defeat.”

“Willing to admit defeat? Then don’t you want to…” The little succubus maid covered her mouth, and didn’t say the second half of the sentence ‘Don’t you want to be his fiancee?’

Loli Lalaria actually gave the girls a good impression, but being a friend was 1 thing, and being a love rival was another.

“I always keep my word.” Lalaria said, “Since I promised that guy to give him the most precious thing, I will never break my promise.”

The ‘most precious’ thing! As soon as Loli Lalaria said this, all members of the harem, including the empress, female scientist, female general and female head of intel, all showed vigilance and scrutiny. This gave ‘that guy’ goosebumps instantly.

“I have given him the most precious mustache, and we have called it even! Now I can justifiably return to Dragon Island to get my property back! Ohohoho …” The flat-chested loli arrogantly laughed weirdly.

“Sir Lalaria is so smart!” The retarded fan club immediately screamed in response.

The harem breathed a sigh of relief while the little maid rolled her eyes, “The problem is Sir Auglas…”

“This guy himself promised to return the property and cancel the marriage contract, and I also gave him the most precious thing. It’s an equivalent exchange. The old man can’t say anything.” The flat-chested loli was not a fool. How could she not understand the little maid’s intention? She gave Chen Rui a contemptuous glance, “Don’t worry, only you will treat this kind of man as a treasure. In my eyes, he’s just a god of bad luck. As long as I get close to him, it’s not a good thing. I don’t want to see him again!”

“Lalaria… will you never come to see me again?” Ms. Black Dragon held the flat-chested loli’s hand with a look of reluctance.

The flat-chested loli was greatly moved, “Olypheus, actually, I can’t bear to part with you…”

Ms. Black Dragon blinked, flashing like black crystal coins, and she said sincerely, “I mean, before you go, can you settle the account first.”

The flat-chested loli, “…”

“I still have an IOU. You promised to give me double.”

The flat-chested loli was startled, “….”

When Paglio and Roman on the side saw that Lalaria was being charged, they moved back secretly with empathy while reducing their sense of presence, so as not to get involved.

In the battle between Lalaria and Chen Rui, the 2 unscrupulous friends bet that Chen Rui would not last for an hour. As a result, Ms. Black Dragon, Alice and Adeline bet heavily on Chen Rui to win. In the end, Chen Rui defeated Lalaria, and the 2 unscrupulous friends were deeply regretted.

Not to mention that the 2 guys lost all the private savings in their pockets, they even made an IOU under the coercion of Ms. Black Dragon and her friends. Olypheus could be regarded as a big creditor during this time.

Looking at Lalaria hurriedly fleeing and the fan club following her, Isabella smiled and grabbed Ms. Black Dragon, who was about to pursue them, “Good job, Olypheus.”

Ms. Black Dragon really didn’t understand why she was praised this time, and she asked dazedly, “What?”

Lalaria’s farewell was just a small interlude. Today’s highlight was the final of the martial battle championship.

When the group of relatives and friends arrived at the arena, the arena was already full of people.

Chen Rui went directly to the arena earlier, and the group of relatives and friends entered the specially arranged VIP restroom. The so-called VIP restroom was a grandstand in a special location where the screen and projection could be viewed at the best angle, and it also had special effects such as sound insulation.

In the VIP restroom, the group of relatives and friends accidentally met 3 acquaintances: Liliz, who was holding the young little loli, and Terdila, who was suspected of being a ‘tauren’.

“Aunt Athena!” The young little loli shouted as soon as she saw Athena.

Athena’s eyes lit up when she saw Duoduo. She remembered something, and she took out the pig’s head stuffed toy last time to give it to Duoduo, “This is yours, Little Duoduo.”

“Aunt Athena is the best.” The young little loli’s eyes turned into 2 crescent moons with a smile. She leaned over and smooched, leaving 2 saliva marks on Athena’s face.

This kind of intimacy surprised Liliz who had been watching the young little loli’s growth. This little princess did not allow strangers to get close to her. Otherwise, they would be turned into a barbecue by the little princess.

The harem troupe liked Duoduo very much, and they took turns to have intimate moments with her. The young little loli also seemed particularly happy.

Athena hugged Duoduo for a while and was reluctant to return her to Liliz. She asked, “Liliz, you brought Duoduo to watch the match today?”

Liliz nodded. In fact, Her Majesty Empress had been ordering her not to go out with Duoduo ever since Duoduo called daddy during the registration last time. Then, Duoduo actually sneaked out by herself one night, which scared her to death. Luckily, she encountered Athena and the others. Instead of blaming her, the empress relaxed the order. Today was the first time she and Terdila came to watch the live broadcast of the competition. Terdila, who had only been able to watch the rebroadcast secretly, seemed particularly excited.

Liliz spoke up, “Sir Aguile is here.”

In the projection, Chen Rui appeared on the field.

Looking at the familiar man in the cloak, Terdila, who once had a brief fight with Chen Rui, was filled with emotion. Terdila had now advanced from the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord which was a rapid progress, but this ‘Aguile’ had already risen to a level where he needed to look up to.

Initially, Duoduo was just playing in Athena’s arms with the pig’s head toy. When she accidentally saw the big screen, her vision couldn’t move away.

The person on the screen was wearing a cloak and even seemed to be wearing a mask, so his face could not be seen clearly. However, the young little loli had a strange sense of familiarity in her heart, and her cute big eyes were flashing while looking at the figure, as if she wanted to see through something.

Few people noticed that the clouds over the arena gradually became fiery red, which spread rapidly and moved in a certain direction like it was being pulled by a special power.

In the battlefield, Chen Rui suddenly sensed that the special burning sensation in his left arm began to appear again, and he couldn’t help holding his left arm.

The young little loli’s eyes lit up as she pointed to the projection and shouted happily, “Daddy! Daddy!”

Athena, who was holding Duoduo, was stunned; Liliz was stunned; Terdila was stunned; Zola, Shea… Everyone in the VIP room was stunned.

Liliz and Terdila looked at each other as their minds were filled with unprecedented shock. They knew Duoduo’s growth process very well. From birth to the present, she has never called anyone ‘daddy’.

Only after coming to the Iron Fist Estate did she say this word, and she even sneaked out to find daddy. Could it be… The 2 had secretly guessed who was Duoduo’s daddy more than once, but no one would expect that the correct answer was actually ‘Aguile’! The prince consort of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Empress Shea!

This secret is simply shocking!

The 2 sides in today’s final are Duoduo’s mother and… father!

Athena and others were equally shocked. Duoduo actually called Chen Rui as daddy!

The child’s voice is full of indescribable joy; it is by no means fake.

No wonder this child gives us such a close feeling… If this is true… Almost all the girls thought of one thing at the same time. When did that bastard hook up with Liliz?! They even have a child!

Liliz and Terdila’s eyes were fixed on Shea, who was wearing a veil. In fact, the 2 had already guessed Shea’s identity from various intel.

From this point of view, Aguile, the first great grand master of the Demon Realm and the incomparably powerful super powerhouse that shook the Demon Realm, is actually the ‘prince consort’ of 2 empresses of the Demon Realm?

I don’t know if this Royal Majesty Shea knows about it… If not, then, Her Majesty Catherine’s plan is too unexpected. This may be the strongest move to reverse the current disadvantage of the Dark Shadow Empire! As expected of the top sage!

Just as the 2 looked at Shea with strange gazes, they suddenly found that the eyes around them were even more strange, and the eyes were mainly looking at Terdila. These gazes were actually filled with pity and sympathy which was incomprehensible to this handsome man. This gave Terdila the creeps.

Not to mention his wife was unfaithful, he even helped others to take care of the child for free… “Poor tauren.” Alice couldn’t help sighing; this sigh was full of endless vicissitudes. The next second, the vicissitudes disappeared as the little loli hurriedly flipped through a book. Then, the vicissitudes momentum resumed as she added an important line, “Anyway, the child is innocent.”

“It was the fault of this collapsing world.” The vicious-mouthed little mermaid princess took the ‘Tauren’s Biography’ from the hands of the little loli, flipped through it, and made an incisive post-reading summary.

The confused Terdila still didn’t understand why he was ‘being’ a tauren again. At this time, Duoduo made a move that shook the VIP room again. She pointed to the projection and shouted again, “Mommy! Mommy!”

TL: Victory or not, the trial after that will most likely be something deadly…

chapters.title: Chapter 877: Reunion
chapters.body:
Chapter 877: Reunion

The woman from the Dark Shadow Empire, coupled with Duoduo’s pointing at a certain guy and calling him ‘daddy’ made the harem girls already determined that Liliz was Chen Rui’s ‘first woman’. However, Ms. Duoduo’s 2 subsequent ‘mommy’ immediately subverted the girls’ previous concept, or in other words, subverted the cognition of all relatives and friends.

That ‘woman of the Dark Shadow Empire’ isn’t Liliz, but… Catherine, the Dark Shadow Empire’s empress?

Whether it was scheming Isabella, fake daze Zola, indifferent and calm Shea, or others… They were all stunned. Even Catherine’s cousin, Roman’s mistress, Medilu, was also stunned.

The only one who was a little ignorant was Ms. Black Dragon, who wanted to imitate Zola to join in the fun and say ‘what’, but she was frightened by the strange atmosphere.

Chen Rui didn’t know that the little phoenix, whom he missed badly, was not annihilated, but she was reincarnated in the form of a real daughter, let alone that Ms. Duoduo’s calling of ‘daddy mommy’ had caused the harem to face the biggest earthquake. His eyes were set on Catherine who appeared on the opposite side.

The Dark Shadow Cape, 1 of the 7 artifacts, was not seen behind Catherine. The blue and white gown seemed to be for a ceremony rather than a duel. The white covering her face was also much thinner than usual, which allowed her exquisite and perfect facial features to be faintly seen.

Catherine was the first to speak, “You’re here.”

At the beginning, it seemed that there was an intent of turning passive to active, which was also in line with Catherine’s style.
