“ En .” Chen Rui replied, and he immediately found that the voices of the 2 seemed to be amplified by some kind of device. It actually spread far away, probably through special transmission, spreading to the entire estate. He could not help frowning.

Catherine smiled nonchalantly, “For the individual outcome, there is no suspense or meaning in this final. The real final was over 2 days ago.”

This sentence made Chen Rui slightly stunned. Before starting the battle, Catherine said this frankly when the transmission of her voice was spreading. Is this the rhythm of admitting defeat?

When she made the appointment in advance so solemnly, is it just to admit defeat in public? Just as Chen Rui was puzzled, Catherine shook her head again, and her tone changed, “However, for the Dark Shadow Empire, the 3 empires and even the entire Demon Realm, the ‘final’ has just begun. Today will be the decisive moment.”

Chen Rui asked tentatively, “Why do you say that?” Catherine looked him in the eye, “I said before, the final will be the time to reveal everything.”

“You mean the ‘multiple choice question’?”

“It should be the last time, a multiple-choice question between us.”

The conversation between the 2 was transmitted through Catherine’s set-up in the arena, at the Iron Fist Estate, and broadcast live throughout the Demon Realm on television. The first few sentences still sounded like mind tactics before the hands-on, but the latter words sounded a bit different. Many sensitive people had strange expressions on their faces.

Multiple choice between ‘us’?

When the harem troupe in the VIPs restroom of the arena heard these, it sounded particularly flirtatious. The girls who were still skeptical at first were finally completely determined. Catherine no doubt is the ‘woman of the Dark Shadow Empire’!

The Demon Realm’s first beauty, top sage empress!

A certain bastard hides it so well!

Liliz and Terdila simultaneously shivered when they sensed the terrifying aura.

“Before this, I have a few questions to ask.” Catherine was not in a hurry to say the ‘multiple choice question’ that made the harem troupe extremely anxious. “Last time during the 3 empires’ peace talk. You have proposed the 3 empires form the ’empire alliance’ in the true sense that allows all the people of the Demon Realm to stay away from war and enjoy peace. I would like to hear a specific explanation. “

The specific terms of the negotiation between the empires were originally secret, but now Catherine was asking this publicly in front of the Demon Realm. This made Chen Rui startled.

Catherine added, “What are you hesitating about? Or is that offer just a trick to delay when you’re weak?”

“No, I’m just thinking about how to phrase it.” Chen Rui had already vaguely understood Catherine’s intention, “This empire alliance can be called a ‘confederation’. The confederation itself is not a sovereign empire, and each empire member is still a sovereign and independent empire with their own legislative, executive, diplomatic, military, financial and other powers. All empires will achieve comprehensive cooperation and sharing in technology, economy, resources as well as other aspects. Sharing wealth and woe as well as common interests. The resolutions relating to the alliance can be approved by the leaders’ meeting to take effect…”

Chen Rui eloquently explained what he knew as ‘confederation’. On the earth where he was originally located, the British commonwealth and the Commonwealth of Independent States belonged to the confederation system.

Although both confederation and commonwealth belong to the compound empire structure, there was a big difference between them. Simply put, confederation was ‘the union of the empires’ whereas commonwealth was ‘combined empires’. In terms of the form of 3 empires, confederation was the most suitable form of alliance.

The confederation system was Chen Rui’s ultimate goal to achieve the unification and peace of the Demon Realm. The economic war and military parade that he planned, plus this competition were all for this purpose. Show his fists first and then reason. Unexpectedly, Catherine actually took the initiative to bring up this on such a high-profile occasion.

The current situation of the Demon Realm was not optimistic. The Fallen Angel Empire had achieved an overwhelming absolute advantage both economically and militarily. The next step was definitely the Bloody Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire unite against the Fallen Angel Empire, which would cause war.

The people definitely didn’t want a war to happen, especially after seeing the terrifying force of the Fallen Angel Empire at the military parade ceremony. Coupled with the impact of the currency crisis, they were even more afraid. The proposal of this ‘confederation’ brought an unexpected turn of events, enabling the people of the Demon Realm to see the hope of true peace. Most importantly, this new system was personally proposed by the Prince Consort ‘Aguile’ of the Fallen Angel Empire.

Catherine asked some crucial questions, and Chen Rui answered them one by one. In some public places, more and more people gathered in front of magic television as they all listened carefully, seeming to forget that this was supposed to be a heated battle.

After the Q&A, Catherine took a few deep breaths and nodded, “Thanks for your clarifications. Now, you have 2 options. First, declare war on the Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire with mighty strength and start your absolute domination ruling. Perhaps you can also take off the mask to show your true face that will shock the entire Demon Realm – Even if you don’t count individual force because super powerhouse doesn’t participate in the war, with your terrifying means of manipulating the economy, coupled with the incomparably powerful military strength at hand, you are also a well-deserved number 1 in the Demon Realm. Of course, the Dark Shadow Empire will not surrender, and I believe Raizen will be the same. Even if you can win the final victory, you will also pay a considerable price. The second option is that the 3 empires form a confederation alliance, but you must swear by your soul that you will never interfere in any government affairs of the confederation. As long as the confederation truly exists, you will forever give up the war and give up domination as well as control over the Demon Realm. The control I’m talking about is not only force and military; it is including your unfathomable economic warfare tactics.”

One is war and absolute domination while the other is giving up war and domination. Judging from Catherine’s words, ‘Aguile’ is the real mastermind of the Fallen Angel Empire. In other words, the prince consort can fully represent his wife, Shea the Great.

As soon as these 2 choices were mentioned, many people whispered to each other.

“Give up domination forever?” Chen Rui pondered slightly. “I wonder if there is a third option.”

Catherine was silent for a moment before she answered, “There is, which is to kill me in this duel. Or I’ll spend my life fighting you to the death. As long as I’m dead, you don’t have to make any choice.”

“It turns out that you came with the determination to die. If I choose the first one, you will do the same, right?” Chen Rui looked at Catherine’s robe and nodded slightly, “No wonder the Dark Shadow Cape is not there. It seems that in the past 2 days, you have entrusted a lot of things. Since you have completely arranged your successor and funeral, considering the hidden rule that the super powerhouse cannot interfere with the ordinary war, your death will not radically impact the Dark Shadow Empire’s combat power, but it will boost the morale of all soldiers instead. An indignant army is bound to win… However, sacrificing your most precious life like this… Apart from the throne, your responsibility, and your people, what else do you have? Do you think it’s worth it?”

Catherine looked at him quietly, and she solemnly gave the answer word by word, “It’s worth it.”

The arena, which was still a little noisy initially, was suddenly silent. The same was true for the VIP room. At this moment, Athena, Zola, Isabella… including Liliz and her husband, were all silent. Looking at the woman wearing the veil and her lonely and determined figure, they suddenly understood many things.

Shea resonated the most; a deep sadness flashed across her indifferent purple eyes.

“Daddy, mommy…”

Duoduo, who had just calmed down, suddenly struggled, and Athena was caught off guard. Duoduo bounced away and rushed out of the VIP room. The small body suddenly turned into a flame that rushed into the sky. Zola responded the fastest. A red light flashed in her hand, intending to restrain fire with fire and stop Duoduo without hurting her. At this time, a phoenix chirp sounded, and the flame suddenly turned into a phantasm of a little phoenix. Zola’s strength not only failed to stop it, but the phoenix even took advantage of it as it bounced away more quickly, disappearing from their vision in the blink of an eye.

Looking at the image of the little phoenix, Athena showed an unbelievable expression as she suddenly thought of something.

“You’re still so persistent… You gave up too many things, even your own life, for the tens of thousands of people behind you, for the responsibility on your shoulders.” Chen Rui sighed and put his hand to his mask, “In honor of you, I will give you the real answer.”

At this moment, everyone held their breath and stared at the hand holding the mask.

Take off the mask, reveal your true face, and shock the entire Demon Realm? Declare war on the Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire with mighty strength and begin absolute domination?

Is it finally time to face war? Many people were extremely nervous.

The mask was slowly removed. It was a familiar face; the face that appeared in the Dark Shadow Empire’s mechanic contest and the Fallen Angel Empire’s potioneer contest – Master Arthur.

This was not his true face.

Catherine’s heart shuddered as she already understood the meaning of the face.

Immediately, that face showed her a vaguely familiar smile as he said 2 words, “You won.”

These 2 words spread far and wide and in everyone’s ears.

“I swear by my soul that as long as the confederation truly exists and as long as the Demon Realm can be truly peaceful, I will forever give up war as well as the domination and control of the Demon Realm.” Chen Rui smiled while looking at her, “What I want to say is that this is actually my greatest wish.”

This oath was equivalent to publicly announcing the abandonment of the war. As long as Raizen and Catherine agree to establish that kind of confederation of peace and mutual benefit, the war that the people were most worried about would not happen again. The true peace was really happening.

In an instant, the entire arena, the entire estate, and the entire Demon Realm burst into thunderous cheers. Even from the distance of the ancient battlefield, the cheers could be heard.

Seeing that smile and hearing the distant cheers, Catherine’s body trembled. It seemed that some kind of strong strength that had been supporting her was quietly going away.

She stood up straight again, “I want to know the name of that song.”

She listened to ‘that song’ when she went directly to the Dark Moon as Christina to give Chen Rui an ultimatum. Although she only heard it once, she liked this song very much. That deep sentimental music with somber sadness had repeatedly echoed in her dreams.

Chen Rui suddenly realized what was going to happen, but he wasn’t sure. There was a strange look in his eyes as he said the answer.

“‘Eternal Guardian’.”

Catherine closed her eyes gently, and the lingering notes seemed to play in her ears again.

Silent Night Wetland. This man used his last strength to teleport with Broc.

Crystal Valley. He crushed his own heart without hesitation.

Jergal Fortress’ small plain. Facing the incomparable Raizen, he grinned and said to her “Run away quickly”.

In the deadly [Flame of Nirvana], he desperately embraced her who almost annihilated. “I caught you.”

“If your persistence is to protect everyone, then my current persistence is just to protect you.”

Eternal Guardian.

Catherine opened her eyes and all the ‘he’ overlapped before combining into 1 person, that was the man in front of him. Just like Castle in the Sky under the moonlight, the person in her dreams and memories had become a real existence that could be touched.

Catherine’s vision became hazy, and the veil on her face suddenly disappeared, revealing that perfect face.

For the first time, she showed her face in front of everyone, facing him.

The breathtaking beauty coupled with the strength of 5th nirvana made her appearance and temperament perfect. Even Zola was slightly inferior to her now.

This made the audience who was in a commotion just now become quiet again.

Catherine suddenly smiled, “The eternal guardian? Can I understand it as foolish as always?”

Chen Rui also smiled, “Of course.”

Catherine watched Chen Rui quietly without restraining the tears slowly flowing down from her eyes, “Then, are you still willing to accept such a woman who is not only foolish, but also stubborn, selfish, everchanging and ruthless?”

She never thought that one day she would ask such a question to a man on such an occasion.

However, now she simply asked like this, putting aside all hesitation.

She never imagined that she would admit defeat to this man in front of the Demon Realm.

However, when he smiled and said the words ‘you won’, she knew that she had lost.

Completely lost to this man.

Everyone in front of the arena and magic television was shocked again, even more shocked than when they heard about the confederation system. Even a fool could see the relationship between the 2.

The Demon Realm’s top beauty, the top sage, the empress of the Dark Shadow Empire, actually…

And that man is the prince consort of the Fallen Angel Empire’s empress!

Chen Rui’s eyes were filled with tears as he stared deeply at those beautiful twinkling eyes. He took a deep breath, lowered his head slightly, and stretched out his hand, “As always, this is my honor.”

Catherine stretched out her hand gently. She seemed to be trembling, but she finally grabbed his hand. There was no passionate hugging and kissing; it was just holding hands like this as if they were holding the most important thing in each other’s lives.

“I’ve always been afraid that we will pass by and gradually drift apart. I’m afraid that I can’t stand the test of time, and the memory of you will gradually fade away. Fortunately, you caught me again.”

“Apart from the throne, the responsibility, and the people, I… I finally have you.”

“Thank you as always, my love, my only man, my daughter’s… father.”

The last few words shocked Chen Rui. He suddenly felt the heat of his left arm was unprecedentedly strong. As soon as he tore off his clothes, he saw a circular mark on it. The totem in the center of the mark was a phoenix spreading its wings.

Fire phoenix.

Chen Rui’s heart beat violently. When he raised his head suddenly, he saw a flame flying in the air. In the flame was actually the shadow of the little phoenix.

“Daddy!”

Chen Rui was dumbfounded for a moment as if he was struck by lightning. The small flying figure came to him in the blink of an eye and transformed into a lovely little fair-skinned girl who rushed into his arms.

Unfamiliar face, but with a familiar feeling. Especially the familiar voice; the familiar action.

Chen Rui stretched out his hand tremblingly and gently touched the little girl’s tearful face in disbelief. It is actually so real, so warm.

“Duoduo!” Without the slightest hesitation, he hugged the small body tightly. He could no longer hold back the tears and they poured out frantically.

No matter how Duoduo is resurrected, whether she is a phoenix or what, fortunately, I did not lose her in the end.

Catherine was slightly surprised. Without any introduction or guidance, the daughter who had never seen her father directly found Chen Rui and Chen Rui also directly called out the daughter’s name.

This human once told some stories. Perhaps as the story said, in the past life, they were relatives – father and daughter.

Zola and others who came from a distance looked at Chen Rui, who was hugging Duoduo tightly and bursting into tears. Everyone was silent, and no one made a sound.

TL: Finally 😭…

chapters.title: Chapter 878: Doomsday Trial
chapters.body:
Chapter 878: Doomsday Trial

The martial battle championship held in the Bloody Empire finally ended. Compared with the strongest battle in the semi-finals, what happened in the finals, which could be called a divine scene, was even more eye-catching.

There was no fierce battle as imagined or even a fight at all; there was only a conversation between a man and a woman from beginning to end.

There was no winner in this final. From another perspective, both Catherine and ‘Aguile’ were the winners.

As the Demon Realm’s top beauty and sage, Empress Catherine, said, this was the most critical moment for the Dark Shadow Empire, the 3 empires, and the entire Demon Realm.

Empress Catherine, with the determination to die, made ‘Aguile’ (which represented the Fallen Angel Empire) choose to give up domination and control of the Demon Realm forever, and pointed out the ‘confederation’ alliance, a hopeful future empire system.

It seemed that this empress almost sacrificed her life in exchange for the peace of the Dark Shadow Empire and even the entire Demon Realm, but what happened next was more like a sensational and affectionate stage. Her Majesty Empress and Aguile actually loved each other, and they even had a daughter secretly!

Seeing the hands of lovers Catherine and ‘Aguile’ clasped together caused a commotion in the entire Demon Realm, including the Dark Shadow Empire.

If it was another time, this event would have set off a terrifying ‘quake’ inside the Dark Shadow Empire alone.

However, under the current situation, this move had given the biggest reassurance for the precarious and anxious Dark Shadow Empire. The Dark Shadow Empire could breathe a sigh of relief regardless of whether that ‘confederation’ system would be implemented.

In fact, by now, many people had clearly understood the strength of ‘Aguile’. This Royal Highness Prince Consort was by no means a vassal. It was even said that ‘Aguile’ should be the biggest factor that Shea could bring down Obsidian and ascend from lord to ruler. The strength he had in hand was enough to control the entire Demon Realm.

When Shea was still the lord of the Dark Moon, ‘Aguile’ had been working behind the scenes under the guise of the Cloak Gang until the Obsidian crusade where he began to really show his true power by beheading Regent Obsidian on the spot. In the martial battle championship this time, although there was no battle in the final, he was already the recognized champion and super powerhouse who far surpassed Raizen. Putting aside individual strength, as many have guessed, the magic gun troop, assemble puppets and never-before-seen ancient guardians who appeared at the Fallen Angel Empire’s grand military parade, were all strengths that really belong to ‘Aguile’ – If Shea had such strengths, she would not have been nearly wiped out by Raizen back then.

In this context, the success of Catherine and ‘Aguile’ reuniting was great news for the Dark Shadow Empire, which had been worried about the occurrence of war.

Catherine was the absolute ruler and spiritual leader in the Dark Shadow Empire who had won the trust and support of the people. When ‘Aguile’ asked her whether, ‘Sacrificing her life for the throne, responsibility, and the people, is it worth it?’, Catherine answered without hesitation. ‘It is worth it’.

At this moment, countless people of the Dark Shadow Empire shed tears.

In the end, Aguile gave up the ambition to rule and gave up the war for Catherine. When the two held hands, the vast majority of the people of the Dark Shadow Empire felt heartfelt joy and relief. They were silently blessing the beloved Her Majesty Empress. Catherine’s prestige had not declined, but grown instead.

In contrast, the Bloody Empire Lord Raizen’s face looked gloomy.

The last time Raizen was chasing them in the small plains, Raizen discovered that something was wrong between ‘Aguile’ and Catherine, but he didn’t expect that Catherine actually made such a move in the final. What’s even more unbelievable was that the 2 actually had a daughter!

Judging from the performance of Aguile swearing to give up ‘domination’, holding hands with Catherine, hugging his daughter and crying bitterly, it is inevitable that the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire will form the same front, and the Bloody Empire will face an unprecedented dangerous situation.

Originally, the strong rise of the Fallen Angel Empire forced the Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire to join forces to fight against it, but now the Dark Shadow Empire has unexpectedly become an ‘ally’ in another sense of the Fallen Angel Empire. Whether the confederation system can succeed, the Bloody Empire is forced to the edge of the cliff.

A number of pressing issues had been put before Raizen, forcing him to think more.

Now, the love history and romance gossip about Aguile and the 2 empresses, Catherine and Shea, plus the mysterious super powerhouse magician Zola, were spreading wildly. These hot topics could be heard in every corner.

The main protagonist of the incident, a certain Sir Prince Consort who was envied and hated by countless males, was not in the high spirits as imagined now, but he was anxiously facing a… trial.

The all-female juries consisted of the harem troupe of Athena, Zola, Isabella, Shea and Kia as the presiding judges while the juries were Delia, Medilu, Alice, Adeline, Krobelus and Helen.

22 eyes were fixed on Chen Rui, and this oppressive atmosphere made the male protagonist feel more nervous than facing Demi-God or even Pseudo-God.

Fortunately, there was a powerful amulet on the male protagonist, which was Ms. Duoduo riding on the neck. Due to many follow-up issues to deal with, Catherine, who had a touching reunion in the final, did not go with Chen Rui, but Ms. Duoduo insisted that she would not leave daddy, so she followed Chen Rui back to the inn.

Ms. Duoduo rode on Chen Rui’s neck, familiarly pulling daddy’s hair, which was her favorite nest when she was the little phoenix.

It was a pity that it was a human body now, and her size had become larger, so she couldn’t roll on it. Nonetheless, there were also advantages to being in a human body as she could nibble and scratch daddy’s face as she wished.

Seeing the young little loli crawling around on the target, trying to squeeze the guy’s face into various funny shapes from time to time, most of the juries’ attention was inevitably attracted. The oppressive atmosphere could no longer last and finally dissipated, allowing the male protagonist to wipe off his sweat in relief.

Isabella realized that it couldn’t go on like this, so she was the first to speak, “This Royal Highness Prince Consort. Do you have something to say?”

“I have nothing to say other than to say ‘I’m sorry’.” Royal Highness Prince Consort bowed his head with a guilty gesture. Although he really hoped to have the domineering aura of the male protagonist in the novel that deters all wives and concubines, there was an obvious gap between reality and ideals. It was impossible not to humble his attitude at this time.

Nothing to say? The presiding judges and the jury quickly exchanged glances. Then he can be convicted?

Convicted for what? Cheating with Catherine without telling everyone?

The problem was, according to the order of time and things, Catherine was his first woman in the true sense. Only the earliest Athena was qualified to compete with her, and the rest could only be regarded as the later ‘mistresses’.

Several girls in the presiding jury winked at each other, then they took a step back in tacit understanding. Athena was standing at the front now.

When Athena was suddenly pushed to the front, she was a little flustered. Delia hurriedly gave her good friend an encouraging gaze, and the harem troupe’s comrades also gave her an eye gesture as a support.

Athena bit her lip and walked in front of Chen Rui. Chen Rui looked up at Athena with an apologetic look. At that time, his intimacy with Catherine was purely accidental. Although Catherine was his first woman, Athena was the first woman he really fell in love with; she was also the one he loved most.

Athena’s heart softened when she saw his gaze. Chen Rui had confessed to her about ‘Christina’ long ago, but she didn’t expect ‘Christina’ to have such a big background that it caused an unimaginable commotion throughout the Demon Realm the moment the relationship was publicized. This made the harem troupe more jealous and envious.

“ Eh-hem! ” A reminder sounded from behind. When Athena returned to her senses, she struggled violently in her mind for a while. When she finally made up her mind and was about to speak. Little Duoduo, who had been fiddling with daddy’s hair, said in a childish voice, “Aunt Athena, Duoduo wants to eat red apple.”

“ Ah … Duoduo waits a minute, aunty will choose the reddest one for you now!” Athena hurriedly went to the side to choose the apple.

Someone secretly breathed a sigh of relief: My daughter is the powerful one after all. She managed to neutralize the first wave of the enemy’s offensive without any fight.

When the harem troupe saw that the vanguard was diverted away, they were naturally unwilling to give up. The strategist Isabella decided to go out in person and said with a sad face, “Actually, Her Majesty Empress knew you first, so we don’t have a say. However, putting aside the status, both of you even have a child… Didn’t you say that we are a family? Now I just want to know how many secrets you have…”

“Aunt Isabella, comb hair hair.” Duoduo took out a small red comb and handed it to Isabella.

Isabella, “ Ah , okay…”

After being smooched by the little girl, Ms. Yini was no longer desolate as she helped Ms. Duoduo comb her hair with a loving look on her face. After the vanguard general went to peel the apple, the jury suffered a non-combat attrition again as the madam strategist became a combing maid.

After the strategist of the main jury unexpectedly failed, the rest of the people looked at each other and were speechless for a while.

“I’ll go!” The little loli of the jury jumped out abruptly. She pointed at Chen Rui with a look of grief and indignation, “Brother! You’re a big liar, a big bad guy…”

Alice’s heart was really sad. I originally thought it was Terdila who was being taurened(NTR, being cheated), but I didn’t expect that I was the one who is getting taurened (Self-asssumed)! I have been waiting for 3 years without success. Catherine, that wicked mistress, reaped without sowing, had sex with brother, and gave birth to a child!

The more Alice thought about it, the sadder she became, then she started crying. Ms. Duoduo saw that Alice was crying, and she followed suit without realizing it. Everyone panicked and rushed to coax the 2 lolis.

After barely coaxing Ms. Duoduo into laughter and Alice was comforted by Shea and Adeline, the momentum of the previous public trial had been completely destroyed.

The female strategist who continued to act as the combing maid shook her head after knowing that the operation code named ‘Doomsday Trial’ was a complete failure.

Chen Rui also realized this, and he secretly felt lucky. He wanted to hug the troublemaker Ms. Duoduo and desperately ‘smooch’ her- This girl is so caring, Ikki Tousen (1) .

Shea, who had been silent for a while, sighed, “Okay, we will just ask you 1 question, and you must answer truthfully. Do you still have any other women out there?”

“Absolutely not!” Chen Rui knew that this kind of concluding remark meant that the trial meeting was coming to an end, and that he could finally get away with it, so his head shook like a rattle.

Ms. Duoduo couldn’t hold onto daddy’s hair, so she had to give up. At this time, Isabella had already helped her comb her hair. Ms. Duoduo was very happy and pointed toward Athena and the others, “Aunt Athena, Aunt Isabella… eh , daddy, Duoduo still remembers there is an Aunt Blanche?”

Blanche?

Female?

The ears of the jury who were about to disperse stood up at the same time. The atmosphere suddenly returned to the strange vibe just like before.

No! The savior is also the troublemaker… Chen Rui almost cried like Ms. Duoduo.

Ms. Duoduo still didn’t know that she had pulled someone back to hell. When Chen Rui was in the Jade Forest Sea, he thought he couldn’t take Duoduo with him, so he entrusted Blanche, a half-elf girl, to take care of Duoduo. Duoduo retained its previous memory, so it was reasonable that she remembered Blanche. However, when she brought it up at this terrible time, she could only be described with the words, ‘tripping dad’.

A veritable ‘tripping dad’.

“ Swoosh swoosh swoosh… ” In the blink of an eye, blade-like gazes all surrounded him.

The daddy’s daughter was a little tired of daddy’s bird nest head, “Aunt Athena, Duoduo wants to play ‘Angry Birds’.”

Athena stretched out her hand and embraced Ms. Duoduo who was flying toward her. She gave her comrades a firm gaze that wasn’t there just now: I’ll leave the rest to you all.

What happened later, only the people involved know best. Anyway, the male protagonist didn’t dare to think about it.

When a certain guy recalled this tragic past, he only said a very philosophical sentence: Every man’s IQ is close to Einstein’s when he is cheating, and every woman’s reasoning is no less than Sherlock Holmes when she is catching the cheater.

Even Einstein, no matter how smart he was, could only kneel obediently when faced with several Sherlock Holmes and several ‘accomplices’ like Watson.

In fact, the shock of this ‘Doomsday Trial’ did not last long. Soon, the savior came.

Bloody Empire Lord Raizen personally wrote an invitation to invite Shea of the Fallen Angel Empire and Catherine of the Dark Shadow Empire to attend the first talk of the 3 empires’ leader to restart the peace talks of the 3 empires. Prince Consort ‘Aguile’ was also invited as a special guest.

This was the first peace talk proposed by Raizen, who had always maintained a tough attitude in more than 300 years, which might mean that the Demon Realm would enter a new era of change.

(1) A japanese manga describing a girl who is destined to unite the 7 schools that are constantly ‘at war’ with each other.

TL: No wonder author keeps saying Terdila is a tauren before, turns out he is saying that Terdila is getting cheated.

chapters.title: Chapter 879: A Negotiation That Will Determine The Future
chapters.body:
Chapter 879: A Negotiation That Will Determine The Future

Note: 4 chapters for today (including monthly goal chapters)! Thanks for the support 🥰

In the council hall of the lord’s mansion of the Iron Fist City, the rulers of the 3 empires gathered again, and the Fallen Angel Empire Prince Consort Aguile attended as a special guest.

The talk this time was very similar to the peace talk in the Dark Shadow Empire 2 years ago. However, in 2 years time, everything had changed. They were still the 4 negotiators, but the situation was completely reversed.

The Fallen Angel Empire, which was the weakest at the time, was already the existence that the other 2 empires needed to look up to, whether it was economic or military aspects. Under this disadvantageous situation, the Dark Shadow Empire’s Catherine the Great should unite with the Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen to maintain the balance of power. However, Her Majesty Empress made a shocking decision in the martial battle championship to the surprise of everyone by tying herself to the battleship of Aguile. The Dark Shadow Empire was already the associate empire of the Fallen Angel Empire in a sense, so Raizen couldn’t calm down. Taking advantage of the opportunity that the 3 rulers were in the Iron Fist City Fort, he made a decisive decision to talk about it right away.

For this negotiation, both Catherine and Shea seemed to take it seriously. Catherine didn’t even look at Chen Rui because she represented the Dark Shadow Empire, and Chen Rui knew this very well. However, there was no need for mere formal communication between him and her now. If the love can last and stand the test of time, then there is no need to stay together everyday.

Shea and Catherine also nodded to each other as always, without any special gesture or indication.

Soon, the negotiation began.

As expected, the central topic of this meeting was the ‘confederation system’ mentioned by Chen Rui in the final. 2 years ago, Raizen dismissed this system of the 3 empires alliance, but now he was forced by the situation as it was a matter of life and death for the Bloody Empire, so Raizen had to bow his proud head and go back to that option. Objectively speaking, this new system was indeed quite tempting to allow the 3 empires to go hand in hand and truly grow together in a peaceful environment without war.

Chen Rui had also been thinking about how to further improve this ‘confederation system’ in consideration of the actual situation of the Demon Realm, so he shared some of his thoughts and understandings. Catherine obviously did the corresponding homework and proposed some very interesting and constructive comments which were more about fighting for a greater benefit for the Dark Shadow Empire.

Shea also put forward her own conditions. The Fallen Angel Empire was currently the strongest empire, but all this was because of Chen Rui. According to Chen Rui’s oath in the final, as long as the confederation was established, he would really withdraw and not interfere in the internal affairs of the confederation. Therefore, in order to ensure the long-term dominance and speaking authority of the Fallen Angel Empire in the future alliance, many aspects needed to be adjusted and transitioned to further ensure their own interests.

Raizen just listened without saying a word at first. When he first spoke, it was to oppose Catherine’s proposal that the rest of the royal family could join the confederation and have a certain independent voice.

Catherine’s intention was ‘diverting rather than blocking’. Giving the rest of the 4 fallen royal families a place would fundamentally eliminate the cause of the turmoil and fundamentally solve one of the causes of the Demon Realm’s turmoil. Meanwhile, Raizen’s opinion was to use tough methods to suppress or even eradicate all the fallen royal families that would not surrender to eliminate the hidden dangers.

This showed the special characteristics of Catherine and Raizen. Catherine was not stubborn. She just took the hidden powerhouse participating in the martial battle championship as an example, pointing out that the Demon Realm had a vast territory. It was impossible to completely wipe out the fallen royal families. It might also backfire in case of slight mistakes. Letting them participate in the confederation was not only a kind of tenderness, but also a strategy of advancing by retreating.

Catherine’s eloquence and planning were indeed extraordinary. Raizen couldn’t find a more convincing argument, so he asked, “If those royal families are stubborn…”

“Tenderness is not weakness and appeasement. Those who destroy the peace of the empire and the alliance will be spurned by the entire Demon Realm, and I will also not hesitate about wielding a blood-stained sword.” Catherine said lightly, but there was unconcealable murderous intent in her tone.

Raizen was very aware of how this ‘old friend’ had ascended the throne, so he finally nodded. After Catherine convinced Raizen, the topic changed to the magic game.

She put forward a special condition, which was to ask the Fallen Angel Empire to unconditionally share magic game technology and benefits. Not only economically, but also military aspects.

Some time ago, the Fallen Angel Empire military parade ceremony made everyone realize that the magic game was not only a huge cash cow and a special world to improve personal training, but it was also an unimaginable ‘special forces’ training base. Now the magic rifle soldiers and assemble puppets had entered the official legion establishment of the Fallen Angel Empire, and more troops were likely to appear in the future.

Catherine deliberately quoted Chen Rui’s original words. The original intention of confederation was to stay away from war and share peace. The 3 empires would cooperate and promote each other in economic and military aspects. The Fallen Angel Empire should not be dominating. Otherwise, the true meaning of confederation would be lost. If the Fallen Angel Empire was not willing to share, then the magic game must be banned.

Chen Rui secretly muttered. The child’s mother is really cruel, but I will definitely not agree to ban it. The magic game not only involves the economy and military, but also my training and the collection of faith power plans; it is also related to the Demon Realm’s future.

Facing Chen Rui’s objection, Catherine’s attitude was extremely firm. She did not give in at all because of her personal relationship with Chen Rui. At this negotiating table, she represented the interests of the Dark Shadow Empire.

Raizen naturally expressed support for this condition.

“The sharing of economic benefits can be considered, and the military aspect can also be partly shared, but technology is impossible. It is even more impossible to ban magic games!” Chen Rui pondered for a while, and he looked at the secretaries and guards around, “I’m not just thinking for the interests of myself or the Fallen Angel Empire, the specific reasons… I can explain it, but there can’t be a 5th person present.”

Raizen waved his hand, everyone withdrew except for the 3 rulers and Chen Rui, then he turned on the soundproof magic circle.

“First of all, let me explain that my strength actually comes from a special inheritance, the ancient alchemy civilization.”

As soon as he said this, not to mention Shea, even Raizen and Catherine also nodded in unison. Chen Rui had confessed this to Catherine, and Raizen had also seen the huge Castle in the Sky at the Warlock Fortress. Moreover, many ancient guardians who appeared in the Fallen Angel Empire’s military parade ceremony should be due to the ancient alchemy civilization, which can also reasonably explain why ‘Aguile’ could be the alchemy great grand master which shocked the Demon Realm. Perhaps it was also the reason why Aguile’s power surged beyond the norm.

“The technical principle of the magic game is actually an illusion similar to the kingdom. Users can get real exercise and training effects in the illusion. Each of the game helmets has a mystic crystal which stores a certain amount of magic power. Once the magic power is exhausted, it must be refilled. This is why the game needs to be recharged. The power of kingdom illusion is not equivalent to the kingdom of a super powerhouse, but it is generated with the special power of the central life crystal of the ancient alchemy civilization as the core. No one can control and use it except for me, the inheritor. Therefore, the shared technology that Your Majesty Catherine just mentioned is not plausible both theoretically and practically.”

Catherine and Raizen actually instructed someone to study the magic game long ago, and they also tried to ‘copycat’, but they failed without exception. They could naturally identify that Chen Rui’s explanation was not perfunctory.

“In fact, I developed this magic game not only for the purpose of profiting or training a small number of controllers of ancient weapons, but for another reason; an important reason related to the future life and death of the Demon Realm.” Chen Rui conveniently categorized the ‘magic gun’ into the ancient alchemy civilization. In fact, the magic gun was created with his limited knowledge of firearms in his previous life and the magic gun blueprint jointly studied by the Elf Grand Master Finoia and the Hobbit Grand Master Rick. The magic gun in the game was actually still at the semi-automatic level while Crystal Phoenix’ had successfully developed a fully automatic rifle, and its lethality was even higher.

Chen Rui’s next goal was to develop firearms that were more suitable for this world and more powerful (such as the demon version Desert Eagle, the demon version M200 Intervention, etc.). Although they could not replace the personal training and strength of powerhouses, they could increase an ordinary person’s combat power by several or even dozens of times. Perhaps a corresponding ‘profession’ would be derived as in the game.

Since firearms have entered this world, they are destined not to be unknown . Chen Rui had no doubt about this.

“Is it related to the future of the Demon Realm?” Even Raizen couldn’t help but interject, “Are you sure it’s not an alarmist?”

Chen Rui shook his head, revealing a solemn expression, “Have you ever heard of the term ‘abyss’?”

Raizen shook his head and said he didn’t know while Catherine frowned and spoke up, “I have studied ancient literature before. The word, ‘abyss’, in the ancient language, represents ‘taboo’, but the specific meaning is not clear.”

“Taboo?” Chen Rui remembered that Tetenis also seemed to have said this, “Hearing is false, seeing is believing. Instead of explaining it with words, it is better to use your own eyes to verify it.”

With that said, there was a faint blue light on Chen Rui’s hand, and everyone felt that the surrounding scene had changed. They were already in another place. The 3 of them were no ordinary people, so they soon realized that this was just an illusion that Chen Rui activated. As soon as they restored their calmness, the scene in front of them made the 3 of them stunned.

Endless fiery red filled with suffocating scorching heat. Their vision was full of tidal waves, waves of strange creatures.

Individually, these creatures were not very strong. They were about the level of a Higher Demon, but the terrifying thing was the infinite number. Millions, tens of millions, billions?

Through the buff of those strange red flowers, the strength of most of the creatures leaped from the Demon King to the Great Demon King level. Hundreds of translucent creatures with a length of more than 10 meters and a height of about 6 meters appeared in front of them. The limbs were strong, and the tail was long and sturdy. It was exactly what they saw in the military parade ceremony, the ancient guardian, giant crystal beast of the Demon Overlord level.

Demon Overlord would undoubtedly crush Demon King or Great Demon King. In the surrounding force field, hundreds of enemies were annihilated, but facing millions, tens of millions or even hundreds of millions of Demon King and Great Demon King, the force field of the giant crystal beast was so insignificant that it was soon completely submerged in the terrifying ‘tide’.

Judging from the ‘ocean tides’ that continued to appear afterward, this kind of creature was only a relatively low-level existence. No matter whether it was a high-level or low-level creature, there was only 1 special characteristic – destruction.

Wherever they passed, there was no life left, only a piece of scorched ground.

The image gradually faded, and the 3 rulers returned to the council hall. Chen Rui’s voice sounded, “This is the strength of the abyss. What you see is only the tip of the iceberg. I can tell you frankly, civilization as powerful as the ancient alchemy civilization and many others that I do not know of… are completely destroyed by this.”

Although Shea saw this video for the first time, she had heard a few words about the abyss from Chen Rui before, so she was somewhat prepared, but Raizen and Catherine saw the terrifying abyss for the first time. Their eyes revealed shocked expressions that couldn’t be concealed.

The 2 realized 1 thing at the same time. Facing such a terrifying abyss, the entire Demon Realm, no, even plus the human world, I’m afraid…

Chen Rui’s next few words made the 3 rulers change their facial expressions at the same time.

“There is bad news. As far as I know, the Abyss Family still exists, but it is sealed somewhere for some reason. Over the years, they have tried their best to return to the legendary world called the ‘Master Plane’. The Demon Realm has many secret worshippers of the Abyss, and I have destroyed more than 1 Abyss altar. The existence of these people, for the 3 empires and the Demon Realm as a whole, is even more terrifying than the ‘Bloodfall’. I have a bold assertion here, the return of the Abyss, I’m afraid… is just a matter of time.”

“Could it be those monsters and dungeons you set up in the magic game… Only Catherine’s mind turned quickly, and she related it to the magic game intel.

“Smart.” Chen Rui smiled and praised his woman unceremoniously, “There are quite a few monsters and specially made dungeons in the magic game were created by imitating the characteristics and habits of the abyss creatures in order to deal with the abyss disaster that may occur in the future. I hope that even if we leave this world one day, when our descendants face these terrifying creatures that suddenly appear, they can maintain strong confidence and the most effective combat power. “

Raizen’s gaze toward Chen Rui finally changed, showing his respect for the first time.

Catherine and Shea, who knew Chen Rui’s true identity, felt even more sentimental. There was a hint of tenderness in their eyes.

“There are my beloved women here, and my friends who go through life and death with me. This is my home. I will sacrifice my life to protect it and everything I cherish.”

This man, not only did he say it, he did it all the time.

He was human and this was the Demon Realm, but this was his home, the real home.

chapters.title: Chapter 880: Condition; Son-In-Law Of The Demon Realm
chapters.body:
Chapter 880: Condition; Son-In-Law Of The Demon Realm

“The Bloody Empire will make every effort to popularize the magic game. In the future, military and college training, selection, and advancement will add the corresponding magic game assessments.” Raizen was the first to express his approval.

I thought Raizen will be the most resistant. I didn’t expect that he was actually the first to agree . Chen Rui was startled, “You actually believe me so much? Maybe these are just an illusion created by me.”

“ Hmph ! My eyes are not confused to this level, and with your current strength or personal force, there is no need to lie… Most importantly, over the years, I have also received some intel related to altar and blood sacrifice.”

“I suggest that the 3 empires join forces, strike the root cause, and destroy all churches and believers who worship the abyss.” Shea’s suggestion was approved by the 2 rulers. In fact, the Fallen Angel Empire had secretly begun doing this 2 years ago, but with little success.

Catherine’s thinking was even far-reaching. She proposed the idea of game battle competition across the entire Demon Realm which would promote the improvement of the combat power of all people compared with the separate dungeon competition, team battle, and so on.

She even thought of the inter-empire esport. As expected of the child’s mother. Seeing that the 3 rulers agreed, Chen Rui nodded again and again. There was no doubt that after learning about the common terrifying enemy of the ‘Abyss’, the unity of the confederation alliance would be stronger in the future.

“Since this is the case, when the alliance is established, I will transfer all the economic benefits of the magic game belonging to the 2 empires, and the 3 empires will further strengthen military cooperation. I will provide the confederation with magic gun technology. As for others, due to the limitations of the alchemy civilization, it cannot be shared.”

Catherine nodded slightly, “Then, we can start the preparations for the formation of the confederation alliance as soon as possible.”

“Wait.” Raizen sneered, “The Bloody Empire didn’t agree to join this alliance.”

As soon as these words came out, the other 3 were quite speechless. We were talking so enthusiastically just now, and now you suddenly change your mind?

“I can accept all the conditions you proposed earlier, even including the Samael Royal Family joining the alliance, but you must promise me 1 condition.” Raizen’s burning gaze turned to Chen Rui.

“Me?” Chen Rui pointed to his nose with astonishment.

This time he participated in the meeting without wearing a mask, and he used the face of the mechanical master which would appear in the public for a long time in the future.

“Yes, you.” Raizen snorted coldly.

“What?” Chen Rui obviously resorted to Ms. Fairy Dragon’s fake daze. It can’t be making an agreement for some sort of battle, right?

“You marry my daughter.” Raizen said almost word for word.

“What?!” Although the same word, Chen Rui was already shocked this time. Is there a problem with my ears or did old Raizen take the wrong medicine? Why is his thinking so out-of-the-box?

It’s popular to give out daughters these days? Auglas gave 2, but 1 has become a sister, and the other has been returned.

Raizen’s condition was so unexpected that Catherine and Shea were equally taken aback.

“This is my only condition.” Raizen said firmly, “Otherwise, the Bloody Empire will never compromise and fight until the last man!”

“Wait! Your Majesty Raizen.” Chen Rui spoke quickly, “This is an empire affair…”

Raizen sneered coldly, “Marrying my daughter is an empire affair.”

The words ‘political marriage’ appeared in Chen Rui’s mind. He didn’t expect that one day he would also encounter such a thing. He quickly shook his head and said, “I’m the prince consort of the Fallen Angel Empire, how can I marry the princess of the Bloody Empire? “

“Do you think I’m a fool?” Raizen’s face was terrifyingly gloomy as he pointed at Catherine, “Then what is your relationship with the Dark Shadow Empire’s Royal Majesty Empress?”

“…”

“ Hmph! That alliance looks very attractive, but the competition in it is equally fierce. Among the 3 rulers of the alliance empires, 2 are your women! Even if you swear not to interfere in government affairs, you are well known for your abilities. The magic game alone can overturn the entire Demon Realm. If this continues, the Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire will team up. No matter whether the alliance continues or not, the Bloody Empire will have no place at all in the future. So, you must marry my daughter.”

Catherine and Shea glanced at each other and quickly exchanged silent communication. At this moment, their identities were not only 2 rulers, but also ‘family members’.

Moments later, Shea was the first to comment, “Your Majesty Raizen is right, it’s really not a private matter but an empire matter.”

“The Bloody Empire has a large population and the largest territory. The tenacity and combat power of its soldiers are the highest among the 3 empires. In addition, if the whole nation became soldiers, even if a war is launched, it cannot be solved in a short time.” Catherine’s analysis was more convincing, “The war of the Bloody Empire annihilating the Wrath Empire lasted only 5 years, but even after 50 years, the post-war situation is still not stabilized… Besides, the Demon Realm is now ushering in a rare era of rapid development. No one wants war to happen.”

Shea nodded, “For an empire and for the entire Demon Realm, it only takes a marriage to completely avoid the occurrence of war. Everyone knows how to choose.”

“As expected of both Royal Majesty.” Raizen’s facial expression finally relaxed, “I mean what I say. The Bloody Empire will accept all the terms of the alliance just now, and start to fully prepare for the preliminary work of the alliance. The day ‘Aguile’ and my daughter get married is the day the alliance is officially established.”

“Wait a minute…” Chen Rui, who was the main party, broke down in cold sweat when he heard that the 3 of them had concluded the political marriage.

Unexpectedly, Catherine and Shea didn’t seem to see him. Catherine asked Raizen directly, “Your Majesty doesn’t seem to have a princess. I wonder which noble lady in the royal family?”

Everyone knew Raizen did not have a daughter, so he should find a royal bloodline to give the princess name for marriage. This kind of thing was very common among empires.

Raizen shook his head and gave a shocking answer, “No, I have a daughter, and… this time it’s not the princess who will marry, but the empress of the Bloody Empire.”

Chen Rui and the other 2 were shocked at the same time. Raizen’s intention was obvious. He would pass the throne to his daughter and withdraw from the political arena.

In this way, Chen Rui became the 3 empires’ empress’… co-prince consort? This was a veritable son-in-law of the Demon Realm.

“In the future, your sons and daughters must become the throne inheritors of the Bloody Empire.” Raizen glanced at Catherine and Shea. “In this way, the Demon Realm can truly usher in lasting peace.”

Catherine and Shea couldn’t help nodding their heads. The 3 empires formed a confederation alliance of equality and mutual assistance. In the future, the 3 empires’ empresses would be blood relatives. This association was much more stable than a general alliance.

“You’ve actually seen my daughter before.” Raizen glanced at Chen Rui, who was speechless, and continued to bombard him with explosive news.

“Tiffany.”

“Her situation is a bit special because her mother is human.”

“She’s in a little trouble now, and you have to bring her back safely.”

Raizen’s words made Chen Rui calm down gradually from surprise. Some mysteries in his mind were finally revealed – That mysterious noble Ms. Tiffany is actually Raizen’s daughter! That is why Raizen strongly opposed the pursuit of Tiffany by several princes.

Even more surprising is that her mother is human! No wonder she has a physique of light and dark attributes!

On the 4th floor of the Bloody Empire’s Book Collection Hall, Tiffany underwent a ‘baptism of light and darkness’ with Sariel’s power and became a ‘key’ leading to a mysterious place. According to Sariel 2 years ago, the baptism of light and darkness on Tiffany’s body will take 2-3 years to completely condense. At that time, she will set off to that mysterious and dangerous place to find the silver box. Counting the time, it should be soon.

Chen Rui suddenly thought: Raizen’s request for this marriage will not only bring back Tiffany safely, but also make the Bloody Empire prosper in the confederation alliance through marriage. It can be said to kill 2 birds with 1 stone.

Catherine and Shea couldn’t help thinking of Chen Rui’s identity when they heard that Raizen’s daughter’s mother was actually human. Shea asked tentatively, “Where is Princess Tiffany now?”

“I don’t know either, but there is 1 thing I know.” Although Raizen was answering Shea’s question, he said it to Chen Rui. He slowly opened his palm, and a ring lay quietly inside.

This ring did not have any special decorations or inlays. It looked bland with just a faint red light, but with Chen Rui’s sensing ability, he immediately found the powerful strength it contained. Catherine on the other side blurted out emotionally, “Bloody Ring!”

1 of the 7 artifacts, Bloody Ring!

“This daughter has rarely been by my side since she was a child… She has more hatred for me… I will give you the Bloody Ring. Her blood was refined into the ring using the secret technique a long time ago. Although I don’t know her specific location now, the Bloody Ring can point you in the right direction and help you find her.”

Looking at the highest artifact of the Bloody Empire handed over by Raizen, Chen Rui was stunned for a moment. He never thought that Raizen would give him the Bloody Ring.

Of course, Raizen had another intention of borrowing Chen Rui’s hand to pass the Bloody Ring and even the entire Bloody Empire into the hands of the daughter who ‘had more hatred for him’.

Catherine and Shea’s gaze exchanged quickly, and they finally reached a tacit understanding. Catherine spoke up to Chen Rui, “Take it. As Her Majesty Shea said just now, this is not your personal matter anymore. The confederation alliance is your proposal. This peaceful situation has always been your ideal, and now it is only the last step away from the establishment of the alliance and real peace. Do you want to overthrow all your previous efforts?”

Shea showed her approval, and Raizen understood that the 2 were expressing their stance to him, so he nodded with satisfaction. So far, Raizen had a considerable understanding of the opponent ‘Aguile’. Not only did he had terrifying strength, but he also had the inheritance of ancient times. More importantly, ‘Aguile’ would do everything to protect his woman.

Raizen had experienced this firsthand at the Jergal Fortress and the Warlock Fortress, a man who fought with his life whether for Catherine or Shea. Because of this, even women like Catherine were completely conquered by him. Even if it was a political marriage, as long as Tiffany became his woman, he could rest assured for both public and private reasons.

Chen Rui looked at the eyes of the 3 with a bitter smile. In this case, do I still have any choice?

TL: Possible that he could get more princess/empress?

chapters.title: Chapter 881: Meeting
chapters.body:
Chapter 881: Meeting

The meeting of the 3 rulers came to a successful conclusion, and the important decisions made in this meeting were destined to be recorded in history.

The 3 empires, the Fallen Angel Empire, the Dark Shadow Empire, the Bloody Empire, issued a joint statement that they would stop all sanctions and war and plan the establishment of a joint alliance. The Demon Realm would usher in a new era of peace.

Of course, things such as the son-in-law clause had not been disclosed to the public, and the specific date of establishment of the confederation had not been determined. The parties involved were clear about the reason.

The announcement of this joint statement made the entire Demon Realm cheer. The 3 empires had all experienced the scourge of war. For the people, almost no one wanted to live that kind of destitute and homeless life again. For those who had excess energy and were fond of fighting and battling, there were also multiple platforms — The battle ball contests, martial fighting contests, and magic game training. The future legion martial arts battles, inter-college contests, magic game battle and others mentioned in the joint statement by the 3 empires could also give them ample opportunities to show their abilities.

With the successful conclusion of the martial battle championship and the important consensus reached in the 3 empires’ talk, it was almost time to leave the Iron Fist Estate.

After setting a return date of departure within 3 days, Chen Rui received a special invitation from Raizen to go to the mechanic association of the Iron Fist Estate to give a lecture to the mechanic who came to watch the game.

Chen Rui naturally couldn’t refuse, but he didn’t foresee that once he left, an important visitor came to the VIP inn where he was staying.

Her Majesty Empress from the Dark Shadow Empire.

Mother of the child.

After the final that the Demon Realm was still talking about so far, Catherine had communicated with Shea in the 3 empires talks and reached a considerable understanding, but it was the first time Catherine had officially come to meet the harem troupe. However, she did not expect that a certain mediator was not there; it was equivalent to directly facing the ‘sisters’ (love rivals?).

Catherine’s arrival was reasonable, but the harem troupe seemed to be flustered not because Chen Rui was not there, but because they happened to be playing a game with Ms. Duoduo, so many people had strange drawings on their faces.

This VIP inn was not accessible to ordinary people, but the person sitting at the gate drinking wine happened to be the dead duck dragon. Seeing the arrival of Her Majesty Empress (who was the lover of the damn human) who had defeated him, he rolled his eyes and greeted her with enthusiasm, then he very ‘enthusiastically’ asked the waiters not to inform and let Catherine in directly. When the Dark Shadow Empire’s Royal Majesty Empress entered the hall, the girls who were caught off guard didn’t even have time to ‘remove their makeup’.

When Catherine came to the hall, she deliberately removed her veil, not because she wanted to show off, but to express her honesty in order to avoid unnecessary grudges from the girls by wearing the veil.

In order to prepare for the moment of meeting, the top sage Her Majesty Empress also thought about various words or possible situations in advance, but when she saw several madams, she was almost startled.

Athena was dressed in a barrel-like suit with metallic paint on her face;

Isabella was dressed as a witch with an exaggerated hooked nose;

Shea was wearing a huge bizarre robe. It was not a crown on her head, but a hood that looked like a bald head, plus a beard stuck to her face;

Zola’s face was rubbed with ashes, and her body was covered with straw;

Even the little loli Alice’s big claws held a lion mask that was just taken off…

The only normal one was Ms. Duoduo, who was wearing a cute dress, carrying a small basket, and wearing a pair of crystal shoes next to a barking puppy.

Catherine saw at a glance that the power breath on the puppy was Kingdom level, and she couldn’t help being surprised. The girls were also stunned — The top beauty lived up to her reputation indeed. The face and elegant, wise temperament that overwhelmed all living beings made even the harem troupes who were already stunning inevitably envious. Furthermore, they were in this abnormal state which was kind of awkward at the moment.

Meanwhile, Ms. Duoduo had rushed over happily, “Mommy! Mommy!”

“Duoduo! You’re naughty again!” Catherine glanced at her daughter in her arms angrily, and she patted her little butt lightly.

“No! Aunts are playing an interesting game with me! This game is called…” Little Duoduo sucked her finger as if she couldn’t remember it all of a sudden.

The puppy with an appeasing smile on his face actually said, “Little Master Duoduo, no, Master Dorothy, this script is called The Wizard of Oz, and I’m your puppy Toto.”

Catherine noticed the voice of this puppy which was belong to Dodo who was defeated by Red Pipit. Looking at the strange appearance of the ladies, including Iceberg Empress Shea, she suddenly couldn’t say the many words that she had prepared before. She had a lot of words in her mind, but in the end, she just gave a deep bow to the ‘love rivals’.

“Thank you.”

Although there were only 2 words, it was genuine and full of sincerity. Shea and the other girls could naturally sense it and they bowed back in a hurry.

“Mommy, Aunt Athena is a tin man, Aunt Zola is a scarecrow, Aunt Isabella is…” Duoduo went through one by one, “and Sister Alice is a lion who likes to ‘Ow’ .”

“I said that it’s not sister; it’s aunty!” Alice corrected her immediately. The little loli had her own thoughts; she didn’t want to be a generation lower than her sister, Athena and the others.

Duoduo walked over curiously, stood on tiptoe, stretched out her hand and compared Alice’s height, then she compared with Athena and Isabella beside her before confirming with a serious look, “It’s sister!”

“…” The lion loli, who was hit on her soft spot, ‘ow’ to the sky with tears streaming down her face.

Fortunately, Duoduo was not looking at the chest.

Shea frowned, “Alice, don’t be rude in front of Her Majesty Catherine!”

“It’s okay.” Catherine smiled slightly, “So… are you all still missing a role?”

On the other hand, the mechanics of the Mechanic Association were very enthusiastic. It was not until evening that Chen Rui returned to the inn. He was surprised when he heard the news of Catherine’s arrival.

This madam empress top sage’s reputation is not for nothing. Even Isabella is inferior to her. In some respects, she can even single out the whole harem troupe. The worst thing is that she came to visit when I was not there. Maybe a war of words or even a world war has already happened.

When Chen Rui hurried to the hall, he saw a harmonious scene that surprised him: Catherine was chatting and laughing with the girls, and everyone’s attitude seemed to be very casual, unlike what he expected.

Little Duoduo was curled up in Isabella’s arms, sleeping soundly. With the abundant energy of Ms. Little Phoenix, she must be exhausted from playing since she fell asleep so early.

Seeing Chen Rui coming in, the girls got up one after another, and Alice quickly greeted him happily, “Brother is back!”

Chen Rui patted the little loli’s head, looked at the girls, and said to Catherine, “You’re here.”

Catherine smiled and nodded.

“ Hmph! It sounds like he is the supreme master. A flirty, shameless, lousy man.” Needless to say, the one who muttered with vicious mouth skill must be the little mermaid princess.

Ms. Black Dragon came up to announce the good news, “Boss! Sister Catherine treated us to a free meal today!”

For the chick, free was naturally the biggest attraction.

Chen Rui was taken aback, “Have you all eaten?”

“Why, Royal Highness Prince Consort? Your fiancée’s father… which is the father-in-law you often say, didn’t he ask you to stay for dinner?” Hearing Ms. Yini’s surprised voice, Chen Rui was speechless. You’re still holding my daughter in your arms, can’t you stop for a second?

“Your Highness Prince Consort… I’m sorry that I didn’t take away some food for you.” The troublemaker’s little maid rubbed it in with a grudge.

“Boss, it’s okay. I especially kept a late night snack for you with a 10% discount. 10,000 black crystal coins for…” Without changing her expression, Ms. Black Dragon took out half of a steamed bun that she couldn’t finish.

“…”

Catherine looked at Chen Rui, who was devastated, and smiled without saying a word.

Shea spoke up, “Alright, we’ve had a busy day today. Everyone is exhausted. We’re going to rest. Chen Rui, you go and send Catherine off.”

All the girls nodded in unison, and Chen Rui heard a hint. Shea didn’t add the word ‘Her Majesty’ to Catherine. They seem to be relatively close. Does this indicate a good omen?

Before he could clarify it, he was inexplicably kicked out the door, accompanied by Catherine and the sleeping Ms. Duoduo.

The 2 did not ride the magic carriage, but chose to walk instead. In order not to attract attention, Catherine put on a veil, and Chen Rui disguised another face.

Under the moonlight, the shadows of the 2 were getting closer and closer. Catherine held Chen Rui’s arm. It was the first time Chen Rui had such an intimate moment with her in public. There was a different feeling immediately – very heartwarming.

“Your heart seems to be beating fast, Your Highness Prince Consort.”

“Now is not the time to waste your spirit power to study this kind of data.” Chen Rui shrugged while hugging the sleeping Ms. Duoduo, “You also seem a little nervous, Your Majesty Empress. Is this the first time you’re holding a man for a walk like this?”

“You should be honored.”

“I think it is more appropriate to use the word ‘heartwarming’. This is my true feeling.”

“Is it?”

“Of course.”

“I never thought that I would have such a day. We took a lot of detours, but fortunately, we finally got to where we wanted to go.” Catherine’s head gradually came closer and gently rested on his shoulder. The shadows on the ground overlapped into 1.

He is right, ‘heartwarming’, that’s how it feels.

Chen Rui gently kissed her hair while smelling the familiar fragrance comfortably, “There is still a long way to go, let’s go together.”

“ En… “

Catherine looked up, lifted the veil, and kissed his face.

This movement was so natural like a couple who had been together for many years.

It was also a heartwarming feeling. Chen Rui’s heart was warm, and he only hoped that this road could continue infinitely.

At this point, the 2 had reached a remote place. Catherine stopped and took out something wrapped in layers of cloth from behind, “By the way, this is for you.”

Chen Rui knew that this thing was taken out from the magic carriage at the entrance of the inn before she decided to walk, but she kept it behind her back. He didn’t know what it was.

Catherine carried Little Duoduo while Chen Rui opened the package. It was actually a metal object like a piece of armor. With his current mechanical grand master eyesight, he quickly saw the key and pressed 1 of the parts. The armor pieces quickly overlapped and changed, transforming into an armor.

The whole armor was black, exuding a special fluctuation and giving people a feeling of indestructibility. Chen Rui’s mind moved as he tried to put the armor into the storage space, but to no avail. He was slightly shocked, “Wrath King Armor?”

Catherine smiled and nodded. Chen Rui was greatly surprised. It’s really 1 of the 7 artifacts, the Wrath King Armor of the Samael Royal Family!

When Gustav (Bridget) fought desperately and was defeated by Raizen, Raizen did not take away the Wrath King Armor. However, the Wrath King Armor and the corpse of Bridget disappeared after that. Ms. Black Dragon, who went there immediately to pick up free goodies, came empty-handed. I didn’t expect it to fall into Catherine’s hands.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of something and tried to ask, “Is Bridget…”

Catherine nodded and answered, “Yes, he’s still alive thanks to the resurrection potion you gave me when you were in the small plains.”

Chen Rui once entered the palace and sent a resurrection potion to Catherine after the Dark Shadow Empire mechanic contest, but in the battle of the Crystal Valley, Catherine poured the potion on the ground when she thought he was dead. Later, when Chen Rui was in the small plains of the Jergal Fortress, he took out another bottle for Catherine, wanting to help her survive the disaster of Nirvana, but he relied on Duoduo’s strength to save her life in the end.

Bridget died in the battle with Raizen this time after burning out his blood and vitality, but his body was not damaged, and his soul was not completely dissipated. He was successfully resurrected by Catherine with a resurrection potion.

“But Bridget’s side…”

“I not only saved him, but also promised to give the Samael Royal Family a place in the empire alliance in the future as well as a valuable space for survival and development, so he promised to lend me the Wrath King Armor indefinitely.” Catherine’s eyes flashed a glimmer of wisdom, “Actually, this was the condition I had negotiated with Raizen when we met. In short, I scammed the Samael Royal Family once. However, Raizen made demands on you with such a manner, even at the risk of letting her daughter inherit the throne and marry you… he shouldn’t be able to solve Tiffany’s trouble by himself. You are likely to be in danger. I know you have the ability to activate the 7 artifacts. Just like the God-Eating Mask, the Wrath King Armor is 1 of the 7 artifacts; the strongest armor other than the Illusive Demon Shield. With it, at least you have a little more chance of success. If you need it, I can lend you the Dark Shadow Cape as well.”

Then only Chen Rui knew Catherine’s intentions to deceive the Wrath King Armor. He was moved and hugged her gently.

“Catherine, I…”

“Don’t want to go back tonight?” Catherine clearly guessed what he was thinking, and a blush flashed across her face behind the veil, “Aren’t you afraid of being dismembered by the ladies the next day?”

“…”

“Alright, you don’t have to look so tragic like you are being rushed to the execution ground… In fact, when they asked you to send me and Duoduo back just now, they have acquiesced to your ill idea.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, “Really?”

“My guess.”

“…”

TL: Only the boots are still missing, what will happen if he gets the full set? By the way, how do they do ‘that’ when Duoduo is around, hmmm …

chapters.title: Chapter 882: Mass Distribution Of Benefits
chapters.body:
Chapter 882: Mass Distribution Of Benefits

That night, Chen Rui did not return to the inn in the end. As for how ’deeply’ he discussed life with Her Majesty Empress, it was unknown.

Fortunately, after returning carefully the next day, perhaps because of the amulet, Ms. Duoduo, there was no storm as expected, and everything seemed calm. However, after returning to the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Moon, some girls occasionally put forward special hints of ‘send me back’, making someone feel ashamed. No doubt, there is competition everywhere.

After all, Catherine was the lord of an empire. Although she expressed her intentions to Chen Rui in front of the entire Demon Realm, the empire and the people still had an unshakable position in her mind. As far as the Demon Realm’s current situation was concerned, it was impossible to leave the empire behind to be with Chen Rui all day, but there was a complete tacit understanding between her and him. Even if they were separated by thousands of miles, the distance between their hearts was still only a few feet away.

It was exactly that sentence, ‘If love can last and stand the test of time, then there is no need to stay together everyday’.

Besides, with the [Star Gate], it was not difficult to meet in the future with just 1 star point.

In addition to the amiability and humility that Catherine showed last time, there was one more thing that made the harem troupe had a good impression on her, that was Ms. Duoduo. When Catherine returned to the Dark Shadow Empire this time, she did not take Little Duoduo with her, but entrusted her daughter to the harem troupe for the time being. Quoting her original words, “With so many moms to take care of Duoduo, she will definitely be happier and more blissful.”

Ms. Duoduo was now the harem troupe’s favorite child, and Duoduo’s attachment to Chen Rui was very strong. Catherine’s decision could be considered going with the flow, but when Duoduo parted with mommy, she still cried a lot, which made all the women present couldn’t hold back the tears.

Shea continued to preside the capital. Octopus King Red Pipit left while Chen Rui returned to the Dark Moon with his lover and friends. Life seemed to return to normal. However, Chen Rui’s identity had been different. He currently had many titles: the Fallen Angel Empire’s prince consort, the Dark Shadow Empire’s prince consort-to-be (not certified), the Bloody Empire’s future prince consort (not certified), great grand master, martial battle championship top powerhouse, etc., but the title he was most proud of was his daughter’s father.

At that time, Little Phoenix Duoduo actually ‘self-exploded’ in the hands of Isyorul. In fact, she used an innate Nirvana talent to seal her soul in the stigmata of Chen Rui’s left arm, but the price was a bit cruel, that was to completely destroy her body. The little phoenix had already had this plan before meeting Isyorul, and the stigmata on Chen Rui’s left arm was precisely pecked out by Duoduo.

If it could absorb enough fire element power, the stigmata could make the little phoenix accumulate Nirvana power and be reborn again. Of course, Nirvana also had a considerable risk. If it could not be reborn, it would be completely reduced to ashes.

Due to the limited expressive ability of the little phoenix at the time, Chen Rui did not know about it. After returning to the Demon Realm, he had a lingering relationship with Catherine by accident. The stigma of the little phoenix absorbed the most dangerous 5th [Flame of Nirvana] which was like a dose of the largest nutrient solution. This not only made Catherine safe and Nirvana succeed, but it also bred in Catherine, the most suitable maternal body, through sex. In the end, she was born safely in a human body.

The little phoenix, who combined the Nirvana power of the Asmodeus Royal Family, was no longer a pure fire phoenix, but mutated to become another kind of stronger phoenix. Therefore, the current Duoduo had 2 forms, the phoenix and the Asmodeus Royal Family. The purest and strongest Nirvana power flowed in her blood. She was still young now. Once she grew up, she would become an extremely powerful being.

The reason why Catherine’s strength had improved by leaps and bounds, and she could even activate [Fire Phoenix Transformation]. It was part of the power that Duoduo gave back to the maternal body when she was born.

Just as Chen Rui would never forget the little phoenix daughter after returning to the Demon Realm, although the little phoenix lost a lot of consciousness after the self-explosion and Nirvana resurrection, her memory of Chen Rui was always preserved. This kind of affection was touching. However, there were also a lot of ‘bad habits’ left in the memory such as… Angry Birds.

Ms. Duoduo, whose real age was only 1 year old, was not tired of this dangerous game that ruined people. In just a few days, most of the things in the house that were about the size of a pig’s head were destroyed by Ms. Duoduo. Even the regretful daddy couldn’t do anything to correct her. He lamented the difficulty of education.

The battle between Chen Rui and Lalaria in the martial battle championship was quite rewarding, and he felt that he had a better understanding of the power of the 6-star evolution. Unlike a normal Demi-God, he didn’t need to worry about believers or [Armor of Faith], but he clearly felt that ‘law’ was the way forward.

The biggest difference between the kingdom of Demi-God powerhouse and the kingdom of Kingdom level powerhouse was that the Demi-God kingdom was based on reality and had a kingdom projection of faith and life. This not only improved its power qualitatively, but it also provided a steady stream of faith power that supported combat. On the other hand, the kingdom of the Kingdom level was only equivalent to an independent energy space which would constantly consume the power of the person activating it.

Chen Rui only understood this during the battle with Lalaria. In the future training, he would further integrate the power of the kingdom and faith, as well as the mystery of the ‘ release’ of the faith power.

As the ‘backbone’ of the Demi-God kingdom, law was also fundamentally different from Kingdom level, which Chen Rui felt particularly deeply. [Red Pole Star Transformation] was completely different from the law in the normal state, while the law of [Pole Star Transformation] was based on ordinary law. If he could further comprehend and strengthen ordinary law, not only the power of [Pole Star Transformation] would be doubled, but he could also explore the way to the next evolution level.

Having been busy with planning and training previously, Chen Rui was truly relieved now that the martial battle championship was over and the 3 Empires Alliance was about to be completed. He could calm down, study and utilize the new features of the Super System.

The current maximum time law of the training ground had become 1:500, that is, 1 hour was equivalent to 500 hours of training effect. Not only that, the training ground also had the function of [Faith Projection], which could manifest into reality.
