The effect was 1/5 of the original training ground, which was getting a time law of 1:100. The longest duration of projection was 3 months in real time, and he needed to pay 1000 faith crystals every day, which was close to 100,000 in 3 months. This price was originally very expensive, but for Chen Rui, who owned the entire Demon Realm’s magic game faith, the faith crystals he now owned were calculated in units of 100 million. Not to mention 100,000, even 1 million or 10 million was nothing to him.

Compared with the training ground, he only needed to sit back and enjoy another function which was the [Star-level Enhancement] under [Link Enhancement]. Compared with the time-limited [Battle Enhancement], [Star-level Enhancement] was a permanent enhancement unless the spiritual link was canceled.

The ‘star conferring’ was also ‘reaping without sowing’.

Whether it was the training ground, [Star-level Enhancement] or star conferring, the necessary condition was the spiritual link. Chen Rui’s original spiritual links were only those who were related to star conferring: Athena, Zola, Isabella, Paglio, Roman, Dodo and Guradam of the master-subordinate contract. The others such as Catherine, Shea, and so on were not covered, and now it was natural to take them into account.

The number of Blue Pole Star Emperor equality contracts upon entering the 6-star evolution was limited to 6, and the number of master-servant contracts was 15. After reaching the Red Pole Star Emperor, the upper limit was doubled. The equality contract was 12, and the master-servant contract (including master-subordinate) 30 people.

Chen Rui thought it over carefully. Duoduo was too young to be considered now. The initial spiritual links of Athena and the other 5 remain unchanged. There were also 6 equality contract spots. 1 reserved for Catherine and 2 for Shea and Kia. First of all, he met the necessary harem spot; the remaining 3 were gifts for friendship for Olypheus, the most promising to advance to Kingdom, Delia, one of Chen Rui’s loyal members, and Krobelus, a best friend of the harem.

The rest of the candidates include Roman’s new ‘mistress’ Medilu, the little loli Alice, naga girl Adeline, Helen (can be ignored), and the elated old man Tetenis, and so on. However, this quota was not constant. As long as he broke through to the next Pole Star Level, the slots would definitely double again, so Chen Rui was not in a hurry.

After the link was established, Chen Rui started the mass distribution of benefits.

The first was the [Star-level Enhancement] of [Link Enhancement].

According to the prompt, the strength of the recipient would be sealed, then in about 1 month, the seal would slowly disappear. This process was like a silkworm spinning a silk cocoon to bind itself before it broke out of the cocoon. Enhancement itself was not dangerous, but after ‘breaking the cocoon’, the amount of strength or progress depended on the absorption and comprehension in that 1 month. The only pity was that this enhancement was only for linked objects, so Chen Rui himself was not included.

The time of ‘cocooning’ could not be offset by the rules of the training ground. Because of this, before participating in the martial battle championship, Chen Rui never used [Star-level Enhancement] on his family and friends. Now the competition had ended, and many people also gained valuable insights in the actual combat, so they could take this opportunity to consolidate and improve.

During this period of enhancement, the group of relatives and friends stayed in the residence most of the time. Chen Rui transferred the maroon lamp spirit Manlace to protect Shea in the palace while he stayed in the Dark Moon to protect Lord Athena as well as relatives and friends.

Every day he took the daughter out for strolling, entered the Super System for training, had fun and traveled with relatives and friends. At night, he would be squeezed by the girls’ ‘begging for children’… The days passed quickly. Before he knew it, a month had passed.

After the [Star-level Enhancement] was completed, the first significant change was sensing power. People who got the [Star-level Enhancement] could sense the existence of each other at a certain distance, and not only Chen Rui alone. This was quite a useful feature for a team.

The second change was naturally strength. Kia reached the peak stage of the Great Demon King; Athena and Delia broke through to the Demon Emperor realm, and Guradam completely fused the bones of Ukleus through the enhanced power. He finally successfully entered the Demon Overlord level. However, the changes in the rest of the people were not obvious at first glance, but everyone could feel the incredible change as if the body had been washed again by some strange strength. Their foundation had been further consolidated, and some stagnation of the previous training was also easily resolved.

Chen Rui had already understood the meaning of the [Star-level Enhancement], which was to use Star Power and faith power to cast off the old self and turn over a new leaf. It not only further solidified the foundation, but it was also easier to break through the bottleneck in the future. It was like a super version of devil fruit.

As Chen Rui who owned the Super System, he naturally didn’t need this kind of enhancement, so [Star-level Enhancement] didn’t work for the controller.

Another unique feature of [Star-level Enhancement] was the ‘interaction’, 2 people who received the enhancement would get an obvious strength buff within a certain distance. The more people, the stronger the buff. The only exception was Guradam of the master-subordinate contract, which was likely because of different type of link. If there were other master-subordinate contractors, Guradam should also be able to get this buff. Regardless of the type of link, the effect of this buff would double as long as Chen Rui was in it. This was simply the halo feature of the team leader, in which non-’team members’ would not have.

chapters.title: Chapter 883: Star Conferring Accident! Biggest Discovery
chapters.body:
Chapter 883: Star Conferring Accident! Biggest Discovery

After the benefits of [Star-level Enhancement] were distributed, it was time for star conferring.

Originally, the Blue Pole Star Emperor had 6 star slots. Star General was conferred to Paglio. Zola and Dodo were Star Servants while Athena, Isabella, and Roman were Star Apprentices.

The current Red Pole Star Emperor’s star conferring had increased to 21 slots: 1 Star Concubine, 2 Star Commanders, 4 Star Generals, 6 Star Servants, and 8 Star Apprentices.

Star Concubine: Spirit buff: SS. Special attribute: [Break Mind]: Double the damage of spirit and soul attacks, and halve the damage of spirit and soul attacks.

Star Commander: Strength buff: S++, speed buff: S++. Special attribute: [Safeguard]. Greatly reduces damage and doubles stamina regeneration.

Star General: Strength buff: S-. Special attribute: [Break Army]. Increases damage and doubles destruction.

Star Servant: Spirit buff: A+. Special attribute: [Concentration]. Accelerates speed of magic casting and spirit recovery.

Star Apprentice: Speed buff: A. Special attribute: [Lightning Dash]. Accelerate movement and attack.

Everyone in the harem wanted the title ‘Star Concubine’ despite having nothing to do with attributes, but unfortunately, there was only 1 slot. The most important thing was that kingdom level was a threshold. SS-level strength was not something that ordinary powerhouses could really activate, plus it was also a buff in spirit, so he gave it to Zola.

The remaining Star General and Star Commander positions were decided by drawing lots. Catherine was also included in the lots, which was drawn by Ms. Duoduo.

In the end, Ms. Duoduo and Dodo had the best luck, they both got Star Commander. Paglio got Star General which was the same as before. Kia also got Star General, but the little maid thought about it and gave up the slot to Athena, who was great in offense. The remaining 2 Star Generals were drawn by Shea and Delia respectively. As for the rest, Star Servant and Star Apprentice were chosen at will. Roman and Isabella still chose the Star Apprentice that best suited their characteristics. Olypheus also chose Star Apprentice while Kia, Krobelus and Guradam chose the Star Servant with spirit buff.

At the moment when the star conferring was completed, everyone was shaken and appeared in a strange place.

This was a wide place. There was a high platform glowing with faint colorful lights in front.

“What is this place?”

“Why do I have an extremely huge strength in me? The law seems to be stronger?”

“I don’t have law power yet, but my spirit power has been expanded a lot?”

“Me too!”

“…”

At this moment, Zola, who had a similar experience, said, “This is the strongest kingdom inherited by Chen Rui from the great grand master. The abnormality you feel is the effect of faith power.”

The kingdom inherited from the great grand master? Faith power? The relatives and friends were surprised.

Chen Rui’s figure appeared on the platform. In everyone’s mind, there was actually a kind of unattainable deterrence, like a god who looked down on the world. However, this feeling soon disappeared except for Guradam.

Special effect of the spiritual link, ‘Emperor’s Deterrence’

Star prowess: Reverence, put an end to all rebellious will (can be canceled).

As Chen Rui expected, Zola’s ‘True Star Servant’ became ‘True Star Concubine’. Dodo became ‘True Star Commander’ while Paglio became ‘True Star General’. There was no such change in the star title as they had not reached Kingdom Level.

True Star Concubine: Spirit buff: SS+. Increases basic magic and the upper limit of spirit by 50%.

Special attribute: [True Break Mind]. Doubles the damage of spirit and soul attacks, doubles the control of elements, and halves spirit and soul damage taken.

True Star Commander: Strength buff: SS-. Speed buff: SS-. Reduces stamina loss by 50%.

Special attribute: [True Safeguard]: Greatly reduces damage, doubles stamina recovery, and doubles the speed of body regeneration.

True Star General: Strength buff: SS-. Increases basic perception ability by 30%.

Special attribute: [True Break Army]: Doubles damage and destructive power with a chance to ignore the target’s defense.

The power of true star positions was tested in Zola’s brief encounter with Lalaria back then. Zola’s 2 attacks actually forced her to activate the teen girl transformation of the intermediate stage of Kingdom level. Moreover, Lalaria was a black dragon who was immune to magic.

The [6 Elements Kingdom] plus true star position was enough for Zola to defeat all the opponents of the same level and even the higher level. The only pity was that due to luck, Ms. Fairy Dragon could not really show her strength in the martial battle competition. However, the gossip news that Zola hugged Chen Rui intimately before conceding defeat in the competition was still widespread the Demon Realm, which Ms. Fairy Dragon was very proud of.

Now the power of ‘True Star Concubine’ was far greater than that of ‘True Star Servant’. Apart from Catherine who had not yet obtained [Star-level Enhancement] and the star position, Ms. Fairy Dragon was undoubtedly the strongest existence among all relatives and friends.

What surprised Chen Rui himself was that only those who got true star position could enter the Star Conferring Platform previously. This was what happened when Zola became a ‘True Star Servant’ last time. However, everyone entered the Star Conferring Platform this time!

This shouldn’t be because of the Red Pole Star Emperor. Oh, it’s [Star-level Enhancement]! Chen Rui reacted abruptly —[Star-level Enhancement] actually has this connection with the Star Conferring Platform!

However, if Chen Rui did not reach ‘Red Pole Star Emperor’, he also could not use [Star-level Enhancement], so it was a causal relationship.

After everyone entered the Star Conferring Platform, Chen Rui found that in addition to the original Emperor’s Deterrence, Devotion and Faith Link, the spiritual link attribute had an additional ‘Armed Bestowment’.

‘Emperor’s Deterrence’ was a deterrence that could not be disobeyed. ‘Devotion’ reinforced faith and prohibited change of faith. Except for Guradam, Chen Rui had canceled this effect on the rest of the people. ‘Faith Link’ allowed the giving and absorption of faith, which was long-term relationships similar to investment and return. They were adjusted to a minimum for the rest of the group except Guradam.

The ‘Armed Bestowment’ was actually a bestowment of faith equipment which was already similar to Demi-God powerhouse, but this bestowment was for offense and was directly linked to the Faith Martial Soul of the exchange center.

Faith Martial Soul could cover any weapon (including fists). In addition to a large leap in attack power and damage, it would also add a trace of the power of destruction law that Chen Rui comprehended. This meant that Athena, Isabella, and linkers whose combat power was below kingdomized would have a leap in strength again.

However, this Armed Bestowment had a time limit and could only be used once a day for half an hour each time.

Without any hesitation, Chen Rui bought Faith Martial Soul directly at the exchange center and conducted the Armed Bestowment. After explaining Faith Martial Soul and the true star position, everyone was shocked again.

“The inheritance of the ancient great grand master… is so powerful?” Paglio was secretly shocked. He could clearly sense that the increased strength was definitely not an illusion, especially the kind of faith power that could only be obtained by reaching Demi-God. Now it was constantly circulating in his body as if he was born with it. For the kingdomized powerhouse, this was the most rare and precious thing, and it would be much easier to break through to the Demi-God level in the future.

“The ancient great grand master must be a super Pseudo-God closest to god.” Krobelus exclaimed.

“I feel that I have vaguely touched the edge of kingdomization now.” Roman pounced on Chen Rui with admiration on his face, “Now even if someone tells me that the great grand master is god, I believe it, sir leader! Sir Uncle! Sir inheritor of the great grand master! I will be your faithful believer in the future, please accept my kneeling!”

Chen Rui kicked the nephew away speechlessly, and he shrugged apologetically to Delia, “How do I put it? Cheating tool, protagonist halo, BUG… Uh , you don’t need to understand why. You just need to know it’s very powerful. “

With the [Star-level Enhancement], star conferring, plus the projection of the training ground, whether it was a beloved woman or a friend who shared life and death, they could become stronger in a short period of time. He could also deal with Tiffany’s matter with confidence. In fact, there was no need to search for her deliberately. According to Sariel, the deadline for a certain action was probably approaching.

Before Chen Rui could finish a sentence, the slime’s triumphant voice sounded from the side, “True Star Commander, truly handsome (same pronunciation in Chinese)! Master Slime is too handsome, truly handsome!”

Chen Rui and friends, “…”

In fact, the biggest beneficiary of this kind of star conferring was Chen Rui himself, who had received quite generous rewards. The solar system power of the entire Super System had more than doubled, and the power of various skills had been buffed at the same time. The most important thing was that the understanding of the destruction law had become more comprehensive. Many of the original ambiguities had also begun to clear a little.

With Chen Rui’s current level, every small step was very difficult, such a leap in quality and quantity at the same time was an incredible progress. He could now use the power of the [Red Pole Star Transformation] far better than in the martial battle competition.

On the Star Conferring Platform, a series of colored light beams suddenly appeared and lined up. The purple light beam closest to the Star Conferring Platform should represent the Star Concubine, the blue ones on both sides were Star Commander, the green ones were Star General. The light beams of Star Apprentice and Star Servant were white.

The light beam began to change rapidly, and the purple light beam condensed into a translucent sculpture of Zola, which was exactly the same as the real person, but the expression looked a little solemn. The blue light beam became an onion-like shape with a smile on his face. Since Catherine was not there, the other blue light beam representing Star Commander had not changed. The rest of the images of Athena, Paglio, and others also appeared in the corresponding light beams, and those star positions that were not selected were vacant.

This abrupt change made everyone’s astonished eyes fall on their own ‘sculpture’. Dodo looked curiously at the smiling onion, showed a peace sign and showed everyone the same smile.

Chen Rui clearly sensed that this image contained extremely strong faith power. When his thoughts shifted to Zola’s sculpture, corresponding texts appeared in his mind.

True Star Concubine: Zola.

Emperor’s Deterrence: Cancel status (recoverable).

Devotion: Cancel status (recoverable).

Faith Link: Current scale (adjustable).

Armed Bestow: Red Star Law Soul Soldier (removable).

Star Status: None.

Remarks: Remaining stay time on the Star Conferring Platform currently: 6 minutes.

Chen Rui showed a clear expression. This should be the change of star conferring after advancing to the Red Pole Star Emperor. These sculptures not only label the attribute of star conferring so that the controller can revoke and restore it at any time, but they also show some special data. For example, the stay time on the Star Conferring Platform, but these sculptures seem to have other functions.

At this moment, Dodo curiously touched the sculpture. His whole body turned into a ray of light and was sucked into the sculpture.

The sculpture suddenly burst into blue light and seemed to be full of vitality in an instant. This change shocked everyone. As Chen Rui’s thoughts turned slightly, he had seen the status displayed by Dodo’s sculpture.

True Star Commander: Dodo.

Emperor’s Deterrence: Cancel status (recoverable).

Devotion: Cancel status (recoverable).

Faith Link: Current scale (adjustable).

Armed Bestowment: Red Star Law Soul Soldier (removable).

Star Status: Fusion (currently 3 hours remaining; recoverable)

Remarks: Remaining stay time on the Star Conferring Platform currently: 3 hours.

The original 6 minutes stay time has turned into 3 hours? Is it because of the ‘fusion’ star status? Chen Rui suddenly thought of something. He did not immediately restore Dodo’s fusion state. With a shift of thought, everyone had returned to the scene of the house.

Ms. Duoduo, who was in Medilu’s arms, flew over and landed in Chen Rui’s arms, “Daddy! Aunt Athena… Were you all playing puppet games just now? Why aren’t you all moving now? Duoduo wants to play too!”

No doubt what entered the Star Conferring Platform just now was everyone’s consciousness, or it should be called soul.

Chen Rui looked around, “Duoduo, be a good girl. Tell daddy, where’s Dodo?”

“Dodo…” Ms. Duoduo flashed her cute big eyes as she looked left and right, “ Huh ? He was still here just now.”

Chen Rui felt that some kind of speculation seemed to come true, and his heartbeat was a little faster. Everyone else left the Star Conferring Platform, and their consciousness returned to reality, but Dodo’s physical body actually disappeared in the ‘fusion’ star status!

Could it be that…

Chen Rui immediately entered the Star Conferring Platform and saw that the sculptures of the others were all there. Dodo’s one was still in that fusion state. With his mind turned, he exited the Super System, handed Duoduo to Athena, then he activated the [Star Gate].

The current [Star Gate] had increased to 4 star points, and the setup time had changed from 3 years to 10 years.

The place Chen Rui was going to was the star point of the Blue Lake Mountain Range of the ancient alchemy civilization. When he arrived at the City of Stars in an instant, he found that Dodo was indeed still in the fusion state of the Star Conferring Platform!

This discovery surprised him. After some thoughts, he opened the [Star Gate] again. This time he wanted to experiment with A-level space. The system prompted ‘1 million faith crystals is required’. Chen Rui chose ‘Confirm’ without hesitation.

The scene changed again. Looking at the familiar scene of the Storm Island, Chen Rui suppressed his emotional mood and canceled Dodo’s fusion state. Dodo’s figure instantly appeared beside him, covering his eyes with a frightened expression.

The status of Star Conferring Platform at this time showed: True Star Commander: Dodo.

Emperor’s Deterrence: Cancel status (recoverable).

Devotion: Cancel status (recoverable).

Faith Link: Current scale (adjustable).

Armed Bestowment: Red Star Law Soul Soldier (removable).

Star Status: None. Remarks: After canceling star fusion, it will take 24 hours to be able to fuse again.

“ Haha! ” Chen Rui couldn’t help laughing, No doubt!

When Dodo heard the master’s laughter, it was relieved as it seemed that there was no danger. It removed the hands covering its eyes and looked at the dazzling sun in the sky. It asked curiously, “Master, Dodo seems to have fallen asleep just now… Where is this?”

“It’s a very good place.” Chen Rui laughed a few times with full of joy in his heart. The [Star Gate]’s defect of not being able to carry other people has always been my biggest regret, and now it can finally be realized!

This means that if I encounter any danger, I can put the link object in the Star Conferring Platform to avoid the danger, and it will be easy to bring Zola back to the human world to meet the father-in-law and mother-in-law of the Dragon Valley. I can even bring my relatives and friends to the human world for day trips.

“Mon… monsters!” Dodo pointed to several huge figures that suddenly appeared nearby. Wait! That seems to be the subordinate Titan made by master in the City of Stars? Yes, they are even bowing to master. But… this doesn’t seem like the Blue Lake Mountain Range?

The leader of the titans, Oceanus, was originally attracted by the laughter, but when he approached, he sensed Chen Rui’s spiritual imprint breath, and hurriedly bowed, “Master.”

Chen Rui learned from Oceanus that after he left, the Storm Island trial had ushered in 2 batches of dragons and dragon riders. There was no conflict with the giant or the wind elementals, and the training effect was quite promising.

Chen Rui nodded, then he explained a few things to Oceanus and Dodo. He gave Dodo a gem as a reward, and left a bunch of food that the slime liked to eat.

“Dodo, just stay here and don’t walk around. I’ll pick you up in a day.”

“Master! Truly handsome! Dodo… Truly handsome!”

Listening to the excited voice of the slime behind him, Chen Rui showed a knowing smile on his face.

TL: He can even bring more girls back from the human world to the demon realm…

chapters.title: Chapter 884: Dawn
chapters.body:
Chapter 884: Dawn

In the faint purple sky, there were a few scattered starlights. The color of the 2 moons was almost thin, and it was pitch black everywhere. The leaves in the cold wind shook slightly, making a rustling sound.

As soon as Chen Rui opened his eyes, he saw the calm sky.

This feeling of ‘quietness’ was like the woman who was sleeping beside him.

The star observatory of the palace was the tallest building in the Dark Shadow Empire, surrounded by various magic circles including silent magic circles. Even without these set up, every time Her Majesty Empress went to the star observatory, there were almost no people who would look for her or interrupt.

Many guards, including ministers, knew that Her Majesty Empress liked to have a quiet time alone on the star observatory. It was said that many decisions that could affect the entire Demon Realm were made here. For instance, teaming up with the Bloody Empire to fight against the top powerhouse, Midnight Sun’s Fallen Angel Empire back then. This place could be regarded as a turning point in the rise of the Dark Shadow Empire.

However, no one could have imagined that this time Her Majesty Empress’s ‘quiet time’ was spending the night in the arms of a man.

Chen Rui himself could not have imagined it. It was initially a romantic rendezvous or called an ‘infidelity’, but he and Catherine talked about things here from the afternoon until midnight. In the middle, apart from changing roles as a chef and a musician, they actually didn’t do any ‘important’ things before they gradually fell asleep.

A month ago, Catherine had already obtained the strength of [Star-level Enhancement]. The main purpose of this meeting was star conferring. Duoduo got the ‘Star Commander’ for mommy. With Catherine’s kingdomized strength, it was naturally a true star position.

Looking at the top beauty lying quietly beside him with a peaceful face like a baby, something called blissfulness spread silently in his heart.

He secretly channeled power to relieve the numb arm, raised his head, and looked at the sparse stars in the sky. Chen Rui felt his mood become more and more peaceful.

There was no cruel war, no crisis of life and death, no heavy burden, just hugging the beloved woman like this, quietly looking at the starry sky, and slowly growing old together. This was the life he dreamt of and the goal that he strived for.

Suddenly, there was a strange throbbing in Chen Rui’s soul as if a certain kind of fire that was dimmed by being wrapped in darkness was suddenly ignited. His whole soul became hot.

The flame gradually solidified into a huge hazy eye, but the strong sense of oppression it exuded was extremely clear.

“The blessed ones of the ‘Evil Moon Sigil’…” The giant eye made a suffocating voice, and every word caused the soul to tremble, “It’s time to fulfill the promise.”

Sariel!

Chen Rui was shocked. What should come is finally coming. Judging from Sariel’s tone, it seems that I am not the only ‘blessed ones’ of the ‘Evil Moon Sigil’?

“You have 10 days to gather at the place indicated by the Evil Pupil and wait for my order. Those who break their promises or exceed the time will be completely annihilated in the seal curse!”

In 10 days, if I can’t arrive at some place, I will be annihilated?

In fact, after integrating the strength of [Deep Analysis], the Evil Pupil had already become Chen Rui’s real strength. If he wanted, he could eliminate Sariel’s part of the seal at any time, but he exposed Aguile’s name in front of Sariel last time. If the seal was hurriedly extinguished, once Sariel noticed it and took revenge, it was likely to implicate many people.

In addition, Raizen’s commission was also related to the fate and peace of the entire Demon Realm… Alright, I am not that noble, but at least it is related to the happiness of my women, so I must go for this trip to the Mysterious Land.

Mysterious Land, Silver Box, Tiffany, Sariel, Satan, the rest of the blessed ones…

Get rid of Sariel’s control completely and bring back Tiffany. Perhaps… that silver box too…

While thinking about it, Sariel’s eyes flashed, and Chen Rui felt that there was something in his Evil Pupil which seemed to be a kind of compass. The 2 luminous spots in it could determine the position and direction of himself and his destination.

Strangely enough, the red luminous spots that represented him actually almost overlap with the green luminous spot that represented the destination. So, the gathering area Sariel said is actually near the Dark Shadow Empire?

Before he could think about it, Sariel’s image had gradually faded in his soul before he disappeared without a trace in the blink of an eye.

Chen Rui pondered for a moment, then he retracted his thoughts. Whether it is a blessing or a disaster, it could not be avoided. Now I don’t know anything about this action, so I can only adapt accordingly.

All of a sudden, he sensed something. When he turned his head, he saw 2 eyes that were brighter than the stars and quieter than the sky looking at him.

Chen Rui said apologetically, “Did I wake you up?”

Catherine’s eyes became more gentle as she shook her head gently, “It’s almost dawn.”

“ En .” Chen Rui stroked her hair lightly. Catherine’s hair was long and soft. It was usually coiled on her head, and it looked like a waterfall when she untied it.

Catherine looked up at the sky, and her soft voice sounded, “The darkness before dawn. The darkness is quiet and cold, but it is more of a feeling of rebirth where a new day will be born and created. From darkness to light, to vitality, and finally back to the darkness, over and over again. Do you… like this kind of darkness?”

Chen Rui stared at her side face. Although the visibility was low, with his eyesight, he could clearly see the perfect outline and shining eyes at this distance. This is my woman, the woman who said ‘I finally have you’ in front of everyone.

I’ve always been afraid that we will pass by and gradually drift apart. I’m afraid that I can’t stand the test of time, and the memory of you will gradually fade away…

Chen Rui smiled as he said the 3 words softly, “I like it.”

Catherine heard the meaning and emotion contained in these 3 words, and gave him a deep look- If one day, the people abandoned me, the officers betrayed me, and even everyone in the world stood against me, this man will still stand by my side, right?

As he himself said, a ‘fool’ that lost his intelligence over lust.

But it firmly grasped her heart.

He once said that one day, when she no longer had to bear the burden on her shoulders, he would take her out of here to a place that truly belonged to them to live a relaxed and happy life.

This day will come, right?

It is like the dawn that gave birth to a new life. Before that, although it was dark, he was with me. No matter whether advance or retreat, success or failure, I have no regrets.

Catherine’s heart suddenly filled with hope for the future.

“What’s wrong?” A concerned voice came from the side.

“It’s nothing, just… I think your appearance just now is a bit attractive, just like when I woke up, you were staring at the sky.”

“Isn’t it very handsome? Very dashing?” Chen Rui was 😦 when he inexplicably thought of a certain the slime’s recent catchphrase, truly-handsome, but his tension due to Sariel’s summon was gradually eased.

“No, it’s very ‘cute’.” Catherine pursed her lips, revealing a shallow smile.

Chen Rui was speechless for a while, “This word is not suitable to describe a man.”

“But it suits you very well.” Catherine’s eyes turned, and there was a bit of playfulness in her tranquil eyes, which made Chen Rui dumbfounded.

“I’ll take it as a compliment for now. I just take it as I’m handsome and dashing, plus a little cute.”

“ Hmph! Your self-intoxication level is about to catch up with the flowery words.” Catherine leaned on her side, resting her head on his shoulder more comfortably, while one leg rested on his body. Her Majesty Empress enjoyed this feeling: Steady, peaceful and safe with nothing to guard against.

“By the way, the preparatory work for the alliance of the 3 empires has basically been completed, and the people’s expectations are quite high. It depends on when you bring back that fiancee, the future Royal Majesty Empress of the Bloody Empire.”

Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “The tone of the last sentence made me feel that Her Majesty Empress is also a woman.”

Her Majesty Empress first turned her face sideways, then she asked with interest, “Who is the Her Majesty Empress you are talking about?”

Chen Rui was suddenly at a loss for words just like another Royal Majesty Empress who often was at a loss for words facing his flowery words. In fact, she was right. After all, a certain Sir Son-in-law of the Demon Realm still had a ‘future’ Royal Majesty Empress.

“You seem a little unwilling?”

“I’m willing! I’m willing!”

“Really willing? You are going to go back pitifully without taking advantage of anything?” Her Majesty Empress blinked playfully, and the corners of her eyebrows showed a seductive hint, which was different from the temptation talent of the little maid and Madam Aunt’s fascination. It was a kind of natural seduction which made people’s hearts skip a beat.

When Chen Rui reacted, he felt that the warm breath merged with his own breath. It turned out that there was zero distance between Her Majesty Empress and him as the cherry lips were gently pressed on his mouth.

It was also a very natural move.

With the warm lips and tongues intertwined, Chen Rui’s mind had been completely relaxed as he indulged in the intimate contact with Her Majesty Empress. His hands that stopped on her soft hair moved toward the neck and the back, gently stroking her smooth back.

Catherine’s body slowly flipped over, completely lying on top of him. Her cloud-like black hair was casually draped. The 2 plumps pressed against his chest. Even though she breastfed Ms. Duoduo, the plumps didn’t have a sign of drooping. In Chen Rui’s impression, they were more plump and firm.

When Chen Rui’s hand slid down to the round and tight ass and stroked the watery valley, the empress’ breathing became more and more rapid. A stimulating moan came from her lips as she grasped the hard object and slowly incorporated it into her body.

Facing the man she loved deeply, the mature body did not need to be concealed or suppressed. The accumulated longing and love were merged in the desire and bloomed without reservation.

It only bloomed for him alone.

The stars gradually dimmed as the sky gradually turned yellow and gray. Although the ground was still pitch-black, the silent vibe quietly disappeared, replaced by the rhythm of life before dawn.

A new day was about to begin.

chapters.title: Chapter 885: Gather! Silver Box Target
chapters.body:
Chapter 885: Gather! Silver Box Target

Chen Rui, dressed in a cloak, unhurriedly walked out of the city gate toward the Black Screen Mountain which was a mountain in the outer suburbs of the Dark Shadow Empire. The nearby terrain was quite complicated, so unfamiliar people would get lost in it, and they had to make a huge detour to get out.

Looking up at the sky, although it was already morning, it seemed very dim. The whole sky was gray like it was dawn.

This reminded Chen Rui of the passionate dawn with Catherine at the star observatory a week ago, which could be described as ‘indulgence’. The beauty of the Demon Realm’s top sage allowed him to unscrupulously enter her body in various shy poses.

Just like many women of the Asmodeus Royal Family, in the heart of Her Majesty Empress, love between men and women was the most natural thing while desire was the blending and sublimation of feelings. Moreover, the intimacy between husband and wife or lover was originally a private enjoyment behind closed doors. The others couldn’t say anything about it. , so there was no conflict or resistance. Although some ‘requests’ still made her shy, she finally let go of her restraint, dedicated everything to him and catered to his desires wholeheartedly to please him.

This was the Asmodeus Royal Family called ‘lust’. Every woman in the Lust Royal Family was undoubtedly a stunner in bed, let alone the Demon Realm’s top beauty. Of course, this kind of dedication would only be given to the man she loved the most. In front of others, she was still the revered, wise and cold empress.

The 2 were busy from dawn to morning. Only until evening, Chen Rui woke up from his slumber. He did not continue to stay in the palace and bade Catherine farewell.

“Be sure to protect yourself for me, for Duoduo, and for them. I’m waiting for your return.”

Although there was only a short night of happiness, Catherine didn’t hold him back. She didn’t ask why; she just kissed him and said these 2 sentences.

It turned out that when Chen Rui sensed Sariel’s call in his mind, the empress with incredible insight had already guessed something from the abnormality he revealed.

That’s right, I have her, them, and Duoduo. No matter what is in the road ahead, I will not hesitate and will definitely come back.

In the following week, Chen Rui only brought back news to the girls of the Dark Moon through the Dark Demon, lest they worry. He didn’t go back personally, but he was training in the Super System to digest the benefit from Catherine’s ‘star conferring’ and further comprehend the mystery of the Red Pole Star Emperor as well as law. Now there were still Star Servant and Star Apprentice in the star conferring, but the equality link had been used up. In other words, before Chen Rui advanced to the next level, he could only perform star conferring for the remaining slots by signing a master-subordinate or master-servant link.

The clouds continued to rumble with thunder; a heavy rain was imminent.

Before he knew it, the Black Screen Mountain had appeared in front of his eyes. The mountain was actually not very big, but the black-leaf forest connected with the mountain looked a little creepy. The Dark Shadow Empire was very prosperous. Even in the outer suburbs, there were many people who came here. However, the weather was so gloomy today, and the rainstorm was coming, so people were rushing back.

Chen Rui walked into the forest step by step according to the position shown in the Evil Pupil.

The time limit given by Sariel was 10 days, but instead of arriving on the last day, Chen Rui chose to go earlier. Chen Rui was no longer a rookie at the beginning who didn’t understand anything. His real goal was not only the silver box, but also Tiffany. This operation was likely to be extremely dangerous. Sariel did not summon him alone. The so-called ‘companion’ might stab him in the back at any time. It was beneficial to observe in advance.

The rain started to fall in the woods. When the raindrops fell on Chen Rui’s cloak, it slipped away as if it touched something slippery.

A figure appeared on the hillside in the distance. It was a burly man with a bald head wearing a dark red cape. Chen Rui was slightly surprised that the direction the bald man was going seemed to be the same as his.

Chen Rui’s thought moved, and he kept a distance and followed behind. The man sensed something and looked back at him. The blue right eye seemed to turn black in an instant. At this moment, the nearby rain was rushing toward Chen Rui.

The incoming rain condensed into a huge transparent fist with an overwhelming power. Chen Rui, who seemed to be unable to dodge, was hit directly.

There was no explosion or shattering as imagined as the fist stopped about 4 meters in front of Chen Rui. It had actually changed from liquid to solid, and was frozen in a strange way. The next moment, the huge fist quickly turned into particles and dissipated.

The bald-headed man’s eyes squinted as he seemed to feel a tingling pain. Chen Rui’s expression was indifferent, but he just looked at the bald-headed man lightly.

If there was a third person present, they would feel strange spirit fluctuations at most, and they couldn’t see fist, freeze, or any abnormal rain, because at that moment, it was actually a spirit confrontation.

Chen Rui activated the power of [Winter Territory]. After further comprehension of the destruction law, the power of [Winter Territory] had doubled, and the skills had become more sophisticated. It had become 1 of the most efficient means of fighting the enemy.

In this short confrontation, Chen Rui had the obvious upper hand. Due to the distance, the [Analytical Eyes] was unable to determine the specific strength of this person, but Chen Rui could feel that the strength of the bald man was at least Kingdom level. More importantly, he faintly sensed the unique power of the Evil Pupil in the spirit power of the opponent.

Although the opponent was actively provocative, Chen Rui didn’t want to waste his strength in this useless battle, so he didn’t pursue the victory. His eyes flashed, deliberately revealing a trace of the Evil Pupil’s breath, smiled lightly, and walked over slowly, “Sir, I think you have misunderstood something. Our destination should be the same.”

With seemingly casual steps, Chen Rui had walked in front of the bald man in the blink of an eye. The bald man’s eyes flashed, but he didn’t make a move in the end. He realized it when he sensed the Evil Pupil’s breath on Chen Rui, “ Oh , sorry.”

The [Analytical Eyes] immediately showed the profile of the bald man.

Race: Leviathan Royal Family

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A (SS)

Physique: A (SS-), Strength: A (SS), Spirit: A (SS), Speed: A (SS-).

Attribute: Water attribute, devour physique.

Danger level: Normal.

This bald head guy is actually a Kingdom level powerhouse of the Leviathan Royal Family, but the Leviathan Royal Family doesn’t mean anything. The royal family is divided into the royal family and ordinary royal family. Among the ordinary royal family of the Fallen Angel Empire, the royal family only accounts for 1%. The bald head guy should be a reclusive super powerhouse. It has nothing to do with the Broc family or the Bloodfall organization. Perhaps he had gone reclusive when the Illusive Demon Empire still existed.

What is certain is that no one who has trained to the super powerhouse level is a simple-minded person. The bald guy may have had some kind of guess beforehand, but he still attacked without hesitation. Now, this ‘realization’ expression is probably pretending. Even the apology is mainly because my strength is evident. Otherwise, even if he didn’t continue to fight, it would not be like this.

After Chen Rui thought about this, he just smiled and nodded, “Richard.”

The bald man also introduced himself, “Quero.”

This kind of name was just a pseudonym. The 2 of them walked forward together tacitly.

When they were close to the luminous spots indicated by the destination, there was indeed a stone wall in front, and there was no entrance. Chen Rui could sense that it was not a magic circle or an illusion but a real stone wall.

Seeing that Chen Rui didn’t respond, Quero took a step forward. The pupil of his right eye turned silver, and the stone wall suddenly had water ripples. The ripples wrapped Quero in it and disappeared.

Chen Rui clearly sensed that the silver right eye was releasing the power of the Evil Pupil. It seemed that the Evil Pupil was equivalent to a ‘passport’. He immediately imitated Quero, and the power of the Evil Pupil appeared in both eyes.

No doubt, the stone wall also underwent the same change, and the ripples quickly wrapped Chen Rui and disappeared.

After a teleportation-like feeling, Chen Rui appeared in a new location which was a huge building that seemed to be an abandoned temple. Something could be seen from the remaining traces. For instance, the faintly visible totem with a huge eye on the wall should be related to Sariel.

Chen Rui suddenly felt like he had seen this kind of totem somewhere. Right, Trevante!

Trevante was a ruined site of the Belphegor Royal Family. He was tricked to go there by Isabella, who was still an enemy at that time, and rescued Roman, who was almost killed by the evil eye tyrant underground.

The Breeze Shadow Empire of the Belphegor Royal Family is long gone. I wonder if there is any relationship between Sariel and the Belphegor Royal Family or the evil eye tyrant?

However, it is meaningless to think about this at the moment. Chen Rui focused his attention on several people at the site.

In addition to Quero, 5 other people had arrived – 4 men and 1 woman.

The [Analytical Eyes] showed that the woman was the strongest. She has reached the intermediate stage of the Demi-God, and her strength is even above Lalaria. This woman who looks cold and beautiful, has a moving figure and is unique from ordinary demons. She is actually a mutated medusa!

Generally speaking, the maximum strength limit of ordinary medusas is the Demon Emperor. There are very few mutated bloodlines who can become Demon Overlords, and those who can enter the super-level can only be described as ‘legendary’.

Chen Rui’s mind fluctuations aroused the awareness of the medusa powerhouse. When the woman gave Chen Rui a cold look, he only felt a dead breath enveloped him. He instantly had a kind of ‘don’t want to live’ death will. He secretly gave her a thumbs up as he looked away.

Seeing that Chen Rui easily got rid of her gaze, the medusa powerhouse showed a slight surprise, and she did not continue to attack. She just sneered and ignored it.

Among the other 4 men, 1 was on the peak stage of the Kingdom level, 1 on the early stage of the Kingdom level, and 2 on the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, which was just 1 step away from Kingdomized.

Everyone knew in their mind that all those who came here were the powerhouses controlled by Sariel’s ‘Evil Moon Sigil’, the ‘teammates’ of this operation, so there was no conflict.

Chen Rui didn’t rush to strike up a conversation. He nodded to Quero and sat down in a corner.

After that, some people came one after another. Including Chen Rui and others, there were 13 in total.

Through these 2 days of contact, Chen Rui already knew that the medusa was called Keressa, and her current strength was the most powerful of all. Apart from Chen Rui, there were 4 others who had reached kingdomized, namely Pato at the peak stage of the Kingdom level, Quero at the intermediate stage of the Kingdom level, Sara and Marton at the early stage of the Kingdom level.

The rest were in the Demon Overlord level, and 1 of them was Chen Rui’s ‘acquaintance’. The magician Thursfield, who was defeated by Zola at the Demon Realm’s martial battle competition, then blindly professed his love, but he was eventually raped.

However, Thursfield couldn’t recognize Chen Rui’s current face, and he didn’t know that the ordinary face with only Demon Overlord’s apparent strength was Zola’s ‘lover’, the focal character that shocked the Demon Realm.

These people were not ordinary powerhouses, and their talents or abilities should be suitable for going to that mysterious place. It seemed that Sariel had been planning ahead a long time ago.

At the last moment of the 10-day period, the center of the temple suddenly shone brightly, and a large amount of mist evaporated around it. This mist penetrated everyone’s defenses without exception. After lingering for a while, it gradually dissipated.

The strange thing was that the mist had no poison or other negative effect. Everyone felt that the body and soul had been washed in a certain way, and their physique had also been bestowed some kind of special power. They were high-spirited all of a sudden.

The dazzling light condensed into a huge eye, exuding shocking pressure. It was Sariel whom Chen Rui had seen on the 4th floor of the Bloody Empire’s Book Collection Hall, but it was obviously just a projection.

Sariel’s voice sounded, “Blessed ones, I’m glad you came as promised! The healing power just now can buff the power of the Evil Pupil, accelerate the healing of the hidden wounds of your body or your soul to make you reach the optimal stage. I also bestowed 3 months of ‘[Regeneration]’.”

“Compared with the rewards for keeping promises, those who fail to come here, regardless of the reason, will be regarded as betrayers and will be annihilated!”

Everyone bowed in unison, knowing clearly in their mind: Sariel seems to have a clear distinction of rewards and punishments. Even the ‘reward’ of the mist that ignored everyone’s defense just now was actually the intention of deterrence, showing that ‘your life and death are under my control’.

“You have only 1 goal this time. That is to do whatever it takes to get a silver box.”

The images of the silver box and Tiffany appeared in everyone’s mind at the same time, and many related ‘data’ were transmitted to the mind through the Evil Pupil. It seemed that the Evil Pupil was equivalent to Sariel’s medium.

“Whoever gets the silver box or everyone who comes out with the silver box, will receive abundant rewards and complete freedom!”

“Now, I will teleport you to your destination. Remember, failure is equal to death.”

With that said, Sariel’s pupils shone brightly, and a light door appeared in the center of the temple.

TL: Seems like they will have to fight each other for the silver box too…

chapters.title: Chapter 886: The Yuan Crystal
chapters.body:
Chapter 886: The Yuan Crystal

Looking at the light door, everyone did not speak. They just silently walked in.

“When necessary, I allow you to summon my avatar.” Sariel’s voice sounded in Chen Rui’s soul, and his heart shivered slightly.

It seemed that Sariel saw through his disguise at a glance, which should be related to some kind of ‘recognition’ function of the Evil Pupil, so it was likely to be difficult to hide his current strength from Sariel, but Sariel did not ask superfluous things. For a Pseudo-God powerhouse, especially a top-notch Pseudo-God powerhouse, let alone a Demon Overlord or a Kingdom level, even a Demi-God was just an ant. All Sariel cared about was the silver box.

Chen Rui didn’t speak nor look at Sariel. He just nodded slightly without stopping as if he was reminding himself. He followed Quero in front of him into the light door.

Behind the light door was a strange place with light flames floating around. There were countless mysterious inscriptions in the light flame that was changing with a strange rhythm. The arrangement and rhythm were slowly changing at a speed visible to the naked eye. It seemed to contain endless mystery.

There were 2 light doors here, which seemed to be some kind of entrance.

Chen Rui felt familiar with this scene. I should have been here before!

The changing flames and inscriptions around him were ingenious and complicated magic circles in the eyes of him who was almost a magic circle grand master. This discovery reminded him suddenly. It turns out that this place is actually… the ancient magic tower of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association!

The ancient magic tower’s 4th floor!

The ancient magic tower of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association was originally called the 2 great relics together with the Book Collection Hall of the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association. Someone called the ‘Emerald Pillar’ built by the Mechanic Association of the Fallen Angel Empire and the ancient magic tower as well as the Book Collection Hall as the 3 spectacular buildings of the Demon Realm.

If it was a few years ago, there must be countless people who would overlook the Emerald Pillar because the construction of the Emerald Pillar was only a few years of work, so it couldn’t be compared with ancient relics such as the ancient magic tower and Book Collection Hall. However, magic games have become popular throughout the Demon Realm now. The magic games integrated entertainment, training, war, and battle, which had changed the entire Demon Realm. As the core pillar of the magic game, the Emerald Pillar was already qualified enough to be comparable to those 2 ancient relics.

In fact, the Emerald Pillar was the core faith building that integrated the A-level faith receiver. It could automatically transmit faith power to the City of Stars with the devotee’s heart regardless of space and distance. The beneficiary was naturally Chen Rui who possessed the City of Stars’ spiritual imprint.

To Chen Rui’s surprise, the ‘mysterious place’ that hid the silver box was actually the ancient magic tower that was regarded as an imperial treasure by the Dark Shadow Empire!

Right, it must be sealed on the 5th floor!

The 5th floor was the most mysterious place of the ancient magic tower. No one had ever entered the door of the 5th floor. Chen Rui tried it himself when he participated in the mechanical contest, but he was unable to enter the light door.

There were several unconscious figures on the ground, who were probably the mechanical master who was comprehending the magic circles on the 4th floor. They fainted due to the impact of the light door. I believe that with Sariel’s ability, the entire scene of the 4th floor will be concealed, making the Mechanic Association unable to detect it.

After the last person walked out of Sariel’s light door, Sariel’s light door actually moved and flew to the light door leading to the 5th floor. When the 2 light doors gradually overlapped, a strange twist and fusion occurred. In the end, it burned and became a door of flames.

The power of Pseudo-God? Chen Rui was secretly surprised. I didn’t expect the door on the 5th floor to actually open like this!

Perhaps this door is originally related to Sariel?

Behind this door of flames, there was a trace of mysterious breath. Obviously, this was their destination.

Sariel’s voice came from the flame door, “Come in!”

Although this voice still contained a strong pressure, it sounded strenuous. It seemed that it was not easy for even Sariel to open this door.

The ‘Evil Moon Sigil’ was like a remote control bomb that could explode at any time. Sariel was the owner of the ‘Evil Moon Sigil’ which was equal to the owner of the remote control. Even if his original body was not here, even a Demi-Godpowerhouse like Keressa dared not disobey.

Everyone looked at each other quickly and entered the door of flames hurriedly.

After everyone entered, the flame on the light door gradually disappeared and returned to its original state as if nothing had happened.

As soon as Chen Rui entered the light door, there was a strong warning sign. In an instant, he was wrapped in an extremely dangerous and terrifying breath, which revealed indescribable destruction, berserk, death… The breath quickly invaded his body, rampantly destroying everything along the way. His body began to disintegrate and annihilate. Even his soul began to tremble.

With Chen Rui’s physique and strength, he was actually unable to resist this terrifying breath. He kept feeling the danger of being annihilated.

Chen Rui activated the destruction law without hesitation to protect his body and soul. At the same time, he activated the power of [Star Devouring] and [Star Conversion] to quickly devour and resolve the invading force. After the destruction law was activated, the surface of his skin seemed to be covered with an intangible protective film, which continuously filtered and assimilated the dangerous breath. The remaining power was quickly decomposed and absorbed by the [Star Devouring] and [Star Conversion] in his body, no longer posing a threat. The previously damaged parts were also quickly restored by the passive skills of the Super System and the [Regeneration] power given by Sariel.

After activating the protective power, Chen Rui could see the situation in front of him. This was a huge and boundless world with no sky or ground, just a space that was almost chaotic. There were countless meteorite-like objects floating around in random order. Some of these meteorites were very huge, equivalent to an island; some emitted a fiery light; some were extremely cold. The location where Chen Rui and others were located was a giant meteorite.

The meteorites often collided with each other and exploded. Dangerous lights could be seen everywhere. There was also a storm-like scene in the distance. The entire space was full of unknown crises. Chen Rui instinctively felt that a little carelessness in this world would result in a disintegrated body even for a super powerhouse. Take the immediate environment as an example, as long as the protective power was lost, even standing still was a dead end.

In the ‘data’ given by Sariel, this was just the outermost space of Mysterious Land, called the Lost Land.

The people who came in with Chen Rui encountered the raid of the Lost Land’s strange force without exception. Facing the threat of death, they all used their powers to resist the strange force.

The most conspicuous was Keressa, whose black hair suddenly lengthened, and snake-like phantasms appeared at the end, devouring the strange force. The snake phantasms then transformed into a snake-patterned cloak behind Keressa. Despite all the squirming and twisting of the cloak under the force, Keressa seemed at ease.

Pato of the peak stage of the Kingdom level was covered with layers of special crystals like a piece of armor. The armor would show cracks from time to time, but it quickly healed automatically.

The bald Quero whom Chen Rui first knew activated the devour power activated by the Eye of Incubus. The nearby powers were constantly devoured. This talent was somewhat similar to Chen Rui’s [Star Devouring].

Compared with the super powerhouses, the Demon Overlord-level powerhouses were more haggard. 2 of them were almost turned into ashes, but relying on the [Regeneration] power given by Sariel, they eventually activated some skills and survived.

Chen Rui nodded secretly. No wonder Sariel would be so ‘kind’ to bestow [Regeneration] ability given to everyone for a month at the expense of his strength. It had already been calculated. Over the years, Sariel has deliberately chosen the host of the ‘Evil Moon Sigil’ in order to enter this mysterious place and get the silver box. The same must be true of Satan. There must be immeasurable dangers on the road ahead. I must be extra vigilant.

Keressa flicked the bizarre snake-patterned cloak, and a water wave-like power spread layer by layer to cover the crowd.

There was no doubt that the strength of the Demi-God level was extraordinary as everyone suddenly felt less pressure. The medusa’s cold voice sounded, “Everyone should already know the difficulty of this mission. The danger in this world is beyond our imagination. Putting aside Sir Sariel’s reward, in order to go back alive, we must work together.”

As soon as these words came out, everyone nodded.

“Since it is a team, then there must be a leader. Those who are willing to come with me, stand here. Sir Sariel said that everyone who comes out with the silver box will receive generous rewards and total freedom! If you want to act alone, I will not force you. We can part ways here… But I want to get things straight here, we are either teammates or enemies. Those who don’t want to join, I will never be merciful next time we meet.” Keressa’s voice was bold, solemn, and full of decisiveness.

Everyone sensed the powerful strength of Keressa. After thinking for a while, they all stood over. Keressa nodded with satisfaction, “Since you have joined the team, you must obey my arrangements. If you run away from the battle, I will not let you go easily. Of course, you can put forward your opinions, and we will discuss them together.”

Hence, a temporary team was formed. Although Keressa vowed to bring everyone together to complete the mission and return safely, everyone knew that almost all the people who joined the team were scheming, including Keressa herself, who also had the attitude of using others.

Once there was an exclusive benefit or an unavoidable risk, the so-called ‘team’ would burst like a bubble.

Until then, everyone would remain ‘united’.

The strange force that filled in the space was very difficult to deal with. In addition to the need to activate strength protection, everyone’s actions almost cost twice the usual strength. Especially flying became extremely difficult.

The world was constantly changing and moving. For example, the dangerous strength at this moment was only a seed state, so they could stay there safely. The next moment it would grow and explode, which made it become the most dangerous place, so they could not stay or rest too long in the same place. Otherwise, it might become a burial place, so they must be constantly on the go.

Everyone flew forward together under the command of Keressa. Keressa’s sensing ability was very strong. With her ‘radar’, they avoided a lot of danger.

“Madam Keressa, what is that?” A Demon Overlord pointed at the meteorite floating ahead. There was a solidified glittering thing above it. It was a crystal emitting a magnificent light.

Keressa glanced at it and replied, “The yuan crystal. Although that crystal has a certain value, it has no effect on ordinary powerhouses, plus mining it is too troublesome, so don’t waste your strength.”

Hearing what Keressa said, the Demon Overlord, who initially had the intention to collect some yuan crystals, suddenly became silent.

This is the yuan crystal? Chen Rui’s eyes lit up.

The yuan crystal was the crystal that constituted the basic ‘life yuan’ of the ancient alchemy civilization. It could greatly enhance the power of Crystal Phoenix, and it was even possible to evolve to have the core crystals from level 4 to level 5 civilizations. Not only that, the yuan crystal was also an irreplaceable material for making the game control’s core crystals. As long as the yuan crystal was found, it would not be a dream to realize the magic game network in the human world.

Auglas once said that the yuan crystal could only be found in a mysterious place that even Pseudo-God dared not go to. No doubt, in this Lost Land, Chen Rui found this kind of rare material that could not be found everywhere.

That piece of meteorite was about the size of 2 basketball courts, and the yuan crystal covered an area of at least 4 meters.

“Madam Keressa” Chen Rui spoke up, “I need the yuan crystal to make an important thing, so I want to collect some.”

“I said it before, you have to obey my arrangements in the team.” Keressa glanced at him with murderous intent in her eyes, “You didn’t hear me just now? Or you want to leave the team?”

Chen Rui’s expression remained unchanged, “The ‘important thing’ I said is to use the yuan crystal to create an active magic circle to reduce the erosion and exhaustion of the surrounding forces to everyone. I wonder if Madam Keressa accepts this explanation?”

As soon as these words came out, everyone expressed their excitement. The strange powers here are indeed quite troublesome, and it is just the beginning. If the time goes on and the power protection or flight is continuously used in this way, then the loss is quite shocking. If this ‘Richard’ can really create that magic circle, it can solve a big problem.

“Can you really do it?” Keressa’s eyes flashed a terrifying light as if to see through his soul, “You should know the consequences of deceiving me.”

“I understand.” Chen Rui looked at her without fear.

Keressa stared at him for a moment, and she finally nodded, “Everyone temporarily stopped moving forward and try your best to mine the yuan crystal.”

The magic circle mentioned by Chen Rui was not a simple excuse. He was observing the surrounding environment from the very beginning and was thinking about how to effectively solve the problem of interference from the strange forces. Of course, the yuan crystal was just an excuse. Even if there was no yuan crystal, it could be made out of the other material, which would even produce a better effect.

As long as he could show the value of the magic circle was worth it, then he could justifiably use the strength of the team to continuously collect all the yuan crystals that he needed effortlessly.

chapters.title: Chapter 887: The Blazing White Way
chapters.body:
Chapter 887: The Blazing White Way

As Keressa said, the yuan crystals were indeed a bit troublesome to mine. The part attached to the meteorite was extremely strong. Once it was separated from the meteorite, the color and energy of the yuan crystal would gradually weaken, and finally become a useless crystal.

Strangely, the yuan crystal gradually regained its original brilliance soon after it was in the hands of Keressa.

Chen Rui could sense that Keressa had infused a little kingdom’s vitality into it, and he immediately understood: The dimness of the yuan crystal should be a kind of ‘dormant’ state, and it needs to rely on the kingdom’s vitality to survive. No wonder the ancient alchemy civilization regarded the yuan crystal as the life yuan.

After getting the yuan crystal, Chen Rui took out a tool platform and activated the magic circle of the tool platform with the reason of silence. Everyone could only see the vague shadows. They couldn’t see the real movements inside.

Chen Rui took this opportunity to enter the refinery of the Super System, and activated the time law. He tried to inject the vitality of the [Galaxy Kingdom] into the yuan crystal one by one. No doubt, the yuan crystal which gained vitality quickly regained its radiance. He placed them in the storage warehouse.

The next step was the real crafting process. After the blurring magic circle was withdrawn, one after another strange items appeared in front of everyone.

A very simple bracelet inlaid with several yuan crystals looked unremarkable. The only thing that was special was that the power emitted by this yuan crystal was extremely refined, which was far better than the ordinary yuan crystal. Perhaps it was the accessory buff effect.

The question was whether such a simple accessory could resist that terrifying force?

Everyone’s eyes showed expressions of disbelief. Keressa’s eyes were filled with a strong murderous aura. The spirit power firmly locked Chen Rui and planned to kill him at any time. As a leader, if she was tricked, where would her prestige be?

Chen Rui looked calm as he took out a bracelet and put it on his hand. The bracelet suddenly emitted a bright circle of light, and the light seemed to spread to his body.

Keressa frowned and put on a bracelet. After the light circle formed, no doubt she felt that the original double strength loss was reduced a lot. Not only that, there was also a strong echo between the light circles, forming a loop that constantly canceled the eroding strange forces. The more people there were, the stronger the loop would be. It was like a giant net which would resist the eroding power. Although there were some leaks, it felt much better than before.

“The yuan crystal inlaid on the bracelet is the high-concentration yuan crystal that I compressed with a special instrument. All the yuan crystals have been exhausted just now. You should have seen the effect of this magic circle, the only disadvantage is that the yuan crystals are consumables. These can only last for about 2 hours. Once exhausted, new crystals must be added. So, if we encounter the yuan crystal minerals along the way, I hope to continue collecting; the more the better.”

The last sentence was obviously addressed to Keressa. Although Keressa’s suspicions were not completely dissipated, the effect of the mobile magic circle was in front of her eyes. She couldn’t help but believe it. I didn’t expect ‘Richard’ to be more useful than I imagined. He is actually proficient in magic circles and mechanic skills. It really alleviates the big problem of the strange power invasion and strength loss.

In this environment, being useful meant living longer. The medusa put away the killing intent and looked at Chen Rui with a little more importance in her gaze as she nodded. Anyway, these yuan crystals were just like a waste without the vitality of the kingdom that she infused, so she was not worried that this mere Kingdom level guy would play any tricks.

Unfortunately, Keressa didn’t know that this mere ‘Kingdom’ level guy had a kingdom vitality and faith power that were stronger than her countless times.

Relying on the strength of the ‘team’, Chen Rui had more and more yuan crystals on hand. Whether it was used to upgrade the life crystals of the ancient refinery civilization or to manufacture the core crystals for game control, it was already more than enough. Considering the exhaustion of the mobile magic circle, Chen Rui did not reject Keressa’s ‘kindness’ and continued to hoard the yuan crystals.

This Lost Land was boundless with no sun or moon, and other lives; it was dead silence. Judging from the timing item, everyone should have been flying for 3 full days, but they hadn’t found the exit the ‘Blazing White Way’ as per Sariel’s ‘data’.

Although it had only been 3 days, the environment here was unpredictable, and potential dangers might erupt at any time. Even if they had Chen Rui’s magic accessory, they must maintain the highest level of vigilance while maintaining the protective power. The previous Demon Overlord Chloe who asked Keressa about the yuan crystal was too tired and didn’t notice the abnormality under his feet. As a result, he exploded together with the meteorite and turned into ashes. Even if he had the ability of [Regeneration], it would not help. Now there were only 12 people left in the team.

A gray cloud appeared in front, and it seemed to be slowly getting bigger. Chen Rui only glanced at it a few times, and sensed that his vision seemed to be distorted by a special power.

Keressa’s eyesight was the best, and her facial expression suddenly changed, “It’s a space storm! Get out of the way!”

Everyone was shocked. The cloud that ‘slowly’ grew bigger was actually a huge storm moving at a high speed! This world was not like the outside world. Even a super powerhouse was in danger of dying at any time in the face of a space storm similar to the power of nature. The best way was to retreat and avoid it.

The group hurriedly flew horizontally with all their strength in an attempt to avoid the storm. However, the speed of the huge storm was extremely alarming. Before everyone could fly to the edge, the storm was unavoidably approaching.

Different from the imagined devour power, this storm actually erupted outward. Countless meteorites or substances were madly blasted outward like fountains. Many of them still carried flame-like high temperatures, dragging long smoke like a meteor.

The protective net made by the magic accessories was instantly torn apart by the massive power of the storm, and the intangible force threw everyone out.

The Demon Overlord Thursfield, who was once defeated by Zola, felt pain in his ribs as if a sharp cone drilled into his ribs. In an instant, he was struck many times, and even the armor that protected the soft spots was almost pierced through.

It turned out that the substances that erupted in the storm were very terrifying in terms of speed and strength like a cannon that continuously launched an attack. Even a small piece of dust could cause terrifying damage under this terrifying eruption.

Thursfield majored in magic, but his body’s toughness had reached the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. He even activated protective magic, but he was still barely able to resist this terrifying eruption.

The rest of the crowd had also been impacted at different levels. In comparison, several super powerhouses were much better. Chen Rui’s body was extremely strong and tough, plus the passive skills of the Super System, even if he didn’t wear that Mystic Jade Armor, the normal projectile couldn’t pierce through his skin defense either.

Chen Rui stabilized his body while dodging the huge meteorite. The first impression of this ‘erupting’ storm was a ‘white hole’.

A white hole was an imaginary hole in outer space from which energy, stars and other astronomical objects emerged or burst. It was the exact opposite of the all-devouring black holes. There was no doubt that this storm should be a force field similar to the principle of white holes.

Chen Rui suddenly remembered the Blazing White Way described in Sariel’s information. With a move in his mind, he used the power of the Evil Pupil to look into the storm. No doubt, he faintly saw faint white luminous spots, which should be the source of the projectiles. Just as he was about to speak, Keressa’s voice sounded in his head, “The Blazing White Way!”

The Blazing White Way to exit the Lost Land! Everyone’s spirits were lifted, and they heard Keressa’s voice in their mind, “The Blazing White Way is in the center of the storm. Immediately rush into the storm with all your strength!”

Everyone reacted in unison as they channeled out strength to rush toward the storm.

The repelling strength of the storm was very strong, and the weaker people were blown away before they could get close. However, they still charged forward one after another without concealing their strength because if they could not exit, even if they did not encounter any danger, sooner or later they would run out of strength and be annihilated by the strange forces of the Lost Land.

Chen Rui was the second to charge into the storm after Keressa. This storm was much bigger than it looked from the outside with all kinds of substances shooting out of it. It was almost an independent small space. The luminous spots in front had become clear, and the projectiles turned into rapid light beams. The closer he was to the core, the more terrifying the speed and strength of the projectiles.

In the previous battles, Chen Rui had used the [Star Devouring] similar to the black hole many times. Especially Shura who originated from destruction could also merge himself with the black hole to exert more mighty power. The ‘white hole’ in front of him gave Chen Rui the opposite feeling. It was not ‘destruction’, but ‘creation’.

At that time, when Chen Rui completely defeated Shura, he used the comprehension of creation. After the destruction reaches the extreme, it is the beginning of a new life. This feeling is very subtle, like what I saw that night when I was holding my beloved woman… Dawn.

The omen of danger made Chen Rui recover his senses from the subtle mood immediately. There was a flash of light in front of him. He suddenly felt a heat on his face, and his face was bleeding, which meant that his body strength could no longer resist the launched attack.

Immediately afterward, more dangerous warning omens surged in his mind. Chen Rui threw his fist without hesitation, and a 5-meter-high meteorite shattered in front of him. The fragments flew backward like lightning, and many fragments still hit Chen Rui’s body, causing more injuries on him. This was even despite his reaction was quick. Otherwise, at such a high speed, once he was hit, he would be seriously injured.

Chen Rui didn’t dare to neglect. A defensive shield appeared around his body. His hand made a blade shape, showing a faint light as he drew arcs one by one and continuously slashed out. The use of force was very clever. It was not a straight line attack, but the impact force was diverted diagonally to the rear. The materials that were approaching were either smashed or knocked away.

At this point, the crowd was quite close to the core. The repulsive force was getting greater and greater, and the white luminous spot in front had quickly magnified. No doubt, it was a circular light door similar to an exit – Blazing White Way.

A Demon Overlord named Blanco couldn’t dodge in time, and was hit hard by a fast-moving meteor. His entire body was torn apart. Blanco wasn’t dead yet, so he channeled all his power and used the [Regeneration] power given by Sariel to the extreme. However, the impact was too strong. As soon as his body started to heal, it disintegrated at a faster speed. In the end, he turned into countless broken limbs that blasted away…

A Demon Overlord not far behind was very unfortunate as his head was hit by a broken limb flying at a terrifying speed. Both eyes were in severe pain, so he couldn’t see for a while. With a slight neglect, his chest was pierced through by a sharp object. As soon as the cry of help was shouted halfway, the countless rubble that rushed over passed through his body. He lost his strength and was quickly knocked back. His body was even grinned to pieces before even flying out of the storm.

At this time, there were only 10 people left in the team, and most of them were severely injured, especially the loss of strength was huge. Because the repulsive force was too large, everyone could barely hold on while avoiding the launched attack. They, including Keressa, could no longer fly forward.

“We must create a gap for the repulsive power, otherwise we cannot enter the light door!” Keressa’s figure appeared in the back. Her whole body was charging with a powerful strength, and her voice sounded in everyone’s mind, “I need some time to activate my kingdom! You all launch your most powerful move together now!”

Now, there was not much time to think about it. Everyone hesitated for a while, and all kinds of lights attacked forward. However, the core repulsion of the Blazing White Way was extremely powerful. Even the lights generated by the attacks were twisted when they were close to the light door.

But the reaction force generated at this moment had given Keressa enough activation time. The ‘cloak’ on her body with countless holes spread out and turned into infinitely elongated hair, merging with the space. The entire surrounding light suddenly dimmed.

The 2 Demon Overlords, who suffered the most injuries, suddenly trembled, and their bodies quickly dried up as if all their flesh and blood were quickly drained. A few people with good eyesight could see that the snake-like hairs were withdrawing from their bodies.

Without a doubt, the vitality of the 2 Demon Overlords was drained by Keressa.

At the same time, the breath of life on Keressa suddenly became richer, and her eyes turned into snake-like vertical pupils. They emitted a strange light that spread forward. Wherever the light passed, the shining light shone from the ‘white hole’ quickly dimmed. In the blink of an eye, except for Keressa and the rest, everything turned dark gray and petrified!

This terrifying [Petrify] was not only aimed at ordinary life or ordinary substance, but even the entire space seemed to be solidified.

Taking advantage of this momentary stagnation, everyone rushed toward the Blazing White Way without hesitation and soon disappeared into the white light door.

Almost at the next moment, the solidified dark gray exploded, and countless rushing white lights filled the entire space. The 2 solidified corpses that were stagnant in the space were disintegrated under the powerful impact of the light.

chapters.title: Chapter 888: Ghastly Floating Land
chapters.body:
Chapter 888: Ghastly Floating Land

After the dizzy shuttle, several figures appeared in a space. They were thrown out by an intangible power. Since everyone had extraordinary strength, they quickly stabilized themselves.

There was a new environment in front of them. Everyone was on a cliff. To be precise, it should be the edge of an island. There were also several similar islands in the distance, which were actually suspended in the air with white mist floating in between.

It was also a vast space with almost no gravity. On the contrary, the buoyancy in the air was still very large, but the surrounding light appeared dim, and the sky was gloomy. There was a feeling that the ‘sun’ was completely covered by dark clouds.

Clearly, everyone had managed to get out of the Lost Land via the Blazing White Way.

There were only 8 of the previous 13 people, but no one mentioned the 2 Demon Overlords whose vitality was drained by Keressa in the end. Here and now, ‘survival’ was the biggest keyword. Not to mention, this temporary team was initially formed with interests in mind.

Up to now, everyone knew that the reason why Keressa formed this team was not only to gather strength to increase the possibility of completing the mission, but also to keep teammates as ‘food’ in captivity.
