Of course, the people who joined the team were also shrewd people. For example, in the last scene at the Lost Land, if they didn’t join, they would be killed by Keressa. Take the Blazing White Way as an example. Without Keressa, those Demon Overlords would hardly be able to pass through; even survival would become a major problem. Relying on a powerhouse was the best way out. The Kingdom level powerhouses were more of a wait-and-see state of judging the situation while moving forward with the help of Demon Overlord and Keressa. As long as the opportunity presented itself, they would definitely leave this ‘team’ that posed the backstabbing risk at any time.

This place should be the ‘Ghastly Floating Land’ recorded in Sariel’s ‘data’. There was a most important place here which was the gate to Chaos Realm where the silver box was located. As long as they found the gate here, they could enter the final location to find the silver box to complete the task.

The location of the gate was not fixed. To enter the gate, one must find the ‘key’ or the entrance to the gate. The ‘key’ was naturally Tiffany, and Sariel had her image clearly printed in the spiritual imprint of the Evil Pupil.

Unlike the Lost Land, there were wandering spirits in Ghastly Floating Land. They were powerful souls that had lost their consciousness and would attack any living creature.

Sariel’s ‘data’ was limited to this. There was no more detailed record. Even the final destination Chaos Realm was unknown.

Ghastly Floating Land did not have the same strange power as the Lost Land that constantly eroded the body and soul, so their strength loss had recovered to its normal state. The only thing that felt special was ‘coldness’. It was not a normal temperature drop, but a ghastly cold that could even make their souls tremble.

This cold did not change with the level of strength. Everyone felt that the higher the strength, the stronger the cold erosion.

Keressa glanced at Chen Rui and seemed to want to ask him if there was anything he could do. Before Chen Rui answered, Thursfield jumped out first.

Thursfield was one of only 2 Demon Overlords on the team. When he thought of the 2 Demon Overlords who had been drained by Keressa before, he was secretly horrified, so he didn’t want to be the next victim.

“This… I should be able to solve it. Although I’m not from the Samael Royal Family, I have a special fire talent that can trigger the mutated spirit fire, which happens to be the nemesis of this chill.” Thursfield said cautiously. An eye appeared between his eyebrows. It was the Evil Pupil. The Evil Pupil flashed a faint red and his body began to glow red. Everyone felt that the area was getting warmer. The red light spread to everyone, and the chill that penetrated their souls was also dispelled a lot.

Seeing Keressa nodding slightly, Thursfield looked very respectful on the surface, but he was secretly proud: If my value is recognized by Keressa, then the chance of survival will be greatly increased. At least it can win precious time and let the ‘victim’ sequence move backward while I wait for an opportunity to make a move.

Chen Rui didn’t care about this chill as the Super System could easily dissolve that ghastly power into aura, but since someone was willing to contribute, why not just sit back and enjoy it?

“We have already arrived at the Ghastly Floating Land. When we passed the Blazing White Way just now, everyone exhausted enormous strength.” Keressa spoke up, “This space is very large, and I don’t know where the woman who became the key is, let alone whether there are other enemies, but the environment here is harsh. If we stay here for a long time, our strength will eventually run out, so we must hurry up to find the door. If we end up with nothing, even if we can leave, we can’t bear the wrath of Sir Sariel. I suggest that we send 2 people to investigate the situation nearby, and the rest of the people will recover strength here while waiting. What do you all think?”

“Madam Keressa’s approach is very good.” Thursfield was the first to agree. The others thought about it and didn’t raise any objections.

Keressa nodded, “So, who’s going to investigate?”

Thursfield responded quickly. He immediately ‘subconsciously’ glanced at the female Demon Overlord Anriel and Chen Rui. In the entire team, Thursfield and Anriel were the weakest, so they were generally the best cannon fodder candidates, but now Thursfield had shown his value. This glance was equivalent to nominating Anriel and Chen Rui.

Putting aside Anriel, that ‘Richard’ was good at magic circles. Thursfield felt that he was his biggest potential competitor. Although my strength is weaker than him, it is clear that Keressa is the one with the hardest fist. I just hold tight to Keressa’s thigh, then naturally, there is no need to worry about offending ‘Richard’.

Keressa understood Thursfield’s intentions, but she didn’t point it out. The rest of the people were happy to see that someone came forward, so they all set their eyes on Anriel and Chen Rui.

“Richard, so it’s you and Anriel. You 2 go separate ways.” Keressa said in an unquestionable tone. With a flick of her finger, 2 blue rays of light flew toward Anriel and Chen Rui, and suspended in front of them. It was 2 strange symbols.

“The strength of this space is very strong, and items such as magic maps cannot be used. The 2 imprints condense my kingdom power. In case you lose your way, it can guide you back here. 3 days. When you return, I want to see the most useful intel.” Keressa’s last sentence had a hint of threat. This symbol also must have a tracking function.

Chen Rui thought for a while. Upon grabbing the symbol, the symbol instantly turned into a curved mark and sank into his palm. Anriel also reluctantly accepted the mark.

Looking at the figures of Chen Rui and Anriel flying far apart, a triumphant expression flashed across Thursfield’s eyes.

Although Keressa’s strength was still higher than that of Lalaria, Chen Rui’s current strength was also far superior than he was during the martial battle competition. Especially after accepting the buff of star conferring, he had a deeper understanding of the Red Pole Star Emperor and law, so the power of [Red Pole Star Transformation] was also greatly increased. If he really had to fight against Keressa, there was nothing to be afraid of.

Chen Rui accepted the investigating mission because he had his own plans. He flew all the way, and after confirming that he had left everyone’s vision, he took out something from his jacket. It was a necklace with a ring on it.

Mammon Royal Family artifact: Bloody Ring.

Unlike the Wrath King Armor, Chen Rui did not perform [Deep Analysis] on the Bloody Ring. After all, this was a token to pass to Tiffany, so he couldn’t use the Bloody Ring artifact’s special attribute, but he could do one thing with the Bloody Ring, that was to find the whereabouts of the ‘key’, Tiffany.

Fortunately, unlike the other 7 artifacts, the Bloody Ring was small in size and could be easily carried without analysis. Chen Rui specially made a necklace that reinforced the ring.

After activating the Bloody Ring using the method taught by Raizen, a thin layer of reddish light emerged on the ring. When Chen Rui tried a few turns, there was a very faint flickering from the ring that was almost unnoticeable. If it weren’t for Chen Rui’s amazing sensing power, it would be impossible to detect it.

Tiffany has really come to this Ghastly Floating Land!

Chen Rui was high-spirited. While he unleashed his spirit power to sense the change of the ring, he flew forward according to the ring’s prompt. The so-called team and investigating task were not in his mind at all. As for the Demi-God imprint, although it was a little troublesome to erase it, it was not impossible.

The Bloody Ring could only indicate the general direction. After flying for a long time, the flashing intensity of the ring had only slightly changed, which showed that Tiffany was far away.

Unlike the danger that erupted everywhere in the Lost Land, this Ghastly Floating Land didn’t seem to have much danger except for the bone-chilling cold, giving a lifeless feeling.

As Chen Rui was on the way, a group of the white mist at the edge of the floating island in front of him flew toward him at a very fast speed. After taking a closer look, this ‘white mist’ was actually a ghost-like thing with green light flashing in both eyes. They had claw-shaped hands, and had no lower body. They made a creepy low howl which sounded like a cry.

These must be the wandering spirits in Sariel’s ‘data’! There are hundreds of them!

The speed of the wandering spirits was very fast. In the blink of an eye, the [Analytical Eyes] showed the race as spirit (wandering spirit). 5 of them had actually reached the Kingdom level, and the strongest had reached the peak stage of the Kingdom level while the rest were all Demon Overlord levels!

This kind of strength would be a frightening power in the Human World or the Demon Realm.

[Analysis] data showed that wandering spirits had 3 special attributes: Immortal body, erosion, and life devour.

Chen Rui didn’t have time to think about it. He slashed with [Aura Blade]. The wandering spirits of the intermediate stage of Kingdom level were split into 2. However, the split wandering spirit quickly returned to its original shape almost at the same time. Chen Rui couldn’t help shivering when he sensed a strange power invaded his spirit, but it was quickly resolved by the Super System.

I’m eroded and contaminated by the spirit after the sword qi just touched the wandering spirits. It seems that the special attribute of the wandering spirits is no doubt terrifying.

According to Sariel’s records, wandering spirits were powerful spirits that had lost their self-consciousness. Once they locked on the enemy, they would continue to attack without giving up until the enemy was destroyed.

Wandering spirits had no concept of fear, nor would they stop due to the loss of their companions. Instead, they rushed more fiercely from all directions. Chen Rui issued a [True Destructive Aura Blow] without a second thought, and all the nearby wandering spirits were disintegrated into countless pieces. The 5 Kingdom level wandering spirits were in relatively better condition, but they were also fragmented.

However, the consequence of this kind of aoe skill was that Chen Rui’s spirit had been eroded by countless ‘reflections’. Even if the Super System resolved it in time, he still felt dizzy. What’s more troublesome was that those wandering spirits, including the Demon Overlord ones, had begun to reintegrate.

The strength of kingdomized can’t kill Demon Overlord-level creatures?

This reminded Chen Rui of Dodo’s immortal body, and he couldn’t help but feel troubled.

He had actually put on the ‘Thunderous Sound’ that doubled the damage to the undead, but the wandering spirits didn’t seem to be equivalent to ordinary undead, so the effect was not obvious.

Spirit… Erosion… Chen Rui’s thoughts moved, and there was a set of full-body armor on his body. The jet-black armor revealed an ancient breath. There was a full set of helmet, boots, and wristband.

The Wrath King Armor.

The Wrath King Armor was ‘borrowed indefinitely’ from the Samael Royal Family by Catherine. This was the child’s mother’s sincerity, so Chen Rui would naturally not refuse it. As 1 of the 7 artifacts, the Wrath King Armor could only be activated by the recognized Samael Royal Family member, but facing the [Deep Analysis] of the Super System, the Wrath King Armor reluctantly knelt down to it. Now the Wrath King Armor had become Chen Rui’s 4th (3 1/2 to be precise) artifact.

The Wrath King Armor could greatly reduce physical damage and magic damage, protect the soul, immune to spirit-type erosion, and automatically recover. He could also bestow a ‘Soul Armor’ that had a strong defense to specific people for a limited time to have half of the Wrath King Armor’s attributes.

Although he only exerted a part of the ‘quasi-artifact’s’ power, the protection ability of the Wrath King Armor was already quite amazing. It was far better than the Overlord Armor or Mystic Jade Armor that was also quasi-artifacts.

As for the ‘borrowing’ time, just like the Demon Shield, although it was temporarily impossible to get rid of it, Chen Rui believed that there would be a way in the future. He would not make Catherine lose credibility. Of course, Her Majesty Empress’ kindness of ‘lending’ the Dark Shadow Cape was rejected by Chen Rui as he didn’t want to deceive the child’s mother.

As soon as the Wrath King Armor was put on his body, the annoying spirit erosion disappeared without a trace, but now Chen Rui was surrounded by the reintegrated wandering spirits. From a distance, it was like a ball of thread entwined in layers, constantly wriggling.

All of a sudden, the ball of thread wriggled and fell apart.

A sword appeared in the vision. The body of the sword was white and engraved with 2 strange marks.

The Sword of Fallen Angel.

The Sword of Fallen Angel, which was also 1 of the 7 artifacts, had the most powerful special attribute [Soul Searing], which could slay and split the enemy’s soul.

The attribute of [Soul Searing] was indeed very effective. The wandering spirits that were slashed had much lower ability to regenerate. After a few slashes in a row, the spirits dissipated into mist.

After beheading an early stage of the Kingdom level wandering spirit, Chen Rui felt that his soul power seemed to increase a little. He understood that this was another benefit of [Soul Searing], which was devouring the enemy’s flesh and blood for his own use.

Although the wandering spirits had no flesh and blood, they had powerful souls that surpassed undead creatures, so it was equivalent to a great buff. Although he could only devour a part of the soul power, it was already quite impressive.

Chen Rui was suddenly in high spirits. The Sword of Fallen Angel wielded layers of sword lights filled with sharp qi, turning the immortal wandering spirits into mist.

chapters.title: Chapter 889: Law Fragment
chapters.body:
Chapter 889: Law Fragment

Bzz bzz bzz…

The last spirit was the strongest wandering spirit at the peak stage of the Kingdom level. It turned into countless fragments and scattered. Chen Rui did not hesitate, the Sword of Fallen Angel in his hand swung out layers of water ripples, completely destroying and disintegrating the fragments.

This time, the ‘shredded corpse’ was completely cut off from the possibility of resurrection.

After successfully massacring all the wandering spirits, Chen Rui sensed that the nearby cold air seemed to be attracted by something as they gathered and condensed at a high speed in front of him.

Just when he clenched the Sword of Fallen Angel with caution, the ‘gathered’ had turned into ‘solidification’. A faintly radiant object appeared in front of him.

When Chen Rui waved his hand, the thing flew over. It was a finger-sized crystal. Although it was not large, it exuded an incredible power breath. What surprised Chen Rui was that this breath actually contained incomparably pure Kingdom level law power.

“Law fragment?” Chen Rui thought of what Earth Elemental King mentioned. After a super powerhouse was completely annihilated, the most quintessential law might remain and solidify into a law fragment.

This kind of law fragment was generally formed after the annihilation of the kingdomized or Demi-God powerhouse, and it contained the purest law power comprehended in life. The law fragment was actually the initial rudiment of the future ‘Godhood’ or ‘Pseudo-Godhood’.

The law fragment was an extremely rare treasure. It could help trainers who did not have the law to comprehend the law as soon as possible, which was equivalent to a shortcut to the Kingdom level. However, this kind of trainer who relied on the fusion of law fragments to enter the super-level would have much slower progress after entering the super-level than the trainers who comprehended the law personally unless he could find another way or obtain a real big realization. Furthermore, the difficulty of breaking through the bottleneck would be doubled.

In addition, the law fragment was also the best ‘nutrient’ for ordinary super powerhouses, which could absorb the ultimate pure law power and enrich one’s own law foundation. Although this kind of ‘quantitative change’ was not comparable to ’qualitative change’, it was also an extremely precious supplement. Especially after Chen Rui broke through to the [Red Pole Star Emperor], he had fully understood the importance of ‘quantitative change’ and foundation accumulation.

“It’s an unexpected gain! With the law fragment, Athena, Isabella and the others will be able to step into the super-level much faster, then their lifespans will be greatly extended.”

Chen Rui showed joy. Although the law fragment was precious, the first thing he thought of was not himself but Athena and the others.

Zola and Catherine had already stepped into the Kingdom level, and Shea had advanced from the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, but due to the shallow foundation and busy empire affairs, her usual training time was limited, so stepping into Kingdom was quite difficult. Isabella was just at the early stage of the Demon Overlord while Athena and Kia were even weaker. Athena was at the Demon Emperor, and Kia was only at the peak stage of the Great Demon King.

The difference in strength also meant a huge difference in lifespan. This difference could not be narrowed by external factors such as longevity potion. The lifespan of ordinary demons was 200-500 years, and the lifespan of royal families was relatively longer. After the middle level (Demon King, Great Demon King), the lifespan would be extended by about half, and after entering the upper level (Demon Emperor, Demon Overlord), it would be doubled or more. Generally speaking, a Demon Overlord powerhouse’s lifespan was at least 1,000- 2,000 years.

After stepping into the Kingdom level, the trainer could absorb the natural strength to replenish energy, and he did not have to completely rely on food to sustain life. His vitality was also greatly enhanced by the force of nature and law, and his lifespan would be extended by 10 times. After reaching Demi-God or Pseudo-God, this ratio would increase significantly.

Chen Rui was most worried about the woman he loved dying in his arms because their lifespan was exhausted. For this reason, he would rather shorten his lifespan. Now that he had a law fragment, he saw the hope that Athena and others would have a greatly extended lifespan.

The more law fragments there are, the greater the chance of breaking through to the kingdom. There are 5 people: Athena, Isabella, Shea, Kia, plus friends such as Delia, Krobelus, Medilu, and so on. 1 law fragment is not enough. With that, Chen Rui made a decision to hunt down wandering spirits and get more law fragments while looking for Tiffany!

Time flies. In the blink of an eye, 3 days had passed, and the medusa powerhouse, Keressa, who had been recuperating and recovering, slowly stood up with a cold murderous intent in her eyes.

It had been 3 days. Among the 2 people sent to explore the way, Demon Overlord Anriel had returned yesterday while the guy named ‘Richard’ had actually never returned. Judging from her own kingdom imprint, ‘Richard’ didn’t die. However, he hadn’t returned or seemed to be coming back due to the imprint response, so he should have deliberately left the team.

“ Hmph! Want to escape? How can you come and leave my team as you wish?” Both of Keressa’s pupils became snake-like pupils. As she waved her hand on her body, a silver scale appeared in her hand. The rune of the previous mark was faintly revealed on the inside. When she squeezed it, the silver scale shattered.

Somewhere in the Ghastly Floating Land, Chen Rui felt his soul tremble. The imprint in his palm glowed brightly before disappearing without a trace. There was a sneer on Chen Rui’s face. The mark is exactly as I expected. It is not only for tracking and coordination functions but also a ‘time bomb’ that can be detonated remotely at any time.

However, he was prepared long ago. Even Sariel’s Evil Pupil was assimilated, not to mention this little Demi-God mark. Shortly after accepting the imprint, he activated [Deep Analysis] and cooperated with the power of [Star Conversion] to absorb the imprint power, leaving only an ‘empty shell to confuse Keressa. Therefore, the so-called ‘explosion’ was no different than a camera flash.

Keressa didn’t know Chen Rui’s methods, and she thought she annihilated ‘Richard’. She sneered, “That Richard tried to escape the team. Now his soul has been completely annihilated! Our team does not need such selfish or cowardly character. Who else wants to leave?”

The last sentence revealed an obvious threat. Everyone looked at each other in dismay, and no one mentioned leaving.

“Madam Keressa, what do we do now?” Thursfield asked flatteringly.

Keressa glanced at Anriel approvingly, “Although ‘Richard”s attempt to escape has already been executed, we still got an important intel. This time, Anriel did a good job. Not only she explored the traces left by those people, but she also drew a detailed map. The kingdom mark on your body has been canceled, and this scale is for you. The scales contain a trace of my kingdom power, which is equivalent to a powerful magic bomb. It can be used for self-defense if necessary.”

Anriel quickly and respectfully took the scales and thanked Keressa.

“We first go to the place that Anriel found, then we follow the traces. We should be able to find the whereabouts of the ‘key’ or ‘gate’ along the way.”

Keressa’s tone was firm and decisive, but she didn’t notice the strange light that flashed in Anriel’s eyes, who turned around.

In the other direction, Chen Rui already had 4 law fragments in his hands. This was the result of his hard work for several days. At this time, the light on the Bloody Ring was darker. He was obviously a lot closer to Tiffany’s location.

There was a heart-shattering cry from the front again. Chen Rui was already familiar with this kind of sound, but this batch of wandering spirits was not small. There were about 1000 of them which made the place look white. They flew toward the island where Chen Rui was located.

Although he couldn’t tell how many super-level wandering spirits there were, judging from Chen Rui’s experience in hunting wandering spirits these days, there were at least 10 at the Kingdom level. It was unknown if there were more powerful Demi-God-level wandering spirits.

Just 2 days ago, Chen Rui encountered Demi-God-level wandering spirits. At that time, there were hundreds of thousands of wandering spirits, and there were 8 Demi-God-level spirits sensed in the [Analytical Eyes]. He simply was not their opponent. If he hadn’t used the [Sneak] technique to hide his figure in time, even escaping would be a problem.

Although there were a lot of wandering spirits in front of him, with the Sword of Fallen Angel and the Wrath King Armor, he should be able to deal with them. Worse comes to worst, he could also activate [Red Pole Star Transformation]. However, there was a certain period of weakness after [Pole Star Transformation], and the skills of the Super System would be frozen for a period of time. It was extremely dangerous, especially in this environment. He must be cautious and not take risks easily.

Chen Rui didn’t activate [Sneak]. Instead, he just restrained his breath and hid behind a huge rock. While thinking of a strategy, he suddenly noticed that the wandering spirits in front of him were agitated. It seemed to have discovered his existence and flew over.

Chen Rui was startled, but he didn’t panic. He flew into the air while quickly equiping the Wrath King Armor and the Sword of Fallen Angel. The power he accumulated initially suddenly rose to the maximum, and there was a berserk and fierce breath in the ghastly cold air.

A huge Scorching Dragon with destructive breath roared out. Wherever it went, the wandering spirits were torn apart, and the huge impact repelled the surrounding wandering spirits. After the Scorching Dragon flew in a large circle, it circled back and collided with Chen Rui.

Scorching Dragon merged with Chen Rui who was covered in a flame. The red light with amazing power submerged into his body and exuded a terrifying pressure. Large cracks appeared on the ground under his feet.

[Scorching Dragon Possession] made Chen Rui’s breath skyrocketed again. The Sword of Fallen Angel in his hand drew a circle of profound sword qi. It was another state of [Water Sword], [Overlapping Sword Qi] , which was derived from the fist power comprehended in the surfy sea.

Different from the kind of ripples that leverage power, this sword energy was a sharp qi like a huge wave, turbulent and surging. Wherever it passed, the weaker wandering spirits were directly turned into flying ashes.

The [Analytical Eyes] showed that there were 15 wandering spirits at the Kingdom level. Fortunately, there were no wandering spirits of the Demi-God level. The wandering spirits of the Kingdom level were far superior to the Demon Overlord level, especially the regeneration ability. Even with the Sword of Fallen Angel, it would take several slashes to be completely wiped out. With nearly 1,000 Demon Overlord-level wandering spirits, even after Chen Rui activated [Scorching Dragon Possession], he still felt a huge pressure. He fought while moving. Combined with the shifting power, he avoided the greater ones and swiftly massacred the weaker wandering spirits while moving.

When the massacre reached the climax, the Sword of Fallen Angel actually launched out of Chen Rui’s hand. The momentum of this attack was very fierce, piercing through 3 wandering spirits consecutively before flying back to his hand.

[Sword Control]——Doubles damage. The sword can be controlled within the effective range away from the body and launched various attacks.

Chen Rui shifted to a distance in an instant as he glanced at the long sword lightly. There was blood on the tip of the sword.

Wandering spirits had no blood.

An astonished voice sounded in front, “You… you actually see through my stealth talent!”

TL: Who is that? Anriel or someone else? Is Anriel setting Keressa up?

chapters.title: Chapter 890: Leslie
chapters.body:
Chapter 890: Leslie

A figure appeared in the space in front of him. This was a young woman with blue hair and blue eyes. She had an excellent appearance and figure, but compared with Athena and Kia, there was still a certain distance. Only those eyes were particularly moving, full of soul-stirring amorous feelings with every blink. She was covering her shoulder with 1 hand.

“This sword actually damaged my soul! Could that sword…” Before the woman could finish speaking, she was already surrounded by the wandering spirits.

The target of the wandering spirits was all beings other than themselves. Previously, this woman had a special stealth talent that hid her figure, so she was not discovered by wandering spirits. Now that her stealth talent was exposed, she would naturally be attacked by the wandering spirits.

Chen Rui sneered without saying a word. The Sword of Fallen Angel in his hand burst out with all his strength, slashing a wandering spirit of the peak stage of the Kingdom level into half. It was not the first time he had hunted wandering spirits. He felt something was amiss when he was unexpectedly discovered by the wandering spirits previously. The strongest of these wandering spirits was only at the peak stage of the Kingdom level. At that distance, even if he didn’t activate [Sneak], his hiding place should not be exposed at all.

Later, when he was fighting with the wandering spirits and shifting, the [Analytical Eyes] unexpectedly showed some information other than wandering spirits, which made him finally understand that it was someone who deliberately brought the wandering spirits to him and wanted to kill him with the hands of the wandering spirits. Perhaps the person was even trying to take advantage when both sides were injured.

This woman was from the Leviathan Royal Family. Her strength was not Demi-God, but the peak stage of the Kingdom level. She must have some kind of remote peeping ability. She had been hiding with her stealth talent. After she noticed Chen Rui’s location, she successfully attracted the wandering spirits over. However, she also didn’t expect that Chen Rui would be able to see where she was, deliberately fighting and retreating to her vicinity before he unexpectedly attacked her with [Sword Control].

This blow condensed the powerful strength of [Scorching Dragon Possession] which was originally aimed at her forehead, but unfortunately, the woman was also very alert. She dodged at the critical moment. Only her shoulder was injured. However, the woman’s stealth technique could no longer be used for the time being, and she had also become the target of wandering spirits.

There was no need to worry about the wandering spirits escaping during the fight because this loss of self-consciousness left only aggressive spirits. Therefore, once they fought, there were only 3 words: Fight to the death.

The Kingdom level wandering spirits that had been slashed into halves were extremely fierce. Despite having been hit several times before, the half bodies still rushed toward Chen Rui.

The lethality of Chen Rui in the [Scorching Dragon Possession] state was greatly enhanced. The Sword of Fallen Angel shone brightly, and countless vast sword qi surged. The halved spirit was turned into hundreds of pieces… In the overlapping turbulent sword qi, their vitality was finally completely cut off.

After a while, a law fragment appeared in the air.

“Law fragment!” The woman blurted out. Despite being surrounded by 4 Kingdom level wandering spirits, she still had the energy to observe this side.

Chen Rui was about to collect it when the wandering spirits of the peak stage of the Kingdom level flew over and launched a berserk attack. All of a sudden, he clearly sensed that there was a soft water element power in his vast sword qi, and it rolled toward the law fragment silently.

When a cold light flashed across Chen Rui’s eyes, the sword intent changed. The vast sword qi emitted by the Sword of Fallen Angel turned into ripples and pushed away all the wandering spirits that approached like a big intangible hand. The next second, the ‘big hand’ wrapped around the soft water element power and squashed the water element power.

During the pull of sword qi, the law fragment was brought to Chen Rui and disappeared in the blink of an eye.

This scene made the woman’s eyes flash with boundless hatred, and her blue eyes suddenly turned into deep black, including the whites and pupils. Generally speaking, only the right eye of the Leviathan Royal Family was the Eye of Incubus, but it was both eyes for this woman. It was an extremely rare talent just like Broc. It’s just that Broc’s strength was not even like the light of a firefly in front of this woman.

The history of the Demon Realm had been long-standing. Putting aside the factors such as massacre and extinction, the lifespan of the super powerhouse of the reclusive powerhouses and geniuses was unknown. If he hadn’t entered the super-level, he would not really touch this level, and he would only meet the ordinary powerhouse level of the initial Demon Emperor Demon Overlord.

The super-level is a new starting point, and there is still a long way to go. Chen Rui had long been aware of this.

After the woman activated the Eye of Incubus, there was no change on the surface. Instead, she was hit by the wandering spirits as she was distracted. She immediately showed a painful expression. Immediately after, countless wandering spirits went into her body. The hot body began to expand rapidly and burst into pieces.

Chen Rui could see clearly that the explosion and shattering were just the water element’s mirror image. It seems that the woman has activated the stealth talent again, and she wants to use the wandering spirits to consume my strength.

No doubt, the wandering spirits who killed the ‘dead’ target immediately turned their attack on Chen Rui.

Chen Rui snorted as his body shifted continuously. The ripples on the sword suddenly became more chilly, and there was a gradually frozen figure in the air in front of him. It was that woman. By right, the Leviathan Royal Family had water element proficiency, so ordinary water element freezing would not work at all. However, this chill was completely different from water element power, and it was also different from the ghastly chill of the Ghastly Floating Land. It was another extreme chill that contained unstoppable destruction power.

Even the intangible soul body of the wandering spirits gradually slowed down, and the weak ones actually turned into ice sculptures, floating in the air.

This woman reacted very quickly. Seeing that her talent for stealth was exposed, she didn’t want to fight more, and she didn’t crave the law fragment. She just wanted to use the strength of the wandering spirits to leave quickly and get rid of this dangerous man. This plan was actually very smart. It could be seen that she belonged to the type of deep scheming but cautious. It’s a pity that Chen Rui saw through her intention at a glance. He activated another means to break her stealth technique again.

That terrifying destructive breath was very difficult to deal with. It not only quickly destroyed her resistance, but also gradually invaded her soul. The black light in the woman’s Eye of Incubus was flourishing, and there were torrent-like fluctuations around her body. The spirit shackles that had the power of the [Soul Shackles] had formed a strange kingdom, but she was still unable to break free from the [Winter Territory] that incorporated the strongest destruction law – No, it should already be called [Winter Kingdom].

Not only that, under the interference of [Winter Kingdom], she could no longer use the same tricks to hide, so she had to deal with the attacking wandering spirits while resisting the freeze.

Chen Rui shook his sword, and countless sword qi containing [Soul Searing] radiated out. The ice sculptures were turned into powder, and the frozen wandering spirits were also annihilated. Under the power of the Sword of Fallen Angel, he killed the surrounding wandering spirits one after another, and he harvested a law fragment again.

Seeing that the wandering spirits around Chen Rui were gradually exhausted, the woman was secretly terrified. She wanted to use this man to hold the wandering spirits for some benefits. She didn’t expect her plan to fail and was even self-defeating, becoming his tool to delay the wandering spirits.

Chen Rui appeared in front of the woman with a shift, and the wandering spirits that approached her were instantly torn into countless pieces by the terrifying sword light. The woman only felt that the destruction energy suddenly became several times stronger, and even her feet began to freeze. She couldn’t help being shocked, and she shouted, “I’m willing to surrender!”

That kind of destructive power immediately stopped. Before Chen Rui could speak, a small black crossbow exuding intense waves appeared in the woman’s hand. Chen Rui didn’t have enough time to dodge. The 3 sharp winds had been accurately nailed into the chest.

This 9-shot crossbow was 1 of the big trump card for that woman. The quality had reached the quasi-artifact.

“ Hmph ! You want me, Leslie, to surrender?”

The woman’s sneer quickly solidified on her face as she saw that the opponent’s breastplate was only dented with 3 shallow holes; they didn’t penetrate the opponent at all. Then, the holes quickly returned to their original shape as if they had not suffered any damage.

“What?!” This was the first time Leslie encountered such a scene, so she was taken aback. Not to mention an armor, the crossbow can easily penetrate even a shield. What kind of armor is this?

Although surprised, Leslie didn’t stop her hand movements. The little crossbow fired again, firing all the remaining 6 bolts against the face that the armor couldn’t cover.

A big buckler with an ancient and simple pattern suddenly appeared in front of him, replacing the bolts’ target.

“Ding! Ding! Ding! Ding! Ding! Ding!”

This time, not even a small hole was left; the shield was unscathed.

When Leslie saw the big shield, her facial expression suddenly changed, “Demon Shield!”

Leslie was the royal relative of the Illusive Demon Empire back then, so she was no stranger to this shield. In other words, any of the Leviathan Royal Family knew exactly what this shield meant.

The highest artifact of the Leviathan Royal Family, 1 of the 7 artifacts in the Demon Realm, the Demon Shield of the Illusive Demon Shield!

Chen Rui was waiting for the moment when Leslie was distracted. With a flash of red light, 2 chains flew out. The chains exuded a strange flame breath and bound Leslie in a cross shape.

He had long guessed that Leslie would do a sneak attack. The reason he had so many actions was to keep her alive.

The chains seemed to be phantasms, and they soon disappeared into Leslie’s body. After that, Chen Rui didn’t bother Leslie. He used [Winter Kingdom] with the Sword of Fallen Angel to slaughter all the remaining wandering spirits and gained 3 more law fragments.

A total of 5 law fragments were harvested this time. Together with the hunting harvest from the previous few days, there were a total of 9, which was not a small harvest.

Chen Rui put away the law fragments before setting his eyes on Leslie.

Leslie was suspended in the air at this time. The kingdom around her had long since disappeared, and her life was under his control. Her strength seemed to be almost completely imprisoned by these 2 intangible chains. In fact, she struggled with all her might, but as soon as she struggled, there was a terrifying absorption from the chain which actually began to devour her flesh and blood. She was scared witless. Fortunately, as long as she didn’t move, the power of devouring would disappear automatically.

The Shackles of True Flame.

This was a powerful artifact that the 4-winged angel Isyorul of the human world had activated on Chen Rui. It was bestowed by Raphael, 1 of the 3 archangels. If Duoduo hadn’t sacrificed himself to save Chen Rui, the Shackles of True Flame would have almost killed Chen Rui.

Later, it took him 2 years to completely absorb the law of the Shackles of True Flame and turn it into his own strength.

The Shackles of True Flame that Chen Rui activated was not as domineering as it used to be, but it had a stronger restraint ability.

“Leslie?” Chen Rui looked at the silent woman and smiled coldly, “You’re Satan’s subordinate, right?”

TL: Satan’s people are here too?

chapters.title: Chapter 891: Puppets And Trap
chapters.body:
Chapter 891: Puppets And Trap

“I also know you are under Sariel. Our positions are different. I’m forced to attack you. If you want to kill me, I have nothing to say.” Leslie’s expression was pitiful, especially those sad eyes. It made people feel compassion involuntarily.

No doubt this woman is the powerhouse sent by Satan to the Mysterious Land this time. The purpose must be to escort Tiffany to a ‘door’ somewhere, and of course, to defeat the competitors in Sariel Team.

Chen Rui was clear. This is a special competition. Whether it is the Satan Team or the Sariel Team, they are all manipulated pieces. They kill each other and consume each other on this board. The 2 players behind the game are 2 Pseudo-Gods, Satan and Sariel.

Auglas once said that the location of the yuan crystal can completely annihilate even Pseudo-God powerhouses at any time. Only the special physique of the light and dark body can survive. Whether it is a member of the Sariel Team or the Satan Team, their physique is very special and possesses various abilities. Although they encountered many risks, they still survived. However, none of them has a light and dark body.

Perhaps the Lost Land and the Ghastly Floating Land have corresponding special rules that restrict Pseudo-God’s power, but neither of them is the place that Auglas said, but the Chaos Realm behind the ‘door’, which is the most dangerous place. Even powerhouses like Satan and Sariel, who are closest to God, dare not set foot in it, so they manipulate these chess pieces to go.

Chen Rui didn’t know whether there are other tacit understandings or rules in the game between the 2 Pseudo-Gods. He only knew that in this kind of game, any piece could be discarded at any time. Even the last piece that survived might not have a good ending.

With Chen Rui’s current strength. There was simply no way to compete with Pseudo-Gods like Satan and Sariel, so the best way was to escape the game. He tried to activate the [Star Gate] at the Ghastly Floating Land, and it was not a problem to escape directly, but the consequences would be more serious.

He already used the name ‘Aguile’ with Sariel, and Sariel seemed to value his ‘destruction body’. Perhaps even the Evil Pupil badge had other tricks, which must be guarded against. What’s more, this time Chen Rui came to the mysterious place for an important task, which was to bring back ‘fiancée’ Tiffany. This was the most important condition for the peaceful unification of the Demon Realm.

While Chen Rui was thinking quickly, his eyes turned to Leslie with resentment. The murderous aura gradually became stronger, “Although it’s just a different position, since you are here, you should be prepared to die…”

“Wait a minute!” Leslie’s body trembled as tears streamed down her face, “You’re stronger than me, so it’s not difficult to kill me. The powerful means of restraint that you deliberately activated just now must be to get more intel from me. I can tell you all; I am even willing to be your servant with absolute obedience… Just please don’t kill me.”

“Keep you alive?” Chen Rui sneered, “You already saw so many of my secrets, yet you still want to live?”

“Master!” Leslie already couldn’t care less. Even the title had been changed, “Master can own and activate the Sword of Fallen Angel, the Wrath King Armor and Demon Shield at the same time. You can be regarded as an out-of-the-world genius of the entire Demon Realm, and you will surely become an unprecedentedly powerful existence in the future. I am willing to follow master. I can also tell master the whereabouts of IIlusive Shield! Help master collect all 7 artifacts!”

Leslie no doubt saw the origin of the 7 artifacts on Chen Rui. The last 2 sentences made Chen Rui’s eyes flash, and he seemed a little intrigued, “You are willing to surrender to me?”

“Of course!” Leslie’s eyes lit up with hope, “I’m a remaining member of the Leviathan Royal Family. My father used to control the royal treasure house and transferred an amazing amount of wealth in time before his death. It is still in my hands to this day. Among them, I have the talent of the Eye of Incubus. Although it is not as powerful as master, I have also trained to the peak stage of the Kingdom level. I believe I can become the master’s right-hand man. After master advances to Demi-God in the future, I can also become the strongest believer of master. As long as master speaks, my ability, my wealth, including my body can be dedicated to the master! By the way, I have the talent of innate infatuation and special physique which can bring the greatest pleasure to men in bed. If the master doesn’t believe it, just try it…”

Leslie’s breathing became a little hurried, and there was an undisguised flattery on her face. The armor on her body automatically peeled off, revealing a plump and attractive body. A unique body scent spread out. The white skin was so tender like it was made of water. The enchanting eyes had a sense of timid, alluring men to trample her immediately. “What I want to say is…” Chen Rui seemed to want to resist this temptation, but he couldn’t move his gaze away from Leslie. In his mind… he imagined himself molesting this seductive female body in various poses. His eyes were wide open.

At this time, Leslie’s eyes were shining brightly, and the power of the Eye of Incubus suddenly rose to the extreme. A terrifying spirit power penetrated Chen Rui’s eyes and seemed to cover his soul completely.

After launching this blow, Leslie’s complexion became extremely pale. The breath all over her body suddenly dimmed. She obviously used the secret technique to exhaust her strength plus the restraint effect of the Shackles of True Flame.

Despite paying a huge price, this woman did not hesitate at all; she resolutely used all her strength. It was completely different from the one begging for pity just now. No doubt, a powerhouse that could train to a super-level was no ordinary person.

At this time, she saw a mask that looked ordinary on the outside, then her secret technique that exhausted all her strength disappeared without any sound.

“What I want to say is,” Chen Rui looked at Leslie regretfully, “The poison in your fragrance has nothing to do with me. Moreover, the 7 artifacts I have are not only the first 3, but also the God-Eating Mask.”

1 of the special attributes of the God-Eating Mask was immunity to all soul control.

Leslie’s facial expression became a little paler, and blood was overflowing from her 5 orifices at the same time. Her strength dropped to the lowest point while a faint yellow light glowed in the eyes behind Chen Rui’s mask. Leslie only felt her mind shake, and her soul became blurred. When she suddenly thought of the God-Eating Mask’s most famous function, she couldn’t help but freak out, “No! I really want to surrender. I…”

Her voice gradually decreased, and her eyes also became dull. Although there were occasional struggles in between. She finally remained quiet in the end.

When Leslie recovered, her eyes looking at Chen Rui had already become extremely pious, “Master.”

Originally, the God-Eating Mask could only turn people whose strength level was lower than himself into puppets. Chen Rui and Leslie were both at the peak stage of the Kingdom level, but after Chen Rui activated [Scorching Dragon Possession], his strength was infinitely close to the Demi-God level, which was equal to the difference between S+ and S++. The most important thing was that Leslie activated the attack in a desperate attempt in the end caused her spirit to be greatly damaged. After several tries, Chen Rui finally succeeded in turning her into a puppet.

Chen Rui nodded to Leslie in satisfaction. The strength of [Scorching Dragon Possession] was gone, and his face was full of exhaustion. This fierce battle with the wandering spirits was already tiresome, and it would take a lot of effort to maintain the [Scorching Dragon Possession] to convert Leslie. Because of this, he deliberately pretended to be seduced and led Leslie to make a move so that he could successfully control her when she was at the weakest point. Otherwise, it could only be done by activating the [Red Pole Star Transformation] which consumed more strength.

“Leslie, now, tell me everything about you.”

“Yes, master.” Now that Leslie already became a puppet of the God-Eating Mask, not to mention these, even if she was asked to sacrifice herself or commit suicide, she would not hesitate.

Leslie revealed that Satan controlled a lot of super powerhouses, and he sent more people than Sariel this time. In addition to Tiffany, there were 18 people. There were 2 at the Demi-God level, 7 at the Kingdom level, and 9 Demon Overlords.

The Satan Team was quick when passing the Lost Land but at the cost of 1 Kingdom level powerhouse and 2 Demon Overlords. When they first arrived in the Ghastly Floating Land, they encountered the wandering spirit group. They lost 4 Demon Overlords, and 1 Kingdom level. Now there were 2 Demi-Gods, 5 Kingdom levels, and 3 Demon Overlords.

The first task of the Satan Team was not to find the so-called ‘door’ or kill the Sariel Team, but to obtain the element fragments because the element fragments were the necessary material to open the door; Leslie and others were sent to obtain the element fragment. Before bumping into Chen Rui, she already got 3. As of now, there were still 10 days before the agreed meeting time. At that time, they would return to the meeting place.

Tiffany was not awake, but sleeping in a special crystal coffin… to prevent some kind of power from leaking. As long as the required number of element fragments were collected, Tiffany could be released to find and open the door.

Leslie also revealed a piece of news that the Demi-God Enquit of the Satan Team had set a trap to wipe out the Sariel Team. Currently, the Sariel Team… had taken the bait.

If it was teammates like Roman and Delia, Chen Rui would not hesitate to come to the rescue, even if it was risking his life. But Keressa and the others were purely an interest-based combination with mutual scheming. Keressa even activated the mark to kill Chen Rui. It was not a pity that this kind of ‘teammates’ died.

Chen Rui was concerned about the news of Tiffany. When he heard that she was locked in the crystal coffin, he frowned slightly, thought about it, and made a decision.

“Let’s work together to kill the wandering spirits to get the element fragments. When the time comes, I will quietly follow you to the gathering place.”

“Yes, master.”

At this time, the Sariel Team was fighting a group of the wandering spirits at another location. Keressa’s eyes flashed, and several nearby Kingdom level wandering spirits solidified. This was the mutated talent of a Demi-God level medusa powerhouse. Even spirits was also not immune to the mighty power of this super [Petrify].

“ Boom Boom Boom …” When Keressa’s hair flicked, the solidified wandering spirits turned into powder and disappeared. The medusas’ face turned pale, already dispelling all the side effects of the erosion of the wandering spirits.

“Madam Keressa, help!” Thursfield already could not resist the onslaught of the wandering spirits in the distance as his protective magic shield collapsed.

Keressa ignored Thursfield’s cry for help. Her eyes fell on a crystal fragment left by the annihilation of the Kingdom level wandering spirit. When she took the fragment, she sensed the pure law power, and she couldn’t help showing joy, “No doubt it’s an element fragment! Anriel, your intel is very useful. You have done a great job this time!”

At this moment, Thursfield was already being pierced by several Demon Overlord-level wandering spirits. His flesh was badly mutilated as he screamed horribly. A cruel smile flashed past Keressa’s face. Just as she was about to leave, she suddenly thought of something and waved her hand, destroying all the wandering spirits. Then, she flew straight toward the wandering spirits at the Kingdom level.

chapters.title: Chapter 892: Old Hatred
chapters.body:
Chapter 892: Old Hatred

The Sariel Team led by Keressa searched for the wandering spirits to slay in order to get the law fragment while searching for the ‘key’. Although Sara at the early stage of the Kingdom level was killed in a fierce battle, they became more proficient in cooperation and successfully obtained a lot of law fragments.

Keressa got 8, Pato got 3, Quero 1, Marton 1 while Anriel and Thursfield were empty-handed. This allocation plan was obviously advantageous to Keressa, but the rest of the people were afraid to speak out because she was too powerful. They were still inferior even if all of them teamed up. On the other hand, the special attribute of the wandering spirits was very difficult to deal with, and Keressa’s talent had considerable restraint against the wandering spirits. If they left the team and acted alone, it seemed rather difficult for even Pato of the peak stage of the Kingdom level to hunt the Kingdom level wandering spirits. What’s more, not every Kingdom level wandering spirit would condense a law fragment. In case there was a mishap, Sara would be the best example.

As for Anriel and Thursfield, they dared not object at all, but Keressa promised that as long as the 2 could find a valuable group of wandering spirits or ‘key’, they would be allocated the next law fragment.

In fact, Anriel and Thursfield were equally clear that the possession of valuables would arouse the envy of others. With their strength, even if they get a law fragment, they couldn’t keep it long. They could only obey Keressa even more.

If they hadn’t been for a little use value, if they were in the outside world, their lives would have been snuffed out by these super powerhouses.

However, the absorption or comprehension of the law fragment would take a lot of time, so even Keressa did not dare to absorb it immediately. After all, these ‘teammates’ were all scheming people. Moreover, the top priority was to complete the task and get out of this ghastly place as soon as possible. Even without Sariel’s reward, these law fragments alone would be considered a huge gain.

“Madam Keressa! I found a batch of the wandering spirits!” Pathfinder Anriel panted as she said to Keressa. “In terms of quantity… I guess it looks like 500 to 600, but there should be a super-level wandering spirit among them. I sensed that kind of momentum, so I didn’t dare to get too close. If it wasn’t for the madam’s scale to shield the breath, maybe I’d have been noticed.”

“Very good!” Keressa stood up, the number of 500-600 was completely easy for the team to defeat. “I will do as I say. If we get a law fragment this time, you have a spot.”

“Madam, I just want to be able to leave here safely.” Anriel smiled bitterly, “I hope that madam can protect me, and this spot will be regarded as an offering to madam.”

Seeing that Anriel was so sensible, Keressa showed a satisfied expression, “Okay, I will protect you to the best of my ability.”

Although the credibility of this sentence was not very high, Anriel knew that in the eyes of the other party, she was just an ant and did not dare to question it, so she quickly thanked her.

Keressa gave the order, “Everyone, let’s go and hunt the wandering spirits together!”

Meanwhile, in the other direction, Chen Rui was flying unhurriedly.

“Leslie. The scouting map you provided is the main place where we can find the wandering spirits more easily, and your stealth talent plus water element is indeed the best way to lure the wandering spirits. When you break up the wandering spirits, I can easily eliminate them. In just 7 days, we actually collected 21 law fragments!” Chen Rui expressed his approval.

Leslie looked humble, “Thank you for the compliment, master. The mark on the map is actually the location of the wandering spirits group activity that I detected a few days ago. It’s just that my strength is inferior, so I didn’t dare to provoke them. Master is the real powerhouse. You can actually kill the Demi-God wandering spirits.”

Chen Rui and Leslie teamed up to hunt down a lot of the wandering spirits these days. Especially yesterday, they actually found a group of the wandering spirits with a Demi-God level wandering spirit. Chen Rui activated the [Red Pole Star Transformation] to annihilate that Demi-God level wandering spirit in one fell swoop and got the more valuable Demi-God level law crystal ball.

Unlike the Kingdom level fragments, the Demi-God level was a complete crystal ball. The law contained in it was more powerful and complete, and its value was far more than Kingdom level fragments. The Demi-God was a step before the Pseudo-God, which could no longer be called a law fragment, but a power evolved from a law. It was closer to the ‘divine’ called Pseudo-Godhood. However, until now, Chen Rui had not seen a Pseudo-God wandering spirit. Perhaps it was restricted by some special rule.

“What is this mysterious place? There are actually so many powerful wandering spirits; almost endless! Even the Demon Overlord-level wandering spirits are in horrifying amounts beyond imagination, let alone so many super-level wandering spirits. If it was outside, they could simply destroy the existence of the entire world. I wonder if it was formed by the different forces here, or by the mutated soul after the annihilation of the real person.” This was Chen Rui’s biggest doubt since arriving at the Ghastly Floating Land.

“Judging from the law fragment… this kind of soul entity is likely to be formed after the annihilation of a real powerhouse, and these powerhouses are quite powerful during their lifetime, otherwise they will not form a soul entity after death, so even the weakest wandering spirits here are the Demon Overlord level.”

Chen Rui took a deep breath, “So, the actual number of people who died in a certain period is far more than the number of the wandering spirits? What actually happened?”

Leslie shook her head, and Chen Rui suddenly thought, “Have you heard of ‘Twilight of the Gods’?”

“Twilight of the Gods?” Leslie was stunned, “I have seen incomplete records in some ancient books. The legend stated that it was a huge disaster of all the worlds, and even the gods fell into eternal sleep. But no one can be sure whether it’s a legend or a fact. It’s true that the gods haven’t performed miracles for many years, and maybe that’s where these legends come from.”

Chen Rui frowned. What Leslie said was similar to what he knew from Catherine. Although the gods hadn’t shown miracles for a long time, the legendary god’s concept of time was completely different from the ordinary world. A god’s yawn was probably thousands of years in the world. Take the solar system as an example. The creation and evolution of the real solar system took hundreds of millions of years or even longer, but it took only a few years for ‘Chen Rui’.

Therefore, no one could be sure whether the legendary gods were dozing or sleeping.

“Right, master. I have seen the term law fragment in an incomplete old handbook.” Leslie seemed to have thought of something, “The note has some fragmented descriptions. For example, life essence, law fragment, the secret of creation and destruction.”

Life essence…? The secret of creation and construction…? Chen Rui seemed to have touched something crucial and he asked, “Who wrote that handbook?”

“The handbook is incomplete, and it mentions ‘Python’ that seems to be a person’s name, but I don’t know if it’s the author.”

Python? Chen Rui had never heard of this name. Although he now had the strength to compete with Demi-God, his knowledge in this world might not be as good as that of a Demon Overlord. Perhaps he could find the answer from experienced people like Earth Elemental King or Auglas.

“It’s not long before you need to gather.” The most important thing at the moment was Tiffany and the silver box. Chen Rui didn’t waste any more energy thinking about these things, “I’ll give you 7 fragments for the mission. Let’s go to the gathering place. I will use the [Sneak] to follow you from afar. When we find Tiffany, we will act according to the situation.”

“Yes, master.”

Chen Rui and Leslie were unobstructed all the way, but Keressa encountered a great danger at this time.

Under Anriel’s guidance, the Sariel Team found the group of 500-600 wandering spirits. However, the number of the wandering spirits suddenly increased tenfold at the beginning of the battle, and it was still increasing, besieging several people layer by layer. Even more terrifying, super powerhouses like Anriel and Pato had sensed the breath of more than 1 Demi-God level wandering spirits!

Everyone in the Sariel Team couldn’t help being shocked, and they quickly moved closer together to form a defensive formation.

Keressa could sense that the wandering spirits were drawn to something, and this focus was actually the ‘pathfinder’ Anriel. She shouted angrily, “This is a trap! Anriel!”

Anriel smiled strangely, “Keressa, an overbearing guy like you will fall into this too? You only found out that it’s a trap now?”

“You’re not Anriel! Who exactly are you?! No, the imprint I secretly put into Anriel did not change. This is…” Keressa suddenly reacted, “[Puppetry]! Beelzebub Royal Family! “

“Remember the battle in the Dead Sea? I didn’t expect to meet you here; even as an enemy! The woman you sent to explore the way was captured by me and turned into a puppet long ago, and my teammates activated a talent to shield the breath that the puppet may leak. It was just a good opportunity to lead you step by step into the trap. Enjoy the last moment of life. This time, I can finally avenge the past!”

“Vesilna!” Keressa gritted her teeth and said an enemy’s name.

“ Haha …” Anriel’s laughter stopped abruptly, and she was annihilated under Keressa’s rage.

Vesilna was not an alarmist; the number of wandering spirits increased more and more. The rough estimate was probably exceeding 10,000, and there were 6 wandering spirits of the Demi-God level alone.

Everyone’s complexion changed greatly. Now it was not an option for attack or defense at all, even escaping was a problem.

Keressa gritted her teeth and grabbed Thursfield as she channeled her strength. Thursfield’s body suddenly emitted a fiery glow which rose to a terrifying level in an instant. The approaching Demon Overlord level wandering spirits actually evaporated out of thin air.

“Madam Keressa…” Thursfield only felt that his body swelled like a balloon, and he could be shattered at any time. He was so terrified that he couldn’t finish a sentence, and he had lost the ability to speak under the terrifying expansion.

Several Kingdom level powerhouses like Pato, Quero and Marton could see clearly that Keressa used a secret technique to stimulate Thursfield’s spirit flame talent, turning Thursfield into a ‘body bomb’. It seemed that Keressa had secretly did something to him, so she deliberately did not kill Thursfield.

However, the Demi-God level wandering spirits had already surrounded them, and it was still difficult to escape by exploding the spirit power of Thursfield alone.

Keressa also understood this point. She couldn’t be bothered anymore as it was a matter of life and death. There were several law fragments in her hands. While launching [Petrify] to block the attack of the wandering spirits, she exhausted a lot of her vitality and energy quickly to incorporate into Thursfield’s body. The energy in Thursfield’s body instantly skyrocketed 10 times, 20 times, 30 times…

Soon Thursfield had turned into a ball emitting berserk heat, ready to explode.

Pato and others all backed away in shock when they sensed the astonishing breath.

“Boom!”

The red light was prosperous, and a monstrous heat wave burst forth. This kind of fire spirit power combined with the explosion of the law fragment was extremely terrifying. It particularly had a great damage on the soul entity of the wandering spirits. The wandering spirits all dissipated into a puff of smoke. Those Demi-God wandering spirits closest to the center of the explosion were also torn apart, temporarily beyond recovery.

Keressa’s figure disappeared in the distance like lightning through the momentum. Pato and the other 2 were also affected by the aftermath, and they were soon swarmed by the wandering spirits.

chapters.title: Chapter 894: Tricky Battle! Evil Pupil Vs Evil Pupil
chapters.body:
Chapter 894: Tricky Battle! Evil Pupil Vs Evil Pupil

Enquit and Vesilna’s shifting speed was extremely fast. Soon after, they had reached the place where the wailing sound was. Even if the 2 of them were already mentally prepared, they couldn’t help but gasp in horror at this moment.

The number of the wandering spirits was much more than expected. Looking from a distance, it was an endless sea!

There were more than 30 Demi-God level wandering spirits at the forefront alone!

They looked at the fast-flying figure chased by the Demi-God level wandering spirits. The figure was a woman with disheveled hair and a lower snake body. This woman’s speed was fast and slow. It seemed that she was not lightly injured, but she kept dodging while leading the terrifying sea of the wandering spirit to the gathering island of the Satan Team.

Keressa! Vesilna showed intense hatred as she looked at the culprit who brought the great danger at the most critical moment.

The severely wounded Keressa who was chased around seemed to have the intent of dying together. She flew straight toward the 2 of them with all her strength. Those Demi-God level wandering spirits had already discovered the existence of Enquit and Vesilna, and some of them had already rushed toward them.

As Vesilna took a deep breath, the space actually faintly throbbed, and a huge vortex suddenly appeared in front of her.

Beelzebub Royal Family’s bloodline talent – Devour!

Although it was not comparable to the absolute devour power of the God-Eating Mask, this kind of talent was no trivial matter, especially when it was launched by a Demi-God level powerhouse. For a time, the speed of the Demi-God wandering spirits that flew over suddenly slowed down. As the vortex continuously extracted the white mist from their bodies, their figures gradually faded. The first to bear the brunt was Keressa. Her snake body was even getting smaller and smaller in the devour power.

Vesilna suddenly felt that something was wrong, and she saw that ‘Keressa’ had changed, revealing her true face. It was actually a man’s body. She seemed to have just devoured the layer of disguise.

“Voss!” Vesilna was startled. It turned out that the real body of this ‘Keressa’ was the Satan Team’s member, Kingdom level powerhouse Voss, who failed to get back in time!

However, Voss was obviously a corpse at this moment. His body was covered with dozens of snake scales with secret techniques, each of which contained the real blood of Keressa. It was equivalent to making Voss a temporary avatar. The creation of this avatar would also consume a lot of Keressa’s strength, but it was clear that her strategy was successful. Even the Enquit of the peak stage of the Demi-God was not aware of it.

Decoy tactic! The term popped up in both Enquit’s and Vesilna’s minds. Their thoughts could not help but fly to the ‘old nest’ at the back. At this moment, Voss’ body rapidly inflated like a balloon. A faint white light shone through it, and extremely dangerous breaths radiated out.

“It’s the strength of the law fragment! Retreat!” Enquit was the first to respond. With a loud shout, his body shifted rapidly.

Vesilna also hurriedly started shifting, but it was too late. Voss’ body inflated to the limit and a terrifying explosion abruptly occurred.

A huge mushroom cloud slowly rose as Vesilna’s body was blown back in the terrifying light. The nearby Demi-God level wandering spirits were smashed to pieces. Even Enquit, who was the fastest to react, were shaken by the aftermath. His internal organs had been severely damaged.

Although he wasn’t that close, there were at least 10 or more law fragments in this explosion. Moreover, it used the body of the Kingdom level powerhouse as a medium, so its power was extremely terrifying.

Of course, the most seriously injured was Vesilna. The [Armor of Faith] that appeared at the last minute to protect the owner had been torn apart, and there were terrifying wounds on her face and body. Her right arm was almost unusable. Although her devour ability could devour part of the explosion, the energy of the law fragment was too overwhelming. Only 30% was absorbed, and the remaining 70% hit right at Vesilna’s body. Her vitality was severely injured, and her combat power was reduced by at least half.

If it weren’t for the [Armor of Faith] and the devour power, Vesilna’s situation would have been even worse.

The nearby wandering spirits were either annihilated or disintegrated, but the wandering spirits did not know what fear was at all. The latter did not pause at all, and they still swarmed endlessly, surrounding the seriously injured Vesilna.

Although most of the wandering spirits of the Demi-God level could recover due to the explosion, the number of the wandering spirit sea behind was too large, and there was no lack of the wandering spirits of the Kingdom level in the middle. They surrounded Vesilna and launched a rampant attack.

Vesilna was at her weakest state now. Knowing that her situation was at stake, she shouted, “Enquit, help me! I’ll give you all the law fragments I have!”

Enquit in the distance hesitated for a moment, but he turned around and walked away — Although law fragment was a desirable thing, nothing was more important than life. Even if he didn’t take into account the problem of the enemy’s decoy tactic. In this case, he just had to lead the wandering spirits in front. As long as he persisted until the door opened, the hope of survival was still very high. Once he was surrounded, even the peak stage of the Demi-God level could not stand against so many wandering spirits.

Now Vesilna was besieged by the wandering spirits, attracting firepower, so she could buy some more time for him to rush back to protect Tiffany. If something happened to even the ‘key’, then no matter how many law fragments he had, the result was only death.

Seeing Enquit escaping, Vesilna’s face showed a desperate expression. She gritted her teeth, and countless luminous spots came from all over her body. They quickly turned into groups of demonic flies surrounding her to resolve the onslaught of the wandering spirits. However, the wandering spirits around her had become more and more numerous, and they were inexhaustible. Even the spiritual strength of the Demi-God level could not withstand so much spiritual erosion, so she could only bear with agony. The most terrifying thing was that the Demi-God level wandering spirits that had previously been exploded to pieces also began to rapidly recover.

Chen Rui did not know that such a sudden change had taken place in front of him. The departure of Enquit and Vesilna made him have a new plan in his mind. The ideal result was that these 2 Demi-Gods were entangled by the wandering spirits and couldn’t escape, so he could enter the door with Tiffany or try to escape.

Of course, an ideal was just an ideal. He was still vigilant now while waiting for Tiffany’s chant to complete.

Every time Tiffany wrote a rune, the breath of the ancient vicissitudes of life became more and more vast, and the purple mist condensed with law power around her body would also weaken accordingly. From the concentration of purple mist, the chant of this ‘Open Sesame’ would still take considerable time to complete.

All of a sudden, Chen Rui sensed something as he suddenly pushed Leslie next to him, “Be careful!”

Almost at the same time, a figure on the ground broke through the ground. Leslie merely avoided the blow after being pushed away by Chen Rui. However, the figure seemed to be flowing like water. It went at the 2 Kingdom level powerhouses along the way, Liszt and Spree. They shuddered and stood still. Upon being swept away by the wind driven by the figure, they were actually torn apart.

The strength of Liszt and Spree was at the early stage of the Kingdom level and an intermediate stage of Kingdom level respectively. They didn’t even have the power to fight back, so they were instantly killed.

“Keressa!” Chen Rui stared at the rising figure closely. He was secretly shocked when he thought about what happened before, and he immediately understood the snake girl’s plan.

What a good trick! What a good decoy tactic!

Leslie flickered. She activated the stealth talent and disappeared in place.

Since Keressa was almost killed by Vesilna’s tricks a few days ago, she wasn’t surprised that the enemy could call out her name. She glanced at Tiffany, who was still drawing the symbol without realizing it, then she turned her gaze to the surviving 3 people. She initially thought she could easily deal with the enemies around the ‘key’, but she never thought that a guy with an ‘early stage of the Kingdom level’ could actually detect his sneak attack and push the woman at the peak stage of the Kingdom level at a critical moment. It was a surprise indeed.

But it should just be a fluke just now. Even if the opponent has special sensing power or invisibility, they are only Kingdom level ants and cannot be my opponent. The priority is to quickly finsh the battle, capture the ‘key’ and enter the ‘door’ as soon as possible.

At this moment, a huge explosion sounded in the distance, and a triumphant smile appeared on the corner of Keressa’s mouth. Her black hair suddenly lengthened and her eyes turned into snake pupils.

The surrounding light suddenly dimmed, and the criss-crossing black silks seemed to divide the space into countless pieces. The Demon Overlord named Wal just met the snake pupils, and his body was instantly turned into a stone statue. The black silks swiped and shattered the statue into powder.

Chen Rui knew that Keressa was from the medusa tribe, so the moment her eyes turned into snake pupils, he avoided her eyes in time. However, even if he didn’t look at her, a pair of terrifying snake pupils also appeared in Chen Rui’s mind. He felt that the whole mind was dead and his body began to become rigid. This was not a simple erosion of spirit power, but a fusion of Demi-God kingdom power and medusa’s [Petrify] talent.

Leslie’s snort came from not far away. She actually could not maintain the concealment state and fell to the ground. Her body began to stiffen. Keressa’s kingdom was really terrifying. She could petrify without even looking. The power of this kind of [Petrify] was thousands of times more powerful than ordinary medusas!

Keressa knew that the time was short, so she didn’t wait for the 2 of them to completely petrify. She shifted in front of Chen Rui and was ready to kill with one hit when she saw that the other party suddenly raised his head and looked at her.

In an instant, Keressa seemed to see the stars in the sky, flashing red light.

A powerful breath burst out from this ‘Kingdom level ant’, and it instantly surged to a level that shocked Keressa.

That body became extremely dazzling, as if it was made of stars, and the dazzling light quickly spread out, turning into a sky full of stars, filling the entire [Petrify Kingdom]. The 2 different kingdom faith and life force began to repel and dispel each other.

In the blink of an eye, the [Petrify Kingdom]’s power was suppressed.

Keressa’s pair of snake pupils shrink suddenly – My decoy tactic should have successfully diverted the 2 Demi-God powerhouses. After detonating the avatar with law fragments, I will launch surprise attack and snatch ‘key’. However, there is still such an enemy who actually has such a powerful strength!

When the figure in red armor shining with starlight waved, several sharp qi slashed toward Keressa like intangible swords with a length of more than 10 meters.

Keressa instinctively felt the terror of this knife. If she was hit, her entire body would be split in half. She immediately shook her head, and her long hair condensed into a long whip to face the intangible sword qi. This [Aura Blade] actually was swept away, but Keressa’s hair was also chopped off quite a bit.

Keressa had no time to think about how the opponent’s strength could suddenly rise to the same level as her because a strange flame was already burning on the opponent’s body. A long and winding burning huge beast came out of the manic and ferocious breath.

The huge beast exuded a special momentum, and it seemed to have an innate restraint on her. This blow is unavoidable.

Keressa’s robe disappeared suddenly, revealing a naked body. The upper body was a nearly perfect female body with 2 purple buds standing proudly on the towering twin peaks. The lower body was a snake body covered with purple-red scales.

The scales on Keressa’s lower body quickly spread upward, and instantly wrapped most of the upper body’s skin before condensing into an armor – [Armor of Faith] of medusas.

At the same time, dozens of terrifying snake pupils suddenly opened on her body. She looked extremely ferocious, and her momentum suddenly skyrocketed. Chen Rui could clearly sense that it was the Evil Pupil’s power! Dozens of Evil Pupils!

With the [Armor of Faith] coupled with the buff from dozens of Evil Pupils, Keressa’s pupils suddenly turned silver and stared at the Scorching Dragon.

The speed of Scorching Dragon stopped, and gradually slowed down. The body was quickly covered with a layer of silver-gray, and the energy body actually began to solidify.

When approaching Keressa, the entire Scorching Dragon had turned into a complete solid state. Keressa whipped it, and its huge body was actually turned to powder.

Chen Rui was slightly surprised. He never thought that Keressa’s talent was so powerful that she could actually petrify Scorching Dragon!

However, for him who had activated [Red Pole Star Transformation], [Scorching Dragon Kill] was just a general killing move. If he launched [Scorching Dragon Roar], then Keressa would definitely not be able to petrify all, let alone [Pole Star Storm]. The problem is that these are all aoe moves, so I’m concerned that they will affect or disturb Tiffany. It seems that I have to try the best single target killing move [True Red Extinction] that has not been used in actual combat.

Keressa’s fighting experience was extremely rich. Before Chen Rui could make the next reaction, she had already launched a counterattack.

Chen Rui felt dizzy for a while, and there were countless phantasms with snake pupils in front of him. The whole shining [Red Star Kingdom] became a world of pupils in the blink of an eye, and the twinkling light of the stars turned into the blinking of snake pupils.

“[Extreme Vicious Stare]!” Keressa shouted, and blood flowed from her mouth, nose, and ears at the same time. This move was so powerful that it consumed a lot of yuan power and kingdom power during charging.

Under the illumination of the countless snake pupils, Chen Rui felt that Star Power seemed to stagnate, and even his soul had the illusion of being frozen.

When he snorted and closed his eyes, the [Red Star Territory] covered by snake pupils began to shine again. The temperature in the kingdom suddenly dropped, and the countless snake pupils began to solidify gradually. This was not the power of [Petrify], but rather ‘frozen’!

Keressa sensed that her [Extreme Vicious Stare] was sealed by a wave of terrifying destructive power. On the surface, it was a simple freeze, but in fact, it completely destroyed the inner core. At this moment, Chen Rui’s eyes opened with a serene and strange light. With a ‘ click ’, all the frozen snake pupils were cracked.

Keressa screamed tragically, and blood spurted out from the silver snake pupils and the eyes on her body.

“The Evil Pupil! This is the power of the Evil Pupil!” Keressa covered her eyes in pain. “Who are you?!”

chapters.title: Chapter 893: Critical Moment
chapters.body:
Chapter 893: Critical Moment

Chen Rui didn’t know that his original ‘team’ had been destroyed, and he was approaching the gathering place of the Satan Team with Leslie.

“This area doesn’t seem to have any wandering spirits?”

“Raikkonen and Rostree should be in charge of this place. It is likely that the wandering spirits have been temporarily eliminated by them.”
