According to Leslie, Raikkonen was at the early stage of the Kingdom level while Rostree was a Demon Overlord. Satan Team’s task assignment was that the stronger the strength, the farther the scope of responsibility, and the more law fragments that needed to be paid. Of course, as long as the specified number was completed within the specified time, the excess part would be theirs.

This distribution plan was much better than the Sariel Team, but it was impossible to be united in this kind of combination no matter what. The powerful ones controlled and enslaved the weak ones. The team members were also scheming against each other.

“I already sense someone is coming.” Chen Rui looked at the sky ahead. These days, under the protection of Leslie, he had completely digested the soul power obtained by the Sword of Fallen Angel after massacring the wandering spirits. He felt that his soul power had more than doubled, so the sensing power of the spirit power had been greatly enhanced, exceeding the ordinary peak stage of the Kingdom level, which was far above Leslie.

Soon, Leslie also sensed someone, “2 people. This power breath should be Raikkonen and Rostree. Master, do you want to kill these 2 people?”

“Kill?” Chen Rui nodded. Seeing that the Bloody Ring’s light was flourishing, he had an idea, “Wait, I suddenly thought of a good way to go to the gathering place with you.”

Half an hour later, the figures of Leslie and ‘Raikkonen’ appeared in the air, and they both flew toward the gathering place.

2 days later, the 2 arrived at a floating island.

Chen Rui, who was disguised as Raikkonen, finally met the ‘teammates’ of Team Satan. There were 5 other people besides Leslie. 2 Demi-God levels, 2 Kingdom levels, and 1 Demon Overlord level.

The Demi-God level was a man and a woman, Enquit, great demon, peak stage of the Demi-God; Vesilna, Beelzebub Royal Family, intermediate stage of the Demi-God. Liszt and Spree were at the Kingdom level. The Demon Overlord was called Wal. Plus Chen Rui and Leslie, there were 7 people in total.

Chen Rui’s eyes ‘inadvertently’ swept across the crystal coffin on the ground. The crystal coffin was made of frosted glass, and a woman was lying quietly in the middle. She seemed to have fallen into a deep sleep. No doubt it was Tiffany whom he remembered.

In order to avoid suspicion, Chen Rui didn’t look at it much. After all, Enquit and Vesilna were both Demi-God powerhouses, especially since Enquit had reached the peak stage of the Demi-God. He couldn’t fight them by force.

Enquit’s first sentence was to ask Chen Rui, “Raikkonen, why did you come back with Leslie? Where’s Rostree?”

Chen Rui looked downcast, “We were besieged by a large group of wandering spirits. Rostree died, but luckily we met Leslie who returned…”

“Leslie, you saved him?” Vesilna glanced at Leslie.

The Beelzebub Royal Family had a special spirit power sensing for [Puppetry]. When Chen Rui was in the Crystal Valley, Azgalor saw through the puppet Fatilu created with the God-Eating Mask. However, the puppet effect of the God-Eating Mask was related to his own strength. When Chen Rui puppeted Leslie, he was in the state of [Scorching Dragon Possession], which was very close to Demi-God. Not only that. In order to prevent being seen through, he also used the Wrath King Armor power to bestow the ‘Soul Armor’ to Leslie. The Wrath King Armor’s ‘Soul Armor’ had half the defense of the original body. The most important thing was that it was immune to the erosion of spirit power, so under this situation, Vesilna’s spirit power would not be seen through Leslie.

Leslie smiled, nodded, and didn’t say much. Chen Rui cooperated with a bitter expression as he took out 5 law fragments, and handed them over to Enquit, “Sir Enquit, this is the share that Rostree and I hand over.

Vesilna didn’t look at Leslie again. She didn’t notice anything wrong apparently. She frowned, “Why haven’t Voss and Macy come back?”

“Wait a little, it’s not the last time yet.” Enquit said with murderous intent, “No matter what the reason is, as long as they don’t return within the specified time, they will be treated as leaving the team and killed!”

Except for Vesilna, the rest of the people bowed their heads under the pressure of Enquit’s terrifying murderous intent. Chen Rui thought: The Satan Team no doubt are not kind people too, but the advantage of the Satan Team is that they have ‘key’ Tiffany in hand, so they are not afraid that the team members will flee because only Tiffany can open the ‘door’. If one leaves the team, staying in this world will definitely result in death.

Nearly another day passed, and the final gathering deadline had come. Enquit didn’t say more, but from the fierce gaze, it could be seen that even if those 2 returned, they would definitely be at a dead end.

“We still need 5 pieces of law fragments. Except for Vesilna and I, each of you will pay another piece to make up the number to open the space door.”

Everyone looked at each other in dismay. Generally speaking, in addition to the law fragment handed in, there would be more or less kept for themselves. Naturally, no one was willing when Enquit asked them to take out the private goods they desperately obtained.

“Sir Enquit!” Chen Rui was the first to speak, “If it was 2 days ago, I would definitely take it out without hesitation, but now… I really don’t have it! If sir give me time, I can immediately go hunt the wandering spirits!”

With that said, Chen Rui glanced at Leslie angrily, and everyone suddenly understood that the reason why Leslie saved ‘Raikkonen’ was because she forced ‘Raikkonen’ to hand over all the law fragments. Perhaps even Rostree was probably killed by Leslie.

This time Enquit and Vesilna’s last suspicion was gone, but Leslie gave Chen Rui a vicious stare.

Enquit didn’t care about the grievances between ‘Raikkonen’ and Leslie. The struggle between the team members was beneficial to his control. As for the ant Rostree, he did not even care whether he was dead or alive.

“Leslie, hand over Raikkonen’s share as well, and the rest 1 each.” Enquit spoke up, “Raikkonen, you will be the first to enter the door later.”

Although everyone was reluctant, there was no room for them to resist because Enquit pulled Vesilna to his side, so they had to take out their fragments obediently.

There were 24 pieces in total. Enquit began to draw a hexagram array on the ground, then he took out the purple stone slabs prepared in advance and arranged them in the corresponding positions. Chen Rui could see clearly that the ancient runes were engraved on those stone slabs.

These runes exuded a massive power breath, and the content was profound and mysterious. With Chen Rui’s current level, he could only understand the general meaning. This was still under the premise of getting Sariel’s guidance on the runes. Chen Rui guessed that these rune stone slabs were likely from Satan.

The center of the hexagram was Tiffany’s crystal coffin. Chen Rui and others placed each of the ancient runes’ stone slabs under the command of Enquit, then they placed the 24 fragments into the corresponding runes. The entire hexagram array began to emit a strange light, and the law fragments in the array gradually liquefied, glowing with the essence of crystal light. The liquid seeped into the crevices and inscriptions of the hexagram, vaguely forming an enormous symbol.

The liquefied crystal became gas again, and the star-like light enveloped the crystal coffin in the center. Chen Rui could see that although it had changed into a gas form, the law power had been further purified by the hexagram, reaching an extremely terrifying purity.

The crystal coffin stood up slowly, constantly absorbing this purified law power. The crystal coffin and the hexagram array were fading at a speed visible to the naked eye. It was as if the ‘pupa’ inside was absorbing and continuing to strengthen, and it was about to break out of the cocoon.

In half an hour, the crystal coffin had completely ’melted’, revealing the female body inside. The hexagram array and the stone slabs also turned into a cloud of purple energy. Tiffany’s light blue hair was moving while her body was floating. There was no veil on her face, revealing a delicate and beautiful face. Her closed eyes slowly opened.

Her pupils were black and white, which at first glance looked similar to the [Heart of Light and Dark] of the Lucifer Royal Family. However, that kind of breath was not only a light element or dark element power, but a breath that contained destruction and creation that seemed to be fused together. The strength of this breath had surpassed her original peak stage of the Demon Overlord level and leaped to the Kingdom level, and it was still rising.

Tiffany stretched out her hand and drew the ancient runes in the air. After each rune containing the power of light and darkness appeared, they gradually disappeared. It should be a long, difficult and esoteric chant.

Chen Rui had already been able to discern the meaning of these profound runes, but he just felt an indescribable ancient breath coming toward his face, and the feeling of looking up involuntarily poured out of his mind. Not only him but also everyone else.

Tiffany’s state at the moment was very strange. She seemed to have lost her consciousness. She was only driven by the power of the hexagram, like a marionette, to complete this chant.

That ancient and vicissitudes breath was becoming more and more intense. It was certain that once this chant was completed, the ‘door’ to the final destination, Chaos Realm, would be opened.

At this moment, Enquit’s ears moved as he suddenly sensed something. He turned his head to look at the sky in the distance and frowned. Then, Vesilna also noticed something abnormal. Chen Rui was the third one to sense it, and he clenched his fists lightly.

Wailing.

This was the wailing of the wandering spirits. There were 2 Demi-Gods, Enquit and Vesilna. Even if the group of the wandering spirits came over, there was nothing to be afraid of. However, this was definitely not the ordinary group of the wandering spirits.

Judging from the direction in which the sound spread, it was the island where everyone was!

With Chen Rui’s experience of hunting the wandering spirits, the scale and strength of this wail were at least tens of thousands of the wandering spirits! A group of wandering spirits of this size had at least 4-5 wandering spirits at the Demi-God level!

As the voice became clearer, the facial expressions of Enquit and Vesilna changed at the same time while Chen Rui’s eyes were full of astonishment. The number of the wandering spirits is probably much more than I estimated just now!

Judging from the wailing, the speed of the wandering spirits seems to be very fast, especially the power of the 20 or so voices in front is sufficient to even deter 2 Demi-Gods.

There are not 4-5 , but 20 wandering spirits of the Demi-God level!

“Vesilna!” A cold voice sounded in the distance. This voice sounded very familiar to Chen Rui. It was the ‘leader’ Keressa of the Sariel Team.

“I got to know from your 2 teammates about your gathering point.” Keressa’s voice was getting closer, “A special gift for you! Do you like it? Old friend!”

“Keressa! You’re not dead!” This time it was Vesilna’s turn to gnash her teeth. Not only was this enemy not dead, but she also launched a terrifying counterattack at this critical moment!

It turned out that the reason why Voss and Macy couldn’t come back was that they encountered Keressa who escaped from the last trap. They were forced by Keressa to reveal the gathering place, and their ending could be imagined.

Keressa knew that there were two Demi-Gods here. 1 was even at the peak stage of the Demi-God, which she couldn’t deal with, so she had attracted a large number of powerful wandering spirits to come, retaliating with the same way to avenge the vengeance just now.

“You guys protect Ms. Tiffany!” Enquit rose into the air while shouting loudly, “Vesilna, let’s divert the wandering spirits! Be sure to hold on until the door is opened!”

It was not that Enquit sacrificed himself to save others, but because the rest of these people were just powerhouses at the Kingdom level. They were unable to fight against Keressa and divert the wandering spirits away at all. Since it was the most critical moment now, in case of accidents and something happened to Tiffany, then he and the entire Satan Team would not be able to survive.

Vesilna also understood this. With a shrill sound, she turned into a lightning bolt and followed Enquit.

chapters.title: Chapter 895: The Last Symbol
chapters.body:
Chapter 895: The Last Symbol

Keressa’s judgment was not wrong. Chen Rui indeed used the power of the Evil Pupil.

His Evil Pupil was originally integrated by [Deep Analysis], and its power and control were far better than the average Evil Pupil. Although Keressa’s strength was Demi-God, the ‘quality’ of the Evil Pupil was far inferior than that of Chen Rui, and Chen Rui’s attack just now combined with [Red Star Territory] and [Winter Territory]. It was like a level suppression which directly counter Keressa’s ultimate move.

Keressa’s killing move was canceled, the power of the Evil Pupil buff disappeared, and her eyes could not see for a while, but she reacted very quickly. She condensed kingdom power around her to form protection in the shortest time. She was indeed a battle-hardened Demi-God level powerhouse.

Chen Rui didn’t answer. He was very aware of the ruthlessness and cunning of this opponent, plus Sariel had given them a powerful [Regeneration] ability, so she must not be taken lightly.

The destructive breath in Chen Rui’s hands began to condense at a high speed as his right arm glowed with red light. It was the most powerful [True Red Extinction].

The profound meaning of [True Red Extinction] was to compress power in a special way and then explode it. This was not a simple power compression, but a compression of law and faith power. The power that exploded after compression would be multiplied by squares.

The Star Power required for this move was several times that of [Pole Star Storm]. Although it was not a large-scale indiscriminate attack, its concentrated destructive power to fixed targets was far more than [Pole Star Storm].

Since Chen Rui was charging this biggest killing move, he obviously intended to kill with one blow. Powerful people could be hard to eliminate completely after all. At present, most of the purple mist around Tiffany had disappeared, and it would not take long for the ‘door’ to open. Enquit and Vesilna might also return at any time, so Keressa must be resolved as soon as possible before then.

Keressa was a Demi-God after all, and even a Demi-God medusa. Although she was hit hard by her own [Extreme Vicious Stare] recoil, she recovered quite fast. The Evil Pupil could no longer be used for a while, but her vision was almost restored. At this moment, she suddenly instinctively sensed a great danger as if she was surrounded by dozens of Demi-God level wandering spirits when she was luring the wandering spirits earlier. No, it was even more terrifying.

As long as the power he accumulated is released, I will surely die. Keressa clearly felt this, and the will that had been firm was actually shaking involuntarily. Her momentum suddenly weakened a bit, not only because the destruction law of [True Red Extinction] itself was extremely powerful, but also because of a mysterious power of ‘momentum’.

Intimidate the people before even killing them.

Although this move [True Red Extinction] seemed to be charging, it had actually taken effect.

Chen Rui suddenly turned his head and looked into the air on the left where a figure had already appeared. It was Enquit who had arrived by shifting.

Enquit looked at both sides in amazement and glanced over Keressa in the medusa form before she looked at Chen Rui, “Raikkonen… No! you’re not Raikkonen! Who are you?!”

Raikkonen was only at the early stage of the Kingdom level. Although this person’s appearance was Raikkonen, his power breath was at the Demi-God level, especially the terrifying breath charging in his right arm. Even him, a peak stage of the Demi-God, sensed danger.

This person pretended to be Raikkonen and lurked in the team. He must have an ulterior motive. Fortunately, he took the initiative to expose it, otherwise the consequences would be disastrous.

Enquit was also a scheming person. If these 2 enemies, ‘Raikkonen’ and Keressa, were fighting each other at another time, he would definitely make a good plan and take advantage of it, but the situation was very urgent now. The army of the wandering spirits behind might approach at any time, and Tiffany’s ritual was about to be completed. It was precisely the most critical moment.

No matter what the background of the other party is, they must be removed as soon as possible to avoid further problems.

As soon as Enquit thought of this, flames erupted from his body, covering his body and forming a set of black and red half-armor. As soon as the [Armor of Faith] appeared, his entire momentum suddenly skyrocketed. The flame suddenly turned into freezing air, and the nearby space began to crystallize out of thin air, then the crystals quickly spread toward Chen Rui and Keressa.

More than 80% of Enquit’s power was aimed at Chen Rui – This enemy posing as Raikkonen posed the greatest threat to Enquit. Even Keressa, who tricked Vesilna and him into danger, seemed to have suffered a big loss in the hands of this person, so he must be the first target to be finished off.

Chen Rui clearly sensed the killing intent of the opponent. At this time, [True Red Extinction]’s law compression was close to the peak. In the split second, he shouted loudly and unleashed the power in his hands. He abandoned Keressa and launched it to Enquit.

Keressa had almost regained her vision. She saw a red light swept past her body and flew toward Enquit. The light was not very bright, it had no amazing momentum, and its speed was not fast. It seemed like an ordinary attack, but Keressa’s snake pupils could see clearly that there seemed to be a ‘world’ that was constantly in destruction in the light.

The terror feeling made Keressa shudder, and she suddenly felt a tingling pain in her body as if she was being stabbed by countless sharp pointed needles. When she focused her mind, she realized that huge cracks appeared on her armor. Traces of high purity destruction power invaded through her body. This was only the force residual that passed by!

Enquit wanted to launch an attack, but he suddenly had a warning sign of extreme danger. The hairs on his body stood up. This dangerous level is even more dangerous than the ‘body bomb’ before! He decisively changed the charging power into defensive force.

The next second, he saw a red light.

That was not a red light, but an overwhelming destruction.

Enquit crossed his hands and made a closed posture. The space around his body suddenly turned into a huge crystal ball. The crystal ball stretched out countless criss-crossing ice crystal icicles and formed a huge shield. This was his strongest defensive skill. Both magic and physical attacks would be refracted in front of this giant shield.

However, the red light penetrated directly in this way. Wherever it passed, all obstacles evaporated and disappeared.

Enquit showed an unbelievable expression, and now he had been locked by the red light’s destructive breath. Let alone shifting, even ordinary teleportation could not be done. It was simply inevitable.

In the roar, Enquit’s body suddenly doubled in size. The kingdom’s faith and life force were raised to the peak stage. The countless solid and sharp ice crystals in the ice kingdom were like open fangs, facing the red light with all their strength.

The red light pierced through the ice crystal kingdom at a constant speed. Keressa saw the giant ice ball that emitted a strong cold air trembed, then it quickly collapsed into countless gravel-like substances. This collapse continued for nearly 1,000 kilometers. It turned out that Enquit’s body had been pushed into the distance.

There was still a red light flashing in front of Enquit, less than a meter away from his body, but the light had dimmed a lot. With a violent force, he finally completely crystallized the terrifying red light and smothered it in his hand.

When the red light turned into a crystal block, the [Armor of Faith] on Enquit’s upper body was completely shattered, and his enhanced state gradually returned to the original state. His face turned pale as he gasped for breath and his hands trembled involuntarily. He felt that the internal wounds he had suffered from facing the wandering spirits had more than doubled. He looked utterly horrified.

The power of this blow is actually so terrifying! A peak stage of the Demi-God like me had to go all out to resist it. If I made a tiny mistake just now…

If there is another blow like this…

Enquit looked at Chen Rui like he was a great enemy without any underestimation or slack. Keressa was even more frightened. If it was me just now, I’ll be annihilated like that kingdom ice ball!

The medusa rolled her eyes, “Let’s team up to kill him!”

Enquit was moved as he slowly flew closer. The strength of this ‘Raikkonen’ is too terrifying, and he could be called the biggest threat. In the current situation, it will be wise to join forces with that woman.

Chen Rui looked at Enquit coldly. In fact, the [True Red Extinction] attack just now consumed more power than during normal training. It seemed that the stronger the opponent was, the more Star Power and law power that the move absorbed. Although this move made the peak stage of the Demi-God powerhouse suffer a lot, he also exhausted 80% of his power.

If Enquit launches a counterattack at this time, I’m afraid it will be difficult to resist, plus there is a vicious and cunning medusa staring at me.

Most importantly, now is the last moment to open the door. I must not escape.

Chen Rui’s mind changed, and he already had an idea. He snorted coldly and raised his hand, that was holding something, to Enquit.

This was a snake pattern badge.

Enquit was shocked, and Chen Rui had already asked indifferently, “Do you still want to join forces with her to kill me?”

“So you are Sir Satan’s confidant.” Enquit said with a wry smile, “Just now…”

“If you didn’t try to kill me just now, I won’t take the initiative to attack you.” Chen Rui glanced at Keressa, “Now the time is pressing. Kill this cunning woman first, so that it doesn’t affect the time Ms. Tiffany opens the door!”

“Okay!” Enquit’s murderous aura rose, and the ice crystals around him began to condense again, locking on Keressa.

In fact, if it wasn’t for the terrifying strength shown by Chen Rui which left lingering fears on Enquit, even if he could prove the identity of ‘teammates’, Enquit might not admit it. He would even kill him.

In this world, fist was the greatest truth.

Keressa initially assumed that Chen Rui was related to Sariel, so she wanted to use Enquit to defeat him before gaining some advantage from within, but she didn’t expect Chen Rui to actually take out the ‘token’ of the Satan Team. She couldn’t help being horrified as she fell into the most dangerous situation.

—— I’m not the opponent for either 1 of them, let alone 2!

Keressa’s response was extremely fast. She immediately flew toward Tiffany, wanting to take the hostage.

Chen Rui and Enquit saw through her attempt, and they were about to stop her when Tiffany’s hand tapped a point in the air. The ‘point’ suddenly became bright, and the vast and ancient power around it suddenly increased tenfold, a hundredfold… Powerful and pure life force quickly radiated out.

No matter Keressa, Chen Rui, Enquit or Leslie who were in the distance, they were all blown away by the strong quake. Chen Rui and the other 2 could barely stabilize their body at a distance of hundreds of meters and could not take a step forward. Leslie had been repelled to 2km away.

This position was still moving backward with the enhancement of the symbol power.

Judging from the purple mist of law power, this should be the last symbol, and the most powerful one.

At this moment, there was a wailing sound from the rear. Chen Rui and the others all sensed something, and they turned around abruptly. They were shocked by the scene before them.

An endless wandering spirit sea.

The wandering spirits seemed to be attracted by the powerful life force emanating from the symbol, rushing toward it frantically.

The nearest Leslie was already surrounded by the wandering spirits. In the blink of an eye, she was drowned without a trace.

chapters.title: Chapter 896: Open
chapters.body:
Chapter 896: Open

“Stop the wandering spirits first! Or we’re all screwed!” Keressa screamed.

Keressa was right. Tiffany was behind them. Now was the last moment to open the door, if the ‘key’ fell into the hands of the wandering spirits and the door failed to open, neither Satan Team nor Sariel Team could complete the mission, and there was only death waiting for them.

In this situation, Chen Rui, Enquit all Keressa all temporarily gave up their previous grievances, divided into 3 directions, and joined forces to block the wandering spirits.

They could only resist and could not escape.

Next to Enquit, the projection of an ice and snow world became clearer and clearer. His shattered [Armor of Faith] was actually condensed again, but this time only the shoulder armor and breastplate were condensed, so the power buff had dropped a lot.

After all, resisting the [True Red Extinction] made him severely injured.

Enquit’s icy power did not have much restraint on the wandering spirits. He was just supressing them with pure strength. However, the defensive power of the ice crystals was very good, forming a series of barriers, blocking the Demi-God wandering spirits in the front.

The recoil of the Evil Pupil in Keressa had been basically suppressed. Her talent strength was extremely powerful. Especially now that she was in a medusa form, she could fully exert the power of [Petrify], and its lethality was far greater than that of Enquit. The wandering spirits solidified wherever she looked. Even the wandering spirits at the Demi-God level were no exception, but the speed of petrification was much slower. Furthermore, even if they shattered after solidifying, they would recondense.

The wandering spirits of the Kingdom and Demon Overlord levels were different. The Kingdom level could be reborn once or twice whereas the Demon Overlord level was directly turned into dust and annihilated. Although the Demon Overlord level belonged to the highest level of the ‘normal world’ outside, it was the lowest level of the pyramid here like a cannon fodder that could be disposed of at any time.

Chen Rui had already been equipped with the Wrath King Armor and the Sword of Fallen Angel. The armor of [Pole Star Transformation] was in energy form that could be fused with real armor, and it still looked like a Star Armor on the outside. The power of the Wrath King Armor was integrated into the current Red Star Armor, so there were no worries of spiritual erosion of the wandering spirits. The Sword of the Fallen Angel swung out layers of tidal wave-like gigantic sword qi, slashing toward the incoming wandering spirits. His fighting experience with the wandering spirits was quite rich. The wandering spirits were torn apart and annihilated under the overlapping giant sword qi and the gentle water wave.

The attacks of the 3 had shown great power, but they were still unable to stop the wandering spirit sea. Under normal circumstances, this lethality should be able to effectively attract the hatred and anger of the wandering spirits, but the current wandering spirit sea actually ignored the 3 as they all rushed wildly in Tiffany’s direction.

Enquit’s ice crystal barrier lasted for less than 1 minute before it completely collapsed.

Although Keressa’s [Petrify Kingdom] was extremely effective, it could not completely petrify due to the endless wandering spirits. The powerful wandering spirits with outstanding strength even shattered the outer petrified layer and continued to charge.

The situation on Chen Rui’s side was even worse. Facing the dense wandering spirit sea, although the [Overlapping Sword Qi]’s damage was greater, it couldn’t hold back the continuous incoming enemies. The wandering spirits that were cleared were instantly filled up. Even the original most effective [Ripple Sword Qi] was almost useless. It was true that [Ripple Sword Qi] could get rid of great power with little effort, but when the quantity reached an unacceptable level of ‘millions’, it was naturally insufficient.

A lot of the wandering spirits that had been eliminated had formed law fragments, but none of the 3 dared to collect them. They were attacking while retreating simultaneously as they could only slow down the turbulent tide of the wandering spirit sea. They were already less than a kilometer away from Tiffany.

More than half of Tiffany’s symbol had been completed, and the repulsive force generated was gradually weakening, but the breath of life was more and more intense, causing the wandering spirits to be more violent. The pressure on Chen Rui and the other 2 was multiplied.

The distance between the wandering spirit sea and Tiffany quickly shortened. 900 meters, 800 meters… In the blink of an eye, it was already less than 500 meters.

“ Roar! ” Chen Rui and Keressa heard a loud roar at the same time. In an instant, almost all their senses were rendered useless by the power of the roar.

Enquit had activated the battle form of the great demon, and his head suddenly doubled in size, making him look particularly ferocious. His kingdom changed from a world of ice and snow to a huge ice crystal head which roared just now.

This roar contained terrifying faith power. A large number of cracks appeared in the space as if countless bombs were detonated at the same time. A huge gap suddenly opened up in the wave of the wandering spirit sea in front, and all the wandering spirits within the range were torn apart to oblivion. The roar lasted for some time, and the gap continued to expand. The wave of wandering spirits at the edge of the gap were all rolled back.

Enquit’s strongest killing move, [Split God’s Roar]

As the peak stage of the Demi-God, Enquit finally showed his great strength. Of course, this was not what he wanted, but under the current situation, it was no longer an option to hide. As the roar gradually weakened, Enquit’s breath also weakened rapidly.

There were countless criss-crossing black lines around Keressa, dividing the space into countless facades. These black silk were her hair, or more precisely, countless venomous snakes. The kingdoms of the Demi-God level were all real projections. The kingdom of Enquit was a land of ice and snow while the kingdom of Keressa was actually the snake hair of the medusa!

There were terrifying poisons in the small spaces divided by the snakes. Unfortunately, these poisons had no effect on the wandering spirits, but the power of the facade of the small space was not only that. The spirits were all sucked in.

The number of the wandering spirits was extremely large, and those space facades swelled up quickly. Keressa’s eyes flashed, and the space facades burst open. The power of so many façades exploding at the same time was not as simple as 1 plus 1, but it exploded several times in a special superposition method. The wandering spirit sea on this side seemed to be torn into half by a pair of intangible giant hands. Keressa’s strongest was not the [Petrify] but the ‘explosive’ power!

This kind of power once let her escape from Vesilna’s trap before she came back and set a trap to trick Vesilna. Now facing the precarious situation, she finally launched her full strength.

Chen Rui’s side was also struggling. At this distance, [Pole Star Storm] would definitely not work. The only big move was [Scorching Dragon Roar]. However, just before he activated it, he had an idea, and he crushed the snake pattern badge without hesitation.

After a while, an irregular hole appeared in the space in front, and a figure appeared in the vision. This was an ordinary-looking young man, but he exuded a feeling of being one with the world. Although it exuded only the breath of Demi-God level, this kind of conception was beyond the reach of even Enquit, the peak stage of the Demi-God.

Satan!

One of the strongest Pseudo-Gods. To be precise, it was a Demi-God level avatar.

As soon as the avatar appeared, he fell into the encirclement of the wandering spirits. He didn’t seem to activate any means, yet the wandering spirits around him actually stopped. The power of time!

Chen Rui clearly sensed the familiar law power, and he was shocked. Satan actually has the same special time law as me!

With a wave of Satan’s hand, the wandering spirits retreated one after another. Chen Rui could see clearly that this ‘retreat’ was not being pushed away, but a reverse flow of time. While ‘retreating’, the wandering spirits quickly became weak and thin. By the time they ‘retreated’ back to the ‘original state’, they had been completely annihilated.

It turns out that time law can also be used like this! Chen Rui was excited. His current time law was limited to ‘pause’. It was almost impossible to change the flow rate, let alone reverse the time like Satan. It even dealt lethal damage.

All the wandering spirits in the circle around Satan were annihilated by this blow. Satan glanced at Enquit and Keressa in the other 2 directions, then he looked at Tiffany who drew the last symbol. A hint of doubt flashed past his eyes. Just before the avatar appeared, when the space was split, Chen Rui had activated [Sneak] and hid near Tiffany.

The avatar of Satan was only the strength of Demi-God, [Sneak] of the Super System was extremely wonderful, especially Chen Rui was still in the state of [Pole Star Transformation], so although Satan had already felt some strangeness, he still couldn’t find Chen Rui’s trace.

“The badge that summoned me should be…” Satan seemed to remember something and frowned, “Could that person be here too? Could it be that before he died…”

Without waiting for Satan to think for too long, the wandering spirit sea had approached again. Satan snorted and shook his hands. Countless tiny ripples appeared in front of him. This kind of ripples seemed ordinary, but with a high-speed and powerful shock force. The wandering spirits that rushed forward shattered and disintegrated into powder.

When Chen Rui saw this scene, the concept of ‘high-frequency weapons’ in the past life’s science fiction movies suddenly appeared in his mind. Satan’s means is exactly the same high-frequency concussion’s profound meaning. Even the previous time law should also be just the tip of the iceberg of Satan’s true power!

Although Enquit couldn’t check what happened on Chen Rui’s side, he noticed the arrival of Satan and seemed to be more diligent. Keressa also somewhat guessed it and felt uneasy.

Although powerful, Satan was a Demi-God avatar after all, it was impossible to completely eliminate this sea of wandering spirits. Moreover, a steady stream of the wandering spirits came from afar after being attracted by the breath of life. Let alone Demi -God, even a Pseudo-God might fall in this encirclement.

Satan glanced back at Tiffany, and he stretched out his hand. A powerful and pure power rushed over. This blow was not to hurt Tiffany but to assist her.

Tiffany’s black and white eyes flourished. The speed of drawing symbols suddenly accelerated, and the concentration of life breath also doubled.

This change agitated the group of wandering spirits immediately. Even Satan started to retreat under the terrifying pressure. It was even more difficult for Enquit and Keressa to resist. The group of wandering spirits that broke through from those 2 directions was less than 50 meters away from Tiffany!

Chen Rui was taken aback. Just as he was about to show up to resist the wandering spirits, Tiffany’s movements suddenly stopped. That the group of law purple mist had completely disappeared – The final symbol was completed!

In the space, a ‘door’ slowly opened.

The door to the final destination, the Chaos Realm, finally opened.

TL: They struggled so hard in this realm, what will they face in the next realm?

chapters.title: Chapter 897: Mysterious Corpse
chapters.body:
Chapter 897: Mysterious Corpse

Just when the door opened a gap, the wandering spirits that rushed over turned their heads and fled like they sensed the most terrifying thing.

In the blink of an eye, the entire sea of the wandering spirits receded like a tide.

Chen Rui was taken aback by this phenomenon. The wandering spirits, which will fight to the death, are actually scared away!

Immediately afterward, Chen Rui sensed a strange breath emanating from the ‘door’ opened by Tiffany. This breath did not spread fast, but when Chen Rui wanted to dodge, he found that he had already been shrouded in it. This ancient and mysterious strength seemed to be above the law.

In an instant, all kinds of thoughts, such as eternity, immortality, imperishable, and so on emerged from Chen Rui’s mind at the same time. He was unable to maintain the state of [Sneak] and revealed himself.

The moment he showed his figure, he suddenly felt 2 blade-like sharp qi falling on his back. When he turned around, he happened to meet Satan’s gaze.

There was a hint of surprise in Satan’s eyes, and there was more ice cold murderous intent – Yes, it’s this human! Back then, he was only a Demon Overlord ant, but he has actually advanced to the level of a Demi-God, and he can actually activate the secret skill of concealment under my eyes, a Pseudo-God (avatar)! I actually haven’t noticed him yet!

This was not the most critical issue. There was only 1 type of person who could enter the Ghastly Floating Land apart from those super powerhouses whom Satan himself sent to assist Tiffany, and that was his old enemy, Sariel!

The next second, the mysterious ancient breath suddenly changed. Chen Rui only felt an irresistible suction, and he was sucked in by the door.

Those who were sucked in were Tiffany, Keressa, Enquit, and the countless wandering spirits that had no time to escape.

The only exception was Satan. The avatar was getting dimmer while watching Chen Rui’s disappearing figure with a sneer on his face. The gaze seemed to be watching a corpse entering the incinerator.

Soon, the avatar turned into nothingness with a pop .

The mysterious door opened just a little bit. After sucking them as well as a large group of the wandering spirits, it gradually closed again before disappearing into the air as if nothing had happened just now. Only the wandering spirits fleeing in panic in the distance witnessed what had just existed.

After Chen Rui was devoured into the door, before he had time to see the surroundings, he felt that his body and soul trembled at the same time. All the strength, especially the life force and faith power, began to flow away quickly. Even the Star Armor on his body gradually faded.

Chen Rui was taken aback. He tried to use the kingdom power with all his strength to fight against it, but he couldn’t resist. Star armor, including the Wrath King Armor, which was known as the strongest armor, was useless in front of this strange devour power.

As Chen Rui’s thoughts moved, he had recalled the avatar Shura and merged with him. He put away the strength of [Pole Star Transformation], and the Star Armor quickly disappeared. At the same time, a faint black hole appeared beside him. The devour power of the black hole and the devour force in the space counteracted each other. However, even if he cast the black hole together with Shura, it still could not completely offset the strange suction. It just became much slower than before.

Chen Rui finally got a chance to breathe. He calmed down and secretly operated the Super System, integrating the faith power and life force of the solar system in the Super System into his body. It was equivalent to replenishing his lost strength.

The faith power and life force of a large solar system were extremely amazing. Even if part of it had been lost, it was quickly replenished, so the real consumption was not very large. After Chen Rui quickly adapted to the devouring power, he could see the surrounding environment clearly.

Chaos Realm, as the name suggested, was full of chaos and indistinctness, but due to the devouring power, the body was moving forward involuntarily as if attracted by something. There was no way to resist it.

“ Ah! ” A sharp scream sounded from behind. It was actually Keressa whose body had begun to collapse.

Enquit’s condition was not much better. Although he was at the peak stage of the Demi-God where his power of kingdom and life was far better than that of Keressa, he couldn’t stand this rapid consumption. The [Armor of Faith] on his body had long disappeared. It wouldn’t be long before he followed the footsteps of Keressa.

Not just Keressa and Enquit, but the wandering spirits as well. The wandering spirits rapidly faded and dimmed as they were sucked forward. This was true annihilation. Even law fragments couldn’t be condensed, and they couldn’t reborn.

Besides Chen Rui, there was only 1 person who could keep calm in this terrifying environment, and that was Tiffany.

Tiffany’s skin faintly sparkled. Although her life force was also flowing away, she seemed to be well prepared. There was no abnormality on her body. Chen Rui could see that this was not Tiffany’s own strength, but the role of a special item. The secret method should be used in the item to reserve a lot of faith power and life force, so Tiffany was not affected.

However, the power of this item was limited. Once it was exhausted, Tiffany’s life would also dry up.

After Tiffany opened the door, she had recovered from that unconscious state. She noticed Chen Rui’s gaze and glanced back at him. Although she was a little surprised that he didn’t have any abnormality, she didn’t pay much attention to it.

In less than 10 minutes, Keressa’s life force had been completely exhausted, and she finally turned into ashes and disappeared. Even if her scheming was deep, she still couldn’t resist in the face of absolute strength.

The next who was annihilated was Enquit. At this time, the rest of the Demi-God level wandering spirits had also disappeared, leaving only Tiffany and Chen Rui in the huge space. They continued to fly forward under the influence of that strange suction force.

Another 2 hours passed. Tiffany looked back again, and she found that Chen Rui was still unscathed. She finally showed a surprised gaze – This person should be the opponent to get the silver box, and he also has some kind of special item like me, but my item is made by Teacher Satan with great effort. Its power is definitely far superior to the opponent’s. As long as the opponent’s item strength is exhausted, he will be dead.

Chen Rui didn’t know Tiffany’s thoughts. He tried to activate the [Star Gate] just now, but received an unexpected prompt, “The strength of the controller is not enough to cross the S-level space seal and above.”

S-level space?

When I was traveling through the human world, it was prompted as A-level space. Although I don’t understand the specific details of this hierarchy level, it is certain that this Chaos Realm of ‘S-level and above’ is far superior than the human world and the Demon Realm.

At the Ghastly Floating Land just now, he also tried to set the star point and turn on the [Star Gate], but after passing the ‘door’, it could not be activated. It seemed that if he wanted to leave here, he could only figure out another way.

The devour power in front suddenly heightened. Chen Rui and Tiffany trembled at the same time as if they had passed through a certain barrier. Immediately afterward, their eyes lit up, and the infinite chaos finally disappeared. They were greeted by a brand new scene.

This was an endless universe. From a distance, one could see the faint planet, just like the planets of the Super System, but it was countless times larger than that planet as if it was a real universe.

The previous feeling of eternity, immortality, imperishable… reappeared and intensified countless times. Correspondingly, the power of life and faith flowed away faster.

Chen Rui frowned slightly: This should be the real Chaos Realm, which no longer has the suction force that makes one unable to control the body. I can fly freely in this space. The silver box should be somewhere in the Chaos Realm. The question is, where is it? It’s impossible to search each planet, right? This universe is vast. Even if I can survive here with the Super System, even if with a lifespan of hundreds of thousands of years, it is like looking for a needle in a haystack.

Chen Rui thought while following behind Tiffany.

Tiffany looked at this strange man like he was her mortal enemy. She had been sleeping in the crystal coffin previously, so she did not know that this ‘Raikkonen’ was a member of the ‘Satan Team’, not to mention that Chen Rui was not the real Raikkonen.

Although Tiffany was vigilant, she did not dare to act rashly. Although she had been cleansed in law power in the ritual of opening the door, she had benefited a lot and could break through to the Kingdom level at any time, but this person’s strength was obviously far better than the ordinary Kingdom level powerhouse. If she fought recklessly, she would not be an opponent.

“Ms. Tiffany, don’t be nervous. In fact… we are old friends.” Chen Rui tried it, and this space did not hinder the transmission of sound.

Tiffany didn’t make a sound, and the alert in her eyes became stronger.

“Remember what happened on the 4th floor of the Bloody Empire’s Book Collection Hall?” Chen Rui shook his head, “I brought you out.”

“It’s you?” Tiffany raised her delicate eyebrows, and she saw Chen Rui’s face changed. No doubt it was the person who saved her back then.

Tiffany’s expression eased slightly, but she didn’t let her guard down, “Why… why did you come here?”

“2 purposes.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Firstly, to find something; secondly, to bring you back safely.”

Tiffany directly ignored the second ‘purpose’ and sneered secretly. No doubt it is for the silver box! The mission this time is extremely important to me. No matter what the origin of this person is, I cannot let him succeed!

Tiffany became more and more alert as she nodded calmly. Without speaking, her eyes looked into the distance, and she was shocked.

Chen Rui followed her gaze and also showed an astonished expression.

A mysterious thing appeared far away.

It appeared to be a human body.

Chen Rui’s first impression of this human body was ‘gigantic’.

Huge, vast, even…boundless.

In fact, Chen Rui and Tiffany were far away from the ‘human body’, but even looking at it from a distance, they could feel the unimaginable size.

The strange thing was that this human body had no life at all. It seemed to be dead or it had fallen into a deep sleep.

At the moment of seeing the human form, Chen Rui and Tiffany simultaneously had a trembling deep in their souls as if they had to look up at this ‘corpse’ whenever and wherever it was.

Relying on the power of the Super System, Chen Rui gradually suppressed the abnormality in his soul, but another feeling surged- This ‘corpse’ contained a might that could not be described in words. A gaze or even a thought could completely annihilate him.

Chen Rui couldn’t help shivering, and he subconsciously used the [Analytical Eyes]. The corpse’s shape suddenly changed. It was not a corpse, but countless stars. To be precise, a solar system!

A complete solar system, or rather, a small universe!

chapters.title: Chapter 898: Twilight Of The Gods?
chapters.body:
Chapter 898: Twilight Of The Gods?

Chen Rui’s [Analytical Eyes] just now was a combination of [Deep Analysis] and the power of the Evil Pupil. He didn’t expect to see such a small universe!

The ‘small universe’ was surrounded by a magnificent might like the enormous energy in the real universe, but there was no trace of life or faith as if it was completely dormant.

With a slight distraction, the ‘small universe’ in his eyes changed back to ‘corpse’.

He couldn’t see the face nor the gender, but he could clearly sense the existence of the ‘human shape’.

Even the [Analytical Eyes] couldn’t keep peeping at the power of the ‘small universe’. If this ‘corpse’ is really a complete life entity, it must be some kind of supreme existence, then his (her) current state is an eternal sleep? Or is he (she)truly dead?

The ‘corpse’ was not stationary; it slowly flew toward his side.

Chen Rui didn’t dare to get close to peep. Not only because of the trembling due to looking up at it, but also because the huge ‘corpse’ gave him a strong sense of danger. He instinctively realized that although the ‘corpse’ had no life breath, the terrifying might contained in it was a real existence. With his current strength, let alone attacking or exploring the ‘small universe’, as long as he got close to a certain extent, he would be completely turned into the dust of the universe under the terrifying strength.

All of a sudden, Chen Rui only felt a shake, and he seemed to be in a new boundless space. Faint clouds surged on the ground, exuding powerful energy everywhere, as if every grass and tree was an extremely terrifying presence.

In the sky, there seemed to be a pair of eyes slowly opening. Those eyes with indescribable power looked down at everything on the ground.

In an instant, the previous trembling of the body and soul reappeared, and it was 100 times stronger. A strong feeling of awe appeared in Chen Rui’s heart. While resisting, a voice like a Sanskrit chanting sounded in his ears.

“Faithful ones will get eternity.”

“Faithful ones will get immortality.”

“Faithful ones…”

Every time the voice sounded, Chen Rui’s willpower weakened slightly. He seemed to be integrated into this space and became a part of it.

At a critical moment, the Super System in his consciousness began to operate and devoured those invading soul powers. At the same time, the Wrath King Armor on his body emitted a faint brilliance. Chen Rui abruptly woke up and secretly breathed a sigh of relief. If I lost consciousness just now, my soul would be completely controlled. My everything will be taken over and devoured by this space.

I must break through the space as soon as possible and escape from this place.

After the activation of [Red Pole Star Transformation], the Super System would enter a hibernation state, but the planets’ faith power and life force would not be exhausted. Functions such as storage warehouses could also be used as usual, but the active skills could not be activated. Over time, this hibernation would slowly cancel. Now several hours have passed since the last activation of the [Red Pole Star Transformation], so the Super System had not been completely ‘unfrozen’ and was in a semi-dormant state. Hence, he could only use basic skills such as the [Analytical Eyes]. If he wanted to use skills like [Red Pole Star Transformation] or [Scorching Dragon Roar], he had to wait for at least another day.

In this situation, the speed of the system to resolve the abnormal force was much slower than usual, and the abnormal force that invaded the soul was very powerful. Even under normal conditions, it might not be able to resolve simultaneously.

Chen Rui sensed that his soul began to blur again, especially the sound similar to Sanskrit chanting was incessant in his ears. After closing the hearing, it actually sounded in his mind. Chen Rui bit the tip of his tongue, regained his sanity, and flickered his body into 3 figures.

Chen Rui did not activate a Super System’s skill but the killing move after integrating Shura.

“[Supernova Explosion]!”

Avatar Shura and Chen Rui’s original body strength were synchronized, and they were both peak stages of the Kingdom level. The [Star Explosion] was activated by 3 avatars at the same time. The stacked power was far more than the ordinary 3 times. It was Shura’s strongest attack.

The terrifying power spread, and a bright light lit up in the space. It was even more dazzling than the sun as if the sun exploded.

Although without the power of [Red Pole Star Transformation], this attack should be equivalent to the attack of the early stage of the Demi-God.

However, under such a huge impact, there was not even a single crack on the ground. Even those faint clouds were not changed at all, as if the [Supernova Explosion] was just a light sigh.

What exactly is this place? Chen Rui was shocked as he didn’t expect such a result.

The mocking intent in the eyes in the sky increased. Chen Rui felt the trembling of his soul more violently. When his mind moved, there was a mask on his face. It was the God-Eating Mask that was immune to the spirit erosion. That kind of weird feeling was immediately isolated.

Although the outside interference was isolated, some kind of strength that had entered the soul still could not be eliminated. It was spreading faster than the resolving speed of the Super System.

“Faithful ones will be imperishable…”

Chen Rui’s body trembled as sweat poured down like rain. He shouted angrily, and he held a sword in his hand.

The Sword of Fallen Angel.

Like the Wrath King Armor, the Sword of Fallen Angel also flashed with an unprecedented light. Even the God-Eating Mask on his face seemed so.

Chen Rui was trying his best to resist the invasion power in his soul. He didn’t have time to think about these details, and he stabbed with the sword.

This sword was stabbed backward.

It was actually stabbed into his own body.

Before that, he had already controlled that part of the protection of the Wrath King Armor to change its position, so the sword passed through without the slightest hindrance.

After this ‘self-mutilation’ stab, his sanity gradually became clear – the Sword of Fallen Angel had the special attribute of [Soul Searing]. After stabbing the enemy, it would directly kill and split the enemy’s soul power, and it could also devour the enemy’s flesh into his own power. As Chen Rui was the master of the Sword of Fallen Angel, his own soul and flesh and blood would not be affected by [Soul Searing], but the invading soul would be quickly killed and split.

With the annihilation of the invading soul, this space, including the eyes in the sky, began to fade gradually before finally disappearing. Chen Rui’s eyes dazzled, and he returned to the original Chaos Realm. He just held the Sword of Fallen Angel in his hand and maintained a ‘self-mutilation’ posture. Everything just now was actually not an illusion!

Chen Rui’s first reaction was not to draw his sword, but to fly at full speed because he was now a lot closer to the ‘corpse’. To be precise, he should have been affected by some kind of power just now and actively flew to the ‘corpse’.

Not only him, but also Tiffany. The closer she got to the ‘corpse’, the faster her life force and faith power flowed away. It was like a universe black hole that devoured everything.

Chen Rui responded quickly. With a flick of his body, he used the [Light Boom], grabbed Tiffany, who was muddle-headed, and flew in the opposite direction. They finally got rid of the terrifying feeling.

The ‘corpse’ didn’t react at all. It just floated on its own and gradually moved away.

Chen Rui didn’t pull out the Sword of Fallen Angel stabbed in his body until he flew to a safe distance where he didn’t feel any danger or strangeness. Compared with the great danger just now, this kind of pain was nothing at all. With his physique, he would heal up quickly.

Chen Rui took a deep breath as he wiped the cold sweat on his forehead. The ‘corpse’ should be dormant. The danger just now should be its own ‘passive special attribute’, which can automatically devour nearby life entities to become a part of itself.

There is actually such a terrifying presence!

If the ‘corpse’ regains consciousness…

Chen Rui recalled the encounter in the strange space, and he suddenly thought of something. He was shocked: Could this ‘corpse’ be…

Tiffany, who was caught by Chen Rui, gradually opened her eyes, and her gaze was clear. Her soul seemed to be unaffected or she had some kind of protection item. Looking at the huge ‘corpse’ far away, Tiffany seemed to recall what happened just now. She took a few deep breaths with lingering fear, broke free from his hand, and said softly, “Thank you.”

“Do you know what that is?” Chen Rui, seeing that Tiffany seemed to know more about this Mysterious Land than him, pointed to ‘corpse’ and asked.

Tiffany glanced at him and flew forward silently. Chen Rui thought about it for a while, and he continued to follow without asking more.

About 2 days later, the light on Tiffany’s body had dimmed a little, indicating that the reserves of faith and life force had been consumed a lot. Chen Rui had the power of the planets of the Super System which continuously and automatically generated life force and faith power, so the loss was lower.

Tiffany was not flying aimlessly. She seemed to be moving forward according to some sense, and she was well prepared. She also brought a lot of food so that she could replenish her strength from time to time. Chen Rui’s storage warehouse had more food, but after entering the super-level, he no longer needed to rely on food to maintain his life, so he occasionally offered food to Tiffany, but the other party just shook her head and refused.

Chen Rui knew very well that Tiffany still had a strong vigilance against him in her mind. If he asked the silver box or other related questions, he would definitely not get an answer. Anyway, his mission here was to protect Tiffany. The silver box was secondary, so he did not insist.

The huge ‘corpse’ appeared in front again; this time it was 2.

As before, the 2 ‘corpses’ also had unclear faces, but there was a similarity – ‘universe’. Each ‘corpse’ was a ‘small universe’.

With the lessons learned from the past, this time Chen Rui and Tiffany both pulled themselves together and cautiously stayed away from the 2 ‘corpses’. No doubt, as long as a safe distance was maintained, the 2 ‘corpses’ seemed to be truly dead without any reaction or threat.

As Chen Rui watched the 2 huge ‘corpses’ go away, a familiar term appeared in his mind: ‘Twilight of the Gods’.

chapters.title: Chapter 899: The Destruction Palace And The Silver Box
chapters.body:
Chapter 899: The Destruction Palace And The Silver Box

Are these ‘corpses’… god?

In an instant, many of the mysteries in Chen Rui’s mind became clear.

No wonder, over the years, the Demon Realm, including the human world, has no miracles. Thus, Michael and the other 3 archangels have the guts and even successfully steal Light God’s faith!

Chen Rui and Leslie once discussed the issue of the Ghastly Floating Land’s wandering spirits, and Leslie deduced from the law fragment that the wandering spirits were probably formed after the annihilation of real powerhouses. These powerhouses were quite powerful during their lifetimes, so they could become wandering spirits after death, and the worst powerhouses in the Ghastly Floating Land were the wandering spirits at the Demon Overlord level.

The wandering spirits that Chen Rui encountered in the Ghastly Floating Land, including the ‘sea’ that Keressa brought up, should be just a tiny bit in the vast space. One could imagine what terrifying war occurred when the wandering spirits were formed. The number of deaths at that time must be several times the number of the wandering spirits.

This battle is likely to be the legendary ‘Twilight of the Gods’.

Linking to these mysterious and powerful ‘corpses’, it is enough to explain why the Ghastly Floating Land has so many powerful soul entities. Compared with these supreme beings, Demon Overlord level, Kingdom level, or even Demi-God and Pseudo-God, are all just an ants who can be easily sacrificed.

Having said that, even if the ‘corpse’ is indeed the legendary god, no one can be sure whether they are truly dead. However, it is certain that even if they are not dead, they have fallen into some kind of deep sleep.

Chen Rui now had more new questions. What is it that caused these supreme beings to go into deep sleep?

What is the truth about ‘Twilight of the Gods’?

What is the silver box?

With all kinds of doubts, Chen Rui followed Tiffany to continue traveling in this mysterious Chaos Realm.

7 days passed. Along the way, the 2 encountered several huge ‘corpses’. They carefully avoided them, and there wasn’t any danger.

For the past 7 days, Tiffany had been moving almost without sleep. The crystal light on her body had dimmed a lot, and it seemed that her reserves of life and faith were almost exhausted. Given her current strength in this environment, the willpower displayed was astonishing. Just as Chen Rui felt in the brief communication with Tiffany, she had an extraordinary persistence. This persistence itself should not be purely for the silver box. Perhaps it was for something else.

This was a girl with a story.

Suddenly, Tiffany stopped.

“Don’t follow me anymore.”

For the first time since the past few days, she said, “If you keep going, you will die.”

Chen Rui was stunned. He could hear that Tiffany’s words were not malicious, but a tone of advice. Perhaps for the sake of his ‘saving grace’ in the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall. As for Chaos Realm, she had already determined that he had ulterior motives. From Tiffany’s attitude, they were about to reach a certain destination soon. That place would be dangerous.

Chen Rui pondered a little and asked, “So, tell me. How can I get out of here?”

Tiffany glanced at him, “Why come in if you don’t know how to get out?”

Chen Rui shrugged. He really didn’t know as Sariel didn’t say anything.

However, Sariel once said a sentence when he entered the door on the 5th floor of the ancient magic tower.

When necessary, I allow you to summon my avatar.

That’s right, this should be the only way to get out. In other words, if I can’t complete the mission of getting the silver box, then even if I summon Sariel, it’s impossible that he will let me go back.

Tiffany shook her head and continued to fly forward. Chen Rui followed her and smiled, “Since it is more dangerous in front, I can’t leave. As I said, I will protect you.”

Tiffany frowned, and didn’t speak again. To her, the excuse for ‘protection’ was so lame that even a child wouldn’t be deceived – Since he doesn’t listen to advice, then let him dig his own grave.

After about a day, there were finally some changes in the front.

It was not a scene of universe stars, but clusters of mists covering a very wide area which made it blurry. Chen Rui felt a very pure destructive breath in that mist.

This kind of destructive breath was inevitably terrifying for even a super powerhouse, but Tiffany rushed in without hesitation.

No doubt, as soon as they entered, the 2 were wrapped in the destruction power.

This was law power.

Destruction law could radiate its strongest power unhindered in this kind of space. The closer they were to the front, the stronger the destructive power. If the previous space life force and faith power were to be devoured, then it was to be destroyed here. The power they consumed here was 10 times greater than before.

Not only the wear and tear, but Chen Rui’s body also began to fade a little bit. His mind moved slightly, and he activated the destruction law he had comprehended. The situation suddenly changed, and the 2 laws began to cancel and ‘destruct’ each other. They were in a stalemate.

The brilliance of Tiffany’s body began to light up again. Her body did not seem to be afraid of destructive power, but she needed to maintain the output of faith power and life force. Chen Rui could see that although the brilliance was bright, her strength was waning. The brightness now was equivalent to shining inward.

Tiffany knew this too, so she sped up abruptly and flew forward with all her might, trying to race against the clock.

The mist in front seemed to have changed. It was not blurry, but it had solidified into a corresponding shape. The strength and concentration of the destruction law in this area had reached an extremely terrifying level. Even Chen Rui’s destruction law was not enough to make ends meet. The life force and faith power were rapidly consumed at a staggering speed.

The brilliance around Tiffany suddenly flourished and was extremely dazzling, but just as Chen Rui expected, it began to dim quickly after the brilliance.

“No…” Tiffany rushed forward with all her strength, trying to reach her destination before the brilliance disappeared, but all the brilliance had been extinguished, and a terrifying destruction law completely wrapped her.

Tiffany, who had lost the protection of the brilliance, seemed to be facing a great crisis. She had a desperate expression – With her physique of ‘light and dark body’, she could completely accommodate this kind of law without harm, but her own consciousness and soul would be completely erased and become a ‘tool’ that had lost its soul.

It was also equivalent to the death of the person ‘Tiffany’.

If this mission could be completed, she could completely restore her freedom, and Teacher Satan would grant her another wish, which was her biggest motivation.

However, these days, she had been rushing desperately, but she was still slow.

It was only a little bit slower, but it was still slow.

1 step away was the difference between life and death.

I consumed too much faith power and life force prepared in advance with the secret method on the road. As a result, it is completely exhausted when I am about to reach the final destination.

I’m not willing…

Not willing to die here…

I still want to go to that place…

I still want to see…

Mommy…

Just when Tiffany’s consciousness gradually blurred, a peculiar breath wrapped around her. This breath gave her a warm feeling, like a mother’s embrace in a dream.

Tiffany became conscious and found that she was being held by that person with ulterior motives. The faith power and life force were continuously transmitted from that person into her body to resist the fatal invasion of the destruction law.

Tiffany’s gaze became cold again, and her body tightened, but she didn’t struggle because she knew that if she left this strong protection, her soul would be wiped out. At that time, even if her ‘body’ completed the mission, it would have no meaning.

I didn’t expect this person’s strength to be so powerful. That kind of life force and faith power seems to be endless, and he can easily travel in this terrifying law land.

It’s a pity that his purpose of saving me is for the silver box. Once he finds the silver box later, I will lose value.

“Over there…” Tiffany pointed to the side. She had no choice at present. She could only find the silver box with the help of this person’s strength, then it was up to their own means.

Chen Rui moved quickly in the direction indicated by Tiffany. After passing through a few mists, the scene changed and he saw a palace.

This was a huge and splendid palace with majestic momentum. The moment Chen Rui saw the palace, the power of destruction law beside him suddenly collapsed.

The destructive breath emitted by this palace was the purest law power, which was many times stronger than the outside world. It could annihilate any matter, and Chen Rui’s law power was easily defeated.

Chen Rui instinctively felt that in the next second, his body and soul would collapse.

Even the Wrath King Armor could not resist it.

So, he merged with Shura’s power without thinking.

At the moment of incorporation, the surging law power had penetrated Chen Rui’s body.

Chen Rui clearly felt that not only was his body not damaged, but he had ‘retained’ part of his law power, which corresponded to his own comprehension of the destruction law. He felt that his law had actually benefited a lot. Some of the ‘retained’ part gradually dissipated while some were absorbed by Chen Rui.

Now when he looked at the palace again, it seemed to have changed again. It was no longer a tangible entity or a mist illusion, but a combination of special rhythms. The purest power of destruction law!

This is a palace of destruction law!

Tiffany looked at Chen Rui, who seemed unaffected, in horror. She had already sensed it when Chen Rui’s law collapsed, so she thought that this person would definitely die. I didn’t expect him to be safe and sound!

Not even my teacher, the mighty Pseudo-God Satan, dared to set foot in this place in person!

That’s why he took great efforts to cultivate me as a chess piece!

This man actually can!

Chen Rui hugged Tiffany while shuttling in the Destruction Palace, quietly comprehending the mysteries of these laws.

He had Shura’s destruction body. These laws might be the most lethal weapon to others, but they were a great nourishment for him. Tiffany was a light and dark body, so she could also survive in this environment. As long as Chen Rui kept providing faith power and life force, her consciousness would not be obliterated.

After figuring out the general context of law, Chen Rui clearly felt that the entire palace was an epic-like law. However, according to this structure, it should be derived from an origin.

This origin should be the only goal of the Pseudo-Gods’ mission, the silver box!

Silver box is right in this Destruction Palace!

TL: Will Chen Rui just give Tiffanny the silver box?

chapters.title: Chapter 900: The Second Silver Box
chapters.body:
Chapter 900: The Second Silver Box

After comprehending the law vein of the Destruction Palace, Chen Rui finally realized that the Destruction Palace should have been derived from an origin. In other words, the Destruction Palace was an illusion created by the origin.

Of course, this ‘illusion’ was not bluffing, but fatal.

The origin was in the palace, and it might be hidden anywhere or not anywhere. However, as long as the law of this palace was cracked, the origin could be found.

However, even Pseudo-Gods couldn’t bear the law power of the Destruction Palace, let alone cracking it.

The destruction law was not a single one, but it could derive myriad changes. Everyone’s understanding was different. With the special avatar of Shura, Chen Rui could touch a part of the origin power, but unfortunately, the comprehension and understanding were only in a relatively elementary stage. He could not reach the height of the true ‘origin’.

The Destruction Palace was a manifestation derived from the origin law. As far as Chen Rui’s current level was concerned, it was impossible to crush the law power of the palace, but he did not need to use absolute strength to suppress it. An ant hole may cause the collapse of a great dike. Theoretically, the palace could collapse on its own by influencing some of the nodes.

Only origin power could ‘influence’ origin nodes, so Chen Rui needed to use Shura’s power. Shura was another destruction entity derived from the silver box, which itself represented a part of origin. Of course, there was still a big difference between theory and practice. Chen Rui serached for a long time, and relying on the strength of [Deep Analysis], he only roughly understood the structure of the entire palace law, but he could not even find a node that could cause an influence. It was like a student who didn’t have sufficient writing skill. He wanted to try to revise the masterpiece of an adult writer, but he didn’t know how to start even though he obviously had a pen and a dictionary in hand.

Tiffany was in Chen Rui’s arms and didn’t struggle or interfere. She just watched him fly around the palace indifferently. She understood that this person was looking for the silver box, but even the ‘key’ like her had to use some kind of ritual and sacrifice some things to find the clue of the silver box. It was delusional for this person to seek directly.

The problem was that now she had fallen into the hands of this person, and she had to rely on that kind of life force and faith power to maintain the existence of her soul, so she must be patient and wait until this person was out of ideas before she could try to negotiate with him again.

Chen Rui used the power of [Deep Analysis] to quickly calculate while thinking, but the more he calculated, the more complicated it was. This kind of comprehension thing was very mysterious, which could not be analyzed by simple data. After several failed attempts, he simply closed [Deep Analysis]. He no longer thought about cracking and influencing. He purely used Shura’s origin to feel the origin of the palace.

Gradually, this change had unexpected effects. After a period of mutual repel and cancellation, the 2 origins finally became complementary and merged together. Shura’s origin had grown a lot, or rather, the origin of destruction was more complete.

An inspiration flashed in Chen Rui’s mind. It turns out to be like this! As long as I can complete Shura’s origin to comprehend and master the most original destruction law, I can truly reach the peak of the Red Pole Star Emperor in order to break through to the next realm.

Chen Rui couldn’t help laughing because he had not only mastered the general mystery of the Destruction Palace, but he also clarified the way forward.

In Tiffany’s surprised gaze, Chen Rui pointed at a pillar of the palace. In Tiffany’s eyes, it was a pillar, but in Chen Rui’s eyes, it was a law node. Even a Demi-God might not be able to sense it, but Chen Rui could clearly see it.

He was not using Shura’s destructive power at this moment, but an extremely rich life force. Just like when he defeated Shura at the beginning, what he activated was the ‘creation’ power which was the opposite to destruction. Life was the greatest creation.

The life force was devoured by the destruction law in an instant, but the law node was also influenced by it. The pillar suddenly cracked, and even that part of the ceiling collapsed, instantly turning into a mist that could not be recovered.

Although Tiffany didn’t understand what was going on, she was very clear that the Destruction Palace was made out of the strongest destruction law. Even Teacher Satan himself would not be able to destroy it, and it was actually easily destroyed by this man!

Immediately afterward, Chen Rui quickly flew and pointed in the palace. Wherever he passed, a large area collapsed, making it seem incomplete. After his last move, the entire palace collapsed. Those mist seemed to be attracted by something and quickly gathered at one point. The silver light gradually became clear, and it condensed into a square box that floated in the air.

Silver box! Tiffany was shocked. This person actually found the silver box!

Chen Rui released Tiffany and flew toward the silver light. Of course, he didn’t forget to release a cluster of power to protect her.

The shock in Tiffany’s eyes gradually dissipated, replaced by despair.

Since he found the silver box, she had lost her use value. Even if he did not kill her and abandon her here, as long as the protection on her body was exhausted, her soul would vanish.

Chen Rui grabbed the familiar silver box. No doubt it was the same as the Dark Moon’s.

He thought about it and opened the box. In an instant, the flow speed of life force suddenly increased thousands of times.

Then, Chen Rui saw the destruction.

Destruction is the principle of the universe. Everything has a death, including the universe itself, but death does not mean the end. Instead, it is the transfer of energy, which is another kind of creation…

Chen Rui’s eyes were red. He had already realized something when he was exploring the Destruction Palace. Now the sense was clearer and more complete. Shura’s origin had become complete in this realization.

The destruction disappeared in an instant because Chen Rui had closed the silver box.

The silver box might have other more special functions, but for him, he had already gained something valuable of his own.

The only thing that was strange was that there was no small box inside this silver box.

Chen Rui remembered very clearly that inside the silver box of the Dark Moon, there was a smaller box. What’s going on?

What is that little box?

This kind of thinking was interrupted by the muffled sound on the side. It turned out that the life force devoured when the silver box was opened was thousands of times that of the ordinary state, so the protective power on Tiffany’s body had been exhausted in an instant. She was wrapped in destruction breath, and was about to die.

Chen Rui immediately shifted in front of Tiffany and waved his hand. A thick cluster of life force and faith power wrapped Tiffany, making her recover.

At this moment, a whirlpool-shaped exit appeared at the place where the silver box was initially floating. Chen Rui’s eyes lit up: Could this be the passage to exit the Chaos Realm?

“Kill me and you can get out of here.” Tiffany’s words confirmed his suspicions.

Chen Rui smiled slightly and stretched out his hand, “Follow me.”

Tiffany didn’t move. She just asked a little unexpectedly, “Why?”

“As I said, I came here for 2 purposes, the first is this box, and the second is to protect you.” Chen Rui shrugged, “Actually, I said it in the opposite order. My main purpose is to take you away safely. The silver box is secondary.”

Tiffany stared at him for a moment, and her eyes softened a little. She looked at the silver box, and shook her head, “You go.”

Without the silver box, it would be meaningless for her to leave this place as she would be dead anyway.

Chen Rui saw through her mind and asked, “Tell me, besides life, what else can you get with a silver box?”

Tiffany hesitated for a moment before finally saying, “Freedom, and… mother.”

Chen Rui knew that Tiffany’s mother was a human. Has she been imprisoned by Satan? No wonder she risked her life to this extent. If that’s the case……

“I’ll give this to you.”

Tiffany looked at the silver box in his hand in disbelief, and her body trembled a little.

No, not an illusion. it is true.

Chen Rui’s voice sounded, “As I said, the silver box is secondary.”

“Who are you?” Tiffany’s voice also trembled. She was filled with indescribable gratitude and excitement, but she just couldn’t figure out why.

This treasure is even coveted by Pseudo-Gods. This person tried so hard to get it, but he gave it to me so easily.

“Actually… We met a long time ago. Besides, this silver box is a dangerous thing, so I may not be able to keep it. En , besides that, there are many reasons… If you don’t mind, let’s find a more suitable place to sit down and have a good talk? By the way… my hand is a little numb.”

Tiffany’s eyes were getting red, and she didn’t say anything polite. She just nodded and held his hand tightly.

The 2 held hands and flew toward the exit together. They entered the exit, and the vortex gradually disappeared.

After a while, Chen Rui and Tiffany appeared on a small island surrounded by endless seas.

The radius of this small island was only tens of meters, and the area was very small.
