Finally, in the Tower of Glory at the bottom of the sea, after repelling the Holy Dragon Rodriguez, Chen Rui risked his life to let Shura take control of his body, then he completely defeated and assimilated Shura with the comprehension of ‘creation’ , which was the only way to truly get rid of the nightmare.

Until today Chen Rui understood that Shura was actually a product of Python’s soul power and the Book of Destruction’s origin power!

To be precise, when he opened the silver box for the first time and felt the destruction truth of the universe, the Super System absorbed the destruction origin that was partially integrated with the soul of Python, which happened to merged with the inner demon of the Alioth State at that time. It mutated into a special life entity with independent consciousness, which was Shura.

No wonder even Shura couldn’t explain his origins.

chapters.title: Chapter 907: 2 Conditions
chapters.body:
Chapter 907: 2 Conditions

Python’s voice interrupted Chen Rui’s train of thoughts, “I have a special might of sense, I can sense that you have a very strange ability. Even if you sign a contract, it may not be able to restrain you. I can’t control you and even… even your woman. I can clearly sense that the soul imprint applied to the fairy dragon has disappeared, which surprised me. I don’t know how you did it, but this alone, you have enough qualifications to stand in front of me. Otherwise, you will not have the opportunity to speak.”

Chen Rui bowed slightly, “Madam’s attention is my honor.”

“You have the snake pattern badge and the Evil Pupil Badge… Let’s not verify their authenticity for the time being. I will just assume you have the trump card to summon Sariel and Satan. So why are you risking your life instead of using their strength? Risking your life to face a dangerous existence like me? Satan is powerful and scheming, but he is not a stingy person. If he has any promises or the like, as long as you complete the mission, he will usually fulfill it. You’re not a fool. On the contrary, you are also very smart. The reason why you choose to come here directly must be your own plan. Then I will guess, do you want to cooperate with me and share the mystery of the silver box, or do you want me to leave to avoid you being threatened or drawn into the powerhouse battle?”

“I admire Madam’s wisdom.” Chen Rui smiled wryly, “To be honest, I have no ambition and limited strength. The Book of Destruction is a disaster rather than luck for me. I’m here today just to talk openly with madam. At the very least, I don’t want my loved ones to be threatened again.”

Zola is lucky this time because I noticed the abnormality in time, but after all, Python is one of the strongest Pseudo-Gods with deep scheming. Even Satan was bewildered by her methods, and still has not found this silver box.

As long as the threat of Python exists, there is no guarantee that Ms. Fairy Dragon or others will not face a plot next time. Let’s take a step back and say that if the same control method is inflicted on friends like Paglio, I can’t use ‘papapa’ to rescue them, right?

“Your little dragon lover also has amazing talent. I just gave her an extra soul imprint, and she actually broke through to the peak stage of the Kingdom level. The [6 Elements Kingdom] has great potential. Her strength is almost invincible below Demi-God. She has the strength to fight even if it is a junior Demi-God. I wonder if her opponent is you, who will win?”

With a smile, Chen Rui didn’t answer the question. He and Zola would never be real rivals. In the martial battle competition, Chen Rui once drew a battle with her, but Ms. Fairy Dragon just gave him a warm hug before conceding defeat.

“Your smile tells me that you value your women and friends, which is a very admirable virtue, but sometimes it can also become a burden for you.”

Python’s words were somewhat threatening. Chen Rui could already hear it, “Madam, you are someone who understands, please say it directly.”

“Don’t get me wrong. Although I’m a soul entity, I have no interest in your little lover’s body. I just wanted her to help me with some things. Now that you have canceled my soul imprint, then these matters fall on you. In fact, it is easier for you. As long as you meet 2 conditions, this silver box, together with a page of the Book of Destruction, will be given to you.”

Chen Rui’s heart sho ok. Book of Destruction? Isn’t this reward too big? Back then, Python did not hesitate to sacrifice her body to escape the siege of the Pseudo-Gods with his soul and a silver box, but now she actually gave it away easily?

So, what are the conditions for Python? Chen Rui’s mind was more vigilant.

“Don’t be so nervous, for more than 1 million years, this section of destruction origin has been integrated into my soul imprint and become a part of my soul. When I tried to activate ‘deprivation’ might just now, I could sense that you seem to have a more complete destruction origin breath on you. My first condition is, I want your complete destruction origin. Don’t worry, you just need to copy the memory imprint, so it won’t cause any loss to your existing strength.”

Chen Rui’s thoughts moved slightly, and he vaguely understood, then he asked, “I want to hear Madam’s second condition first.”

“The second condition is simpler, take me to a place.”

Chen Rui immediately had a hunch that this place must not be simple, “What place?”

“The human world, where the Book of Creation is!”

Chen Rui shocked: Where the Book of Creation is?

Now that I know that the silver box contained the remnants of the Book of Destruction, the corresponding Book of Creation must be at… the top of the Holy Light Mountain, the Light Divinity Temple!

“The power of creation and destruction origin?” Chen Rui suddenly thought of something and exclaimed, “What exactly does madam want…”

“ Haha !” Python laughed tenderly, and Chen Rui felt his soul actually tremble in this terrifying laughter.

“Satan wanted to imitate Michael and those guys to gather the Book of Destruction, rule all super powerhouses, and establish the Dark Divinity Temple to steal the faith of the gods so as to converge Godhood to become a god. But after so many years, no matter whether it is stealing God faith’s Michael, Gabriel or Raphael, although they are infinitely close to god, who can take that step and become god? Strength’s peak stage is absolute, but there is more than 1 way to reach the peak stage. The road that I am going is a different road! Maybe I can even become an existence beyond god!”

Chen Rui was stunned by the grandeur or insane ‘ambition’ of Python: Merging the power of destruction and creation origin to become an existence beyond god?

“What exactly is the Book of Creation and Destruction, madam?” Chen Rui asked one of the most crucial questions.

“The things left over from the world of ‘creation’ and ‘destruction’…” Python looked up at the sky, and her voice became more and more ethereal. “Everything in the world, including God, originates from this.”

Create and destroy this ‘world’ including god? Chen Rui just felt a little short of breath, “Who created god and this world?”

“I don’t know, the gods call it the ‘Originator’, but the specifics are unclear. Nevertheless, what is certain is that it is the supreme existence far above all living beings.” Python mentioned ‘Originator’ with unabashed awe in her voice. But instead of continuing, she turned back to the subject, “I’ve spoken my conditions, and I want to hear the answer from you now. Yes, now. “

The last sentence was obviously not to leave room for Chen Rui. In fact, the bigger threat lied in the previous conversation – Python made it very clear that she no longer needed the silver box or the Destruction Book. Even if Chen Rui could really summon Satan or Sariel, she could escape without any scruples. Meanwhile, Chen Rui as well as his women and friends would face terrifying revenge. Or rather, even before this escape, she could easily kill everyone.

Chen Rui’s mind raced quickly before he finally answered, “I promise you, Madam Python.”

“Very well, my sense might told me that you didn’t lie to me. You made the real choice, and the most correct one. I’m surprised that you seem to be confident enough to go to the human world? Rest assured, as long as I get the result, I won’t care about superfluous things. From now on, this silver box is yours.” Python made it clear that she was not afraid of his default. In fact, she also had this capital.

Chen Rui thought for a while and asked, “Madam Python, is your current state suitable for the crossover space to reach the human world?”

“These years, I have been using the strength of the Fountain of Vitality, Fountain of Resurrection and Fountain of Vitality to nurture my soul and absorb the origin of destruction. Not long ago, my soul entity finally reached the perfect state of completion. Even if I encounter opponents like Satan and Michael again, I also have the power to fight. If I can further comprehend the origin of the destruction, even Michael may not be able to defeat me. The space crossover is definitely not a problem. I will turn into an imprint and attach to your body at that time. It also protects you from falling into the most dangerous space turbulence when traveling through space.”

Python deliberately pointed out her own strength, and Chen Rui naturally knew it. He nodded and said, “Crossover to the human world is not an easy task, so I need time to prepare. As for the memory imprint of the destruction origin… I can copy it to madam now. It’s just that my understanding of the destruction origin is quite shallow, and there are many difficult and complex aspects. I wonder if I can ask madam for advice?”

“Of course.”

“Great, let’s keep the silver box with madam. If madam really doesn’t need it, leave it to me when I get everything ready to go to the human world.”

“Okay.” Python nodded with satisfaction, “Since you are so sincere, I will give you 5 more soul imprints. These imprints were created when I was refined by the destruction law. For me, they are ‘extra’ burdens. For trainers below Pseudo-God, it is extremely precious strength and insight, but the same person can only use 1 copy, so your fairy dragon lover can’t use it.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, but he knew very well that this kind of soul imprint was the same as the 1 received by Zola, which had a hidden ‘side effect’ of being controlled, unless he adopted the same ‘rescue’ method.

The advantage was that Athena and the others could finally absorb the power of the law fragment to the maximum extent and reach the Kingdom level in the shortest time; the disadvantage was that they had to ‘work hard to death’ again. Moreover, other than his own women, the remaining ‘partners’ couldn’t use it. After all, that ‘rescue’ approach was not for people outside the crystal harem.

Chen Rui knew that Python had a special sense might, and she had comprehended destructive power for many years, so he did not play tricks with the destruction origin, and copied the complete law imprint of the destruction origin to Python.

Python just used spirit power to probe the imprint, and it immediately engraved over. She couldn’t help but be overjoyed when she realized that it was indeed a complete origin law breath. She also patiently answered each question raised by Chen Rui. Pseudo-God’s guidance was no doubt exceptional. Chen Rui felt that he had benefited a lot, and his comprehension of the destruction law went a step further.

A few hours later, he released the Fountain of Resurrection, dipped the silver box in it, and left.

Despite the ‘burden’ of a Pseudo-God powerhouse on his back, Chen Rui’s mood at the moment was more exciting than nervous.

This time, not only did he cancel Zola’s hidden dangers, but he also got 5 Pseudo-God soul imprints. As for the silver box, Chen Rui was not very keen, but the condition that Python proposed to go to the Light Divinity Temple made his eyes lit up.

There was no doubt that Python was definitely not as friendly as it seemed on the surface. Whether it was a condition or a negotiation, she was just using him. None of these Pseudo-Gods who have lived for countless years were not of great minds.

However, Chen Rui also had his own calculations.

The Book of Destruction and Creation are actually leftovers from beings above god.

The destruction origin is already so powerful, so I must not miss the power of creation origin. There is not only the Book of Creation in the Light Divinity Temple, but also another important thing. Coincidentally, I can solve them together.

The Light Elemental King once said that the Light Divinity Temple can only be coveted by the strength of the Pseudo-God.

As long as I comprehend the origin of destruction, I can match Michael? So train hard… Pseudo-God’s Madam Python, the stronger you are, the better it is.

A smile appeared on the corner of Chen Rui’s mouth as he quickened his pace.

chapters.title: Chapter 908: Alliance And Requests
chapters.body:
Chapter 908: Alliance And Requests

1 of the most popular phrases in the Dark Moon residence lately was, “You are already dead.”

This sentence had nothing to do with Death Omen and Kenshiro, but because the identity ‘Chen Rui’ was about to die.

The Dark Moon Estate had been spreading with a news that the former first minister of the Demon Realm, the former sheriff and financial officer of the Dark Moon Estate, the Dark Moon lord and the husband of the third general Athena, human Chen Rui, was unable to get used to the Demon Realm’s environment. Coupled with his frail and sickly body, he had been on the verge of death many times, and now it was finally time.

Someone once witnessed Chen Rui fainting on the street, and Shea, the great emperor of the Fallen Angel Empire, also visited the Dark Moon 4 times in 3 months. She stayed in for several days, which further confirmed the authenticity of the rumor.

The arrival of Her Majesty Empress was undoubtedly to visit this ‘old minister’ and offer condolences to Lord Athena, but the truth was often unexpected. Who could have guessed that Her Majesty Empress’ ‘visiting’ method was actually for sex, and the reason why she stayed for a few days was because of the exhaustion from having sex. Since Her Majesty Empress’ empire matter was too busy, she could not finish them all at once, so a ‘staged treatment’ approach was adopted, which was why Shea came to the Dark Moon 4 times in 3 months.

The crystal harem girls seemed to be merry and cheerful. From time to time, someone would join in to help Her Majesty Empress fight together. Everyone had prior experience. It was all the fault of the side effects of the Pseudo-God soul imprint that needed such a wretched cancellation method.

The Pseudo-God soul imprint was no doubt a very precious thing, and the effect was quite obvious. It was a match made in heaven for the law fragment. The law fragment could help the girls to upgrade to the Kingdom level as soon as possible, but due to taking shortcuts, the progress after entering the Kingdom level would be several times more difficult than the normal advancement. With the assistance of this Pseudo-God imprint, this drawback would not exist anymore, and it would also be easier to break through the bottleneck. After all, this was the imprint left by the strongest Pseudo-God’s soul entity when refining the destruction origin law. It was unique; even Satan couldn’t create such a soul imprint.

Unfortunately, the number of such soul imprints was extremely limited. Since Zola was already the beneficiary, Chen Rui gave the remaining 5 to Athena, Isabella, Kia and Shea respectively; 1 was kept for Catherine.

As for the ‘human dying’, it was entirely the rumor released by Chen Rui himself. Aguile had disappeared for a few months. It was declared to the public that he went for closed-door training.

The only headache was Ms. Duoduo. Although when Chen Rui went to Mysterious Land, Catherine once came to the Dark Moon to visit Duoduo, but after all, several months had passed. The little girl had long been unable to hold back her thoughts of Catherine, and she had been crying for mommy recently. No game could catch her interest. Since the equality link was now full, and using the star conferring to crossover the [Star Gate] must take another month for [Star-level Enhancement], so Chen Rui decided to take Duoduo directly back to the Dark Shadow Empire.

At this time, Shea, who received the ‘treatment’ for the last time, brought news that Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen and the Dark Shadow Empire’s Empress Catherine would visit the Fallen Angel Empire together in the near future to meet Empress Shea to negotiate the specifics of the alliance of the 3 empires.

Since Catherine would come, Chen Rui naturally didn’t need to make another trip there. He quickly coaxed the baby girl.

Soon, the Fallen Angel Capital welcomed 2 visiting rulers.

Now the relationship between the 3 empires was extremely harmonious. Compared with the armistice agreement period, the cooperation was closer and more sincere. The Demon Realm had unprecedented prosperity in all aspects. The 3 empires’ alliance had become the aspiration of the people.

The meeting of the 3 rulers started in a friendly atmosphere, and the 3 parties conducted further consultations on the general framework and key issues of the establishment of the alliance. the progress was very smooth.

Then, at the request of Raizen the Great, the 3 rulers held a secret meeting.

There was also a 4th person, Chen Rui.

The presence of ‘Aguile’ was specially requested by Raizen, and this was 1 of the basic conditions raised by Raizen at this alliance meeting of the 3 empires, so Chen Rui appeared in the secret meeting.

“Her Majesty Catherine and Her Majesty Shea are smart people, so I won’t go around in circles.” Raizen said straight to the point, “I have no objection to the formation of the alliance, and I completely agree with all of your plans, but Aguile, you haven’t done the things you promised me yet.”

The thing mentioned by Raizen was naturally the condition of marrying Tiffany last time. Chen Rui was also prepared for this. He said, “Your Majesty Raizen, I will tell you frankly. A few months ago, I went to a mysterious place together with Ms. Tiffany and helped her escape safely in the end. However, I also offended 2 powerful Pseudo-God Satan and Sariel. Recently, I have been disappearing, trying to use fake death to avoid disaster, so as not to affect my loved ones and friends. I can fulfill my promise to marry Ms. Tiffany, but for the safety of the 3 empires and Ms. Tiffany herself, this marriage can only be done in secret for now.”

Chen Rui glanced at Catherine, “Not only Ms. Tiffany, but Her Majesty Catherine and I… as well.”

Catherine had met Chen Rui before and knew about it, so she nodded generously after hearing him say it in front of Shea and Raizen.

Since she and Catherine were also secretly married, Raizen should have no problem.

Raizen looked at Catherine, then at Chen Rui, but he shook his head and handed Chen Rui something: A ring hanging from a necklace, “Take it.”

Bloody Ring of the 7 Artifacts! Chen Rui was taken aback. I made the necklace myself and gave it to Tiffany, so it seems that Tiffany should have met Raizen, but why did Raizen give me the Bloody Ring again?

“Tiffany has left, leaving Bloody Ring behind.” Raizen was silent for a moment, then he continued, “From the beginning to end, she didn’t say a word to me. She just left this note.”

Chen Rui took the note with a sentence written on it.

“I’ll go to look for my mother, take care.”

“This was the first time she has said ‘take care’ to me since she grew up.” Raizen’s expression was calm, but his eyes were full of bleakness, “Most probably the last time too.”

“Your Majesty Raizen, can I take the liberty to ask, Tiffany’s mother…”

Raizen knew what he wanted to ask and gave the answer directly, “That woman is in the human world.”

Human world! Chen Rui knew that Tiffany’s mother was human. I remember when she was at the Chaos Realm, Tiffany once said that the silver box can be exchanged for her freedom and mother. He thought that Tiffany’s mother was imprisoned by Satan as a threat. I didn’t expect that I guessed wrongly. Tiffany’s mother is actually in the human world.

So, this time Tiffany managed to get back the silver box, Satan’s promised to fulfill the reward, in addition to giving Tiffany real freedom, and… teleportation to the human world?

Turns out that after returning safely from the Chaos Realm, instead of accepting the throne, Tiffany went to the human world to find her mother.

“Aguile, I would like to start the alliance of the 3 empires now, but you will bring Tiffany back from the human world to inherit the throne of the Bloody Empire.”

“This… Ms. Tiffany has made her choice. ” Chen Rui frowned, “Why not respect her choice?”

“That’s the human world whereas she’s a demon. Once her identity is revealed, the consequences will be unimaginable. ” Raizen clenched his fists a little, “Whether it’s fulfilling your promise, or… be my plea, for the Bloody Empire and Tiffany herself, please take her back to the Demon Realm.”

Catherine was slightly moved. She and Raizen had known each other for many years. Even when they faced the mighty Midnight Sun, Raizen had never spoken in such a pleading tone.

Tiffany was not only the future empress of the Bloody Empire, but also Raizen’s daughter, his only daughter.

“You should agree to His Majesty Raizen’s request.”

Not only Catherine, but Shea also agreed. The marriage with Tiffany was not only a family matter, but also an empire matter.

“Okay.” Chen Rui thought for a while and agreed. Anyway, I have already agreed to Python to go to the human world, so I can make use of this trip to find Tiffany as well. As for Tiffany’s mother… Let’s see the situation first, if necessary, I can bring her back the Demon Realm with her.

Seeing his agreement, Raizen breathed a sigh of relief with a little green light in his hand, “This is the space seed to go to the human world. I obtained it from a human in the Demon Realm back then. As long as you activate it, you can go to the human world safely, but you’ll have to find another way to come back.”

Chen Rui didn’t expect Raizen to even prepare this. He didn’t explain about the [Star Gate] and just said, “Don’t worry, as long as I find Ms. Tiffany, there will be a way to return. However, where is Ms. Tiffany’s mother?”

“I don’t even know where she is. I only know that her name is Andee. She has a powerful light-element physique. Maybe, this is a pseudonym. You can only judge Tiffany’s location based on the Bloody Ring…” Chen Rui showed a bizarre expression. This woman gave birth to a child with Raizen, and Raizen only knew this?

“I know what you’re wondering.” Raizen sneered coldly, “My union with her, even giving birth to Tiffany, was the result of deliberate manipulation. This person’s name, you have mentioned before.”

Deliberate manipulation? Give birth to Tiffany? Light and dark body?

Chen Rui’s mind was spinning quickly, and he suddenly realized it. He blurted out, “Satan!”

Satan manipulated Andee to be with Raizen and gave birth to Tiffany with a light and dark body. Then, he took her as an apprentice and brought her back to the Mountain Seckred for training. The real purpose is to create a ‘key’ that opens the door to the Chaos Realm!

It turns out that Satan has been trying to ‘make: this kind of ‘key’ after the Pseudo-God battle that year in order to enter the Chaos Realm, and he finally succeeded today.

“I have a question.” Catherine said, “The marriage of Lady Andee and Your Majesty Raizen should have been 100 years ago, so with human lifespan, can she live to the present?”

“The strength of that woman was the Great Demon King back then, and she was almost able to advance to the Demon Emperor. She must be able to survive until now. Tiffany has a special kind of bloodline sensing, so she can find her.”

Catherine heard the sigh hidden in Raizen’s tone. She knew that Tiffany also had this kind of bloodline sensing to her father, but unfortunately it was her mother whom she ended up looking for.

Raizen handed the space seed and Bloody Ring to Chen Rui and walked out.

“By the way, be careful with that woman.” Raizen left the last sentence at the door and disappeared from the vision of the 3 of them.

TL: Maybe Andee is a believer of a Pseudo-God as well?

chapters.title: Chapter 909: Departure, Human World Tour Group
chapters.body:
Chapter 909: Departure, Human World Tour Group

Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen and the Dark Shadow Empire’s Empress Catherine visit the Fallen Angel Empire. After several days of meeting, the 3 empires’ alliance that all the Demon Realm was anticipating had finally taken a decisive step.

During their final live meeting on magic television, the 3 rulers issued a joint statement announcing the formation of a confederation association called the ‘Demon Realm Independent Empire Alliance’ next month, and the 3 empires’ newspapers published the headlines immediately regarding the major resolutions and rules of the meeting.

This was the first real empire association in the history of the Demon Realm. The association had the highest public institution, ‘parliament’. The 3 empires, including the representatives of the remaining 4 royal families, were members of the ‘parliament’ and had voting rights.

The main function of the parliament was to negotiate, deal with and regulate the common activities and affairs of the 3 empires, but it was not the highest central government. The 3 empires still had independent political powers, each of which had complete independence and autonomy in diplomatic, legal and military. Each member of the empire only had the nationality of its own empire, and there was no common nationality of the confederation.

This association was somewhat similar to the EU in Chen Rui’s previous life, which was between commonwealth and confederation. The main nature was still a confederation, but in some cooperation and details, the unity was stronger, and the common interests were more prominent.

The news that the 3 empires’ alliance was about to be officially established made the whole Demon Realm cheer. Interests would always be the utmost priority among empires, so disputes and contradictions were inevitable, even in times of peace. However, this alliance bound the best interests of each empire together. As long as the general direction was grasped, there should be no disintegration crisis in the next N years. The people could enjoy peace.

In the peaceful era of the future, the brave and ruthless demons also had a stage to fully demonstrate their abilities.

The ‘Infinite Warrior OL’, a comprehensive training game that integrated individual battles, team battles, skills, tactics, entertainment and other elements, had become the Demon Realm’s most popular activity with the largest number of participants and the widest coverage; the battle ball league was also becoming popular with the addition of cup tournament; the Demon Realm’s martial fighting competition, which was successfully held in the Bloody Empire, would be held every 4 years; the armies of the 3 empires would hold military competitions from time to time, and the newly established the 3 empires’ colleges would also conduct college exchange competitions. This included the mechanic competitions, potioneer competitions and so on.

After the meeting of the 3 empires, Raizen immediately returned to the Bloody Empire while Catherine, the Dark Shadow Empire’s empress, accepted the invitation of Shea of the Fallen Angel Empire to stay in the Fallen Angel Empire for another 10 days.

The relationship between Catherine and Aguile was well known in the Demon Realm. The relationship between the 2 empresses, Shea and Catherine, who shared a common ‘prince consort’, naturally became the focus of private discussions among the Demon Realm people. Now that the 3 empires’ alliance was a certainty, the 2 empresses had nothing to worry about both in the interests of the empire and their personal feelings. Catherine’s stay this time would further deepen the relationship between the 2 empires, but from another perspective, it was more like accepting a private invitation.

It was a pity that the man who was the focus of envy and hatred, the mysterious prince consort, had been in ‘closed-door training’. He had not made any public appearances including this meeting of the 3 empires as if he had disappeared.

1 of the main reasons for Catherine to stay was to absorb the law fragment and the Pseudo-God’s soul imprint. Needless to say, it was also to have intimate time with the long-parted lover and receive ‘treatment’.

The Dark Shadow Empire’s empress who had absorbed the law fragment and Pseudo-God soul imprint was not only strong, but she also looked radiant and lively after being fully nourished by the man, making the harem girls envious.

When Catherine returned to the empire, she brought her daughter along. Although the little phoenix was crying and calling for mommy before, when she really had to part with her daddy, including these aunties whom she liked, she cried bitterly. Catherine saw that the harem really loved her daughter, so she promised to bring Duoduo over to reunite with the girls in secret after a while. At that time, she would put Duoduo there for a while.

Even so, the girls were still reluctant to separate with this most precious little princess. Holding and kissing the little phoenix, they parted with tears in the end.

The events of the Demon Realm had basically settled down, so Chen Rui decided to go to the human world. There were 2 main tasks on this trip to the human world: 1 was to fulfill his promise to Python and the other was to bring back Tiffany.

Since Chen Rui had now mastered the mysteries of [Star-level Enhancement] and star conferring. As long as one was a spiritual link object of star conferring, one could merge with the star position in the Star Conferring Platform and teleport along with the [Star Gate]. This had been proved successful after being tested on Dodo at the beginning.

Although the merging time was only 3 hours and it only could be remerged after 24 hours, it only took a few seconds to crossover the [Star Gate]. In other words, the harem troupe, relatives and friends who had received star conferring could go to the human world together!

Now was the time when the 3 empires’ alliance was about to be established, and the affairs would be very busy. Therefore the 2 empresses, Catherine and Shea, would definitely not be able to go. Athena, who was the lord, was also unable to leave. Kia was currently breaking through the level of Demon Emperor, and Athena needed her assistance, so it was not possible to go there.

Before the meeting of the 3 empires, Roman, who touched the power of the kingdom, had been in closed-door training. Consecutively, Medilu and Delia naturally stayed to accompany him. Ms. Black Dragon, under the stimulation of the boss’ salary increment, accepted Lalaria’s advice and was ready to break through the Kingdom level by absorbing the law fragment.

Chen Rui once promised the sir father-in-law and madam mother-in-law of the Dragon Valley to bring Zola back to her parents’ house, so Ms. Fairy Dragon must be going. Isabella would also be going since she had broken through to the Demon Overlord level, so there was no training plan for the time being. There was also the poison dragon couple who were interested.

Originally, Ms. Black Dragon also wanted to go, but after getting the promise of a salary increment from the boss, she happily absorbed the law fragment to break through the Kingdom level. Lalaria also stopped causing trouble temporarily. She absorbed the Demi-God’s law crystal ball while guiding Olypheus – In fact, Chen Rui left Olypheus on purpose, and he spent a lot of money to bribe her. With Ms. Black Dragon as a spy and the supervision of Vesilna, Lalaria’s trouble causing index should be greatly reduced.

In the end, the list of the human world tour group was officially finalized. The specific members were: Chen Rui, Ms. Fairy Dragon, Madam Aunt, Master Poison Dragon and wife, as well as a ‘truly handsome’.

After making all the preparations, Chen Rui activated the skill of the Star Conferring Platform, then he kept Zola and others in the Star Conferring Platform. When everyone touched their statues, they entered the hibernation state of star merging.

Subsequently, Chen Rui entered the Rainbow Valley and came to the Fountain of Resurrection.

“Madam Python, we can go now.”

The Fountain of Resurrection boiled and slowly separated, revealing the silver box in the middle. Clouds of mists rose up, condensing into a faint human shape.

“Your efficiency is admirable.” The mist rushed toward Chen Rui. Chen Rui did not activate the defensive power. He just let the mist surge into his body. Python didn’t invade his soul. It just condensed into a 6-pointed star on his wrist.

“The silver box is at your disposal, but I still need to use the Fountain of Resurrection. You can use your special ability to keep the Fountain of Resurrection. When you crossover the space later, I will exert my strength to protect you from falling into the space turbulence.”

“No need.” Chen Rui kept the Fountain of Resurrection accordingly with a slight smile, “I have a space seed to return to the human world. Coupled with a special teleportation magic circle I prepared during this time, I can safely reach the human world at the fastest speed. However, I may need to use madam’s power when returning to the Demon Realm at that time.”

This statement was actually a mixture of true and false. Not to mention that the Evil Pupil might not be able to hide from Python, Python had seen Chen Rui a long time ago, so she was likely to have already seen through his human identity. It might be one of the reasons why she used Chen Rui to go to the human world.

No doubt. Python had no doubts, “As long as I’m around, returning to the Demon Realm is not a problem.”

“Thank you, madam.” Chen Rui walked to a laboratory in the Rainbow Valley, where the [Star Gate] had already been opened. Chen Rui walked into the door, and in the blink of an eye, he disappeared together with the space door.

In a sunny valley, a light blue light door opened, and Chen Rui appeared.

It was not the original star point of the Storm Island, but a barren hill outside the Yang Shao Empire’s Garden City.

This was of course the early preparation of Chen Rui. He didn’t want to expose the secret of the Storm Island to Python, so before this time, he arrived in the human world ahead of time and changed the star point.

This location was very particular. Going south from the Garden City, the Storm Island could be quickly reached by sea.

“Madam Python, we’ve arrived.”

“No doubt it’s the human world, very well.” Python’s voice sounded, “The light element here is too strong, and my soul can’t exert its strongest power at the moment. I must find a secluded place and use the power of the Fountain of Resurrection to merge the light element power with me, which will take about 2 months. I will leave a mark for you. You can arrange your schedule freely within these 2 months. When I complete the fusion, I will notify you with the mark.”

No wonder Python asked him to keep the Fountain of Resurrection previously. It turned out that it was for this! Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. As the Star Conferring Platform was also a trump card that he didn’t want to expose, he was trying to find an excuse to divert Python for a period of time before letting Zola and others out, but Python herself made this request first.

This barren mountain itself was very remote. Soon, Chen Rui found a cave and released the Fountain of Resurrection from the galaxy garden. Python immediately flew out from the 6-star imprint on his wrist and merged into the Fountain of Resurrection. The springwater was suddenly covered with a layer of steam.

Chen Rui also set up a hidden magic circle around it. In fact, with a Pseudo-God Python, even if it was discovered, it would not be a big problem.

After Python flew into the Fountain of Resurrection, the 6-star imprint did not disappear; it still remained on Chen Rui’s wrist.

“Don’t worry, this imprint will not have any effect on you, nor can it monitor your behavior. Moreover, the soul power stored in it can also allow you to use ‘deprivation’ might 3 times. This may deprive the enemy, including the power of innate talent. With my might, even Pseudo-God cannot be immune, but this might is not without limits. The stronger the opponent, the less the strength will be deprived and the shorter the duration will be.”

Compared with Satan and Sariel, Python was much gentler in attitude and means, or it should be more of a lure by promise of gain than coercion. However, it did not mean that she was a kind type. On the contrary, Chen Rui had not relaxed his vigilance; he was even more cautious.

This is a world where the strong dominates the weak. I have some value now, so Python is like this. Once my value is lost, it is very likely that she will even gnaw on my bones.

“Thank you, madam.”

“Okay, you are a smart person, so I won’t say anything extra. I wish you good luck.”

Chen Rui heard the implication of this sentence and bowed slightly, “I will rush back as soon as madam issues the imprint notification.”

Although Python said that the 6-star imprint had no effect on him, just in case, after leaving the barren hills, Chen Rui immediately used [Deep Analysis] with the power of the Evil Pupil to blind the imprint. Of course, if Python issued the notification, he could still sense it.

After more than 2 hours, the relatives and friends’ ‘tour group’ were canceled from star merging and regained consciousness.

Above them was the scorching sun that was different from the 2 moons, below them was the slightly swaying deck and in front of them was a vast sea.

Chen Rui’s voice sounded from the side, “Everyone, welcome to the sunny human world.”

chapters.title: Chapter 910: Zola’S Acquaintance
chapters.body:
Chapter 910: Zola’S Acquaintance

“The sunshine of the human world is quite comfortable after getting used to it.” Master Poison Dragon leaned on the deck of the Devil’s Snare Ship and took a sip of wine comfortably. The slime at the opposite side was also holding a wine bottle while nodding quickly.

Zola and Krobelus stood at the end of the ship, watching the hurricanes in the distance while discussing something in a low voice.

Krobelus came to the human world for the first time, so she treated Zola as her guide.

Zola originally came from the human world, so she was no stranger to this world full of light elements, but she had been in the Demon Realm for 20,000 years. Everything in the human world had become unfamiliar. She hadn’t been to the Storm Sea area even in those years.

The relationship between the 2 dragon beauties had always been good, and their men were friends of life and death. Although Zola sometimes habitually dazed, there was never a shortage of topics between women, especially between acquaintances.

As the saying goes, 3 women played a show. However, there was a ‘pillar’ that was not together. It was not that Isabella had a bad relationship with the 2 women. On the contrary, Isabella’s closest best friend was Krobelus, and she had a good relationship with Zola normally, but she didn’t join their discussions. Instead, she snuggled up beside Chen Rui.

Different from the powerful dragons, the demons who were used to the dark element environment needed a certain amount of time to get used to the sunlight that was full of light elements. Not only that, Chen Rui was also using the power of the Evil Pupil to cooperate with the Belphegor Royal Family’s secret treasure ‘Evil Blue Tear’ to try to completely block the dark element breath on Isabella’s body. In that way, it could perfectly conceal Isabella’s demon identity.

‘Evil Blue Tear’ was known as the first treasure of the Belphegor Royal Family under the Breeze Shadow Boots. Not only could it greatly enhance the spirit power in a short period of time, it could shield the breath on the body so that others could not see through the real strength. It also greatly enhanced the bloodline power of the Eye of Evil, thus promoting the mutation of a normal demon’s bloodline. However, this mutated power had great side effects which would greatly reduce the lifespan of the recipient, and the effect was far less than that of the devil fruit.

This was the treasure that Royce dedicated to Chen Rui. It had once led to the root cause of the tragedy of Royce’s family.

Now to Isabella, the most important function of the Evil Blue Tear was naturally to shield her breath. After combining Chen Rui’s modification and the Evil Pupil power, the shielding breath function of the Evil Blue Tear had rose again. Even a super powerhouse could not see through this layer of disguise.

“Yini, are you okay?”

“ En .” Isabella rested her head lightly on his shoulder, “I’m much better. Actually, it’s not just my body… I’ve been a little nervous in my mind.”

Chen Rui stroked her hair gently, “Are you afraid of seeing ‘that person’ again?”

“A bit. I have more hatred for that person.” Isabella smiled bitterly, “Actually, the one I should hate the most is myself.”

“It’s the past, whether it’s fear or hatred.” Chen Rui wiped away the moisture from the corners of her eyes and held her hand, “You don’t have to be obsessed with this matter. No matter what you have to face, I will always accompany you.”

Chen Rui didn’t mention the ‘Breeze Shadow Boots’, but he must try to get it this time when going to the Holy Light Mountain with Python.

“I feel very fortunate now.” Isabella felt her heart calm down. She got closer and held his hand.

It’s great to be able to hold these hands for a lifetime.

Storm Island could be seen ahead. The sandmen maneuvered the Devil’s Snare Ship over.

After 1 hour.

“Is this the Storm Island where the Wind Elemental King is located?” Zola looked around curiously, “No doubt, the wind elemental breath is extremely strong. If the wind element magic is activated here, its power will be doubled.”

While walking, Ms. Fairy Dragon held Chen Rui’s hand intimately. Isabella and Krobelus were chatting and laughing together. Master Poison Dragon could only carry Master ‘Truly Handsome’.

Chen Rui knew that Isabella did this on purpose. When sailing on the Devil’s Snare Ship, Madam Aunt ‘occupied’ him most of the time. Although Ms. Fairy Dragon and Betty were chatting speculatively on the side, they occasionally glanced over here, and it was inevitable that she felt something. Now that Madam Aunt intended to let Ms. Fairy Dragon had him ‘exclusively’, so Zola’s heart was naturally a lot more balanced.

Yini was not only smart, but also considerate, which made people feel very caring. In general, she could make the harem more harmonious, but don’t underestimate the power of Ms. Secret Intelligence. Once she wanted to make some trouble, the lethality was absolutely several times better than the charming succubus.

“Are those thunderbirds hovering in the sky?” Isabella looked up at the dozens of the thunderbirds in the sky, “Dodo, they seem to be familiar to you?”

The slime said triumphantly, “Of course, Madam Isabella, Dodo is—truly—handsome!”

“Handsome your onion ass!” Chen Rui showed a 😦 expression. Let alone Dodo’s strange appearance, this matter had nothing to do with his appearance – The thunderbirds were of course ‘familiar’ to the egg thief.

The last time he experimented the [Star Gate], he had left Dodo on the Storm Island for 2 days, and he nearly stole all of the thunderbirds’ eggs, triggering a mass rampage of the thunderbirds on the Storm Island. When Chen Rui arrived, there were still 2/3 of the poor thunderbird eggs left. If the slime didn’t want to keep it for the master to make delicious braised bird eggs, all of it would have been eaten up.

Chen Rui eventually returned those surviving the thunderbird eggs to the thunderbirds. Now that the smell of egg thief appeared, the thunderbirds naturally stepped up their defense and patrol.

Paglio disliked the thunderbirds’ noise and released a little dragon demeanor. The dragon demeanor at the Kingdom level was no trivial matter, and the frightened thunderbirds retreated.

After walking for a while, a huge figure appeared in the basin in front. Sensing Chen Rui’s spiritual imprint breath, one after another titan knelt down.

“Master.” The sound of heavy footsteps gradually approached, and the slow voice unique to Oceanus sounded.

Zola keenly sensed the difference, “The titans here seem to be more powerful than those of the Demon Realm; they have clearer minds and complete autonomy.”

“Oceanus, these are my wives, Zola and Isabella. This is my brother, Paglio, and his wife, Krobelus… The titans are to respect and obey them as they respect me.” Chen Rui introduced the crowd to the titans. Dodo had been here last time and needed no introduction.

“Your order is the will of the titans, great master.” Oceanus bowed his head respectfully, “I have something to report to the master. Yesterday, a team of dragons from Dragon Valley arrived at Storm Island and started the magic game’s illusion trial…”

Chen Rui patiently listened to Oceanus’ slow report. This trial was the masterpiece he shared with Zola’s father, the Elf King Span. The main content was a small dungeon of the magic game ‘Infinite Warrior’. In addition, there was magic circle trap tests and actual combat tests with the Titans.

Although this kind of trial was only a small part of the magic game, the effect was surprisingly good. Whether it was the dragons or dragon riders, they all showed great interest. Chen Rui thus successfully resolved the hatred between the Dragon Valley and the Storm Island. With the mediation of his mother-in-law Madam Meria, the 2 became partners.

Since then, dragons had come to Storm Island several times for trials, and the feedback was favorable. This time, it was an elite trial led by senior elders, and all the participants in the trial were dragons with outstanding strength or potential in the Dragon Valley.

“Elite?” Paglio grinned strangely, “Just in time to let ungifted people like us witness it.”

“You seem to be very resentful? Dead duck dragon with envy and hatred?” Chen Rui grinned and hugged Zola, “Let’s go and have a look. I wonder if we can meet your acquaintance from 20,000 years ago.”

“Dead duck? Your whole family is…” Before Paglio finished, Ms. Fairy Dragon glared at him. Thinking of the ‘friendly training’ where he was completely abused a few days ago, Master Poison Dragon suddenly shriveled and stopped talking.

The trial field was a basin with a cloud of mist in the center. In fact, it was a small ‘magic game server’ combined with a magic circle. Participants would wear special helmets to enter, and those who successfully complete the dungeon would appear at the entrance; those who couldn’t complete the dungeon would either be teleported out, or in the worst case, they would be stunned by a spirit recoil or even suffered severe soul damage.

The main reason was the lack of a central life crystal at that time, so this game server’s controls and spiritual imprint transmissions were also quite flawed. Chen Rui obtained a large amount of the yuan crystal from the Lost Land, where the mystery was located, and now he had successfully produced a core control crystal dedicated to the magic games. It was being stored in the storage warehouse.

Despite such flaws, the dragon testers were still very enthusiastic and had long been mentally prepared. After all, this method was already very safe compared to the previous dangerous trials that often involved death. Moreover, the magic circle also allowed a chaperone to enter the trial. This chaperone would wear a sense helmet. When he discovered danger, he could forcibly cut off the spiritual imprint power in the game to avoid accidents.

There were many men and women standing outside the basin. Obviously, the dragons all used human figures. The leader was a middle-aged man with a thin face and body with a mustache. Next to the man was the Wind Elemental King Sethtine; they were talking.

The arrival of Chen Rui and others attracted the attention of the dragons. Many dragons expressed surprise, especially when they saw the titans who could rival the giant dragons kneeling down on 1 knee and bowing to the man.

“You’re here.” Sethtine flew to them. In the eyes of the Elemental King, there was no difference between demons and humans. After resolving the biggest crisis with the help of Chen Rui last time, even the wind elementals, known for their fickleness, also became his friend.

Sethtine introduced the 2 to each other, “This is Sir Pelin, the senior elder of the Dragon Valley, 1 of the leaders of the Dragon Valley trial this time, and an Elder Gueroas who is protecting the dragons participating in the trial. This is the creator of the trial field, Sir Richard.”

“It turns out to be Sir Pelin, nice to meet you.” Chen Rui remembered that he had heard the name ‘Pelin’ somewhere, but he couldn’t recall it for a while. He politely paid his respects.

The [Analytical Eyes] showed that Pelin was a blue dragon whose strength had reached SS+, peak stage of the Kingdom level. Judging from the element breath sensed by the Evil Pupil, this was a powerhouse that could control terrifying wind element power.

Pelin looked at Chen Rui, who only looked like a Demon Overlord-level breath, and showed an arrogant expression, “Are you the Richard who signed a contract with Meria?”

This attitude made Chen Rui frown, and he gradually looked grim.

Pelin’s gaze turned to a certain spectacled lady who was holding the man closely, and he stopped immediately. His gaze became more and more surprised.

Before Pelin could speak, a trembling voice sounded beside him, “Zo… Zola!”

The voice was from a short-haired dragon with a beautiful appearance and a slender figure, but unfortunately, her chest was a little flat, giving a neutral and special beauty. However, this beauty’s face was full of horror as if she saw the most terrifying thing. Her eyes were twitching.

Such a moving appearance made one feel sympathy for her.

Chen Rui was stunned for a moment, but he never thought that he would actually meet Zola’s acquaintance. Zola must have done something back then to terrify this beauty like this.

“ Hmph! ” Zola said contemptuously while pushing up the frame of her glasses, “Karru, you are still like this. When will you truly be a man?”

“Man?” Chen Rui, Paglio, Isabella, and Krobelus blurted out at the same time.

“So cute, he must be a boy” – Chen Rui’s mind summed up this ‘famous saying’ from his previous life.

Only 😦 could be used to express everyone’s mood at the moment.

“The daughter of that bastard elf and Meria actually…” Pelin’s eyes widened.

Hearing this sentence, Chen Rui suddenly recalled. Pelin, Karru! That’s right, Zola’s escaped marriage from this sissy Karru back then! And Pelin is Karru’s father!

We actually met such an acquaintance, or more accurately, it should be the ‘inevitable clash of enemies.’

When Zola heard that Meria was going to marry her to Karru, she beat up Karru violently in a rage. Then, she robbed all the wealth of this poor sissy before running away from home.

When the Elf King Span learned that his daughter had run away from home, he knocked on the door in a rage, beating the poor sissy and his father violently. Then, he robbed Pelin Family’s wealth and left.

It seemed that the protagonists and the experiences of these 2 stories were strikingly similar.

What to do? They were father and daughter.

Chen Rui could understand why Karru was so frightened when he saw Zola. Poor child, he has been traumatized for 20,000 years, and now the ‘nightmare’ is coming again.

The dragons were already whispering.

“Zola, the daughter of the great elder?”

“I heard that she ran away from home 20,000 years ago?”

“She is so affectionate with this man named Richard… ” Pelin narrowed his eyes, hiding his surprise and hatred, then he changed to a smiley expression, “So it’s Zola. After not seeing you for many years, you finally showed up. What a coincidence. This time Uncle Pelin will take you back to the Dragon Valley. “

Ms. Fairy Dragon gave Pelin a dazed look, “Who are you?”

“I’m Karru’s father!” When Pelin was unable to take advantage of the topic, a trace of blue lightning lingered on his fingertips, “It seems that I need to teach you on behalf of the great elder what basic manners are.”

Before Pelin could ‘teach’, his hair suddenly stood up. A purple electric spark faintly emerged from Zola’s body. An extremely dangerous feeling surged in the blue dragon’s mind.

chapters.title: Chapter 911: Rules And Reunion
chapters.body:
Chapter 911: Rules And Reunion

“ Oh ?” The Elder Blue Dragon sensed that the dangerous breath coming from Zola seemed to have reached the Kingdom level. Although he was a little surprised, he didn’t care too much. He raised his brows as his voice became more and more gloomy, “You dare to attack me? Now I need to teach you not only basic manners, but also the minimum rules.”

Although the hierarchy concept of dragons was not as established as that of humans or demons, there were also basic rules, the most important of which was strength.

Zola beating up Karru was a fight between kids; Span beating up Pelin was a fight between super powerhouses. But if Zola wanted to beat Pelin, that was a crime, unless… Just as Pelin’s words finished, the purple light was flourishing, and the surrounding dragons burst into a commotion: Zola, actually made a move first!

The Elder Blue Dragon had been prepared for a long time. The blue lightning flew out rapidly, resisting the purple light.

Almost in a split second, the 2 lightning collided with each other.

Contrary to all the dragons’ expectations, the purple lightning did not collapse as expected, but it was in a stalemate with the blue lightning.

These 2 lightning bolts seemed to be ordinary, and there were not too many sparks, but everyone could feel that the lightning contained extremely terrifying energy. Even the hardest metal would be melted in an instant if it was close to the lightning.

When Pelin felt the huge pressure from the purple lightning, he was secretly startled and completely put away his underestimation. He let out a low growl, and his momentum skyrocketed. The blue lightning became more and more dazzling. However, no matter how hard he exerted his strength, the purple lightning remained unmoved.

Pelin was in disbelief. As a blue dragon, he had the innate talent to control the wind element. Furthermore, he had been researching the power of lightning for many years. Even Zola’s mother, Meria of the Demi-God level, could not necessarily match his accomplishments in the research of lightning.

He had used all his power, yet Zola still firmly suppressed his strongest blue lightning.

Is this still the ignorant ‘little girl’ back then?

There was no need to compete for kingdom or anything else. Just with this blow, Zola had shown a power that was not below his peak stage of the Kingdom level.

At this moment, Pelin only heard Zola snorted coldly, “Is this all you got?”

Pelin was greatly shocked. The purple lightning around Zola’s body began to flicker with a special rhythm. She gradually faded, and her face was blurred. She turned into a phantasm wrapped by lightning.

The shining blue-purple light ball in the middle began to slowly move toward Pelin. The dragons could hardly believe what they saw. Facing Zola, the daughter of the great elder who had been missing for 20,000 years, Elder Blue Dragon Pelin at the peak stage of the Kingdom level was suppressed!

The Wind Elemental King on the side said emotionally, “Elemental heart! It’s actually the rhythm of the elemental heart!”

Only the Elemental King had an elemental heart, and now this rhythm was manifested in Zola’s body.

“Although it’s just an elementary rhythm, it’s really the rhythm of a wind elemental heart!” Sethtine expressed shock.

Zola, composed of lightning phantasms, suddenly snapped her finger, and the blue lightning instantly dissipated without a trace. Pelin’s entire body was surrounded by purple lightning.

“ Roar !” Pelin’s body grew rapidly. In the blink of an eye, he returned to the form. The blue dragon had innate wind element control, and had considerable immunity as well as damage reduction ability to wind element power. However, this purple lightning seemed to carry a special penetration power, almost ignoring the blue dragon’s talent.

Pelin’s huge body spasmed and trembled involuntarily in the lightning. He bent his body, and even the dragon scales stood up as he exclaimed in pain, “Damn it!”

Sissy Karru, who was beside him, hurriedly wanted to come up to dissuade him, but suddenly, there was a weird onion in front of him, then he fainted.. That kind of Kingdom level breath deterred the dragons, and they didn’t dare to step forward for a while. Bullying the weak to claim credit was naturally Master Slime’s expertise.

Chen Rui looked at Pelin wrapped in lightning with sympathy. When he was the assistant of Ms. Fairy Dragon in the Rainbow Valley, he was ‘baptized’ as a coke every day. The history of blood and tears was enough to compose a book ‘How Steel is Made in the Demon Realm’.

He knew that Zola didn’t intend to kill. She just wanted to teach Pelin a lesson, including Pelin’s arrogance to him before, so he didn’t stop her.

“I’m the Dragon Valley elder! How dare you offend me like this!”

“ Buzz buzz …” (electric spark sound)

“Stop! Otherwise, even Meria won’t be able to protect you!”

“ Buzz buzz buzz buzz …”

“Gueroas! Save me!”

“ Buzz buzz buzz buzz …”

“ Ah! stop! “

“ Buzz buzz buzz buzz buzz buzz buzz buzz …”

“I’m just kidding! Zola!”

“ Buzz buzz …”

“My relationship with your parents has become friends. You can’t treat me like this!”

“ Oh ?” The purple lightning finally slowed down.

“It’s true! It’s absolutely true!” Pelin confirmed while trembling all over. He felt his tongue was numb to the point of losing his voice.

“Who are you?” Zola asked dazedly, and the purple l spark was doubled.

Pelin, “…”

Everyone, “…”

At this moment, the mist of the trial illusion suddenly froze, and a shout sounded. A dazzling golden light flashed in the sky, and a huge golden palm appeared in the air, pressing down on Zola.

As soon as the golden palm appeared, the surrounding space showed traces of being shattered by the terrifying pressure. Zola showed a solemn expression. She abandoned Pelin and launched a giant purple lightning hand to greet the golden palm.

The speed of the 2 sides suddenly slowed down under the force. It was only a brief stalemate in the air before the lightning seemed to be on the verge of collapse. However, soon, there were 4 more rays in the lightning, black, white, blue, yellow, and red. The entire power suddenly increased several times or even dozens of times.

Sethtine was taken aback, “Not only wind element, but also earth element, light elements… Complete 6 elemental hearts!”

With that said, the giant lightning hand and the giant golden hand had grabbed each other instantly. Everyone only felt that the nearby space vibrated violently, and the 2 giant palms collapsed at the same time as they canceled each other.

Pelin, who witnessed this scene, was horrified. Gueroas’ strength is already approaching the intermediate stage of the Demi-God, which is almost on par with the Great Elder Meria while Zola’s strength should be similar to mine, yet she is able to take this blow!

It seemed that he didn’t lose for no reason.

At this time, the Wind Elemental King Sethtine had already understood that this powerful dragon woman was the beneficiary of the wind element source power. To be precise, she had obtained the source power of the 6 Elemental Kings. However, even if one could get the 6 elements source power, it was quite difficult to successfully form the strongest [6 Elements Kingdom]. One carelessness could result in annihilation.

The woman not only successfully established the [6 Elements Kingdom], but she even surpasses the realm of the ordinary element kingdom, producing the rhythm of the elemental heart!

This kind of strength is no longer an ordinary kingdom. Even in a certain aspect of ‘quality’, she has surpassed Demi-God and is close to the level of ‘might’. That is why she can resist the Demi-God level giant golden hand.

The blue light that flickered in Wind Elemental King’s eyes gradually subsided. He seemed to want to say something, but shook his head and said to himself, “I should wait…”

“ Huh? ” Gueroas’ voice in the illusion was a little surprised. A figure rose into the air, and the giant palm appeared again.

The golden light and power of this giant palm were even greater than before. Although Zola had the [6 Elements Kingdom], she was only kingdomized after all. The giant lightning palm now cost her a lot of strength. It would probably be difficult to take another blow in such a short period of time.

A more dazzling brilliance suddenly flashed beside Zola. A vast and powerful breath surged out. From the dazzling stars, a punch was launched.

“ Boom! ” Under the horrified gazes of the dragons, the golden giant palm shattered instantly.

Then, the dragons watching the battle only saw starlight and golden light intertwined. Their vision was violently distorted by an indescribable power. In less than a minute, all the lights except the starlight disappeared.

The smoke and dust dissipated. The sturdy ground of the trial field was full of crisscrossing terrifying cracks. The original mist covering the basin disappeared. The magic circle of the trial seemed to be completely destroyed by the powerful strength as the dragons looked over here in amazement.

The 2 figures gradually became clear. The one wearing the magnificent 4-winged armor was Chen Rui who had activated the [Red Pole Star Transformation]. He spread his right hand and aimed at another young man.

The young man was of medium stature with a stern face and prominent facial features. The half-armor on his body had multiple cracks, and he was panting slightly.

“Do you concede defeat?” Chen Rui asked.

The young man felt the terrifying breath in his right hand, but his indifferent expression remained unchanged. He just looked at the damaged trial field and answered irrelevantly, “You’re very powerful, but you have destroyed the trial field of the dragons.”

“This trial field was originally mine, not the dragons’.” Chen Rui sneered, “I only ask you, do you concede?”

The youth nodded, “Concede.”

Chen Rui waved his right arm to the sky. A red light flew straight into the sky. Everyone had an illusion like the entire sky was cut in half by this ‘red line’.

By the time the ‘red line’ disappeared, the space cracks scattered along the way seemed to confirm the terrifying power of the blow just now.

The young man was shocked. He knew that if he was hit by this, even with the physique of the holy dragon, he would be annihilated without a doubt.

The rest of the dragons were stunned, and no one dared to speak out again— Even the most powerful Elder Gueroas was easily defeated by the opponent!

Chen Rui’s figure flashed and returned to Ms. Fairy Dragon’s side. The [True Red Extinction] just now was undoubtedly a demonstration of strength, and the effect was marvelous.

Zola had changed from the lightning phantasms to the human form. She held Chen Rui’s hand with a quiet and gentle look as if she had nothing to do with baking the dragon just now.

When the young man saw Zola, he raised his brows, revealing an unexpected expression, “Zola?”

“Uncle Gueroas.” Ms. Fairy Dragon was stunned for a while; she didn’t pretend to be deaf this time.

“ En , good that you’re back.” Gueroas seemed to have a more silent temperament. He just nodded in relief without asking any questions. He went straight to Karru’s side and rescued the unconscious sissy.

At this time, the dragons looked at Chen Rui and Zola with very different gazes. No matter which race, the real powerhouse could always win admiration and awe.

Chen Rui could see that although Gueroas didn’t talk much, he was definitely kind to Zola. it was not because he lost to him just now, but a real kindness. He thought about it for a while before speaking, “I think topics like ‘rules’ need no discussion, and I believe Elder Pelin has no opinion.”

The Elder Blue Dragon, who had regained his human form, stood up tremblingly with the help of Karru. His injured body occasionally emitted green mists. He looked downcast and did not speak.

Zola’s strength had obviously surpassed him. The so-called ‘rules’ were just a joke. The most embarrassing thing was that he lost his reputation in front of his son and a group of dragon juniors.

“Sir Gueroas.” Chen Rui’s star armor gradually faded as he revealed a friendly smile, “Can you help inform Great Elder Meria? I think this should be great news for a mother.”

Gueroas nodded as he looked at Zola’s hand holding Chen Rui.

Since Gueroas and Meria were also elders at the Demi-God level, they didn’t have the token to directly summon Meria, let alone Pelin, the mortal enemy. However, Gueroas had his own method of communication. After he sent a message and established a space fixed point, in 3 hours or so, a teleportation portal opened at the fixed point, and 2 people rushed out. It was the Great Elder Meria and Elf King Span.

Both the great elder fairy dragon and the Elf King looked a bit flustered. Meria usually had her purple hair in a high bun, but it was now scattered. It was probably because she was preparing for the teleportation array in a hurry that she had no time to care about her appearance at all.

“Zola!” Meria shouted at the first sight of her daughter who was chatting with Isabella.

Zola stared at Meria dazedly, and her lips moved. Before she could speak, she was embraced by Meria who had teleported over.

“Baby, it’s been 20,000 years. You’re finally back, woo woo …” Meria didn’t have the majesty of the great elder as tears streamed down her arms when she hugged her daughter.

Zola called out ‘mommy’ as she buried her head in Meria’s chest with slightly shaking shoulders.

The Elf King didn’t teleport. He just strode to his wife and daughter, spread his arms, and hugged the 2 most important women in his life.

Chen Rui was teary when he suddenly thought of the scene of the reunion with Catherine and his daughter in the final of the Demon Realm’s martial battle competition. Isabella walked over, held his hand gently, and looked at the family of 3 admiringly.

chapters.title: Chapter 912: Decision
chapters.body:
Chapter 912: Decision

After the family reunited, Meria still held Zola’s hand tightly, lest her daughter would disappear if she let go.

The Old Father-in-law Elf King walked up to Chen Rui and patted his shoulder hard, “You’re good. Very good!”

Chen Rui noticed that the strength of the Old Father-in-law Elf King had actually climbed to Demi-God. In fact, Span’s strength was already Demi-God more than 20,000 years ago. It was just because the elf tribe had an existential crisis at that time, and in order to seal the Tree of Nature’s curse of the Jade Forest Sea’s elf tribe, Span paid the price of losing power and life. If it wasn’t for the secret technique of sharing life that Meria activated later, the Elf King would have fallen.

Rather than saying that Span’s arrival at Demi-God was an ‘advance’, it was more appropriate to say that it was a ‘recovery’. There should also be a credit for Chen Rui’s ‘filial piety’ for dedicating him many treasures last time. However, under the excitement of the old father-in-law, he seemed to be unable to control his strength and almost broke his son-in-law’s shoulder bones.

“Mommy, this is Paglio, this is Krobelus, and… Dodo. They are my best friends.”

Meria’s eyes lit up. Zola used to be a loner. She was either immersed in researching or training, and she never had any friends, but now she had made a few ‘good friends’ – That couple should also be dragons, but that Kingdom level onion is a bit weird…

Krobelus dragged Paglio to bow to Meria and her husband. Master Poison Dragon seemed a little embarrassed. In fact, he and Zola were mortal enemies. No one could have imagined that the 2 would turn from enemies into friends and become real friends.

Meria’s eyes were finally fixed on Isabella. Although she didn’t see the previous scene where Isabella and Chen Rui held hands, the great elder fairy dragon instinctively felt the ‘threat’ of this charming woman to her daughter and she asked cautiously, “And what about this lady?”

Facing Zola’s mother, even Isabella couldn’t help feeling uneasy.

“Isabella, 1 of his women…” Zola’s answer made the atmosphere awkward, but Ms. Fairy Dragon immediately took Isabella’s hand and added, “Yini is my sister and also my closest family in ‘that place’.”

Meria and Span were very surprised by Zola’s words and titles. The couple exchanged a quick glance and nodded slightly.

Isabella glanced gratefully at Zola and bowed respectfully to Meria, “Madam Meria.”

“Don’t be so restrained, Yini. Since you are Zola’s sister, then you are also one of us. Call me auntie.”

“Aunt Meria.”

Chen Rui breathed a sigh of relief, “Aunt Meria, let’s go over there and sit down.”

“You should call me Madam Meria!” Madam mother-in-law gave her son-in-law a dissatisfied look, but she smiled at Isabella. She came over and affectionately pulled Isabella as well as Ms. Fairy Dragon aside to talk.

Chen Rui was speechless for a while. He secretly lamented as he faintly heard the question of, “How many sisters do you all have?” from the madam mother-in-law. As he looked at sir father-in-law, he smiled guilty and explained in haste.

After struggling to explain for a long time, the Elf King seemed to have heard nothing. Instead, he asked, “What did you say?”

Chen Rui:  …

No doubt, like father, like daughter.

Master Poison Dragon, who was watching on the side, seemed to gloat over the misfortune. He was whistling with the expression ‘you have this day too’ on his face. Only the clueless Master Truly Handsome jumped up and down happily, demonstrating that ignorance is bliss.

Reunited after such a long time, the family seemed to have endless things to talk about.

“Baby, it turns out that you have been through so much. No matter what, never leave us again.” Span looked at the daughter beside Chen Rui dotingly, “Wherever you are going, daddy and mommy will accompany you!”

Span’s last sentence was a little loud. Gueroas from the distance slowly walked over, “Span, you can go, but Meria can’t go.”

Meria frowned while Span sneered, “Our family can go wherever we want! What right does an outsider like you have to talk about!”

Gueroas ignored the Elf King and walked across to Meria, “Meria, let’s go back to the Dragon Valley. The elders council is about to be held; you must not leave at this time.”

Span jumped up. Instead of his usual grace and fake deafness, he broke out in foul language, “Gueroas! Meria is my wife, go back your ass. Get lost!”

Chen Rui had already seen that something was wrong between the dragon elder and the Old Father-in-law Elf King. Zola leaned into his ear and whispered, “Uncle Gueroas and mommy are students of the same teacher. He was also mommy’s biggest suitor back then…”

Oh! Chen Rui showed a realization expression. No wonder Gueroas, who is cherishing words like gold, becomes more talkative when he comes to Meria. No wonder old father-in-law is so mad.

“Span!” Gueroas exclaimed, “Do you want to get Meria into trouble?”

The Elf King sneered coldly, “Isn’t it just the position of the great elder? Whoever wants it can take it! I’ve been fed up with all the boring intrigues in Dragon Valley for so many years! Now we have found our daughter, we have no regret. The Dragon Valley… the worst is just to part ways! Our family will go back to the Jade Forest Sea!”

“Do you have the same plan too? Meria!” Gueroas looked directly at Meria.

“Span,” Meria didn’t answer directly, but she held Span’s hand first with a very gentle gaze, “Remember the scene when you desperately rushed to the Jade Forest Sea? I, too, have a responsibility that I can’t let go of.”

The Elf King’s anger gradually subsided. He clenched his wife’s warm palm without saying anything.

Only then did Meria look at Gueroas, “I have never forgotten teacher’s dying exhortation and my responsibilities, but Stanwell has been preparing for a long time for the elders council this time. There is also the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor backing him, so it will be difficult to resist his tactic. Not only can’t I keep the great elder position, there is even the possibility of being expelled from the Dragon Valley.”

“If you go, there is still a chance. If you don’t participate, you won’t even have the last chance!” Gueroas clenched his fists.

“I didn’t say that I won’t participate in the elders council this time. I will try my best to fight for it.” Meria nodded and handed Chen Rui a communication ball, “Richard, take this communication ball.”

Due to the presence of many outsiders, Meria and Span had always paid attention to the way they addressed Chen Rui, “You stay on the Storm Island with Zola, Isabella, and these friends. I will contact you as soon as I solve some things. “

“No, Meria, Zola should go back with you.”

The words of Gueroas completely triggered the Elf King. 2 long and narrow rapiers appeared in his hand, and countless overlapping images appeared in Gueroas’ body in an instant. The sword light shrouded the entire sky.

The overlapping images and the sword light suddenly disappeared. The 2 light blue rapiers pierced through Gueroas’ shoulders, staining his shirt with blood, but Span, who was holding the dual rapiers, showed a surprised expression on his face.

Span’s swordsmanship was extraordinary and he was Demi-God back then, but after all, he just advanced to Demi-God. On the other hand, Gueroas was from the strongest holy dragon family. His strength was close to the intermediate stage of the Demi-God, and the battle experience was extremely rich. Both stood equal chances, so it wasn’t easy to end the fight.

The reason why Span’s 2 swords struck directly was entirely because Gueroas did not dodge it.

“Gueroas!” Meria also exclaimed.

Gueroas didn’t look at Meria this time. He was staring at Span who was still shocked, “Do you know how outstanding Zola is? She perfectly beat Pelin who was at the peak stage of the Kingdom level – Not only Pelin, but at the same level, she has no opponent; including you before your advancement! She even managed to take a Demi-God blow from me unscathed! She’s the most outstanding genius in Dragon Valley over the years!”

After Span and Meria saw Zola, they focused on their daughter and didn’t care about other things at all. After hearing Gueroas say this, the couple realized what happened before they came here.

Darling Zola defeated Pelin?

And she took the blow of Gueroas?

“You should know exactly what a genius like this means to the Dragon Valley. Although Royal Majesty Pagris secretly supports Stanwell and wants to take full control of the elders council, he values more the future of the Dragon Valley as a whole. With Zola here, Meria has the capital to deal with the elders council. Even if she no longer serves as the great elder, at least she will not be exiled. Span, you are Meria’s husband. If you insist on taking her and Zola away. I have no right to stop you from leaving. But have you thought about it from Meria’s point of view? I just want to ask you one thing. After you were pushed out of the Jade Forest Sea, did you really give up the elf tribe?”

Span was silent. When he gave up the elf empress and chose Meria, he was rejected by the elf tribe and left the Jade Forest Sea. However, when the elf tribe was at the juncture of life and death, Span put aside all previous grudges, joined forces with Meria to break into the forest sea, kill the fallen elf, and seal the Tree of Nature at the expense of life and strength. To say that he gave up the elf tribe would be deceiving himself. Just like what Meria said before, she also had responsibilities that she couldn’t let go of.

A strong blue light was emitted from the rapiers, but it was not for killing the enemy, but for healing. In the blink of an eye, the 2 rapiers had disappeared. Gueroas’ wound stopped bleeding and began to heal quickly. Of course, this was only a surface healing, However, the holy dragon had a strong self-healing power, and it would only take a few days to recover.

The Elf King’s move undoubtedly acquiesced to Gueroas’ proposal. At this time, Meria said, “I’m me; Zola is Zola. My daughter is not any kind of bargaining chip. I will not let my daughter’s freedom be restricted.”

The Dragon Emperor Pagris was behind the marriage between Zola and Karru back then. Pelin was the biggest supporter of Pagris at the time, and Meria had a very high prestige in the elders council. Through this marriage, the Dragon Emperor could unite and further consolidate the newly ascended throne, but this also caused Zola’s rebellion. As a result, she left for 20,000 years.

So, now Meria would no let her daughter get involved in the struggle of the Dragon Valley no matter how.

Gueroas smiled wryly, “Meria, I’m not trying to restrain Zola’s freedom. On the contrary, as long as she can show her strength and value, she can do whatever she wants. Besides, your son-in-law accidentally destroyed this trial field of dragons when he was fighting with me. The cooperation with the Storm Island has already aroused the dissatisfaction of the elders council. Fortunately, the dragons who participated in the trial are very interested in this trial. Now that the trial field has been destroyed, I’m afraid that it will make things worse.”

“You don’t need to say more, Gueroas. I’ve made up my mind.” Meria’s attitude was extremely firm.

“Wait a minute, mommy.” Zola said, “I’ll accompany you back.”

“No!” Meria and Span said in unison.

“Aunt Meria, Uncle Span, listen to me.” Chen Rui’s voice sounded, “First of all, I want to say… Maybe in your eyes, Zola is still the little girl who should hide behind her parents, but in fact, your daughter has grown up. She has her own choice and responsibility. I think her choice is correct, so I support her. I will go to Dragon Valley with her.”

Zola glanced at Chen Rui with undisguised affection flashing behind her glasses.

“No, you all…”

“Meria, Richard is right, our daughter has really grown up.” The Elf King stopped his wife’s words, “We are a family. No matter what it is, we will face it together.”

Meria was silent for a long time before she finally nodded slowly, “Okay, then let’s go back together. I want to see what kind of storm Stanwell can stir up.”

“This is my Meria.” The Elf King and Meria looked at each other with pride, “Worse comes to worst, we make a big mess just like when I was in the Jade Forest Sea!”

“I’ll go too.” Isabella said softly, holding Zola’s hand.

“How can you count us 2 out in such a merry thing?” Master Poison Dragon hugged Ms. Betty’s waist and grinned. Master Truly Handsome also raised his hand, expressing his willingness to go to the Dragon Valley to find some weaklings to bully.
