“Very good.” Span didn’t say anything polite and just nodded. Daughter is right. They are no doubt her true friends.

“Since that’s the case…” Gueroas said a sentence and turned his head away. “You should hurry up and repair this trial field. At least try to restore some of its functions before the elders council is held.”

“ Hmph! ” Span glanced at Gueroas’ back, “This guy is annoying, but the proposal is right. Richard, let’s hurry up.”

“No need.” Chen Rui showed a confident smile, “If Stanwell is going to use this as an excuse to suppress Aunt Meria, I’m pretty sure I’ll slap this back in his face. Let’s build a long-term 2-way teleportation portal while there’s still time. I believe that after the elders council this time, Storm Island will become an indispensable true partner of the entire Dragon Valley.”

Both Meria and Span had witnessed Chen Rui’s abilities, and their eyes lit up when they saw how confident he was.

“If he said he can do it, he can definitely do it.” Zola added, and Isabella followed suit.

“Although this guy is cunning and shameless, his ability to bluff won’t lose to anyone.” Master Poison Dragon added another sentence.

“Master, truly-handsome!”

chapters.title: Chapter 913: The Dragons’ Elders Council
chapters.body:
Chapter 913: The Dragons’ Elders Council

The Dragon Valley was not a valley, but a collective name for a huge mountain. Unlike the Dragon Island in the Demon Realm, which had separate islands, the dragons in the Dragon Valley were relatively close to their den and had a closer ethnic relationship.

The core of the Dragon Valley was the Holy Spirit Summit in the central mountain, which was a huge peak that needed to be looked up at.

This was where the royal palace of the ruler of the Dragon Valley, Dragon Emperor Pagris, was located.

The palace of dragons was completely different from the elf tribe’s feeling of delicate beauty and exquisiteness to the point of a strand of hair. It looked more majestic and… ‘vulgar’.

The so-called ‘vulgar’ was the feeling of a nouveau riche. Even every inch of the material on the ground was a valuable treasure which looked crystal clear and shining. Everyone could see that it was a valuable commodity. This was the consistent style of dragons.

In the palace, the regular elder council was being held.

The convening of the elder council was a major event for the dragons. Generally speaking, it was held every 5,000 years. The Dragon Emperor and all the elders would attend it, mainly to discuss the personnel changes of the dragons, discuss the future development, and vote to decide some important matters.

Personnel changes include the promotion of elders, the selection of elites, and so on. Today’s conference had attracted the attention of more dragons than ever because it was said that this personnel change was an unprecedented big change.

The previous direct apprentice of the Great Elder Nierince, the current Great Elder Meria, was likely to step down. Not only that, Meria had made countless mistakes in serving as the great elder for nearly 30,000 years. If the crimes were convicted, the great elder might face imprisonment or even exile.

For the dragons of the Dragon Valley, the Great Elder Meria sometimes appeared to be very domineering. Sometimes she would even prank, which made many dragons complain, but as the great elder, Meria definitely lived up to the title. Over the years, she had contributed numerous times to help the dragons. Almost every giant dragon of the magic department in the entire Dragon Valley had received more or less guidance from her. Therefore, she had a high prestige.

This time, the most promising candidate to replace Meria as the great elder was Stanwell. Stanwell was a ‘newbie’ who was promoted after the Dragon Emperor Pagris ascended the throne, and his promotion speed was very fast. In just 20,000 years, he had become the second person in the elder council after Meria – For dragons, 20,000 years was really nothing. It was like a guy who had no foundation and had been in politics for less than 10 years, actually holding the important position of Deputy Prime Minister.

In fact, everyone understood that behind Stanwell was the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor. Throughout the ages, there had been a wonderful balance between the elder council of the Dragon Valley and the Dragon Emperor. The decision-making power of the elder council sometimes even constrained the Dragon Emperor. It was a bit similar to the relationship between Chen Rui’s previous life’s king and parliament. Of course, this ‘king’ had much more power.

The current Dragon Emperor Pagris belonged to the type of heroic talent and was more authoritarian. He had always wanted to cancel this constraint and realize his absolute reign. When he first ascended the throne 20,000 years ago, due to his unstable foundation, he adopted a softer approach to the elder council. Zola’s marriage was 1 of the means he used to win over the Great Elder Meria.

As a result, Zola ran away from the marriage and the Elf King beat Pelin up out of anger. Meria was a very smart person. After thinking about it, she did not calm the situation. On the contrary, she escalated this matter by taking the initiative to hand over the ‘authority’ to the Dragon Emperor. Pagris knew the intent of this move. Not only did he not blame Meria, but he also admitted the mistake of ‘presumptuous matchmaking’, and comforted the Meria couple more.

The result of this matter was a win-win situation, Meria gained Pagris’ trust, and the Dragon Emperor’s position was further consolidated. However, the position of the great elder had the power to interfere with every major policy, and Meria had a very high prestige among the dragons. This was always uncomfortable for Pagris who had a strong desire to control.

As the saying went, when a new king is crowned, he brings to the court his own favorites and expels those of his predecessor. For 20,000 years, Pagris had been cultivating his own direct power. Confidant Stanwell was a representative figure who emerged because of this.

This elder council was the time for Stanwell to ‘show his sword’. To be precise, the one who really showed his sword was the Dragon Emperor Pagris who had been planning for 20,000 years.

After Meria, Pelin and Gueroas arrived at the palace hall, the elder council was officially convened.

First of all, Dragon Emperor Pagris routinely summarized the development of the Dragon Valley’s dragons over the past 5,000 years, and he expressed his gratitude to the elder council for their support.

After the Great Elder Meria paid tribute to the Dragon Emperor on behalf of the elder council, Stanwell started pointing out the series of crimes that Meria committed. Stanwell’s move was expected by the elders. In fact, everyone knew that most of the so-called ‘crimes’ such as deceiving the emperor, misbehavior, personal gain, and suppressing newcomers were partly caused by Meria’s dominance, but most of them were ungrounded.

“These charges are well-documented. Everyone can prove it. I’ll just give 1 example.” Stanwell glanced at Pelin, “During the union marriage between Meria and Pelin, Meria’s daughter, Zola, ran away from the marriage. Instead of apologizing to Pelin, Meria instigated her husband, Span, to go to Pelin’s house to severely injure him as well as looted his wealth! This kind of domineering atrocity is simply outrageous! Elder Pelin, as a victim, you only need to say if there is any such thing?”

Pelin didn’t dare to look at Meria. He just nodded, “Yes.”

“Great elder,” Stanwell smiled slightly, “What do you have to say?”

Meria didn’t even look at Stanwell. She turned her gaze to Dragon Emperor Pagris, “Your Majesty, do you think so too?”

Pagris shrugged, smiling silently.

“Stanwell, go on.” Meria turned her head at Stanwell, and she said lightly.

Stanwell felt that the 2 eyes of the great elder fairy dragon penetrated his soul like sharp arrows, and he shivered slightly. He did not dare to look directly and looked away, then he continued. Many of the following ‘crimes’ were truths among the false; most of those truths were actually condoned by Pagris deliberately back then, but Meria did not explain it. Dragon Emperor Gelgoris did not open his mouth either.

In the end, Stanwell finally showed his fangs, “Meria is no longer fit to be the great elder, and her actions are too unacceptable, I suggest imprisoning her for 10,000 years or expelling her from the Dragon Valley to set an example.”

Whether it was imprisonment or expulsion, it was considered the most serious punishment, and there was basically no possibility of a comeback. It seemed that the Dragon Emperor was determined to bring down the great elder this time, but Meria’s prestige was evident. In addition, these years she did not only hard work, even her credits were also undeniable. If she was really punished like this, the elders would feel disheartened. For a while, there was a commotion of discussion.

“Your Majesty, I have something urgent to report.” After Stanwell finished speaking, Gueroas came out, “The trial field on Storm Island has been destroyed.”

“What?” Pagris frowned, “Who did this?”

Gueroas looked at Meria, “The son-in-law of the Great Elder Meria.”

Gueroas might seem indifferent and quiet, but he was not a simple-minded person. After the battle on the Storm Island, his first reaction was to block the news and forbid anyone to communicate with the Dragon Valley, including Pelin. Meria and the others just entered the palace at the right time to participate in the elder council, which was also Gueroas’ idea. The purpose was to not give Stanwell time to prepare or respond. Taking the initiative to ‘expose’ this matter now was undoubtedly a way to make concessions in order to gain advantages.

“It’s Meria again!” Stanwell no doubt immediately jumped out to criticize, “This trial field is very important to the dragons, and it was 1 of the only correct decisions for Meria. Unexpectedly…”

“Wait a minute.” Pagris heard the key issue and interrupted Stanwell, “Did you mention her son-in-law?”

The elders also realized this. The voice of the discussion suddenly subsided, and all eyes looked at Gueroas.

“Zola is back.” Gueroas’ next sentence shocked the audience, “She defeated Elder Pelin.”

“Zola… defeated Pelin?” Pagris was taken aback, thinking he had heard it wrong, “Are you sure it was Zola and not… Meria or Span?”

“Yeah, it’s Zola, and it’s a total defeat.” Gueroas glanced at Pelin, “Elder Pelin?”

Pelin felt the astonished eyes of everyone and wanted to find a hole to burrow into, but the fact was obvious. Even if he were to fight with Zola again, it would only be more embarrassing. He couldn’t deny it, so he nodded.

“Zola defeated Elder Pelin with his best power of lightning. Don’t laugh at Elder Pelin. If it is the same level, whether it is me, Span or Meria against Zola, it will be the same result as Elder Pelin!”

Stanwell said in horror, “You mean, Zola has reached the peak stage of the Kingdom level?”

“It’s not just an ordinary peak stage of the Kingdom level! At that time, I was protecting the dragons who participated in the trial field, and I attacked her without knowing the context. As a result…” Gueroas sighed and paused, ” Zola actually resisted my 70% strength blow unscathed. Elder Pelin, including all the dragon elites of the trials, can testify. Zola is the most outstanding genius I have seen in the dragons like no other!”

Pelin also nodded quickly: Losing to the most outstanding is not an embarrassing thing, especially since Gueroas has admitted that he himself is not a match for Zola at the same level.

In just 20,000 years, she had reached the peak stage of the Kingdom level! Invincible in the same realm! And she could even fight with a person of a higher level!

3 almost ‘impossible’ things were all concentrated in 1 person!

No wonder Gueroas used 2 phrases: the most outstanding genius! Like no other!

Not to mention the elders, even Pagris was moved. Stanwell didn’t expect such a turning point, and he was momentarily stunned.

“Meria, is this true?”

This effect was exactly what Meria expected. Meria smiled lightly, “Compared with other things, I’m more happy to be reunited with my daughter. As for strength… Zola is now outside the palace. If Your Majesty does not believe it, you can summon her immediately.”

“Okay!” Pagris nodded, “Gueroas, bring Zola to the hall immediately. I think, not only me, all the elders are impatient to see the most outstanding dragon genius.”

chapters.title: Chapter 914: Daring Human?
chapters.body:
Chapter 914: Daring Human?

After a while, Zola appeared in the main hall of the palace.

Not to mention strength, the peerless beauty of Ms. Fairy Dragon alone could attract everyone’s attention, but Pagris’ eyes obviously lacked aesthetics; he just looked at Zola with a scrutinizing gaze.

Ms. Fairy Dragon appeared to be calm, or to be more precise, in a daze. You stare as you like; I’ll stay dazed.

“It’s really the peak stage of the Kingdom level. Very good.” Pagris’ eyes lit up as he sensed the power breath that Zola exuded. He made no secret of his appreciation, “Zola, now, attack me with all your strength.”

Ms. Fairy Dragon didn’t seem to catch him, “What?”

The Dragon Emperor seemed very patient as he repeated, “Attack…”

Just as Pagris spoke, Ms. Fairy Dragon suddenly launched a sneak attack.

Her body turned into water ripples in the blink of an eye. Almost at the same time, Pagris’ body and the throne behind him were frozen into an ice sculpture.

Frozen instantly.

Meria and other elders who were proficient in elements could sense that this strike seemed simple, but it was extremely mysterious. It not only contained the ‘freezing’ of the water element, but also the ‘solidification’ of the earth element. The 2 element powers were perfectly overlapped together, which exerted several times the usual momentum.

Before most of the elders could react, a purple lightning with terrifying power pierced through the ice sculpture, and the entire ice sculpture shattered.

Everyone was taken aback, but Pagris’ body did not shatter; only a human-shaped shell shattered.

A ‘ball’ appeared in the Dragon Emperor’s hand. It was a light ball with lightning, which was the biggest blow from Zola.

This result was not unexpected because Pagris was the only super powerhouse in the Dragon Valley to reach the level of Pseudo-God, not to mention that Zola was only at the peak stage of the Kingdom level. Even in the peak stage of the Demi-God, it was impossible to hurt the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor.

However, the attentive elders had discovered that the throne behind Pagris was cracked.

“It’s actually a composite strength of 6 elements. Even the completely opposite elements are so perfectly integrated. Judging from the power alone, it has far surpassed the kingdomized level. This should be the most powerful [6 Elements Kingdom] of the fairy dragons?” Pagris’ golden pupils glowed brightly. With a flick of a finger, the light ball extinguished without a trace.

The Dragon Emperor’s gaze swept across the cracks on the throne behind him. Instead of anger, he stood up and laughed, “No doubt she is the most outstanding genius like no other! Zola, I’m now directly appointing you as an elder, enjoying the highest privileges! Elder Meria, you have a wonderful daughter. Very good! Very good!”

There were 3 ‘very good’ including the previous one, which was very rare for Pagris. Stanwell followed Pagris for many years. How could he not understand the mind of Royal Majesty – The appearance of Meria’s genius daughter had changed the original intention of the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor. Such a peerless young genius was rare to see in a million years. She was undoubtedly 1 of the Dragon Valley’s greatest hopes for the future. In any race, as long as it was a qualified patriarch, they would not give up or treat such a character badly.

Not to mention that Zola was directly named an elder, Pagris’ title for Meria alone had shown his attitude: No matter what ‘exaggerated’ things Meria had done in the past, they could all be ignored.

Under these circumstances, it was impossible to banish or imprison Meria. What Stanwell had to do now was to settle for the next best thing and push Meria out of the great elder position.

“Congratulations to Elder Zola, and also to Your Majesty, for having an extraordinary genius in the Dragon Valley.” Stanwell’s topic changed, “I would like to ask Elder Meria, has the dragons’ trial field on the Storm Island been repaired?”

Just now, Stanwell and Pelin had secretly exchanged some thoughts. He learned from Pelin that the trial field that had been destroyed on the Storm Island had still not been repaired. With a thought, he immediately decided to use it as an excuse to stir up an issue.

Meria’s eyes flickered. I originally wanted to entice Stanwell to take the bait, but I didn’t expect that he actually shifts to this topic himself . Now she frowned on purpose without saying a word.

Stanwell was secretly delighted as he shook his head and said, “The trial field was built together by Meria’s husband Elf King Span and the Storm Island’s controller. It has always been well-received by the dragons. I have seen it myself, and it is indeed an ingenious and mysterious illusion. Now I already know that the controller is Elder Meria’s son-in-law ‘Richard’. Regardless of whether she had selfishness in signing the Storm Island contract or not, what Elder Meria is doing now is unconvincing. Elder Meria clearly knew that she might be sanctioned by the elders council today, but she deliberately instigated her son-in-law to destroy the trial field at such a critical moment. What does this show? He is clearly threatening the elder council and Your Majesty! “

‘Forcing the emperor with merit’ was a more serious act than ‘suppressing the emperor with high power’. The last sentence almost touched the scales of the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor. Pagris raised his brows slightly and sat down again. Regardless of whether Stanwell’s words were true or not, this was a taboo for him.

Stanwell noticed Pagris’ expression and hurriedly continued, “Everyone makes mistakes. I’m not proposing to expel and imprison Elder Meria, but I think that Meria is indeed unfit to serve as the great elder.”

Meria bowed to Pagris indifferently, “Your Majesty, this matter is related to the future of dragons, and it also involves some secrets. But since Stanwell mentioned it in the elders council, will Your Majesty allow me to publicly disclose what I initially planned to report to you privately?”

“Okay. ” Pagris pondered and nodded slightly. If it was before Zola appeared, it would definitely not be this attitude, “However… I hope there is a real explanation for the trial field incident.”

“Of course, first of all I want to introduce my son-in-law, a special human, Richard.”

As soon as Meria finished speaking, a human appeared beside Zola. It was Chen Rui.

The elders were all taken aback. When did this person come in? On the surface, the breath is only a Demon Overlord level, but he actually concealed himself from the presence of so many powerful dragons!

“Meria, you are so daring!” Stanwell shouted, “Today is the dragon elders’ meeting, you actually let a human in!”

Pagris raised his hand, and the surrounding noises suddenly fell silent, “You came in with Zola, right? What a great hidden talent. Even if I control the entire palace, I can only feel a little strange.”

“Your Majesty.” Chen Rui bowed to Pagris. Pagris was a very young man with silver hair and golden eyes. His expression was casual, and he was somewhat familiar.

Chen Rui remembered that when Samuel and Paul battled, the ‘young man’ who sat side by side with his human father, Lex the Great, was Pagris, the emperor of dragons in the human world!

No wonder a word of appreciation from Pagris would let Lex decide to send Samuel to the Dragon Valley’s dragon rider selection.

“First of all, forgive me, Your Majesty. After all, my intrusion is very rude, but I have made a promise with my wife that no matter how big the danger is, I will face it with her.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “But this worry is obviously superfluous, the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor’s boldness is beyond expectation. I’m delighted that Zola has such a senior and guide.”

“ Oh? ” Pagris glanced at Chen Rui lightly, “That’s a good reason, and the compliments are of a high standard. However, it’s not enough to offset your presumptuousness and Elder Meria’s unilateral decision.”

When it came to ‘unilateral decision’, Pagris’ tone was a little sterner.

“Your Majesty has misunderstood Elder Meria. Entering this palace was one of the conditions I requested to cooperate with the Dragon Valley.”

Pagris was surprised, “You cooperate with the Dragon Valley?”

“Arrogant! Ignorant!” Stanwell shouted, “If it wasn’t for Elder Zola’s sake, I’d smash you, an ant, into powder right now! Your Majesty, I suggest expelling this man from the Dragon Valley immediately! Besides, I think the issue of Elder Zola’s spouse should be revisited. As the best genius in the Dragon Valley, how can she marry a human! Her husband should at least be a dragon!”

Chen Rui looked at Stanwell and suddenly said, “Hello, brother-in-law.”

Stanwell was stunned: Brother-in-law? Recognizing me as relatives? What kind of turning point is this?

“What he meant was, ‘fuck your sister’.” Dragon Emperor Pagris’ explanation made Stanwell’s face flushed red with rage.

“Your confidence really makes me curious.” The Dragon Emperor looked at Chen Rui with interest. His seemingly indifferent golden eyes flashed a frightening cold light, “Before I consider Stanwell’s suggestion, I want to listen to your explanation first. Note that your explanation is Elder Meria’s, so you better think about it before you speak because there is only 1 chance.”

“First of all, let me explain about the trial field. Yes, I destroyed the trial field. I already have something that is 100 times better than that, so why should I care about the defective product? Besides, the ownership of this trial field is in my hands, not the dragons. Do I need to be punished by the dragons for destroying my own possession?”

Although the last sentence was domineering, Pagris immediately got the keypoint, “100 times better? You mean the original is only a defective product that is only equivalent to 1% of it?”

“It’s not even 1%!” Chen Rui raised a finger, “This is a special device that integrates entertainment and training. It can provide a stronger and more perfect trial. Not only can it cultivate countless better talents on the basis of zero casualties, it can also bring endless wealth! This is the most important project I want to cooperate with the dragons!”

“Zero casualties? Countless talents? Endless wealth?” Pagris’ eyes were shining brightly, “Is this true?”

“As the master of the ancient alchemy civilization, the master of all ancient guardians, including the titans, in a certain sense, my words have the same weight as the Your Majesty Dragon Emperor, which is the source of my confidence. Besides, the best is to prove it with evidence… Before I came here, a small trial facility had been set up in the plaza of the Rainbow Summit where Elder Meria lived. Now there should be quite a few dragons trying there. Why don’t Your Majesty go and take a look ?”

Pagris didn’t hesitate anymore this time. He stood up immediately, “Let’s go now!”

chapters.title: Chapter 915: Brother-In-Law? Go Out And Talk
chapters.body:
Chapter 915: Brother-In-Law? Go Out And Talk

About 10 minutes later, Pagris and the elders arrived at Meria’s Rainbow Summit.

Before they got to the plaza, everyone was taken aback by the long queue lined up down the aisle.

“Wagg, why are you in line again?”

“There was only 20 minutes of trial time just now! I’m not satisfied yet! But my account and level are still there, so I can continue this time! Hey , Carson, aren’t you the most afraid of trials? Why don’t you escape this time?”

“Afraid your ass! I killed that trial participant just now, and a small crystal that recovers 10% HP! Fortunately, I was quick and stored it in the warehouse. Haha! I will continue to take risks later?”

“You’re so damn lucky. Saroja and I were about to grind the monster to death, but the 20 minutes was actually up!”

“I heard that there are not only potions like crystals, but also special equipment!”

“This trial is much better than the one on the Storm Island. Not only does it have no soul recoil, but the feeling of fighting has always been imprinted in my mind. Sepear, let’s fight again when we go back later. This time I have the confidence to break your killing move!”

“Bring it on!”

“…”

Stanwell hurriedly said, “Your Majesty, this is a ruse by Meria and that human. These dragons may have been deliberately called to deceive…”

Pagris gave him a deep look, which made Stanwell panic and didn’t speak again.

The crowd soon came to the plaza that had a pillar. Elf King Span and Paglio and others were guarding at the side. Many dragons around the pillar were in human form, wearing a special magic helmet on their heads and lying on the ground. They seemed to be in a drowsy state as they did not even aware of Pagris’ arrival.

“Well, I’ll wake them up first.”

Chen Rui snapped his finger, interrupting the output of the magic power, and the dragons woke up one after another.

“Why is it gone?!”

“Sir Span, what happened?”

“I was fighting against the little boss with Latyi just now. It was about to die, then it was suddenly gone. Ah ah ah ah !”

“Hurry up and continue!”

“…”

“That guy hit me in the head with something… Ah? Your Highness Pagris!”

The dragons hurriedly stood up and bowed. Pagris looked at the dragons who were clamoring to continue. Many of whom were usually lazy. He was really surprised. Among these dragons, many were the children or apprentices of the elders, as well as the confidants he cultivated themselves. It is impossible to say that all of them are bribed by Meria to deceive me.

Then there is only 1 explanation, the new ‘trial field’ really has huge appeal as the human said.

Is it really 100 times better than the 1 in Storm Island?

When Pagris picked up a magic helmet, Chen Rui’s voice came from the side, “Your Majesty, the current trial system can only be used for trainers who do not exceed the peak stage of the Kingdom level. If Your Majesty wants to try, you must suppress your soul power to below the peak stage of the Kingdom level. Your Majesty can feel this way of training, but because your soul power is too high, so you cannot be affected by the real effect of the kingdom’s illusion power, so you cannot get the benefits of the training.”

Pagris nodded and put on the helmet. The rest of the elders followed suit, and Stanwell hesitated a bit before picking up the helmet.

3 hours later.

The Rainbow Summit Hall.

“Sir Richard.”

Pagris looked at the human opposite the round table with a smile on his face. After experiencing the ‘trial’ and listening to Chen Rui’s blueprint for the development of the magic game in the entire human world, the attitude of the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor had undergone tremendous changes.

Whether it is the accumulation of longevity or strength, dragons are superior to other races. Even if the magic game spreads to the entire human world, under the same training environment with the same opportunities, the progress of dragons will definitely surpass other races. Besides, the mode of continuous fee-charging – trials with zero casualties, countless talents, and endless wealth are actually things that can really be grasped in the hands!

This human was not boosting!

“Sir Richard said before that the plan is to spread out to the entire human world. I very much agree with this. This will also be a historic and important change. However, in terms of division, your share of 70% is too much. I think 50-50 is the most appropriate.”

“Your Majesty, to be honest, I also feel that I have lost by giving 30% to the Dragon Valley.” Chen Rui shook his head, and he was still unwilling to let go, “No one can imitate or decipher this technically. A few elders have already tried and confirmed it just now. In other words, I have unique technology and equipment, and I just need to find the most reliable partner. Pardon my impoliteness, but dragons are not the only forces that I can promote magic games to. For instance… the Holy Light Mountain, the elf tribe, also has the same or even better conditions. Are Your Majesty trying to push me to these forces?”

“Sir, don’t forget your relationship with the dragons. Whether it’s for public or private reasons, the elf tribe or the Holy Church is not comparable to us.” Pagris spread his hands, “Perhaps I’ll ask Elder Zola to talk to you?”

Chen Rui grinned, “In that case, Your Majesty should be mentally prepared to make a sacrifice as Zola is my woman. It will be considered lucky for the dragons to even have 10% by then. In fact, the magic trial game is just one of the cooperation projects between me and the dragons. For example… this.”

There was a bottle of wine on the table, and the fragrance of wine wafted out. Almost no dragons in the Dragon Valley were not fond of wine. Besides, the aroma of wine was so unique and strong, almost surpassing all the fine wines they had tasted. Many elders couldn’t help but sniff and stare at the wine on the table. The Dragon Emperor Pagris was also not exempted.

“Aromatic millet wine brewed with Fountain of Vitality. It is divided into 4 grades: Grade 3, grade 2, grade 1 and the best grade. This bottle is the best grade aromatic millet wine. Your Majesty can taste it first.”

As soon as he finished speaking, the wine bottle appeared in Pagris’ hands. After taking a sip, his eyes brightened. In the blink of an eye, the wine bottle had bottomed out.

Seeing the unsatisfied expression of the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor, the elders swallowed their saliva while Paglio next to Chen Rui laughed secretly: I drink such fine wine every day! In fact, the cunning human still held back something. That kind of white wine is the real killer.

“Not just aromatic millet wine, but also potion.”

“Potion?” Pagris shook his head, “I can confirm the cooperation of the aromatic millet wine now! As for potions… Let me tell you, this Elder Querondit is the grand master of pharmaceutics who studied potions for many years and he can craft 3 types of Eternal series potion. He is stronger than your human potion grand master; dragons don’t need it for the time being…”

Before Pagris finished his words, Chen Rui threw a bottle of black potion to the white-haired Elder Querondit.

When Querondit opened the cork and smelled it, he was shocked, “Wait a minute, Your Majesty!”

Pagris was startled. Querondit, who had always been calm, seemed to be drinking some kind of exciting potion. His whole body was shaking with excitement, “Elder Querondit?”

“Don’t rush me!” Querondit, who was over the moon, actually yelled at Dragon Emperor, “I want to test it first!”

With that said, Querondit had vanished. Soon, he was back in the hall with a dragon fly in his hand.

Dragon fly was 1 of the companion creatures of the dragons with strong attack and fragile body.

As Querondit stroked his hand, the dragonfly was split in half and died. All the people present were powerhouses. They clearly sensed that the dragon fly was dead.

However, when Querondit poured the black potion on the dragon fly, the 2 halves of the dragonfly actually healed slowly, then it finally flapped its wings and came to life again.

This scene made Pagris’ pupils shrink suddenly. He finally understood why Querondit lost his calm temperament. The rest of the elders were also moved – It is actually the legendary…

Chen Rui seemed to be serene without any emotional turmoil. Master Poison Dragon kept criticizing these dragons in the human world for being bumpkins who had never seen the world, but he never thought about what he looked like when he saw this kind of potion.

“It’s really a resurrection potion!” Querondit hollered, causing the entire hall to echo. He completely lost his usual composure. He rushed in front of Chen Rui, “Where did this bottle of potion come from?”

“As I said, I’m the master of the ancient alchemy civilization, um … This title is a bit bluffing, more precisely, an inheritor.” Chen Rui said indifferently, “Of course, I made the resurrection potion. Other than that, I can also make a full set of True series potions and Eternal series potions.”

Hearing this, Meria and Span looked at each other. In fact, they both knew very well that the son-in-law could make more than that. There was also the longevity potion, which was as famous as the resurrection potion. They looked at Chen Rui with satisfaction.

“Sir great grand master!” Querondit blushed with excitement. He suddenly remembered something, and bowed respectfully, “Please forgive apprentice’s rudeness. Apprentice couldn’t contain my excitement at the thought of seeing the highest resurrection potion in my lifetime.”

Apprentice? Chen Rui was taken aback. This master is at least tens of thousands of times my age, “ Wait, Elder Querondit…”

“There are no elders here, only great grand master and apprentice! I, I, that…” Querondit was incoherent. This scene undoubtedly shocked Pagris and his friends.

The dragons were people with wide knowledge. Not to mention the full set of True series potions, the full set of Eternal series potions is way beyond a bottle of eternal potion alone, and there is also the resurrection potion!

A grand master who can craft the entire series of eternal potions is already an existence that the whole world looks up to, not to mention the great grand master of making a top-level resurrection potion!

On this side, Chen Rui finally managed to temporarily calm down the fanatical old man’s idea of becoming his apprentice.

“Sir Richard is also a potion great grand master!” Pagris said in awe, “Great Elder Meria, I said before that you have a great husband. Now I add, you have a great daughter and a great son-in-law. “

Meria tilted her head gracefully and thanked the Dragon Emperor for his appreciation. Starting from Chen Rui’s demonstration of powerful ‘strength”, Stanwell’s facial expression became more and more unsightly. Now Pagris called her the ‘great elder’ which was equivalent to completely knocking his last fluke off a cliff.

“Your Majesty, the cooperation between the Dragon Valley and I should not be a problem now, right?”

“Sure, Sir Richard.” Pagris said with a smile.

Chen Rui shrugged, “But I still have a problem – Before we can actually cooperate, I think it’s necessary to go out and privately talk to that Elder Stanwell, the bastard who urged my wife’s mother to be exiled and my wife to marry someone else.”

The Dragon Emperor smiled a little more oddly, “Are you sure?”

“I’m sure! However, as long as Elder Stanwell is willing to bow his head and apologize to Aunt Meria and Uncle Span in front of the whole family, plus dedicate all his property as compensation, this matter is over.”

“You’re dreaming! The conflict between Meria and I is the internal affairs of the dragons. Who are you to interfere?” Stanwell jumped up suddenly – If he really did that, let alone compete with Meria, he couldn’t even lift his head in the future in the Dragon Valley.

Chen Rui glared at Stanwell deliberately, and shouted ‘sternly’, “I gave you a chance, Stanwell.”

“Human! Do you think you can scare me by playing a drama with Gueroas and destroying the trial field on Storm Island?” Stanwell observed his expression, and already had a judgment in his mind, “It’s impossible to apologize and compensate! We can go out. If you have the ability, don’t let a third person intervene!”

“Richard!” Meria expressed nervously, “Now that your partnership with the Dragon Valley has been finalized, let’s forget about this matter. Stanwell’s strength…”

“Richard…” Ms. Fairy Dragon also said a word with ‘worry’.

Although Meria didn’t continue, Stanwell was more certain in his mind that ‘Richard’ was just a paper tiger which was in line with his previous expectations. Gueroas and Meria are obviously a team. The Storm Island is a set-up drama to deal with the elder council.

Not only that, Stanwell also had a special talent for spirit sensing, and he could clearly sense that the real age of this human was less than 30 years old. Even if he was an inheritor or genius, he was only at most at the Kingdom level. This was even his high regard for the other party because Zola would surely not marry a weak person who only had the strength of ‘Saint’.

Stanwell’s biggest reliance was his own strength. Although he was only Kingdom level on the surface, he advanced to Demi-God not long ago with the help of the Dragon Emperor. This was also one of his trump cards to compete for the great elder position. As long as Meria and Span didn’t meddle in the battle, even if Zola helped move, he was absolutely sure to let the other party humiliate himself.

Chen Rui secretly gave his wife and mother-in-law a thumbs up. As expected of a blackhearted mother and daughter. With a few words, Stanwell jumped right into the trap.

“Okay, since Aunt Meria said so, then give you 1 last chance. Elder Stanwell, apologize. Just an apology!”

“ Haha! ” Stanwell laughed wildly, “No need, I’ll wait for you outside. As long as you can convince me, let alone apologize in front of the whole family, I can even compensate all the property to Meria!”

With that said, Stanwell didn’t give Chen Rui a chance to talk at all, and he strode out the door. Chen Rui hesitated for a while as if he ‘had’ to follow because he didn’t want to lose face

After the two figures disappeared from the vision, Gueroas, who had been silent, said, “In the Storm Island, I can’t last a minute under Richard’s hands. This is not a show.”

Elders:  …

“I actually wanted to tell Richard just now that Stanwell’s strength is too weak… There is no point in bullying him.” The blackhearted Fairy Dragon Mother-in-law also explained innocently.

Elders: …

chapters.title: Chapter 916: Profiteer Dragon Emperor
chapters.body:
Chapter 916: Profiteer Dragon Emperor

After a while, Chen Rui walked in with a contented face and clapped the dust on his hands.

“ Oh? ” Pagris’ eyes became more interested, “You finished reasoning with him?”

“Yes, he ‘reasonably’ lost.” Chen Rui spread his hands, “According to the agreement, Stanwell should apologize in public and compensate for all the property. However, he was right at the beginning, the conflict between him and Aunt Meria is just the internal affairs of dragons. It is inconvenient for an outsider like me to intervene in the solution. I will leave the decision to Your Majesty and Aunt Meria.”

Pagris showed a surprised expression. This approach was equivalent to giving up the victory after winning. Although it seemed to be a loss, it saved the face of the Dragon Emperor and even the entire dragons. From Meria’s point of view, it was more rewarding than directly asking Stanwell to apologize.

“It turns out that it’s not Zola who is ‘one of the most talented’, but you.” Pagris gave Chen Rui a deep look, “The youngest great grand master ever, the youngest Demi-God, or whatever else that I don’t know yet… I have a feeling now, that is ignorance. When did a peerless human like you appear? I actually didn’t know until today.”

Pagris’ burning vision swept across Isabella, and his brows slightly raised.

Chen Rui noticed the change in the Dragon Emperor’s gaze and smiled indifferently, “Cooperation is not about begging or charity. As both cooperating parties, the stronger the strength, the better, isn’t it?”

“Yes.” Pagris nodded, “Please take a seat.”

Meria suddenly said, “Before Your Majesty and Richard talk about the cooperation. I want to say something first.”

Pagris nodded slightly, “Great elder, please speak.”

“Originally, I wanted to report this matter to Your Majesty before the elder council convened. However, I just heard the news from Zola, so I rushed to reunite with my daughter, which caused the delay. I would like to apologize to Your Majesty in advance.”

“It doesn’t matter, this feeling is completely understandable.”

“Your Majesty, the elder council was established with the original intention of assisting the Dragon Emperor, brainstorming ideas, and allowing the dragons to move forward in a more stable situation. Over the years, it has played an extremely important role. The contribution of the elder council to the Dragon Valley’s size and development today is obvious to all. But everything has its advantages and disadvantages. Over time, we also see some shortcomings. What I want to explain here is the power of the great elder. Since the original intention of the elder council is to gather everyone’s strengths, then to avoid any misunderstanding, the great elder should also not have the supreme authority. I suggest that the power of the great elder should be distributed. Part of it is integrated into the power of the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor, and part of it is distributed among the elders. All elders have the right to vote and make decisions, and the position of the great elder is more of a spiritual supporter. The focus of the function is to promote the implementation of the Dragon Emperor’s resolutions and to train new people.”

As soon as these words came out, the elders suddenly burst into a commotion. This was equivalent to directly distributing the supreme power of the great elder to the elders. Not only had the status of all elders and real powers been further improved, but also from the perspective of the Dragon Emperor, the decision-making power was further enhanced. The original power of the great elder was greatly reduced.

Pagris’ eyes flickered vigorously for a while. He took a deep breath, “Great Elder Meria, pardon my rudeness to ask: Are you serious?”

“These words are all my sincere words.” Meria looked directly at Pagris, “It’s also what I’ve always thought. Now, as the great elder, I formally propose to Your Majesty to please approve it.”

“If I remember correctly, the authority that the great elder has today should have been further enhanced by the former great elder, your teacher Nierince. Great Elder Nierince specially gave you the position of the great elder before he died, and now you…”

“Teacher is dedicated to dragons, and he has no selfish intentions, which God can attest.” Meria said firmly, “This world is constantly developing and improving. The Dragon Valley must adapt to this environment and constantly adjust as well as improve in order to keep up with the pace of the times. The dragons need a more united and harmonious leadership layer. Internal strife or adherence to stereotypes will only make our pace stagnant or even backward. Let the dragons always stand proudly at the peak stage of the world; this is also the original intention of the teacher.”

Pagris stood up slowly and bowed solemnly to Meria, “Great elder, please accept my highest respect. Sorry for some of my misunderstandings previously. I swear by Dragon God that as long as I, Pagris, exist, Great Elder Meria will always be the leader of the elder council, the guide of the dragons, my mentor and my friend.”

Meria also bowed back. Naturally, this decision was unanimously approved by all the elders (except for a certain ‘brother-in-law’ outside), and the originally subtle atmosphere suddenly became harmonious.

Chen Rui nodded secretly. Mother-in-law’s move of retreating is much more beautiful than my previous one. Using her son-in-law’s ‘potential’, not only she removed the biggest worry in the Dragon Emperor’s mind, but she also made her status from precarious to unbreakable while the dragons will be more united. This is a 3-win result. She is worthy of being the highest elder who has managed the elder council for many years.

“Great elder, the negotiation and cooperation with Richard will be entirely your responsibility. I believe you will bring me satisfactory results.” Pagris’ eyes flashed a sly expression.

“Your Majesty, you… seem a little unkind.” Chen Rui’s expression froze. Meria is not Zola. From the previous insistence on returning to the Holy Spirit Summit, the importance she put on the responsibilities and interests of the dragons in her mind is evident. The problem is, facing my mother-in-law, how can I bargain with her?

“Meria is the No. 1 figure in the dragons except the Dragon Emperor. Do you think she can’t represent me?” Pagris’ smile had the potential to be a profiteer in Chen Rui’s eyes. No, he is exactly a profiteer.

“ Um … Of course not! Aunt Meria is absolutely qualified!” Chen Rui diverted the topic, “By the way, I apologize to Your Majesty first. When I negotiated with Elder Stanwell just now, my words were a bit harsh and both of us were young and hot-tempered, as a result…”

The elders of dragons on the side were quite speechless. You can be young and hot-tempered, but Stanwell is tens of thousands of years old. Can he still be considered ‘young and hot-tempered’?

“If necessary, you can talk to him again.” The Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor replied solemnly, making the elders even more speechless, “Even if you really want to call him brother-in-law, it’s okay. His sister, Loraine, is a famous beauty among the dragons. I can introduce her to you.”

This time, it was Chen Rui who was speechless. I understand now. No matter whether the Demon Realm or the human world, dragons are thick-skinned. Putting aside the matter of sending my mother-in-law to negotiate, he is now pimping me in front of my wives.

Feeling the sharp gazes from Zola, Isabella, Meria and Span, Chen Rui wiped the sweat from his forehead and changed the subject again, “Someone seemed to have said before that Zola is not suitable for people other than dragons?”

“Who said that?” Pagris said angrily, “Tomorrow you will have your wedding! From now on you are the son-in-law of the Dragon Valley. Who dares to provoke you?”

Chen Rui, “…”

Chen Rui thought about it and pointed to Madam Aunt, “This Ms. Isabella is also my wife.”

“No problem! The 3 of you will get married together! I’m your witness!” Pagris suddenly showed a strange smile, “For dragons, there is no difference between demons or humans, only friends and enemies. And I can guarantee that everyone present, including the elders and your brother-in-law, will not say anything unnecessary to anyone.”

Pagris no doubt sees through Isabella’s identity! Chen Rui was secretly stunned.

“Actually, your wife’s way of concealing breath is extremely ingenious. If it wasn’t for the holy dragon’s extremely keen sense of dark breath, I would hardly notice any clues. How about I give her a piece of Pseudo-God’s Holy Scale to change her appearance and hide the dark breath so that even Pseudo-God can’t see it. Moreover… if she can fully integrate the holy spirit power of the scale, the advancement to kingdom is not a problem.”

A silver scale appeared in Isabella’s hand, glowing with crystal light. As soon as she got the scale, it turned into a mark and disappeared into Isabella’s forehead. A crystal mole suddenly appeared between her eyebrows, which looked unique.

The Holy Scale of the holy dragon was extremely rare, which was equivalent to the essence of strength, and it could halve the damage of ordinary light element magic. For Isabella, who had absorbed the Snow Dallet Flower, she will undoubtedly achieve twice the result with half the effort. Pagris’ favor was quite big.

“What request do you have?” Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor looked at Chen Rui with a smile, “I try my best to satisfy it, but whether it’s brother-in-law, a wedding or the Holy Scale, dragons have made great efforts and shown enough sincerity. In terms of sincerity, I believe that Sir Richard will have something to say when negotiating with the great elder.”

Chen Rui secretly cursed. Sincere your ass. Except for the Holy Scale, the wedding is just a passing scene. As for the brother-in-law… Forget it, I don’t want your sister.

“If you don’t have any more requests, then I have a more personal question to ask.” Pagris looked at Paglio.

“This… should be a poison dragon. I would take the liberty to ask, does he also come from the same place as that Ms. Isabella?”

“Yes, this is my brother, Paglio.” Isabella had been exposed anyway, so Chen Rui simply said it frankly.

“Poison dragon from the Demon Realm…”

As soon as these words came out, several senior elders revealed strange expressions like they thought of something.

Pagris’ strange gaze made Master Poison Dragon shudder for a while. Just when Chen Rui was worried about the dead duck dragon, the Dragon Emperor suddenly threw out something.

“Pick it up and try it.”

TL: Is Paglio also a royal family of the Dragon Valley? Paglio, Pagris, hmmmm …

chapters.title: Chapter 917: The Choice Of The Poison Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 917: The Choice Of The Poison Dragon

Everyone’s eyes were focused on the jet-black metal weapon on the ground.

A short stick. The front section was a large round mace, and the middle was connected by a chain.

The chain hammer, also known as the flail, was a heavy swinging weapon.

The flail seemed to be so heavy that when it fell to the ground, it left a sinkhole in the solid floor.

“This should be a good thing…” Master Poison Dragon looked at the flail with gleaming eyes. Paglio was a little jealous just now when Pagris gave Isabella a piece of Pseudo-God’s Holy Scale. According to the pace… are you going to give me another treasure? It seems that following that cunning human really has some benefits.

“This is a powerful artifact called ‘Thunder Flail’. Although it is only a primary artifact, it is extremely powerful.” Pagris was holding another ring inlaid with a green gem, “If you can pick it up, not only can you get this artifact, you can also have the right of inheritance to a huge treasure. The mystery of the treasure is in this ring.”

With that said, that ring also flew to the ground in front of Thunder Flail.

Artifact plus a huge treasure? Paglio thought he heard it wrong. Why are the giant dragons in the human world so generous? Have they forgotten the fine traditions of ‘being stingy’, ‘heartless rich’ and other virtues inherited from our ancestors?

In the spirit of carrying forward the self-enrichment traditions of the ancestors, Master Poison Dragon bent down without thinking to grab the flail, but the flail was heavier than he imagined. He couldn’t even move it.

First, he used 1 hand, then 2 hands… But no matter how hard he tried, it still didn’t move at all.

Paglio had already exerted all his strength, and his face was flushed, but he still couldn’t succeed. In the end, he had to stand up dejectedly. His old face was hot for a while – it is a precious treasure, but I can’t even pick it up. Plus, it’s in front of so many dragons, it’s so embarrassing.

Strangely, none of the dragon elders seemed surprised as if it was only natural that Paglio couldn’t pick it up.

“It’s normal that you can’t pick it up.” Pagris said slowly, “Under normal circumstances, only powerhouses above Demi-God can pick it up, but they can’t use the true power of Thunder Flail, including me, the Dragon Emperor. There is only 1 way, which is to burn the power of bloodline and try to get its approval.”

Burning the power of bloodline was different from the ordinary ‘blood recognition’. It reverses the blood of the whole body and activates the most initial as well as the strongest inheritance power hidden in the bloodline. The danger of this method was obvious, and it usually injured the vitality seriously; some even resulted in a coma.

“All the dragons in the Dragon Valley… can’t be recognized by it?” Master Poison Dragon was not a fool. He immediately understood a bit.

Pagris shrugged and gave a correct answer, “The previous master of this artifact is a poison dragon.”

The poison dragon was a very rare type of dragon just like a fairy dragon, so Paglio nodded in realization. He took a deep breath, and his strength began to surge: Isn’t it just burning the bloodline? For the sake of artifact and treasure, I will go all in… at most I’ll ask this human to give me a bottle of resurrection potion.

Master Poison Dragon gave Little Betty a ‘reassuring’ gaze and began to reverse the flow of blood in the whole body. Numerous flowing bumps suddenly appeared on his body, which was very terrifying.

When Paglio crouched down to hold the Thunder Flail again, the flail actually glowed faintly, and the short stick was slowly lifted up.

The golden light in Pagris’ eyes suddenly flourished. Not only the Dragon Emperor, but also Meria and several senior elders showed shocked expressions.

Paglio was struggling. Judging from the expression on his face, it was quite energy-consuming as if the short stick alone was heavy. The blood flowing back on his body was getting faster and faster. His blood erupted from his skin.

The green blood unique to the poison dragon flew out, and the ground was corroded into countless potholes. He even became a green ‘blood man’. The blood that splashed on the Thunder Flail seemed to be absorbed like encountering a sponge.

“Paglio…” Krobelus’ trembling voice sounded.

Hearing Little Betty’s voice, Paglio was refreshed. He ignored the bleeding and exerted strength in his hands. The flail was lifted up. The entire Thunder Flail burst out ‘buzzing’ black lightning.

When the flail was completely lifted up, Paglio was surprised to feel the flail in his hands suddenly become lighter. He tried to change from 2-handed to 1-handed, and he managed to hold the flail with only his right hand. With a wave, the buzzing black lightning drew terrifying trajectories in the air. The entire hall began to shake.

Seeing Paglio spinning the Thunder Flail, Dragon Emperor Pagris involuntarily stood up as his eyes glowing with excitement. Several elders such as Meria nodded frequently.

After the poison dragon stopped burning the bloodline, he felt that the flail became extremely heavy again. Although it was not like the situation where he could not move it before, he could only barely lift it with 1 hand and could not swing it freely.

With a ‘clang ’, Paglio threw down the Thunder Flail, drank a bottle of grand master healing potion thrown by Chen Rui, and said to the Dragon Emperor, “Your Majesty, this should count as I qualified, right?!”

“Of course!” Pagris did not conceal the strange emotions in his eyes, “Actually, you are not able to use it freely because your strength and bloodline are not integrated with well enough. As long as you reach Demi-God or completely integrate the inherited power of burning bloodline just now, the power of Thunder Flail can truly be unleashed.”

“So, I can get the Thunder Flail and that treasure ring?” Master Poison Dragon’s eyes had turned into black crystal coins. He didn’t even care to wipe off the blood on his body.

“Of course, the son of Cairrealo.” Pagris’ smile contained a genuine cordial.

“What?” Master Poison Dragon’s hand that stretched out to the ring suddenly stopped, then he slowly stood up and looked at Dragon Emperor, “What do you mean?”

“Just as you understand, Cairrealo. Trisilarondoartes, your father’s full name.”

“Trisilarondoartes?” Paglio pointed his thumb to himself, “You got it wrong? My last name is Sandro Archilles!”

“Sandro Archilles? Is this the name given by the dragon who adopted you?” The Dragon Emperor did not mind Paglio’s rudeness at all, but he explained patiently, “Cairrealo. Trisilarondoartes, the elder of dragons, the famous warrior of dragons. He is like my sibling, my closest comrade and brother. He is your real father. Thunder Flail is the best proof. No one but his descendants can use this artifact with bloodline inheritance.”

Paglio sneered, “I’m the dragons of the Demon Realm. That Cairre or something, isn’t he the elder of the Dragon Valley, how could I be his descendant?!”

“It’s Cairrealo.” the Dragon Emperor solemnly corrected, ” When your father went to the Demon Realm for training and returned to the human world, he told me that he left a descendant in the Demon Realm. It’s a pity that your father died in a battle later. Since he has no other children, I have always kept the Thunder Flail and his inheritance. Your age, coupled with the Thunder Flail’s bloodline activation, can completely confirm that you are the son that Cairrealo left in the Demon Realm. Although dragons are born with innate advantages and strengths that are far superior to those of the same level, the difficulty of each advancement is far greater than that of ordinary people. Fortunately, we have a long time. Once we breakthrough, our strength will surpass the people of the same level again. With your age and your current Kingdom level strength, although not as good as Zola, you are also an extremely talented genius. You will inherit everything from your father, including artifacts, wealth and eldership. I’m very happy that Thunder Flail has a new owner. We in the Dragon Valley will welcome a new elder of great talent, the son of Cairrealo.”

“The elder of the Dragon Valley? Me?” Paglio was stunned for a moment, and he suddenly laughed exaggeratedly, “If this artifact and ring is given unconditionally, of course I will not refuse, but the elder of the Dragon Valley is still fine, as for Cairrealo. Trisilarondoartes, I don’t know who is he. Or you can say that he has nothing to do with me at all. I’m Paglio. Sandro Archilles! Sandro Archilles is my surname, and it has always been this! It will be this in the future too!”

Chen Rui saw Paglio’s somewhat furious smile, and he suddenly understood a lot.

“When I was born, I didn’t see anything except eggshells.”

“In these years, I have no relatives, but there are quite a few enemies.”

“The giant dragon doesn’t need friends, especially the poison dragon. Have you ever seen Gods have friends? They only need admiration and fear, not unnecessary care and understanding.”

This was Paglio. If he didn’t meet a certain human, which then led to a series of changes, perhaps he would always be the lonely poison dragon with no relatives or friends, only strength.

“Cairrealo is your father. That is irrefutable.” Pagris shook his head, “No matter what you have experienced or you are unwilling to accept this fact, you can’t change it; you can’t deceive yourself.”

“I’m sorry to let down your good intentions, Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor.” Paglio said coldly, “How can a loner like me be qualified to claim kinship with such a powerful family? Little Betty, let’s go!”

With that said, without even looking at the Thunder Flail and the green gem ring, he pulled Krobelus and walked out.

A light flashed in Pagris’ eyes, and an intangible barrier appeared at the entrance of the hall. Paglio and Krobelus, who had reached the entrance, were temporarily unable to advance an inch.

“If you can walk out of this door today, not only you can the artifact and the ring, I will also not force you on anything else.” The Dragon Emperor’s stern voice sounded, “If you can’t do it, stay in the Dragon Valley to think it over. We will talk about it another time. I mustn’t let the only descendant of my brother make this stupid mistake.”

At this moment, the power of the barrier suddenly disappeared.

Chen Rui’s figure appeared behind Paglio, “You all go first.”

The poison dragon laughed. It was a real hearty laugh. He understood the gaze of this cunning human. This guy must have absolute confidence. He immediately took Krobelus out of the door.

There was no need for extra politeness, only the absolute trust of life.

“Little Betty…”

“ En? “

“Nothing.”

(Our future children will definitely see more than eggshells when they are born.)

It seemed that there was a tacit connection in the heart as the 2 holding hands were even tighter.

chapters.title: Chapter 918: The Tower Of Glory
chapters.body:
Chapter 918: The Tower Of Glory

Pagris quietly watched the poison dragon left. Just as he said, as long as Paglio could leave the gate, he would not interfere.

It wasn’t until the poison dragon couple completely disappeared from his vision that the Dragon Emperor spoke with a colder tone, “Human, you are better than I imagined. You not only disintegrated my imprisoning power instantly, but you also blocked almost all my abilities. Even if it was only for a moment, it is enough to surprise me. However, I would like to ask you, does this behavior represent your provocation to the majesty of the Dragon Emperor?”

Chen Rui’s move was indeed a face-slap. If it weren’t for his previous cooperation and his relationship with Meria and Zola, Dragon Emperor Pagris’ tone would not have been so tactful.

What Chen Rui activated just now was the power of [Deprivation] given by Python. Since Pagris was a Pseudo-God powerhouse, the [Deprivation] power could only be maintained for a moment. Even so, it was enough for Paglio and Krobelus to escape successfully.

Everyone knew that Chen Rui had actually blocked the strength of the Dragon Emperor Pagris just now, so they were all moved – As the Dragon Emperor said, even for a moment, it was enough to surprise everyone. After all, Pagris was a Pseudo-God!

“What is the relationship between that Cairrealo and Your Majesty?” Chen Rui asked. Feeling the strong pressure from the Dragon Emperor, he channeled Star Power secretly, trying his best to stabilize his mind.

“We are comrades-in-arms and brothers who can give our lives for each other.” A trace of pain flashed in Pagris’ golden eyes, “Back then, Cairrealo sacrificed his life to cover my escape.”

“At that time, Your Majesty and the poison dragon brother should be facing… an unstoppable enemy right?”

“Yes, my strength hadn’t even reached Demi-God back then, and Cairrealo’s combat power was far above me. Unfortunately, we are still not the opponent of that enemy.” The expression of pain in the Dragon Emperor’s eyes became more intense and his tone became extremely solemn. “I was seriously injured and completely lost the ability to move, and he… he knew that he would definitely die to stay, but he rushed to divert the enemy without hesitation. I could only watch him…”

“Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor, you are… cunning, insidious, shameless, and sometimes an unscrupulous guy.” Chen Rui’s words shocked Meria. The surrounding dragons’ elders glared angrily.

Pagris’ golden eyes flashed red with murderous intent as his voice became colder, “You mean I deliberately let Cairrealo…”

Chen Rui shook his head, “Cunning, insidious, shameless, and sometimes unscrupulous. The same is true for me. Thankfully, I, like Your Majesty, have a brother who can fully watch my back, and he is also a poison dragon. Cairrealo was able to hold off that unmatched enemy for Your Majesty back then, and today… I can too.”

Pagris raised his eyebrows, and his burning gaze was fixed on Chen Rui’s face. Chen Rui seemed very calm, but the Dragon Emperor clearly saw resolute in human’s eyes without any pretense.

This human and the son of Cairrealo are indeed brothers who can entrust life and death to each other. Just like Cairrealo and I back then.

“No doubt you’re a cunning and shameless guy.” Pagris’ murderous aura suddenly disappeared. Instead, his eyes were filled with warmth and admiration, “The son of Cairrealo is really lucky to have a companion like you.”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Both of us are lucky.”

“ Hmph. However, this is Dragon Valley, and I’m the Dragon Emperor. I felt that my dignity was being challenged just now, so you must give me a satisfactory answer.” Although the Dragon Emperor’s face was still tense, everyone knew that this sentence actually had no substantive coercion; it was more about taking back his face.

Chen Rui pondered and said, “I also have a special magic product called the ‘magic phone’ that will also bring long-term and huge benefits which is no less than the magic game. Initially, I didn’t want this product to be released so soon, but for my brother, I’m willing to change the plan and give 20% of the profit of this product to the dragons for free. What does Your Majesty think of this ‘answer’?”

“Very good.” Pagris didn’t ask more details about the magic phone. With a wave of his hand, ‘Thunder Flail’ and the green gem ring flew to Chen Rui, “Since you are the brother of the son of Cairrealo, you will keep these for him. I have cast dragon secret art on the Thunder Flail, which allows it to be kept in the space equipment. However, except for the bloodline of Cairrealo, others cannot exert the power of the artifact. In fact, that little guy… he just can’t figure it out now. If one day, when he figures it out or if he changes his mind, you give him these 2 things. The doors of the Dragon Valley are always open to him.”

Chen Rui also did not refuse it and kept the flail and ring into the storage warehouse.

“Since the magic phone is ready to be released in advance, some things will be adjusted accordingly… Well, I will first build a core signal station for the magic game in the Dragon Valley so that all the dragons in the Dragon Valley can participate in the ‘Infinite’ Warrior OL’ trial. This training process… um , let’s call it the ‘closed beta’ trial. The future ‘public beta’ will be completely open to the entire human world, and wealth will naturally flow in. However, the current closed beta test must be confidential. Only dragons can participate in this kind of trial. Haste makes waste. Don’t be anxious about the economic benefits of aromatic millet wine, telephone, games, etc. When the time is right, I will naturally have plans to promote them. Your Majesty and elders, please believe me. “

“Of course we trust you. In terms of confidentiality, you can rest assured. This is related to the future of the dragons, so I will issue a strict order. If anyone dares to disclose it, they will be severely punished.” Pagris nodded. The ability of this human is beyond doubt. His proposal is equal to letting the dragons strengthen themselves in advance via trials, which is definitely the most important point. As for that kind of economic benefit, it will be long-term anyway, so there is no hurry.

“By the way,” Chen Rui thought of one thing, “I have 1 more question for Your Majesty. Does Your Majesty know about the Holy Dragon Rodriguez?”

“Rodriguez is a famous powerhouse of the holy dragon family. He has reached Pseudo-God back then, but he does not belong to the Dragon Valley.” Pagris pondered for a moment and said, “The Dragon Valley cannot include all the dragons in the human world. Although most of the past Dragon Emperor is from the holy dragon family, even the voices of the holy dragons are not the same. As the most powerful dragon family, the holy dragon has an incomparably powerful life force and is the best in offensive and defensive ability among dragons. We are immune to low and intermediate grade magic. Plus the characteristic of light attributes, we are called ‘glorious dragons’. Therefore, the holy dragon has been valued by the Holy Light Mountain, and it has attracted various attention in the church. After multiple ways to win over us, part of the holy dragons took refuge in the Holy Church. Rodriguez was the leader of them. About 700,000 years ago, the Holy Church Archbishop Mobil led a group to search for the light origin fragment. They suffered heavy casualties upon meeting a powerful enemy. Rodriguez went to provide reinforcement after receiving the signal for help. As a result, Rodriguez defeated the enemy, but he did something unexpected by the church, that is, he beheaded all the light priests, including Mobil, and took the light origin fragment. Unexpectedly, Mobil still transmitted the truth to the church with his spiritual power. In the end, Rodriguez was chased by the 3 archangels of the church and was severely injured by Raphael, but he still used the church’s artifact the ‘Tower of Glory’ to escape. His whereabouts are still unknown now.”

“Tower of Glory’?” Chen Rui thought for a while and asked again, “The artifact of the church?”

“The Tower of Glory is the rarest space artifact and one of the strongest artifacts in the Holy Church. It is said that the Tower of Glory can activate the power of 3 artifacts. The first being the ‘space barrier’ where space can be used as a barrier to effectively defend against various attacks of the enemy. The second is the ‘space shuttle’, a long-distance space shuttle that can break through the enchantment and perform a random long-distance space shuttle. Rodriguez used this ability to escape the originally deadly pursuit several times. The third is ‘kingdom merging’. It can form a special space by merging a kingdom and can carry a large number of life entities to move freely in space. But there is a limitation, that is, you can’t activate the kingdom to fight or do other things while moving. Unless you have 2 kingdoms, 1 for merging and 1 for combat. “

Chen Rui’s heart thumped when he heard it – The ‘Tower of Glory’ is actually so badass! That space shuttle is a good weapon to escape. I used the ‘Dark Will’, a ring with teleportation ability given by Shea back then. However, the ring is very tricky. Not only is it susceptible to interference and failure, but sometimes when bad luck occurs, I will even be teleported to the face of the enemy. The ‘Tower of Glory’ is obviously a licensed and upgraded product. It is drastically better than the kind of fake and shoddy imitation products like the ‘Dark Will’,. The most attractive thing is the ‘kingdom merging’ that carries life entities for space movement. If I use it with the [Star Gate], I can bring an army to travel freely between the 2 worlds without a problem.

The Dragon Emperor’s eyes narrowed, “You’re so interested in these past events. Could it be that… you got the Tower of Glory?”

You really guessed it right! Chen Rui was anxious immediately. This space artifact is no trivial matter. If I disclose it in front of Pagris, it is hard to guarantee that he will not covet it. He had a spontaneous idea, “To be honest, Your Majesty, I once practiced for a long time in the Demon Realm; I met my lover, Isabella, there. I have heard that there is a holy dragon called Rodriguez, who had a big battle with the Dragon Emperor Crusier of the Demon Realm’s Dragon Island hundreds of thousands of years ago. In the end, he was wounded and fled with missing whereabouts. That’s why I asked this question. I never thought there would be such an insider story.”

“It turns out that Rodriguez escaped to the Demon Realm! No wonder he has been missing. However, as far as I know, even if the ordinary trainers really get the Tower of Glory, it will be useless because the Tower of Glory needs to use Pseudo-God’s soul power to activate…”

Pagris’ words made Chen Rui suddenly have a realization. No wonder, the Tower of Glory that I obtained from Rodriguez cannot be used after the success of [Deep Analysis]. It turns out that it needs to be activated by the Pseudo-God’s soul power! “

To wait until I reach the level of Pseudo-God, I’m afraid that it will be a long time away. Speaking of the soul of Pseudo-God… there is a ready-made one… But a slight mistake is likely to result in a double penalty. It is better to be patient, and think of a long term plan.

“Okay, without further ado, Great Elder Meria will stay and negotiate with you in detail.” The Dragon Emperor yawned and stood up, “I will do what I say, tomorrow, I will personally officiate the marriage of the 3 of you.”

chapters.title: Chapter 919: The Dragon Valley Wedding
chapters.body:
Chapter 919: The Dragon Valley Wedding

The next day, in the Dragon Valley.

A grand wedding kicked off.

Although the preparation time was very hasty, it did not affect the grandness of the wedding at all. Almost all the dragons in the Dragon Valley came.

This time the wedding was presided over by the Dragon Emperor Royal Majesty Pagris himself. The 2 daughters of the Great Elder Meria were getting married. 1 was Fairy Dragon Zola who once left the Dragon Valley and the other was Meria’s newly recognized daughter, called Isabella, who seemed to be a human. What’s even more surprising was that the groom, ‘Richard’, was also human.

Although this ‘Richard’ was a human, he was an amazing powerhouse. The Storm Island’s trial field, which had been well received by dragons, was Richard’s masterpiece. The ‘official version’ of trial illusion called the ‘Infinite Warrior OL’, which was tried at the Rainbow Summit yesterday, was 100 times stronger than the original trial. Not only was it not dangerous, but it was also extremely interesting and challenging. The dragons that had tried it couldn’t get enough of it.

It was said that ‘Richard’ would popularize this illusion throughout the Dragon Valley where every giant dragon could participate in the ‘Infinite Warrior OL’. This alone was enough to make all dragons cheer.

What happened yesterday was far more than this one. The Great Elder Meria, who was initially expected to step down or even be expelled, regained the unanimous support of the Dragon Emperor Pagris and the elders, while the Elder Stanwell, who was the most vocal, not only got nothing, but he also failed miserably and lost face after ‘sparring’ with the great elder’s son-in-law, ‘Richard’.

It was said to be sparring, but in fact, he was beaten in front of many dragons who participated in the trial. Stanwell, who had the strength of Demi-God level, had no power to fight back ‘Richard’. Richard’s strength was evident. It seemed that the previous defeat of Golden Dragon Elder Mayroskea and Red Dragon Elder Russola to this human on the Storm Island was not accidental; he must have held back mercifully.

Due to time constraints, the wedding skipped a lot of red tape, but the Dragon Valley’s traditional ‘test’ for the groom was unavoidable. If he failed to pass the test, he must pay a considerable amount of money to redeem each dragon participating in the wedding. Otherwise, he would not be able to go to the bride’s side to complete the wedding. In front of Chen Rui was the dragons’ favorite test – the ‘Scale of Wealth’.

The Scale of Wealth was actually a long-established artifact of the dragons. It did not have any lethality or protection, and its only function was to measure wealth and value.

The core content of the ‘Scale of Wealth’ test was ‘Wealth Comparison’. A representative selected by the dragons and the groom would each take out a corresponding amount of treasures and put them on the artifact scale to measure and compare. If the groom wins, he would get all the wealth put in by the other party, and the celebration gifts sent by all the dragons participating in the wedding would be doubled; if the other party wins, the groom’s wealth would belong to the other party. All the celebration gifts sent by the dragons would be returned, plus paying double the gift money. In short, winning would bring double gain; losing would bring double loss.

The representative participating in the competition was usually the loser in the pursuit of the bride. Although he failed in love, he could win wealth as compensation. Generally speaking, this aggrieved ‘representative’ would go all-out in the game, so the groom’s winning rate was very slim. When Span and Meria got married, the representative they encountered was Gueroas, Meria’s biggest suitor, and Span failed miserably. The Old Father-in-law Elf King not only lost all his fortune on the Scale of Wealth, but he also paid double the gift money to all the dragons present. This was also 1 of the reasons the old father-in-law had always been hostile toward Gueroas.

Dragons were financial masters. In other words, misers, but naturally they would not miss this good opportunity to accumulate wealth where the more they bet, the more they earn. Plus the additional ransom money that would be paid if the groom failed to pass the test, it was definitely a huge windfall, so the dragons gave large sums of gift money as if they were high.

The representative who appeared this time was somewhat unexpected. It was not Karru, whom Zola escaped from the marriage, but the loser Stanwell from the elder council. Stanwell was beaten badly by the human yesterday. Today, he intended to use the wedding to ‘revenge’, which was also reasonable. Since he couldn’t win in a fight, he would be able to vent his frustration if he could win all the wealth of the human.

Dragons had a very long lifespan, so it was no exaggeration to say that the wealth they accumulated was comparable to an empire; not to mention an elder like Stanwell. Hence, everyone was full of confidence in Stanwell’s victory.

Meria and Span didn’t even know about Stanwell’s appearance beforehand. They were both shocked and had a bad omen.

The Scale of Wealth looked like a huge scale with a height of 3 meters. In fact, the 2 trays were space doors, which could accommodate wealth to the maximum extent. The types include equipment, treasures, coins, etc., which must be counted outside the space ring. After the 2 sides entered the tray space, the scale would display the wealth value of the treasures presented by both sides to enable measurement and comparison. The time limit was 10 minutes, and the things handed up could not be retrieved. Although there was no direct display of treasures to outsiders in the whole process, the justice of the scale was absolute. The wealth of the losing party would automatically fall into the space of the other party.

Under the eager gazes of the dragons, Chen Rui and Stanwell flew onto the scale trays and disappeared.

However, Stanwell’s tray began to glow, and the color representing wealth began to change from green to blue, then from blue to purple… and it turned into dazzling gold in the end. The scale completely tilted toward Stanwell’s side.

The dragons exclaimed in amazement. Everyone knew what this color represented. It was no exaggeration to say that Stanwell bet on all his properties. It seems that this sir elder who was humiliated yesterday no doubt lived up to expectations.

At this moment, the dragons were in a commotion for a while because the balance moved again. It actually tilted toward Chen Rui’s side. Everyone saw that the tray had turned into the color of the rainbow, which was an unprecedented color!

The 2 sides in the space were able to see each other’s scale, which shocked Stanwell. Originally, according to yesterday’s gambling agreement, after he lost to Chen Rui, he should apologize to Meria in public and compensate for all the property. Later, Dragon Emperor Pagris mediated from it, avoiding the public apology and letting Stanwell participate in the test of the Scale of Wealth as a representative. If Stanwell lost, then he would pay all his property as a gift; if he won, he could get a lot of money, and let Chen Rui pay double the dragons’ gift, which was also considered a vent of his frustration. After all, Stanwell was a direct descendant of Pagris, and the Dragon Emperor did have a set of methods to coax and appease him.

It was a pity that Stanwell, who believed he would win today, was unexpectedly sad again.

Seeing the rainbow light, Stanwell’s face twitched. He gritted his teeth, and a golden ring appeared in his hand. The shiny gold of the scale suddenly turned dark gold, which once again attracted the wonder of the dragons.
