However, this time the dragons were amazed because although Stanwell’s scale turned dark gold, the entire scale was still firmly tilted toward Chen Rui’s side without even moving.

Stanwell broke out in cold sweat. He was trembling while he took out 2 silver scimitars. The dark golden color of the balance seemed a little darker, but the tilt remained unchanged.

This result cast hopelessness in Stanwell’s mind. He was just stunned there, not even aware of the 10-minute flashing warning. It wasn’t until the end of the time when he was teleported out that the elder holy dragon recovered his senses. Looking at the empty hands, he fainted on the spot.

In the space on the other side, Chen Rui was smiling from ear to ear as he looked at the countless coins, antiquities, and wealth beside him. He hurriedly used the storage warehouse to collect them one by one.

In fact, Chen Rui didn’t do anything. He took out the God-Eating Mask, the Sword of Fallen Angel, the Wrath King Armor and the Demon Shield. When he saw the light of the rainbow and the tilt of the scale, Chen Rui, who originally planned to throw the Tower of Glory, immediately calmed down. Although these equipment appeared to be quasi-artifacts, they were parts of some kind of supreme artifact in legends, so the value they contained was no doubt immeasurable.

As a senior elder of dragons, Stanwell must be extremely wealthy. Meanwhile, even if Chen Rui lost, Stanwell would not be able to take the things with him. At most, Chen Rui had to compensate for the gift money only.

Seeing the human walking out of the Scale of Wealth with a smile, all the dragons were shocked. This guy actually won Stanwell, and now everyone has to pay double the gift money!

Meria and Span naturally laughed heartily, especially the Old Father-in-law Elf King. The son-in-law made them proud this time; he was much stronger than Span in the past.

The next representative was a girl. This girl had a demure and beautiful appearance, but she looked bitter and enraged. It was Stanwell’s sister, Loraine.

Chen Rui could fully understand the rage of this girl. Whether it was just winning her brother Stanwell’s fortune, or the ‘brother-in-law’ title that had been quietly spread by the dragons, there were good reasons for Sister Loraine to be so hateful.

Sister Loraine knew that even her brother’s Demi-God level strength was no match for this human, so she calmly chose what she was best at – The ancient magic card ‘Fate Showdown’.

In the end, it was natural that the 2 siblings grieved together.

Under the eyes of Zola and Isabella in the distance, Chen Rui did not dare to show mercy. He used quick tactics to beat Sister Loraine 3 times consecutively within 10 minutes, almost instantly defeating the poor holy dragon girl. He passed the test neatly without any entanglement or flirting.

The dramatic part was the final test, where the biggest ‘sufferer’ of the wedding, Karru, Zola’s betrothed partner, appeared on the stage.

“About that… Sir Richard, I…I…”

Looking at the timid ‘beautiful’ sissy, Chen Rui had a helpless feeling. This test is probably going to be difficult. What are we going to compete in? Embroidery? Needlework? Nonsense…

Karru was about to say something when Ms. Fairy Dragon seemed to cough slightly from behind.

Sissy’s already tense nerves seemed to be flicked, and he shivered suddenly. His speech became several times smoother, “Sir Richard, I have no problem here!”

“Thank you.” Chen Rui breathed a sigh of relief.

“No no no! I should be the one thanking you.” Sissy looked back in fear and said sincerely.

Is it to thank me for marrying Ms. Fairy Dragon, saving you from trouble?

How much trauma did Darling Zola leave in the heart of this kid…

Chen Rui gave Karru a friendly smile, wiped the sweat from his forehead, and walked forward.

“You… you are a good person.”

Chen Rui’s body was shocked by the sissy’s praise from behind, and the cheering voice of a certain ‘Master! Good person! Truly-handsome’ almost made him lose balance and fall down. After taking a deep breath, he finally stabilized himself and stepped onto the ceremonial stage.

Today, Zola and Isabella were both dressed in the traditional costumes of dragons, which were elegant and luxurious. They looked particularly alluring.

Chen Rui bowed to Meria and Span, took the hands of the 2 brides, and walked toward Pagris.

As the witness of the wedding, the Dragon Emperor looked at the 3 newlyweds walking hand in hand. His eyes swept over a certain poison dragon with a face of ‘I don’t know you’, and a knowing smile appeared on his face as he began to read the wedding oath.

chapters.title: Chapter 920: Samuel In Trouble
chapters.body:
Chapter 920: Samuel In Trouble

The married life could be described as a honeymoon, especially Ms. Fairy Dragon and Madam Aunt’s long-time wish was realized. Not only did they hold a grand public wedding, but the Demon Realm’s sisters and competitors were not around, so they naturally seized the opportunity to ask to roll on the bed and beg for a baby. It was a windfall for a certain guy who hugged both and had a busy nightlife. No one knew how many patterns there were as he tasted the wonderful taste all the time.

With the full support of the Dragon Emperor, the ‘Infinite Warrior OL’ signal towers with magic game core crystals as the main part were soon successfully built at the Holy Spirit Summit. The magic helmet was distributed to every dragon.

For a time, the craze of “trial” magic games swept the entire Dragon Valley.

This version of the magic game was a human world version that Chen Rui deliberately improved. Dragons originally appeared in the form of original bodies. They must train with dragon bodies to a certain level. After completing exclusive tasks, they could get a series of rewards, especially the ability to change to human form. They could use both forms flexibly in the game in the future in order to complete various training and missions.

The upgraded map and dungeon for the dragons were more difficult, and the exclusive mission was more difficult – These not only did not reduce the enthusiasm of the dragons, but it aroused a great desire to challenge.

Like the Demon Realm, the daily magic game had a strict time limit. After all, this was not a pure game, and a lot of experience gained during training also needed to be consolidated and digested through practice.

For dragons who had a lot of time to splurge, this kind of magic game that integrated training and entertainment was indescribably wonderful. Even the Dragon Emperor and others above the Demi-God level had deliberately suppressed their realm and practiced with an ‘alternative account’. The difference from ‘ordinary players’ was that they couldn’t directly get the kind of comprehension from the spiritual imprint of the game. In addition to guiding the younger generation with some experience and skills, they were more just for entertainment.

Chen Rui paid a lot of valuable materials, but he gained not only the trust and friendship of the Dragon Valley, but also the faith power. These 2 points alone far exceeded the investment, and the Dragon Valley would be his starting point for expansion to the human world.

After the expansion plan reached a certain level, the subsequent faith absorption was only one of the ultimate goals. Perhaps, at that time, another form of war could be used to eliminate the real war.

On this day, Chen Rui was in the courtyard of the Rainbow Summit, preparing to taste Isabella’s freshly brewed tea with Zola. Someone outside the courtyard suddenly asked, “Is Sir Richard here?”

This voice… is actually the sissy who praised me as a good person at the wedding last time? Chen Rui was stunned for a while before he stood up.

No doubt, at the gate of the courtyard, he saw super Sissy Karru who was even more feminine than a woman. Behind him was a little boy who looked about 12 years old. He had a delicate appearance that gave a shota vibe.

Usually, this was the time when the dragons were in the magic game. Chen Rui was a little puzzled by the arrival of the sissy and asked, “It’s Karru. This is your friend, right? Come and sit inside.”

At first sight, the sissy saw Ms. Fairy Dragon who was slowly tasting with a teacup in the yard. When his eyes met hers behind the glasses, he shuddered, and he almost peed out of fright. He hurriedly shook his head, “No, thank you, Sir Richard. I took the liberty to interrupt today because my brother, Anderlu, has something important to tell sir.”

It turns out that the little shota is the sissy’s younger brother, Anderlu. Both of these brothers are the delicate kind of handsome. How come they don’t resemble Pelin’s old face at all? Chen Rui made an evil guess in his mind before he nodded at the little shota , “Hi, Anderlu.”

“Sir Richard…” Anderlu bowed cautiously. Chen Rui was now the object of admiration and envy of many young people on Dragon Island. The little shota once witnessed Stanwell being beaten by Chen Rui (and heard that his father was beaten by him). Now that he directly met Chen Rui face to face, he showed considerable nervousness, “Sir, uh , do you remember… remember, that…”

Seeing the fear of the little shota, Chen Rui felt amused, “Don’t be nervous, Anderlu. What’s the matter? Just tell me.”

The little shota nodded hurriedly. He took a few deep breaths, and finally said, “Sir, do you remember the human dragon rider whom you praised during the trial on the Storm Island?”

Chen Rui’s mind moved. During the trial on the Storm Island back then, he only praised 1 human dragon rider.

“I think he’s Samuel?”

“Sir really remember!” There was a little more hope in the little shota’s eyes.

“ En , the dragon rider named Samuel has limited strength, but he left a deep impression on me with his bravery and persistence.” Chen Rui asked calmly, “Did… something happened to him?”

“Yes, he was recently imprisoned in the Dragon Bright Empire, where the Kemplot Family is also at risk of life and death. It is said that there will be a trial in about 2 months. I originally wanted to beg the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor to intercede, but His Majesty said that this incident involved the human empire’s struggle for the throne, and the Dragon Valley never participates in this kind of human royal struggle, so I was forbidden to leave the Dragon Valley. Some time ago, I sneaked away and was caught by my father. He took me back and put on a bracelet that imprisoned my strength.” Anderlu raised a ‘bracelet’ in his hand with a dejected face.

Then only Chen Rui knew that something like this happened to Samuel. He looked at the shota with a pleading expression on his face as he asked, “You care so much about the life and death of that human dragon rider?”

“It’s like this…” The sissy said, “My father has been very strict with Anderlu since he was a child, and he will punish him at every turn, so Anderlu has always had low self-esteem. It was the human dragon rider who gave him real confidence and strength. In the later trials, 2 of them also established a deep friendship between life and death. Therefore, Anderlu wants to beg sir to ask Sir Dragon Emperor to intercede…”

“I’m afraid this is a bit difficult.” Chen Rui shook his head, “The Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor’s consideration is right. If the forces of the Dragon Valley interfere too much in the internal affairs of the human empire, it will definitely cause many unintended consequences. As dragons, you should know His Majesty’s character better than me. Even if I speak, he will not change this principle. However, I will go to the human empire in a while. At that time, I will pay attention to Samuel.”

The tone that sounded a bit perfunctory made shota secretly anxious, “Sir, please accept my request. Even if you can’t save the Kemplot Family, please save Samuel’s life…”

Chen Rui nodded secretly when he saw that the shota dragon really had a life-and-death relationship with Samuel.

Samuel had always been loyal to him, the ‘Third Highness’. With the loyalty of the knight, he would never support other princes. The reason why he was in prison and the whole family was threatened must be involved in some conspiracy.

This trip to the Dragon Bright Empire is necessary. Not only to save Samuel’s life, but also to save the entire Kemplot Family from the crisis.

“Anderlu!” The sissy hurriedly pulled at the younger brother who was about to go on. He bowed and said, “Hurry up and thank sir!”

The sissy knew very well that with the identity and strength of ‘Richard’, he didn’t have to play along with a small character like his younger brother. As long as he really ‘paid attention’, Samuel’s survival hope would greatly increase.

The shota also realized this, and he quickly bowed. Chen Rui definitely would not show that he cared much about Samuel. He nodded lightly, “I know what you want to say. Don’t worry, I won’t tell Elder Pelin or Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor about this matter.”

“Thank you sir!” The sissy expressed his gratitude and added, “You’re such a good person.”

Chen Rui, “…”

After the sissy and his brother left, Chen Rui returned to the tea table.

“Zola, Yini, I want to go to the Dragon Bright Empire.” Chen Rui naturally wouldn’t hide anything in front of his 2 wives. He took the small teacup that Isabella handed over, “That Samuel is a friend I knew from the Demon Realm. I have to go and save him.”

Madam Aunts spoke up, “I’ll go with you.”

Chen Rui was taken aback, “Although the Evil Blue Tear has a strong ability to shield breath, the Dragon Bright Empire is 1 of the 2 human empires. There are many activities of the Holy Church’s executives. The church is extremely sensitive to dark elements. Before fully integrating the Holy Scale of the Dragon Emperor, you should not enter the human world so as not to cause unnecessary trouble due to identity exposure. This time, you and Zola will stay here. I will go alone. I’ll come back to accompany you 2 when Samuel’s matter is resolved.”

Zola felt that Chen Rui was right and she nodded, “ En .”

“ Oh? ” Madam Aunt’s charming eyes rolled, “But, I remember… you seemed to have said before that you are the prince of the Dragon Bright Empire? When going back this time, will you meet the beauties or concubines you used to love?”

Ms. Fairy Dragon’s ears suddenly perked up, and she threw aside any reason as she raised her hands to form a group, “I’m going too.”

Chen Rui, “…”

At this moment, Chen Rui felt a tremor in his wrist. A 6-star imprint gleamed a scorching light.

Chen Rui was shocked and took a deep breath, “It seems that none of you can go.”

It’s Python’s signal!

Python was in the barren mountains on the outskirts of the Garden City, using the Fountain of Resurrection to integrate light element power in order to exert the most powerful strength. Originally, this process was expected to take about 2 months to succeed.

According to the information provided by shota Anderlu just now, Samuel still had about 2 months, so he should solve the problem on Python’s side first.

The destination of this trip was undoubtedly the Holy Light Mountain. Although Python was the soul of Pseudo-God, the Holy Light Mountain had 3 archangels, which could be said to be extremely dangerous. Even Python didn’t dare to be negligent. She took more than a month to integrate the light element. What’s more, Python and Chen Rui were in an interest-based relationship. In this case, Zola and Isabella couldn’t go together.

“ Huh? ” Ms. Fairy Dragon pretended that she didn’t hear it clearly.

Ms. Yini, who was still playing previously, fell silent this time and said with a wry smile, “Zola, this time… I’m afraid we really can’t go.”

“ Oh .” Zola was still very convinced of Isabella’s judgment, so she didn’t say anything about messing around.

“When this matter is over, let’s go to the Dragon Bright Empire together.” Chen Rui held the hands of the 2 women.

chapters.title: Chapter 921: Contract And News
chapters.body:
Chapter 921: Contract And News

Yang Shao Empire’s Garden City.

In a cave on a barren mountain in the outskirts of the city.

“Madam Python.” Chen Rui bowed to the Fountain of Resurrection shrouded in mist.

The mist quickly converged into a vague woman, which looked mysterious and ethereal. Her eyes slowly opened, and a faint glow appeared.

When Chen Rui looked at the gloomy gaze, he felt that his strength was quickly pulled out of his body, and he was shocked. He quickly activated the power of the Evil Pupil to remove the ‘deprived’ power.

“Not bad.” The woman showed an admiring smile as her pleasant voice sounded, “Although your Evil Pupil originated from Sariel, it has other magical uses. When Sariel activated the ‘Evil Moon Sigil’, he would have never imagined this kind of abnormality would happen.”

Chen Rui heard the subtext behind Python’s praise: I won’t make the same mistake as Sariel, and you shouldn’t have any rash thoughts.

“Madam has overpraised. In fact, because my soul power is somewhat special… and this time the Evil Pupil’s abnormality was just a fluke. I almost lost my body and spirit because of it. I still have a lingering fear, when I think about it.”

“Luck is also 1 of the strengths…” Python didn’t continue on this topic. Her tone changed, “Do you know our destination this time?”

Chen Rui didn’t fake daze, and he replied, “Madam once said that Satan wanted to imitate Michael and others to gather the Book of Destruction, to dominate all the super powerhouses of the Demon Realm, and to create the Dark Divinity Temple to steal the faith of the gods in order to condense godhood and embark on the path of becoming a god. So, is our destination this time…the Holy Light Mountain, the core of the Holy Church?”

“Yes, the Book of Creation is at the Light Divinity Temple at the top of the Holy Light Mountain,” Python gave him a deep look, “Are you familiar with the Holy Light Mountain?”

“I… visited the Holy Light City of the Holy Light Mountain once back then.” Chen Rui took a deep breath, “Actually, I’m a human. Madam should already know this.”

Python nodded slightly as her eyes flickered, Chen Rui stared straight at her without hesitation as his gaze showed a scorching light, “Madam, my original intention to go to the Demon Realm was to experience strength, but I accidentally encountered the most important woman in my life, so I plan to stay in the Demon Realm. I have prepared for the worst for this trip to the Holy Light Mountain… But there is still a glimmer of hope in my heart, and that is to return to the Demon Realm.”

Chen Rui’s meaning was very clear. Although I have concerns, I have already arranged the funeral. At most, we will die together.

Judging from the difference in strength between the 2 sides, it was nonsense for him to perish together with her, but this time the destination was the Holy Light Mountain. Under certain specific circumstances, the possibility of perishing together still existed.

“Since you’ve said it so frankly, I’ll also tell you the doubts in my heart. I’m not sure if it is a trap that you’re leading me to?” Python smiled tenderly, but Chen Rui could keenly hear a hint of gloom in the laughter, “If you want to get rid of my control, this is a pretty effective way. Therefore, we need a way to get the best of both worlds without mutual distrust, such as…”

“Master-subordinate contract.” Chen Rui replied.

With a master-servant contract, the master could kill the subordinate at a certain price whereas the master-subordinate contract was different. The master couldn’t kill the subordinate, but with the power of contract, the subordinate must be loyal and would never betray the master.

Python revealed a pondering expression while Chen Rui spoke up again, “Also, I want 1 more thing, which is likely to be put together with the Book of Creation.”

“What is it?”

“1 of the 7 artifacts of the Demon Realm, the Breeze Shadow Boots!”

“Breeze Shadow Boots?” Python was a little surprised, “The Wind Badge is actually in the Light Divinity Temple?”

It wasn’t the first time Chen Rui heard the term ‘Wind Badge’. He nodded, “About 100 years ago, a human cheated the Breeze Shadow Boots from my woman, causing the Belphegor Royal Family to be nearly wiped out, and I swore to help her get it back. So, I hope Madam will grant my request.”

Only with common goals and needs could Python be more at ease.

“My intuition tells me that what you said before may be somewhat inaccurate, but these words are indeed true.” Python smiled, and a contract of soul power appeared in her hand, “I promise you. Anyway, the Breeze Shadow Boots are not important to me. Sign the master-subordinate contract now.”

Chen Rui looked at the contract, then he added soul power and signed Chen Rui’s name without hesitation. Python was a person who knew his details. If he used other names, it would cause suspicion. But in this world, ‘Chen Rui’ was also a pseudonym.

“Your soul power… does feel a little special.” After Python signed her name, the 2 names on the contract glowed, indicating that it took effect, then the contract disappeared.

He heard similar words when he signed a master-subordinate contract with the Holy Lady Eudora that year. Similarly for Chen Rui, this contract was just a spiritual link that could be easily canceled at the cost of aura.

He knew that Python had super sensing talent far better than Eudora, so before that, just in case, he deliberately used the Evil Pupil as the reason earlier to point out that his soul power was special. No doubt he passed the test smoothly.

After signing the master-subordinate contract, the atmosphere between the 2 parties seemed to relax a lot, and Python obviously put down most of her guard.

“Madam, as far as I know, the Holy Light Mountain usually opens the teleportation portal every day for pilgrims to enter the Holy Light Mountain to worship, and later it was changed to every 7 days for various reasons, and the checking is stricter. This is the Garden City belonging to the Yang Shao Empire which is extremely far away from the Holy Light Mountain. We need to go to the Yang Shao Capital first, then from the capital to the Dragon Bright Empire, and then pass through the Dragon Wing City at the west of the Dragon Emperor Empire. After that, we use the teleportation portal to the White Cliff where the Holy Light Mountain is.”

Chen Rui’s knowledge of the human world’s intel was not limited to the previous visits here, but more from the avatar of Shura. He also played a trick game here. The fastest route should be the Dragon Tooth City at the eastern border of the Dragon Bright Empire. Dragon Tooth City had a teleportation portal dedicated to the White Cliff. The reason why he suggested the Dragon Wing City in the west was that he wanted to stop by the Dragon Bright Capital Yerodisha in order to understand the situation of Samuel and the Kemplot Family.

Even if the time was tight, Samuel’s personal safety must be ensured first.

In fact, the culprit of the ‘reform’ of the pilgrimage was himself. The theft of the Snow Dallet Tree shocked the upper levels of the entire church, so they greatly strengthened the White Cliff’s vigilance.

Although Python’s sensing talent was powerful, it was impossible to cover everything. Coupled with the shielding power and contract guarantee of the Evil Pupil, she didn’t have any doubt, “Very good, then we will go to the Yang Shao Capital first. Rest assured, our main purpose is to infiltrate. As long as you don’t encounter the 3 archangels, I have absolute confidence to take you away safely and return to the Demon Realm.”

After speaking, Python turned into smoke and returned to the 6-star imprint on Chen Rui’s wrist.

10 days later, Chen Rui appeared on the streets of the Dragon Bright Capital Yerodisha.

The Dragon Bright Empire had a very close relationship with dragons, and they also had the only real Dragon Knight Legion in the human world. ‘Yerodisha’ meant ‘sparkling treasure’ in the dragon language.

Yerodisha was 1 of the most famous cities for human beings. The grand and prosperous city was also the political, military and commercial center of the Dragon Soul Empire. Even the Demon Realm’s most advanced Fallen Angel Capital was still inferior to Yerodisha.

Chen Rui came to Yerodisha for the second time. Looking at the wide avenues, the buildings and the endless crowds, the long-lost strange feeling began to surge in his heart – Arthur, your home, is here.

The first thing he did when he came to Yerodisha was to inquire about the opening time of the Dragon Wing City’s teleportation array. This was for Python to see. Only after inquiring did he know that the opening time of the Dragon Wing City’s teleportation array was 6 days later, and it would only take 4 days to get there.

As it was getting late today, Chen Rui found a hotel in Yerodisha. While drinking wine at the wine pavilion at night, he heard about some recent events, including the Kemplot Family.

The Kemplot Family was once the top commercial family across multiple sectors of the Dragon Bright Empire. The huge wealth also made many people jealous of the Kemplot Family. After the disappearance of the ruler of the Golden Estate, Third Prince Arthur, whom they were loyal to, the representative lord, Second Prince Garfield, had repeatedly suppressed and framed them, so they had fallen into a precarious predicament.

After the second son of the Kemplot Family, Samuel, was born, he defeated the top genius swordsman Paul, married the eldest daughter of the Philip Family, Joanna, and successfully passed the Dragon Valley test to become a member of the Dragon Knight Legion. He contributed a lot and won the appreciation of Lex the Great. Samuel’s father, Carlo, was also promoted to become the director of the Finance Affairs Department from the original deputy director, becoming 1 of the 5 leaders of the 2 councils and 3 departments. The entire Kemplot Family saw the hope of revitalization again.

The trade fair held every 3 years in the human world would start in 2 months. This year it will be held in the Dragon Demeanor City, the second largest city in the south of the Dragon Bright Empire. However, at this juncture, 2 major events happened. The first was that several major chambers of commerce in the empire jointly sued the Finance Affairs Department’s Director Carlo for using unscrupulous methods to suppress the chambers of commerce in various places, and even murdered people for money for personal and family selfish interests. They produced a lot of solid evidence of the large number of crimes, asking Lex the Great to punish him severely.

Seeing that the trade fair was about to be held, yet such a thing happened, Second Prince Garfield took advantage of the situation to fan the flames. Lex the Great seemed extremely furious. If it wasn’t for Fourth Prince Luke’s protection, Carlo’s family would have been raided and beheaded. He was now imprisoned in the prison for felons.

The second major incident was that Samuel, who had rushed back after hearing the news, wanted to assassinate Second Prince Garfield in order to vent his personal anger. He was captured on the spot by Fagris, the leader of the Dragon Knight Legion, and imprisoned in the Thunder Prison where powerhouses were imprisoned.

These 2 incidents almost made the Kemplot Family collapse. At present, important family members were being monitored by the military. Even the closest in-laws, the Philip Family, were forced to draw a line with them, and Joanna was forcibly taken back to the family. She ran around in private, trying to rescue Samuel, but there was nothing she could do.

Chen Rui didn’t know Carlo’s personality, but he knew very well about Samuel. Samuel is definitely not some kind of mindless scumbag; he must be caught in some kind of trap. Judging from the fact that the Dragon Emperor rejected Shota Dragon Anderlu’s request on the grounds of not interfering with the royal family’s internal strife, this matter is definitely not simple.

Anyway, I have to go to the Thunder Prison tonight.

chapters.title: Chapter 922: The Arrival Of The ‘Elder’
chapters.body:
Chapter 922: The Arrival Of The ‘Elder’

At night.

Thunder Prison Hall.

The Red Dragon Dimayaro leaned back on the chair and yawned. He took a sip of the juice in his hand uneventfully. The more he drank, the more boredom he felt. He threw the bottle with half of the drink left into the trash bin that was exactly 20 meters into the corner of the hall. It was one of the few entertainments here as the Thunder Prison’s supreme guardian.

The Thunder Prison was not an ordinary prison, but a place of imprisonment specially set up for the Saint powerhouses located in the southwest corner of the inner city. It was not only guarded by a large number of elite legions, but also the powerhouses of the Dragon Knight Legion. The magic circle could be described as impregnable.

Although most of the people who were imprisoned were Saint-level powerhouses, because of the almost absolute safety, this was actually a very easy job for the guards. However, for dragons who had a long life and like to be free, this was absolutely a chore.

They couldn’t drink their favorite dragon fruit wine all day long. They couldn’t have their favorite money shower in the crystal coin pile. They couldn’t peek at beauties changing their clothes, or even transform into a dragon body and spread its wings comfortably in the sky… There were too many restrictions!

Compared with the current draffing days, the happy life in the Dragon Valley was simply a Dragon God-like enjoyment. The depressing thing was that there were still 3 months before the arrival of the next dragon to take over the post, and every minute was torture.

All of a sudden, Dimayaro was shocked. He stood up abruptly because he had clearly felt that all connections between himself and the Dragon Inscription were completely cut off in an instant – The highest guardian had a special ‘soul refraction’ which was connected with the Dragon Inscription defense formation at the core of the Thunder Prison. He could sense all abnormalities that might appear in the inscription formation. The power of the inscription formation in the core area of the Thunder Prison was extremely powerful. Even a super powerhouse could not break in silently. Now all connections were actually cut off, which meant the Dragon Inscription formation had been cracked!

Silently cracking everything in the blink of an eye? This is not something that brute force can do. The person must have extremely profound Dragon Inscription attainments. I’m afraid even the Great Elder Meria of the Dragon Valley cannot achieve this level!

By the way, it seems to be very quiet outside. Does this quietness mean that all the defenses are… Dimayaro was drenched in a cold sweat.

“ Oh ? You actually noticed the disappearance of the inscription. Did you use soul refraction?” When a strange voice sounded from behind, Dimayaro’s hair stood on end, and his whole body was burning with flames. The fiery red light illuminated the entire hall. Without hesitation, he launched a full-strength blow.

The fire instantly converged into a small fist-sized fireball floating at the fingertips of 1 hand like a harmless flame. With a light tap of a finger, it turned to nothing.

Dimayaro’s heart sank suddenly. He was one of the best of the dragons youth generation, and his strength was about to enter the kingdom. However, the strength shown by the enemy in front of him was far beyond Kingdom level. He could not match it at all.

“Little guy, don’t be nervous. I won’t hurt you.” The man was wearing a mask that only exposed his nose, so he couldn’t see his face clearly, “Plus I didn’t kill anyone outside. I just modified the nearby Dragon Inscription to become an illusory array so that they can’t detect the movement here.”

“Excuse me, may I know elder’s identity?” Dimayaro asked tentatively. Only dragons can achieve this kind of Dragon Inscription, and he should be a senior elder-level powerhouse.

Many elders usually do closed-door training unless it was something like the elder council. Even the giant dragon in the Dragon Valley might not have seen all the elders, especially the younger generation.

“ Hehe , don’t ask so much, little guy. I was commissioned by Little Anderlu of Pelin Family to come and see a dragon rider named Samuel, as well as pass him a few words.”

This masked person was naturally Chen Rui, and Dimayaro was at least several thousand times his age. The name ‘little guy’ was actually very deceiving, but Dimayaro had no doubts. Instead, he suddenly seemed to realize something, “It turns out to be Little Anderlu. No wonder… Uh , since it is inconvenient for sir elder to say, I will not ask more.”

Chen Rui easily persuaded Python for this trip to the Thunder Prison. In fact, Python didn’t bother about the reasons at all. She simply chose to go into a hibernation state which closed the senses. Anyway, they signed a master-subordinate contract. Given the strength gap between the 2, as long as she did not cancel the contract, Chen Rui couldn’t betray her. This was the most important reason for Python to be rest assured.

In fact, from Python’s point of view, compared with the ordinary strength of the top super powerhouse close to the gods, ordinary people were just irrelevant ants. Except for strength, everything else would not be taken to heart. Any grievances and trivialities awere just ridiculous things. This was also the general mentality of many super powerhouses, especially powerhouses above Demi-God.

“Little red dragon, what’s your name?”

Hearing that the other party recognized him as the red dragon at a glance, Dimayaro had no doubts, “Dimayaro has seen sir elder.”

“Then, Dimayaro, take me to meet the dragon rider whom Little Anderlu keeps talking about.”

“Sir elder, this way please.” Dimayaro took Chen Rui to the front passage without hesitation.

Dimayaro’s station was already the last level of the Thunder Prison, which was the cage area protected by the magic circle, and there were no guards guarding it.

The Thunder Prison was actually a huge confinement magic matrix. Each prison was a sub-magic circle, interlocking with each other. Once an ordinary powerhouse was imprisoned here, it would be difficult to break free.

Inside the prison was an enchantment surrounded by thunder, so one couldn’t see the things inside. People who were not familiar with it had no idea where the prisoners were kept.

Dimayaro took Chen Rui into 1 of the enchantments, which was a cage.

“Sir elder, this is the place. The enchantment just now can isolate all images or sounds inside, so sir elder can safely ask questions later.”

Chen Rui saw Samuel in the cage. He lay weekly on the ground like a dead man.

Samuel had many shocking scars on his body. He seemed to be an empty shell and he had lost his strength. If it weren’t for the slightly open eyes and the faint breath of life, Chen Rui would have thought he had died.

Chen Rui frowned, “His injury… what’s the matter?”

Dimayaro quickly explained, “Don’t get me wrong, sir. I didn’t attack the dragon rider. He was seriously injured when he was captured by Legion Commander Fagerius, then the Second Prince Garfield sent Golden Knight Trinis to break his limbs… “

A furious and cold light flashed across Chen Rui’s eyes, “Open the door.”

Dimayaro shivered as he felt the murderous intent. He quickly took out the magic key to open the cage door, and he bowed, “Sir elder, please help yourself. I will go out to the hall to guard first so that no one is allowed to enter.”

The red dragon was smart. He knew that the elder was unhappy with Samuel’s serious injury, so he immediately chose to leave. Even if sir elder wanted to break out from the prison or something, his strength would not be able to stop him, so he might as well do him a favor.

After Dimayaro left, Chen Rui hurried into the cage. Looking at the terrifying wounds, the murderous aura in his eyes became more and more vicious. He immediately helped Samuel to fix the broken bone, took out the potion and medicine for healing, and applied it internally and externally. Despite the help of the [Analytical Eyes], Samuel broke out in a cold sweat from the pain while the bones were being fixed, but he gritted his teeth silently.

Under the potion effect, Samuel’s face finally seemed more florid, but the internal injury and vitality couldn’t recover immediately. He said in a low voice, “Thank you sir elder.”

It seemed that Samuel heard Dimayaro just now and also regarded him as an elder of the Dragon Valley.

Chen Rui tried to check with the Evil Pupil and [Deep Analysis], and he found that Python no doubt was in a hibernation state. For the sake of safety, he carefully wrapped the mark with the Evil Pupil power. Then, he spoke up, “How did you and the Kemplot Family end up in this situation?”

Samuel was shocked by the familiar voice. He had an unbelievable expression in his eyes, “You…”

“It’s me, Samuel.” Chen Rui took off the mask, revealing the true face of ‘Arthur’.

“Your Highness! You actually came here!” Samuel was extremely emotional as he struggled to get up, but Chen Rui stopped him.

“Your injury is very serious, lie down and recuperate first. This is my order!”

Samuel smiled wryly, “I always wanted to follow in Your Highness’ footsteps, but every time Your Highness came to me at the most critical moment…”

“Tell me what happened first?”

“It started with my father, Carlo.” Samuel sighed while showing shame, “As I have been suppressed and persecuted by the third prince, Garfield, and Your Highness ordered me not to reveal the news of Your Highness’ existence, so I’m very sorry… Father finally couldn’t stand it… he took the bait from Fourth Prince Luke.”

“You and your father don’t need to be sorry. It is far more difficult to support a family than outsiders think, plus it has been so many years…” Chen Rui shook his head, “So, the so-called joint accusation is Garfield’s plan? “

“Yes, my father tried his best to support the whole family, and he worked as a financial secretary for many years. It is impossible to say that he is completely ‘clean’, but it is definitely not as sensational as mentioned by the chamber of commerce. In fact, there are basically no clean people in that circle. In other words, clean people can’t get into the circle at all. This is Garfield’s trick. However, this time, my father really took a wrong critical step- If it was in the past, even if it was at the juncture of a trade fair, His Majesty Lex would not have such a violent reaction. Furthermore, with His Majesty’s wisdom, it is impossible that he did not notice something fishy. The reason for this decision should be that he is very dissatisfied with father’s choice to support Fourth Prince Luke, so he took this opportunity… “

Chen Rui nodded. Dragon Emperor Pagris knew that this matter is related to the internal struggle of the royal family long ago, and he must have communicated with Lex. Garfield has been suppressing the Kemplot Family for so many years. Lex knew this clearly and would normally overlook it or de-escalate matters. The ruthless move on Carlo this time is clearly taking advantage of the situation.

In Lex’s original layout, the Kemplot Family should be in a very wonderful position which can play a ‘balancing’ role among the princes and even the whole situation. Now Carlo has turned to the Fourth Prince Luke in order to reverse the family’s predicament, which is equivalent to destroying this balance. That is why Lex the Great hit the Kemplot Family hard, which is also a painful reminder.

Chen Rui had been trained in the Demon Realm, so he was already a veteran with a very sensitive political sense – If everything is within my expectation, Carlo and the Kemplot Family should not be ‘in danger’. After the storm, there is likely to be an opportunity to be used again in the future, but the status will undoubtedly be greatly reduced. If Carlo is stubborn and the Kemplot Family can’t continue to play a ‘balancing’ role as before, then Lex the Great will abandon the Kemplot Family entirely.

“You attempted to assassinate Garfield, what actually happened?”

“My destination was originally the Royal Palace, which was also Garfield’s malicious plan. He set a trap to lure me there, creating the illusion that I was trying to intimidate or assassinate Lex the Great in order to save my father. As a result, I found out and evacuated in time.”

Chen Rui thought of the plot of Lin Chong accidentally entering the White Tiger Hall by mistake in ‘Water Margin’, which was exactly the same as Garfield’s trick. Fortunately, Samuel was not Lin Chong, but what happened to the assassination of Garfield?

“Just as I carefully retreated all the way to the Shion Palace’s flower garden, I happened to see that Garfield bastard actually wanted to forcibly harass Her Highness Veronica!”

Chen Rui’s soul suddenly fluctuated when he heard the name ‘Veronica’. A pair of deep and beautiful eyes with a touch of sadness and tenderness appeared in his mind.

Garfield wants to forcibly harass?

There was an inexplicable rage in Chen Rui’s soul, and he wanted to smash Garfield into pieces.

“Don’t worry, Your Highness, I stopped Garfield right away. Her Highness Veronica was not hurt. Not only did I beat the second prince, but… I also used [Dawn Extinction] to silently invade his stomach. Even if he recovers from the injury in the future, it will be difficult for him to regain his majesty as a man. I’m afraid that the Royal Highness Second Prince has not noticed this until now, otherwise it would not be as simple as breaking my limbs.”

Samuel was feeling smug, and he didn’t seem to care about the cost of his serious injury. Instead, he felt that it was worth it for Veronica’s safety plus the plot against Garfield.

Chen Rui took a deep breath, calmed down, and suddenly understood why Samuel ‘assassinated’ Garfield.

With this kind of loyalty, he didn’t know whether to laugh, cry, or sigh.

chapters.title: Chapter 923: The White Cliff! Ring Abnormality
chapters.body:
Chapter 923: The White Cliff! Ring Abnormality

Chen Rui now understood that the reason why Samuel ‘recklessly’ attempted to assassinate Garfield this time was actually directly related to him, Prince ‘Arthur’. If Samuel hadn’t thought of him as his master, he wouldn’t have attacked Garfield at such a critical juncture in order to protect Veronica, whom ‘Arthur’ had longed for.

“Come with me, let’s get out of here.” Chen Rui secretly sighed and looked around, “There is a little guy named Anderlu in the Dragon Valley who has been thinking about your safety. I only learned that something happened to you and the Kemplot Family from him. I can pretend to be a dragon elder to get you out so that Lex the Great can’t pursue it too much and just let it go.”

“This time I’m afraid I’ll disappoint Your Highness’ kindness…” Samuel shook his head slowly, “The Garfield’s incident involves the face of the royal family, plus the current predicament of the Kemplot Family, if I leave with Your Highness now, the Kemplot Family will be completely over.”

“However, this place is too dangerous for you. Don’t underestimate Garfield’s viciousness.”

“Don’t worry, Your Highness. This is also a kind of training. This month, due to the upcoming trade fair, I should still be safe. In fact, I have made a new breakthrough in comprehending the territory during this period. I’m training the bone eversion technique taught by my teacher. For this secret technique, the pain of the body is only a ‘polishing’ of the will and soul. I believe that it will not take long for me to break through to the real Saint. If I can break through to the real Saint… A Saint dragon rider, I believe that even Your Majesty should attach more importance to me. At least, I won’t be in life danger.”

Chen Rui knew that Samuel’s words were not entirely true, but if he left directly, he would feel not at ease. After a moment of silence, he spoke up, “A short time ago, I defeated the 2 elders, Gueroas and Stanwell, at the Demi-God level in the Dragon Valley.”

Samuel showed a disbelief expression: Demi-God level super powerhouses! His Highness actually defeated them! I remember the last time on Storm Island, His Highness was only able to compete with the kingdomized powerhouse…

“So, do you still have the loyalty, determination and confidence to be my subordinate?”

This sentence shocked Samuel. His whole body trembled with excitement, and he called out with all his strength, “Yes!”

“Very well, Samuel. Kemplot, would you like to be the subordinate of Arthur. Roland… aka ‘Chen Rui’? Whether I’m a prince or not, whether I have the strength or not?”

Looking at the light of the contract that appeared in front of him, Samuel forcibly supported his severely injured body and made a half-kneeling posture, “Your Highness, my master, it is my lifetime honor to be able to follow in your footsteps.”

“Okay, don’t be surprised and don’t ask anything about what you are going to experience next.”

After completing the master-subordinate contract, Chen Rui immediately performed [Star-level Enhancement] on Samuel through the spiritual link. He integrated a piece of law fragment power into Samuel’s body.

Samuel felt that his strength was sealed, but at the same time, an indescribable and powerful strength was continuously compressed into his body as if tempering his whole body and soul little by little. It was like a cocoon. As long as he could break out from the cocoon, he would be reborn and his strength would reach an unprecedented height.

“In a month’s time, your strength will slowly recover. This recovery is a brand new process of refining and basic accumulation. You must concentrate on comprehension. Due to the limited time, 1 of the steps was advanced by me, so there may be a reduced effect, but there is a way to make up for this. I will give you another ‘star position’ in the future…”

The ‘advance step’ that Chen Rui said referred to the input of the law fragment. It was indeed a bit hasty to comprehend [Star-level Enhancement] while absorbing the power of the law fragment, but Chen Rui did not have more than 1 law fragment at hand. When Samuel reached the Saint (Demon Overlord level), he could continue to absorb.

Looking at the surprised Samuel, Chen Rui smiled slightly, “My subordinate… Saint level is not enough. In fact, in front of the real powerhouse, how insignificant Saint is. My goal for you is the super-level. Only then will you realize that this is the real starting point.”

“Yes, master.” Samuel suppressed the excitement and surprise in his mind and didn’t ask any further questions.

“I have urgent matters and need to leave Yerodisha immediately. Since the trade fair will be held in January, you should be relatively safe this month. I will let the dragon outside try to protect you from being disturbed. When I come back 1 month later… I’ll try to help you and the Kemplot Family out of the crisis. You must retaliate on those who broke your legs or lynch you!”

“Master, do you want to…” Samuel’s eyes were instantly filled with fiery brilliance. Is His Highness Third Prince, who has disappeared for a long time, finally coming back to the empire?

Whether it is an alchemy grand master or a Demi-God level super powerhouse, his identity can shock the entire Dragon Bright Empire. In front of the master, Garfield and the like are just insignificant ants.

Chen Rui frowned, “Stop guessing, what you have to do now is to hurry up and comprehend without distraction. Let me remind you, if you don’t even reach Saint by then, then I will forever cancel your qualifications to follow me.”

“Yes!” Samuel was alert, and he quickly restrained his thoughts.

Chen Rui didn’t go on. He ordered Samuel a few things before leaving the prison.

When the red dragon outside saw ‘sir elder’ coming out, he hurried up to meet him. He nodded and said, “Sir elder?”

“This month, I don’t want anyone to disturb him, understand?” Chen Rui’s words had already used a hint of the power of the Evil Pupil. Dimayaro felt his soul tremble, and quickly took the order.

“Dimayaro, this is the finest wine for you. It is very precious, enjoy it slowly,” Chen Rui threw a bottle of aromatic millet wine to the red dragon, “By the way, let me tell you something, this time at the elder council, Madam Meria received the unanimous support of Royal Majesty Pagris and all the elders. She continues to serve as the great elder. The Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor also swore by Dragon God that as long as he reigns, Madam Meria will always be the elder council leader and guide of dragons.”

The red dragon was taken aback, and his face became a little more joyful. As a junior who had received Meria’s guidance, he was a supporter of the great elder fairy dragon. He was very happy to hear the news of Meria’s comeback now. However, this no-name elder is too stingy. Such a lousy bottle of wine is called a precious and extremely fine wine?

Although the red dragon thought so in his mind, he didn’t dare to say more. He just said thank you.

“When you return to Dragon Island, you can go directly to the Rainbow Summit and find the Great Elder Meria for the real reward… or punishment. Get it?”

The red dragon understood. Sir elder has a clear distinction of reward and punishment. If someone disturbs Samuel this month, then I will be punished. It seems that the protection task must be completed no matter what. Anyway, 1/3 of this acre of land belongs to me, the master red dragon. No one shall ruin it!

By the way… This sir elder is actually related to the Great Elder Meria. It seems that he must be a senior who has been training closed-door in seclusion.

After the ‘sir elder’ walked away, Dimayaro opened the wine bottle and smelled it. His eyes suddenly brightened. He had never smelled such a strong wine fragrance before!

After taking a sip, the intoxicated Dimayaro immediately had a good impression of the disappeared sir elder – Dear Dragon God! It is really a precious and extremely fine wine!

After leaving the Thunder Prison, Chen Rui went straight back to the hotel. The next day, he got into a carriage to Dragon Wing City.

The Dragon Wing City was a military stronghold or a city where the Dragon Bright Empire had the Holy Church’s teleportation point. Generally, a large number of legions were stationed here. The purpose was naturally to guard the city and protect the church against some kind of demented cultist such as the Black Death Follower. Of course, some other reasons were not disclosed.

Chen Rui stayed in the Dragon Wing City for 2 days. He disguised as a believer and mingled into the Hall of Light to pray. In the process, he got to know some believers who were going to make a pilgrimage to the Holy Light Mountain this time.

On the day the [Teleportation Portal] opened, a large number of believers had gathered in the Hall of Light. In addition to the locals from Dragon Wing City, there were more devotees who came from all over to worship.

At this time, Chen Rui had ‘replaced’ a big bearded believer into the Hall of Light. He obtained the Devotion Badge to enter the teleportation portal and mixed with like-minded ‘believers’.

Last time, due to paladin’s assessment and the closure of the Holy Light Mountain, the teleportation portal of Dragon Tooth City was 1-way, but this time the teleportation portal of the Dragon Wing City was 2-way, which meant that one could freely go to and fro.

Chen Rui followed the large group and walked to the dedicated teleportation portal of the Hall of Light.

The Devotion Badge was equivalent to an identity verification for the believers who entered, and it was very valuable. It was usually only owned by the devout believers who had donated much property. The badge incorporated a little blood of the believers as a ‘key’ to prove it. But for a mechanic grand master like Chen Rui, it was not difficult to crack it. Chen Rui with the Devotion Badge successfully passed the authentication and entered the teleportation portal smoothly.

After a strange feeling of writhing in the water, Chen Rui and the believers felt that the outlook had changed drastically. They had reached their destination.

Chen Rui and others were on a small plaza-like platform surrounded by a team of Light Knights. There were several similar ‘plazas’, and a large number of believers were being sent over.

In front was an undulating mountain range with mostly white rocks, so it was also known as the White Cliff. Among the mountains, there was the highest mountain with clouds on its peak. It stood out from the rest and was particularly eye-catching.

The destination this time was the Holy Light Mountain.

The surrounding believers showed expressions of excitement or sincerity as they knelt down one after another; many even prayed after every step.

This was the second time for Chen Rui to come to the Holy Light Mountain. There was still a considerable distance from the Holy Light City at the foot of the Holy Light Mountain. Even riding a horse would take half a day. Those believers actually knelt after every step. Nobody knew when they would arrive.

In order not to arouse suspicion, Chen Rui also learned from some believers to bow and close his eyes to pray after walking a few steps. However, when he lowered his head, he suddenly discovered something abnormal.

The abnormality appeared on his neck.

The ring hanging from the necklace was emitting a strong color. It was the first time he had seen such a strong signal since he came to the human world.

That means that Tiffany is right on the White Cliff!

chapters.title: Chapter 924: Nowhere To Hide
chapters.body:
Chapter 924: Nowhere To Hide

Chen Rui looked at the intense color of the Bloody Ring and was secretly surprised – This ‘surprise’ is really unexpected.

Previously, I used the Bloody Ring to find the direction of Tiffany, but the human world is too big, and the color has not changed much. Now, I coincidentally find Tiffany in the White Cliff.

Tiffany is a demon. She actually appeared in the core of the Holy Church? Could it be that she is imprisoned? Or the mother of the human world whom she has been looking for…

“What did you find?” Python’s voice sounded in his mind, obviously feeling the changes in his emotions.

Chen Rui quickly thought, and he decided to tell the truth, “There is a person I have been looking for. She is probably in the Holy Light Mountain. I have sensed her. If possible, I hope to take her with me.”

“Your first mission is the Light Divinity Temple,” Python sensed that he was telling the truth, “If the mission can be successfully completed, I can agree to your request, but before the mission is completed, don’t attract any attention!”

“Understood.”

While Chen Rui communicated with Python with his soul, his body movements never stopped. He followed those believers while bowing and walking forward slowly. He could sense all kinds of interlocking magic circles in the vicinity along the way and even in the air. The security seemed to be much tighter.

About 3 hours later, there was a checkpoint in front. At this time, the color of the ring became a little thicker, indicating that the direction was correct.

There are several teams of Light Knights to maintain the order in this checkpoint. The believers lined up to go through the checkpoint. This situation was somewhat similar to the toll booth in Chen Rui’s memory.

In Chen Rui’s impression, the last time he came with Paul, there was no such ‘toll booth’. It should be because the transmission location and the route were different. He went to the knight’s dedicated channel last time.

The function of this checkpoint was to exchange the Devotion Badge for another Holy Light Badge residing in the Holy Light City, which was like a ‘temporary ID card’.

Chen Rui followed the team to the front of the checkpoint and handed the Devotion Badge to the reviewing priest. The priest took the badge, glanced at him, and handed him a Holy Light Badge.

Chen Rui keenly noticed that there were several types of Holy Light Badge in front of the priest, and there seemed to be subtle differences. He wondered if it was related to the amount of money donated when obtaining the Devotion Badge. He wanted to ask, but the priest waved his hand and pointed to the long line behind, indicating for him to pass quickly and not let the believers in the back wait for a long time.

Chen Rui had no choice but to keep walking forward with the Holy Light Badge. He slowly mixed in with the crowd of believers who did not worship after every step and walked in the direction of the Holy Light City.

Soon, a large fortress appeared in front again. The believers entered through tunnels, and a large number of Light Knights were stationed at the entrance.

“Please hold the Holy Light Badge high and enter the tunnel of the fortress.”

The believers held up the Holy Light Badge they received in front of them and passed through the fortress 1 by 1. When it was Chen Rui’s turn, a Light Knight looked at the badge and politely motioned him to go to another ‘VIP tunnel’.

There seemed to be very few people in the VIP tunnel. Chen Rui felt a little strange, but he obeyed the knight’s request and walked toward the tunnel.

Besides Chen Rui, there were only 2 people who also took this tunnel, a young man and a middle-aged woman.

After walking for a while, Chen Rui realized that something was wrong. The tunnel seemed to have no end. The surrounding strength fluctuations indicated that it was a loop magic circle.

Chen Rui stopped, frowning slightly. Am I exposed? It should be. Where is the flaw? Could it be… He looked at the Holy Light Badge in his hand.

At this time, the light was flourishing, and a group of Light Knights appeared in all directions, surrounding the 3 people. No doubt, the so-called ‘VIP Tunnel’ had a special ‘reception’.

“Sirs, I’m a believer of Light God! I donated all my property to the church! What are you going to do?” said the middle-aged woman in front of her in horror.

The knight leader had reached the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor, and he should be a Divinity Temple Knight. He sneered, “Despicable cultists, under the supreme Light God’s faith, any quibbling and pretense are futile. Your Devotion Badge feedback has already explained everything! After entering the White Cliff, the Devotion Badge did not reflect the slightest faith toward Light God. Obviously, you are the spies who mixed into the White Cliff!”

It turns out that Devotion Badge also has such a role . Only then Chen Rui knew the real reason for the ‘toll booth’.

The middle-aged woman and the young man knew that their identities had been revealed. Thus, they shouted in unison, turned around and rushed toward the way they came.

The strength of these 2 people was not weak. They moved like 2 rays of light, knocking down the Light Knights who blocked them along the way.

The magic circle in front of the light flashed, and the figure of the Divinity Temple Knight appeared in front of the 2 rays of light. The long sword turned, and the lights suddenly flew out, turning into 2 figures falling to the ground with a sluggish expression.

The 2 of them responded quickly. They knew that they were not the knight’s opponents, so without waiting for the other party to make a move, they immediately activated a certain secret technique. Their facial expressions suddenly turned gray as black blood flowed from the corners of their lips. Their entire bodies began to decay rapidly.

“Sir Sherk!”

The Light Knights came up, and Sherk raised his hand, “No need, most of the spies who mixed into the White Cliff are fearless warriors. This kind of poison can not only destroy life, but also annihilate the soul.”

All of a sudden, the Divinity Temple Knight remembered something and said in shock, “Where’s another person?”

The Light Knights looked at each other. Right, what about the big bearded man?

In this magic circle with so many Light Knights, including Sherk himself, no one actually noticed how the ‘big bearded man’ disappeared.

“Even if it is Saint’s sneak technique, it is impossible to leave the magic circle silently, unless this person is also the master of magic circles.” Sherk said with a solemn expression, “Or… his strength has far exceeded our perception ability, and even surpassed the general Saint! Immediately send a warning to the defense in front, and report this to Sir Parsali of the Heavenly Thunder Hall!”

This Knight Sherk’s judgment ability was really good. When Chen Rui stopped previously, he had already roughly figured out the structures of the magic circle,so there was no need to do anything with the knights. When the knights were focused on the 2 spies, he got out of the magic circle in a few moments.

After going through the incident just now, Chen Rui didn’t take it lightly anymore. He made full use of the skills of [Camouflage] and shifting, constantly changing positions and appearances to successfully pass several levels. He finally came to the Holy Light City at the foot of the Holy Light Mountain.

The Holy Light City was 1 of the most famous cities in the human world, which was famous as the Dragon Bright Capital, Blue Glory Capital and Silver Moon Celestial Capital.

The residents of the Holy Light City were the devotees closest to God. Under the power of God’s care, their life expectancy and physical condition were higher than ordinary people. They could participate in various activities organized by the church, see the legendary important characters, and even witness some legendary ‘miracles’. For believers of the Light God, being able to join the Holy Light City was the utmost honor.

There was a strict limit on the number of people in the Holy Light City. Only a few new residents were recruited every few years. This process required extensive review. Only the most devout believers could join the Holy Light City, which could be regarded as 1 in a million.

Normally, the Holy Light City welcomes a large number of pilgrims every day, but the pilgrims only stay in the Holy Light City for 5 days.

In the area of the Holy Light Mountain, whether in the air or on the ground, especially the various defensive enchantments of the Holy Light City were several times stronger than when Chen Rui came. It was obviously impossible to use shifting to pass through the Holy Light City to the Holy Light Mountain unless he planned to break through by force.

After using the [Sneak] technique to sneak through the city gate smoothly, Chen Rui frowned. He was already familiar with the Holy Light City. There are so many people here, so it is not difficult to hide. However, every believer is wearing the Holy Light Badge. This badge is likely to have a special screening effect like in the previous fortress, so that cultists who have no faith in Light God cannot hide.

The fact that he was discovered in the fortress earlier showed that it was useless to get someone else’s Holy Light Badge. Python’s voice sounded, “Try to become a Light Knight?”

Chen Rui immediately turned into an ordinary Light Knight. He even pretended to stop some believers for interrogation. It seemed that no flaws were revealed, but soon, Chen Rui found that he was being followed. The Light Knights kept on converging in all directions.

After all, Chen Rui’s strength was far superior to these knights, so he didn’t give them a chance to gather. His body flickered, and he had escaped from the pursuers. After several turns, he hid in the safest residential courtyard, but he frowned even tighter. – Now the White Cliff’s defense is simply too terrifying. It’s not the same as when I followed Paul here. Especially the ‘recognition device’ that uses faith as the ultimate weapon against spies. It is almost impossible to mix in with an ability like transformation technique.

Chen Rui didn’t know that the reason for such precaution today was because of himself. After the Snow Dallet Tree was stolen, the whole upper levels of the church were furious. Following that, the Black Death Follower frequently attacked churches in various places, so the church spent a lot of effort to build a huge overall defense system on the Holy Light Mountain to prevent any foreign spies from mixing in.

In the future, this kind of defense system would gradually spread to the core areas of the Hall of Light in various places. Besides ensuring safety, it would further strengthen the faith and purity of the church personnel.

“There’s no other way. The strength of the guards in this place is beyond imagination. If this continues, we will not be able to enter even the Holy Light Mountain.” Python pondered for a moment, “Since you have come here, naturally you can’t return like this… Maybe the decoy tactic is a good idea.”

Chen Rui nodded. He was actually looking in the direction of Tiffany according to the display of the Bloody Ring when he was shifting his hiding spots just now. From the display, Tiffany was not in the Holy Light City, but above the Holy Light Mountain!

The closer we get to the Holy Light Mountain, the stronger the defenses will be. Judging from the current situation, even if I have the [Sneak] skill, it is impossible to sneak in without being noticed as before. It seems that I have to be ready for a tough fight.

chapters.title: Chapter 925: Invade By Force
chapters.body:
Chapter 925: Invade By Force

After night fell, several places in the Holy Light City lit up at the same time, and half of the sky was red. Just as the Light Knights urgently mobilized their forces, a silent figure was already sneaking toward the Holy Light Mountain.

With Chen Rui’s speed and sneaking skill, he had successfully broken through several checkpoints under the cover of the night. But the closer he got to the Holy Light Mountain, a feeling was getting stronger.

Law suppression.

The last time Chen Rui came here, he was only Demon Overlord-level and did not really comprehend his own law, so he didn’t feel that way. Now he was a super powerhouse who had mastered the real law, so he could clearly sense that the Holy Light Mountain’s suppressing power to the law power. If one fought here, the law power would be greatly suppressed, which meant that the super powerhouse could not exert the strongest combat power.

The source of this suppression may be faith power. Perhaps the top of the Holy Light Mountain…

It is impossible to retreat now. Besides, when I was only Demon Overlord, I sneaked into the Snowy Summit Stage alone, fought against the high-level powerhouse of the church, and stole 3 of the Snow Dallet Trees. Now that my strength is far superior than previously, there is nothing to fear.

Even without the great threat of Python, just for the sake of Tiffany or the Breeze Shadow Boots, I have to break into the Holy Light Mountain!

Chen Rui felt pride in his mind as he continued to sneak forward. He soon reached the entrance of the stairs under the Holy Light Mountain.

It was still the familiar wide staircase. Whether it was the number of guards or the strength of the magic circle, it was completely different from the previous one.

The guards on the Holy Light Mountain were well-trained and highly disciplined. The Holy Light City below was full of commotion. Meanwhile, the guards here were calm, as if nothing had happened. They didn’t even look at him.

Chen Rui had already noticed that the biggest difference between the magic circle of the Holy Light Mountain and the bottom of the mountain was that it was filled with strong faith power, and it was interlocked. As long as a part of the magic circle was triggered, the entire magic circle would be activated. Even these guards were an important element of the magic circle. Once the guards had any abnormality, the entire magic circle would sense it, just like every maid in Teris’ residence in the Bloody Empire was part of the magic circle. It was just that the magic circle in Teris’ residence was only a drop in the bucket compared to the behemoth Holy Light Mountain.

Not only that, the magic circle had extremely serious space interference, so it was almost impossible to activate space shifting skills here.

“Madam Python, I believe you have also sensed the difficulty of these magic circles. It seems that it is impossible not to disturb these guards to reach the Holy Light Mountain.”

“Then let’s force our way in, since we came here, we won’t go back empty-handed.” Python laughed, “These ants are not worth mentioning at all. My only concern is Michael, Gabriel, and Raphael, but in this kind of land of faith, the 3 of them should usually be in a dormant state to absorb and digest the faith power. At most, they will only dispatch an avatar. Since we can only invade by force this time, then we will make it quick and go straight to the Light Divinity Temple with all our strength. The possibility of getting the Book of Creation this time is very slim, but our goal is not to seize the Book of Creation, but to absorb the origin power of creation. As long as the time is right, it should not be a problem to enter the Light Divinity Temple to obtain the origin power of creation.”

Chen Rui sneered secretly. Python said it so easy, but with my ‘peak stage of the Kingdom level’ strength, invading by force in this enemy base camp with 3 dormant archangels is likely to end up in annihilation. Even if it is only the avatar of the 3 archangels, I am by no means an opponent.

Chen Rui had a doubtful expression on his face, and seemed to be hesitant. In fact, Tiffany and the Breeze Shadow Boots were not far away. Even if Python was not by his side, he would not leave, but now his value to Python was the greatest, so it was also the best time to put forward conditions.

“Don’t you want to get the Breeze Shadow Boots? This is the best chance. With me, it will definitely go according to your wish. Here are the last 5 soul imprints of Pseudo-God. I will give them to you. As long as I get the origin power of the Book of Creation, I will have my way to get you out.”

“Thank you madam!” Chen Rui got 5 more copies of the Pseudo-God’s soul imprint. Knowing that his ‘hesitation’ had already taken effect, he overdid it. He gritted his teeth, and his peak stage of the Kingdom level strength breath suddenly surged up, “Okay, I’ll give up this life and go with madam on this trip!”

The knights guarding on both sides of the stairs suddenly showed a vigilant expression because they had sensed that an outsider stepped into the periphery of the magic circle. When they had the next sense, the magic circle was broken!

Just within 2 seconds, the magic circle at the entrance of the Holy Light Mountain was forcibly breached. The speed was really fast!

Immediately afterward, the occasional electric spark or light flickered on the way going up the mountain. The guarding knights only sensed the magic circle collapsing, but they didn’t even clearly see the figure of the intruder.

In front was a small plaza. After this plaza, the stone steps behind were divided into 3, leading to the Holy Light Mountain’s 3 major summits respectively.

The core of these 3 main peaks was the 3 temples, namely the Divinity Seal Hall of Pope Vantis, the Star Hall of Archbishop Pusmeer, and the Holy Blessing Hall of Holy Lady Eudora. The Snow Dallet Flower was located at the Snowy Summit Stage at the east of the Divinity Seal Summit. The highest peak of the Holy Light Mountain did not belong to the 3 main summits, but an independent existence. Above the Divinity Seal Summit, it was the forbidden area of the Holy Church where only the pope and the 2 archbishops could enter.

The lights on the plaza were bright. The Heavenly Thunder Hall’s owner, the Paladin Captain Parsali nicknamed ‘Glorious Swordmaster’ was wearing a white full-body armor, holding the greatsword ‘Gale’ in both hands while waiting in full force. He was surrounded by a large number of Divinity Temple Knights.

He had already learned that someone had set fire to the Holy Light City. Just as he received a warning from the bottom of the mountain, he immediately noticed that someone had entered the magic circle in this area. He was frightened. The speed of the intruder was beyond imagination, and the magic circles along the way were actually ignored and directly cracked. Parsali thought to himself that he would never be able to do this, even though he had successfully broken through to kingdomized last year.

“ Boom! ” The golden lightning in front of him flickered for a while, and a figure wrapped in ice appeared in the vision. The figure shook slightly, and the ice caused by the strong magic circle suddenly shattered and shot toward Parsali.

Parsali sensed the terrifying power of the ice tearing through the air. The knights behind him definitely couldn’t resist it. A strong flame instantly erupted around him. The greatsword in his hand was inserted toward the ground, and the flame instantly turned into countless interlaced translucent light shields that blocked the front.

When the sharp ice hit the light shields, there were countless cracks on the light shields, but the sharp ice also disappeared without a trace. Just when the Divinity Temple Knights breathed a sigh of relief, Parsali was shocked. A huge ‘cross’ suddenly appeared on the overlapping light shields as if it was slashed by some terrifying weapon.

The next second, all the light shields collapsed without a trace.

Parsali’s facial expression had become extremely serious. This move was his strongest defensive-swordsmanship, called [Unassailable]. After breaking through to the Kingdom Level, he combined law power and became more unassailable, yet the opponent easily crushed it!

“[Break Army]!” After many battles, Parsali unhesitatingly launched his strongest swordsmanship attack. A white light beam rushed toward the enemy. Wherever it passed, the solid ground protected by the enchantment cracked.

This slash was actually equal to the essence of countless slashes, and it was deeply rooted in the truth of simplifying complexity. However, this sharp sword qi containing kingdom power slowed down the moment it was sent out as if it encountered countless ripples with huge resistance. Subsequently, as if being hit by a whip-like force, the invincible sword qi turned into particles and dissipated with a ‘bang’ .

In an instant, my strongest defense and attack were… Parsali was extremely shocked. Before he could make the next move, there was a shake. He was stunned in place, and the figure had disappeared.

“Sir Parsali!”

The Divinity Temple Knights at the back found out something was wrong. As soon as their feet moved, the entire armor on Parsali was torn apart and shattered into countless pieces as if affected by the ground shaking. He collapsed to the ground. Although he was still breathing, he had completely lost the combat power.

Parsali’s eyes were still full of disbelief after he collapsed. With just 2 casual blows, my 2 strongest moves completely collapsed, and the actual strength activated by the opponent is not much stronger than mine!

In fact, Parsali did not know that Chen Rui had personally experienced his 2 attacks in the past, and now his strength was peak stage of the Kingdom level while the highest combat power under [Red Pole Star Transformation] had reached Demi-God level. Whether it was the mastery of law, kingdom or strength, it was far above him, so under the same strength, it was not surprising for him to be defeated in seconds.

Just like Pseudo-God’s Demi-God avatar, the combat power was far superior to that of ordinary Demi-God.

If it wasn’t for Chen Rui wanting to save time and strength, Parsali would be a dead body now.

The faith power in the magic circle at Parsali’s checkpoint was much stronger. For Chen Rui, the resistance was even greater.

In the blink of an eye, he had come to that 3-way intersection.

When going to the Divinity Seal Summit, Chen Rui sensed that the radiance of the Bloody Ring, which was originally very rich, began to fade. It seems that Tiffany is not at the Divinity Seal Summit, but at the Holy Blessing Summit or the Star Summit.

But judging from today’s situation, it is impossible to take Tiffany away. I have Python in me too, so I can only go straight to the Divinity Seal Summit.

Chen Rui once saw the giant statue of Raphael at the Holy Blessing Summit’s plaza, which could be described as magnificent. However, compared with the Divinity Seal Summit’s Michael, the statue of Raphael was nothing, because the entire Divinity Seal Summit was a huge statue.

Although Michael’s sculpture was far less detailed than Raphael’s, the momentum was more majestic. It was like a giant with 12 wings in the sky looking down at all the creatures below, giving people a trembling feeling of reverence.

TL: Is Tiffany’s mom Holy Lady Eudora? Shouldn’t be right? Her mom should have been imprisoned or something…

chapters.title: Chapter 926: Camael
chapters.body:
Chapter 926: Camael

The huge ‘Michael’ mountain gave Chen Rui an intangible sense of oppression. He didn’t dare to stay. He carefully bypassed the Divinity Seal Hall where the pope was located and followed Shura’s previous route toward the top of the Holy Light Mountain.

Strangely, after bypassing the Divinity Seal Hall, the road in front of him was completely different from the route that Shura took in memory. The originally rugged mountain road had become a flight of stairs. No matter which direction he changed to, the white jade-like stairs would appear under his feet like it was prepared in advance.

Python’s voice sounded, “This is a space guide. It will send you to the place where the enemy’s strongest troops are assembled. It should be a chain reaction caused by you triggering the magic circle just now, but since you have already invaded by force, there is no fear of being exposed. It’s just a mere space guide. Later, move at full speed in the direction I said, and don’t care about everything you see along the way.”

Yes. Anyway, we are going all-in this time. I can’t afford to care about this anymore. Chen Rui accelerated without thinking. Countless figures of the knights rushed out of the stairs.

In Chen Rui’s normal sensing, these were all real, and the strength was very strong. If he didn’t avoid it, he would definitely be injured. However, in the [Analytical Eyes], there was no display of life, but the Super System had a burst of alarm sounds of spiritual intrusion. It seemed that these were powerful illusions caused by the Holy Light Mountain’s faith power. Even powerhouses of Kingdom level strength were not spared.

Of course, these were not simple illusions, but also a kind of soul attack. Chen Rui did not panic. A huge black hole appeared in the Super System. The foreign force that could not be converted in time was all devoured by [Star Devouring].

“Your ability is stronger than I thought. You actually ignored the soul attack that contained faith.” Python praised, “Now teleport to the left, and take 10 steps forward…”

Chen Rui focused his mind with all his strength, ignoring these phantoms. He moved quickly according to the position Python said. He didn’t know how many times he changed positions. The stairs under his feet finally faded, turning into a bumpy mountain road. Looking back, Michael’s giant ‘sculpture’ was far behind – He had been out of the scope of the Divinity Seal Summit.
