In front of him was a huge mountain surrounded by mist. He couldn’t see the specific situation, but he could sense the incomparably rich faith power. It was the destination of this time, the forbidden place of the Holy Light Mountain: the top of the Holy Light Mountain.

There seemed to be no magic circle in the area at the top of the Holy Light Mountain, or rather, there was no need for it.

Chen Rui remembered Shura slaying Holy Dragon Radamaro when he first entered the top of the Holy Light Mountain, and later encountered a terrifying attack by faith power along the way to Light Divinity Temple. This kind of attack was not the previous soul attack or illusion, but the power could really make one’s body and soul vanish. Even Shura’s special physique could barely resist it. In the end, the moment he saw the Light Divinity Temple, he was annihilated.

At that time, Shura’s main purpose was to implement the decoy tactic by attracting the troops so that he could steal the Snow Dallet at the Snowy Summit Stage. At that time, neither Shura nor Chen Rui’s strength had reached super-level. Therefore they could not sense the true strength of Holy Light Mountain nor did they encounter any real obstacles. The most important thing was that for so many years, no one had been able to invade the ‘sacred and inviolable Holy Light Mountain’, so most of the guardians were in a state of slumber.

However, the theft of the Snow Dallet Tree was like a small butterfly. The flickering wings caused a chain effect. Isyorul, Ze Hongen, and even Raphael’s avatars all woke up, especially when the 2 4-winged angels had fallen, the Holy Light Mountain had activated the real strength ‘mode’.

Chen Rui walked for a while, and a platform with 3 sculptures appeared again in front. Behind the platform were stairs leading to the mountain.

Among the 3 sculptures, the man among them was the tallest and most burly. He was about 10 meters tall, with 8 wings behind him, making him look majestic. Next to him were 2 smaller female sculptures with 4 wings.

The moment Chen Rui stepped onto the platform, the moon in the sky actually glowed with a strong sun-like light. A majestic momentum instantly filled the entire space.

“Invade the forbidden area, die!”

The 2 beautiful female voices sounded at the same time. Then, there was a bright light, and a powerful force overwhelmingly pressed toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui’s eyes flashed, and his palms formed a blade shape. Under the sharp qi, the colored light was torn apart. However, the scattered colored light bloomed with stronger power, interweaving into criss-cross patterns. Even the space was solidified, making people immobile.

At this moment, 7 huge white light balls appeared in the colorful light. These light balls seemed to be connected by invisible threads. They exploded in the blink of an eye. This connection seemed to be a special kind of buff that doubled the power of the light ball’s explosion. The overall power of the explosion was extremely terrifying. All the colorful light patterns were instantly shattered and annihilated.

[Aurora Shot]!

In the past, the power of [Aurora Shot] and [Aura Blade] only had their own advantages, which was far less comparable to the Scorching Dragon and other big moves. After Chen Rui studied the destruction law, he had a new understanding of [Aurora Shot]. [Aurora Shot] was the quickest and most labor-saving move to use destruction law. The current move was called [7-star Explosion], which was derived from [Aurora Shot]. Under the structure and connection of destruction law, for every 1 explosion, the power doubled. The explosion of the 7 [Aurora Shots] was 7 times that of a single [Aurora Shot].

If he could further comprehend the essence of destruction law, this ‘multiplying’ might become ‘square power’. The momentum would undoubtedly be more terrifying.

Once this [7-star Explosion] was launched, the colorful light disappeared without a trace. However, before the power fully exploded, it was extinguished in one palm.

“ Hmph! Lowly guy, how dare you act arrogant in front of me, Camael!”

The one who spoke was a burly man, holding a silver spear in his hand with 8 wings gleaming behind him. Behind him were 2 4-winged women who looked slightly panic.

In the [Analytical Eyes], Camael’s data was shown as.

Race: Angel (8-winged)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SSS+

Physique: SSS+, Strength: SSS+, Spirit: SSS, Speed: SSS+.

[Analysis]: Light attribute, weapon proficiency, battle intent enhancement, space talent, defense talent.

Danger level: Extremely dangerous!

The strength of the 2 women was SS- and SS, both of which were kingdom levels, but what made Chen Rui puzzled was that their race was actually ‘human’.

Chen Rui also noticed that the wings of this Camael were real wings. The silver feathers exuded shining bright and holy breath whereas the wings behind the 2 women who were suspected to be twins were condensed by light and not solid, just like Ze Hongen and Isyorul. I remember Ze Hongen and Isyorul’s original race is also shown as ‘human’?

What’s going on?

But Chen Rui didn’t have time to think about it. As Camael slowly raised the silver spear in his hand, the sun-like light ignited from the spear, and a powerful breath of the peak stage of the Demi-God locked on him. Under this terrifying pressure, Chen Rui couldn’t help sweating. His strength was almost suppressed to the lowest point – If he used [Red Pole Star Transformation], he might have the power to fight Camael, but he didn’t want to expose his last trump card in front of Python.

Now Chen Rui was only the strength of the peak stage of the Kingdom level. Facing the peak stage of the Demi-God’s Camael, Python would definitely not sit by and watch.

No doubt, the voice of Python came to his mind, “Relax your mind, accept my strength, and leave the rest to me.”

Knowing that the situation was urgent, Chen Rui immediately relaxed the defenses of his mind. He felt an extremely comfortable feeling wrapping his soul. He actually had an indescribable pleasure as if going into a hot spring with a tired body. It also seemed to be a sexual connection between a man and a woman where the body and soul were completely integrated.

At this moment, the spear in Camael’s hand was shining brightly. The terrifying sharp qi pierced through Chen Rui’s body. There were countless interweaved light nets around Chen Rui. Even the space was divided into deep fissures. This was even due to Camael wanting to catch him alive. Otherwise, he could annihilate this ant of this Kingdom level with a single blow.

“Sir Camael is so powerful!”

“Yeah, it’s just a blow, and…”

“ Hmph! This guy almost hurt you all just now. Angille, Anchele, I will hand over the interrogation to both of you in a while; just don’t kill him.” Just as Camael said this, he was greatly shocked. He saw faint mist coming out of Chen Rui. The light net actually dimmed immediately, and it was eroded in the blink of an eye.

The mist, like a slender hand, waved at the silver spear, and the dazzling ‘sunshine’ immediately began to fade. In the blink of an eye, it had turned into a dim fluorescent light and began to corrode.

“My Spear of Judgement! This is deprivation…” Camael groaned strangely as if seeing something terrifying. He waved both hands, and the 2 women, Angille and Anchele, flew toward the mist involuntarily.

Before the 2 women could touch the mist, they let out a shrill scream. The snow-white skin corroded at a speed visible to the naked eye. In the blink of an eye, the 2 pretty female bodies turned into skeletons, then the skeletons turned into smoke and dissipated.

Chen Rui was horrified, but his body was now taken over by Python. He could only watch it all happen from the third person perspective. On the other side, Camael had turned into a white light and disappeared without a fight at the moment when Angille and Anchele resisted.

Chen Rui felt that the extreme pleasure of soul fusion gradually faded. He actually had a reluctance feeling. Python’s voice sounded, “Camael has become more alert. He actually escaped. This may be a little troublesome. Let’s go to the Light Divinity Temple! We must reach before the 3 guys wake up!”

Chen Rui hurried forward and disappeared into the stairs in the blink of an eye, while the 3 angel statues behind Camael had cracked and collapsed.

At this moment, the entire Divinity Seal Summit trembled slightly. The huge 12-winged sculpture slowly opened its eyes.

chapters.title: Chapter 927: The Person Closest To God, The Most Terrifying Woman
chapters.body:
Chapter 927: The Person Closest To God, The Most Terrifying Woman

“Madam Python, just now… is that guy named Camael an angel?” Chen Rui didn’t encounter any obstacles along the way, but the top of the Holy Light Mountain had strong interference. With his peak stage of the Kingdom-level strength, he was still unable to shift, and his speed was also greatly limited. The more he advanced, the more so.

“Yes, Camael is an 8-winged angel. He is usually quite belligerent, but don’t be fooled by the surface. You have seen his cunning just now. I wanted to kill him while he was careless, but I was noticed by him. He even sacrificed his companions to escape.”

Chen Rui frowned. Although Python is a soul entity, she is a peak stage Pseudo-God after all. Is it so much trouble to get rid of a mere peak stage of the Demi-God?

Python sensed his doubts, “If my body is still here, it’s just a snap of my fingers to solve him, but now I’m a soul entity, plus Camael has a strong defensive talent and space skill which happens to restrain my strength. If we take too much time and strength here, it’s not worth it.”

Chen Rui nodded as he accepted the explanation, and asked, “Those 2 women… Angille and Anchele are also angels?”

“Angille and Anchele are indeed angels, but those 2 women are just super-level human beings bearing the names of the 2 angels Angille and Anchele. The real Anchele or Angille should have perished long ago. Guys like Michael really think that they have become a god? They actually assign a divine servant like this… They are all narcissistic and arrogant guys!”

Angille and Anchele are humans bearing the names of the angels? Isyorul? Ze Hongen?

The real angel has fallen?

Chen Rui vaguely understood something. While asking, he did not stop walking as he quickly moved up the stairs.

The faith power in front was getting stronger and stronger, and it carried a sense of danger. The intangible pressure was also increasing step by step. If Chen Rui had enough time, he could stop and use the abilities such as [Star Devouring] to digest and absorb slowly in order to convert these extremely high concentrations of faith power for his own use.

However, he didn’t have the time at all, so the Holy Light Mountain’s faith power became the most dangerous weapon.

A leaf, a speck of dust, a gust of wind… even the moonlight in the sky, all turned into something deadly.

Shura also encountered this kind of attack where ‘everything in the world is a weapon’, but at that time Shura’s strength did not even reach the Kingdom level, so each step was a struggle. Chen Rui initially thought that with his current strength, he could completely defend or even be immune to this level of attack, but the power of the attack far exceeded his imagination. Even if he had reached the peak stage of the Kingdom level, being in this environment was also like walking on thin ice. If he was a little careless, his body and spirit would be destroyed.

Chen Rui understood a little. This is the power of a rule. No matter how strong it is, as long as I enter this range on the top of the Holy Light Mountain, I will encounter this kind of fatal danger, even a Pseudo-God like Python is no exception. Unless I’m immune due to certain conditions or I completely surpass the ‘rule’ with absolute strength.

Chen Rui tried his best to use all kinds of abilities, and under the guidance and help of Python, he stepped forward step by step despite the ‘barrage’. Gradually, there was a special breath amid the faith power. This breath gave Chen Rui a faint sense of familiarity as if he had felt it before somewhere. It was not because Shura came here last time, but the real feeling from himself. It was just that he couldn’t remember it in a hurry.

“The breath of ‘creation’!” Python was refreshed. Her the pitch couldn’t help but raise a bit. “Quick! Go ahead!”

Chen Rui had only taken a few steps before he stopped abruptly because he had already discovered the abnormality ahead in the [Analytical Eyes] – even though his vision or other senses hadn’t noticed it yet.

Race: Unable to determine!

Comprehensive strength: Unable to determine!

His reaction was correct as Python’s voice sounded immediately afterward, “Stop!”

A figure faintly appeared in front of him. As soon as this figure appeared, all the power of the faith attack suddenly changed as if being pulled by some special strength, then it gradually calmed down.

This calm was only on the surface. Chen Rui could clearly feel that a more terrifying power was constantly accumulating, compressing, and charging. Once it erupted, it must be several times the terrifying power.

The moonlight suddenly brightened a lot, but it wasn’t as dazzling as the sun. It was more crystalline and soft, and the entire moonlight seemed to be attracted by this figure.

This was a near-perfect man dressed in a white robe with no extra lining. His long golden hair was scattered on his shoulders. Although his face was vague, one could feel the incomparably handsome facial features with his mind. It was just flawless.

Chen Rui thought that ‘Arthur’ was already a handsome guy, but in front of this man, he was obviously overshadowed.

The most impressive was the holy temperament exuded from the whole body that was gentle like the rising sun and aloof. It made people feel ashamed involuntarily and had the urge to kneel down and worship at the same time.

This kind of ‘worship’ feeling had never occurred to Chen Rui even when facing Satan or Sariel. He only had a similar feeling when facing those huge ‘corpses’ in the Chaos Realm.

However, compared to the ‘corpses’, which were as vast as a solar system, this man’s temperament was far less. It was more of a superficial ‘sacred’. With Chen Rui’s current understanding of faith power, ‘holy’, ‘aloof’ and ‘worship’ were mostly caused by the ‘coat’ constructed by faith power rather than the inner real quality like those ‘corpses’.

Even so, this man’s momentum and strength were superior to Chen Rui’s now. If it wasn’t for Python’s strength, he would have been defeated by the breath released by the man.

Such strength! Such momentum!

3 archangels!

Not the Raphael I’ve seen before, so it should be Gabriel or…

“Michael…” Python’s voice had already sounded in Chen Rui’s mind.

No doubt, is the leader of the 3 archangels, chief archangel, Michael!

“Python?” Michael said as if hearing Python’s voice in Chen Rui’s soul. The voice was thick and gentle, but it implied a dignified solemnity.

“ Hmph! Michael! It has been a long long time.” It seemed that the 2 were old acquaintances. Facing Michael, Python knew that she couldn’t hide it, but she still did not break away from Chen Rui’s body.

“You actually gave up your body? Or, you lost it in battle…” Michael’s tone was a little surprised. “So, you invaded this land of highest godfaith to steal the Book of Creation?”

“The land of the highest godfaith?” Python’s voice was filled with unabashed contempt. “A servant who fools god, have you been fooling yourself too long that you even fooled yourself?”

Michael seemed very calm, “I didn’t fool myself. I’m not a god yet, but I’ve just touched a little bit of a threshold to that path.”

“A little threshold? You actually touched it?” Python didn’t laugh at it this time. She was silent for a moment, and sighed. “It seems that after planning and managing the Holy Church for so many years, you have really achieved something. However, touching the threshold does not mean taking that step; you and I are very clear about this.”

“Yes, but no matter what, I have already walked in front of you and Satan.” Michael nodded slightly, “Okay, reminiscence time is over. Next, do you choose to be captured? Or be annihilated in battle?”

“Don’t worry, Sir Chief Archangel, let me explain my purpose first.” Python smiled tenderly and unhurriedly, “I didn’t mean to be hostile to you guys. Otherwise, I wouldn’t choose to go straight ahead like this. This time, I am indeed aiming for the Book of Creation, but not to take it away. Instead, it is to comprehend the full power of creation and see if there is a way to recreate my physical body. If you help me this time, I will owe you a favor. In the future… if something happens, I can stand on your side.”

“‘Help’?” Michael showed a smile, but not the slightest intent, “You fallen one, do you think this word will appear between us?”

“There is no eternal enemy or friend, light and darkness will always coexist. If there is no ‘darkness’, how can ‘light’ be so bright?”

Michael sneered, “Unfortunately, even from the point of view of interests, you don’t have the leverage I need. Moreover, I don’t believe you at all, unless you are willing to surrender to me.”

“ Haha! ” Python seemed to have heard the funniest thing, “Surrender to you? Michael, do you really think you are a god after stealing some faith?”

“I said, I’m not a god yet, but there is no doubt that I have become the person closest to god.” The breath on Michael’s body gradually changed. His blond hair fluttered, and the faith power that had been suppressed began to show signs of eruption.

Chen Rui could no longer describe the magnitude of this kind of power. Even Satan or Sariel (who might not have unleashed their real power) did not give him such a terrifying sense of oppression.

“I will also give you a choice, get out of the way.” Python’s voice was cold, “Otherwise, die!”

“Such a strange self-confident.” Michael glanced at Chen Rui, then he shook his head, “I can’t think of the reason you have the confidence to compete with me at the Holy Light Mountain. Let alone you are a soul, even if you are in optimum state, you are not my opponent. Do you think this Kingdom level ant can be the key to your escape?”

Python laughed, and Chen Rui’s body was drawn by the laughter. He involuntarily exuded a breath of destruction origin.

“I’m not thinking of ‘escaping’, and he’s not an ant, but… a weapon that can annihilate you, me, and everything.”

Chen Rui was taken aback when he heard this sentence.

“He is a very special body of destruction, and he condenses the complete origin power of the Book of Destruction. This position is quite close to the position of the Book of Creation. As long as I use the secret technique to trigger and detonate the destructive power in this person. An explosion that is several times more than its own origin… You should know what will happen when the powers of complete destruction origin and complete creation origin intertwine.” Python’s crisp laughter sounded. It was very sweet, but it was extremely creepy in Chen Rui’s ears.

Chen Rui finally understood why Python chose him to come to the human world and the Holy Light Mountain.

Michael’s eyes suddenly turned gloomy. Although the strength of this ‘ant’ is weak, he contains an extremely pure destruction law. Is it indeed the complete power of the destruction origin?

Python’s laughter became more charming, and the breath of the destruction origin in Chen Rui suddenly increased dozens of times; even Michael couldn’t help but be surprised.

Destruction and creation were the 2 most earliest origins, and they were also 2 absolutely opposite strengths. Unless there was another power as an intermediary, if the explosion power of the complete origin directly intertwined, it would produce a kind of mutation which would multiply the destructive effect. At that time, everything would be destroyed, then reborn again. The process would be repeated, but the original things would be obliterated.

Michael definitely would not possess that kind of ‘intermediary’ power, so if the power really exploded, even if Michael could escape alive, the Holy Light Mountain and even the entire White Cliff would be destroyed. His efforts over the years would also be destroyed.

If the true Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction were directly intertwined, then the whole world, the whole plane would be…

Chen Rui wanted to break free of Python’s soul power or suppress the power of destruction origin, but he felt that his body was completely out of his control, like a puppet being pulled on strings. He was shocked and angry, “Madam Python, you…”

“Are you surprised? Do you think after I signed a master-subordinate contract with you, I will be completely at ease? Unfortunately, I’m not Sariel.” Python’s voice was so gentle that it gave Chen Rui goosebumps, “Although your strength is low, I have not underestimated you. How can someone who can get rid of Sariel’s control be such a simple character? Do you remember when you were at Camael’s place before? That wonderful fusion of souls… At that time, I was really in control of you .”

Chen Rui suddenly realized that the reason why Python fused her soul to control his body was not to deal with Camael, but to use Camael, the Demi-God whom Chen Rui ‘could not defeat’ to achieve real control over him. No wonder she put in so much effort, but she still let Camael escape. Even without Camael, in the face of a powerful enemy like Michael, Python will take advantage to perform ‘fusion’.

The signing of the master-subordinate contract appeared to be Chen Rui’s luring plan succeeded, but in fact, he himself was deceived and let down his guard. Now that he thought about it, the reason Python carefully taught him the mystery of destruction origin law in the Demon Realm was also for this scene.

With such a mind and means, this woman could only be described as ‘terrifying’. Even Chen Rui, who had been extra careful, was still tricked.

“What method did you use?” Chen Rui said furiously.

“In addition to soul fusion, there is also a poison that combines destruction law and might. I named it ‘affection’. For a stupid guy like you, whether it is family, friendship or love, it is the biggest shackle and also the most powerful poison. Therefore, even if you have extraordinary ability and wisdom, you will be easily controlled by me.”

TL: Can Chen Rui still cancel the contract in time to get back his control?

chapters.title: Chapter 928: You Underestimated Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 928: You Underestimated Me

At this moment, Chen Rui’s mind was full of warning signs, and a dangerous murderous aura erupted from Michael’s side. The previously suppressed faith power surged out with unprecedented power.

Next, Chen Rui’s entire vision was covered with red light.

This red was not a simple flame or brilliance, but a sun-like fiery red. The sun might not have this fiery red, but this fiery red gave Chen Rui an intuition of ‘sun’ inconceivably.

This is the sun of death.

When death comes, you have nothing to resist.

This was how Chen Rui felt now. He couldn’t see Michael’s move at all. Only this feeling was left.

As long as he was illuminated by the fiery red sun, he would completely disappear.

This was undoubtedly a light element attack, but it also gave Chen Rui a feeling of near-desperate death. For example, even if the [Body of Light Glory] could offset 90% of the damage, the remaining 10% could easily destroy and annihilate him.

The strength of Pseudo-God was not something that Kingdomized or Demi-God could covet at all. Even if he activated [Red Pole Star Transformation], facing the top Pseudo-God powerhouse, he would definitely end up being killed in a second. Moreover, it was Michael who was closest to God.

Michael’s response was very timely – Kill directly! Don’t give Python time to unleash the power of this ‘body bomb’!

“No matter how deep the memory is, there will be a day to forget it; no matter how deep the possession is, there will be a time to lose it.”

“There are gains and losses for everything in the world.”

Python’s clear voice sounded. The speed of the sound should be slower than the speed of light, but Python’s voice came first. Under this voice, the fiery red suddenly dimmed as if it ‘lost’ all its brilliance.

This was not a spell, but a kind of power similar to ‘speaking out of the law’, which combined various powers including belief, faith, chanting, kingdom, and so on. It could also be called might.

Python deliberately talked to Chen Rui previously in order to accumulate energy as precautions. Hence, Michael’s reaction was within her expectations.

When Chen Rui came back to his senses, he found that he had appeared 100 meters behind Michael. At some point of time, a fiery red longsword had appeared in Michael’s hand. The quillons were in the shape of a cross – It was this terrifying weapon that launched the ‘death’ sunshine just now.

However, the fiery red long sword seemed a little dim. Python’s [Deprivation] might was really so powerful that it actually stripped away the power of the ‘sun’.

Although the dark elements of the human world, especially the Holy Light Mountain, were far weaker than the light elements, it was night now when the dark elements were most active. Under the might of Python, even the moonlight eclipsed, and the entire Holy Light Mountain fell into darkness.

“Divine deterrence is like hell! The hand of light will eventually tear apart all the evil haze.” Michael’s voice revealed the majesty and solemnity above the sky.

When the golden light shone, the darkness was torn apart. The golden light came from behind Michael, where there were 6 pairs of golden wings. Like Camael, these wings were real. The golden feathers exuded a rich and incomparable divine breath. Michael spread the 12 golden wings. Chen Rui felt dizzy, and the entire space was refracted into countless golden mirrors which separated the space where he was.

Just a casual action of spreading the wings can divide the space!

Chen Rui felt that Python controlled his body to make countless unimaginable shifting, teleporting, and jumping movements at this moment. If it was an ordinary space, he would have already dodged it, but this golden mirror space had a kind of reflection ability. No matter how mysterious the movement or even the attack, it would be reflected back.

This is… space law!

Chen Rui was secretly surprised. At this time, Python didn’t seem to do anything, but the nearby mirror began to decay and fell apart silently.

Poison! Python’s affection poison can even pierce through space law!

Just like time, imperceptibly and silently poisoning everything.

Compared with this, Paglio’s poison can only be regarded as child’s play.

In the blink of an eye, the red light reappeared, and a majestic force surged forward. Chen Rui felt as if he was in an oven. His flesh and blood were separated and annihilated; even his soul was suffocated. It took him a long time to get rid of that terrifying feeling. He found that blood was oozing from his facial features, which quickly evaporated.

At this time, the distance between Chen Rui and Michael was further widened, and the steps between the 2 had long since disappeared, leaving only a bottomless huge hole. A few golden feathers slowly floated down in the air.

In just a few seconds, Python and Michael have had several fierce confrontations. Obviously, from the perspective of Python’s soul state, she had suffered a major injury and she was at an absolute disadvantage.

“You actually laid down a highly poisonous law a long time ago, but the most fearsome thing is your ‘deprivation’ power.” Michael sneered, “Unfortunately, you met me, and this is the top of the Holy Light Mountain, so you have no chance of winning. With your current soul entity, how many times can you withstand such exhaustion? If…”

Before Michael could finish speaking, his facial expression changed abruptly. Chen Rui’s body gradually swells up, and the breath of the destruction origin, which was originally terrifying, skyrocketed again.

Python said indifferently, “I didn’t plan to fight with you in the first place. I just used poison to cancel the enchantment of this area when I was talking. Although my current position is still a certain distance from the Book of Creation, I can already sense the strong origin power of creation. In the case of the failure of this barrier enchantment, once the power of the destruction origin explodes, it is likely to cause a chain explosion. Then, not only the entire Holy Light Mountain is in danger of collapsing, even you and I may be annihilated. My body has been lost, and since I dared to come to your 3 archangels lair from the Demon Realm, I have already been mentally prepared. And you, my Sir Chief Archangel, including Raphael and Gabriel, are you mentally prepared to die together with me, a little woman who has nothing and has sacrificed everything…?”

Michael’s brows furrowed, and the red long sword in his hand slowly lowered – Python’s words were not bluffing. It was indeed a bit of a disappointment for not being able to kill that ‘body bomb’ in time just now.

A large amount of mists began to emit from Chen Rui’s body. The mists condensed into the shape of a woman who looked ethereal like a fairy.

The soul entity of Python had finally been separated.

“Okay, Sir Chief Archangel, it looks like you’re not going to stop me anymore. I’m going to the Hall of Light now. This man has a part of my soul-consciousness in him. He will just stay here – you know my means. Your speed of sealing the space can’t compare to my soul sense, so the explosion will happen before you do it.” Python showed an alluring smile, “Don’t worry, I’ll keep my word. After an hour, I will leave and I promise not to touch the Book of Creation at all. But if you dare move again, then let’s feel the aftermath of Twilight of the Gods together. You know I will do it, my old friend. I have this guts and determination like back then… just like I would do anything to kill Uriel.”

Speaking of the name ‘Uriel’, Michael’s pupils shrank slightly. A cold light flashed across his eyes as he spoke up, “I have no doubts about your madness, but I also don’t believe your promise at all.”

“Since you choose to believe in my madness, you can only choose to believe in my promise.” Python seemed very relaxed as she hummed a little tune lightly. She turned around and left with a graceful and ethereal figure like a cheerful elf.

Michael’s hand holding the sword clenched tightly as he glanced at Chen Rui, but he didn’t make a move in the end.

“Madam Python.” Chen Rui said, “Actually, even if Sir Michael doesn’t do anything in an hour, you’ll still blow me up, right?”

When Python stopped and turned around, “Are you reminding Michael to do it or are you reminding me to completely wipe out your original body consciousness now?”

“It’s not a reminder, but a sentiment. Madam Python, I have to admit that I underestimated your scheming. Now I just want to say one word to you, maybe the last one.”

“Is it the repentance and scolding before the farewell? Or the last words before death?” Python smiled, “It’s actually not that serious. Perhaps if I’m in a good mood, I’ll take you away in an hour.”

Chen Rui sighed, “What I want to say is… Although you thought you had paid enough attention to me, unfortunately, you still underestimated me.”

Python narrowed her eyes slightly, and she suddenly felt that the master-subordinate contract connection was canceled. Although she had anticipated that the contract might be invalid, she still did not expect that this guy who was weaker than herself would be able to cancel the contract on his own initiative. However, canceling the master-subordinate contract did not have much binding force on her.

However, the next moment, Python felt that the part of the soul in Chen Rui’s body was shaken. Her soul had already been moved into a strange space. This was a huge solar system. The endless galaxy revolved around several dazzling suns in a special rhythm, showing a vast and boundless momentum.

Kingdom?

Python sneered secretly. It is still the Kingdom level after all. This kind of illusion created by law is not a real kingdom at all, let alone the power of faith and life. The illusion can be completely defeated without taking any action at all .

Suddenly, Python’s gaze changed because she clearly sensed the strong and vast faith power and breath of life emitting from the solar system.

Countless creatures! Indescribably vast faith!

Even my kingdom, no, all Pseudo-God kingdoms, can’t have this level of faith and life force!

This is simply…Kingdom of God!

How could he have such a kingdom!

What shocked her more was that a huge black hole appeared in space. Her soul suddenly felt a terrifying feeling of being torn. She was involuntarily attracted by this black hole with terrifying devour ability.

Python quickly activated her power to resist, but the black hole contained the universe law of the entire solar system, so it also contained life force and faith power, which could not be resisted at all.

Soon, Python’s soul was swallowed by the black hole.

At the top of the Holy Light Mountain, Python’s original body couldn’t help but lose her voice when she sensed all of this, including the disconnection of that part of the soul, “No!”

Chen Rui glanced at the chief archangel who had been standing still and shrugged, “Sir Michael… I think, before completely canceling the threat of explosion, I need to seek your protection.”

chapters.title: Chapter 929: Michael’S Shock
chapters.body:
Chapter 929: Michael’S Shock

At this moment, Python almost thought that he was in some kind of illusion. This guy with only Kingdom level actually devoured my soul avatar with his own strength.

It meant she lost the ‘remote control’ to this bomb! It also meant that her careful layout was completely disrupted!

“Unfortunately, your poison also has no effect on me.” Chen Rui’s swollen body gradually returned to his original state, “Perhaps as you said, for a foolish guy like me, ‘love’ is the biggest shackle, but you don’t know that it’s also the biggest motivation, so your poison has become my strength. Don’t even think of going back to the Demon Realm for revenge, because I’ve transferred all the people involved. Oh, by the way… It is still a question whether you can leave here today.”

“Damn!” Python turned into a puff of smoke and rushed toward Chen Rui quickly.

Michael, who had been watching at the side, finally moved. The fiery red sun shone again, and thousands of fiery red rays surged toward Python.

Although what happened is a bit unbelievable, Python has taken the initiative just now, so it should not be a trick. I can’t believe that the ant actually has the ability to get rid of Python’s control. I can’t let Python control him again.

Python was about to approach Chen Rui, but she was blocked by the power of the red sun. She couldn’t help being shocked and angry.

The light of the red sun quickly began to dim, but the breath of the long sword was endless like surging river. Although Python’s power was still strong, facing Michael’s majestic offense, she gradually began to look exhausted. The most important thing was that her mind was disrupted.

This insignificant guy actually causes my originally perfect plan to…

“Weaken! Lose! Deprive!”

This time, the fiery red light became extremely dim, but it was not as completely deprived as before. Michael’s red cross sword pointed at Python, “The wicked hate the light. Never show mercy to the wicked who practice deceit.”

Countless fiery reds whistled forward like shooting stars, hitting Python in an instant. The whole space was shaking.

In the fiery explosion, Python’s voice sounded again. However, it was no longer charming and calm, but with a hysterical hiss.

“The real cruelty, the real poison, is human nature and human mind.”

Michael frowned and held his chest as black gas covered his face. Feathers came off from the 12 wings and turned black. Most of them turned into thick smoke before they fell to the ground. Everything nearby was rapidly decaying and peeling off.

“God’s grace is as vast as a sea! When the light shines, the unbearable darkness will be completely dispelled!” When Michael placed the red cross sword on his forehead, rays of light flickered, and a circle of white light rippled out. The poisonous black gas gradually faded away.

The fiery red power that swept across Python was also eroded by the large black mist that poured out. However, Python’s state was much worse than Michael’s. Her body had become a lot thinner, and her eyes were dull.

Although Python was also the top powerful Pseudo-God, in her current state of soul entity, the odds of winning could only be described as ‘extremely slim’ when fighting against Michael in this ‘home’.

The fierce battle between Python and Michael was short and thrilling. Neither of the two Pseudo-Gods took action against Chen Rui. Instead, they tacitly avoided him. Michael wanted to avoid interfering with Chen Rui, lest he failed to break free, while Python wanted to regain control of Chen Rui.

Chen Rui’s ingenious words were the key to clarifying that he was still in danger of ‘exploding’. Otherwise, he would have been killed by Michael long ago.

In any other time, Michael definitely wanted to imprison and annihilate Chen Rui, and Python would not let him go. However, both of them had to avoid this ‘ant’ now. This was the so-called, ‘the situation is stronger than people’.

As if to avoid the impact of the remaining momentum, Chen Rui kept retreating and dodging. The direction of his dodging was not in the direction of the mountain where both Pseudo-Gods were sensitive, but it was behind the huge broken pillar on the side.

All of a sudden, Michael and Python glanced at the broken pillar at the same time as they seemed to sense an abnormality. The broken pillar turned into particles and dissipated, revealing the ‘ant’ at the peak stage of the Kingdom level behind it. His body faintly exuded the essence of destructive breath, but there were faint wounds similar to cracks on his body as if he had been injured by some kind of impact.

Michael frowned. I clearly sensed that the ‘ant’ seemed to have left just now, but he is still here. There is no doubt that the pure destructive breath should be the destruction origin power. The feeling just now is probably a means of Python to distract my attention.

Judging from those ‘wounds’, if the ‘ant’ that exudes the power of the creation origin keeps staying close to the power of creation origin, as long as he is not controlled and detonated by Python’s secret technique, he will be completely annihilated by the opposite power of creation even if I don’t make a move myself. Once the destruction origin is completely contained by that guy, then I will simply kill him with a single slash to eliminate the future troubles forever.

Thinking of this, Michael let go of the biggest scruples in his mind, and the golden wings behind him emitted a strong light, attacking Python with all his strength.

Python also sensed some changes. Although the destructive breath exuded by Chen Rui was indeed of the correct origin, she always felt that something was wrong. It was just that she didn’t have any time to think about it as she had to focus on dealing with the biggest threat, Michael.

The battle between the 2 became more and more intense. As time passed, Python, who had lost all of her power, appeared to be in a dire situation.

The top of the Holy Light Mountain was the most forbidden place in the church; even the pope and the 2 archbishops were not allowed to enter under normal circumstances. Now that the powerful enemy had invaded, the 3 leaders, Pope Vantis, Archbishop Pusmeer and Holy Lady Eudora had all rushed over. They just got some kind of power communication from Michael and did not enter the forbidden area. They quickly calmed down the chaos of the Holy Light City and led the army outside the forbidden area on standby.

In the flash of the red light explosion, Python couldn’t dodge it, and her right arm was slashed in half by Michael’s long sword. Although a new arm was quickly generated, her soul power was greatly weakened. Michael was about to kill this old opponent completely, but he suddenly sensed something. He was shocked in disbelief. The enchantment of Light Divinity Temple is triggered!

Someone is intruding!

Who is it?

Michael suddenly came to his senses. The shocked gaze looking at the ‘ant’ who was hiding aside changed to rage and murderous intent.

“Sir Michael, you finally realized it?” Chen Rui knew he was exposed. His eyes flashed in red as he revealed a strange smile. His whole body began to swell up rapidly, and the breath of destruction origin surged to the top in an instant. Although it did not have the power of the secret technique like Python before, it was quite amazing.

Michael and Python were both shocked, especially Python. My original sense was true! That ‘Chen Rui’ actually…

That sentence is no doubt correct. In fact, not only me, but even Michael underestimated him!

Although his strength is only the peak stage of the Kingdom level, his mind and means is not inferior to the powerhouses standing on the peak stage. If this person can have more powerful strength in the future, then it is likely he will be an existence that all powerhouses, including Michael and I, must look up to!

How can this kind of person be willing to be controlled?

When she was thinking, her figure flashed and instantly appeared below the mountain, which was behind Michael.

Michael didn’t pay any attention to Python because that ‘ant’ was the scourge that had to be eliminated immediately. He waved the long sword, and a ray of red light pierced through ‘Chen Rui’s’ forehead. Before he exploded, his body was torn apart and disappeared as particles. However, at the same time, 2 identical ‘Chen Rui’ appeared on the sides. Before Michael attacked again, they exploded violently.

“ Boom! Boom !”

Outside the forbidden area, everyone only felt the mountain shake for a while as if a terrifying explosion had occurred on the top of the Holy Light Mountain. The nearby mountains and stone stairs protected by the enchantment collapsed one after another. In addition, terrifying cracks began to appear and continue to expand.

The 3 giant leaders were all shocked. Such a terrifying shake actually happened at the core of the entire Holy Church and the Holy Light Mountain’s most sacred temple! This is the first time in the history of the church!

At this moment, they saw a red sun rising from the top of the mountain, completely obscuring the moonlight in the sky, making it a spectacular sight.

Under the light of the red sun, the shake and collapse gradually ceased. The cracks gradually recovered wherever the light of the red sun passed.

“It’s the Holy Cross Sword of Archangel Sir Michael!”

“With Sir Michael here, don’t worry about anything!”

“…”

Here, the Light Knights cheered loudly with boosted morale.

However, at this time, Michael’s face didn’t have the slightest sense of relaxation. There were only gloomy and dignified. The seemingly peaceful gaze contained boundless rage and killing intent.

The power of the explosion just now was quite astonishing, especially the destruction origin that mixed with the power of creation. Although I defended in time, I am still slightly injured.

The most hateful thing is that a mere Kingdom level ant actually fooled me! Fooled the most powerful and closest person to God in the world!

Unforgivable!

This ant must die!

Michael didn’t turn around to chase Python. Instead, he turned into a light stream and quickly rushed toward the Light Divinity Temple.

Although Michael couldn’t activate shifting, his speed was so fast that he was close to the Light Divinity Temple surrounded by white light in a moment. He happened to see the hateful figure staggering and knocked backward from the Light Divinity Temple. He seemed to be seriously injured.

It is also within expectation that this ‘ant’ is repelled by the power of the Light Divinity Temple. The Book of Creation itself has an extremely powerful strength. Even Pseudo-God cannot approach this temple unscathed. Ordinary powerhouses who try to enter are tantamount to courting death.

Not only that, but on the periphery of the temple, a powerful enchantment was also set up by Michael himself. In addition to the profound ancient runes formation, it also contained the 2 mighty powers of light element and fire element that Michael was best at. Those who trespass would inevitably be hit hard. An ordinary Pseudo-God powerhouse should not even think of trespassing it, let alone this Kingdom level ‘ant’. It would be lucky if he wasn’t annihilated instantly.

A little different from before, this ant had an extra magnificent red armor on its body with 4 wings on its back, exuding the dazzling brilliance of stars. Although there were many cracks, it could not cover the indescribable splendor and dazzle. Even Michael of Pseudo-God would inevitably have a surprised feeling.

[Armor of Faith]! The strength of this ‘ant’ breath… is actually Demi-God!

What a cunning guy! He deceived my perception once again!

However, even Demi-God is still just an ant in front of Pseudo-God!

Die!

No, capture him alive! Then draw out his soul and let this damn demon be tortured and tormented by Holy Light forever! Michael clenched the Holy Cross Sword.

All of a sudden, the chief archangel’s pupils shrank because he had already seen that there was 1 more thing in the armored man’s hand: A pair of boots!

In Light Divinity Temple’s… Wind Badge!

chapters.title: Chapter 930: Escape
chapters.body:
Chapter 930: Escape

The Wind Badge!

Michael’s shock was not trivial. Although the Wind Badge was just an altar inlaid on the periphery of the Light Divinity Temple, and it still had a considerable distance from the core of the hall where the Book of Creation was placed, it was inside the Light Divinity Temple after all.

Even without the law power of the power of creation origin, it was impossible for any Pseudo-God to completely ignore the might of the protective enchantment and directly passed through or shift into the Light Divinity Temple; they could only choose to invade by force.

Now that the Wind Badge was in his hands, there was only 1 answer: This ‘demon’ with only Demi-God level bore the powerful original power of creation to crack the ‘light fire might’ enchantment set by Michael himself, then he invaded the temple and took away the Wind Badge!

Equally astonished was Python who followed. She quickly hid behind Michael during the explosion just now, so she wasn’t hurt. When she saw the pair of boots in Chen Rui’s hands, there was only 1 word in Python’s mind: Unbelievable.

Michael scolded furiously. The hot red light on the Holy Cross Sword shone; the sun of death rose up again, shooting fiery light all around.

The moment Chen Rui rushed out of the Light Divinity Temple, he did not perceive Michael’s arrival, but he had already sensed it from the [Analytical Eyes]. The next second, he was shrouded in the ‘sunshine’ of death.

Before this blow came, the terrifying pressure caused the star armor of [Red Pole Star Transformation] to slowly crack. Even the Wrath King Armor, which was integrated into the star armor, was in an extremely vulnerable state.

Once he was hit, even with the protection of the Wrath King Armor, he still could not resist it. At that time, his body and soul would be crushed.

It was the first time that Chen Rui really faced the powerful attack of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God directly. Under this kind of suppression, he couldn’t dodge at all, so he could only take it forcefully. He immediately run the kingdom’s faith power with full force to quickly relieve the pressure. At the same time, a faint starlight appeared in his hand, drawing out a mysterious track.

[Star Diversion]!

The fiery red light of death seemed to have encountered something slippery and was twisted away. A lot of light actually reflected toward Michael.

Michael didn’t expect such a move, so he was caught off guard. He was swept by his ultimate move, and a few golden feathers fell down. It was fine if this blow was reflected by the powerhouse of the same level like Python, but this was a guy at the Demi-God level. For the peak stage Pseudo-God, who had a very high self-esteem and claimed to be ‘closest to God’, it was tantamount to a great shame.

Michael’s eyes were full of murderous intent. With a flick of the Holy Cross Sword, its power suddenly doubled, but he still couldn’t hit the hateful ‘demon’. Python, who was behind him, was secretly surprised.

Python had lost a lot of energy in the battle with Michael previously. At this time, she did not rush to take action. She just hid in the back far away. She seized the time to recover quickly while waiting for the opportunity to make a move.

Chen Rui actually knew that [Star Diversion] was very powerful. Even Pseudo-God’s attacks could be diverted and reflected, but this skill only had an effective time of 10 seconds. Even if he was only swept away by the remaining force of that sword, he would completely collapse.

At this time, the most important thing is to escape immediately. Chen Rui’s mind moved slightly, and the [Star Gate] appeared in front.

Michael was even more astonished when he saw the space door. The Light Divinity Temple is the location of the creation origin. All space power will be rejected unless it’s a powerful talent or a special artifact from Pseudo-God. This ‘demon’ actually opened the space door inconceivably while resisting the power of the Holy Cross Sword.

This person must have a substantial secret!

In any case, I must catch him today!

Michael glanced at the golden feathers that had fallen to the ground, and those feathers instantly turned into countless golden luminous spots that disappeared into the air. At this time, the effective time of Chen Rui’s [Star Diversion] just ended, so Michael’s attack could no longer be diverted. Countless sunlight of deaths pierced through his body in an instant.

Chen Rui’s body shattered immediately, but the fragments turned into strange flies and flew toward the blue [Star Gate]. The fiery red sun of death shone on the flies, but it actually had no slightest effect.

“The Earth Badge!”

“The God-Eating Mask!”

Michael and Python shouted almost at the same time. The 2 names were actually 1 thing.

1 of the 7 artifacts or 1/7 of the supreme artifact!

Python finally understood how much she underestimated this human. It was ridiculous that she always thought she had paid enough attention to him.

The Earth Badge, also known as Beelzebub Royal Family’s God-Eating Mask, is said to be immune to all soul control. Previously, this guy didn’t use the God-Eating Mask at all to isolate my soul control. At the same time, he ignored the poison that even Michael is not immune to.

What’s even more astonishing is that this guy actually used a strange substitute under the watch of 2 Pseudo-Gods, Michael and I while he sneaked into the Light Divinity Temple, broke through the powerful enchantment that even Pseudo-God could not enter, and got the Breeze Shadow Boots (the Wind Badge)!

Wait! Since he is human, how can he activate the power of the God-Eating Mask?

Could this guy really be the Demon Realm’s Beelzebub Royal Family?

The name Chen Rui’… should also be a pseudonym!

All of a sudden, the always confident Python couldn’t help but doubt her own judgment.

Just as the demonic flies flew toward the [Star Gate], a sneer appeared on the face of Michael who had quickly recovered from his surprise: Want to escape?

With his space law and the power of creation origin near the Light Divinity Temple, even Python couldn’t escape!

The speed of the demonic flies was very fast, and they had been flying for a long time, but they had not been able to reach the space door that was close at hand.

The space around Chen Rui was dotted with golden luminous spots, like fireflies surrounding him. He seemed to enter an infinite loop tunnel. No matter how he moved forward, it would be offset by the space rule attached to the weird ‘fireflies’.

Chen Rui knew that it was caused by Michael’s might. The effect of [Demonic Flies Transformation] was about to end. This was the most critical moment of life and death, so he immediately activated the last trump card without thinking.

Michael suddenly sensed that the power of space actually uncontrollably flowed to the ‘demon’. Then, there was a transparent ‘wall’ around the golden ‘fireflies’. A gleam of white jade-like light loomed, and the connection between Michael and the ‘fireflies’ was actually cut off!

The golden luminous spots faded away and recondensed into pieces of feathers that fell to the ground.

Michael clearly sensed that he could no longer fully control the space law here because part of the space law has already been controlled by the other party’s translucent ‘wall’?

No! The whole thing should be a tall building…tower?

“The Tower of Glory!” Michael suddenly remembered a high-grade space artifact that the Holy Church had lost for many years, and he was shocked again: This demon is actually related to the Holy Dragon Rodriguez who betrayed the church back then!

The chief archangel had never been so shocked in the past tens of thousands, hundreds of thousands or even more years!

The Tower of Glory seemed to be unable to use smoothly in the hands of the ‘demon’. It was only controlled by some kind of external object, and the blocking wall was only similar to the existence of phantasms. Even so, the space blocking force in front of the flies had completely disintegrated. The flies rushed to the space door smoothly and were about to disappear.

Due to being oppressed by Michael’s law power and the power of creation origin and the Tower of Glory was being forcefully channeled, so its power could not be fully exerted. The space power of the artifact began to fade rapidly.

Michael immediately charged his power as he wanted to make the biggest blow to completely defeat the defense of the Tower of Glory. Although the guy had the Tower of Glory, he cannot exert its real power. He thinks that he could escape from a peak stage Pseudo-God who has mastered space law by entering the space door? I shall pull this guy out of the space door, not only to recover the Wind Badge, but also the Earth Badge and the Tower of Glory!

The 12 wings on Michael’s back fluttered, and the phantasm of the Tower of Glory was torn apart immediately. Nonetheless, his next move was not to rush into the space of the Tower of Glory, but to turn back and draw out his sword.

When the Holy Cross Sword drew an arc, Python who was planning to ambush behind was almost cut off, and the space behind her had been divided into half.

Python just groaned, but she did not stop at all. It seemed that she had anticipated Michael’s blow and took it forcefully. Taking advantage of that power, she dragged the half body that was almost broken to rush into the enchantment of the Tower of Glory first.

Although the phantasm of the Tower of Glory had been shattered by Michael, the power of space had not completely faded. When Python rushed in front of the [Star Gate], the mist on her body had dimmed by half, but she still rushed toward the light blue ‘teleportation portal’ without hesitation.

Although her injuries and exhaustion were evere, as long as she entered the teleportation portal, she could escape the Holy Light Mountain and catch the mysterious ‘Chen Rui.’ Not to mention the many secrets of this person, at least she could acquire 2 parts of the supreme artifact and the space artifact, Tower of Glory.

At this time, the demonic flies just flew into the blue door with vague starlight, followed by Python, but an unbelievable thing happened. Python’s body was actually unable to enter, but she directly passed through it as if that ‘door’ that was still shining was just an illusion!

But the guy entered this ‘door’ just now!

While Python was slightly distracted, the terrifying red light behind her already struck. It was too late to dodge.

Initially, Python’s plan was to escape into the space door to capture Chen Rui, then demolish the entrance in order to escape from Michael’s pursuit. Unexpectedly, she actually couldn’t get into that light door. Python’s state and strength were already inferior to Michael. In this level of battle, a small mistake could affect the entire outcome. This miscalculation almost decided her failure.

In the shrill screams, the body was cut into half by the red light, and the severed surfaces quickly began to burn. Although it was not a real body, this blow also caused Python to be severely injured.

It was just a brief moment, but several turning points occurred. Python was also a ruthless character. She reacted very quickly. As the Tower of Glory and the Book of Creation still affected Michael’s space law, she self-exploded the half misty body.

Under the power of this kind of soul self-destruction, cracks appeared in the sealed space, and Python’s remaining body turned into a green mist which seeped in the cracks. She soon disappeared together with the cracks.

Michael didn’t pursue Python. He immediately appeared in front of the [Star Gate] that had become dim and rushed in. However, just like Python, he passed through and couldn’t enter. Michael’s golden eyes flashed coldly. He wielded the Holy Cross Sword, and countless red lights engulfed the light door.

However, the light door seemed to be transparent. The red light containing powerful space law went through it without hindrance. The fading startlight seemed to be laughing at the ‘person closest to God’

Inaccessible! Can’t attack either! What space law is this!

The next second, his furious roar cut echoed the sky, and the entire White Cliff shook.

chapters.title: Chapter 931: I’M A Fisherman
chapters.body:
Chapter 931: I’M A Fisherman

Yang Shao Empire: Barren hills outside the Garden City.

Under the moonlight, a light door opened, and a human figure rushed out. This human figure seemed to be composed of countless tiny flies. In the blink of an eye, the flies had combined into a real human body and fell to the ground.

The bright star-like armor on the human body began to fade away quickly, and inside was a black armor. The surface of the armor was covered with tiny cracks and dents. It was gradually healing at a speed visible to the naked eye.

Soon, the black armor also disappeared, revealing the scarred body inside. Many wounds burst open from the inside due to excessive pressure. Obviously, the damage to the inside that was invisible to the naked eye was more serious, but Chen Rui’s face was smiling, and he was laughing out loud.

This trip to the Holy Light Mountain could be described as a series of thrills. Facing the incomparably powerful Pseudo-God, he actually became the final winner and the only winner.

Python’s actions really exceeded his expectations. Even without the strength of Pseudo-God, this woman’s scheming could be called terrifying. Although he took precautions a long time ago, he also deliberately showed weakness and signed the master-subordinate contract, but he still fell into the trap and almost turned into a human bomb.

However, he also schemed on Python. Neither Python’s ‘affection poison’ nor soul control could override the Super System. After Python left a part of her soul consciousness under Chen Rui’s control, he immediately activated the Super System to devour that part of soul and cut off the biggest threat of becoming a ‘human bomb’.

He then managed to divert Michael’s firepower to Python, staying out of the way as a bystander to the powerhouses’ fight.

The name Chief Archangel Michael had a special religious meaning in another world in Chen Rui’s memory which was also accompanied by countless legends and miracles.

In this plane, ‘the person closest to God’ was not an exaggeration. Except for the ‘corpse’ of the Chaos Realm that had surpassed a certain category, Michael was the most powerful super-level person he had ever seen. Even the Demon Realm’s strongest Pseudo-God Satan was inferior.

From Michael’s level, Chen Rui’s strength was really not worth mentioning. He was just an ant that could be killed at will.

It was this kind of contempt that gave Chen Rui an opportunity to make a bold move while watching the fight as a bystander. He hid behind the broken pillar and immediately released the avatar Shura. At the same time, he activated [Sneak] and quietly walked toward the Light Divinity Temple.

Although Python and Michael were aware of it at that time, Shura, who was still on the scene with the origin of the destruction, made them not suspicious. The most important thing was that the 2 Pseudo-Gods were fighting fiercely at the time and had no time to be distracted.

Chen Rui sneaked all the way to Light Divinity Temple smoothly. He would like to express his special thanks to Python for using the highly poisonous law to cancel the enchantment along the way. Python was prepared to go to Light Divinity Temple herself, but she did the work for others instead.

The closer he got to the Light Divinity Temple, the more intense a pure and powerful breath became.

The origin breath of creation.

It was a power that was diametrically opposite to the destruction origin. Chen Rui had already learned about the terrifying consequences of mixing the creation origin and the destruction origin from the previous conversation between Python and Michael, so he did not dare to reveal the slightest bit of the destruction origin breath.

The only thing that creation origin and construction origin had in common was that they were dangerous.

Here, Chen Rui did not feel that ‘everything had been destructed’ feeling, but he felt a special ‘distortion’. Under this origin power, all the body, soul, memory, etc. would be erased from the original impression and regenerated.

This was tantamount to another form of death.

This terror of ‘creation’ was no less inferior to ‘destruction’.

The strength of the peak stage of the Kingdom level just resisted for a moment and then declared disintegration. The first thing that changed was his hair, which began to grow frantically. Then, his muscles began to twist, and his blood flow reversed to the maximum.

In such a critical situation, Chen Rui activated the [Red Pole Star Transformation] without hesitation. The law power of the [Pole Star Transformation] far exceeded the kingdom level, but Chen Rui did not dare to use the destruction origin law. He just coped with the time law using 4 seasons kingdom.

However, the law of the Demi-God level was also unable to resist the erosion of the power of creation origin, and the star armor began to show signs of disintegration. Perhaps only by reaching the ‘might’ of Pseudo-God could this origin be effectively resisted. No wonder the Light Elemental King once said that without reaching the level of Pseudo-God, one is not qualified to covet the things in the Light Divinity Temple.

Fortunately, in the state of [Red Pole Star Transformation], the Super System’s powerful faith power and life force protection could be freely invoked, plus the protection of the God-Eating Mask and the Wrath King Armor, Chen Rui also held on for a while. It was just that a special sense of familiarity in his heart was getting stronger and stronger.

Chen Rui finally remembered that in the Star Tower of Starlight College that day, after absorbing the power of starlight and fully integrating the Shackles of True Flame, he once sensed a special strength. The entire space of the Star Tower seemed to be a projection of some kind of existence. What really dominated the projection was the law that seemed to be the truth of the universe. It seemed shallow but actually profound.

At that time, he tried to use his soul power to touch and perceive this ‘truth’, but he was almost overwhelmed. In the end, he used the Super System to roughly devour the trace of ‘power’ and slowly comprehend in [Star Conversion].

It was because of this power that the Holy Church’s 4-winged angel ‘God of Exploration’ Ze Hongen appeared, intending to recruit him to become the holy apprentice under Raphael. Eventually, he became the second super powerhouse who died in the hands of Chen Rui.

After the Star Tower incident, as time passed time, that trace of power was gradually decomposed and absorbed by the [Star Conversion], but Chen Rui could not comprehend the ‘truth’ contained in it. Just a vague feeling remained in the spiritual imprint.

Now Chen Rui finally understood what the essence of that ‘power’ was: Creation !

It turns out that the Star Tower is actually a projection of the creation origin!

I wonder if this projection is generated naturally or is it deliberately done by 3 archangels…

If it is the latter, I’m afraid that it is a big conspiracy for Starlight College – talented students who can comprehend or touch the creation law will be recruited into the church or the comprehension of these people will be absorbed by a certain devour method to become ‘nutrition’ for the 3 archangels.

It turns out that that trace of origin power of creation has always been in my body!

After understanding this, Chen Rui corroborated the residual ‘vague feeling’ with the breath of creation origin around him. Combined with his comprehension of ‘creation’ when he conquered Shura, he felt that the comprehension of the spiritual imprint gradually became clear. The erosion speed and power of the creation origin had also been reduced a lot.

If he was given enough time to comprehend here, he might be able to truly grasp a part of the creation origin, but unfortunately, given the current situation, it was impossible to stay for a long time.

In the Light Divinity Temple, Isabella’s biggest heart knot was kept here. It was the Demon Realm’s 1 of the 7 artifacts, the Breeze Shadow Boots; the highest artifact of the Belphegor Royal Family. Now that he had come here, he couldn’t just leave empty-handed. At least, he should give it a try!

He experienced a lot of thrills in the next forceful invasion to Light Divinity Temple, but what surprised Chen Rui was that the protective enchantment of Light Divinity Temple was actually the power of light element and fire element!

Although the power of the enchantment was extremely powerful, for Chen Rui, who had

the [Fire Phoenix Stigmata] and the [Body of Light Glory], it was nothing. In the end, he successfully passed the enchantment and entered the Light Divinity Temple.

The Light Divinity Temple was a special space, just like the Destruction Palace in the Chaos Realm. The entire temple was constructed by the most original and powerful creation law, and it was a complete creation law, which was much more powerful than the Destruction Palace.

Although Chen Rui faintly comprehended the power of creation, he was not a ‘body of creation’. Even the faith and life force of the Super System kingdom couldn’t resist the incomparably strong power of creation origin, and the life force suddenly began to descend. The star armor began to change its shape involuntarily. This process caused a lot of damage.

At a critical juncture, Chen Rui alertly took out the Demon Shield. While barely able to defend, he activated the [Light Boom] technique to search for the Breeze Shadow Boots as quickly as possible. Just when his defense was about to run out, he found a round table-shaped platform in a facility that looked like an altar.

The platform had a faint golden color and a very special texture. Even Chen Rui couldn’t tell what material it was. It was engraved with strange symbols of unknown meaning. There were 7 dents, and a pale green badge was embedded in 1 of the dents.

Chen Rui thought of the words ‘Wind Badge’, and he took the badge.

Immediately after the badge was removed from the platform, it shone and changed into a pair of boots.

Breeze Shadow Boots!

Chen Rui was overjoyed. At this time, the platform emitted a strong golden light, which dazzled him for a while. He was rejected from the Light Divinity Temple, and he happened to meet Michael who came over.

Facing what should be the most powerful Pseudo-God, Chen Rui took a risk and finally escaped. The space artifact, ‘Tower of Glory’, played a huge role there

The Tower of Glory was obtained from the Holy Dragon Rodriguez, and it had already been cracked by [Deep Analysis]. However, because Chen Rui did not have the strength of Pseudo-God, he had been unable to activate it. When negotiating at Town Nimbus in the Warlock Fortress, he faced Midnight Sun. Chen Rui used the method of burning life to control the Tower of Glory’s power to temporarily resist the Bloodfall Orb of Midnight Sun.

Judging from the rank of the artifact, the Tower of Glory was far superior to the Bloodfall Orb, but it was suppressed by the Bloodfall Orb in the end. It could only be said that the owner, Chen Rui, was too weak. If facing a Pseudo-God like Michael or the strongest Pseudo-God who had mastered space law might, he surely would not be able to repeat the same trick.

However, Chen Rui controlled the Tower of Glory with the real power of Pseudo-God this time. To be precise, it was the soul imprint of Pseudo-God, which was the ‘reward’ from Python previously.

Chen Rui had a flash of inspiration when he got the soul imprint just now. At that time, he only had a rough vision to use the soul imprint to control the Tower of Glory, but he never thought it would be the key to his escape.

Even Python also didn’t think of this. She carefully planned for a long time to come from the Demon Realm to the human world, but in the end, she was empty-handed, almost dying in the Holy Light Mountain. Finally, she benefited Chen Rui, the fisherman.

In the Tower of Glory, there were still several angel feathers of Raphael, plus they were top-level Pseudo-Gods. In the eyes of any mechanic grand master, they were quite rare mechanical materials.

Just in case, Chen Rui didn’t stop in the barren mountain area. He set off from Port Thor in the Garden City overnight and took the Devil’s Snare Ship to the Storm Island where there was a teleportation array directly to the Dragon Valley.

chapters.title: Chapter 932: Gift
chapters.body:
Chapter 932: Gift

Holy Light Mountain.

The plaza of the Holy Blessing Hall.

With a gloomy face, Michael stood in front of the giant statue of the 12-winged angel.

In front of the statue was the figure of a black long-haired man gathered by white light. He had an otherworldly demeanor.

“Python? Demon?” The black-haired man frowned, “I didn’t expect that woman to have such courage to break into the Holy Light Mountain. Have we been too lax over the years? Or perhaps it’s because it has been a long time since we last showed that we are ignored by these ill-intentioned guys? Shall we wake Gabriel from the Black Prison Desert and join us for a trip to the Demon Realm?”

“It’s not necessary for now. The most urgent task is to further digest and absorb the faith power. Anyway, after 100 years, the seal between the 2 worlds will be loosened again, and it will not be too late for us to meet those ‘old friends’ by then. But this time, it’s my carelessness to lose ‘Wind Badge’ and 2 4-winged servants.”

With that said, a cold light flashed in Michael’s eyes, “Python has lost her body, and this time she was severely injured by me again, so there is nothing to worry about. If it wasn’t for me to wake up in a hurry, and I have to separate out a part of my strength to suppress the source of faith that was not fully digested, I would have killed her. However, the demon ant was indeed out of my expectation. Although he was only Demi-God’s strength, he had ‘Earth Badge’ and ‘Tower of Glory’. He actually slipped away under my watch! “

“The Tower of Glory!” The black-haired man raised his eyebrows, “It seems that the traitor Rodriguez escaped to the Demon Realm. However, since the Tower of Glory is in the hands of the demons, then Rodriguez must have fallen, which is good news. After this incident, Python and the demon will definitely not dare to come again. But this incident has undoubtedly sounded the alarm for us. Whether it is the Black Death Followers or other enemies, we must not let our guard down.”

Michael sighed, “You’re right. Raphael, there is still a key issue, the Snow Dallet Tree will take at least 10,000 years to regenerate seedlings. During this time, the church can no longer convert the [Body of Light Blessing] ], so we can only rely on the sources of the 2 Holy Empires. This way, the faith power, combat power and influence power will be greatly reduced.”

The black-haired man was Raphael, one of the 3 archangels like Michael. He replied, “There is good news. The holy relic that was lost by the Cloud Rider Empire has been discovered.”

Michael’s eyes lit up, “It’s really good news. It can somewhat solve the immediate pressing needs.”

“I heard that the Black Death Followers are also paying attention to this holy relic. Just in case, I have sent 3 holy apprentices to assist.” Raphael pondered and said, “The discovery of the Nightmare Wilderness is indeed surprising and unexpected. Those stupid orcs have been blinded by the Black Death Followers for so many years. This time I sent an 8-winged angel to bloodbath the Nightmare Wilderness with the Tribunal. All tribes suspected of evil faith were wiped out to avoid future troubles.”

“You’re doing it right. Those cultists really deserve to die.” Michael’s eyes flashed coldly, “Compared to the fallen guys in the Demon Realm, the abyss is the biggest enemy. No matter what, we can’t let those guys come back to this world. It should at least be after we become real gods. Otherwise, everything will be completely destroyed…”

“ En , the might of my soul is approaching completion. During this time, I will concentrate on the movement of this world. You can continue to sleep.”

Michael nodded. His body slowly became thinner before finally dissipating into the air.

Dragon Valley.

Afternoon.

There was a faint scent of tea in the courtyard. Isabella sat in front of a small table with an exquisite tea set.

Unlike the Demon Realm’s year-round constant climate, the human world not only had abundant light elements, but it also had 4 seasons. It was the hot summer, and Isabella, who had just arrived in the human world, was inevitably a little not used to it.

Not long ago, she discovered some ‘tea leaves’ with an excellent variety and texture in the Dragon Valley which contained the power of the light element. After drinking it, not only the body’s adaptation to the climatic environment was further strengthened, but she was already able to unleash her talent strength and normal combat power in this environment. Furthermore, she could also absorb the Holy Scale bestowed by Dragon Emperor Pagris faster.

Even Dragon Emperor Pagris couldn’t see Isabella’s demon identity now. Of course, it was thanked to the Evil Blue Tear and that piece of Holy Scale.

Isabella first habitually filled the empty cups on the opposite table, then she picked up the teacup in front of her, smelled the tea, and took a sip.

At the Demon Realm, although all her sisters and friends had tasted her tea, most of them were not used to drinking it. Even her best friend, Ms. Betty, was no exception. Apart from Chen Rui, only Zola really liked it. Ms. Fairy Dragon had become addicted to what she called a ‘bitter drink.’ Every time she had the time, she would come to her small house for a cup of tea.

Now in the Dragon Valley, in addition to Zola, Meria and Span were also in love with her tea art. The newly recognized adoptive parents were really kind to her, making her feel the long-lost affection. In the past 2 days, Dragon Emperor Pagris sent people a lot of training resources. The Elf King and his wife brought Zola and the reluctant ‘son of the Dragon Emperor’s brother’ plus his wife and a certain truly handsome slime for a closed-door training, so they were currently absent.

Despite being alone, there was still a sense of comfort and ease, which was the complete opposite of the loneliness she felt in those days among the crowd.

The only thing she was worried about was him. I wonder how he is now.

The strength of that Python is Pseudo-God. I wonder if he can…

Although she was worried and wanted to be by his side, she could only wait like this.

“This beautiful lady, is Madam Meria here?”

An unfamiliar voice sounded behind her, and Isabella looked back. It was a strange man with snake pupils. He was obviously a dragon.

The dragon stared at her with a look of lustful gaze, which made Isabella frown and shake her head, “Not here.”

“Are you… that Ms. Isabella? What about Sir Span and Madam Zola?”

“Thanks to the treasure presented by Royal Majesty Pagris, father and mother went with Sister Zola for training.” Isabella pointed out the name of the Dragon Emperor, intending to warn the dragon.

“ Oh, ” the dragons responded, but he still looked at her intently, “Don’t you feel too lonely drinking tea alone?”

That look made Isabella disgusted. However, this sentence made Madam Aunt’s blue eyes light up. She looked at the dragon carefully and sighed deliberately, “Yeah, it’s too lonely to be alone.”

“Do you need my company to break up your loneliness? Charming lady.”

As Ms. Yini glanced at the pair of snake pupils, her eyes were seducing, “Answer me a question first, am I the most beautiful and alluring woman you have ever seen?”

“Of course.” The dragon shrugged.

“Am I your favorite, most loved woman?”

“ Uh … yes.”

“Then, you now say loudly ‘except for the favorite Yini, I won’t bother the rest of the women’. “Ms. Yini showed a shrewd smile. She blinked her eyes and looked very charming, “If you say it, I have a special reward for you.”

“This…” The snake-eyed man couldn’t hold back, and he smiled bitterly, “How did you recognize me?”

Ms. Yini sighed as she raised the sound recording stone hidden behind her back, “It’s just 1 step away. What a pity.”

The snake-eyed man’s face had changed back to that of Chen Rui. As he sat down at the table opposite Isabella and looked at the sound recording stone, his forehead was sweating as he sighed a breath of relief – If I really say it and it is recorded by this evil fairy, as soon as it is played in the harem, perhaps half of the crystal harem would collapse immediately.

Madam Aunt smiled charmingly, put away the sound recording stone, and got up to pour him a cup of tea, “Except Betty, Dodo and Zola, no one knows it’s called ‘tea’. Even father and mother only know it’s called a ‘bitter drink’. With a flaw, coupled with your habitual little actions, it becomes a big flaw.”

“So it is.” Chen Rui scratched his head as he smiled and said, “Actually, even if there is no such flaw, I’m afraid that I can’t hide it from my wife after saying more.”

Isabella naturally understood the meaning of the term ‘wife’, and she felt sweet, “It’s too late to say something to compliment. This test is actually a manifestation of distrust of your wife, and it is also a very despicable behavior. Unless you give me a nice gift, I can’t promise that one day… a handsome man will be used to test whether a guy takes me seriously.”
