“Of course.” Chen Rui smiled, “I have prepared a gift. This is an important gift specially prepared for my Yini.”

Ms. Yini’s eyes rolled, and she showed a charming expression, “Really? It seems that you came prepared, but this gift better satisfies me…”

All of a sudden, her words came to an abrupt end.

Chen Rui had a pair of pale green boots, which were not a suitable gift for a woman, whether in style or otherwise.

However, Isabella’s eyes froze, as if she saw something incredible, then she slowly stood up.

Her face had completely lost the previous ease, and she had completely lost the usual charm and amorous feelings. There was only a kind of strong emotion that seemed to be moving. This emotion had been suppressed, but it could not be suppressed completely as her body trembled involuntarily.

The trembling hand touched the pair of boots. At the moment of approach, she timidly did not dare to touch it, until a warm palm gently held her hand and placed it on the boots.

Feeling that long-lost power breath, it seemed that time had suddenly flowed backward to 100 years ago.

Then slowly, slowly, slowly rewind from 100 years ago to the present.

From the moment he met the man in front of him, everything became faster, until the current Dragon Valley.

Her vision was blurry.

Because unknowingly, the tears had been pouring out.

For the first time, she did not suppress her emotion.

Unreservedly, she fully vented out her inner emotions, including those hidden deep in her mind.

Just like the girl who cried up to the sky in the torrential rain 100 years ago.

The difference was that then there was endless despair and pain, but now it was full of hope and happiness.

The shackle in the deepest part of the mind and also the last shackle, shattered and dissipated into wisps of light smoke.

She didn’t speak, but she just pressed her body tightly to the chest, which had been soaked with her tears. She felt the strength and warmth of his arms. A feeling of true rebirth was born in her heart, just like the legendary phoenix.

“For the rest of your life, don’t let me go.”

After saying a sentence silently in her mind, her blue eyes slowly closed. At this moment, she felt an unprecedented peace.

TL: Will she meet that man again in the human world?

chapters.title: Chapter 933: Departure
chapters.body:
Chapter 933: Departure

Early morning.

The sleepy Chen Rui was awakened by strange sensations. With his sensing power, even if he fell asleep, he could sense any dangerous breath within a few kilometers, unless it was an intimate breath that he did not need to guard against subconsciously.

The hit point of this feeling seemed to be in the lower body; something was fiddling…

It seemed to be a warm breath, and an indescribable pleasure spread from the critical part of the lower body to the brain. He seemed to be embraced by that kind of warm and moist touch. It was so comfortable that he couldn’t help but tremble.

The morning was the easiest time for males to erect. In the constant change of speed and rhythm, his body involuntarily tensed. After shivering a few times, he was completely relaxed again.

The originally undulating bulge in the thin blanket rustled for a while, then the blanket was removed, revealing a moving face.

“Good morning.”

“ Ugh , good morning.”

“Do you want to have another go? Frivolous youth?” Ms. Yini licked her lips charmingly with some kind of liquid overflowing from the corner of her mouth; her eyes were full of seductive affection.

Frivolous youth? Chen Rui’s eyes twitched. He somewhat regretted his usual idioms.

However, for countless groups of people who were jealous, envious, and hateful, such as friend-zoned ones, masturbating ones, wishing all lovers in the world to become brothers and sisters ones, this kind of heterosexuality who was discontent should be placed in flame and torture rack to burn to death before flushing the ashes down the toilet – Be gay in your next life!

Before the ‘frivolous youth’ could react, this alluring fairy had already wriggled like a beautiful snake, and she started the next round of sex. The happy good morning bite just now seemed to be just a prelude morning warmup.

Naturally, it was followed by a series of various X-rated shots. From the mist-shrouded dawn to the noon when the sun was shining brightly, the door was just opened.

“Are you hungry? I’ll make you breakfast…” The radiant Madam Aunt took Chen Rui’s hand and said softly.

“Isn’t it lunch already?” Chen Rui pointed to the bright sunshine on his head.

“It’s so late already!” Ms. Yini exclaimed as if she had just discovered it, then she said angrily, “It’s all your fault. Torture me for so long. Even that place…”

With that said, Ms. Yini covered her buttocks and walked toward the kitchen with some weird steps, giving him a charming glance before leaving.

It seems that ‘that place’ is your initiative request.. . Chen Rui was speechless. Isn’t this a blatant reversal of right and wrong and distorting the facts to bully the kind ones? Who said that it is rare to ‘eat’ alone once, and you have to eat one ‘full meal’ at one time?

Having said that, the life of the past few days had indeed been a bit too dissolute, but fortunately, he just took a nap.

However, Chen Rui could clearly feel that so far, Isabella had finally completely untied all the knots in her heart. The current Isabella was not the Snow Dallet nor Devil’s Snare, but the real Isabella. Belphegor.

Feeling the relaxation and happiness of his lover, Chen Rui only felt that he was full of power. As a man, this was 1 of the greatest successes and the most important responsibility.

A voice sounded from the door of the hall ahead.

“Yini!”

“ Ah … Father, Mother, Zola, Betty, Paglio, and Dodo, you’re all back!”

“Yeah, we just got back. Are you preparing lunch? I’ll help you.”

“No need, mother. You’ve all worked hard. Have a seat and rest, leave it to me here. Don’t you and father like the minced meat soup I made the most?”

“ Haha , Meria, this daughter is indeed the best. The other one’s cooking is enough to poison Demi-God… Ouch! Zola!”

“What?” ( Hmph! )

“ Wow , Yini, you seem to be a little different! You seem to be more beautiful, not only beautiful… What’s the secret? Tell me now!”

“ Oh ?” (It seems to be really beautiful…)

“Betty, this is a secret!”

“What?” ( I also want to hear .)

“Zola, let’s cook the cumin BBQ I taught you last time together and blow their minds. Maybe I will reveal a little secret to you.”

“Yini, I’m coming too!”

“Cumin BBQ! Madam Isabella, truly-handsome!”

“…”

All kinds of intruding voices interweave into a warm and peaceful vibe, just like the home at the Dark Moon.

After a comfortable lunch.

The Old Father-in-law Elf King, who had just taken a sip of tea that his daughter Isabella had brought over, showed a pleasant expression, then he jumped up when he heard his son-in-law’s words.

“What? You are going to leave the Dragon Valley?”

“ En , I’m going to the Dragon Bright Empire. I promised Zola and Yini to take them with me.”

Upon hearing this proposal, Master Poison Dragon immediately raised both hands in approval. This ‘son of Cairrealo’, was actually very valued by the Dragon Emperor in the Dragon Valley. This time, the Dragon Emperor made a special exception and compensated a lot of good things, so he really benefited a lot. However, Paglio didn’t want to owe this kind of favor, and he didn’t want to stay in this uncomfortable place all the time.

Krobelus knew Paglio’s thoughts and naturally didn’t want his lover to be unhappy. She also expressed her willingness to leave together. Only Master Truly Handsome was really reluctant to leave this good place where he could enjoy and relax without doing anything (except sometimes the training was too hard), but he couldn’t help himself from the temptation and coercion of Master Poison Dragon. Coupled with the fact that his master proposed to leave, he had no choice but to raise a ‘hand’ with a shriveled onion head. The depressed expression showed Master Slime’s helplessness toward life.

Zola and Isabella were naturally smiling. Whether they were traveling or taking an adventure, being able to accompany Chen Rui was the most important thing. This was a ‘welfare’ that the sisters in the Demon Realm could not enjoy, not to mention that there was likely an old lover of ‘Arthur’ at the Dragon Bright Empire…

You can’t really keep the daughters when they have grown up . Madam Mother-in-law looked at her daughters and sighed, “When are you all leaving? You have to stay for a few months at least?”

“We will depart later.”

“In such a hurry?” Sir Father-in-law and Madam Mother-in-law were taken aback.

“Because there are still some urgent matters in the Dragon Bright Empire, plus it is also related to the life and death of a friend, so it cannot be delayed.”

“Dragon Bright Empire?” The Great Elder Fairy Dragon breathed a sigh of relief. “What are the matters? I’ll solve it for you.”

“No, this matter should not involve the Dragon Valley for the time being. However, some cooperation plans between the Dragon Valley and I will be carried out in the future. If necessary in the future, I will definitely ask aunty for help. We are a family.”

The last sentence made Meria and Span relieved. Mother-in-law Fairy Dragon asked again, “What happens after you solve the matter in the Dragon Bright Empire? Back to Dragon Valley?”

“Not necessarily… However, we will come back often.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “I have the ability to move freely through space, and more importantly… The parents of Zola and Isabella as well as my relatives are here.”

The Old Father-in-law Elf King nodded, said nothing, and patted his son-in-law on the shoulder.

Before leaving, the Great Elder Fairy Dragon’s eyes were a little red as she hugged her 2 daughters and wished them well for a long time. Then, she stuffed a lot of things to them before bidding goodbye in tears.

Chen Rui and his party came to the Storm Island through the 2-way teleportation array of the Dragon Valley.

After the elder council in the Dragon Valley, although the trial field lost its original function, the cooperation between the 2 parties had become closer. The Storm Island had become 1 of the association bases of the dragons, and they would cooperate with the titans as well as the wind elementals in the future to do some practical training.

The ‘Sky Wheel’, the ruins of the ancient alchemy civilization, was basically recycled. With the efforts of the titans and the help of the wind elementals, a huge castle was being rebuilt at the original site, named the ‘City of Stars’. The rudiment had begun to take shape, echoing the Cloud Palace of the wind elementals.

This would serve as a ‘base’ for Chen Rui in the human world as well as the fixed star point of Chen Rui’s [Star Gate].

After the events of the Holy Light Mountain, Chen Rui changed the star point back to Storm Island.

After reaching [Red Pole Star Transformation], the [Star Gate] had 4 star points, and the setting time of star points had also increased from 3 years to 10 years. The current 4 star points were:

1. The Demon Realm’s Dark Moon Estate Residence – He could reach the Fallen Angel Capital through Zola’s [Teleportation Array], which was very convenient.

2. The Star City of the Storm Island – The Storm Island had a 2-way [Teleportation Array] leading to the Dragon Valley, which was equivalent to reaching the Dragon Valley directly.

3. The Ghastly Floating Land where the mystery was located – There were a lot of powerful wandering spirits here, and it would also ‘create’ precious law fragments, plus there were no outsiders. It could be used as the best secret training place for himself, his relatives and friends. More importantly, this was a place that even the Pseudo-God dared not set foot in. Once the star point disappeared, it would be impossible to enter again.

4. The top of the Holy Light Mountain, which was temporarily set up outside the Light Divinity Temple. He originally intended to covet the power of creation origin and the news of Tiffany, but because this place was too sensitive and extremely dangerous; even the [Star Gate] was almost at a loss. It was likely that he would be detected as soon as he broke in, so this star point could be canceled at any time and used for mobility.

The Breeze Shadow Boots were returned to their original owner and were worn at the feet of Isabella. This artifact was definitely an excellent weapon for speed-type trainers. In addition to doubling the concentration of spirit power, it could greatly increase the speed of action and attack. She would be able to teleport or shift freely beyond space. In addition to the special attribute acceleration of ‘Star Apprentice’, from the perspective of the maximum speed, Isabella at the level of Demon Overlord had reached the ordinary standard of a powerhouse that had just entered the kingdom.

Although the Breeze Shadow Boots were an artifact of the Belphegor Royal Family, the Breeze Shadow Empire had long since vanished. There were not many people left in the Belphegor Royal Family except for Isabella and Roman. Now that the Demon Realm’s 3 empires had established an alliance, the war would be completely subsided, and it was even more unrealistic to rebuild the Breeze Shadow Empire. Isabella’s original intention was to let Chen Rui use the Breeze Shadow Boots, but Chen Rui knew that once the 7 artifacts were successfully assimilated, they would be completely surnamed ‘Chen’ and unable to separate from him, so he rejected her kindness.

Isabella just smiled and didn’t force it, because there was no difference between her or her man having it. It could be handed over to him at any time.

When Chen Rui left the Storm Island last time, he handed some law fragments to Oceanus, the leader of the titans, and wanted him to try to upgrade his strength. Unfortunately, although the titans with the highest strength successfully absorbed the power of the law fragment and their strength had been greatly enhanced, it had never been able to produce qualitative changes to reach the kingdom level. This should be an important topic for Crystal Phoenix’s next research.

Chen Rui rested overnight in the ‘City of Stars’. In the next early morning, the Devil’s Snare Ship sailed out of the Storm Island, heading toward the Dragon Bright Empire’s famous port city, the Red Dragon City.

TL: Will he fight for the throne of Dragon Bright Empire? Hmm , time to get another princess?

chapters.title: Chapter 934: Crown
chapters.body:
Chapter 934: Crown

A moonlit night.

A cold sea breeze blew the flag of the Devil’s Snare Ship, making flappy sounds.

Known as the ‘King of the Night Market’, Paglio probably had something on his mind or he just couldn’t sleep. At the risk of being struck by Ms. Fairy Dragon’s lightning, he knocked on Chen Rui’s door before dawn, pulling the sleepy-eyed human to drink wine on the deck.

It turned out that the wines brought by Master Poison Dragon were out of stock.

A certain truly handsome bug had been snoring in the ship cabin, but when he smelled wine keenly, his nose suddenly became longer. Under the guidance of his sense of smell, he ‘sleep walked’ to the deck and joined the team of drinking wine for free.

“Paglio, take these.”

2 things appeared on the deck, a black flail and a ring inlaid with an emerald gem.

The flail was extremely heavy. If Chen Rui didn’t put a cushioned item on the deck in advance, even the sturdy deck of the Devil’s Snare Ship would have been dented.

The dragon’s artifact, Thunder Flail.

An emerald gem ring that held the secrets of a huge treasure.

Paglio frowned, “What do you mean?”

“Nothing much, that…’son of Cairrealo’? Haha! ” Chen Rui raised his brows and raised the wine cup playfully.

“Bastard! I’m not…”

The poison dragon stood up all of a sudden, and before he finished speaking, he saw Chen Rui shaking his finger, “Calm down, listen to me first.”

“ Hmph , say it!” Paglio sat down again angrily.

“I don’t care if you are the son of Cairrealo or the second generation of a rich official. Anyway, you are the Paglio I know, a partner whom I can entrust my life to.” Chen Rui shrugged, “However, how can the dead duck dragon that I know not even take advantage of the free gift? Let alone Thunder Flail, the wealth hidden in this ring must be extremely amazing…”

The dead duck dragon’s eyes lit up, “You mean…”

Chen Rui grinned, “Take the things as well as the treasures and don’t acknowledge the rest.”

“Wait, sly human, why does it still feel like I’m being fooled?”

“The dead duck dragon I know is not a guy who only knows to run away. After all, you have nothing against money, right?”

The dead duck dragon looked indignant, “Of course there is! And it’s a big hatred! So I’m going to imprison them and their accomplices.”

The 2 guys looked at each other and laughed wickedly while the slime also grinned unknowingly.

The poison dragon didn’t pretend to be reserved anymore. He kept the Thunder Flail and the green gem ring, then the 3 cups cheered again.

At this moment, Chen Rui’s ears moved. There was actually the sound of fighting in the distance.

There was still at least 1.5 days to the nearest landing place, the Red Dragon Port in the Red Dragon City, so this fight should be a battle on the sea.

Judging from the sound of the fighting, there are a lot of people — could they be pirates?

The sound seemed to be slowly approaching. Apparently, the fight was moving toward them. Paglio and Dodo also sensed the anomaly.

The sandmen had entered a state of alert under Chen Rui’s order. Chen Rui, Paglio and Dodo had risen into the air. With their eyesight, they could already see that under the moonlight, there were 4 ships in the distance heading toward them at a fast speed.

The front was a large ship, which looked dilapidated. 2 of the 3 main masts were broken. It was propelled by an emergency power. Behind it were 3 smaller ships, but the firepower was very aggressive.

“Get rid of all these guys, so as not to disturb Little Betty and the others.” Paglio said casually.

The slime immediately raised the wine bottle on the master’s shoulder in agreement. Firstly, it was to please Master Poison Dragon for wine drinking. Secondly, because those guys seemed to be weak enough to be bullied by Master Truly Handsome – Master Truly Handsome had unparalleled intuition and judgment in this ‘special skill’ of bullying the weak.

“Don’t worry, I have turned on the soundproof enchantment of the ship cabin, so they will not be disturbed. As for these guys… Let’s wait and see.” Chen Rui shook his head. In fact, the poison dragon was still very considerate, because Ms. Emerald Dragon’s favorite thing was to sleep in late. Usually, she didn’t get up until after 10 am. However, it would be too cruel to annihilate all these lives in order not to disturb her sleep.

Chen Rui admitted that he was not a kind person too. From the crossover to the present, his hands were also covered with blood, but he had his own bottom line. Although in the cognition of ordinary people, his current strength had reached the highest level of ‘Demi-God’ (referring to the kingdom and above), it did not mean that he would massacre and destruct life at will because of his own preferences —— Of course, if it was a pirate who did all kinds of evil, it was a different case.

1 person, 1 dragon and 1 bug flew over slowly. Due to the light, distance and suppressed breath, both sides of the naval battle did not notice them. A ship behind emitted a strong flame that had charged for a long time, “ Boom! ” The big ship vibrated as it was hit by this cannon attack. The tail of the ship was broken into several pieces, and the main propulsion system was destroyed. The speed suddenly slowed down. Almost no one near the end of the ship was spared.

The speed of the big ship slowed down, and the 3 ships behind them immediately surrounded it. Black figures jumped up from their ships and rushed toward the big ship. The command sounded from the big ship, forming a circular formation and launching arrows with the magic light.

Black figures kept falling, but likewise, the casualties on the big ship were increasing rapidly.

The 3 ‘people’ in the air had been watching the fight. Chen Rui had the best eyesight. He suddenly saw a familiar figure at the front of the circle formation.

A man, wearing light green half-body armor, was holding a card with a faint gold edge in his hand.

Swoosh Swoosh Swoosh … The cards in the man’s hand launched out like locusts. It did not turn into sharp arrows to hurt the enemy, but it turned into dozens of images of the knight and soldiers fighting against the enemy.

It is him! Chen Rui nodded secretly.

Clark, Capricorn Holy Apprentice of the 12 holy apprentices.

The holy apprentice was a holy believer directly under the 3 archangels and had been recognized by the 3 archangels. The [Body of Light Blessing] was the most basic condition. Every holy apprentice had special abilities and combat power as well as a corresponding [Armor of Faith].

After Chen Rui got the Snow Dallet Tree in the Holy Light Mountain, he met Clark in the Clear Mirror City of Loya Empire. When they first met, they formed a bond and almost became friends. Later, Chen Rui’s identity was exposed, and he fought against the 4 holy apprentices including Clark, killed Aquarius Holy Apprentice and Cancer Holy Apprentice Murev. He spared Clark and his lover, Scorpio Holy Apprentice April, and got the intel from Clark about Isyorul. Clark made a good impression on Chen Rui. Aside from the identity of the holy apprentice, he was actually a man with a sense of justice and discernment between right and wrong.

The Capricorn Holy Apprentice’s special skill was [Manifestation], which could turn the patterns in the cards into real warriors. Judging from the current situation, he was the one with the strongest combat power on the big ship. Despite this, black figures kept breaking through the blockade and rushed over. Before they could approach Clark, they were already cut into pieces by the countless red light emerging from the ground.

It was the attack of the woman behind Clark. Half of her armor was torn apart. The large fiery red on the armor had faded and turned into dark silver. She seemed to be seriously injured, but she still held on.

She was also an acquaintance, Scorpio Holy Apprentice, April.

Judging from the fact that April had sacrificed her life to protect Clark, the relationship between the 2 seemed to have developed further compared to last time. Although Clark and April were extremely heroic, the strength of the enemies was equally formidable, especially the leading figures. In the blink of an eye, the priests beside Clark were dead again, and the injuries of the 2 holy apprentices continued to worsen.

In the center of the entire circle was a man wearing a cloak, whose face could not be seen clearly. There was a box-like thing under his feet. There were also a large number of guards around. He seemed to be of high status. He was also injured.

The big ship should be carrying the important members of the Holy Church. The person who has such courage to hunt down the Holy Church… Chen Rui had an answer in his mind.

The Black Death Followers!

Those enemies who fought against Clark must be the guardians of the mysterious cult district chief bishop. Speaking of which, Shura was also the guardian of the mysterious cult east district chief bishop.

At this time, the number of black figures on the big ship kept increasing, and the circle formation of the Holy Church was on the verge of collapse.

Although the battle between the Black Death Followers and the Holy Church believers was nothing more than a dog bites a dog for Chen Rui, but Clark was in it. Chen Rui thought about it and decided to help.

“Sir! We can’t hold it any longer.”

“Sir, run away!”

“…”

“This is the sea. This is no way to escape. We can only take risks to activate the seal.” The man in the cloak sighed, “Except His Holiness Vantis, the physiques of other people can’t withstand it, nor can they unleash the true power of the holy relic. I’m no exception to the true strength of holy relic too, but I would rather choose to die with the enemy or even let the holy relic be lost in the sea… It must not fall into the hands of the Black Death Followers.”

The man in the cloak resolutely opened the box, and a white light beam rose into the sky. He recited the ancient chants aloud. An object gradually became clear in the light beam.

Chen Rui could see clearly that it was a light green crown, but the shape was very strange. It was covered with sharp thorns. Even in the position where Chen Rui was, he could feel the intense and incomparably light breath.

The radiance of the crown under the spell became stronger and stronger while a huge and sacred strength spread around. The black figures that were approaching collapsed and disintegrated while the priests of the Holy Church were much refreshed. Even their wounds were recovering slowly.

The 3 ships of the Black Death Followers also began to gradually collapse under the shine of the light. At this time, the Black Death Followers seemed to have sacrificed something as a lot of bloody mist which contained strong darkness and destruction breath spread from the ships.

When the blood mist was illuminated by the light, they disappeared one after another as if a snowflake met fire. However, the ‘volume’ of the blood mist was very large, and it seemed to be endless, so the light gradually began to dim.

The man in the cloak held the crown high, and the voice of chanting became louder. He seemed to be using his body as a medium as his body became transparent.; the light spread over the blood mist.

The man in the cloak seemed to be on the verge of collapse as the hand holding the crown trembled slightly. His arms began to collapse, and the light of the crown was weakened.

At this moment, the thorny crown moved abruptly. It unexpectedly broke free from the grasp of the man in the cloak and flew in another direction.

It was actually the direction of Chen Rui.

Due to the light and direction of the thorny crown, Chen Rui’s location was immediately noticed by both parties. The man in the cloak was startled and was about to chase after the crown when an incredible scene happened.

The thorny crown flew into the hands of the young blond man with a strange onion on his shoulders. The next second, the light of the crown suddenly shined brightly.

This kind of light was 10 times stronger than when it was in the hands of the man in the cloak before. The entire sea area was illuminated as if it were daylight.

TL: Holy Relic? Because he had the creation origin?

chapters.title: Chapter 935: Holy Relic
chapters.body:
Chapter 935: Holy Relic

Chen Rui was also shocked as he looked at the crown in his hand.

When the man in the cloak activated the thorny crown just now, his mind felt a sense of strength as if he felt the call of a certain power. Shortly afterward, the thorny crown fell into his hands inexplicably.

This feeling of the crown automatically falling into his hand was like a missile, that was switched on, looking for the most suitable launcher (or carrier) to launch it. The previous man in the cloak couldn’t bear the power of ‘launch’, so after it sensed the existence of Chen Rui, the crown abandoned its ‘old love’ without hesitation and chose him automatically.

Immediately afterward, a very strong light element power came from the crown, which merged into Chen Rui’s body, producing a kind of catalytic effect. Chen Rui only felt that the Star Power in his body, which had been refined to the limit, was recombined and refined in a new way, emitting purer and stronger energy, then it was fed back into the thorny crown. The crown began to emit an unprecedented amount of bright light.

Even the poison dragon on the side couldn’t look directly at the dazzling light, and he subconsciously channeled out the kingdom power to resist. Meanwhile, the slime, who was almost blinded, transformed into a sucker, deadly holding onto the master’s shoulders to avoid falling.

The light extended to the sea in the distance. Wherever it passed, the blood mist made a ‘buzz buzz’ overlapping sound like the screams of some living creature. It rolled back and dissipated.

The members of the Holy Church felt that the speed of recovery from their injuries had suddenly increased several times, and they were all amazed.

The man in the cloak’s arms, which had almost collapsed, gradually recovered under the action of this light. Feeling the unimaginable power of divine healing, the man in the cloak couldn’t help but be intrigued – He can actually exert such power of the Crown of Thorns. The real strength of this person…

No! More precisely, the physique of this person…

Chen Rui didn’t pay attention to these as his attention was all focused on the special feeling of the thorny crown blending with the strength in his body, which seemed to be a kind of bloodline connection. The spirit power and soul power got a kind of improvement similar to tempering under the different force of the crown. What was even more surprising was that even the original vaguely creation origin in the body became a little clearer.

Unexpectedly, the crown has such a magical effect. Chen Rui couldn’t help but be overjoyed. His mind shifted and he had already used [Deep Analysis]. The progress had changed rapidly. 1, 2, 3… More than half of it had been analyzed in the blink of an eye.

“[Deep Analysis]” had helped Chen Rui get good stuff like the 7 artifacts and the Tower of Glory, but most of them were ‘stubborn’ and needed a long time for ‘thought transformation’ to succeed. However, the thorny crown in front of him was unimaginably smooth. It was like an adulterer and a woman, um , that… an idiot and a miserable woman hit it off.

Chen Rui vaguely guessed that this perfect integration should have something to do with the [Body of Light Glory], and it was also the real reason why the crown came to him on its own.

When the Black Death Followers on the 3 ships saw something amiss, several powerful guardians flew out, wanting to raid this unexpected ‘enemy’. At this time, Master Slime, who had already adapted to the ‘harmless’ light, immediately greeted them. The transparent fist that stretched 10 meters like a rubber shook a few times, and the ‘Saint powerhouses’ who were respected in the human world were annihilated.

For Dodo, who was about to reach the intermediate stage of Kingdom level, these minions were only the background for Master Slime’s truly handsome appearance.

Dodo’s action was within Chen Rui’s expectation. He was happy to concentrate on analyzing the thorny crown. After a while, the analysis was completed.

The original light green of the crown had turned into a white jade-like crystal color. The shape was more solemn and luxurious, and the light released was more pure and soft.

Chen Rui put it lightly on his head. When the seemingly sharp spikes touched Chen Rui’s head, they turned into phantasms immersed in the hair, which merged with his head without the slightest feeling of discomfort. Instead, it looked like the crown of the ruler. His whole body was wrapped with a special temperament of sacred and noble.

This fusion was not only a decoration. Chen Rui sensed that his soul power had at least doubled, and the Star Power in his body had become more refined and consolidated under the previous tempering. The most gratifying thing was that in the spiritual imprint, there was a special insight of the power of creation origin.

Origin law was the most mysterious power. The reason why Chen Rui mastered the complete destruction origin law so quickly was that in addition to the functions of [Deep Analysis] and training ground, Shura’s destruction was the most important reason.

However, creation origin was different. He did not have the advantage of ‘creation body’ like Shura, so he could only rely on his own comprehension. It had been difficult to make progress before, so he had never been able to grasp the essentials. Unexpectedly, he took the first step today —Although it was only a small step, although it was only a trace of incomplete creation origin, it was also an extremely valuable beginning.

On the skill tree of the Super System, 2 additional skills appeared.

[Divine Healing]——The most powerful healing without hidden injuries. It fundamentally repairs the wounds of the soul and body and promotes the power of regeneration. Can be used once an hour. (can lock multiple targets)

[Divine Blessing]—Attracting the holy power, dispelling all evil forces, purifying and transforming physique. Can be activated once every hour. (Can choose purification or conversion mode; can lock multiple targets)

[Divine Blessing] was supposed to restrain powers other than light, and it had immunity to debuff effects such as illusion and poison. This might be a very strong skill for others, but for him who owned the Super System, the functions were somewhat redundant.

[Divine Healing] was definitely an S-level skill. [Treatment] was generally divided into 2 categories: light element and water element. Water element was relatively mild, but the effect was obviously inferior to the light element. However, no matter which one it was, the principle was to stimulate the body’s potential to heal the injury in advance. Generally, every time one receives healing magic, he must rest for at least 3-5 days. If the frequency of use was too high, the potential was stimulated again when the body had not fully recovered, it would cause permanent inner injuries to the body and cause great hidden dangers.

In a sense, [Treatment] was also a killing technique.

The side effects of potion were smaller, but it was also unavoidable. The higher the grade and purity of potion, the smaller the side effects. For example, the 100% pure potion produced by the Super System. Therefore, both potion and healing magic had a ‘cooldown’. If they were used repeatedly during this time, the effect would be greatly reduced, and it would also bring hidden dangers.

Now this [Divine Healing] had no hidden dangers at all, and it also had various powerful abilities such as soul repair, [Regeneration], etc. For Chen Rui, who had many friends, it was definitely a divine must-have skill for group travel and combat.

When Chen Rui analyzed the Crown of Thorns, Paglio, who was eager, had already easily dealt with the Black Death Followers of the 3 ships, not giving the slime a chance to act cool again – Although as a super powerhouse, he disdained doing something to ordinary people, Paglio would not be lenient to those guys who dared to take the initiative to provoke and attack.

The 3 ships began to decay and peel off in the blink of an eye, and the screams continued. After a while, all the people and the ship turned into green mists and dissipated. Paglio’s poison had been integrated with the law power, so with every gesture, he could release super strong poison. Although it was incomparable with Python’s ‘speaking and law following’ might, among the super powerhouse, he was also 1 of the best poison law masters.

This scene made everyone in the Holy Church tremble with fear – The 3 ships that had just forced their side to be almost destroyed, were actually annihilated by that person’s gesture!

Due to the previous battle, the scarred large ship finally began to collapse. The Holy Church believers quickly organized manpower and boarded the emergency small ship. Since most of these people were well-trained Glorious Knights, they appeared well-organized and not chaotic.

The man in the cloak flew over slowly and stopped at a distance of about 6 meters in front of Chen Rui. His position was slightly lower, showing a respectful attitude.

“Thank you for your help.” The man in the cloak bowed slightly and took off the cloak on his head, “Holy Church, Gralin. Smore pays respect to 3 sirs.”

This was a middle-aged man with a thin face. His strength was an intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. The word ‘Gralin’ was a popular existence in the human world, not because of his combat power, but because of his identity – 1 of the 3 major cardinals of the Holy Church!

The positions of the Holy Church from high to low were the pope, archbishop, cardinal, chief bishop, bishop, pastor, deacon, common friar or nun.

In addition to the Holy Light Mountain’s 3 giant leaders Vantis, Archbishop Pusmeer and Eudora, the 3 cardinal had the most authority in the Holy Church. Only Tribunal Chief Judge Seus and Paladin Captain Parsali could be compared with them.

When Chen Rui stole the Snow Dallet Tree that year, he had a brief fight with the 3 cardinals at the Snowy Summit Stage. He did not expect to ‘reunite’ under such circumstances, let alone that this Sir Cardinal would actually be pursued by the Black Death Followers at sea over a few nights.

In fact, Chen Rui and others were not reinforcements. If it wasn’t for the accident of the thorny crown, they might just pass by by chance; they were even thoughtful people who deliberately watched the battle, but Gralin still put on a very humble attitude. Of course, it was related to the strength shown by Dodo and Paglio.

Chen Rui knew that Gralin’s intention was not simply to thank him. The most important thing was the thorny crown on his head. At that moment, he pretended not to know Gralin’s identity and nodded slightly.

Gralin immediately saw that this blond man whose apparent strength was only Warrior was the leader of the 3 people (2 people and 1 bug). He was surprised, and bowed, “May I ask the name of sir?”

“I just happened to pass by…” Chen Rui didn’t want to say his name.

Gralin didn’t ask any further. Looking at the crown that had turned into white jade, his gaze became even more bizarre. Finally, he spoke up, “This is the holy relic, Crown of Thorns…”

“ Oh .” Chen Rui replied casually, resembling Ms. Fairy Dragon. He was obviously planning to snatch this treasure crown.

—— So what if it’s a holy relic? Even the Wind Badge placed in the temple of your old nest is being worn at the feet of my wife.

chapters.title: Chapter 936: My Name Is Arthur
chapters.body:
Chapter 936: My Name Is Arthur

“Are your people all right?” Chen Rui glanced at the church members who had entered the small ship in an orderly manner. His subtext was that a crown in exchange for a cardinal, 2 holy apprentices, and the lives of so many people in the church could be considered fair.

“Thanks to sir.” Gralin, who was also a sophisticated man, suddenly laughed, “Can you activate the divine power of the Crown of Thorns? This is my only request for the Crown of Thorns.”

“The only 1?” Chen Rui glanced at Gralin in surprise. As he waved his hand, a soft white light from the Crown of Thorns above his head flew toward Gralin. Gralin didn’t avoid it, and he felt a sacred strength enveloped his body, echoing his own light element power. Some of the remaining debuff from the previous battle had been removed, and he felt refreshed.

“No doubt it’s the strength of ‘[Divine Blessing]’!” Gralin took a deep breath and stabilized his emotions. Seeing Chen Rui’s relaxed appearance, he was shocked again and asked tentatively, “Sir… Do you feel any discomfort?”

“Discomfort? Of course not.” Chen Rui shook his head and pointed to the Crown of Thorns, “This crown has already recognized me as its master.”

The meaning of this sentence was obvious: The crown is mine.

In fact, Chen Rui did so accordingly. The Crown of Thorns flashed and disappeared into the Super System just like the rest of the analyzed artifact.

This scene shocked Gralin. What Chen Rui didn’t expect was that the cardinal not only did not pursue it, but instead, he showed an excited expression, “Good, good! It’s great! It’s really the blessing of Light God!”

Chen Rui, “…”

Are you alright, you even write a thank you note for snatching your equipment?

Gralin bowed deeply to Chen Rui, “Sir, can you stop by my ship for a while? I will tell sir more secrets related to the Crown of Thorns.”

More secrets? Chen Rui saw that Gralin did not seem to be lying. He frowned as he looked at the large ship that was torn apart and the main body had already begun to sink, “Are you sure?”

“Of course.” Gralin followed his gaze, then he showed an embarrassed expression.

Chen Rui thought for a while and finally gave the answer, “Let’s go to my ship.”

Soon after, Gralin and the church members appeared on the Devil’s Snare Ship.

Looking at this huge sailing ship, which was exquisite and magnificent, looking at the skilled sailors of the sandmen, the church members couldn’t help expressing surprise even if they were not very knowledgeable, but they didn’t ask much.

Under the effect of [Divine Healing] activated by Chen Rui, even the seriously injured people were well controlled. There was a little more respect in their eyes looking at Chen Rui.

Gralin left Clark and April on the deck to look after the believers while he followed Chen Rui into the room of the ship. Paglio and Dodo were drinking wine at the head of the ship.

Zola and others had been informed by Chen Rui in advance to stay in their room.

“Sir Gralin, please take a seat.” Chen Rui said indifferently, “First of all, it was just an accident that I saved you.”

With his strength, he didn’t need to entangle with Gralin at all. The worst case was to throw all these church members back into the small ship or even throw them directly into the sea, but he was still somewhat interested in the secret of the crown.

Gralin nodded, “The Crown of Thorns… is also an accident, but don’t worry sir, you are already the owner of the Crown of Thorns. There is no doubt about that.”

“Did I become the owner of the Crown of Thorns, and fulfilled the prophecy of the church? What kind of savior did I become? Please forgive me… I read some interesting novels recently.” Chen Rui shrugged, “But I’m not a person who likes to go around in circles. Let’s get straight to the point.”

“No doubt it’s an interesting novel.” Gralin smiled knowingly, “Actually, I don’t like to beat around the bush too. I’d better fulfill my promise and tell sir the secrets of the Crown of Thorns first. The Crown of Thorns is 1 of the 3 of the holy light relics. These 3 holy relics are collectively called ‘creation’.”

“‘Creation’?” Chen Rui thought of the feeling that the Crown of Thorns had caused a trace of creation origin in his body, and he was moved.

Chen Rui’s comprehension of the Super System was now different from what it used to be. Since the ‘solar system’ of the Super System was a real kingdom with faith and life rather than an illusory imagination, in order to go further, a more complete comprehension of universe law must be obtained.

Not only destruction, but also creation.

As for the shortcut of Python’s fusion of creation and destruction, Chen Rui didn’t like it. Everyone had their own way of moving forward, especially he who owned the Super System took a different path.

However, in any case, creation’s origin was an indispensable thing for him, especially now that the opportunity was just in front of him, so he must not miss it.

Seeing Chen Rui’s interest, Gralin explained, “It is said that these 3 holy relics are said to be transformed by the gods according to the container of the power that creates the world. They have incredible strength, so they are named after this.”

A container for the power that creates the world! Chen Rui suddenly wondered. Could it be that thing rich in creation origin…

“If you collect 3 holy relics and get recognition, you can get an incredible insight and have a powerful strength far beyond Saint.” Gralin smiled slightly, “I don’t know if sir has activated any special strength. My perception ability is limited. I can only sense that the strength of Sir does not seem to have reached the level of Saint. Of course, the strength of sir’s 2 friends has already surpassed Saint’s super powerhouse.”

“Your perception is not wrong. My strength is only Warrior, but for some special reasons, I have 2 super-level partners.” Chen Rui showed a ‘calm’ expression, but his mind was sharp – The creator of these 3 holy relics is definitely not a god, but collecting 3 holy relics, ‘getting incredible insights’ is a shortcut to comprehending creation origin.

The Crown of Thorns has provided the best proof that this is definitely the way to go.

“By the way, the whereabouts of the other 2 holy relics… Can Sir Gralin tell me?”

When Gralin heard the word ‘super-level partner’, his eyes flashed, and he spoke up, “Sir should know that about 200,000 years ago, in the human world, 3 Holy Empires coexisted. Namely the Dragon Bright Empire, the Blue Glory Empire and the Cloud Rider Empire. The 3 archangels adhered to God’s will and gave the 3 holy relics to the 3 empires as the empire treasure. However, 20,000 years ago, the Cloud Rider Empire was destroyed by the Allied Forces formed by the Dragon Bright Empire and Blue Glory Empire in a crusade. Eventually, the empire was destroyed. The land was divided into dozens of kingdoms. The current famous Starlight Empire is 1 of them. The truth of this war was the crusade against cultists, because at that time, the Cloud Rider Empire was completely controlled by the terrifying cultists, the Black Death Followers. The people of 30 towns were blood sacrificed, shocking the entire human world. Not only that, the Black Death Followers also invaded the elf tribe of the Jade Forest Sea and tried to use the life tree to summon Evil God, which almost caused the elf tribe to suffer extinction. At the call of the church, most of the countries led by the 2 empires united and finally eliminated the Cloud Rider Empire to resolve this terrifying disaster.”

I see! Chen Rui nodded slowly. The crisis in the Jade Forest Sea was resolved by the Old Father-in-law Elf King. Span paid a huge price for this. If Mother-in-law Fairy Dragon hadn’t sacrificed her life to save him, the old father-in-law has long gone to see the Goddess Elf. Until now, the life tree had not fully recovered, and the seal was even showing signs of loosening.

“Sir Gralin means…the remaining 2 holy relics are now in the Dragon Bright Empire and the Blue Glory Empire?”

“Yes, 1 is Holy Grail and the other is Holy Light Robe.” Gralin nodded, “As the empire treasures, they should be hidden in the most secret treasure houses of the 2 empires where only the ruler knows the real whereabouts.”

“I feel like Sir Gralin is reminding me of something? Is it a condition or is it… a threat?”

“ Hehe , sir, don’t get me wrong,” Gralin shook his head, “I’m just stating the facts in good faith. Isn’t sir not fond of going around in circles? To be honest, the background of the 2 Holy Empires is no trivial matter; they are far stronger than what we can see on the surface. Although your strength is extraordinary, no matter what means you use, it is extremely difficult to obtain Holy Grail and Holy Light Robe unless you make use of the Holy Church’s power.”

“Really?” Chen Rui smiled noncommittally, calculating quickly in his mind.

“I’ll be direct, sir. I’m the Holy Church’s cardinal. The enemies who attacked me previously were the ‘the Black Death Followers’ who advocate darkness and destruction. At the moment of the crisis, I opened the seal of the Crown of Thorns with a secret method, but because my physique can not carry the Crown of Thorns’ holy power, I almost collapsed, so the Crown of Thorns automatically selected for you. Your physique …… should be the purest of the [Body of Light Glory]. Just this alone, you qualify for the church’s Holy Child, His Holiness Pope Glorious’ inheritor! “

“Holy Child?” Chen Rui was really stunned. The pope’s inheritor? Is there a mistake?

Seeing that Chen Rui didn’t speak for a long time, Gralin couldn’t help but speak up, “Sir…”

Chen Rui finally came back to his senses and rubbed his nose, “Actually, the 2 words I want to say the most right now are ‘ hehe ‘.”

Gralin showed an excited expression, “Has sir promised to be the Holy Child?”

Which eye of yours sees that I agreed? Chen Rui spread his hands speechlessly, “I forgot that this kind of vocabulary is too high level for you, let’s change it to a common one – not interested.”

“Sir seems to have misunderstood the church?” Gralin was not discouraged, he would certainly not give up so easily. The theft of the Snow Dallet Tree was still a secret of the church, but as 1 of the 3 cardinals, he also personally experienced it at the Snowy Summit Stage event. Gralin and the church leaders were well aware of the consequences of the disappearance of the Snow Dallet Tree, that was, the Holy Church would not be able to convert the most important [Body of Light Blessing] until the Snow Dallet Tree was revived. They would also be unable to select warriors, including holy apprentice, which would cause immeasurable losses to the prestige and faith of the entire church in the long run.

The whereabouts of the Crown of Thorns this time was a surprise, because the Crown of Thorns had a very important function, that was [Divine Blessing], which could convert light-element physiques step by step. Although it could not be compared with the Snow Dallet Flower’s effect, in the absence period of the Snow Dallet Tree’s growth, it could effectively play a substitute role.

The only drawback was that only the [Body of Light Glory] of the Crown of Thorns could fully exert its strength, and it would also cause a certain amount of reflected damage to the user. Currently, Pope Vantis was the only 1 who could do it. If things went on like this, the remaining little lifespan would be consumed prematurely.

However, now there was another talented young man who had the highest [Body of Light Glory], plus he was able to fully control the Crown of Thorns to activate [Divine Blessing] without harm – This is simply a god gift!

So, no matter what, Gralin would not miss the ‘Holy Child’ and patiently explained it at the moment.

“The authority of the Holy Child is equivalent to the archbishop? I can freely enter and exit anywhere in the Holy Light Mountain, including the forbidden area of the church?” Chen Rui raised his chin, and his attitude finally ‘relaxed’ under Gralin’s words, ” I need time to think about it.”

“I can wait!” Gralin couldn’t help but be overjoyed, “By the way, I still don’t know the name of sir?”

“Alright, I’m being rude, Sir Gralin.” Chen Rui gave an implicit smile, “My name is… Arthur.”

TL: Going back to that place again? Will the angels see through his disguise?

chapters.title: Chapter 937: Public Trial
chapters.body:
Chapter 937: Public Trial

“Sir Gralin, my Devil’s Snare Ship will be docked in about 1 hour. What are your plans?”

“Sir Arthur, may I ask, your destination is…”

“The ship will just dock at the Red Dragon City, and my destination is Yerodisha, the capital of the Dragon Bright Empire.”

“It’s such a coincidence that I’m going to Yerodisha too. I wonder if sir will give me this honor to go with you?”

“Sir Cardinal is too modest.” Chen Rui smiled after ‘learning’ Gralin’s identity.

Gralin also smiled, “I hope that in the future memories, this trip will be the honor of my life.”

Maybe it’s your lifetime nightmare. Chen Rui added in his mind, but he didn’t break Gralin’s attempt to follow.

The importance of the Crown of Thorns to the church that lost the Snow Dallet Tree was self-evident. Originally, when Gralin was ambushed by the Black Death Followers this time, he had already prepared for the worst punishment; he would certainly lose his position of cardinal even if he survived the crisis.

At a critical juncture, the mysterious man ‘Arthur’ suddenly appeared, and the Crown of Thorns was ‘abducted’ away, which should have been a mission failure. However, for Gralin, ‘Arthur’ who had the [Body of Light Glory] and whom the Crown of Thorns recognized as owner, was the biggest surprise beyond expectations. Just reporting it was a great achievement. He definitely would not let this ‘His Holiness Holy Child’ leave his vision, so Gralin put down his status without hesitation and became a follower of a certain ‘His Holiness’.

The 3 ladies including Zola, who had been staying in the ship, also appeared, but at the suggestion of Chen Rui, Ms. Fairy Dragon and Ms. Yini changed their appearances. They both wore a veil. Although it covered most of their beauty, the vibe was still impressive.

Chen Rui learned from Gralin that there were 3 holy apprentices escorting the Crown of Thorns. They were Capricorn Holy Apprentice Clark, Scorpio Holy Apprentice April and Taurus Holy Apprentice Kurwich. Due to the intense fighting, Kurwich was killed and April was seriously injured. She barely held on because of Clark.

The Glorious Knights, including Clark and April, still had a good impression of the owner recognized by the ‘Crown of Thorns’. After all, he saved their lives. However, Chen Rui just talked to them politely without going too deep to avoid unnecessary trouble.

Soon, the land was seen ahead as they arrived at the port of the Red Dragon City.

After entering the Red Dragon City, Chen Rui and his party went to the Hall of Light in the Red Dragon City at the invitation of Gralin.

Strangely, Pastor Germas who was in charge of the Red Dragon City’s Hall of Light, was not there.

As Yerodisha would hold a trial of a Black Death Follower in 3 days, due to the special status of the Black Death Follower, Second Prince Garfield specially invited Chief Bishop Wintour of the Holy Light Mountain as the presiding judge. Wintour came to the Red Dragon City from the waterway and left for Yerodisha under the accompany of Pastor Germas.

What shocked Chen Rui the most was that the name of the ‘Black Death Follower’ who was about to be put on trial in the noble families circle was Samuel. Kemplot.

3 days later.

Dragon Bright Empire’s capital. Yerodisha.

Palace’s conference hall.

This conference hall could accommodate up to 20,000 people and was the largest conference center in the empire. Many famous conferences that decided the fate of the empire and the entire human world had been held here. But today, there would be a trial here.

The presiding judge this time was Chief Bishop Wintour who was specially invited from the Holy Light Mountain. The weight of the jury was also heavier. They were led by Lex. Roland, the Great Emperor of the Dragon Bright Empire.

Samuel, the ‘Black Death Follower’ who was being interrogated, was held on the stage by magic shackles. He was unable to use any power. He even lost the ability to speak.

Samuel was the second son of the Kemplot family; this identity was nothing to the entire Dragon Bright Empire, especially after the dismissal of Carlo, the patriarch and former financial secretary director. Nonetheless, Samuel was part of the dragon rider legion; a real dragon rider. It probably also involved some other secrets, so on the advice of Second Prince Garfield, he invited Chief Bishop Wintour of the Holy Light Mountain, especially for this public trial.

“Samuel. Kemplot, everyone should remember the scene when he was defeated by the capital’s top genius swordsman, the Loman Family’s Paul, when he was fighting in front of the church. In that battle, Paul was appreciated by Philip Family Patriarch Frett and agreed to the marriage contract proposed by Paul. The eldest daughter, Joanna. Philip became Paul’s fiancée while Joanna…”

Second Prince Garfield raised his hand to Joanna in the audience, “Was Samuel’s lover who for many years. As far as I know, the 2 almost eloped because of this. It was Samuel who wanted to prevent Joanna from being cast aside by her family, so he decided to run away. He was determined to train hard to win back his lover with his own strength. In the end, Samuel no doubt did it. In the royal arena, he defeated Paul, was canonized as golden knight by His Majesty, and became a glorious member of the dragon rider legion. This sounds like a very touching and inspiring love story. Sadly, no one could have imagined that Samuel actually went down the fallen path for this very purpose.”

Garfield expressed his regret. Joanna couldn’t hold back, stood up and said loudly, “Samuel hasn’t fallen! What evidence do you have!”

“Can I assume that this rudeness represents the attitude of the Philip Family on the side of the fallen one?” A murderous intent flashed past Garfield’s eyes. He ignored Joanna and looked at her father, Patriarch Frett of the Philip Family.

“Stop looking, Your Highness Garfield. I’ve left the Philip Family. I’m just Samuel’s wife.” Joanna regained her calm after being reminded in a low voice by the woman beside her. “I’m sorry for the gaffe in front of Your Highness, but, I want to ask, what evidence does Your Highness have that Samuel is the fallen one? Samuel is the dragon rider and golden knight canonized by His Majesty. This not only represents the glory of the dragon rider legion and golden knight, it also represents the trust of His Majesty!”

These words carried a lot of weight, especially when Lex the Great was mentioned. If Samuel was assumed as the fallen one, it would also question Lex’s vision.

Lex the Great, who had been listening to Garfield’s accusations without any response, moved slightly, and resumed his doze as if he were watching a play.

“If you want real evidence…” Garfield smiled lightly, “I don’t have any; it’s just a guess.”

There was a commotion from the noble families who were listening. Joanna quickly said, “Since there is no evidence, this is a blatant frame-up. I don’t know why Your Highness did so, but it’s Samuel today, who will it be tomorrow?”

The commotion of the noble families grew louder, and Joanna’s sentence was indeed provocative. Garfield, however, was confident. He only spoke up when the voice gradually subsided, “My guess is very simple. When Samuel lost to Paul, he was only at the Master level. When he dueled with Paul for the second time in the royal arena, he was already a Pseudo-Saint. Not only that, just a few days ago, Samuel’s strength actually broke through to the real Saint! It has been no more than 10 years since Samuel left. From the moment he entered the Pseudo-Saint to the real Saint, it only took at most 3 years, and his strength continues to rise rapidly! Have you ever seen such an advancement speed?”

Everyone was shocked. 3 years! From the initial Pseudo-Saint to the real Saint!

“If Samuel is so gifted, why has he been mediocre until now? No doubt, he was using external power!” Garfield asked Chief Bishop Wintour, the presiding judge, “Sir Wintour, as far as I know, even the holy apprentice serving the light cannot have such a growth rate. Instead, the Black Death Follower… has some kind of blood sacrifice ritual that increases strength?”

“Yes.” Chief Bishop Wintour said solemnly, “Most of the high level guardians of the Black Death Followers have gone through this ritual. This Samuel is progressing at an incredible rate, so he is probably a member of the fallen ones, but Your Highness really has no real solid evidence that he is the Black Death Follower.”

Chief Bishop Wintour’s unbiased remarks caused everyone to nod, and Garfield said calmly, “If you really want physical evidence, I still have 1. Knight Trinis, please bring that thing up.”

Trinis was a tall, thin brown-haired man. It was the same guy who broke Samuel’s hands and feet in the Thunder Prison. He came up with a sheathed long sword in his hand. The sheath was dark red and showed a touch of blood.

“This is a new weapon that Samuel got after defeating Paul. It’s hard to imagine that this is a powerful legendary weapon. Even among the legendary weapons, it is considered a top-grade weapon. Even a Saint powerhouse may not have this level of weaponry. I’m curious where this weapon came from. Now, Sir Wintour, take a look at this weapon.”

Top legendary grade weapons! The noble families in the seats whispered one after another, especially the generals and the knight, who were all staring at the sheathed long sword.

When the long sword was approaching Wintour, the chief bishop sensed something. He frowned as he carefully held the long sword, and slowly pulled it out.

The moment it was pulled out, black smoke came out, and a strong destructive breath instantly filled the entire conference hall. Wintour’s hands emitted strong light element power that made a buzzing sound when illuminating the black smoke. Wintour’s hands trembled slightly. He actually couldn’t suppress it.

Wintour was taken aback and quickly returned the sword to its sheath, and the terrifying breath disappeared immediately. The chief bishop exclaimed, “This has the fallen destructive power; so powerful!”

Trinis hurriedly put away the sword. The audience seemed a little confused. Garfield immediately shouted, “There is no doubt that Samuel is the Black Death Follower! Father, I suggest that the entire Kemplot Family be thoroughly investigated! If necessary…”

This was no longer targetted only Samuel, but the entire Kemplot Family!

chapters.title: Chapter 938: Who Are You
chapters.body:
Chapter 938: Who Are You

Garfield’s eyes hid boundless viciousness and hatred. During this period of time, he almost completely lost the most important function of a male, and he was finally aware of Samuel’s secret means. The terrifying thing was that the wound was incurable, and the people he sent to the Thunder Prison for revenge were unexpectedly blocked by the red dragon guard.

Although Garfield was the second prince, he still didn’t dare to offend the dragons of the Dragon Valley. Besides, the cause of this incident was that he tried to act inappropriately toward Veronica. It was a big scandal, so it naturally could not be made public.

A man, being deprived of that ability, it was simply a great shame and hatred! So he not only wanted to let Samuel die tragically, but he also wanted to drag down the entire Kemplot Family!

This time, Chief Bishop Wintour nodded without hesitation. The church’s attitude toward those suspected of the Black Death Followers was very clear. They would rather kill 1,000 by mistake than let go of 1!

Kemplot Family Partriach Carlo was also listening on the side. The former financial secretary director was newly released from prison, and he remained silent. When he heard these words, he finally changed his facial expression.

Lex the Great’s eyes slowly opened, “Kemplot Family has disowned Samuel.”

This sentence cleared the ties with the Kemplot Family, and Carlo breathed a sigh of relief. Seeing his imprisoned son on the stage, he stood up and wanted to say something, but he was pulled by Fourth Prince Luke beside him. In the end, he sat down again and looked like he had aged several decades in an instant.

As an officer for many years, Carlo had understood the intention of Lex the Great, which was a means of balance and a kind of warning. As a patriarch of a family, he couldn’t sacrifice the entire family for this son. Judging from the current situation, with Garfield’s evidence and the confirmation of the Holy Light Mountain chief bishop, even if he sacrificed the Kemplot Family, Samuel’s fate could not be changed.

“Samuel.” Lex the Great said a second sentence, “I want to hear your own defense.”

The guards on both sides immediately released the restraint on Samuel’s speech ability. Samuel did not rush to defend, but he was silent for a moment before he replied, “Your Majesty, I’m not the Black Death Follower. My weapon ‘Flying Obliteration’ was confiscated by the Legion General Commander Fagerius during this period of time. It was entirely possible that it was manipulated. As for the origin of ‘Flying Obliteration’ and my strength… Please forgive me for being unable to explain it.”

Lex the Great raised his brows slightly. At this point, Samuel still wants to hide it — Whether he is the Black Death Follower or not, no matter what forces are behind him… In short, the strength that is not under my control, I would rather give up. That was Lex’s way of a ruler, or more precisely, the technique of a ruler.

Samuel didn’t explain any further. He just glanced apologetically at his wife Joanna and Ina next to Joanna.

“There’s no way to justify it, huh ?” Garfield’s eyes showed a vicious expression, “The evidence is convincing, yet you insist you are not a Black Death Follower. Who would believe you?”

“I believe him!” Joanna said loudly without thinking about rudeness or family. At this moment, she just wanted to be with him.

“I also believe him.” Ina, who attended as Joanna’s maid, did not hesitate anymore, because this might be her last chance to express her intention. Joanna glanced at Ina, and the 2 women’s hands were clasped together.

From the moment Samuel answered Lex the Great, the noble families present already understood Samuel’s ending, so naturally no one would speak.

Garfield looked at Joanna and Ina disdainfully, and he spoke up, “Sir Wintour, I think we can announce the judgment.”

Chief Bishop Wintour nodded, “I announce, Samuel…”

At this moment, a determined voice sounded from the back of the conference hall.

“Samuel is not the Black Death Follower!”

Everyone was taken aback. They unanimously looked back and saw several people walking in.

The one who spoke was a man in a cloak in front with an unclear face. There was a strange creature on his shoulder. There were 2 men beside him: 1 was holding a wine bottle with a frivolous expression, and the other was wearing a white robe. It was actually the clothes of the Holy Church, and the identity represented by the style of the clothes made the knowledgeable noble families look surprised.

“Who are you?! How dare you intrude…” A general immediately scolded, and the imperial guards were about to make a move, but they were stopped by Lex the Great’s gesture because Lex the Great recognized the man in church clothes. He was slightly moved.

“Wintour, you can announce the verdict that this knight is definitely not the Black Death Follower.” The man from the church bowed slightly in the direction of Lex the Great and said something.

“Sir Gralin!” Wintour, the presiding judge, stood up and bowed to the man who spoke.

Gralin! 1 of the 3 cardinals of the Holy Church!

Now everyone understood this man’s high identity, and they all showed their surprised expressions. Cardinal, the leader of the church after the pope and archbishop!

Although the Holy Light Mountain chief bishop had a higher status than the chief bishop of the general empire or kingdom, in front of this cardinal, he could only bow down. Wintour thought Gralin hadn’t figured out the situation, so he explained, “Sir Gralin, this Samuel…”

“There is no need to explain. Since Sir Arthur said he is not the Black Death Follower, then he is not, understand?” Gralin’s tone became a little sterner, “It’s like neither you nor I are the Black Death Follower.”

When Lex the Great heard the name ‘Arthur’, he had a slight shock. He finally turned his attention to the man in the cloak at the front.

The meaning of Gralin’s last sentence shocked Wintour, and he spoke up without hesitation, “I declare, Knight Samuel is not the Black Death Follower!”

As soon as the result was announced, all the noble families were shocked. Garfield didn’t expect such a turn of events. He said angrily, “Wait a minute! The evidence that Samuel is the Black Death Follower is conclusive. How can you judge him innocence?!”

The man in the cloak pointed to Trinis beside Garfield, and said to the man who was drinking wine, “Give me that blade.”

The wine drinking man yawned and glanced lazily in Trinis’s direction. Trinis felt oppressed by a terrifying power, and he couldn’t move as if he was on the edge of a cliff with boiling lava below. In the blink of an eye, his whole body was soaked in a cold sweat.

In front of everyone’s eyes, Trinis actually collapsed to the ground with a ‘pop’ , trembling all over with a fearful expression. Samuel’s weapon which he was holding in his hand had disappeared, and it appeared directly in the hands of the wine drinking man.

Just a look, and the Golden Knight Trinis who is infinitely close to the real Saint…

Moreover, most of the people present did not see clearly how the blade got into the hands of the man.

Many generals stood up with shock. Lex the Great’s eyes became more and more shocked while his fingers had lightly stroked the ring of his left middle finger.

No one on the side of the man in the cloak looked too surprised, including Gralin, but the strange thing on the man in the cloak’s shoulder had already appeared next to the wine drinking man. It also held a wine bottle and started gurgling it.

At this time, the mysterious man in the cloak had already taken over the sheathed long blade. He glanced at it, and said indifferently, “It’s just enchanted with a little dark power. What a clumsy little trick…”

With that said, he pulled out the blade and held it high. Just when the destructive breath spread again, a dazzling light suddenly lit up on the blade.

This light was as strong as the sun, and the destructive breath was instantly eliminated. It was replaced by a sacred and warm light power that everyone in the entire conference hall felt.

Such a strong power of light! Chief Bishop Wintour, with surprise and reverence intertwined on his face, bowed deeply to the mysterious man in the cloak.

After a while, the light gradually changed from dazzling to crystal. It seemed that a crown disappeared from the head of the man in the cloak, then the mysterious man bowed in Lex’s direction and walked toward the conference stage step by step.

He didn’t show extraordinary strength, but he exuded an indescribable temperament. Whether it was Garfield or Luke, they actually couldn’t open their mouth to stop him for a while.

Samuel had been fixing his eyes on the mysterious man in the cloak, and his gaze trembled slightly. Even in the face of death, he had never felt this emotion before. In fact, from the moment the man in the cloak entered this conference hall, the gaze of this golden knight never left him.

The man in the cloak came to Samuel and stared at him, “Sorry, I’m late, my subordinate.”

Samuel’s eyes were actually a little red, and he knelt down on 1 knee. The people around were surprised to find that the power of shackles on Samuel’s body had been released at some point.

“My friend, you are a loyal subordinate who sacrificed your life for the promise of keeping secrets.” The man in the cloak slowly pressed the long blade ‘Flying Obliteration’ on Samuel’s shoulders.

“Samuel. Kemplot, oh wait, you seem to have been expelled from the family, so…Samuel, whether I have strength or power or not, are you willing to fight for my glory?”

“My lifelong honor.” Samuel lowered his head. There was blood on his wrist, forming a mark in the air, “I swear by the blood, I will become a sword to cut all the thorns for master.”

“I grant you the honor of following me, wherever and whenever.” The man in the cloak handed the long blade to Samuel, who respectfully took it with both hands. He stood up and looked radiant like he was a totally different person — His Highness recognized him as a subordinate in front of Lex the Great, in front of everyone.

Chief Bishop Wintour’s mind had been completely relieved: The light power possessed by this mysterious man can only be matched by His Holiness Vantis. How could his subordinate be the Black Death Follower?

“Who are you? How bold of you! How dare you accept the suspect of the Black Death Follower as a subordinate in front of His Majesty!” Garfield immediately flared up when he recovered his senses.

“This is a provocation to the dignity of the entire Dragon Bright Empire! Guards!” Fourth Prince Luke also shouted loudly. This was the time for him to perform in front of his father, and he must not be left behind. The surrounding generals and noble families all stood up.

“Shut up!” It was actually Lex the Great who spoke. The supreme ruler of the Dragon Bright Empire stood up slowly, and his eyes were fixed on the man in the cloak’s blurred face, “Who are you?”

There was silence all around. The mysterious man was silent for a moment, and he slowly removed the cloak.

TL: Your son?

chapters.title: Chapter 939: Arthur, The Returning Prince
chapters.body:
Chapter 939: Arthur, The Returning Prince

Blonde hair, blue eyes, young, and that familiar… face?

All the surrounding voices fell silent in an instant. Even Second Prince Garfield and Fourth Prince Luke looked shocked.

Lex the Great’s pupils contracted abruptly. Feeling the increasingly strong bloodline sense in his mind, he slowly stepped forward.

“Arthur…”

Chen Rui’s heart beat faster when he heard the name called out by Lex the Great, and a sense of intimacy spread in his heart. Many incomplete memory fragments hidden in the depths of his mind began to be more complete and coherent little by little.

His eyes were slightly red. This was an innate bloodline imprint. Even if the memory was merged after the rebirth, it could not be eliminated.

“My son…” Lex the Great’s voice trembled slightly. No matter whether he was the ruler who controlled power and people’s minds before, at least at this moment, he was just a father.

This sentence confirmed the speculation in almost everyone’s mind. They were all moved. This was shocking news – The third prince who had been missing for several years, the controller of the Golden Estate, Arthur. Roland!

Chen Rui took a deep breath. He already suppressed the boiling emotion as he bowed to Lex the Great, “Your Majesty, I’m back.”

The name ‘Your Majesty’ was not a deliberate separation of Chen Rui, but it came from Arthur’s memory.

Lex’s eyes twitched slightly, but he had no doubt at all. He sighed, “Great, at least you are back.”

On the other hand, Cardinal Gralin couldn’t hide the surprised expression on his face. The future ‘Holy Child’ Arthur of the Holy Church, is actually the prince of the Dragon Bright Empire!

Joanna and Ina also came into realization suddenly. They understood something more. Third Prince Arthur was precisely the ‘Richard’ that Samuel had always been loyal to. The 2 women had witnessed Richard defeat the titans and the 3 powerhouses like Orc Kings. Therefore, Third Prince Arthur was a peerless and powerful being!

However, even if Samuel didn’t instruct them, the 2 women would not say much. In the desperate situation where Samuel was disowned from the family and Joanna left the family, it was the third prince who came forward and said, “Samuel is not the Black Death Follower”, completely defeating Garfield’s vicious means.

Next to Lex, the Government Administration Council’s dean (equivalent to prime minister), Old Kovax, bowed and said loudly, “Your Majesty, please forgive my bluntness, His Highness Arthur’s identity is no trivial matter. Moreover, he has been missing for so many years. Should we check his identity…”

“No need, my bloodline sensing talent can’t be wrong! At this distance, no transformation technique or illusion can fool me. Just like I’ve insisted that he’s not dead all these years.” Lex looked at Chen Rui, ” My gut tells me that he’s my son, Arthur. Although… it’s quite a drastic change.”

“Anyone who has lived in an unfamiliar and dangerous place for 7 years will inevitably change. Otherwise, he would have been eliminated.” The person who said this was not only ‘Arthur’ but also ‘Chen Rui’.

Lex heard the heartfelt feelings of these 2 sentences, and he nodded slowly, “I can understand.”

“Your Majesty,” Chen Rui quickly pieced together Arthur’s more complete memories, and pointed to his head lightly, “Actually, I’ve lost part of my memory. Fortunately, I haven’t forgotten the most important things, such as… Your Majesty.”

Lex glanced at Old Kovax, who was hesitant to speak, “Is there anything else to question?

When Old Kovax heard the coldness contained in this sentence, he lowered his head and said, “No more.”

Based on Chen Rui’s current experience, it could be seen that Old Kovax did it on purpose – He was not deliberately fighting against him, the third prince who had been missing for many years. On the contrary, this was actually a tacit play with Lex, further affirming the identity of ‘Arthur’ and putting an end to everyone’s doubts.

It was no fluke that Old Kovax was able to stand on the Government Administration Council for decades as the top minister.

Fourth Prince Luke had the quickest response, “Third brother! 7 years! You’re finally back!”

“Arthur! My brother.” Garfield also seemed surprised and happy, “It’s really you! I never thought that Samuel would actually be your subordinate! It’s just that I’m surprised by Samuel’s strength and weapon…”

“Enough.” Lex glanced at Garfield. “This is the end of Samuel’s matter. Arthur’s return is the biggest celebratory event for the royal family. Everything else will come later.”

“Yes.” Garfield lowered his head with a thick haze in his eyes.

The trial ended in an unexpected and miraculous turn. Compared with the result of Samuel’s innocence, the return of the third prince, Arthur. Roland, who had been missing for 7 years, was the most important news.

The Royal Highness Third Prince was once the controller of the most prosperous Golden Estate and the favorite prince of Lex the Great. However, he mysteriously disappeared 7 years ago and only appeared until today.

For 7 full years, no one knew where the prince went and what he experienced. The only thing that was certain was the authenticity of the identity of ‘Arthur’, which Lex the Great had made known to the entire empire.

Dragon Bright Empire Royal Palace.

“Arthur, remember this Lagoon Blue Garden? Your mother…” Lex the Great expressed a nostalgic expression, “Ikrina likes to bring you here most.”

In Chen Rui’s consciousness, the image of a blond woman faintly appeared. Her face was a little blurry, but the feeling of kindness was very clear. In his memory, this kind of kindness left the young ‘Arthur’ early, just like his parents on Earth. For a while, sadness flooded his heart, but he didn’t speak.

Lex the Great was silent for a moment and patted his shoulder. Lex was very tall, and he looked less than 40 years old. Chen Rui was a lot shorter when he stood next to him. At this moment, the man who tapped on the shoulder did give Chen Rui that familiar feeling of ‘father’, just as Arthur remembered it.

However, Chen Rui knew very well that Lex was not only a father but also a powerful ruler. Back then, he stepped on his brother’s corpse to stand out from the brutal palace struggle and ascended the throne as the emperor.

The Great Emperor’s means and courage were known to all. They could be seen in the absolute domination of the Dragon Bright Empire today. The more excellent the ruler, the more ruthless he was. Once the rule was really threatened, family affection was just a superfluous bond that could be cut off at any time (exceptions were very few).

Not to mention the stories such as the calamity of witchcraft, the Xuanwu Gate Incident, and the candle shadow and the sound of an axe, Chen Rui couldn’t help but feel pitiful because of his personal experience with Raizen and his 3 sons.

“Tell me, my son, what have you been through all these years…?”
