In the eyes of the ‘experts’, this move had not solved the root problem. The crisis of the Golden Estate had not been fundamentally resolved.

In fact, Chen Rui’s real financial resources were beyond the imagination of the ‘experts’. If the Kemplot Family was rich enough to rival an empire, then Chen Rui’s wealth was comparable to that of the entire world. It was not a problem to sponsor a mere estate for nothing.

After calming down the wage turmoil, Chen Rui not only did not go around to attract merchants or open up business routes. Instead, he made a series of strange actions in the estate, such as stepping up the construction of sub-venues, building new shops, repairing roads, and even punishing and cleaning up the relationship network of leaving the business. He showed a posture of preparing to welcome countless major customers, which rendered certain people’s secretly prepared means useless. Many people find it incomprehensible.

Instead of trying to fill the hole, he is digging a bigger hole, which will only make more and more losses. What is ‘Arthur’ trying to do?

No one knew that the Royal Highness Third Prince was actually a tycoon who held countless financial resources and was best at making money with money. This virgin land in the human world was a fertile land waiting for him to reclaim. How could he possibly lose money?

On this day, a huge figure appeared above the Golden Estate, almost obscuring the sunlight above. The farmers working in the farmland below looked up at this figure in surprise.

Giant dragon!

This giant dragon flew over the estate all the way, appeared in the sky above the city, then it descended and disappeared.

Giant dragons all had the ability to transform into human figures. Once they took on the appearance of human beings, almost no one knew where they went.

Since the Dragon Bright Empire itself had the Dragon Knight Legion, which was unique in the human world. As the people of the Dragon Bright Empire, giant dragons were not as rare as other empires or kingdoms. Relatively speaking, the degree of danger was much less. So, the appearance of this giant dragon did not cause too much commotion.

The next day, 3 giant dragons appeared again in the Golden Estate. 3 giant dragons were no trivial matter, and it attracted the attention of many people along the way to the Golden Estate.

On the third day, there were 5 giant dragons. On the fourth day: 7 dragons; on the fifth day: 9 dragons. Observant people had noticed that the giant dragons that fly over every day were different.

One giant dragon was nothing, but there were so many dragons for several days in a row. This was not a trivial matter. The dragons themselves were already the focus of attention!

Under the spread of some people, the news quickly spread throughout the Dragon Bright Empire, and everyone began to talk about it. Does the Dragon Valley have any new tasks to be completed in the Golden Estate?

Before they knew it, the Golden Estate had become the focus of the entire Dragon Bright Empire.

In fact, the Golden Estate was also the focal point of the Dragon Valley.

“ Hey , have you seen the announcement of the magic game? If you go to the Golden Estate of the Dragon Bright Empire to drink wine, you have a high chance of winning the lottery. Just take the registration code on the cap of the aromatic millet wine bottle, enter it into the game and you will have the chance to open a special treasure chest!”

“That’s no ordinary wine, it’s called the yellow dragon wine! Your level of well-informedness should be despised, Flo! I’ve come back from that estate, and I’ve got 1 month extension game rights in the treasure chest. I can play extra 3 hours every day!”

“So good?”

“What do you mean good?! Little Anderlu of Pelin’s family is the lucky one. He got a golden dragon weapon and a dungeon treasure map!”

“It’s better than me anyway. Alec, I only got a bottle of black potion that can increase the speed by 4 points forever in the game, but speaking of it, the yellow dragon wine is simply a delicious gift from the Dragon God! After drinking that wine, nothing that I drink now tastes good anymore, but unfortunately, the number available is limited now. Each dragon can only buy 3 bottles! I really miss that kind of fine wine…”

“Me too. It seems that there will be an event next month. I must go ahead of time. Isn’t there a sentence in the announcement: First come first serve!”

“ Ahhhhh! No, I have to go to that Golden Estate immediately!”

“Let’s go together!”

“…”

chapters.title: Chapter 947: Wine And Old Friends
chapters.body:
Chapter 947: Wine And Old Friends

Dragon Bright Empire.

In just a few days, more and more dragons came in and out of the Golden Estate, which had already become the focus of all parties.

The answer was finally revealed.

The purpose of the dragons coming to the Golden Estate was to buy a kind of wine.

This wine was never seen before and its name was the ‘yellow dragon wine’.

It was said that the Dragon Emperor Pagris of the Dragon Valley obtained the fine wine secret formula from an ancient treasure. Unfortunately, it was incomplete and could not be brewed, which was a pity. Later, by chance, the new dragon rider, Samuel, got this incomplete secret formula as a reward from the Dragon Emperor. Samuel used to go deep into the dangerous Demon Realm for training, and he happened to get another part of the secret formula there. After repeated experiments, he finally brewed it successfully and built a secret wine cellar in the Golden Estate.

This time, Samuel was able to redeem himself. After returning to the Dragon Valley, he presented the best wine to the Dragon Emperor Pagris. The Dragon Emperor was delighted and named it the yellow dragon wine. He also listed it as a reward for the Dragon Valley’s virtual training.

So the dragons flew all the way to the Golden Estate to receive the reward. However, this kind of fine wine was so wonderful that even the most stingy dragons bought it with a lot of black crystal coins, so it was not just limited to the number of rewards.

Due to the limited number of fine wines, Samuel had to use a limited purchase method, and each dragon could only buy 10 bottles.

Even so, the dragons came in an endless stream, and the yellow dragon wine was in short supply. Many dragons went to the lord’s mansion, and collectively protested to Prince ‘Arthur’ who was followed by Samuel, demanding unlimited sales of this superb wine. Prince ‘Arthur’ had agreed, and he would order Samuel to speed up the brewing so as to prepare for a public sale.

This news intrigued everyone – What kind of fine wine is it that the dragons of the Dragon Valley are so eager to buy, and they even go to the lord’s mansion to protest?

Immediately, a group of quick-witted businessmen entered the Golden Estate and made an appointment with Samuel to get the right to sell this fine wine.

This ‘hunger marketing method’ undoubtedly made those merchants and customers more ‘thirsty’. More and more merchants poured into the Golden Estate.

Those who had tasted the yellow dragon wine unanimously agree that this new wine absolutely surpassed any kind of fine wine in the world today, and it was enough to set off a craze all over the world.

In an instant, not only the Golden Estate, but the entire Dragon Bright Empire was boiling.

At this time, under the coordination of Prince ‘Arthur’, Samuel finally began to openly sell the yellow dragon wine in the city. Among them, the most excellent yellow dragon wine was limited, but 3 types of top, medium and ordinary could be provided in batches to adapt to various price points.

Every day, there were long queues in front of the shops. No matter what type of the yellow dragon wine it was, it was sold out as soon as it was launched. 3 branches were opened, and it was still very hot-selling. The yellow dragon wine on the black market was even ramped up to a sky high price.

Under this opportunity, Samuel took advantage of the timing and announced that the yellow dragon wine would officially provide the first batch of orders at the upcoming trade fair, and the first batch of distributors would be finalized at that time. As soon as the news came out, it immediately aroused great enthusiasm among businessmen, including many large business families.

All discerning businessmen understood that the yellow dragon wine was definitely a kind of fine wine that could sell well all over the world. Therefore, the sales scale and sales volume in the future would only become larger and larger. Even if there was no chance to get an order this time, they must maintain a good relationship with Samuel and Royal Highness ‘Arthur’. For a time, there was an endless stream of visitors and gift-givers.

On the contrary, many people felt sorry for the Kemplot Family as they actually gave up such a cash cow voluntarily!

In this regard, the patriarch of the Kemplot Family, Carlo, the father of Samuel, could only smile bitterly. In fact, as a father, he was very clear that this son had no talent in wine making, and there was no secret wine cellar. The only explanation was what Prince ‘Arthur’ said to him at the time, “The Golden Estate is about to undergo great changes, shaking the entire empire and even the human world.”

The real master behind the scenes was the Royal Highness Third Prince!

Perhaps, the yellow dragon wine was just the beginning.

Since Prince ‘Arthur’ was too busy to meet those visitors in person, he sent Stram of the Kemplot Family, the new treasurer, to approach them on his behalf, and gave some corresponding promises, which made most of the visitors return with joy.

During the visit, an ‘insider information’ was also spread by businessmen one by one.

At the trade fair 1 month later, an auction would be held. The final product would be several alchemy works of Third Prince ‘Arthur’. This time it caused a greater commotion as ‘Arthur’ was not only the third prince of the empire, he was also 1 of the 3 major mechanical grand masters of humans! Although they didn’t know what the ‘auction’ was about, there were works by mechanical grand masters, so this time they would definitely not miss it! For a time, more people flocked to the Golden Estate.

Where there were people, there would be consumption. Profit was always the most important thing for businessmen. The originally vacant shops began to fill up quietly. Since Golden Estate had the ‘novelty product’ of the yellow dragon wine, this ‘full capacity’ was by no means a short-term effect, but it would be a long lasting situation.

It was now that everyone realized why Arthur had a series of measures such as building shops and roads before. The so-called ‘experts’ were dumbfounded.

People gave thumbs up to the Royal Highness Third Prince. Facing all kinds of problems, he appeared calm, strategized, and defused the crisis with a breeze. Such ability and demeanor were indeed convincing.

In fact, Royal Highness ‘Arthur’ was very leisurely at present. As the supreme controller of an estate, he didn’t have to do everything himself. As long as he used the right person, he could save a lot of energy and avoid a lot of subjective mistakes. With the dear Ms. Yini and the trustworthy Knight Samuel helping him, he could of course drink wine while chatting.

Chen Rui wasn’t chatting to Grand Master Chique, because Grand Master Chique had left half a month ago. This exchange gave Grand Master Chique a lot of inspiration, so he was eager to go back to study and practice.

Sitting opposite Chen Rui were 2 acquaintances who were also grand masters.

1 was a tall and thin man with handsome features and pointed ears that were characteristic of the elf tribe, and the other was the big bearded hobbit with white hair. His beard was carefully woven into little braids which was in contrast to the messy hair.

“I had a hunch in the Jade Forest Sea that the youngest mechanic grand master of human is an acquaintance! From the moment I entered the Golden Estate and smelled the faint scent of wine, I am absolutely sure it was you.” The old hobbit shouted as he took a big mouthful of wine. The wine splashed on his beard and chest, but he didn’t care. Instead, he exclaimed jubilantly.

“Although I don’t agree with the hobbit’s rude way of drinking wine, I have always believed in their sense of smell.” The elf took a sip of wine gracefully, showing a pleasant expression, “I really miss the aromatic millet wine you gave me last time. In less than 3 days, it was finished by a certain forest hobbit.”

The elf tribe Grand Master Finoia and the forest hobbit Grand Master Bernd.

In front of these 2 credible old friends, Chen Rui didn’t need to hide or explain too much. He said with a smile, “My friend, don’t worry. This time, the wine will absolutely satisfy you until you’re full. You can bring it back if you can’t finish it, haha . “

“A toast to the generosity of Your Highness Prince.” The elf blinked and raised his glass.

“This prince position won’t last long. My friend, our relationship will have to be cleared up again at that time.” Chen Rui shrugged and raised his cup.

The elf grand master nodded knowingly, which meant he understood, just like when Chen Rui had deliberately attacked him when he faced Isyorul. Today, the elf and the hobbit were here just as the grand masters to communicate with the human ‘junior’ who newly advanced to grand master.

The old hobbit cheered with a customized big cup, “No matter what prince or not, it’s for friendship.”

“For friendship.” The 3 of them shouted at the same time and drank all the wine in the glass in 1 breath; even the elegant elf was no exception.

“Arthur, Bernd and I can only be amazed by you. Especially the magic game you showed us. Although it is not an artifact, it is far more magical than an artifact. It is no exaggeration to say that the whole world will change! You’re the real grand master!”

“I can’t bear this.” Chen Rui said a little embarrassedly, “I just got some inspiration. Strictly speaking, I plagiarized the idea of another civilization. The same goes with the magic gun which is an idea from Sir Finoia.”

This was actually true, but unfortunately, the elf grand master and the hobbit grand master didn’t think so.

Bernd said carefreely, “I’ve seen the original blueprint of the magic gun. Compared with the guns designed in your game, it’s the difference between a newborn baby and the hobbit warriors with a battle axe!”

“Bernd is right.” The elf grand master pondered for a moment, and he finally asked a question hidden in his mind, “I have a question, my friend, I hope you can answer me truthfully. In the magic game’s dungeon… what are those monsters?”

“Why do you ask that?” Chen Rui looked directly into the elf’s eyes.

“Before my teacher’s death, he passed on a part of his strength and memory to me, and there is a huge secret in it. In this part of memory, I found something that is likely to be related to the magic game dungeon. Perhaps it’s an amazing coincidence related to the nightmare that happened to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital’s elf tribe 20,000 years ago.”

Chen Rui nodded, “It is indeed related. In fact, it is modified based on… those terrifying creatures behind the fallen one.”

The answer shocked Finoia. Only Bernd didn’t understand what was going on and looked puzzled.

“I want to ask, what is your relationship with ‘them’?” Finoia’s expression became solemn.

“I think you misunderstood, my friend. Let me state one thing first, the Elf King Span, who sacrificed himself to save the elf tribe, is my wife’s father.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “My wife, Zola, whom the 2 of you saw just now is a fairy dragon. This magic game… Uh , it was researched by me and Sir Span.”

Finoia showed a realization expression, and the nerves that were a little tense suddenly relaxed.

Back then, the Cloud Rider Empire was controlled by the Black Death Followers, and countless people were sacrificed by blood sacrifice. The terrifying Black Death Followers not only mutilated humans, but also extended their horrifying means to the Jade Forest Sea.

At that time, the Great Elder Ifrit, the elf, could not resist the temptation and became a fallen elf, which became the beginning of the nightmare of the elf tribe. Ifrit first used the love between Span and Fairy Dragon Meria as an excuse to expel Span, the highest commander of the elf tribe, from the Jade Forest Sea. Then, he controlled the elf queen step by step. Under the collaboration from the inside and outside forces, the Silver Moon Celestial Capital was easily captured by the Black Death Followers. The real purpose of the Black Death Followers was the elf’s holy tree, the Tree of Nature. They tried to use this as a medium to continuously instill the resentment obtained by blood sacrifice in order to open the entrance to the abyss and release the abyss creatures of the world of destruction.

At a critical moment, Span led a large number of humans and dragons’ powerhouse back to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital to eliminate all the fallen ones. At the cost of his life, he activated the power of the Tree of Nature and completely sealed the entrance.

After being rescued by the Fairy Dragon Meria using the secret technique of life, Span was honored as the Elf King and became an unsung hero of the era.

Finoia’s teacher was the comrade-in-arms who fought side by side with Span at the beginning. Finoia was worried that this human friend was tempted by some kind of fallen power. Unexpectedly, he was the son-in-law of the Elf King, and the magic game was actually the Elf King’s work!

Chen Rui didn’t mind pulling the banner of father-in-law and laughed, “In addition to training and entertainment, the magic game can make the player adapt to more emergencies, including facing some terrifying existences. Whether it is us or our descendants. This is also 1 of the most important original intentions of the magic game.”

“Understood. No doubt it is an admirable work that can change the world, and your ambition is also very noble.” Finoia stood up and bowed deeply to Chen Rui, “This etiquette is on behalf og the elf tribe. I won’t say anything courteous. I have only 1 request, which is to promote the magic game at the Silver Moon Celestial Capital.”

“No problem, my plan is to popularize this game all over the world, but the specific ‘release’ time will be delayed for a while – After the popularity of aromatic millet wine, I will take advantage of the momentum of the aromatic millet wine to find the best entry point to launch it. However, I can guarantee that in addition to the dragons who originally experimented with the game, the Jade Forest Sea will be the first place to popularize the magic game.”

“And the forest hobbit!” Old Bernd added loudly.

“Of course, sir hobbit grand master. I’m talking about ‘the Jade Forest Sea’. My friends there are not just the elves.”

“Today I have gotten to know you better, my human friend.” Finoia smiled gracefully, “I’m honored for this. When your chores are finished, be sure to come to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. I have something for you.”

Chen Rui became interested and asked, “What is that?”

“You will know when you come to the celestial capital.” Finoia showed a mysterious smile, “You will not be disappointed, my friend with noble aspirations.”

TL: Wouldn’t he alert the Black Death Followers too?

chapters.title: Chapter 948: Emotion Fluctuation
chapters.body:
Chapter 948: Emotion Fluctuation

2 mechanic grand masters from the Jade Forest Sea, the elf, Finoia, and the hobbit, Bernd, left the Golden Estate.

It was said that the 2 visiting grand masters hit it off with Lord ‘Arthur’, formed a friendship in the exchange of mechanical skills, and promised to craft 2 works each to participate in the upcoming auction at the Golden Estate.

This news made people look forward to the trade fair of Golden Estate – The first sale of the yellow dragon wine! Auction of works by 3 grand masters!

In a short period of time, more and more people poured into the Golden Estate. The hotels were full. The merchants who were the best at seizing the opportunity launched a marketing strategy to cut prices before the trade fair. The trade fair had not yet started, but the entire market had already become prosperous.

The former lord, the Royal Highness Second Prince’s previous move to remove a large number of talents was self-defeating. Most of the new personnel were ‘Arthur’ people. After an open and secret cleaning, the entire estate was firmly controlled in the hands of the new lord.

Garfield’s plan had been completely shattered. This was an upright crush. In the face of absolute strength, those dirty tricks were simply a joke.

The Golden Estate, Prince Arthur, and the yellow dragon wine had become the 3 most discussed terms in the Dragon Bright Empire. The Royal Highness Third Prince, who had returned after missing for 7 years, had become the most popular figure in the Dragon Bright Empire.

Many families who were still on the sidelines could not hold back. They went to the Golden Estate to visit and even pledge allegiance. There were also many forces that were still standing still, which was actually an investment, venture capital. The earlier you get in, the greater the trust and benefit you may gain, but also the greater the risk.

Soon, the triennial human world trade fair began. The Dragon Bright Empire became the focal point of all human empires and kingdoms. Merchants from all over the world gathered together, and all kinds of goods were dazzling.

The host city this time was the second largest city after Yerodisha in the Dragon Bright Empire, Dragon Demeanor City. However, the attention of the main venue was completely obscured by the Golden Estate, 1 of the sub-venues.

An auction at the newly established Golden Auction House caused a full-scale uproar. The kind of free bidding that appeared for the first time created a precedent. A top-grade legendary equipment produced by a grand master was auctioned at an exorbitant price.

In addition to the equipment made by the 3 great grand masters at the finale, there were all kinds of striking goodies at the auction, such as treasures from the dragons, artwork from the elf tribe, and a materials with 100% purity refined by Grand Master ‘Arthur’ himself, ancient civilization battle chess, Peg’s Solitaire, and so on. The entire auction scene was climax after climax. The economic benefits created were huge enough to make any estate or even an empire look up.

This was just the first auction. Since the auction house had been established, this kind of event would definitely continue in the future. In fact, after this time, many estates and empires had begun to imitate the Golden Estate to set up auction houses.

Afterward, the highlight of the trade fair, the commencement of the yellow dragon wine ‘Placing Order Fair’ pushed the atmosphere of the entire trade fair to its ultimate climax. 30 ‘agents’ were finalized for the first batch. Besides the Dragon Bright Empire, there were several other major kingdoms such as the Blue Glory Empire, the elf tribe, and the hobbit tribe.

According to the plan announced by Golden Estate, the yellow dragon wine would gradually spread to the entire human world in an orderly manner. Many merchants who had not received orders obtained VIP cards of various levels, which could provide discounts and increased purchase limit of the best yellow dragon wine. The most privileged VIP cardholder could get priority to the next order of the yellow dragon wine.

In conjunction with the trade fair, the Golden Estate also launched the concept of ‘contribution value’ where the role played in the development of Golden Estate would be manifested in a numerical way. The contribution value included several evaluation criteria, covering various aspects such as business, agriculture, and public security.

The higher the contribution value, the more benefits and benefits one could get. These benefits include many coveted aspects. The yellow dragon wine’s VIP card was 1 of them, as well as regular tax exemptions, tax reductions, auction rebates, auction VIP cards and even priority selection positions.

These measures had greatly stimulated the development of the entire Golden Estate. In a short period of time, everyone had seen results that were astonishing. In less than 2 months since Chen Rui took over, the entire Golden Estate had shown unprecedented prosperity and vitality, far exceeding the state of Garfield’s reign.

Everyone could see that this was just the beginning.

Let alone Garfield or Luke, the ability of the third prince in managing the estate was hard to match among the elites of the most outstanding Government Administration Council and financial secretary in the entire empire.

The Shion Palace.

Garden.

The Royal Highness Third Prince ‘Arthur’, who was currently the most popular figure in the whole empire, was sitting in Veronica’s newly built pavilion, admiring the flowers while chatting.

The garden was still vibrant and beautiful, but the facilities and maids in the Shion Palace were far better than when Chen Rui first came here because he showed strength beyond expectations.

As Lex the Great said, everything could be used as a bargaining chip.

“Teacher, what do you think of this wine?”

Veronica put down the wine cup, and her face behind the veil seemed to have a rosy blush as she praised, “It is indeed the best wine that has caused a commotion in the entire world. Even if I’m in the deep palace, I have heard of the ‘yellow dragon wine’. I heard that such a bottle of the finest wine is sold at hundreds of black crystal coins outside.”

“As long as teacher likes it, the rest is not a problem.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “This time I came here in a hurry, so I only brought a few bottles for the teacher to try. I’ll send someone to deliver a few boxes later.”

Veronica shook her head, “No, I’m not really good at drinking wine. In contrast, I prefer the ‘tea’ you brewed last time.”

“No problem, but only I can brew that.” Chen Rui laughed. “Teacher, please hold on for a while. I will work harder to get teacher to leave this restrictive place as soon as possible. Then teacher can drink my tea every day.”

“Leave?” Veronica’s blue eyes were faintly hazy, and she sighed, “Little Arthur, thank you for your kindness, but… After all, my identity is a bit special, you should not think too much about it. You should concentrate on managing the estate properly now.”

“Teacher, don’t worry, the estate is developing quite well now. That villain Garfield’s tricks has already become a laughing stock.” Chen Rui sneered, “Actually, Garfield’s tricks are nothing, but this guy actually dared to be rude to teacher. I definitely will not let him go easily! Teacher, please rest assured.”

When Chen Rui said this, he kept looking into Veronica’s eyes. When referring to Garfield, Veronica frowned, showing an expression of disgust, but her mood swings did not change at all just like that silent heart.

Even Chen Rui had a hard time capturing her real mood changes.

“Forget it, didn’t you say that he has already suffered that kind of punishment?” Veronica sighed, “Let’s not talk about this. You seem to be getting carried away now. Although I don’t know much about politics, I have seen a lot of things in the palace after staying for so long. If you want to survive or even go further in this struggle, you must remember 2 words, be cautious. No matter how outstanding you are, even far surpassing all competing princes, don’t forget that there is His Majesty above. This is the most important point, you know?”

Chen Rui was surprised. This surprise was not completely fake. He didn’t expect Veronica to say these words. In fact, his real purpose was not to surpass the ‘competitors’ such as Garfield and Luke at all, but Lex, the emperor of the Dragon Bright Empire, the ruler who could use himself as a bargaining chip.

“I understand, teacher.” Chen Rui nodded. No matter what, Veronica’s words were very pertinent.

“Now that you understand, don’t waste your time with me in the future.” Veronica gave him a deep look, “To put it bluntly, Little Arthur, I understand your intention, but I really don’t suit you.”

“Is it because you were the victim of that damn political marriage… or conspiracy?” Chen Rui clenched his fists, “So what if you’re the wife of ‘Arthur”s uncle? Not to mention that the old guy is dead, even if he is still there, I will not give up. As long as I have absolute power and strength, everything will be justifiable! I didn’t have this ability at the beginning, but now, I have!”

“No, even if you really become the supreme ruler of the entire empire in the future, I will only be your teacher and sister, or even… nothing. If you really respect me, you should never overstep this limit, okay?”

“Teacher, you still don’t understand.” Chen Rui sighed without avoiding her direct gaze. He pointed to his heart, “Regardless of whether this guy ‘Arthur’ regards you as a teacher, a sister, or something else, there is 1 thing that never changes, and that is love.”

Veronica’s eyes were a little frozen. At this moment, Chen Rui sensed clearly. There seemed to be a tremor in the silent mind.

“A relative once said to me that to love someone is to live happily with her forever; to love someone is to hope that the other person will live happily even without you. ‘Little Arthur’ does not know what happened to teacher back then. I don’t even know what teacher is thinking now, ‘he’ just simply wants teacher to be happy – whether or not he can have Veronica. Roland. Sherbert… No, it has nothing to do with all the damn surnames; just ‘Veronica’.”

Veronica shuddered and lowered her head, as if she didn’t want Chen Rui to see her eyes. The mood swings became more obvious.

This was the true intention of the innocent Little Arthur back then, and it was also a strong desire that remained in his consciousness. Only true emotion could arouse her inner emotion.

A teardrop dripped from the lowered face to the ground. It soon submerged into the soil and disappeared.

“What if… teacher told you to get out of here, far away from the Dragon Bright Empire?”

Chen Rui’s mind moved, but he frowned, “Why?”

Veronica didn’t answer. She lowered her head and said nothing.

“It seems that teacher is a little uncomfortable today, so I’ll leave first.” After a while, Chen Rui stood up, “I can feel that there is a shackle in teacher’s heart. I will definitely unlock it, even if the price is everything.”

It wasn’t until Chen Rui’s figure completely disappeared from her sight that the faint voice sounded.

“Little Arthur… You’re wrong, I have no shackles in my heart, because I have no heart, not even a soul.”

As she slowly raised his head, tears had already evaporated.

Blue eyes filled with indifference and…destruction.

TL: Hmmmm 🧐, maybe Veronica asked Lex to marry her to Arthur’s uncle, and both their intention was to protect Arthur?
